title: Generalized Global Self-Optimizing Control for Chemical Processes: Part II Objective-Guided Controlled Variable Learning Approach
summary: Self-optimizing control (SOC) aims to maintain near-optimal process operation by judiciously selecting controlled variables (CVs). In this series of work, the generalized global SOC (g2SOC) approach is proposed, which extends the concept of SOC to the whole operation space and uses general nonlinear functions to design CVs instead of linear combinations. In the first part of this series work, two numerical approaches for g2SOC are proposed: the optimization-based approach and the regression-based approach, based on a theoretical analysis of the existence of perfect self-optimizing CVs. The CVs designed by the former perform better, but are usually infeasible for large-scale problems. In this paper, we propose an algorithm called objective-guided controlled variable learning (OGCVL) that combines the advantages of both and has a better scalability. OGCVL is proposed for efficient CV design that seamlessly integrates symbolic and numerical computation techniques. Finally, the effectiveness of the OGCVL method is verified in two numerical examples. Both examples illustrate show that the OGCVL method is able to achieve good results while maintaining computational efficiency and is also feasible in large-scale problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OGCVL算法，结合优化与回归方法的优势，实现大规模问题下高效的自优化控制变量设计。
AI.motivation: 现有g2SOC方法中，优化方法性能好但难以用于大规模问题，回归方法可扩展但性能有限，需要一种兼具两者优势的方法。
AI.method: 提出目标引导的受控变量学习（OGCVL）算法，融合符号计算与数值计算技术，实现高效的控制变量设计。
AI.result: 两个数值示例验证了OGCVL方法在保持计算效率的同时能取得良好效果，且适用于大规模问题。
AI.conclusion: OGCVL方法结合了优化法和回归法的优点，具有良好的可扩展性，能有效解决大规模自优化控制问题。

title: Robust Learning Meets Quasar-Convex Optimization: Inexact High-Order Proximal-Point Methods
summary: Robust learning aims to maintain model performance under noise, corruption, and distributional shifts, which are prevalent in modern machine learning applications. This work shows that examples of robust learning problems can be formulated as (strongly) quasar-convex optimization problems, which admit a benign landscape with no saddle points. We then propose HiPPA, an inexact high-order proximal-point method that employs a model-value gap to control the inexactness of subproblem solutions. Notably, we prove global convergence of HiPPA to global minima and establish that it attains a (local) linear or superlinear convergence rate, depending on the regularization order and inexactness control. Our numerical experiments on robust feature-alignment distillation indicate strong empirical performance of HiPPA and results consistent with our theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HiPPA方法，将鲁棒学习问题建模为强拟凸优化问题，并通过高阶近似近端点法实现全局收敛到全局最小值，达到线性或超线性收敛速度，在鲁棒特征对齐蒸馏任务中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 鲁棒学习旨在保持模型在噪声、污染和分布偏移下的性能，但这些场景下的优化问题往往具有复杂的非凸景观，现有方法难以保证收敛到全局最优解。
AI.method: 首先将鲁棒学习问题形式化为（强）拟凸优化问题，证明其具有无鞍点的良性景观；然后提出HiPPA（不精确高阶近似近端点法），利用模型-值间隙（model-value gap）控制子问题求解的不精确度。
AI.result: 理论证明HiPPA全局收敛到全局最小值，并依据正则化阶数和不精确度控制，实现（局部）线性或超线性收敛速度；在鲁棒特征对齐蒸馏任务上验证了强经验性能，结果与理论一致。
AI.conclusion: 拟凸优化框架为鲁棒学习提供了理论保证，HiPPA方法兼具全局收敛性和快速局部收敛率，在实践中有望成为鲁棒学习任务的有效优化器。

title: Decentralized Conformal Novelty Detection via Quantized Model Exchange
summary: This work studies decentralized novelty detection with global false discovery rate (FDR) control across heterogeneous composite null distributions, without sharing the raw data due to privacy and bandwidth considerations. We propose a framework based on the exchange of quantized surrogate models, allowing independent agents to share low-precision representations of locally learned non-conformity score functions. We prove that evaluating data against these quantized composite scores preserves conditional exchangeability, providing rigorous finite-sample guarantees for global FDR control. Empirical studies on synthetic datasets confirm our theoretical results, demonstrating that the proposed approach maintains competitive statistical power while drastically reducing the communication cost.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于量化代理模型交换的分散式新颖性检测框架，在无需共享原始数据的情况下实现全局错误发现率控制，并通过理论证明和实验验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 在分布式场景下进行新颖性检测时，需要控制全局错误发现率，但由于隐私和带宽限制，不同代理节点之间无法直接共享原始数据，且各节点面临异构复合零假设分布，现有方法难以同时满足这些约束。
AI.method: 各独立代理节点本地学习非一致性评分函数，将其量化为低精度表示后交换；通过评估量化后的复合评分数据，保持条件可交换性，从而实现全局FDR的严格有限样本控制。
AI.result: 合成数据集上的实验证实了理论结果，该方法在保持竞争性统计功效的同时，大幅降低了通信成本。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架能够在分布式异构零假设分布下实现全局FDR控制，兼顾隐私保护和通信效率，为分散式新颖性检测提供了理论可靠的解决方案。

title: Where Reliability Lives in Vision-Language Models: A Mechanistic Study of Attention, Hidden States, and Causal Circuits
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures, 10 tables. Accepted at the ICLR 2026 Workshop on Multimodal Reasoning. Code and probe-training pipelines: https://github.com/itsloganmann/VLM-Reliability-Probe
summary: A pervasive intuition holds that vision-language models (VLMs) are most trustworthy when their attention maps look sharp: concentrated attention on the queried region should imply a confident, calibrated answer. We test this Attention-Confidence Assumption directly. We instrument three open-weight VLM families (LLaVA-1.5, PaliGemma, Qwen2-VL; 3-7B parameters) with a unified mechanistic pipeline -- the VLM Reliability Probe (VRP) -- that compares attention structure, generation dynamics, and hidden-state geometry against a single correctness label. Three results emerge. (i) Attention structure is a near-zero predictor of correctness (R_pb(C_k,y)=0.001, 95% CI [-0.034,0.036]; R_pb(H_s,y)=-0.012, [-0.047,0.024] on a pooled n=3,090 split), even though attention remains causally necessary for feature extraction (top-30% patch masking drops accuracy by 8.2-11.3 pp, p<0.001). (ii) Reliability becomes legible later in the computation: a single hidden-state linear probe reaches AUROC>0.95 on POPE for two of three families, and self-consistency at K=10 is the strongest behavioral predictor we measure at 10x inference cost (R_pb=0.43). (iii) Causal neuron-level ablations expose a sharp architectural split with direct monitor-design implications: late-fusion LLaVA concentrates reliability in a fragile late bottleneck (-8.3 pp object-identification accuracy after top-5 probe-neuron ablation), whereas early-fusion PaliGemma and Qwen2-VL distribute it widely and absorb destruction of ~50% of their peak-layer hidden dimension with <=1 pp degradation. The takeaway is narrow but consequential: in 3-7B VLMs, reliability is read more reliably off hidden-state geometry, layer-wise margin formation, and sparse late-layer circuits than off attention-map sharpness.

AI.tldr: 本文通过VLM可靠性探针（VRP）系统研究了视觉-语言模型（VLM）中注意力图锐度与回答正确性之间的关系，发现注意力结构几乎无法预测正确性（相关系数接近零），而隐藏状态几何、层间间隔形成和稀疏后期回路更能可靠地反映模型可靠性。
AI.motivation: 检验一个普遍直觉：视觉-语言模型（VLM）的注意力图越"锐利"（即注意力集中在查询区域），其回答越自信且校准越好（即注意力-置信度假设）。
AI.method: 设计统一的机械论分析流程——VLM可靠性探针（VRP），在三个开源VLM家族（LLaVA-1.5、PaliGemma、Qwen2-VL，3-7B参数）上比较注意力结构、生成动态和隐藏状态几何与正确性标签的关系。同时进行因果神经元消融实验。
AI.result: (i) 注意力结构几乎零预测力（R_pb≈0.001），但注意力在特征提取中因果必要；(ii) 隐藏状态线性探针在POPE上AUROC>0.95，自一致性（K=10）是最强行为预测因子（R_pb=0.43）；(iii) 因果消融揭示架构差异：晚期融合LLaVA可靠性集中在脆弱的后期瓶颈，早期融合PaliGemma和Qwen2-VL分布广泛且鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 在3-7B参数级别的VLM中，模型的可靠性更可靠地来自隐藏状态几何、层间间隔形成和稀疏后期回路，而非注意力图的锐度。这为构建更可靠的视觉-语言系统提供了直接的设计启示。

title: Reinforcement learning for inverse structural design and rapid laser cutting of kirigami prototypes
summary: Kirigami is an increasingly useful fabrication method to produce shape-programmable metamaterial structures. However, inverse design remains difficult because deployment is nonlinear, and feasible cut layouts must satisfy discrete compatibility rules, avoid overlap, and map one target shape to valid designs. We present RL-Kirigami, an inverse design framework that combines optimal-transport conditional flow matching (OT-CFM) with reinforcement learning to generate compatible ratio fields for compact reconfigurable parallelogram quad kirigami. A marching decoder enforces global geometric compatibility, and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) aligns the generator with nondifferentiable rewards for silhouette matching, feasibility, and ratio-field regularity. Across procedurally generated target shape instances, a single sample from the pretrained OT-CFM prior reached $94.2%$ sIoU and outperformed solver baselines while reducing forward simulator evaluations from hundreds to 1. GRPO improved accuracy to $94.91%$ sIoU and, with regularity included, reduced $\mathrm{TV}(\mathbf{x})$ from 0.95 to 0.81 while maintaining $94.83%$ sIoU. Generated layouts were exported to DXF and laser-cut in $50~μ\mathrm{m}$ polymeric sheets to produce deployable prototypes in $8.0 \pm 1.0$ minutes per part. These results support a manufacturing-aware inverse design workflow for deployable kirigami metamaterials under hard geometric feasibility constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RL-Kirigami框架，结合最优传输条件流匹配（OT-CFM）与强化学习（GRPO），用于可重构平行四边形四边剪纸超材料的逆向设计。该方法通过行进解码器保证全局几何兼容性，利用GRPO优化不可微的奖励目标（轮廓匹配、可行性、比率场正则性）。单次采样即可达到94.2% sIoU，超越求解器基线；GRPO进一步提升至94.91% sIoU，并引入正则性后将TV(x)从0.95降至0.81。最终可导出DXF并激光切割制备原型，每件耗时约8分钟。
AI.motivation: 传统剪纸超材料逆向设计困难，因为展开过程非线性，可行切割布局必须满足离散兼容性规则、避免重叠，并将目标形状映射到有效设计。现有方法需要大量前向模拟器评估，效率低下。
AI.method: 1) 采用最优传输条件流匹配（OT-CFM）预训练生成先验；2) 使用行进解码器强制全局几何兼容性；3) 引入Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）对齐生成器与不可微奖励（轮廓匹配、可行性、比率场正则性）。
AI.result: 单次OT-CFM采样达94.2% sIoU，前向模拟次数从数百次降至1次；GRPO提升至94.91% sIoU；加入正则性后TV(x)从0.95降至0.81，sIoU保持94.83%。可导出DXF并在50μm聚合物片上激光切割，每件8.0±1.0分钟。
AI.conclusion: RL-Kirigami实现了一种制造感知的逆向设计工作流，在严格几何可行性约束下高效生成可部署的剪纸超材料原型。

title: A Unified Lyapunov-IQC Framework for Uniform Stability of Smooth Quadratic First-Order Accelerated Optimizers
summary: We develop a unified Lyapunov-integral quadratic constraint (IQC) framework for establishing uniform stability of first-order accelerated optimization algorithms in the $β$-smooth and $γ$-strongly convex regime. Classical analyses of uniform stability, such as the work of Hardt, Recht, and Singer for stochastic gradient descent (SGD), rely on direct coupling arguments and case-by-case control of iterate differences under random sampling. Extending such arguments to accelerated methods, such as Nesterov Accelerated Gradient (NAG), is complicated by the presence of higher-order state dynamics induced by momentum. We first extend this classical approach with the use of Lyapunov functions to provide a uniform stability bound for smooth quadratic NAG, and supplement this result with small-scale numerical experiments. We then extend this framework by modeling first-order accelerated optimizers as Lur'e-type feedback interconnections between a linear dynamical system and a (non-linear) gradient operator. $β$-Smoothness and $γ$-strong convexity are encoded a sector IQC inequality. Under this representation, uniform stability is certified via the existence of a quadratic Lyapunov function satisfying a finite-dimensional linear matrix inequality (LMI) in the form of a feasibility problem, which can be solved via semi-definite programming (SDP). We instantiate this framework for NAG and show how classical uniform stability bounds can be recovered via this framework. These results underscore a structural connection between optimization dynamics and robust control theory, providing a modular methodology for reliable and reproducible numerical certification of uniform stability and generalization behavior of first-order methods via convex optimization tools that is adaptable to increasingly complex optimization algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的Lyapunov-IQC框架，用于分析β-光滑且γ-强凸条件下的一阶加速优化算法的均匀稳定性。该框架通过将优化器建模为Lur'e型反馈互连系统，利用二次型Lyapunov函数和线性矩阵不等式（LMI）来证明均匀稳定性，并通过半定规划（SDP）进行数值验证。
AI.motivation: 经典均匀稳定性分析（如SGD的耦合论证）难以直接推广到含动量的加速方法（如NAG），因为动量引入了高阶状态动态。现有方法缺乏统一的、可系统化验证稳定性条件的分析框架。
AI.method: 1) 首先使用Lyapunov函数扩展经典方法，为光滑二次NAG提供均匀稳定性界；2) 进一步将一阶加速优化器建模为Lur'e型反馈互连系统（线性动力系统+非线性梯度算子），利用β-光滑性和γ-强凸性编码为扇形IQC不等式；3) 通过求解有限维线性矩阵不等式（LMI）可行问题来认证均匀稳定性，该问题可通过半定规划（SDP）求解。
AI.result: 为NAG实例化了该框架，并展示了如何恢复经典均匀稳定性界。小规模数值实验补充验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架揭示了优化动力学与鲁棒控制理论之间的结构性联系，提供了一个模块化的方法论，可通过凸优化工具对一阶方法的均匀稳定性和泛化行为进行可靠且可重复的数值认证，并且易于扩展到更复杂的优化算法。

title: Active Multiple-Prediction-Powered Inference
summary: Post-deployment monitoring of healthcare AI requires statistically valid, label-efficient methods, but gold-standard labels from clinician chart review are expensive. Prediction-powered inference (PPI) and active statistical inference (ASI) reduce label cost by combining a small labeled sample with abundant model predictions, but both are restricted to a single predictor, a poor fit for modern clinical pipelines that have multiple predictors of differing cost and accuracy available at inference time. We propose Active Multiple-Prediction-Powered Inference (AM-PPI), which routes each instance to a cost-appropriate predictor subset, samples gold-standard labels in proportion to the chosen subset's residual uncertainty, and reweights predictions to minimize estimator variance, all under a single deployment-time budget. AM-PPI generalizes ASI to leverage multiple predictors and extends Multiple-PPI from global per-predictor allocation to per-instance adaptive routing. We derive closed-form Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) conditions for all three decisions and prove, via biconvexity and strong duality, that the resulting fixed point is a global optimum despite the joint problem being non-jointly-convex. We establish asymptotic normality with valid coverage, minimum-variance unbiasedness within the linear-prediction augmented inverse propensity weighted (AIPW) class, and a closed-form criterion identifying when multiple predictors help. On synthetic data and three healthcare monitoring tasks, AM-PPI produces 10 to 40 percent narrower confidence intervals (CIs) than single-predictor ASI in the budget regime where routing matters, and matches the better baseline elsewhere.

AI.tldr: 提出AM-PPI方法，在医疗AI部署后监控中，通过自适应路由多个预测器、按残差不确定性采样标签并重加权预测，在固定预算下比单预测器ASI方法窄10-40%的置信区间。
AI.motivation: 现有PPI和ASI方法仅支持单预测器，而现代临床管线通常有多个不同成本和精度的预测器可用，缺乏能利用多预测器优势的标签高效统计推断方法。
AI.method: AM-PPI：为每个实例自适应路由到成本合适的预测器子集，按所选子集的残差不确定性比例采样金标准标签，并重加权预测以最小化估计器方差。推导了三个决策的KKT条件，通过双凸性和强对偶性证明全局最优性。
AI.result: 在合成数据和三项医疗监控任务上，AM-PPI在预算受限时比单预测器ASI窄10-40%的置信区间，在其他情况下匹配最优基线。
AI.conclusion: AM-PPI是首个支持多预测器自适应路由的统计推断方法，具有渐近正态性、最小方差无偏性和有效覆盖率，为医疗AI部署后监控提供了更高效的统计工具。

title: Spatial Priming Outperforms Semantic Prompting: A Grid-Based Approach to Improving LLM Accuracy on Chart Data Extraction
comment: his is the version of the article accepted for publication in SUMMA 2025 after peer review. The final, published version is available at IEEE Xplore: https://doi.org/10.1109/SUMMA68668.2025.11302248
summary: The automated extraction of data from scientific charts is a critical task for large-scale literature analysis. While multimodal Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise, their accuracy on non-standardized charts remains a challenge. This raises a key research question: what is the most effective strategy to improve model performance (high-level semantic priming) or low-level spatial priming? This paper presents a comparative investigation into these two distinct strategies. We describe our exploratory experiments with semantic methods, such as a two-stage metadata-first framework and Chain-of-Thought, which failed to produce a statistically significant improvement. In contrast, we present a simple but highly effective spatial priming method: overlaying a coordinate grid onto the chart image before analysis. Our quantitative experiment on a synthetic dataset demonstrates that this grid-based approach provides a statistically significant reduction in data extraction error (SMAPE reduced from 25.5% to 19.5%, p < 0.05) compared to a baseline. We conclude that for the current generation of multimodal models, providing explicit spatial context is a more effective and reliable strategy than high-level semantic guidance for this class of tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文对比研究了从科学图表中自动提取数据时，高层语义引导（如元数据优先框架、思维链）与低层空间引导（叠加坐标网格）两种策略的效果，发现空间引导方法能显著降低数据提取误差（SMAPE从25.5%降至19.5%，p<0.05），而语义方法未取得统计显著改善。
AI.motivation: 多模态大模型在非标准化科学图表上的数据提取精度不足，需要探索最有效的提示策略（高层语义引导 vs. 低层空间引导）以提升性能。
AI.method: 实验对比了两种策略：1) 高层语义方法（两阶段元数据优先框架、思维链）；2) 低层空间方法（在图表图像上叠加坐标网格）。在合成数据集上进行定量实验，以SMAPE为评估指标。
AI.result: 语义方法未产生统计显著的性能提升；空间网格方法将数据提取误差从25.5%（基线）显著降低至19.5%（p<0.05），实现了约6%的绝对误差减少。
AI.conclusion: 对于当前多模态模型，在科学图表数据提取任务中，提供显式空间上下文比高层语义引导更有效、更可靠。

title: Path-Based Gradient Boosting for Graph-Level Prediction
summary: We propose PathBoost, a gradient tree boosting method for graph-level classification and regression that learns discriminative path-based features directly from the input graph structure. Building on a previous work, which was tailored to a specific chemistry application, PathBoost introduces three key extensions: (i) adaptation to binary classification through gradient boosting with a logistic loss, (ii) incorporation of multiple node and edge attributes into the path feature space via a prefix-based decomposition, and (iii) automatic anchor node selection based on categorical attribute diversity, eliminating the need for the user to specify the starting point of the considered path features. We compared PathBoost to graph neural networks and graph kernel approaches on several benchmark datasets, obtaining better results in half of them, and comparable results in the rest. PathBoost shows better performances on graphs with larger average node counts. Overall, the results demonstrate that path-based boosting methods can be competitive with more complex black-box approaches.

AI.tldr: PathBoost是一种基于梯度树提升的图分类与回归方法，通过学习判别性路径特征，在多个基准数据集上与图神经网络和图核方法相比表现具有竞争力，尤其在大规模图上表现更优。
AI.motivation: 在之前针对特定化学应用的工作基础上进行扩展，提出一种通用的、基于路径特征的图分类与回归方法，以与更复杂的黑盒方法（如图神经网络）竞争。
AI.method: 基于梯度树提升，通过三类扩展：（i）Logistic损失的二分类适配；（ii）基于前缀分解的节点和边多属性融入路径特征空间；（iii）基于类别属性多样性的自动锚节点选择。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上与图神经网络和图核方法对比，在半数数据上获得更优结果，其余结果相当；在平均节点数较大的图上表现更好。
AI.conclusion: 基于路径的提升方法可以与更复杂的黑盒方法相竞争。

title: Local Nonconvexity Indices for \(C^{1,1}\) Functions via Generalized Hessians
summary: Davydov, Moldavskaya, and Zitikis introduced local indices for quantifying the lack of convexity of a \(C^2\) function by measuring the nuclear-norm distance of its Hessian from the cone of positive semidefinite matrices. This paper develops a local analogue for functions of class \(C^{1,1}\). At a point \(x\), the classical Hessian is replaced by the Clarke-type generalized Hessian set \(\Hess(h;x)\), defined as the closed convex hull of limiting Hessians at nearby twice differentiability points. Evaluating the same spectral functional over \(\Hess(h;x)\) gives an interval-valued local nonconvexity index whose lower and upper endpoints represent, respectively, the least and greatest visible second-order nonconvexity at \(x\). The construction reduces to the original smooth index when \(h\in C^2\), vanishes for convex \(C^{1,1}\) functions, is invariant under orthogonal changes of variables, satisfies a subadditivity inequality for the upper endpoint under sums, and is upper semicontinuous in its upper endpoint. We also relate the upper endpoint to a pointwise weak-convexity curvature modulus and give explicit \(C^{1,1}\setminus C^2\) examples. The paper is deliberately local in scope: it proposes a scalar diagnostic extracted from generalized Hessian sets, not a replacement for the richer second-order variational theory of nonsmooth convexity.

AI.tldr: 本文为C^{1,1}函数开发了局部非凸性指标，通过Clarke型广义Hessian集上的谱泛函给出区间值局部非凸性指数，该指标在光滑情形退化为原始指标，对凸函数为零，并满足正交不变性、次可加性和上半连续性等性质。
AI.motivation: Davydov等人针对C^2函数提出了用Hessian的核范数距离来量化局部非凸性的方法，但C^{1,1}函数（一阶Lipschitz连续可微函数）缺乏二阶光滑性，无法直接应用该框架。本文旨在将这一局部非凸性量化思想推广到C^{1,1}函数类。
AI.method: 在点x处，用Clarke型广义Hessian集（附近二阶可微点处极限Hessian的闭凸包）替代经典Hessian，并对该集合施加与光滑情形相同的谱泛函（核范数距离到半正定矩阵锥），得到区间值的局部非凸性指数，其下端点与上端点分别表示x处最小的和最大的可见二阶非凸性。
AI.result: 该构造在h∈C^2时退化为原始光滑指标；对凸的C^{1,1}函数取零值；在正交变量变换下不变；满足上端点的次可加性不等式；上端点具有上半连续性。此外，将上端点与点态弱凸性曲率模建立了联系，并给出了显式的C^{1,1}\C^2例子。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一个从广义Hessian集中提取的标量诊断工具，专注于局部度量，而非替代更丰富的非光滑凸性二阶变分理论。

title: Sinkhorn Treatment Effects: A Causal Optimal Transport Measure
summary: We introduce the Sinkhorn treatment effect, an entropic optimal transport measure of divergence between counterfactual distributions. Unlike classical quantities such as the average treatment effect, this measure captures differences across entire distributions. We analyze this divergence as a statistical functional and show it can be written as a smooth transformation of counterfactual mean embeddings with an appropriate kernel. This characterization allows us to establish first-order pathwise differentiability in general, and second-order pathwise differentiability under the null hypothesis of equal counterfactual distributions. Leveraging this smoothness, we construct debiased estimators and use them to obtain asymptotically valid tests for distributional treatment effects with a fixed entropic regularization parameter. Because the power of the test depends on this unknown parameter, we further propose an aggregated test that combines evidence across a grid of regularization choices. Experiments on simulated and image data demonstrate the practical advantages of our estimator and testing procedure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sinkhorn处理效应，一种基于熵最优传输的分布间差异度量，并构建了去偏估计量和渐近有效的假设检验方法。
AI.motivation: 传统平均处理效应只能捕捉分布均值差异，无法刻画反事实分布之间的整体差异。需要一种能够度量整个分布差异且具有良好统计性质的工具。
AI.method: 将Sinkhorn散度表示为反事实均值嵌入的光滑变换，证明其一阶和二阶路径可微性，基于此构建去偏估计量，并设计聚合检验策略。
AI.result: 在固定熵正则化参数下，去偏估计量构成渐近有效的分布处理效应检验；聚合检验方法能有效整合多个正则化参数下的证据。
AI.conclusion: Sinkhorn处理效应为分布处理效应分析提供了新的理论框架和实用工具，在模拟和图像数据上验证了其优越性。

title: Auto-Rubric as Reward: From Implicit Preferences to Explicit Multimodal Generative Criteria
summary: Aligning multimodal generative models with human preferences demands reward signals that respect the compositional, multi-dimensional structure of human judgment. Prevailing RLHF approaches reduce this structure to scalar or pairwise labels, collapsing nuanced preferences into opaque parametric proxies and exposing vulnerabilities to reward hacking. While recent Rubrics-as-Reward (RaR) methods attempt to recover this structure through explicit criteria, generating rubrics that are simultaneously reliable, scalable, and data-efficient remains an open problem. We introduce Auto-Rubric as Reward (ARR), a framework that reframes reward modeling from implicit weight optimization to explicit, criteria-based decomposition. Before any pairwise comparison, ARR externalizes a VLM's internalized preference knowledge as prompt-specific rubrics, translating holistic intent into independently verifiable quality dimensions. This conversion of implicit preference structure into inspectable, interpretable constraints substantially suppresses evaluation biases including positional bias, enabling both zero-shot deployment and few-shot conditioning on minimal supervision. To extend these gains into generative training, we propose Rubric Policy Optimization (RPO), which distills ARR's structured multi-dimensional evaluation into a robust binary reward, replacing opaque scalar regression with rubric-conditioned preference decisions that stabilize policy gradients. On text-to-image generation and image editing benchmarks, ARR-RPO outperforms pairwise reward models and VLM judges, demonstrating that explicitly externalizing implicit preference knowledge into structured rubrics achieves more reliable, data-efficient multimodal alignment, revealing that the bottleneck is the absence of a factorized interface, not a deficit of knowledge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Auto-Rubric as Reward (ARR)框架，通过将隐式偏好知识显式化为可分解的评估准则，结合Rubric Policy Optimization (RPO)将结构化多维评估蒸馏为鲁棒二元奖励，在文本到图像生成和图像编辑任务中优于传统奖励模型和VLM裁判，证明多模态对齐的瓶颈在于缺乏分解接口而非知识缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有的RLHF方法将人类偏好的组合式、多维结构简化为标量或成对标签，导致偏好信息丢失并易受奖励篡改攻击；虽然Rubrics-as-Reward方法尝试通过显式准则恢复结构，但生成同时可靠、可扩展且数据高效的准则仍是开放问题。
AI.method: 提出ARR框架：在成对比较前，将VLM内化的偏好知识外化为提示特定的准则，将整体意图转化为独立可验证的质量维度，抑制位置偏差等评估偏见，支持零样本和小样本场景；在此基础上提出RPO，将ARR的结构化多维评估蒸馏为鲁棒二元奖励，替代不透明的标量回归，通过准则条件化的偏好决策稳定策略梯度。
AI.result: 在文本到图像生成和图像编辑基准上，ARR-RPO优于成对奖励模型和VLM裁判，实现更可靠、更数据高效的多模态对齐。
AI.conclusion: 显式地将隐式偏好知识外化为结构化准则能够实现更可靠的多模态对齐，揭示出瓶颈在于缺乏可分解的接口而非知识本身的缺陷。

title: Distributional Reinforcement Learning via the Cramér Distance
summary: This paper explores the application of the Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) algorithm within a Distributional Reinforcement Learning setting and introduces an implementation of such algorithm named Cramér-based Distributional Soft Actor-Critic (C-DSAC). The novel approach employs distributional reinforcement learning to represent state-action values, and minimizes the squared Cramér distance for learning the distribution. Empirical results across various robotic benchmarks indicate that our algorithm surpasses the performance of baseline SAC and contemporary distributional methods, with the performance advantage becoming increasingly pronounced in high-complexity environments. To explain the efficiency of the new approach, we conduct an analysis showing that its superior performance is partly due to \textit{confidence-driven} Q-value updates: High-variance target distributions (low confidence in target) lead to more conservative model updates, thereby attenuating the impact of overestimated values. This work deepens the understanding of distributional reinforcement learning, offering insights into the algorithmic mechanisms governing convergence and value estimation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Cramér距离的分布式Soft Actor-Critic算法(C-DSAC)，在分布式强化学习框架下通过最小化平方Cramér距离学习状态-动作值分布，在机器人基准测试中超越SAC等基线方法，且优势在复杂环境中更显著。性能提升部分归因于置信度驱动的Q值更新机制。
AI.motivation: 探索SAC算法在分布式强化学习中的应用，克服传统SAC在复杂环境中值估计偏差问题，提升算法在机器人控制任务中的性能和稳定性。
AI.method: 提出C-DSAC算法：采用分布式强化学习表示状态-动作值分布，以平方Cramér距离作为分布学习的目标函数，通过最小化该距离来更新值分布。
AI.result: 在多个机器人基准测试中，C-DSAC性能优于SAC基线及其他分布式方法；在复杂环境中优势更为显著。
AI.conclusion: C-DSAC的优越性能部分归因于置信度驱动的Q值更新机制——高方差目标分布（低置信度）导致更保守的模型更新，从而缓解过估计问题；研究深化了对分布式强化学习收敛机制和值估计的理解。

title: Optimal Acceleration for Proximal Minimization of the Sum of Convex and Strongly Convex Functions
summary: When minimizing the sum of a convex and a strongly convex function, or when finding the zero of the sum of a monotone operator and a strongly monotone operator, Chambolle and Pock (2010) and Davis and Yin (2015) proposed accelerated mechanisms that achieve an $\mathcal{O}(1/N^2)$ convergence rate for the squared distance to the solution, but the optimality of this rate was not established. In this work, we present Fast Douglas--Rachford Splitting (FDR), an accelerated method that improves the constants established in the prior works, and provide a complexity lower bound establishing that both the $\mathcal{O}(1/N^2)$ convergence rate and the leading-order constant of FDR's rate are optimal.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Fast Douglas-Rachford Splitting (FDR)方法，在凸+强凸函数求和或单调+强单调算子求零问题中，改进了Chambolle-Pock(2010)和Davis-Yin(2015)的加速机制的常数，并证明了O(1/N²)收敛速率及FDR领先常数的最优性。
AI.motivation: Chambolle-Pock(2010)和Davis-Yin(2015)提出的加速机制虽然达到了O(1/N²)收敛速率，但其最优性未被建立，且常数有待改进。
AI.method: 提出Fast Douglas-Rachford Splitting (FDR)方法，通过改进加速机制中的常数实现更优的收敛性能。
AI.result: FDR方法改进了先前工作的常数，并提供了复杂度下界，证明O(1/N²)收敛速率和FDR的领先常数均为最优。
AI.conclusion: FDR在凸+强凸求和及单调+强单调算子求零问题中达到最优的O(1/N²)收敛速率，且领先常数不可改进。

title: Sliced Inner Product Gromov-Wasserstein Distances
summary: The Gromov-Wasserstein (GW) problem provides a framework for aligning heterogeneous datasets by matching their intrinsic geometry, but its statistical and computational scaling remains an issue for high-dimensional problems. Slicing techniques offer an appealing route to scalability, but, unlike Wasserstein distances, GW problems do not generally admit closed-form solutions in one-dimension. We resolve this problem for the GW problem with inner product cost (IGW), propose a sliced IGW distance that enjoys a natural rotational invariance property, and comprehensively study its structural and computational properties. Numerical experiments validating our theory are presented, followed by applications to heterogeneous clustering of text data and language model representation comparison.

AI.tldr: 针对Gromov-Wasserstein问题在高维数据中对齐异构数据集时的统计和计算扩展瓶颈，本文聚焦于内积成本下的GW问题（IGW），提出了一种具有自然旋转不变性的切片IGW距离，并系统研究了其结构与计算性质。实验验证了理论，并应用于文本异构聚类和语言模型表示比较。
AI.motivation: Gromov-Wasserstein（GW）问题虽能通过匹配内在几何来对齐异构数据集，但在高维场景下其统计与计算扩展性存在瓶颈。切片技术虽为Wasserstein距离提供了可扩展路径，但GW问题在一维情况下通常不存在闭式解，制约了其实际应用效率。
AI.method: 针对内积成本下的GW问题（IGW），提出切片IGW距离，利用旋转不变性设计切片策略，使问题在一维情形下获得可求解形式，并系统分析其结构与计算性质。
AI.result: 理论验证了所提切片IGW距离的性质，数值实验证实了方法的有效性，并在文本异构聚类和语言模型表示比较任务中展示了实际应用效果。
AI.conclusion: 切片IGW距离有效解决了GW问题在一维无闭式解的难点，兼具旋转不变性和计算可扩展性，为高维异构数据对齐提供了新的高效工具。

title: Embeddings for Preferences, Not Semantics
summary: Modern AI is opening the door to collective decision-making in which participants express their views as free-form text rather than voting on a fixed set of candidates. A natural idea is to embed these opinions in a vector space so that the substantial literature on facility location problems and fair clustering can be brought to bear. But standard text embeddings measure semantic similarity, whereas distances in facility location problems and fair clustering require what we call \textit{preferential similarity}: a participant's agreement with a piece of text should be inversely related to their distance from it. Off-the-shelf embeddings inherit a coarse preference signal through a correlation between semantic and preferential similarity, but fail to capture preferences when the correlation breaks. We formalize this as an invariance problem: text embedding models encode both a preference-relevant signal (stance and values) and semantic nuisance (style and wording), and the two are observationally correlated, so a geometry that relies on nuisance can appear preference-correct even when it is not. We show that synthetic training data designed to break this correlation provably shifts the optimal scorer away from nuisance-dominated cosine and significantly improves preference prediction across 11 online deliberation datasets.

AI.tldr: 现代AI利用自由文本进行集体决策时，标准文本嵌入衡量语义相似性而非偏好相似性（参与者对文本的赞同度与距离成反比）。本文形式化了语义干扰（风格措辞）与偏好信号（立场价值观）的混淆问题，提出通过合成训练数据打破相关性，在11个在线讨论数据集上显著提升偏好预测。
AI.motivation: 现有设施选址和公平聚类文献需要偏好相似性（距离与赞同度成反比），但标准文本嵌入仅衡量语义相似性，二者在语义干扰（风格措辞）与偏好信号（立场价值观）混淆时失效。
AI.method: 形式化为不变性优化问题：设计合成训练数据，打破偏好信号与语义干扰之间的观测相关性，使优化器从依赖干扰的余弦相似度转向更鲁棒的表示。
AI.result: 在11个在线讨论数据集上，该方法显著优于依赖语义干扰的余弦相似度，偏好预测性能大幅提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦偏好信号与语义干扰的合成数据训练，可有效桥接文本嵌入与偏好相似性之间的差距，为自由文本集体决策提供更可靠的几何基础。

title: Geometry-free prediction of inertial lift forces in microfluidic devices using deep learning
summary: Inertial microfluidic devices (IMDs) offer low-cost, high-throughput alternative techniques for many traditional particle- (or cell-) manipulation tasks, but simulating them requires being able to predict particle migration, and thus particle lift forces, under a variety of possible channel geometries. Recent work has demonstrated that machine learning models can be used to drastically speed up these numerical simulations, but doing so required training individual models for every unique channel cross-section type (e.g., rectangular, triangular) -- shifting the burden from the simulation step to the training step. In this paper, we develop a novel approach for predicting particle lift forces that contains no explicit geometric parameters. We train a neural network model using a new parameter set and show that while it performs comparably to existing models on channel geometries in the training set, it is able to generalize to unseen channel geometries far more effectively. We show that the lift force model developed herein can be easily transferred to particle tracing simulation software, where it is capable of predicting particle migration patterns consistent with the literature across a variety of channel designs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种不含显式几何参数的新方法，利用新参数集训练神经网络模型预测惯性微流控器件中的粒子升力，该模型在已知通道几何形状上表现与现有模型相当，但能更有效地泛化到未见过的通道几何形状，并可直接迁移到粒子追踪仿真软件中预测粒子迁移模式。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习模型虽能加速惯性微流控器件的数值模拟，但需要为每种通道截面类型（如矩形、三角形）单独训练模型，将计算负担从仿真步骤转移到训练步骤，缺乏跨几何形状的泛化能力。
AI.method: 开发一种不含显式几何参数的新方法，使用新的参数集训练神经网络模型来预测粒子升力。
AI.result: 该模型在训练集中已知通道几何形状上表现与现有模型相当，但在未见过的通道几何形状上展现出更优的泛化能力，且可轻松迁移到粒子追踪仿真软件中预测粒子迁移模式，结果与文献一致。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无显式几何参数方法有效解决了现有模型需要为每种通道截面单独训练的局限，显著提升了跨几何形状的泛化能力，为惯性微流控器件的快速仿真提供了更通用的解决方案。

title: On the Stationary Duality of Structural Composite Cardinality Optimization
summary: Simple cardinality refers to counting nonzero elements of an independent variable satisfying certain properties. Composite cardinality is a simple counting process composited with an affine mapping, and is therefore more complicated than the simple cardinality. We study the composite cardinality optimization problem (CCOP) with structures covering a wide range of applications. Through the use of the stationary duality, we reduce the composite counting to simple counting, and thereby obtain a dual formulation of CCOP. For both primal and dual problems, we investigate the sufficient conditions for the existence of global solutions. Those conditions are validated on representative examples from existing literature. We then show that local solutions of the primal and dual problems are equivalent to their stationary points. This result further helps us establish a one-to-one correspondences between primal and dual local solutions. We also demonstrate that the correspondence holds for a pair of global solutions to the primal and dual problems, provided that the dual weighted parameters are appropriately selected. The reported theoretical results lay foundation for developing numerical algorithms for CCOP in future.

AI.tldr: 本文研究复合基数优化问题（CCOP），通过平稳对偶性将复合计数简化为简单计数，建立了原问题与对偶问题的全局解存在条件、局部解与驻点的等价性，以及原对偶局部解的一一对应关系，为后续算法开发奠定理论基础。
AI.motivation: 复合基数优化问题（CCOP）涵盖广泛的实际应用，但由于复合计数比简单计数更为复杂，缺乏系统的理论分析框架。本文旨在通过平稳对偶性建立CCOP的理论基础。
AI.method: 利用平稳对偶性（stationary duality）将复合计数约简为简单计数，从而得到CCOP的对偶形式；分别研究原问题和对偶问题全局解存在的充分条件，并通过文献中的代表性实例验证；证明原问题和对偶问题的局部解与其驻点等价，并建立原对偶局部解的一一对应关系；进一步说明在适当选择对偶加权参数时，该对应关系也适用于全局解对。
AI.result: 给出了原问题和对偶问题全局解存在的充分条件，并通过文献实例验证；证明了局部解与驻点的等价性；建立了原问题与对偶问题局部解的一一对应关系；证明了在适当选择对偶加权参数时，该对应关系可推广至全局解对。
AI.conclusion: 本文为复合基数优化问题提供了完整的理论框架，包括解的存在性、局部解与驻点的关系以及原对偶对应关系，为未来开发CCOP数值算法奠定了理论基础。

title: Learnability and Competition in High-Dimensional Multi-Component ICA
summary: Independent Component Analysis (ICA) is a foundational tool for unsupervised representation learning, yet its high-dimensional theory remains largely limited to single-component recovery. We develop an asymptotically exact mean-field theory for multi-component online ICA, capturing the coupling induced by simultaneous learning and orthogonalization. In the high-dimensional limit, the joint empirical distribution of learned estimates and ground-truth components converges to a deterministic process, yielding a closed ODE system for the overlap matrix between learned directions and true components. This characterization reveals a genuinely multi-component, initialization-driven phase structure: a decoupled regime, where estimates align with distinct components and evolve nearly independently, and a competition regime, where overlapping initializations induce orthogonality-driven conflicts, slow reorientation, and delayed convergence. Our steady-state analysis gives explicit learnability boundaries and competition conditions linking step size, data moments, and initialization. These conditions show that larger higher-order moments and competition shrink the stable learning-rate window, increase convergence times, and predict a staircase phenomenon in which the number of recoverable components changes discretely with the learning rate. Experiments on synthetic data and hyperspectral remote sensing data validate the predicted trajectories and phase behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文为多分量在线ICA开发了渐近精确的平均场理论，揭示了由同步学习和正交化引起的耦合动力学，并通过闭合ODE系统刻画了重叠矩阵的演化，发现了初始化驱动的解耦与竞争两种相态，以及由此产生的学习率窗口收缩、收敛延迟和阶梯现象。
AI.motivation: ICA是高维无监督表示学习的基础工具，但其高维理论长期局限于单分量恢复，缺乏对多分量同时学习中分量间耦合效应的理论理解。
AI.method: 采用平均场理论方法，在高维极限下将学习估计与真实分量的联合经验分布收敛为确定性过程，导出重叠矩阵的闭合ODE系统，并进行稳态分析。
AI.result: 发现了多分量ICA中初始化驱动的两种相态（解耦与竞争）；给出了显式的可学习性边界和竞争条件；证明了高阶矩增大和竞争会缩小稳定学习率窗口、增加收敛时间；预测了阶梯现象（可恢复分量数随学习率离散变化）。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立的多分量ICA平均场理论首次完整刻画了分量间的耦合动力学，理论预测在合成数据和遥感数据上得到验证。

title: On Distinguishing Capability Elicitation from Capability Creation in Post-Training: A Free-Energy Perspective
summary: Debates about large language model post-training often treat supervised fine-tuning (SFT) as imitation and reinforcement learning (RL) as discovery. But this distinction is too coarse. What matters is whether a training procedure increases the probability of behaviors the pretrained model could already produce, or whether it changes what the model can practically reach. We argue that post-training research should distinguish between capability elicitation and capability creation. We make this distinction operational by introducing the notion of accessible support: the set of behaviors that a model can practically produce under finite budgets. Post-training that reweights behaviors within this support is capability elicitation; whereas changing the support itself corresponds to capability creation. We develop this argument through a free-energy view of post-training. SFT and RL can both be seen as reweighting a pretrained reference distribution, only with different external signals. Demonstration signals define low-energy behavior for SFT, and reward signals define low-energy behavior for RL. When the update remains close to the base model, the main effect is local reweighting, not capability creation. Within this framework, the central question is no longer whether post-training is framed as SFT or RL, but whether it reweights behaviors already within reach, or instead expands the model's reachable behavioral space through search, interaction, tool use, or the incorporation of new information.

AI.tldr: 本文提出后训练研究的核心区分应在于能力激发（capability elicitation）与能力创造（capability creation），而非简单地以SFT和RL划界。通过“可及支持”（accessible support）概念和自由能视角，论证SFT与RL本质上都是对预训练参考分布的重加权，区别仅在于使用演示信号或奖励信号来定义低能行为。关键问题在于训练过程是在已有行为空间内重加权，还是通过搜索、交互、工具使用或新信息扩展模型的可达行为空间。
AI.motivation: 现有讨论将SFT视为模仿、RL视为发现，但这种区分过于粗糙，无法准确刻画后训练的本质作用。作者希望建立一个更精确的理论框架来理解不同后训练方法的实际效果。
AI.method: 引入“可及支持”概念——模型在有限预算下实际能产生的行为集合；通过自由能视角统一分析SFT和RL，将两者都视为对预训练参考分布的重加权，演示信号或奖励信号分别定义低能行为区域。
AI.result: SFT和RL在更新幅度受限时主要产生局部重加权效果而非能力创造；后训练的核心区分标准是是否改变模型的可达行为空间（可及支持），而非采用SFT还是RL的形式。
AI.conclusion: 后训练研究的核心问题应从“SFT还是RL”转向“重加权已有行为还是扩展可达行为空间”，后者可通过搜索、交互、工具使用或新信息整合实现。

title: BaLoRA: Bayesian Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Scale Models
summary: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become the standard for fine-tuning large pre-trained models at reduced computational cost. However, its low-rank point-estimate updates limit expressiveness, leave a persistent gap relative to full fine-tuning accuracy, and provide no built-in uncertainty quantification, limiting its applicability in settings where reliability matters as much as accuracy. We introduce BaLoRA, a Bayesian extension of LoRA with a novel input-adaptive Bayesian parameterization of LoRA matrices that adds minimal parameters and compute. Surprisingly, not only does the Bayesian extension yield well-calibrated uncertainty estimates, but the adaptive noise injection underlying our approach also significantly improves prediction accuracy, narrowing the gap with full fine-tuning across both natural language reasoning and vision tasks. When applied to band gap prediction in metal-organic frameworks, BaLoRA produces zero-shot test-time uncertainty estimates that correlate more strongly with model error than a trained ensemble of LoRA models, and improve monotonically with compute without sacrificing accuracy.

AI.tldr: BaLoRA是一种贝叶斯扩展的低秩适配方法，通过输入自适应参数化引入少量参数和计算，不仅提供校准的不确定性估计，还通过自适应噪声注入显著提升预测精度，缩小与全参数微调的差距，并在新材料预测中实现与模型误差高度相关的零样本不确定性估计。
AI.motivation: LoRA虽然降低了微调大模型的计算成本，但其低缺点估计更新存在表达能力不足、与全参数微调存在精度差距、且缺乏内置不确定性量化能力，限制了其在可靠性要求高的场景中的应用。
AI.method: 提出BaLoRA，在LoRA基础上引入贝叶斯扩展，采用新颖的输入自适应贝叶斯参数化方式对LoRA矩阵进行建模，仅增加极少的参数和计算量。
AI.result: 贝叶斯扩展不仅产生了校准良好的不确定性估计，而且自适应噪声注入显著提升了预测精度，缩小了与全参数微调在自然语言推理和视觉任务上的差距。在MOF材料带隙预测中，BaLoRA的零样本测试不确定性估计与模型误差的相关性优于训练好的LoRA集成，且在不牺牲精度的情况下随计算量单调提升。
AI.conclusion: BaLoRA通过贝叶斯扩展和自适应噪声注入，在保持低计算成本的同时实现了精度提升和可靠的不确定性量化，尤其适用于对可靠性有高要求的应用场景。

title: On Composite Adaptive Continuous Finite-Time Control of a class of Euler-Lagrange systems
summary: In this paper, we propose several set-point control schemes for achieving finite-time regulation in a class of Euler--Lagrange systems with $n$ degrees of freedom and uncertain potential energy. The proposed controllers are based on composite adaptive control approaches. Each control scheme consists of two main components: a Proportional--Derivative (PD)-based nonlinear feedback term and a finite-time parameter estimation law. The estimation laws rely on the Dynamic Regressor Extension and Mixing (DREM) technique, which can be designed using either the Kreisselmeier or the least-squares dynamic regressor extensions. These results extend recent advances in finite-time adaptive control for Euler-Lagrange systems. To the best of the authors' knowledge, the composite adaptive control formulation proposed here, which does not employ well-known Slotine and Li adaptive control structure, has not been studied in detail yet. The properties of the proposed controllers are rigorously analyzed using Lyapunov methods. The performance of the controllers is thoroughly evaluated through extensive simulation studies.

AI.tldr: 本文针对一类具有不确定势能的n自由度欧拉-拉格朗日系统，提出了几种基于复合自适应控制的有限时间设定点控制方案。控制器由PD非线性反馈项和基于DREM技术的有限时间参数估计律组成，并经过Lyapunov方法严格分析和仿真验证。
AI.motivation: 现有欧拉-拉格朗日系统的有限时间自适应控制研究有限，且尚未有研究详细探讨未采用Slotine和Li结构的复合自适应控制公式。
AI.method: 采用复合自适应控制方法，控制器由PD基非线性反馈和有限时间参数估计律构成；估计律基于DREM技术，可使用Kreisselmeier或最小二乘动态回归扩展设计。
AI.result: 所提出的控制器方案具有有限时间调节特性，通过Lyapunov方法进行了严格的稳定性分析，并通过大量仿真研究验证了控制性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的复合自适应控制方案有效实现了欧拉-拉格朗日系统的有限时间设定点控制，扩展了该领域的最新成果。

title: MemQ: Integrating Q-Learning into Self-Evolving Memory Agents over Provenance DAGs
comment: 22 pages, 11 figures (containing 43 individual image panels total)
summary: Episodic memory allows LLM agents to accumulate and retrieve experience, but current methods treat each memory independently, i.e., evaluating retrieval quality in isolation without accounting for the dependency chains through which memories enable the creation of future memories. We introduce MemQ, which applies TD($λ$) eligibility traces to memory Q-values, propagating credit backward through a provenance DAG that records which memories were retrieved when each new memory was created. Credit weight decays as $(γλ)^d$ with DAG depth $d$, replacing temporal distance with structural proximity. We formalize the setting as an Exogenous-Context MDP, whose factored transition decouples the exogenous task stream from the endogenous memory store. Across six benchmarks, spanning OS interaction, function calling, code generation, multimodal reasoning, embodied reasoning, and expert-level QA, MemQ achieves the highest success rate on all six in generalization evaluation and runtime learning, with gains largest on multi-step tasks that produce deep and relevant provenance chains (up to +5.7~pp) and smallest on single-step classification (+0.77~pp) where single-step updates already suffice. We further study how $γ$ and $λ$ interact with the EC-MDP structure, providing principled guidance for parameter selection and future research. Code will be available soon.

AI.tldr: MemQ 是一种将TD(λ)资格迹应用于记忆Q值的新型记忆管理方法，通过记录记忆间的依赖关系（来源DAG图），以结构距离替代时间距离进行信用分配，在六个基准测试中均取得最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将每条记忆孤立对待，独立评估检索质量，忽视了记忆之间的依赖链——即一条记忆如何促成后续记忆的创建。这种独立性假设导致信用分配不准确，无法反映记忆间的因果结构。
AI.method: 提出MemQ框架：1）引入TD(λ)资格迹将信用沿来源DAG向后传播；2）信用权重按(γλ)^d衰减（d为DAG深度），用结构距离替代时间距离；3）将任务形式化为外生-上下文MDP（EC-MDP），解耦外生任务流与内生记忆存储。
AI.result: 在六个基准测试（OS交互、函数调用、代码生成、多模态推理、具身推理、专家级QA）的泛化评估和运行时学习中均取得最高成功率。多步任务增益最大（+5.7个百分点），单步分类增益最小（+0.77个百分点）。
AI.conclusion: MemQ通过结构化的信用分配显著提升了LLM智能体的记忆利用效率，特别适用于需要长依赖链的多步推理任务。参数γ和λ的选择需结合EC-MDP结构进行指导。

title: TTCD:Transformer Integrated Temporal Causal Discovery from Non-Stationary Time Series Data
summary: The widespread availability of complex time series data in various domains such as environmental science, epidemiology, and economics demands robust causal discovery methods that can identify intricate contemporaneous and lagged relationships in non-stationary, nonlinear, and noisy settings. Existing constraint-based methods often rely heavily on conditional independence tests that degrade for limited data samples and complex distributions, while score-based methods impose strong statistical assumptions. Recent methods address special cases such as change point detection or distribution shifts, but struggle to provide a unified solution. We propose the Transformer Integrated Temporal Causal Discovery (TTCD) Framework, a novel end-to-end approach that learns contemporaneous and lagged causal relations from non-stationary time series. TTCD introduces a Non-Stationary Feature Learner integrating temporal and frequency-domain attention with dynamic non-stationarity profiling, and a custom Causal Structure Learner. A key innovation is reconstruction-guided causal signal distillation, to distill essential causal signals through the reconstruction process of the transformer decoder, which mitigates noise and spurious correlations while preserving meaningful dependencies. The Causal Structure Learner operates on distilled reconstructed signals to infer the underlying causal graph without restrictive assumptions on noise distributions or data generation processes. Experiments on synthetic, benchmark, and real world datasets show that TTCD consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both accuracy and consistency with domain knowledge, demonstrating the approach's effectiveness for causal discovery in challenging real world contexts.

AI.tldr: 提出TTCD框架，一种端到端方法，通过非平稳特征学习器、因果结构学习器和重构引导的因果信号蒸馏技术，从非平稳时间序列中学习同期和滞后因果结构，在多个数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有因果发现方法在处理非平稳、非线性、含噪时间序列时存在局限：基于约束的方法依赖条件独立性检验，在小样本和复杂分布下性能退化；基于评分的方法施加强统计假设；现有方法只能处理变点检测或分布偏移等特例，缺乏统一解决方案。
AI.method: TTCD框架包含三个核心组件：1) 非平稳特征学习器，结合时域和频域注意力机制与动态非平稳性分析；2) 重构引导的因果信号蒸馏，通过Transformer解码器重构过程滤除噪声和虚假相关，保留因果信号；3) 因果结构学习器，在蒸馏后的重构信号上推断因果图，无需对噪声分布或数据生成过程做限制性假设。
AI.result: 在合成数据、基准数据集和真实世界数据集上，TTCD在准确性和与领域知识的一致性方面 consistently 优于现有最先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: TTCD框架有效解决了非平稳时间序列因果发现的挑战，通过因果信号蒸馏技术实现了对噪声和虚假相关的鲁棒性，为复杂现实场景中的因果发现提供了有效方案。

title: Local LMO: Constrained Gradient Optimization via a Local Linear Minimization Oracle
summary: We design Local LMO - a new projection-free gradient-type method for constrained optimization. The key algorithmic idea is to replace the global linear minimization oracle over the constraint set used by Frank-Wolfe (FW) with a local linear minimization oracle over the intersection of the constraint set and a "small" ball centered at the current iterate. In particular, when minimizing $f:\mathbb{R}^d\to \mathbb{R}$ over a constraint $\emptyset\neq\mathcal{X}\subseteq\mathbb{R}^d$, Local LMO performs the iteration \[x_{k+1}\in \arg\min_{z\in\mathcal{X}\cap\mathcal{B}(x_{k},t_k)}\langle\nabla f(x_{k}), z \rangle,\] where $x_0\in\mathcal{X}$, and $t_k>0$ is a suitably chosen radius which can be interpreted as an effective stepsize. While designed as an alternative to FW, Local LMO is perhaps best viewed as a generalization of Gradient Descent (GD) rather than a modification of FW. Indeed, it is easy to see that Local LMO reduces to GD in the unconstrained setting and, more generally, to GD restricted to an affine subspace if the constraint $\mathcal{X}$ is affine. We prove that this simple algorithmic scheme transfers the known (unaccelerated) convergence rates of Projected Gradient Descent (PGD) to the projection-free world in several important regimes, some of which are beyond the reach of FW. In contrast to FW theory, i) our guarantees hold without requiring the feasible set $\mathcal{X}$ to be bounded, ii) our theory does not require the "curvature" assumption, which allows us to establish a standard sublinear rate for convex functions with bounded gradients, iii) we obtain a linear rate in the smooth strongly convex regime. Furthermore, we obtain sharp sublinear rates in the smooth convex and non-convex regimes, in the $(L_0,L_1)$-smooth convex regime, and in stochastic and non-differentiable settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Local LMO，一种新的无投影梯度方法用于约束优化。核心思想是用局部线性最小化预言（在约束集与当前迭代点小球的交集上）替代Frank-Wolfe方法中的全局线性最小化预言。该方法可视为梯度下降的推广，在无约束情形退化为GD，在仿射约束情形退化为受限GD。理论证明该方法在多个重要场景下能达到投影梯度下降的收敛速率，且无需可行集有界或曲率假设，涵盖凸、强凸、非凸、随机和非光滑等多种设置。
AI.motivation: Frank-Wolfe方法虽避免了投影操作，但依赖全局线性最小化预言，需要可行集有界且常需曲率假设，限制了应用范围。本文旨在设计一种新的无投影方法，在保持无投影优势的同时，克服FW的理论局限，达到与投影梯度下降相当的收敛性能。
AI.method: 提出Local LMO算法，迭代格式为$x_{k+1}\in \arg\min_{z\in\mathcal{X}\cap\mathcal{B}(x_{k},t_k)}\langle\nabla f(x_{k}), z \rangle$，即在约束集与当前迭代点$t_k$半径球交集中进行线性最小化。该方法可看作GD的推广：无约束时退化为GD，仿射约束时退化为受限GD。理论分析建立了在光滑凸、光滑强凸、$(L_0,L_1)$-光滑凸、非凸、随机及非可微等设置下的收敛速率。
AI.result: 1) 无需可行集有界；2) 无需曲率假设；3) 在凸函数有界梯度情形建立标准次线性率；4) 在光滑强凸情形获得线性收敛率；5) 在光滑凸和非凸情形获得最优次线性率；6) 在$(L_0,L_1)$-光滑凸、随机和非可微情形也获得相应收敛保证。这些结果在多个场景下超越了FW的适用范围。
AI.conclusion: Local LMO是一种简单有效的无投影优化方法，通过局部化线性最小化操作，成功将投影梯度下降的收敛理论推广到无投影世界，同时克服了Frank-Wolfe方法对可行集有界和曲率假设的依赖，在多种优化场景中具有理论优势。

title: Core-Halo Decomposition: Decentralizing Large-Scale Fixed-Point Problems
summary: We study solving large-scale fixed-point equation \(x^\star=\bar F(x^\star)\) with decomposition. Standard strict decomposition assigns each agent a disjoint block and evaluates updates using only owned coordinates. For most operators, however, a block update may depend on variables outside the block. Truncating these dependencies by strict decomposition changes the mean operator and creates structural bias that cannot be removed by more samples, smaller stepsizes, or additional consensus. We therefore propose Core-Halo decomposition, which separates write ownership from read-only evaluation context: each agent updates its own core and reads from an overlapping halo. By aligning the Core-Halo decomposition with the block-dependence structure of $\bar F$, the original fixed-point problem can be implemented faithfully in a decentralized multi-agent system. We further characterize the fundamental obstruction faced by strict decomposition through a Bellman closure condition and a blockwise bias lower bound, showing that local-only updates can alter the original fixed-point operator. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments across a range of application settings, and demonstrate that Core-Halo achieves near-centralized performance while retaining the parallelism benefits of decentralization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Core-Halo分解方法，通过将写权限（Core）与读权限（Halo）分离，解决严格分解（Strict Decomposition）在多智能体系统中因截断依赖导致的结构偏差问题，实现对大规模定点方程的忠实分布式求解。
AI.motivation: 传统严格分解将变量块分配给各智能体，但大多数算子的块更新依赖块外变量，截断这些依赖会改变均值算子，产生无法通过增加样本、减小步长或额外共识消除的结构性偏差。
AI.method: 提出Core-Halo分解：每个智能体拥有独立的写入权限（Core），同时具有重叠的只读上下文（Halo），使分解方式与算子的块依赖结构对齐，从而在分布式系统中忠实实现原始定点问题。
AI.result: 理论方面：严格遵循Bellman闭包条件并给出块级偏差下界，证明局部更新会改变原始定点算子；实验方面：在多种应用场景下，Core-Halo在保留分布式并行优势的同时，性能接近集中式方法。
AI.conclusion: Core-Halo分解通过分离读写权限并利用重叠区域，有效克服了严格分解的结构偏差，为大规模分布式定点方程求解提供了一种兼顾保真度与并行效率的解决方案。

title: SkillLens: Adaptive Multi-Granularity Skill Reuse for Cost-Efficient LLM Agents
summary: Skill libraries have become a practical way for LLM agents to reuse procedural experience across tasks. However, existing systems typically treat skills as flat, single-resolution prompt blocks. This creates a tension between relevance and cost: injecting coarse skills can introduce irrelevant or misleading context, while rewriting entire skills is expensive and often unnecessary. We propose SkillLens, a hierarchical skill-evolution framework that organizes skills into a four-layer graph of policies, strategies, procedures, and primitives, and retrieves them at mixed granularity. Given a task, SkillLens first retrieves semantically relevant skill seeds, expands them through degree-corrected random walk over the skill graph, and then uses a verifier to decide whether each visited unit should be accepted, decomposed, rewritten, or skipped. This enables the agent to reuse compatible subskills directly while adapting only locally mismatched components. To improve the system over time, SkillLens further refines multi-granularity skills and verifier in order to improve its routing decisions. We provide theoretical analysis showing that mixed-granularity adaptation incurs sublinear cost under sparse mismatch assumptions and that the evolutionary update rule monotonically improves the validation objective until a local optimum. Across MuLocbench and ALFWorld, SkillLens consistently improves over strong skill-based baselines, achieving up to a 6.31 percentage-point Acc@1 gain for bug localization and raising agent success rate from 45.00% to 51.31%.

AI.tldr: SkillLens提出了一种分层技能进化框架，将技能组织为策略-战略-流程-原语四层图结构，通过混合粒度检索和自适应路由机制，使LLM智能体能够在任务中重用兼容子技能、局部调整不匹配组件，并随时间进化优化，在MuLocbench和ALFWorld上取得了显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有技能库系统将技能视为扁平化、单一分辨率的提示块，导致注入粗粒度技能会引入无关或误导性上下文，而重写整个技能则成本高昂且不必要，需要在相关性与成本之间取得平衡。
AI.method: SkillLens包含四层技能图（策略、战略、流程、原语），首先通过语义检索种子技能，然后利用度数校正随机游走扩展技能图，再通过验证器决定每个访问单元是接受、分解、重写还是跳过，从而实现混合粒度重用与局部适配。
AI.result: 在MuLocbench上实现了高达6.31个百分点的Acc@1增益，在ALFWorld上将智能体成功率从45.00%提升至51.31%。
AI.conclusion: 混合粒度适配在稀疏不匹配假设下具有次线性成本，进化更新规则能单调提升验证目标直至局部最优，证明了SkillLens在技能重用与自适应进化方面的有效性。

title: Do Foundation Model Embeddings Improve Cross-Country Crop Yield Generalisation? A Leave-One-Country-Out Evaluation in Sub-Saharan Africa
comment: 9 pages, 10 figures, appendix, code and processed results released publicly
summary: Accurate predictions of smallholder maize yields across national boundaries are critical for food security planning in sub-Saharan Africa, yet most published benchmarks report within-country performance that overstates true generalisability. This paper evaluates whether geospatial foundation model embeddings, specifically Prithvi-EO-1.0-100M and ViT-Base, outperform traditional Sentinel-2 spectral features under a Leave-One-Country-Out cross-validation scheme on 6,404 maize field observations from five African countries. The results show a clear generalisability gap: within-country random cross-validation yields moderate R^2 values, but all feature sets perform poorly under cross-country testing, with universally negative R^2. Frozen Prithvi-EO embeddings provide no meaningful advantage over engineered spectral features for cross-country prediction in this setting. The paper argues that the main limitation is a shift in yield distribution between countries rather than representation quality and releases a reproducible negative benchmark for future work.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了地理空间基础模型嵌入（Prithvi-EO-1.0-100M和ViT-Base）在跨国家小农户玉米产量预测中的表现，发现在留一国家交叉验证下所有特征集均产生负R²，揭示了显著的泛化鸿沟：跨国家预测失败的主因是国家间产量分布偏移而非特征表征质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基准大多报告域内性能，高估了模型在跨国家场景下的真实泛化能力；准确预测撒哈拉以南非洲小农户玉米产量对粮食安全规划至关重要，但跨国家泛化问题尚未被严格评估。
AI.method: 使用Prithvi-EO-1.0-100M和ViT-Base的嵌入特征与传统Sentinel-2光谱特征进行对比，采用留一国家交叉验证方案，对五个非洲国家的6,404个玉米田观测数据进行评估。
AI.result: 域内随机交叉验证达到中等R²，但所有特征集在跨国家测试下表现极差，普遍出现负R²；冻结的Prithvi-EO嵌入相比传统光谱特征在跨国家预测中无显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 跨国家预测的主要限制是产量分布的国家间偏移而非特征表征质量；本文发布了一个可复现的负基准，供未来研究参考。

title: Rennala MVR: Improved Time Complexity for Parallel Stochastic Optimization via Momentum-Based Variance Reduction
summary: Large-scale machine learning models are trained on clusters of machines that exhibit heterogeneous performance due to hardware variability, network delays, and system-level instabilities. In such environments, time complexity rather than iteration complexity becomes the relevant performance metric for optimization algorithms. Recent work by Tyurin and Richtárik (2023) established the first time complexity analysis for parallel first-order stochastic optimization, proposing Rennala SGD as a time-optimal method for smooth nonconvex optimization. However, Rennala SGD is fundamentally a modification of SGD, and variance reduction techniques are known to improve the iteration complexity of SGD. In this work, we investigate whether variance reduction can also improve time complexity in heterogeneous systems. We show that, under a mean-squared smoothness assumption, variance reduction can improve time complexity in relevant parameter regimes. To this end, we propose Rennala MVR, a variance-reduced extension of Rennala SGD based on momentum-based variance reduction, and analyze its oracle and time complexity. We establish lower bounds for time complexity under these assumptions. On a stochastic quadratic benchmark, experiments with the exact method support the theory, while neural-network experiments with a practical inexact variant show similar empirical gains over Rennala SGD.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了异构集群中方差缩减技术是否能提升时间复杂度，提出了Rennala MVR算法，证明了在均值平滑假设下方差缩减能改善时间复杂度，并通过实验验证了理论结果。
AI.motivation: Rennala SGD是首个时间最优的并行一阶随机优化方法，但它基于SGD，而方差缩减技术已知能改进SGD的迭代复杂度。本文旨在探究方差缩减是否也能在异构系统中提升时间复杂度，填补这一空白。
AI.method: 基于动量方差缩减技术，提出Rennala MVR算法作为Rennala SGD的方差缩减扩展，并在均值平滑假设下分析其oracle复杂度和时间复杂度，同时建立下界。
AI.result: 理论分析表明，在均值平滑假设下，方差缩减能在相关参数区间内改善时间复杂度。随机二次基准实验支持理论结果，神经网络实验使用实际非精确变体也显示出优于Rennala SGD的增益。
AI.conclusion: 方差缩减技术可以有效提升异构系统中并行随机优化算法的时间复杂度，Rennala MVR在理论和实验上均优于Rennala SGD。

title: Measuring and Decomposing Mode Separation via the Canonical Diffusion
summary: Mode separation, namely how sharply a distribution fragments into barrier-separated clusters, is a fundamental geometric property of densities, difficult to quantify in high dimensions. It is structurally distinct from dispersion, yet existing tools fall short: differential entropy rises with spread regardless of fragmentation, PCA orders directions by variance regardless of barriers, and mutual information requires a mixture decomposition one usually does not have. We measure mode separation through a single stochastic process intrinsic to the density: a unique reversible diffusion with $f$ as its stationary distribution and constant scalar diffusion coefficient. We extract two readouts from its autocovariance matrix: SSA (Sum of Squared Autocorrelations), a scalar barrier-sensitive measure; and DA (Dominant Autocorrelation directions), linear projections ordered by metastability rather than variance. Under an isotropic-Gaussian null, we derive a closed-form spectrum for the empirical autocovariance that generalizes Marchenko--Pastur, with an analytic upper edge that selects the lag at which DA is read off. Both readouts use only samples and a score function, scaling to high dimensions through pretrained score-based generative models via Tweedie's identity. We apply our framework to three settings: (i) synthetic Gaussian mixtures, where SSA tracks mutual information; (ii) SDXL text-to-image generations, where SSA and DA capture structure that entropy and PCA miss; and (iii) molecular dynamics of alanine dipeptide, where DA recovers the known slow backbone dihedrals from static samples alone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过可逆扩散过程的协方差矩阵来量化高维密度函数中模态分离程度的新框架，包括标量度量SSA和方向度量DA，并在合成数据、图像生成和分子动力学中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 高维密度函数的模态分离（分布是否分裂为势垒分隔的簇）是一个基本的几何性质，但现有工具（微分熵、PCA、互信息）均无法有效量化这一结构，因为这些方法要么对碎片化不敏感，要么需要事先知道混合分解。
AI.method: 利用密度函数f作为平稳分布的唯一可逆扩散过程（恒定标量扩散系数），从其自协方差矩阵中提取两种读数：(1) SSA（平方自相关和），对标量势垒敏感的度量；(2) DA（主导自相关方向），按亚稳定性而非方差排序的线性投影。在高斯零假设下推导了经验自协方差谱的闭式解（推广Marchenko-Pastur分布），提供分析上确界来选择DA的滞后参数。仅需样本和分数函数，可通过预训练基于分数的生成模型（Tweedie恒等式）扩展到高维。
AI.result: 在三个场景中验证：(i) 合成高斯混合，SSA与互信息趋势一致；(ii) SDXL文本到图像生成，SSA和DA捕捉到了熵和PCA遗漏的结构；(iii) 丙氨酸二肽的分子动力学，DA仅从静态样本中就恢复了已知的慢骨架二面角。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自协方差框架能够有效量化高维密度中的模态分离结构，补充了熵和PCA的不足，且可借助扩散模型扩展到高维实际应用场景。

title: PLACO: A Multi-Stage Framework for Cost-Effective Performance in Human-AI Teams
summary: Human-AI teams play a pivotal role in improving overall system performance when neither the human nor the model can achieve such performance on their own. With the advent of powerful and accessible Generative AI models, several mundane tasks have morphed into Human-AI team tasks. From writing essays to developing advanced algorithms, humans have found that using AI assistance has led to an accelerated work pace like never before. In classification tasks, where the final output is a single hard label, it is crucial to address the combination of human and model output. Prior work elegantly solves this problem using Bayes rule, using the assumption that human and model output are conditionally independent given the ground truth. Specifically, it discusses a combination method to combine a single deterministic labeler (the human) and a probabilistic labeler (the classifier model) using the model's instance-level and the human's class-level calibrated probabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在分类任务中如何将人类（确定性标注者）和AI模型（概率性标注者）的输出进行最优组合，利用贝叶斯规则和条件独立性假设，通过模型实例级和人类类别级的校准概率来提升Human-AI团队的整体性能。
AI.motivation: 在分类任务中，人类和模型单独都难以达到最优性能，因此需要有效的Human-AI协作方式来结合二者的输出，以提升整体系统性能。
AI.method: 基于贝叶斯规则，假设人类和模型输出在给定真实标签条件下相互独立，提出一种组合方法：将确定性标注者（人类）和概率性标注者（分类模型）的输出相结合，利用模型的实例级校准概率和人类的类别级校准概率。
AI.result: 该方法能够在分类任务中有效融合人类和模型的输出，提升最终标签的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 在Human-AI协作的分类任务中，利用贝叶斯规则和条件独立性假设，通过校准概率的组合方法可以有效地融合人类和模型的判断，实现超越任何单一方性能的结果。

title: Statistical Inference and Quality Measures of KV Cache Quantisations Inspired by TurboQuant
comment: 23 pages, 7 Figures, multiple tables, the process is highly assisted by AI
summary:
We analyse three KV cache quantization schemes under a fair bit budget: \textbf{KV} (scalar MSE baseline), \textbf{KQV} (WHT + MSE on $K$; WHT + MSE + QJL on $V$), and \textbf{QKQV} (WHT + MSE + QJL on both). Starting from the Beta distribution on the hypersphere, we trace how QJL on $K$ inflates inner product variance by $π/2$, which softmax amplifies nonlinearly via Jensen's inequality, and we present statistical inference and information metrics to highlight practical differences.
  Three empirical findings emerge. (1)~At $n=4$ (the practically dominant budget), KQV wins on every measure -- KL divergence, geometric $K$ error, and 6D distance -- across all distributions and ranks tested. (2)~The K--V asymmetry is unconditional: QKQV is consistently worse than KQV in KL divergence at every budget and distribution. (3)~A budget-dependent crossover exists: QKQV achieves better geometric $K$ reconstruction at $n \in \{2,3,5\}$, KQV at $n \in \{4,6\}$, invariant to rank and tail weight -- an open rate-distortion problem.
  $\mathrm{KL}(p_{\mathrm{ref}} \| p_{\mathrm{quant}})$, K-only by construction, bridges K direction error to routing corruption and output collapse. We present a sufficient condition when the Jensen mechanism amplifies superlinearly through the softmax. At $n \in \{2,3,5\}$, QKQV wins geometrically because this assumption does not bind. At $n=4$, elevated K error and KL divergence for QKQV strongly suggest the Jensen mechanism is the operative cause of the crossover, providing a new perspective and explanation.

AI.tldr: 本文在固定比特预算下系统比较了三种KV缓存量化方案（KV、KQV、QKQV），发现KQV在n=4（实际主导预算）下全面最优，揭示了K-V非对称性和预算相关的性能交叉现象，并通过KL散度和Jensen机制解释了交叉的原因。
AI.motivation: 在固定比特预算下公平比较三种KV缓存量化方案，理解不同量化策略对注意力机制的影响机制，特别是K和V分量的非对称角色以及预算相关的性能交叉现象。
AI.method: 从超球面上的Beta分布出发，理论推导了QJL在K上如何使内积方差膨胀π/2倍，并通过softmax被Jensen不等式非线性放大；采用KL散度、几何K误差、6D距离等多个指标进行统计推断和信息度量的实证比较。
AI.result: (1) n=4时KQV在所有指标上全面最优；(2) QKQV的KL散度始终劣于KQV，呈现无条件的K-V非对称性；(3) 存在预算相关的交叉现象：QKQV在n∈{2,3,5}时几何K重建更优，KQV在n∈{4,6}时更优；(4) 提出了Jensen机制超线性放大的充分条件，解释了交叉现象。
AI.conclusion: KQV方案在实用中最优；K-V非对称性是无条件的；预算相关的性能交叉可通过Jensen机制解释，为KV量化提供了新的理论视角。

title: Efficient sparse GP-MPC with accurate mean and variance propagation applied for quadcopter flight control
summary: This paper presents a computationally efficient approach for Gaussian process model predictive control (GP-MPC), where Gaussian process (GP) regression is used to complement a baseline model of the system dynamics. The proposed method achieves propagation of both the predicted mean and variance, thereby significantly reducing conservativeness compared with existing GP-MPC formulations. The nonlinear GP-MPC problem is reformulated into an exact linear parameter-varying (LPV) structure that preserves the nonlinear prediction dynamics in affine form without introducing further approximation. Moreover, closed-form derivations of moment matching (MM) predictions for sparse GPs are developed, including both mean and variance propagation under uncertain inputs, which improves scalability to larger datasets. This further enables recasting the resulting GP-MPC problem as a sequence of quadratic programs (QPs), which can be solved efficiently. The proposed framework significantly improves runtime efficiency while maintaining prediction accuracy, as demonstrated through simulation and real-world experiments on a Crazyflie 2.1 micro quadcopter.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种计算高效的GP-MPC方法，通过将高斯过程回归与基线动力学模型结合，利用LPV结构精确重构非线性预测，并引入稀疏GP的闭式矩匹配传播均值和方差，最终将问题转化为QP序列，在Crazyflie 2.1微型四旋翼上验证了大幅提升运行效率且保持预测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有GP-MPC方法计算成本高且保守性强，难以扩展到大数据集和实时应用，需要一种既能传播预测均值和方差以降低保守性，又能提升计算效率的方法。
AI.method: 将非线性GP-MPC问题精确重构为LPV结构以保持仿射形式的非线性预测动力学；开发稀疏GP在不确定输入下的闭式矩匹配传播公式（均值和方差）；将GP-MPC问题转化为可高效求解的QP序列。
AI.result: 在Crazyflie 2.1微型四旋翼上的仿真和真实世界实验中，该方法大幅提升了运行效率，同时保持了预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架在显著提高运行时效率的同时维持了预测准确性，为GP-MPC在大规模数据集和实时控制场景中的实际部署提供了可行方案。

title: Learning Theory of Transformers: Local-to-Global Approximation via Softmax Partition of Unity
summary: This paper investigates the learning theory of Transformer networks for regression tasks on the compact Euclidean domain $[0,1]^d$ and $d$-dimensional compact Riemannian manifolds. We propose a novel constructive approximation framework for Transformers that builds local approximations of the target function and aggregates them into a global approximation via softmax partition of unity. This approach leverages the attention mechanism to achieve spatial localization through affine transformations of the input. The softmax activation plays a crucial role in aggregating local approximations to a global output. From an approximation perspective, we prove that a dense Transformer equipped with only two encoder blocks and standard single-hidden-layer point-wise feed-forward networks can achieve a uniform $\varepsilon$-approximation error for $α$-Hölder continuous functions with $α\in (0,1]$ using $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-d/α})$ total parameters. Building upon this approximation guarantee, we establish a near minimax-optimal generalization error bound of order $\mathcal{O}\big(n^{-\frac{2α}{2α+d}} \log n\big)$ for the empirical risk minimizer, where $n$ is the training data size. The Transformer architecture studied in this paper is dense, shallow and wide, and employs softmax activation and sinusoidal positional encodings, closely reflecting practical implementations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Transformer在紧致欧几里得域和黎曼流形上回归任务的学习理论，提出了一种基于softmax划分单元的构造性逼近框架，证明了仅含两个编码块和单隐层前馈网络的稠密Transformer能以$\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-d/α})$个参数实现$\varepsilon$逼近，并建立了$\mathcal{O}(n^{-\frac{2α}{2α+d}}\log n)$的近乎极小最优泛化误差界。
AI.motivation: 从理论上研究Transformer网络在回归任务中的逼近能力和泛化性能，填补Transformer学习理论在紧致域和流形上回归问题的空白。
AI.method: 提出基于softmax划分单元的构造性逼近框架：通过注意力机制对输入进行仿射变换实现空间定位，构建局部逼近函数，并利用softmax激活函数将其聚合为全局输出；采用两个编码块和单隐层逐点前馈网络的结构。
AI.result: 证明了稠密Transformer能以$\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-d/α})$总参数实现$\varepsilon$逼近误差；建立了$\mathcal{O}(n^{-\frac{2α}{2α+d}}\log n)$的近乎极小最优泛化误差界。
AI.conclusion: 所研究的稠密、浅而宽的Transformer架构（采用softmax激活和正弦位置编码）在逼近和泛化理论上均具有良好保证，且结构贴近实际实现。

title: CoCoDA: Co-evolving Compositional DAG for Tool-Augmented Agents
summary: Tool-augmented language models can extend small language models with external executable skills, but scaling the tool library creates a coupled challenge: the library must evolve with the planner as new reusable subroutines emerge, while retrieval from the growing library must remain within a fixed context budget. Existing tool-use and skill-library methods typically treat tools as flat or text-indexed memories, causing prompt cost to grow with library size and obscuring the typed, compositional structure of executable code. We propose CoCoDA, a framework that co-evolves the planner and tool library through a single code-native structure: a compositional code DAG. Nodes are primitive or composite tools, edges encode invocation dependencies, and each node stores a typed signature, description, pre/post-condition specification, and worked examples. At inference time, Typed DAG Retrieval prunes candidates by symbolic signature unification, ranks survivors by descriptions, filters them by behavioral specifications, and disambiguates with examples, keeping expensive context materialization on progressively smaller candidate sets. At training time, successful trajectories are folded into validated composite tools, while the planner is updated with a DAG-induced reward that credits composites by their primitive expansion size. We provide theoretical results showing retrieval cost reduction, sublinear retrieval time, compositional advantage under the shaped reward, monotone co-evolution under conservative updates, and DAG well-formedness. Across mathematical reasoning, tabular analysis, and code task benchmarks, CoCoDA enables an 8B student to match or exceed a 32B teacher on GSM8K and MATH and consistently improves over strong tool-use and library-learning baselines.

AI.tldr: CoCoDA提出了一种通过组合式代码DAG结构协同进化规划器与工具库的方法，在固定上下文预算下实现工具库的高效检索与自动扩展，使8B模型在数学推理等任务上匹配甚至超越32B模型。
AI.motivation: 现有工具增强型语言模型在扩展工具库时面临耦合挑战：库需随规划器进化而更新，但检索必须在固定上下文预算内完成；传统方法将工具视为扁平或文本索引记忆，导致提示成本随库规模增长且忽略了可执行代码的类型化组合结构。
AI.method: 提出CoCoDA框架，核心是组合式代码DAG结构：节点为原始或组合工具，边编码调用依赖关系，每个节点存储类型签名、描述、前置/后置条件规范和示例。推理时通过Typed DAG Retrieval逐步修剪候选集（符号签名统一→描述排序→行为规范过滤→示例消歧）；训练时将成功轨迹折叠为验证过的组合工具，并用DAG诱导的奖励（按原始扩展规模赋分）更新规划器。
AI.result: 在数学推理、表格分析和代码任务基准上，CoCoDA使8B学生模型在GSM8K和MATH上匹配或超越32B教师模型，并持续优于强工具使用和库学习基线。
AI.conclusion: CoCoDA通过代码DAG结构实现了规划器与工具库的协同进化，在理论上证明了检索成本降低、亚线性检索时间、组合优势、单调协同进化等性质，实验验证了其有效性和可扩展性。

title: The Safety-Aware Denoiser for Text Diffusion Models
comment: 27 pages, 12 figures. Code available at: https://github.com/ammanyusuf/SAD
summary: Recent work on text diffusion models offers a promising alternative to autoregressive generation, but controlling their safety remains underexplored. Existing safety approaches are geared toward autoregressive models and typically rely on post-hoc filtering or inference-time interventions. These are inadequate for effectively addressing safety risks in text diffusion models. We propose the Safety-Aware Denoiser (SAD), a safety-guidance framework in text diffusion models. The SAD modifies the iterative denoising process such that the text sample at the final denoising step is steered toward provably safe regions of the text space. This inference-time method can integrate safety constraints into the denoiser, avoiding computationally expensive retraining of the underlying diffusion model and enabling flexible, lightweight safety guidance. We evaluate the safety of the generated text using the SAD, with respect to hazard taxonomy, memorization, and jailbreak. Experimental results show that SAD substantially reduces unsafe generations while preserving generation quality, diversity, and fluency, outperforming existing methods. These results demonstrate that our safety guidance during denoising provides an effective and scalable mechanism for enforcing safety in text diffusion models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出安全感知去噪器（SAD），一种在文本扩散模型中嵌入安全引导的推理时框架，通过修改迭代去噪过程将生成样本引导至安全的文本区域，在不重新训练模型的情况下有效降低不安全文本生成，并在生成质量、多样性和流畅性上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 文本扩散模型的安全控制尚未得到充分研究，现有安全方法主要面向自回归模型（如事后过滤或推理时干预），难以有效应对文本扩散模型的安全风险。
AI.method: 提出Safety-Aware Denoiser（SAD），在推理时修改迭代去噪过程，将最终去噪步骤的文本样本引导至可证明安全的文本空间区域，通过安全引导机制整合安全约束，无需重新训练底层扩散模型。
AI.result: 在危害分类、记忆化和越狱攻击等安全性评估中，SAD显著减少了不安全文本生成，同时保持了生成质量、多样性和流畅性，优于现有安全方法。
AI.conclusion: 去噪过程中的安全引导为文本扩散模型提供了一种有效且可扩展的安全约束机制。

title: Learning Generative Dynamics with Soft Law Constraints: A McKean-Vlasov FBSDE Approach
summary: We propose a generative framework for learning stochastic dynamics from endpoint and intermediate distributional observations. The method formulates generation as a McKean-Vlasov control problem in which terminal and time-marginal laws are enforced through soft energy constraints. The associated optimality system is a forward-backward stochastic differential equation (FBSDE) whose backward component receives a continuous drift induced by the marginal law penalties. This provides a principled alternative to hard interpolation or optimal transport maps between observed distributions: the model learns a stochastic path law whose dynamics remain globally coupled through the mean-field objective. We derive the reduced FBSDE system for quadratic control cost and constant diffusion, connecting terminal and marginal law flat derivatives to score-like training signals. The resulting neural solver is evaluated on low-dimensional distributional benchmarks, where it recovers smooth stochastic paths matching prescribed marginal laws. In a higher-dimensional ALAE latent space, endpoint supervision is used as a qualitative stress test for transporting non-smiling faces toward smiling ones in a pretrained representation. We then use articulated human motion as a structured high-dimensional case study on a curated AMASS low-to-high position dataset, using SMPL-H pose sequences and reduced pose representations. The experiments show that soft marginal law constraints can produce coherent stochastic trajectories whose intermediate distributions follow the observed evolution of human motion. The code is available at https://github.com/murex/deep-mkv-gen/tree/main.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个生成式框架，通过McKean-Vlasov控制问题学习随机动力学，利用软能量约束强制终端和中间边际分布，并用FBSDE求解器在低维基准和高维人体运动数据上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有的分布间插值或最优传输方法通常需要硬约束或显式映射，缺乏对随机路径动力学及中间边际分布的建模能力。本文旨在提供一种原则性的替代方案，通过学习全局耦合的随机路径律来同时匹配终端和中间时刻的分布观测。
AI.method: 将生成问题建模为McKean-Vlasov控制问题，通过软能量约束施加终端和时间边际分布约束；导出对应的前向-后向随机微分方程(FBSDE)最优性系统，其中后向分量接收边际罚分诱导的连续漂移；针对二次控制代价和恒定扩散情况推导简化的FBSDE系统；使用神经网络求解器进行实现。
AI.result: 在低维分布基准上，方法能够恢复平滑的随机路径并匹配指定的边际分布。在高维ALAE潜空间中，通过端点监督实现了非微笑到微笑人脸的成功迁移。在AMASS人体运动数据集上，方法生成了连贯的随机轨迹，中间分布符合观测到的人体运动演化规律。
AI.conclusion: 软边际分布约束能够产生连贯的随机轨迹，其中间分布可有效匹配真实数据演化过程，为学习随机动力学提供了一种灵活且原理性的框架。

title: Tight Generalization Bounds for Noiseless Inverse Optimization
summary: Inverse optimization (IO) seeks to infer the parameters of a decision-maker's objective from observed context--action data. We study noiseless IO, where demonstrations are generated by a ground-truth objective. We provide a high-probability ${O}(\frac{d}{T})$ generalization bound for the induced action set, where $d$ is the number of unknown parameters and $T$ is the size of the training dataset. We strengthen these guarantees under additional conditions that ensure uniqueness of the chosen action, bringing our IO guarantees in line with best-arm identification results in the bandit literature. We further show that the ${O}(\frac{d}{T})$ rate is tight over all consistent estimators considered here, and extend the result to both instantaneous and cumulative regret. Notably, the resulting regret lower bound matches the corresponding upper bounds in the adversarial setting, indicating that the stochastic IO setting is effectively adversarial for the class of estimators studied here. Finally, we propose a parameter-free algorithm with lower per-iteration complexity than generic solvers. Experiments validate the predicted rates and illustrate the tightness of our bounds.

AI.tldr: 本文研究无噪声逆向优化问题，给出了关于诱导动作集的O(d/T)高概率泛化界，证明了该界在一致估计量下的紧致性，并扩展到了遗憾界，提出了一种参数无关算法。
AI.motivation: 逆向优化旨在从观测到的上下文-动作数据中推断决策者目标函数的参数，但现有理论保证不够完善，需要更严格的泛化和遗憾界分析。
AI.method: 1) 推导诱导动作集的高概率O(d/T)泛化界；2) 在保证动作唯一性的条件下加强界，与bandit最优臂识别结果对齐；3) 证明O(d/T)速率对一致估计量是紧的；4) 将结果扩展到瞬时效和累积遗憾界；5) 提出低每轮复杂度的参数无关算法。
AI.result: 得到了O(d/T)的泛化界和紧致性证明；遗憾下界与对抗设置的上界匹配，表明随机IO设置对本文研究的估计量类实质上是对抗性的；提出的算法具有更低的每轮计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 无噪声逆向优化在理论界上具有紧致性，且与bandit学习理论之间存在密切联系；提出的参数无关算法在计算效率上优于通用求解器。

title: Belief or Circuitry? Causal Evidence for In-Context Graph Learning
comment: Under review at ICML Mechanistic Interpretability Workshop 2026
summary: How do LLMs learn in-context? Is it by pattern-matching recent tokens, or by inferring latent structure? We probe this question using a toy graph random-walk across two competing graph structures. This task's answer is, in principle, decidable: either the model tracks global topology, or it copies local transitions. We present two lines of evidence that neither account alone is sufficient. First, reconstructing the internal representation structure via PCA reveals that at intermediate mixture ratios, both graph topologies are encoded in orthogonal principal subspaces simultaneously. This pattern is difficult to reconcile with purely local transition copying. Second, residual-stream activation patching and graph-difference steering causally intervene on this graph-family signal: late-layer patching almost fully transfers the clean graph preference, while linear steering moves predictions in the intended direction and fails under norm-matched and label-shuffled controls. Taken together, our findings are most consistent with a dual-mechanism account in which genuine structure inference and induction circuits operate in parallel.

AI.tldr: 本文通过图随机游走任务探究LLM上下文学习机制，发现模型既非纯粹的模式匹配也非完全的潜在结构推断，而是并行采用结构推理与归纳电路的双重机制。
AI.motivation: 探究LLM在上下文学习中究竟是依赖近期的模式匹配（归纳）还是推断潜在结构（推理），这是一个尚未有定论的基础性问题。
AI.method: 使用图随机游走任务（两种竞争图结构），通过PCA重建内部表征结构、残差流激活修补和图形差异引导三种方法进行分析。
AI.result: PCA发现中等混合比例下两种图拓扑同时编码在正交主子空间中；激活修补实验显示晚期层修补几乎完全传递偏好；线性引导在规范控制和标签打乱控制下有效但会失败。
AI.conclusion: 单一机制无法解释全部现象，最一致的结论是LLM并行运行结构推理与归纳电路的双重机制。

title: Feature Repulsion and Spectral Lock-in: An Empirical Study of Two-Layer Network Grokking
summary: Tian (2025) proves a repulsion theorem (Theorem 6) for the matrix $ B = (\widetilde{F}^\top \widetilde{F} + ηI)^{-1} $ during the interactive feature-learning stage of grokking: similar features have negative off-diagonal entries $ B_{j\ell} $, producing an effective repulsive force that drives them apart. However, the theorem does not specify when this mechanism becomes empirically observable, nor whether it leaves a measurable spectral signature in the parameter updates. We test this directly on Tian's modular addition setup ($ M = 71 $, $ K = 2048 $, MSE loss) and observe a clear structure-mechanism dissociation. The predicted sign rule holds robustly on the top-200 most-similar feature pairs across activations (empirical sign-match rising from 0.865 to 0.985 on $ σ= x^2 $ across 5 seeds, and saturating at 1.000 on $ σ= \operatorname{ReLU} $). However, the spectral signature in the parameter updates is strongly activation-dependent. With $ σ= x^2 $, a simple slope detector on the rolling eigengap $ σ_2 / σ_3 $ of $ ΔW $ fires in 15/15 grokking seeds at epoch 174 (IQR [173,174]) and in 0/15 non-grokking controls, with 229$ \times $ late-stage magnitude separation; the spectrum is rank-2. In contrast, with $ σ= \operatorname{ReLU} $, the detector never fires and the spectrum remains effectively rank-1. This dissociation aligns with Tian's Theorem 5 distinction between focused (power-law) and spreading (ReLU) memorization: while the sign structure of $ B $ depends only on $ \widetilde{F}^\top \widetilde{F} $, how feature repulsion translates into weight updates critically depends on the activation derivative $ σ' $.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证研究，验证了Tian（2025）关于grokking过程中特征排斥的定理（定理6），发现特征对之间的符号规则在激活函数为x²时稳定成立，但在参数更新的谱特征上表现出强烈的激活依赖性：x²激活下可观察到清晰的秩2谱结构和可检测的谱特征，而ReLU激活下谱特征消失，这与Tian的定理5中关于集中式记忆（x²）与扩散式记忆（ReLU）的区分一致。
AI.motivation: Tian（2025）的定理6理论上证明了在grokking的特征学习阶段，相似特征之间会产生排斥力，但该定理未明确说明这一机制何时在经验上可观测，也未说明它是否会在参数更新中留下可测量的谱特征。本文旨在通过实验直接验证这些未解决的问题。
AI.method: 在Tian的模加法实验设置（M=71, K=2048, MSE损失）上进行直接测试，分别使用σ=x²和σ=ReLU两种激活函数。通过top-200最相似特征对的符号匹配率验证符号规则，并通过滚动特征间隙σ₂/σ₃的斜率检测器分析参数更新ΔW的谱特征。
AI.result: 符号规则在x²激活下从0.865提升至0.985，在ReLU激活下饱和至1.000；谱特征上，x²激活下检测器在15/15个grokking种子中于第174轮触发，0/15非grokking对照中触发，后期幅度分离达229倍，谱为秩2；ReLU激活下检测器从未触发，谱保持秩1。
AI.conclusion: 特征排斥的符号结构仅依赖于F̃ᵀF̃，但特征排斥转化为权重更新的方式关键取决于激活函数的导数σ'。这种结构-机制分离与Tian的定理5中关于集中式（幂律）记忆与扩散式（ReLU）记忆的区分一致。

title: Riemannian optimal reduction for linear systems with quadratic outputs
summary: This paper presents an H2-optimal model order reduction (MOR) method for linear systems with quadratic outputs based on Riemannian optimization. The H2-optimal MOR is formulated as an optimization problem in which the optimization variables are selected directly as the coefficient matrices of reduced models. The product manifold is defined properly to impose the stability condition for reduced models.
