AI.method: 提出以Wasserstein距离作为效用度量的DP采样框架，设计了基于Wasserstein投影的WPM机制，该机制达到最小最大最优；同时开发了近似计算该机制的高效算法并提供收敛性保证。
AI.result: WPM机制在Wasserstein距离度量下达到最小最大最优，所提高效算法具有收敛性保证。
AI.conclusion: Wasserstein距离为DP采样提供了更优的效用度量，克服了KL散度的几何和适用性局限。

title: OracleTSC: Oracle-Informed Reward Hurdle and Uncertainty Regularization for Traffic Signal Control
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research
summary: Transparent decision-making is essential for traffic signal control (TSC) systems to earn public trust. However, traditional reinforcement learning-based TSC methods function as black boxes with limited interpretability. Although large language models (LLMs) can provide natural language reasoning, reinforcement finetuning for TSC remains unstable because feedback is sparse and delayed, while most actions produce only marginal changes in congestion metrics. We introduce OracleTSC, which stabilizes LLM-based TSC through two mechanisms: (1) a reward hurdle mechanism that filters weak learning signals by subtracting a calibrated threshold from environmental rewards, and (2) uncertainty regularization that maximizes the probability of the selected response to encourage consistent decisions across sampled outputs. Experiments on the LibSignal benchmark show that OracleTSC enables a compact LLaMA3-8B model to substantially improve traffic efficiency, achieving a 75% reduction in travel time and a 67% decrease in queue length compared with the pretrained baseline while preserving interpretability through natural language explanations. OracleTSC also demonstrates strong cross-intersection generalization: a policy trained on one intersection transfers to a structurally different intersection with 17% lower travel time and 39% lower queue length without additional finetuning. These results suggest that uncertainty-aware reward shaping can improve the stability and effectiveness of reinforcement fine-tuning for TSC.

AI.tldr: OracleTSC提出了一种基于不确定性正则化和奖励门槛机制的LLM强化微调方法，用于稳定交通信号控制决策，在LibSignal基准上实现了75%的旅行时间减少和67%的队列长度降低，并具备跨路口泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统基于强化学习的交通信号控制系统缺乏可解释性（黑箱问题），而直接使用大语言模型进行强化微调时，由于反馈稀疏且延迟、多数动作对拥堵指标影响微小，导致训练不稳定。
AI.method: 提出OracleTSC框架，包含两个关键机制：(1) 奖励门槛机制——通过减去校准阈值过滤弱学习信号；(2) 不确定性正则化——最大化所选响应的概率以促进采样输出间的一致性决策。
AI.result: 在LibSignal基准上，基于LLaMA3-8B的模型实现了旅行时间降低75%、队列长度降低67%；跨路口泛化实验中，旅行时间降低17%、队列长度降低39%，且无需额外微调。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性感知的奖励整形可以提高强化微调在交通信号控制中的稳定性和有效性，同时保持自然语言可解释性。

title: HoReN: Normalized Hopfield Retrieval for Large-Scale Sequential Model Editing
summary: Large language models encode vast factual knowledge that inevitably becomes outdated or incorrect after deployment, yet retraining is costly prohibitive, motivating model editing in lifelong settings that updates targeted behavior without harming the rest of the model. One line of work installs new facts by directly modifying base weights through locate-then-edit procedures, but accumulated edits progressively disrupt originally preserved knowledge, even with constraint-based projections. A complementary line leaves base weights intact and routes edits through external memory, but it faces routing challenges and its performance degrades at scale. We propose HoReN, a codebook-based parameter-preserving editor with enhanced routing built on three ideas. First, HoReN wraps a single MLP layer with a discrete key-value codebook, where each entry is interpreted simultaneously as a knowledge-memory key and a modern Hopfield stored pattern. Second, both keys and queries are projected onto the unit hypersphere so retrieval is governed by angular similarity, removing magnitude-driven mismatches between an edit prompt and its rephrasings. Third, the query is refined through damped Hopfield attractor dynamics, so paraphrases relax into the correct stored pattern's basin of attraction while unrelated queries remain undisturbed. HoReN achieves well-edited performance with consistent gains across diverse benchmarks spanning standard ZsRE, structured WikiBigEdit, and unstructured UnKE evaluations. Moreover, HoReN scales to 50K sequential edits on ZsRE with stable overall performance above 0.9, while prior editors collapse or degrade severely before reaching 10K. Our code is available at https://github.com/ha11ucin8/HoReN.

AI.tldr: HoReN是一种基于码本和现代Hopfield网络的参数保留型模型编辑器，通过离散键值码本、单位超球面投影和阻尼Hopfield吸引子动力学三大核心设计，在保持已有知识的同时高效注入新事实，在多个基准上优于现有方法，并能稳定扩展到50K顺序编辑。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在部署后编码的事实知识会过时或错误，而重新训练成本高昂。现有两类编辑方法存在缺陷：直接修改权重的locate-then-edit方法会逐渐破坏原有知识；保留权重但通过外部存储路由编辑的方法面临路由挑战且在大规模扩展时性能下降。因此需要一种既能高效编辑又能保留已有知识且可扩展的方法。
AI.method: HoReN基于三个核心思想：(1) 将单个MLP层包裹离散键值码本，每个条目同时作为知识记忆键和现代Hopfield存储模式；(2) 将键和查询投影到单位超球面上，通过角度相似性控制检索，消除编辑提示与其改写之间的幅度不匹配；(3) 通过阻尼Hopfield吸引子动力学精炼查询，使改写内容松弛到正确存储模式的吸引域中，而不相关查询保持不变。
AI.result: HoReN在标准ZsRE、结构化WikiBigEdit和非结构化UnKE等多种基准上均取得一致性改进。在ZsRE上扩展到50K顺序编辑时，整体性能稳定在0.9以上，而此前的方法在10K前就已崩溃或严重退化。
AI.conclusion: HoReN通过码本和Hopfield网络的结合，实现了参数保留、高效路由和可扩展的模型编辑，为大规模持续模型编辑提供了有效解决方案。

title: Diagnostic Certificates of Data Quality and Regression Identifiability for Koopman Identification
summary:
Classical persistent excitation criteria usually assess whether an input or regressor signal is sufficiently rich. In Koopman and EDMD with control (EDMDc), however, data quality is determined by the concatenation of lifted state features and control inputs. Input-rich data can still visit a narrow state region, well-spread state samples can still produce degenerate lifted features, and both can fail to condition the final regression problem.
  This paper develops a diagnostic certificate framework for locating these failures. The certificates separate state-space coverage and clustering, lifted-feature nondegeneracy, and the final regression spectrum. The regression-spectrum certificate is the layer with direct theoretical guarantees: it controls the active standardized design's smallest singular value, has Fisher-information and one-step EDMDc stability interpretations, and admits a finite-sample lower bound under a population spectral gap. We also give structural examples and a Schur-complement condition showing why state, lifted, input, and regression diagnostics cannot be substituted for one another.
  As a sampling example, IGPE-DOPT uses these certificates to score candidate trajectory segments. Experiments on Duffing, Van der Pol, and Lorenz systems compare input-, state-, lifted-, and regression-oriented baselines. The results show that certificate layers separate, budget and weights shift bottlenecks, and downstream prediction or control performance is not monotone in any single certificate. The framework is therefore intended as an interpretable diagnostic and data-collection guide, not as a universal optimality claim.

AI.tldr: 本文针对Koopman/EDMDc框架中的数据质量问题，提出了一套诊断证书框架，将状态空间覆盖、提升特征非退化性和回归谱分离为独立层次，并证明回归谱证书具有理论保障（控制最小奇异值、Fisher信息解释、有限样本下界）。实验表明各证书不可相互替代，且下游性能与单一证书非单调相关。
AI.motivation: 经典持续激励准则仅评估输入信号的丰富性，但在Koopman和EDMDc中，数据质量由提升特征与控制输入的拼接决定。输入丰富的数据可能状态覆盖窄，状态覆盖广的数据可能提升特征退化，二者均会导致回归问题病态。现有方法缺乏诊断这些失败模式的系统性工具。
AI.method: 提出三层诊断证书框架：1) 状态空间覆盖与聚类证书；2) 提升特征非退化性证书；3) 回归谱证书（核心层）。回归谱证书控制主动标准化设计的最小奇异值，具有Fisher信息解释和一步EDMDc稳定性解释，并在种群谱间隙下给出有限样本下界。同时给出Schur补条件说明各层证书不可相互替代。作为采样示例，IGPE-DOPT利用这些证书对候选轨迹段评分。
AI.result: 在Duffing、Van der Pol和Lorenz系统上的实验表明：证书层次可分离，预算和权重会改变瓶颈位置，下游预测/控制性能与任何单一证书均非单调关系。输入、状态、提升特征和回归导向的基线方法表现各异。
AI.conclusion: 该框架定位为可解释的诊断和数据采集指南，而非通用最优性声明。证书的层间分离特性揭示了数据质量瓶颈的根源，有助于指导数据采集策略的调整。

title: PFN-TS: Thompson Sampling for Contextual Bandits via Prior-Data Fitted Networks
summary: Thompson sampling is a widely used strategy for contextual bandits: at each round, it samples a reward function from a Bayesian posterior and acts greedily under that sample. Prior-data fitted networks (PFNs), such as TabPFN v2+ and TabICL v2, are attractive candidates for this purpose because they approximate Bayesian posterior predictive distributions in a single forward pass. However, PFNs predict noisy future rewards, while Thompson sampling requires uncertainty over the latent mean reward function. We propose PFN-TS, a Thompson sampling algorithm that converts PFN posterior predictives into mean-reward samples using a subsampled predictive central limit theorem. The method estimates posterior variance from a geometric grid of $O(\log n)$ dataset prefixes rather than the full $O(n)$ predictive sequence used in previous predictive-sequence approaches, and reuses TabICL's cached representations across rounds. We prove consistency of the subsampled variance estimator and give a Bayesian regret bound that decomposes PFN-TS regret into exact posterior-sampling regret under the PFN prior plus approximation terms. Empirically, PFN-TS achieves the best average rank across nonlinear synthetic and OpenML classification-to-bandit benchmarks, remains competitive on linear and BART-generated rewards, and attains the highest estimated policy value in an offline mobile-health evaluation. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/PFN_TS-36ED/.

AI.tldr: 提出PFN-TS算法，利用子采样预测中心极限定理将PFN的后验预测分布转换为均值奖励样本，实现Thompson采样，在保持计算效率的同时取得优异性能。
AI.motivation: PFN（如TabPFN v2+和TabICL v2）能高效近似贝叶斯后验预测分布，但其预测的是带噪声的未来奖励，而Thompson采样需要的是潜在均值奖励函数的不确定性。因此需要一种方法将PFN的后验预测分布转换为均值奖励样本。
AI.method: 提出PFN-TS算法，使用子采样预测中心极限定理将PFN后验预测转换为均值奖励样本；从O(log n)个数据集前缀的几何网格估计后验方差（而非完整O(n)预测序列）；重用TabICL的缓存表示；给出子采样方差估计器的一致性证明和贝叶斯遗憾界。
AI.result: 在非线性合成和OpenML分类转bandit基准上取得最佳平均排名；在线性和BART生成的奖励任务上保持竞争力；在离线移动健康评估中取得最高估计策略价值。
AI.conclusion: PFN-TS有效地将PFN的后验预测分布转化为适用于Thompson采样的均值奖励样本，在计算效率和决策性能上都表现出色，为基于PFN的上下文bandits提供了实用且理论支持的解决方案。

title: Results and Retrospective Analysis of the CODS 2025 AssetOpsBench Challenge
summary: Competition retrospectives are useful when they explain what a leaderboard measured, how hidden evaluation changed conclusions, and which design patterns were rewarded. We revisit the CODS 2025 \assetopslive{} challenge, a privacy-aware Codabench competition on industrial multi-agent orchestration built on \assetops{}. We combine final rank sheets, a 300-submission server log, 149-team registrations, best-submission exports, the organizer winners report, the companion \assetopslive{} system paper, and verified planning-track source trees. Five results stand out. First, the public planning leaderboard saturates at 72.73\%, and richer prompts do not improve that peak. Second, hidden evaluation changes the story: public and private scores correlate moderately in planning ($r{=}0.69$) but negatively in execution ($r{=}{-}0.13$), with several 45.45\% public execution systems reaching 63.64\% on the hidden set. Third, the \tmatch{} term is numerically almost inert in the official composite -- combined on a 0--1 scale with 0--100 percentage scores, it contributes at most 0.05 points per track, and rescaling would swap the top two teams. Fourth, the competition is operationally account-based but substantively team-based: 149 registered teams reduce to 24 with non-zero public scores and 11 fully ranked, while 52.3\% of deduplicated registrations list multiple usernames. Fifth, successful execution methods mostly improve guardrails -- response selection, contamination cleanup, fallback, and context control -- rather than novel agent architectures. These findings identify which behaviors the evaluation rewarded, and motivate scale-aware composites, skill-level diagnostics, and versioned artifact release.

AI.tldr: 本文对CODS 2025 AssetOpsLive竞赛进行了全面的回顾分析，揭示了公开排行榜与隐藏评估之间的差异、复合评分指标的缺陷、团队参与的实际结构，以及成功策略主要集中在改进防护栏而非创新架构上。
AI.motivation: 竞赛回顾有助于理解排行榜实际衡量的内容、隐藏评估如何改变结论，以及哪些设计模式受到奖励，从而为未来竞赛设计提供经验教训。
AI.method: 结合最终排名表、300次提交的服务器日志、149个团队注册信息、最佳提交导出数据、组织者获奖者报告、配套系统论文以及经过验证的规划轨道源代码树，进行多维度综合分析。
AI.result: 五个主要发现：1) 公开规划排行榜在72.73%饱和，更丰富的提示无法提升峰值；2) 隐藏评估改变结论：规划轨道的公开与私有分数中等相关(r=0.69)，执行轨道则呈负相关(r=-0.13)；3) TMatch项在官方综合评分中几乎无效，最多贡献0.05分；4) 竞赛操作上基于账户但实质上基于团队，149个注册缩减为24个有非零分数的团队；5) 成功的执行方法主要改进防护栏而非新颖的智能体架构。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现识别了评估所奖励的行为，并推动了规模感知复合指标、技能水平诊断和版本化工件发布的需求。

title: NoiseRater: Meta-Learned Noise Valuation for Diffusion Model Training
summary: Diffusion models have achieved remarkable success across a wide range of generative tasks, yet their training paradigm largely treats injected noise as uniformly informative. In this work, we challenge this assumption and introduce NoiseRater, a meta-learning framework for instance-level noise valuation in diffusion model training. We propose a parametric noise rater that assigns importance scores to individual noise realizations conditioned on data and timestep, enabling adaptive reweighting of the training objective. The rater is trained via bilevel optimization to improve downstream validation performance after inner-loop diffusion updates. To enable efficient deployment, we further design a decoupled two-stage pipeline that transitions from soft weighting during meta-training to hard noise selection during standard training. Extensive experiments on FFHQ and ImageNet demonstrate that not all noise samples contribute equally, and that prioritizing informative noise improves both training efficiency and generation quality. Our results establish noise valuation as a complementary and previously underexplored axis for improving diffusion model training. Our code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/NoiseRater-DEB116.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NoiseRater，一个元学习框架，用于对扩散模型训练中的噪声样本进行实例级重要性评估，通过自适应重新加权训练目标来提升训练效率和生成质量。
AI.motivation: 挑战扩散模型训练中将注入噪声视为均匀信息的传统假设，探索噪声样本在训练中的差异化重要性。
AI.method: 提出参数化的噪声评分器，基于数据和时间步条件为每个噪声实例分配重要性分数，通过双层优化训练评分器以提升下游验证性能，并设计解耦的两阶段流水线（软加权→硬选择）实现高效部署。
AI.result: 在FFHQ和ImageNet上的实验表明，不同噪声样本贡献不均，优先选择信息量大的噪声可同时提升训练效率和生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 噪声估值是改进扩散模型训练的一个被低估的新维度。

title: Phases of Muon: When Muon Eclipses SignSGD
summary: Recently, Muon and related spectral optimizers have demonstrated strong empirical performance as scalable stochastic methods, often outperforming Adam. Yet their behaviour remains poorly understood. We analyze stochastic spectral optimizers, including Muon, on a high-dimensional matrix-valued least squares problem. We derive explicit deterministic dynamics that provide a tractable framework for studying learning behaviour with a focus on (stochastic) SignSVD, which Muon approximates, and (stochastic) SignSGD, the latter serving as a proxy for Adam. Our analysis shows that for large batch size, SignSVD performs a square-root preconditioning with respect to the data covariance spectrum, while for small batch size smaller eigenmodes behave like SGD, slowing down convergence. We contrast with SignSGD which for generic covariance performs no preconditioning and has no transition, leading to different optimal learning rates and convergence characteristics. The two methods match up to a constant factor with isotropic data, but behave differently with anisotropic data. An analysis of a power law covariance model with data exponent $α$ and target exponent $β$ shows there are three phases in the $(α,β)$ plane: one where SignSGD is uniformly favored, one where SignSVD is uniformly favored, and a third where the two methods exhibit a trade-off in performance.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了Muon等谱优化器在高维矩阵最小二乘问题上的随机动力学，揭示了SignSVD（Muon的近似）与SignSGD（Adam的代理）在批大小、数据协方差谱下的不同行为，并提出了一个幂律协方差模型下的三阶段相图。
AI.motivation: 尽管Muon等谱优化器在经验上表现优异，但其背后的行为机制尚不清晰，缺乏理论理解。
AI.method: 通过高维矩阵最小二乘问题推导确定性动力学，对比分析（随机）SignSVD和（随机）SignSGD，并引入幂律协方差模型（数据指数α和目标指数β）进行相图分析。
AI.result: 大批量时SignSVD对数据协方差谱进行平方根预处理，小批量时小特征模态退化为SGD行为；SignSGD无预处理且无过渡行为；两者在各向同性数据下差一个常数因子，但在各向异性数据下表现不同。在(α,β)平面上存在三种相。
AI.conclusion: SignSVD和SignSGD在不同数据特征下各有优劣，不存在单一最优方法，选择取决于数据协方差谱和目标谱的匹配关系。

title: Coarsening Linear Non-Gaussian Causal Models with Cycles
summary: Recent work on causal abstraction, in particular graphical approaches focusing on causal structure between clusters of variables, aims to summarize a high-dimensional causal structure in terms of a low-dimensional one. Existing methods for learning such summaries from data assume that both the high- and low-dimensional structures are acyclic, which is helpful for causal effect identification and reasoning but excludes many high-dimensional models and thus limits applicability. We show that in the linear non-Gaussian (LiNG) setting, the high-dimensional acyclicity assumption can be relaxed while still allowing recovery of a low-dimensional causal directed acyclic graph (DAG). We further connect identifiability of this low-dimensional DAG to existing results: LiNG models with cycles are observationally identifiable only up to an equivalence class whose members differ by reversals of directed cycles; our low-dimensional DAG, which is invariant across all members of a given equivalence class, thus forms a natural representative of the class. While existing approaches for learning this observational equivalence class over high-dimensional variables have exponential time complexity, our low-dimensional summary is learned in worst-case cubic time and comes with explicit bounds on the sample complexity. We provide open source code and experiments on synthetic data to corroborate our theoretical results.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在线性非高斯（LiNG）设定下，即使高维因果结构包含环，仍能以多项式时间恢复低维有向无环图（DAG）摘要，并建立了与环等价类之间的理论联系。
AI.motivation: 现有因果抽象方法要求高维和低维结构均为无环，这排除了许多包含环的高维模型，限制了方法的适用性。本文旨在放宽高维无环假设，使其能处理更一般的因果结构。
AI.method: 在线性非高斯（LiNG）假设下，证明高维有环结构仍可恢复低维DAG；利用环等价类的观测不可区分性，证明低维DAG是等价类的不变代表元；算法在最坏情况下具有三次时间复杂度，并给出了样本复杂度上界。
AI.result: 理论证明了低维DAG的可辨识性及其与环等价类的对应关系；算法在最坏情况下O(n³)时间内完成学习；提供了合成数据上的实验验证。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功放宽了因果抽象中对高维无环的假设，为处理有环高维因果结构提供了高效的低维摘要方法，并具有理论保证。

title: Human-LLM Dialogue Improves Diagnostic Accuracy in Emergency Care
summary: Clinical decision-making in emergency medicine demands rapid, accurate diagnoses under uncertainty. Despite benchmark progress, evidence for LLMs as interactive aids in live physician workflows remains sparse. MedSyn lets physicians iteratively query an LLM provided with the full clinical record while initially viewing only the chief complaint. Seven physicians (three seniors, four residents) completed baseline and AI-assisted sessions across 52 MIMIC-IV cases stratified by difficulty. Blinded evaluation showed residents' Hard-case correctness rose from 0.589 to 0.734; difficulty-standardised completely-correct rates confirmed a medium effect (Δ = 0.092; p = 0.071; d = 0.47). Automated metrics corroborated these gains: standardised any-match accuracy improved by 0.156 (p < 0.0001), and residents showed the largest F1 gain (Δ = 0.138; p < 0.0001). Dialogue analysis revealed expertise-dependent strategies (seniors asked targeted, hypothesis-driven questions; residents relied on broader queries) and cross-expertise concordance increased (Δ = 0.145; p < 0.0001). Interactive LLM support meaningfully enhances diagnostic reasoning.

AI.tldr: MedSyn是一个让医生在急诊场景下与LLM迭代交互的诊断辅助系统。7名医生在52个MIMIC-IV病例上的盲评实验表明，住院医师的困难病例正确率从0.589提升至0.734，标准化完全正确率有中等效应量提升（Δ=0.092, d=0.47）。自动化指标显示住院医师F1增益最大（Δ=0.138, p<0.0001）。对话分析揭示不同经验水平的医生采取了不同提问策略，且跨经验水平的一致性显著提升（Δ=0.145, p<0.0001）。
AI.motivation: 急诊医学临床决策需要在不确定条件下快速准确诊断。尽管LLM在基准测试中取得了进展，但其作为交互式辅助工具在真实医生工作流程中的证据仍然不足。
AI.method: 开发MedSyn系统，允许医生迭代查询已获取完整临床记录的LLM，同时医生初始仅看到主诉。招募7名医生（3名高级、4名住院医师）在52个MIMIC-IV病例（按难度分层）上完成基线和AI辅助两轮实验，采用盲法评估。
AI.result: 住院医师困难病例正确率从0.589提升至0.734；标准化完全正确率显示中等效应量（Δ=0.092, p=0.071, d=0.47）。自动化指标中标准化任意匹配准确率提升0.156（p<0.0001），住院医师F1增益最大（Δ=0.138, p<0.0001）。跨经验水平一致性提升Δ=0.145（p<0.0001）。
AI.conclusion: 交互式LLM支持能够有效增强诊断推理能力，尤其对经验较少的住院医师帮助更大，同时促进了不同经验水平医生之间诊断决策的一致性。

title: Feature Rivalry in Sparse Autoencoder Representations: A Mechanistic Study of Uncertainty-Driven Feature Competition in LLMs
summary: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) decompose large language model representations into interpretable features, but how these features interact under uncertainty remains poorly understood. We introduce Feature Rivalry -- negatively correlated SAE feature pairs -- and study whether rivalry serves as a mechanistic signature of model uncertainty in Gemma-2-2B using Gemma Scope SAEs. Through a controlled within-domain experiment on PopQA split by response entropy, we find that high-entropy questions produce significantly stronger feature rivalry at layers 0 and 12 relative to low-entropy questions (p=5.3x10^-26 and p=5.8x10^-5 respectively), localizing uncertainty to specific processing stages in the residual stream. We then test whether rivalry is causally upstream of model outputs via activation steering along rivalry axes -- finding that steering along the rivalry direction (vec_A - vec_B) causes more output changes than random directions at low steering multipliers across 15 of 20 rival feature pairs. Finally, a per-prompt rivalry score derived from pairwise cosine similarities of active SAE feature decoder vectors predicts answer correctness (AUROC=0.689), approaching but not matching softmax confidence (AUROC=0.808).

AI.tldr: 本文提出特征竞争（Feature Rivalry）概念——稀疏自编码器中负相关的特征对，发现其在Gemma-2-2B模型的高熵问题中显著增强，可通过激活引导影响输出，并基于竞争分数预测回答正确性（AUROC=0.689）。
AI.motivation: SAE虽能分解LLM表示为可解释特征，但这些特征在不确定性下的交互机制尚不明确。作者旨在探究特征竞争是否构成模型不确定性的机制特征。
AI.method: 1. 在PopQA数据集上按回答熵值分区进行受控域内实验；2. 在残差流第0和12层量化高低熵问题的特征竞争强度；3. 沿竞争轴（vec_A - vec_B）进行激活引导验证因果关系；4. 基于活跃SAE特征解码向量的逐对余弦相似度构建逐提示竞争分数预测回答正确性。
AI.result: 高熵问题在层0和层12产生显著更强的特征竞争（p=5.3×10⁻²⁶, p=5.8×10⁻⁵）；沿竞争方向引导在20对特征中有15对在小引导乘数下比随机方向引起更多输出变化；竞争分数AUROC=0.689，低于softmax置信度AUROC=0.808。
AI.conclusion: 特征竞争是模型不确定性的机制标志，可将不确定性定位到残差流的特定处理阶段，且因果关系上竞争方向影响模型输出，但竞争分数作为不确定性指标的预测能力尚不及softmax置信度。

title: Stabilization for a Cascaded ODE-Wave Equation with Boundary Nonlinear Disturbances
summary: In this article, we investigate the problem of exponential stabilization via output feedback for a cascaded system composed of an ordinary differential equation (ODE) and a wave partial differential equation (PDE) under boundary control. Four types of boundary interconnections are considered. In the absence of disturbances, a novel transformation is introduced to incorporate the PDE boundary control input into the ODE subsystem. Based on this transformation, a state feedback controller is designed to achieve exponential stability for both the ODE and PDE components. When internal uncertainties and external disturbances that match the control structure are present, a disturbance estimator is constructed. Utilizing this estimator, a Luenberger-type state observer is developed to reject the disturbances and exponentially stabilize the original system via an observer-based control scheme. Furthermore, the boundedness of the entire closed-loop system is rigorously established. Numerical simulations are provided to illustrate the theoretical results.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一类由常微分方程(ODE)与波动偏微分方程(PDE)级联构成的系统在边界控制下的指数镇定问题，通过引入新型变换设计状态反馈控制器，并针对匹配扰动构建了基于扰动估计器的Luenberger型状态观测器，实现了系统的指数稳定与有界性。
AI.motivation: 解决ODE-波动PDE级联系统在四种边界互联形式下的输出反馈指数镇定问题，并处理系统中存在的内部不确定性与外部匹配扰动。
AI.method: 1) 引入新型变换将PDE边界控制输入融入ODE子系统；2) 基于该变换设计状态反馈控制器实现指数稳定；3) 针对匹配扰动构建扰动估计器；4) 利用扰动估计器设计Luenberger型状态观测器，实现基于观测器的抗扰控制方案。
AI.result: 所提出的状态反馈控制器实现了ODE和PDE组件的指数稳定性；基于扰动估计器的观测器方案有效抑制了匹配扰动并实现指数镇定；整个闭环系统的有界性得到严格证明；数值仿真验证了理论结果的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文所提的变换与基于观测器的控制策略能够有效解决含扰动ODE-波动PDE级联系统的指数镇定问题，为混合参数系统的抗扰控制提供了理论框架。

title: Scalable Gaussian process inference via neural feature maps
summary: We present a theoretically grounded Gaussian process framework that leverages neural feature maps to construct expressive kernels. We show that the learned feature map can be interpreted as an optimal low-rank approximation to a Gram matrix derived from an implied RKHS, from which we establish consistency of the GP posterior. We further analyse the spectral properties of the induced kernels and introduce product feature-map kernels to address oversmoothing. This simple yet powerful approach enables fast, scalable, and accurate exact GP inference with minimal upfront work. The flexibility of kernel design supports seamless application to both regression and classification tasks across diverse data modalities, including tabular inputs and structured domains such as images. On benchmark datasets, this approach surpasses pre-existing methods in terms of accuracy and training and prediction efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经特征映射的高斯过程框架，通过构造最优低秩Gram矩阵近似实现快速精确的GP推理，并引入乘积特征映射核解决过平滑问题，在回归和分类任务上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的高斯过程方法在处理大规模数据时面临计算瓶颈，且传统核函数设计缺乏灵活性，难以兼顾表达能力与计算效率。作者希望构建一种理论上严谨、可扩展且精确的GP框架，在降低计算复杂度的同时保持模型性能。
AI.method: 1) 利用神经特征映射构造可学习的核函数；2) 将学习的特征映射解释为对隐含RKHS中Gram矩阵的最优低秩近似；3) 分析诱导核的谱性质，引入乘积特征映射核来缓解过平滑问题；4) 支持精确GP推断，无需近似。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上，该方法在回归和分类任务（包括表格数据和图像等结构化数据）中，在准确率以及训练和预测效率方面均超越了已有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为GP提供了一种兼具理论保证、计算效率和灵活性的解决方案，核设计的灵活性使其能无缝应用于多种数据模态和任务，且只需最少的预处理工作。

title: Human-Inspired Memory Architecture for LLM Agents
summary: Current LLM agents lack principled mechanisms for managing persistent memory across long interaction horizons. We present a biologically-grounded memory architecture comprising six cognitive mechanisms: (1) sleep-phase consolidation, (2) interference-based forgetting, (3) engram maturation, (4) reconsolidation upon retrieval, (5) entity knowledge graphs, and (6) hybrid multi-cue retrieval. Each mechanism addresses a specific failure mode of naive memory accumulation. We introduce a synthetic calibration methodology that derives all pipeline thresholds without benchmark data exposure, eliminating a common source of evaluation leakage. We evaluate on two benchmarks. First, a VSCode issue-tracking dataset (13K issues, 120K events) where deduplication-based consolidation achieves 97.2% retention precision with 58% store reduction (+21.8 pp over baseline). Second, the LongMemEval personal-chat benchmark where we conduct the first streaming M-tier evaluation (475 sessions, ~540K unique turns). At a 200K-token context budget, our pipeline matches raw retrieval accuracy (70.1% vs. 71.2%, overlapping 95% CI) while exposing a tunable accuracy/store-size operating curve. At S-tier scale (50 sessions), dedup-based consolidation yields a +13.3 pp improvement in preference recall.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生物认知机制的LLM智能体持久记忆架构，包含六种认知机制（睡眠期巩固、干扰性遗忘、印迹成熟、提取后再巩固、实体知识图谱、混合多线索检索），并引入合成校准方法避免评估泄漏。在VSCode问题追踪数据集（13K问题/120K事件）上实现97.2%的保留精度和58%的存储缩减，在LongMemEval基准（475会话/540K轮次）上首次进行流式M级评估，200K上下文预算下匹配原始检索准确率（70.1% vs 71.2%），S级规模下偏好召回提升13.3个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体缺乏管理跨长交互历史持久记忆的原则性机制，朴素记忆累积存在多种失败模式。
AI.method: 提出包含六种认知机制的生物学灵感记忆架构：睡眠期巩固、干扰性遗忘、印迹成熟、提取后再巩固、实体知识图谱、混合多线索检索；引入无需基准数据暴露的合成校准方法推导所有管道阈值。
AI.result: 在VSCode数据集上：去重巩固实现97.2%保留精度和58%存储缩减（优于基线21.8个百分点）。在LongMemEval上：200K上下文预算下匹配原始检索准确率（70.1% vs 71.2%，95%置信区间重叠）；S级规模（50会话）下去重巩固偏好召回提升13.3个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的记忆架构能有效解决长交互场景下的持久记忆管理问题，在保持召回精度的同时大幅降低存储开销，并提供了可调节的精度/存储开销操作曲线。

title: A PyTorch Library of Turing-Complete Neural Networks
summary: We present a PyTorch package that compiles neural networks and their weights from Turing machine descriptions, producing models that exactly simulate the specified machine without any training. Given a transition function and a set of terminal states, the package constructs a model whose forward pass corresponds to one step of the Turing machine. Two architectures are implemented, each realizing a different theoretical result: (1) a transformer with self-attention, cross-attention, and feedforward layers based on Wei, Chen, and Ma (2021), and (2) a recurrent network based on Siegelmann and Sontag (1995) that encodes the stack in a Cantor set. We develop the constructions from first principles, showing how ReLU networks implement Boolean circuits (AND, OR, NOT, XOR gates and their composition into DNF formulas and binary adders) and how hard attention implements positional lookup on the tape. The package serves as a concrete, runnable reference for the symbolic-neural bridge, and as a foundation for future work on the stability of constructed solutions under gradient-based optimization. Code is available at https://github.com/jonrbates/turing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个PyTorch包，能够将图灵机描述编译为无需训练即可精确模拟指定机器的神经网络模型，实现了变换器和循环网络两种架构。
AI.motivation: 旨在搭建符号系统与神经网络之间的桥梁，提供从图灵机描述到可运行神经网络模型的自动化编译工具，为研究构造性解决方案在梯度优化下的稳定性奠定基础。
AI.method: 基于两种理论成果实现：(1) 包含自注意力、交叉注意力和前馈层的变换器架构；(2) 基于Cantor集编码栈的循环网络架构。从基本原理出发，展示ReLU网络如何实现布尔电路（与或非门、异或门及其组合为DNF公式和二进制加法器），以及硬注意力如何实现磁带上的位置查找。
AI.result: 构建了一个可运行的PyTorch包，能够从图灵机转移函数和终止状态集合自动生成无需训练的神经网络模型，模型的前向传播对应图灵机的一步操作。
AI.conclusion: 该包作为符号-神经桥接的具体可运行参考，为未来研究构造性解决方案在基于梯度优化下的稳定性提供了基础工具。

title: Parameterized Complexity of Stationarity Testing for Piecewise-Affine Functions and Shallow CNN Losses
summary:
We study the parameterized complexity of testing approximate first-order stationarity at a prescribed point for continuous piecewise-affine (PA) functions, a basic task in nonsmooth optimization. PA functions form a canonical model for nonsmooth stationarity testing and capture the local polyhedral geometry that appears in ReLU-type training losses. Recent work by Tian and So (SODA 2025) shows that testing approximate stationarity notions for PA functions is computationally intractable in the worst case, and identifies fixed-dimensional tractability as an open direction.
  We address this direction from the viewpoint of parameterized complexity, with the ambient dimension $d$ as the parameter. In this paper, we give XP algorithms in fixed dimension for the tractable sides, and prove W[1]-hardness for the complementary sides. Moreover, lower bounds under the Exponential Time Hypothesis rule out algorithms running in time $ρ(d)\size^{o(d)}$ for any computable function $ρ$, where $\size$ denotes the total binary encoding length of the stationarity-testing instance. As a further consequence, our results yield the corresponding parameterized complexity picture for testing local minimality of continuous PA functions. We further extend our hardness results to a family of shallow ReLU CNN training losses, with stationarity tested in the trainable weight space. Thus, the same parameterized-complexity picture also appears for simple CNN training losses.

AI.tldr: 本文研究连续分段仿射(PA)函数近似一阶平稳性检验的参数化复杂度，以维度d为参数，给出了固定维度的XP算法和W[1]-硬度结果，并证明了指数时间假设下的下界，同时将硬度结果扩展到浅层ReLU CNN训练损失。
AI.motivation: PA函数是非光滑优化中平稳性检验的基本模型，捕捉了ReLU型训练损失的局部多面体几何。Tian和So (SODA 2025)证明了最坏情况下PA函数近似平稳性检验的计算难解性，并指出固定维度可解性是一个开放方向。本文旨在从参数化复杂度角度解决该方向。
AI.method: 以环境维度d为参数，对可解侧给出固定维度的XP算法，对互补侧证明W[1]-硬度；利用指数时间假设(ETH)建立时间下界ρ(d)·size^{o(d)}；将硬度结果扩展到浅层ReLU CNN训练损失的平稳性检验。
AI.result: 给出了可解侧的XP算法和不可解侧的W[1]-硬度证明；ETH下排除了ρ(d)·size^{o(d)}时间的算法；得到了局部极小性检验的对应参数化复杂度图景；将硬度结果推广到浅层ReLU CNN训练损失。
AI.conclusion: PA函数近似一阶平稳性检验在参数d下具有完整的参数化复杂度刻画：固定维度可解但随维度增长呈指数级困难，且该困难性在简单的CNN训练损失中同样出现。

title: Characterizing the Generalization Error of Random Feature Regression with Arbitrary Data-Augmentation
summary: This paper aims at analyzing the regularization effect that data augmentation induces on supervised regression methods in the proportional regime, where the number of covariates grows proportionally to the number of samples. We provide a tight characterization of the test error, measured in mean squared error, in terms only of the population quantities of the true data, as well as first and second order statistics of the augmentation scheme. Our results are valid under misspecified feature maps, and for any network architecture where only the last readout layer is trained, and the rest of the network is either frozen or randomly initialized. We specify our results in the case of Gaussian data, and show that our asymptotic characterization is tight in this setting.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了在比例增长机制下，数据增强对监督回归方法产生的正则化效应。作者给出了测试误差（均方误差）的精确表征，该表征仅依赖于真实数据的总体量以及增强方案的一阶和二阶统计量。结果适用于错误指定的特征映射，以及仅训练最后一层读出层、其余层冻结或随机初始化的任何网络架构。在高斯数据情形下，作者证明了其渐近表征是紧的。
AI.motivation: 旨在理解数据增强在比例增长机制下对监督回归方法的正则化效应，并给出测试误差的精确理论表征。
AI.method: 采用比例增长机制（协变量数量与样本数量成比例增长），通过仅依赖真实数据总体量及增强方案的一阶、二阶统计量来刻画测试误差。理论推导适用于错误指定的特征映射和仅训练最后一层的神经架构。
AI.result: 给出了测试均方误差的紧的渐近表征，在高斯数据设定下验证了该表征的紧致性。
AI.conclusion: 数据增强在比例增长机制下对回归方法具有可量化的正则化效应，其测试误差可由数据总体统计量和增强方案统计量精确刻画。

title: Log analysis is necessary for credible evaluation of AI agents
summary: Agent benchmarks typically report only final outcomes: pass or fail. This threatens evaluation credibility in three ways. First, scores may be inflated or deflated by shortcuts and benchmark artifacts, misrepresenting capability. Second, benchmark performance may fail to predict real-world utility due to scaffold limitations and recurring failure modes. Finally, capability scores may conceal dangerous or catastrophic actions taken by the agent. We argue that log analysis -- the systematic tracking and analysis of the inputs, execution, and outputs of an AI agent -- is necessary to overcome these validity threats and promote credible agent evaluation. In this paper, we (1) present a taxonomy of threats to credible evaluation documented through log analysis, and (2) develop a set of guiding principles for log analysis. We illustrate these principles on tau-Bench Airline, revealing that pass^5 performance was under-elicited by nearly 50% and surfacing deployment failure modes invisible to outcome metrics. We conclude with pragmatic recommendations to increase uptake of log analysis, directed at diverse stakeholders including benchmark creators, model developers, independent evaluators, and deployers.

AI.tldr: 本文指出智能体基准测试仅报告二元成败结果存在三大有效性威胁（分数失真、无法预测实际效用、隐藏危险行为），提出通过日志分析（系统追踪AI智能体的输入、执行和输出）来提升评估可信度。论文构建了可信评估威胁的分类体系，制定日志分析指导原则，并在tau-Bench Airline上验证，发现pass@5性能被低估近50%，且揭示了传统指标无法捕捉的部署失败模式。
AI.motivation: 当前智能体基准测试仅报告最终成败结果，导致评估可信度受到三大威胁：分数因捷径和基准伪影被扭曲、基准性能无法预测实际效用、能力分数可能隐藏危险行为。因此需要日志分析来克服这些威胁。
AI.method: (1) 提出通过日志分析可揭示的可信评估威胁分类体系；(2) 制定日志分析指导原则；(3) 在tau-Bench Airline上实证验证这些原则。
AI.result: 在tau-Bench Airline上，pass@5性能被低估了近50%，且发现了传统结果指标无法感知的部署失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 日志分析对提升智能体评估可信度至关重要，建议面向基准创建者、模型开发者、独立评估者和部署者等不同利益相关方推动日志分析的采纳。

title: Temporal-Decay Shapley: A Time-Aware Data Valuation Framework for Time-Series Data
summary: With the rapid development of machine learning applications on time-series data, accurately assessing the value of training samples has become essential for data selection, noise detection, and model optimization. However, traditional data valuation methods usually assume that samples are independent and identically distributed, and thus ignore the time-varying nature of sample value in time-series data. This paper proposes an improved temporal Shapley data valuation method that enables accurate sample valuation for time-series data through a temporal decay mechanism and a multi-scale fusion strategy. Specifically, we propose three progressively enhanced temporal Shapley methods. Temporal-Decay Shapley (TDS) incorporates temporal information into Shapley value computation through exponential decay weights; the improved TDS adopts power exponential decay to better adapt to nonlinear temporal drift; and Multi-Scale Temporal-Decay Shapley (MS-TDS) constructs a multi-scale fusion mechanism that balances the value of short-term hotspot samples and long-term foundational samples through parallel multi-scale valuation and sample-level adaptive fusion. Experimental results show that the proposed methods generally outperform traditional methods in noise detection and high-value data identification tasks, with more evident advantages under most strongly temporal settings, thereby effectively improving the accuracy and robustness of data valuation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的时间Shapley数据估值方法（TDS、改进TDS和MS-TDS），通过时间衰减机制和多尺度融合策略，实现对时间序列数据的准确样本估值，在噪声检测和高价值数据识别任务中优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 传统数据估值方法通常假设样本独立同分布，忽略了时间序列数据中样本价值随时间变化的特性，亟需一种能够捕捉时间动态性的数据估值方法。
AI.method: 提出三种渐进增强的时间Shapley方法：1) Temporal-Decay Shapley (TDS) 引入指数衰减权重；2) 改进TDS采用幂指数衰减适应非线性时间漂移；3) Multi-Scale Temporal-Decay Shapley (MS-TDS) 构建多尺度融合机制，通过并行多尺度估值和样本级自适应融合平衡短期热点样本与长期基础样本的价值。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提方法在噪声检测和高价值数据识别任务中普遍优于传统方法，在强时间依赖性设置下优势更为明显，有效提升了数据估值的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入时间衰减和多尺度融合策略，时间Shapley方法能够更准确地评估时间序列数据中样本的动态价值，为数据选择、噪声检测和模型优化提供了更可靠的工具。

title: A PAC-Bayes Approach for Controlling Unknown Linear Discrete-time Systems
summary: This paper presents a PAC-Bayes framework for learning controllers for unknown stochastic linear discrete-time systems, where the system parameters are drawn from a fixed but unknown distribution. We derive a data-dependent high probability bound on the performance of any learned (stochastic) controller, and propose novel efficient learning algorithms with theoretical guarantees, which can be implemented for both finite and infinite controller spaces. Compared to prior work, our bound holds for unbounded quadratic cost. In the special case where LQG is optimal, our numerical results suggest that the learned controllers achieve comparable performance to LQG.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于学习未知随机线性离散时间系统控制器的PAC-Bayes框架，推导了数据依赖的高概率性能边界，并提出了具有理论保证的高效学习算法，在LQG最优的特殊情况下，学习控制器能达到与LQG相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 针对未知随机线性离散时间系统的控制器学习问题，现有方法在处理无界二次成本以及有限/无限控制器空间时存在局限性，亟需一个具有理论保证的统一框架。
AI.method: 采用PAC-Bayes理论框架，推导数据依赖的高概率性能边界，并针对有限和无限控制器空间设计可高效实现的学习算法。
AI.result: 得到的性能边界适用于无界二次成本；数值实验表明，在LQG最优的情况下，学习控制器性能与LQG控制器相当。
AI.conclusion: 提出的PAC-Bayes框架为未知随机线性系统的控制器学习提供了理论保证和实用算法，在LQG场景下展现出竞争力的性能。

title: Fast Training of Mixture-of-Experts for Time Series Forecasting via Expert Loss Integration
summary: We propose a novel adaptive Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) framework for time series forecasting that enhances expert specialization by incorporating expert-specific loss information directly into the training process. Notably, the overall objective comprises the base forecasting loss and expert-specific losses, allowing expert-level prediction errors to jointly shape training alongside the global forecasting loss. This framework is further combined with a partial online learning strategy, enabling incremental updates of both the gating mechanism and expert parameters. This approach significantly reduces computational cost by eliminating the need for repeated full model retraining. By integrating expert-level loss awareness with efficient online optimization, the proposed method achieves improved learning efficiency while maintaining strong predictive performance. Empirical results across economic, tourism, and energy datasets with varying frequencies demonstrate that the proposed approach generally outperforms both statistical methods and state-of-the-art neural network models, such as Transformers and WaveNet, in forecasting accuracy and computational efficiency. Furthermore, ablation studies confirm the effectiveness of the expert-specific loss integration strategy, highlighting its contribution to enhancing predictive performance.

AI.tldr: 提出一种自适应混合专家（MoE）时间序列预测框架，通过在训练过程中引入专家特定损失信息并结合部分在线学习策略，提升预测精度与计算效率，在多个数据集上优于统计方法和Transformer、WaveNet等先进模型。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列预测方法中，混合专家模型缺乏对专家层面预测误差的直接感知，导致专家专业化程度不足，且全模型重复训练计算成本高，缺乏高效的增量更新机制。
AI.method: 将整体目标函数分解为基础预测损失和专家特定损失，使专家级预测误差参与训练；结合部分在线学习策略，对门控机制和专家参数进行增量更新，避免全模型重训练。
AI.result: 在经济、旅游和能源等多频率数据集上，该方法在预测精度和计算效率上普遍优于统计方法和Transformer、WaveNet等神经网络模型；消融实验验证了专家特定损失集成策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 专家级损失感知与高效在线优化的结合能够提升学习效率和预测性能，为时间序列预测提供了一种高效且精准的MoE框架。

title: Evaluating Developmental Cognition Capabilities of LLMs
summary:
Conversational AI is increasingly personalized around users' preferences, histories, goals, and knowledge, but much less around how users interpret and take up model outputs to construct and understand their reality. We draw on Robert Kegan's constructive-developmental theory as a complementary lens on this dimension. Existing methods for assessing developmental stage in the Keganian tradition rely either on expert interviews that do not scale or on sentence-completion instruments that are proprietary, lengthy, or invasive. To make this perspective tractable for LLM evaluation, we introduce the Developmental Sentence Completion Test (DSCT), a 20-item instrument designed to elicit developmental signal in self-administered text. Throughout, we treat the resulting labels as characterizations of stage-like structure in elicited responses, not as validated person-level developmental stage. We then ask how much of that signal can be recovered by LLMs across three elicited response regimes: simulated personas, real human respondents, and default model-generated answers.
  On simulated personas, top frontier models recover simulator-intended labels with high accuracy. On real human DSCT responses, human-LLM agreement is fair, with much stronger within-neighborhood than exact agreement. Finally, when LLMs answer DSCT prompts without persona-conditioning, their responses exhibit stable stage-like differences across model families, with larger and newer models tending to generate higher-rated text. These results suggest that stage-conditioned signal is cleaner in synthetic responses than in human-written DSCT text, and that the core constraint for stage-aware conversational AI is not classifier accuracy alone, but the availability of developmental signal from elicited text.

AI.tldr: 本文引入发展性句子完成测试（DSCT），基于Kegan建构发展理论评估LLM生成的文本中体现的认知发展阶段信号，发现模拟人格下前沿模型能高准确率恢复设计标签，真实人类回应中人机一致性中等，且不同模型家族生成的文本表现出稳定的阶段差异。
AI.motivation: 现有对话AI个性化主要围绕用户偏好、历史等维度，但较少关注用户如何解释和构建自身认知现实。Kegan的建构发展理论提供了这一维度的补充视角，但传统测量方法（专家访谈、句子完成测试）难以规模化，因此需要一种可扩展的、适合LLM评估的方法。
AI.method: 设计了20题的发展性句子完成测试（DSCT），在三种回应情境下评估LLM对发展阶段信号的恢复能力：(1) 模拟人格（已知设计标签）；(2) 真实人类被试；(3) 无人格条件的模型默认回答。将结果标签视为回应中阶段类结构特征的表征，而非验证性的人格发展水平。
AI.result: 前沿模型在模拟人格条件下能以高准确率恢复设计标签；真实人类回应中人机一致性达到中等水平（邻域一致性远强于精确一致性）；不同模型家族在无人格条件下表现出稳定且可区分的阶段差异，更大更新的模型倾向于生成更高级评分的文本。
AI.conclusion: 阶段条件化信号在合成回应中比在人类DSCT文本中更清晰；发展感知对话AI的核心瓶颈并非分类器精度，而是能否从 elicited text 中获取到足够的阶段信号。

title: Quantitative Sobolev Approximation Bounds for Neural Operators with Empirical Validation on Burgers Equation
summary: Neural operators have emerged as a powerful tool for learning mappings between infinite-dimensional function spaces. However, their approximation properties in Sobolev norms remain poorly quantified, even though these norms control both function values and derivatives and are the natural metrics for PDE well-posedness, stability, and generalization. We develop a functional-analytic framework for operator learning in Sobolev spaces and connect it to the numerical behavior of Fourier Neural Operators (FNOs) on a prototypical PDE. First, for a continuous nonlinear operator $\mathcal{G}: H^{s}(D)\to H^{t}(D')$ with $s > d/2$ and inputs restricted to a compact subset of $H^{s}(D)$, we prove that $\mathcal{G}$ can be uniformly approximated in $H^{t}$-norm by a neural operator with $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-d/s})$ trainable parameters. This yields an explicit complexity--error relation of the form $\|\mathcal{G}-\mathcal{G}_θ\|_{H^{t}} \lesssim C N^{-s/d}$. We then study the one-dimensional viscous Burgers solution operator $\mathcal{G}: u_{0}\mapsto u(\cdot,1)$ on a bounded $H^{1}$-ball and train FNOs with an $H^{1}$-loss. Across a sweep of model sizes, we obtain test $H^{1}$-errors down to $\mathcal{O}(10^{-7})$ and relative errors of order $10^{-3}$, with predictions accurately matching both solutions and spatial derivatives on held-out data. A log-log plot of Sobolev error versus parameter count exhibits an approximate power law $\|\mathcal{G}-\mathcal{G}_θ\|_{H^{1}} \approx C N^{-α}$ with empirical exponent $α\approx 1.4$, and long-horizon training reveals optimization instabilities in large FNOs, providing quantitative evidence that Sobolev-space approximation theory meaningfully predicts neural-operator scaling behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了神经算子在Sobolev空间中的逼近理论框架，证明了连续非线性算子可用具有特定参数量的神经算子一致逼近，并通过一维粘性Burgers方程数值实验验证了理论预测的标度律，发现FNO的Sobolev误差与参数数量满足幂律关系，经验指数约为1.4。
AI.motivation: 神经算子在学习无限维函数空间映射方面表现出色，但其在Sobolev范数下的逼近性质缺乏量化分析。Sobolev范数同时控制函数值和导数，是PDE适定性、稳定性和泛化的自然度量，因此亟需建立相应的理论框架。
AI.method: 理论方面：利用泛函分析框架，证明定义在紧致子集上的连续非线性算子$\mathcal{G}: H^{s}(D)\to H^{t}(D')$可由神经算子在$H^{t}$-范数下一致逼近，参数量为$\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-d/s})$，误差界为$\|\mathcal{G}-\mathcal{G}_θ\|_{H^{t}} \lesssim C N^{-s/d}$。实验方面：以FNO求解一维粘性Burgers方程解算子，采用$H^1$损失训练，通过改变模型大小并记录测试误差验证理论预言。
AI.result: 实验得到测试$H^1$误差低至$\mathcal{O}(10^{-7})$，相对误差约$10^{-3}$，预测准确匹配解和空间导数。Sobolev误差与参数量的对数-对数图呈现近似幂律$\|\mathcal{G}-\mathcal{G}_θ\|_{H^{1}} \approx C N^{-α}$，经验指数$α\approx 1.4$。同时发现大FNO在长时训练中存在优化不稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立的Sobolev空间下神经算子的逼近理论能够有意义地预测实际神经算子（如FNO）的标度行为，为理解算子学习的逼近性质提供了定量基础。

title: Observer Design for a Class of ODE -- Continuum-PDE Cascade Systems Inspired by a Control-Theoretic Model of Large-Scale Arterial Networks of Blood Flow
summary: We develop a backstepping-based observer design for a class of ODE - continuum-PDE cascade systems, which can be viewed as the limit, of a finite collection of ODE - $2 \times 2$ hyperbolic systems, as the number of individual PDE system components tends to infinity. The large-scale collection of ODE - $2 \times 2$ hyperbolic systems is motivated by a dynamic model that we present, of a network of peripheral arteries, to which central (aortic) blood flow/pressure enters. We address a case in which average (boundary) measurements, over the ensemble dimension, are available, which is motivated by the availability of non-invasive, peripheral flow/pressure measurements. Exponential stability of the estimation error system is shown by proving well-posedness of the kernel equations and constructing a Lyapunov functional. We also establish that part of the backstepping kernels derived coincide with the solution of a Sylvester equation. We then apply the continuum-based observer for state estimation of the large-scale counterpart and, in particular, of the blood flow system, introducing an approach for optimal construction of continuum approximations. We also introduce an implementation method, adopting a spectral-based approach for computing the observer dynamics, which we illustrate in an academic, numerical simulation example. Furthermore, we illustrate the design in the problem of central flow/pressure estimation using realistic parameters and flow/pressure waveforms.

AI.tldr: 本文针对一类ODE-连续统PDE级联系统（可视为有限个ODE-2×2双曲型系统在分量数趋于无穷时的极限）设计了基于反步法的观测器，证明了误差指数稳定性，并应用于外周动脉网络中的中心血流/压力估计。
AI.motivation: 受外周动脉网络动态模型的启发，其中大量ODE-2×2双曲型系统描述血流传播，而实际中仅能获取非侵入性外周边界测量（平均测量），需要设计观测器来估计不可直接测量的中心（主动脉）血流/压力状态。
AI.method: 采用反步法（backstepping）设计观测器；通过证明核方程适定性并构造Lyapunov泛函建立误差指数稳定性；发现部分反步核满足Sylvester方程；引入谱方法实现观测器动力学计算；提出连续统近似的最优构造方法。
AI.result: 证明了估计误差系统的指数稳定性；表明反步核的一部分与Sylvester方程的解等价；通过学术数值算例和基于真实生理参数的仿真验证了设计有效性，成功实现了中心血流/压力的估计。
AI.conclusion: 所提连续统基观测器能有效用于大规模ODE-PDE级联系统的状态估计，尤其适用于外周动脉网络中的中心血流动力学估计，为利用非侵入性外周测量进行主动脉状态监测提供了理论依据。

title: Uncertainty in Physics and AI: Taxonomy, Quantification, and Validation
summary: Reliable uncertainty quantification is essential for the use of machine learning in physics, where scientific discoveries depend on validated probabilistic statements. We provide a structured overview of uncertainty quantification in ML for physics, introducing a unified taxonomy of uncertainty and clarifying the interpretation of predictive and inference uncertainties across frequentist and Bayesian frameworks. We discuss principled validation tools, including coverage, calibration, bias tests, and proper scoring rules, and illustrate them with simple regression and classification examples.

AI.tldr: 本文系统梳理了机器学习在物理学应用中的不确定性量化方法，提出了统一的分类体系，阐明了频率派和贝叶斯框架下的预测与推断不确定性，并讨论了覆盖度、校准、偏差检验和适当评分规则等验证工具。
AI.motivation: 可靠的 uncertainty quantification 对于物理学中基于机器学习做出科学发现至关重要，而当前缺乏对这一领域的结构化概述和统一分类。
AI.method: 提出统一的不确定性分类法，区分频率派与贝叶斯框架下的预测不确定性和推断不确定性；介绍覆盖度、校准、偏差检验和适当评分规则等验证工具，并通过回归和分类实例进行说明。
AI.result: 建立了跨框架的不确定性量化统一视角，为物理科学应用提供了系统的验证方法论。
AI.conclusion: 该分类法和验证框架有助于推动机器学习在物理学中的可信应用，确保概率性声明的科学有效性。

title: Why Retrying Fails: Context Contamination in LLM Agent Pipelines
summary: When an LLM agent fails a multi-step tool-augmented task and retries, the failed attempt typically remains in its context window -- contaminating the next attempt and elevating the per-step error rate beyond the base level. This context-contaminated restart phenomenon is widely observed in practice yet entirely lacks formal treatment. We introduce the Context-Contaminated Restart Model (CCRM): a chain of T tool-call steps, each failing with base rate epsilon_0; after any failed attempt, the subsequent attempt operates in contaminated context with elevated error rate epsilon_1 > epsilon_0. Under this model we derive five main results. (R1) An exact closed-form formula for P(succeed in at most K attempts). (R2) A cascade-overhead theorem giving the additional attempts Delta K incurred by contamination versus the clean-restart baseline. (R3) An optimal budget-allocation theorem identifying the pipeline depth T* that maximises success probability for a fixed total budget B=KT; we prove the closed form T* = sqrt(B * log(1/(1-epsilon_1)) / log(1/(1-epsilon_0))), with K*=B/T*. (R4) An information-theoretic lower bound via Le Cam's method showing K_CCRM is tight up to O(1). (R5) A clean-restart dominance theorem quantifying the exact benefit of context-clearing before retry. We validate CCRM on real SWE-bench Verified data: the IID model overestimates pass@3 by 17.4 percentage points (98.6% vs. 81.2%), while CCRM fits with error less than 0.001, implying a cascade ratio of epsilon_1/epsilon_0 = 7.1. Monte Carlo experiments confirm all theoretical predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出上下文污染重启模型（CCRM），刻画LLM智能体在多步工具增强任务失败后重启时，因失败上下文残留导致错误率升高的现象。推导了成功概率、级联开销、最优预算分配、信息论下界和清洁重启优势五个理论结果，并在SWE-bench Verified数据上验证，显示传统IID模型高估成功率17.4个百分点，而CCRM误差小于0.001，级联比高达7.1。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体在多步工具调用任务中失败后重试时，失败尝试的上下文会保留在窗口内，污染下一次尝试，使每步错误率高于基线。这一现象在实践中广泛存在但缺乏形式化建模，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 提出CCRM模型，将T步工具调用链建模为每步有基础错误率ε0，失败后重试在污染上下文中进行，错误率提升至ε1 > ε0。基于该模型推导了五个核心定理的闭式解，并在SWE-bench Verified数据集上拟合验证，辅以蒙特卡洛实验。
AI.result: （1）得到最多K次尝试成功概率的精确闭式公式；（2）给出污染相对于清洁重启的额外尝试次数ΔK的级联开销定理；（3）证明最优预算分配定理，得T* = sqrt(B * log(1/(1-ε1)) / log(1/(1-ε0)))；（4）Le Cam方法证明信息论下界紧至O(1)；（5）量化清洁重启的优势。实验显示IID模型高估pass@3达17.4%，CCRM拟合误差<0.001，级联比ε1/ε0=7.1。
AI.conclusion: CCRM准确描述了LLM智能体重试中的上下文污染现象，揭示了传统IID假设的严重偏差，提供了最优重试策略的理论指导，建议在重试前清除失败上下文以显著提升成功率。

title: Communication Dynamics Neural Networks: FFT-Diagonalized Layers for Improved Hessian Conditioning at Reduced Parameter Count
summary:
Background and motivation. The Communication Dynamics (CD) framework, introduced in two earlier papers for atomic-energy prediction and field-induced superconductivity, treats each physical channel as a (2l+1)-vertex polygon whose discrete Fourier transform yields its energy spectrum. This paper applies the same circulant-spectral machinery to neural-network design.
  Layer construction. CDLinear is a block-circulant linear layer with block size B = 2l+1 and 1/B the parameter count of a dense layer of equal input/output dimensions. Three properties follow from the construction. (i) The Hessian of mean-squared loss with respect to the weights is diagonalized by the discrete Fourier transform, with eigenvalues |F[Xj](k)|^2 read directly from the input statistics (Theorem 1). (ii) Under input pre-whitening, the population Hessian condition number satisfies kappa = 1 exactly, with the empirical condition number bounded by 1+O(sqrt(B/N)) on N samples (Theorem 2). (iii) The Shannon noise rate alpha_CD = 0.0118 calibrated in the parent CD papers from the Na D-doublet specifies a transferable, non-arbitrary dropout rate.
  Empirical evaluation. A CDLinear MLP at B = 4 achieves 97.50% +/- 0.23% test accuracy with 2,380 parameters versus 98.15% +/- 0.47% for a parameter-matched dense MLP at 8,970 parameters, a 3.8x parameter reduction at 0.65% accuracy cost, within one standard deviation of the seed-to-seed spread. The CD-MLP mean Hessian condition number kappa = 1.9x10^4 is 310x smaller than the dense baseline kappa = 5.9x10^6, in quantitative agreement with Theorem 2.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CDLinear块循环线性层，将物理中基于离散傅里叶变换的通信动力学框架应用于神经网络设计。该层参数仅为同尺寸全连接层的1/B（B=2l+1），具有Hessian可对角化、条件数接近1（经理论证明）以及可迁移的香农噪声率作为dropout率等特性。在MLP实验中，以2380个参数达到97.50%准确率，相比参数匹配的稠密MLP（8970参数，98.15%准确率）实现了3.8倍参数压缩，且Hessian条件数降低310倍。
AI.motivation: 将物理中用于原子能量预测和场致超导的通信动力学（CD）框架中的循环谱方法应用于神经网络设计，以探索更高效的网络结构。
AI.method: 提出CDLinear层，即块循环线性层，块大小B=2l+1，参数量为同尺寸全连接层的1/B。利用离散傅里叶变换实现Hessian对角化，并在输入预白化条件下使种群Hessian条件数精确为1。同时将CD框架中校准的香农噪声率α_CD=0.0118作为可迁移的dropout率。
AI.result: CDLinear MLP（B=4）以2380参数达到97.50%准确率，而参数匹配的稠密MLP（8970参数）为98.15%准确率，实现3.8倍参数压缩，准确率仅下降0.65%。CD-MLP的Hessian条件数（1.9×10^4）相比稠密基线（5.9×10^6）降低310倍，与定理2定量吻合。
AI.conclusion: CDLinear层在显著减少参数量的同时保持高精度，并具有更优的条件数特性，表明将物理中的通信动力学框架引入神经网络设计是一种有效的方法。

title: Randomized Max-Vertex-Cover Interdiction with Matroid Constraints
summary:
We study a new bilevel optimization problem, termed the Randomized Max-Vertex-Cover Interdiction (RMVCI) problem under matroid constraints, which can be modeled as a zero-sum Stackelberg game on a network between a leader and a follower. The leader randomly selects a subset of vertices to protect, subject to a matroid constraint, while the follower-after inferring the leader's protection probability distribution-chooses a subset of vertices (also matroid-constrained) to attack, aiming to maximize the expected total weight of edges incident to the set of vertices that are both attacked and unprotected. The leader's objective is to determine an optimal randomized interdiction strategy that minimizes the follower's expected payoff.
  Since the follower's response problem is NP-hard, the resulting bilevel program is computationally challenging. We develop a conceptual approximation framework for tackling general bilevel interdiction problems. For the RMVCI problem under matroid constraints, we first formulate the follower's problem as an integer linear program and show that its linear relaxation admits a tight integrality gap of $\tfrac{4}{3}$. Within the approximation framework, we replace the follower's problem by its LP relaxation, and then study the resulting bilevel program. By shifting from distributions over sets to distributions over vertices and applying our approximation framework, we manage to design a polynomial-time 2-approximation algorithm for this relaxed bilevel problem. Combining these ingredients within our framework yields a polynomial-time $\tfrac{8}{3}$-approximation algorithm for RMVCI under matroid constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一类新的双层优化问题——拟阵约束下的随机最大顶点覆盖拦截问题（RMVCI），将其建模为零和Stackelberg博弈。领导者随机选择受保护顶点子集（满足拟阵约束），跟随者观察到保护概率分布后，选择攻击顶点子集（也满足拟阵约束），以最大化被攻击且未保护顶点所关联边的期望总权重。领导者目标是最小化跟随者的期望收益。由于跟随者问题是NP难的，作者提出概念性近似框架，通过线性松弛和概率转移技术，最终设计了多项式时间的8/3-近似算法。
AI.motivation: 在网络安全、关键基础设施保护等实际应用中，防御者需要在资源有限的情况下随机化防护策略，而攻击者会根据观察到的防护策略选择攻击目标。这类问题可建模为双层优化/Stackelberg博弈，但现有研究缺乏对拟阵约束下随机顶点拦截问题的理论分析。
AI.method: 1）将跟随者问题建模为整数线性规划，证明其线性松弛的积分间隙为4/3；2）提出一个概念性近似框架用于处理一般双层拦截问题；3）在框架内用LP松弛替代跟随者问题，将集合上的概率分布转化为顶点上的概率分布，设计多项式时间2-近似算法；4）结合积分间隙和2-近似，得到8/3-近似算法。
AI.result: 1）证明了跟随者问题LP松弛的积分间隙为4/3；2）设计了松弛双层问题的多项式时间2-近似算法；3）最终得到RMVCI问题在拟阵约束下的多项式时间8/3-近似算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过将随机化防御策略与线性松弛技术相结合，首次为拟阵约束下的随机顶点拦截问题提供了多项式时间常数近似算法，为更一般的双层拦截问题提供了理论分析框架。

title: Multifidelity Gaussian process regression for solving nonlinear partial differential equations
summary: Solving nonlinear partial differential equations (PDEs) using kernel methods offers a compelling alternative to traditional numerical solvers. However, the performance of these methods strongly depends on the choice of kernel. In this work, as the available information is inherently multifidelity, we propose a kernel learning approach based on cokriging, leveraging empirical information from multifidelity simulations. In the first step, we fit a differentiable non-stationary kernel to an empirical kernel obtained from low-fidelity simulations. In the second step, we derive a high-fidelity kernel with estimated hyperparameters, and construct a corresponding high-fidelity mean using the multifidelity framework. These components can then be used within a Gaussian process framework for solving PDEs. Finally, we demonstrate the performance of the proposed physics-informed method on the Burgers' equation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于协同克里金法的多保真核学习方法，用于求解非线性偏微分方程，通过低保真模拟拟合非平稳核，再构建高保真核与均值，在Gaussian过程框架下求解PDE，并在Burgers方程上验证了性能。
AI.motivation: 核方法求解非线性PDE的性能高度依赖核的选择，而传统方法缺乏有效的核学习机制。利用多保真模拟中天然存在的多保真信息来学习更优的核函数。
AI.method: 第一步：从低保真模拟中获取经验核，拟合一个可微的非平稳核；第二步：利用多保真框架估计高保真核的超参数并构建高保真均值，最终在Gaussian过程框架下求解PDE。
AI.result: 在Burgers方程上验证了所提物理信息方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的多保真核学习方法能够有效提升核方法求解非线性PDE的性能。

title: Biological Plausibility and Representational Alignment of Feedback Alignment in Convolutional Networks
summary: The feedback alignment (FA) algorithm offers a biologically plausible alternative to backpropagation (BP) for training neural networks yet notably fails to scale to convolutional architectures. Modifications have been proposed to address this limitation, but at questionable cost to biological plausibility. In this paper, we evaluate five learning algorithms including modified FA and standard BP, applied to the same convolutional architecture with the CIFAR-10 dataset. We provide a tripartite comparative analysis focusing on biological plausibility, interpretability, and computational complexity. Our results indicate that modified FA algorithms converge on internal representations that are structurally similar to those produced by backpropagation. In particular, it appears the functional success of modified FA algorithms may be rooted in their ability to mimic the representational geometry of backpropagation, converging on similar representations despite relying on fundamentally different weight update mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了五种学习算法（包括修改后的反馈对齐和标准反向传播）在卷积架构和CIFAR-10数据集上的表现，从生物合理性、可解释性和计算复杂度三个维度进行分析。结果表明，修改后的FA算法能够收敛到与BP结构相似的内部表征，其功能成功可能源于模仿BP的表征几何结构。
AI.motivation: 反馈对齐（FA）算法作为反向传播（BP）的生物合理替代方案，在卷积架构上难以扩展。已有修改方案试图解决该问题，但牺牲了生物合理性。因此需要系统评估修改后的FA算法是否能在保持一定生物合理性的同时达到与BP相当的性能。
AI.method: 在相同卷积架构和CIFAR-10数据集上，对五种学习算法（包括修改后的FA和标准BP）进行三重比较分析，评估维度包括：生物合理性、可解释性和计算复杂度。通过分析内部表征的结构相似性来探究算法成功的原因。
AI.result: 修改后的FA算法能够收敛到与BP在结构上相似的内部表征。尽管权重更新机制根本不同，修改后的FA算法在表征几何上能够模仿BP，这是其功能成功的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 修改后的FA算法虽然在权重更新机制上与BP有本质区别，但通过模仿BP的表征几何结构，能够在卷积架构上取得功能成功，这为设计兼具生物合理性和实用性的学习算法提供了新思路。

title: CERSA: Cumulative Energy-Retaining Subspace Adaptation for Memory-Efficient Fine-Tuning
summary: To mitigate the memory constraints associated with fine-tuning large pre-trained models, existing parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods, such as LoRA, rely on low-rank updates. However, such updates fail to fully capture the rank characteristics of the weight modifications observed in full-parameter fine-tuning, resulting in a performance gap. Furthermore, LoRA and other existing PEFT methods still require substantial memory to store the full set of frozen weights, limiting their efficiency in resource-constrained settings. To addres these limitations, we introduce Cumulative Energy-Retaining Subspace Adaptation (CERSA), a novel fine-tuning paradigm that leverages singular value decomposition (SVD) to retain only the principal components responsible for 90% to 95% of the spectral energy. By fine-tuning low-rank representations derived from this principal subspace, CERSA significantly reduces memory consumption. We conduct extensive evaluations of CERSA across models of varying scales and domains, including image recognition, text-to-image generation, and natural language understanding. Empirical results demonstrate that CERSA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art PEFT methods while achieving substantially lower memory requirements. The code will be publicly released.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CERSA的参数高效微调方法，通过SVD保留主成分（90%-95%谱能量）进行低秩更新，在降低内存消耗的同时，在图像识别、文本到图像生成和自然语言理解等任务上优于现有PEFT方法。
AI.motivation: 现有PEFT方法（如LoRA）采用低秩更新无法完全捕捉全参数微调中权重修改的秩特性，导致性能差距；同时仍需存储大量冻结权重，在资源受限场景下内存效率不足。
AI.method: 利用奇异值分解（SVD）保留主成分（占谱能量90%-95%），仅在该主成分子空间的低秩表示上进行微调，大幅降低内存消耗。
AI.result: 在图像识别、文本到图像生成和自然语言理解等多个领域的不同规模模型上，CERSA一致优于现有最先进PEFT方法，且内存需求显著更低。
AI.conclusion: CERSA是一种有效的参数高效微调新范式，通过保留主成分子空间实现了性能与内存效率的双重提升。

title: A Riemannian quasi-Newton algorithm for optimization with Euclidean bounds
summary:
We propose a Riemannian limited-memory BFGS method for optimization problems with Euclidean bounds. The method combines a limited-memory quasi-Newton update in the tangent space with a Riemannian adaptation of the generalized Cauchy point strategy from classical L-BFGS-B, enabling efficient handling of Euclidean bounds while exploiting the geometric structure of the optimization domain. This setting is important in several applications, including covariance matrix estimation with bounded variance, neuroimaging, EEG signal classification, and other signal processing or computer-vision tasks that couple manifold variables with constrained Euclidean parameters.
  We provide a generic algorithmic framework and an implementation of the algorithm in the Manopt.jl library. Numerical experiments on benchmark problems indicate only minor reduction in performance on Euclidean problems compared to the classical L-BFGS-B method, while outperforming interior-point methods. Furthermore, the algorithm was tested on two mixed manifold and bounded Euclidean problems: amplitude-limited blind source separation with Gaussianity penalization and bounded-variance maximum likelihood common principal components analysis. The proposed method outperforms existing methods by several orders of magnitude.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于带欧几里得约束优化问题的黎曼有限内存BFGS方法，结合了黎曼几何结构与经典L-BFGS-B的广义柯西点策略，在Manopt.jl中实现。数值实验表明，在纯欧几里得问题上性能略逊于L-BFGS-B但优于内点法，在混合流形与有界欧几里得问题上比现有方法快数个数量级。
AI.motivation: 许多应用（如协方差矩阵估计、神经影像、EEG信号分类、信号处理和计算机视觉）中的优化问题既涉及流形变量，又包含带约束的欧几里得参数。现有方法未能有效结合黎曼几何结构与欧几里得边界约束，需要一种既能利用几何结构又能高效处理边界约束的优化方法。
AI.method: 提出黎曼有限内存BFGS方法，在切空间中执行有限内存拟牛顿更新，并采用黎曼适应的广义柯西点策略来处理欧几里得边界约束。提供了通用算法框架，并在Manopt.jl库中实现。
AI.result: 在纯欧几里得基准问题上，性能略逊于经典L-BFGS-B但优于内点法；在幅度受限盲源分离（含高斯性惩罚）和有界方差最大似然共同主成分分析两个混合问题上，比现有方法快数个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效弥合了黎曼优化与有界约束优化之间的差距，为处理混合流形-有界欧几里得优化问题提供了高效且实用的解决方案。

title: Regret Analysis of Guided Diffusion for Black-Box Optimization over Structured Inputs
summary: Guided-diffusion black-box optimization (BO) has shown strong empirical performance on structured design problems such as molecules and crystals, but its regret behavior remains poorly understood. Existing BO regret analyses typically rely on maximum information gain, non-pretrained surrogate models, or exact acquisition maximization -- assumptions that break down in modern diffusion -- BO pipelines, where pretrained diffusion models serve as powerful priors over valid structures and acquisition maximization is replaced by approximate sampling over astronomically large discrete spaces. We develop a first certificate-based expected simple-regret framework for guided-diffusion BO that avoids maximum-information-gain bounds, RKHS assumptions, and exact acquisition maximization. The central quantity in our analysis is mass lift: the increase in probability mass assigned to near-optimal designs relative to the pretrained generator. This view explains how exponential-looking finite-budget convergence and polynomial acceleration can all arise from the same mechanism. We also give practical diagnostics for estimating search exponents from finite candidate pools and a proposal-corrected resampling construction that provides a fully certified sampler instance.

AI.tldr: 本文为引导扩散黑箱优化（BO）建立了首个基于证书的期望简单遗憾分析框架，引入“质量提升”（mass lift）核心量，揭示了指数级有限预算收敛与多项式加速的同一机制，并提供了实用诊断工具与完全认证的采样器。
AI.motivation: 现有BO遗憾分析依赖最大信息增益、非预训练代理模型或精确采集函数最大化等假设，这些假设在扩散-BO管道中均不成立，因此缺乏对引导扩散BO遗憾行为的理论理解。
AI.method: 提出基于证书的期望简单遗憾框架，绕过最大信息增益界、RKHS假设和精确采集最大化；引入“质量提升”作为核心量度；提出从有限候选池估计搜索指数的实用诊断方法和提议校正重采样构造。
AI.result: 该框架无需传统BO分析的强假设即可推导遗憾界，统一解释了指数级收敛与多项式加速现象，并提供了可实际部署的认证采样器实例。
AI.conclusion: 为预训练扩散模型作为先验的BO场景提供了首个严格的理论分析工具，弥合了扩散BO实践与理论之间的鸿沟。

title: What Will Happen Next: Large Models-Driven Deduction for Emergency Instances
summary: Traditional simulation methods reproduce occurred emergency instances through presetting to assist people in risk assessment and emergency decision-making. However, due to the lack of randomness and diversity, existing simulation systems struggle to fully explore the potential risk as emergency instances are scarce. In contrast, Large Models (LMs) can dynamically adjust generation strategies to introduce controllable randomness, while also possessing extensive prior knowledge and cross-domain knowledge transfer capabilities. Inspired by it, we propose the LMs-driven World Line Divergence System (WLDS), which enables diversified visualization and deduction of emergency instances in different domains. WLDS leverages LMs to deduce emergency instances in various development directions, and introduces the factual calibration and logical calibration mechanism to ensure factual accuracy and logical rigor during the deduction process. The interactive module can independently select deduction directions to avoid potential hallucinations that are difficult for the system to identify. Furthermore, by introducing the visualization module, WLDS forms simulation and deduction that combine text and images, which enhances interpretability. Extensive experiments conducted on the proposed Emergency Instances Deduction (EID) benchmark dataset demonstrate that WLDS achieves high-precision and high-fidelity simulation and deduction of emergency instances in multiple specific domains. Relevant experiments further demonstrate that WLDS can generate more emergency instances deduction data for users and provide support for better decision-making in similar emergency instances in the future.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LMs驱动的世界线发散系统（WLDS），利用大模型生成多样化、多方向的应急事件推演，结合事实校准与逻辑校准机制保证真实性，通过可视化与交互模块增强可解释性，在EID基准数据集上实现了高精度、高保真的推演效果。
AI.motivation: 传统应急模拟缺乏随机性和多样性，难以充分探索潜在风险；而大模型具备可控随机性、先验知识和跨域迁移能力，可用于生成多样化应急事件推演。
AI.method: 提出WLDS系统，包含：(1) LMs驱动的世界线发散机制，生成多个发展方向的应急事件；(2) 事实校准与逻辑校准机制，保证推演的事实准确性和逻辑严谨性；(3) 交互模块，自主选择推演方向以避免幻觉；(4) 可视化模块，图文结合的模拟推演提升可解释性。
AI.result: 在EID基准数据集上的实验表明，WLDS在多个特定领域实现了高精度和高保真的应急事件模拟与推演，且能生成更多推演数据以支持未来决策。
AI.conclusion: WLDS有效结合大模型的生成能力与校准机制，实现了高保真、多样化的应急事件推演，为风险评估和应急决策提供了有力支持。

title: Physics-Modeled Neural Networks
summary:
We introduce \emph{Dynamical Physics-Modeled Neural Networks} (DynPMNNs), a continuous-time deep learning architecture in which each hidden layer is defined as the solution of an ordinary differential equation. Unlike classical feed-forward networks, this approach replaces static activation functions with time-evolving dynamical systems, providing a biologically inspired interpretation of hidden-layer behavior and enabling the integration of physically meaningful models. The framework is rigorously grounded in Reproducing Kernel Banach Spaces (RKBSs), allowing DynPMNNs to be characterized as finite-dimensional solutions of an abstract training problem and revealing structural connections with standard neural networks.
  We present a concrete implementation based on the FitzHugh--Nagumo model for neuronal activation, where numerical ODE solvers are embedded into the computational graph via Euler-type schemes. Both network weights and dynamical parameters are trained jointly. Through experiments on the California Housing dataset, we compare DynPMNNs with Neural ODEs (NODEs) and Closed-form Continuous-Time Networks (CfCs). Despite using fewer trainable parameters, DynPMNNs achieve competitive performance.
  These results position DynPMNNs as a principled bridge between dynamical systems and deep learning, with promising directions for further research in expressivity, stability, and physics-based modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DynPMNNs，一种将隐藏层定义为ODE解的连续时间深度学习架构，基于RKBS理论，通过FitzHugh-Nagumo模型实现，在California Housing数据集上以更少参数达到与NODE和CfC相当的竞争力。
AI.motivation: 克服传统前馈网络静态激活函数的局限性，引入时间演化动力系统以提供生物启发的隐藏层行为解释，并实现物理意义模型的整合。
AI.method: 将每个隐藏层定义为ODE的解，基于RKBS理论框架进行严格理论分析，使用FitzHugh-Nagumo神经元激活模型，通过欧拉型数值ODE求解器嵌入计算图，联合训练网络权重和动力学参数。
AI.result: 在California Housing数据集上，DynPMNNs以更少的可训练参数取得了与NODE和CfC相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: DynPMNNs作为动力系统与深度学习之间的原则性桥梁，在表达性、稳定性和基于物理的建模方面具有进一步研究前景。

title: Curvature-Dependent Lower Bounds for Frank-Wolfe
summary: The Frank-Wolfe algorithm achieves a convergence rate of $\mathcal{O}(1/T)$ for smooth convex optimization over compact convex domains, accelerating to $\mathcal{O}(1/T^2)$ when both the objective and the feasible set are strongly convex. This acceleration extends beyond strong convexity: Kerdreux et al. (2021a) proved rates of $\mathcal{O}(T^{-p/(p-1)})$ over $p$-uniformly convex feasible sets, a class that interpolates between strongly convex sets and more general curved domains such as $\ell_p$ balls. In this work, we establish a matching $Ω(T^{-p/(p-1)})$ lower bound for every $p\ge 3$ under exact line search or short steps, and extend the lower bound to objectives satisfying a Hölderian error bound. The proofs analyze the dynamics of Frank-Wolfe iterates on simple instances and hence are not limited to the high-dimensional setting, unlike information-theoretic lower bounds.

AI.tldr: 本文针对Frank-Wolfe算法在p-一致凸可行集上的收敛速度建立了匹配的下界Ω(T^{-p/(p-1)})（p≥3），并推广到满足Hölderian误差界的目标函数，证明该下界在精确线搜索或短步长条件下是最优的。
AI.motivation: 已有工作（Kerdreux et al., 2021a）证明了Frank-Wolfe算法在p-一致凸可行集上的收敛上界为O(T^{-p/(p-1)})，但该上界是否紧（即是否存在匹配的下界）尚未明确。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，为算法的收敛速度提供完整的上下界刻画。
AI.method: 通过分析Frank-Wolfe算法在简单实例上的迭代动力学过程，推导收敛速度的下界。不同于信息论下界方法，该分析不依赖于高维假设，而是直接刻画算法在具体问题上的行为。
AI.result: 对任意p≥3，在精确线搜索或短步长条件下，Frank-Wolfe算法在p-一致凸可行集上的收敛速度下界为Ω(T^{-p/(p-1)})，与已知上界匹配。该下界进一步推广到满足Hölderian误差界的目标函数情形。
AI.conclusion: Frank-Wolfe算法在p-一致凸可行集上的收敛速度上界O(T^{-p/(p-1)})是紧的（p≥3），且该下界在更一般的Hölderian误差界条件下依然成立。

title: Sharp feature-learning transitions and Bayes-optimal neural scaling laws in extensive-width networks
summary: We study the information-theoretic limits of learning a one-hidden-layer teacher network with hierarchical features from noisy queries, in the context of knowledge transfer to a smaller student model. We work in the high-dimensional regime where the teacher width $k$ scales linearly with the input dimension $d$ -- a setting that captures large-but-finite-width networks and has only recently become analytically tractable. Using a heuristic leave-one-out decoupling argument, validated numerically throughout, we derive asymptotically sharp characterizations of the Bayes-optimal generalization error and individual feature overlaps via a system of closed fixed-point equations. These equations reveal that feature learnability is governed by a sequence of sharp phase transitions: as data grows, teacher features become recoverable sequentially, each through a discontinuous jump in overlap. This sequential acquisition underlies a precise notion of \textit{effective width} $k_c$ -- the number of learnable features at a given data budget $n$ -- which unifies two distinct scaling regimes: a feature-learning regime in which the Bayes-optimal generalization error $\varepsilon^{\rm BO}$ scales as $ n^{1/(2β)-1}$, and a refinement regime in which it scales as $n^{-1}$, where $β>1/2$ is the exponent of the power-law feature hierarchy. Both laws collapse to the single relation $\varepsilon^{\rm BO}=Θ(k_c d/n)$. We further show empirically that a student trained with \textsc{Adam} near the effective width $k_c$ achieves these optimal scaling laws (up to a small algorithmic gap), and provide an information-theoretic account of the associated scaling in model size.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了从含噪查询中学习具有层次化特征的单隐层教师网络的信息论极限，并探讨了向更小学生模型进行知识迁移的问题。在高维背景下（教师宽度k与输入维度d线性缩放），利用启发式留一解耦论证，推导了贝叶斯最优泛化误差和特征重叠的渐近精确刻画。研究发现特征可学习性由一系列尖锐相变主导：随着数据量增长，教师特征依次通过不连续跳跃被恢复。这引出了"有效宽度"k_c的概念，统一了两种不同的缩放标度：特征学习区（误差~n^{1/(2β)-1}）和精炼区（误差~n^{-1}），两者均坍缩为单一关系ε^BO=Θ(k_c d/n)。Adam优化器在有效宽度附近训练学生模型可达到最优缩放律。
AI.motivation: 理解从具有层次化特征的教师网络向学生网络进行知识迁移的信息论极限，特别是高维背景下（教师宽度与输入维度同阶）的贝叶斯最优泛化误差和特征学习行为的精确刻画。
AI.method: 采用启发式留一解耦论证（leave-one-out decoupling argument），结合数值验证，推导出贝叶斯最优泛化误差和个体特征重叠的渐近精确刻画，形式化为一组闭合定点方程。
AI.result: 发现特征可学习性由一系列尖锐相变主导，特征按幂律层次顺序恢复；定义了有效宽度k_c，统一了两种缩放标度：特征学习区（误差~n^{1/(2β)-1}）和精炼区（误差~n^{-1}），两者坍缩为ε^BO=Θ(k_c d/n)；Adam优化器在有效宽度附近可达到最优缩放律。
AI.conclusion: 建立了层次化特征学习的信息论极限与有效宽度概念的精确联系，为知识迁移中数据量、模型宽度和泛化误差之间的权衡提供了统一的理论框架，并验证了实际优化器（Adam）接近理论极限的能力。

title: The Echo Amplifies the Knowledge: Somatic Marker Analogues in Language Models via Emotion Vector Re-Injection
summary:
Current language model memory systems store what happened but not how it felt. This distinction -- between semantic memory (knowing about a past event) and episodic memory (re-experiencing it) -- was identified by Tulving as the difference between noetic and autonoetic consciousness. Damasio demonstrated that humans with intact knowledge but absent emotional markers exhibit impaired decision-making.
  We bridge this gap for language models. Using Gemma 3 1B-IT with pretrained Gemma Scope 2 sparse autoencoders, we identify 310 emotion-exclusive features at layer 22 with psychologically valid geometry. We construct distinctive-feature emotion vectors during experience and partially re-inject them during recall, triggered by context similarity at layer 7.
  We test four conditions paralleling Damasio's framework: A (no memory), B (semantic labels), C (emotion echo), and BC (semantic + echo). For emotional orientation, the echo alone steepens the threat-safety gradient: the regression slope of threat rating on contextual similarity is 0.80 for C vs 0.56 for A ($p$=0.011, permutation test). For decisions, the echo amplifies knowledge into action: BC=80% good choices vs B=52% ($z$=+2.60, $p$<0.01), while the echo alone has no effect (C=22%, n.s.). The echo changes how the model feels independently, but changes what it does only when combined with knowledge -- replicating Damasio's core finding.
  The echo amplifies knowledge. It does not replace it.

AI.tldr: 本文借鉴Tulving的语义/情景记忆区分和Damasio的情感标记理论，为语言模型构建了"情感回响"机制：用Gemma 3 1B-IT在层22识别310个情感专属特征，在体验时构建情感向量，在回忆时部分重注入。实验复现了Damasio的核心发现——情感回响单独改变感受，但只有与知识结合才能改变决策（BC=80% vs B=52%），且情感回响放大知识而非替代知识。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型记忆系统只记录事件内容（语义记忆），无法记录事件的情感体验（情景记忆）。神经科学表明，缺少情感标记的知识会导致决策障碍（Damasio的躯体标记假说）。本文旨在弥合这一差距，为语言模型引入类似情景记忆的情感体验机制。
AI.method: 使用Gemma 3 1B-IT模型和预训练的Gemma Scope 2稀疏自编码器，在层22识别出310个具有心理学有效几何结构的情感专属特征。在体验阶段构造区分性情感向量，在回忆阶段层7通过上下文相似度触发部分重注入。设计四组实验：A（无记忆）、B（语义标签）、C（情感回响）、BC（语义+回响）。
AI.result: 情感回响单独使用使威胁-安全梯度更陡峭（回归斜率C=0.80 vs A=0.56，p=0.011）。仅语义标签的好选择率为52%，加入情感回响后提升至80%（z=+2.60, p<0.01），而单独情感回响仅22%（无显著差异）。
AI.conclusion: 情感回响改变了模型的情感感受方式，但只有当与知识结合时才改变决策行为——精确复现了Damasio的核心发现。情感回响放大（amplify）知识，而非替代知识。

title: Echo-LoRA: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning via Cross-Layer Representation Injection
summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) has become a practical route for adapting large language models to downstream tasks, with LoRA-style methods being particularly attractive because they are inexpensive to train and easy to deploy. Most LoRA variants, however, revise the update rule within the weight space of each layer and leave the intermediate representations formed by deeper layers largely unused. We propose Echo-LoRA, a cross-layer representation injection method for parameter-efficient fine-tuning. During training, Echo-LoRA collects boundary hidden states from deeper source layers, aggregates them into a sample-level echo representation, and uses lightweight projection and gating networks to inject the resulting signal into shallow LoRA or DoRA modules. Answer-only masking, masked distillation, and stochastic routing are used to keep this auxiliary path stable and to reduce the gap between training and inference. On eight commonsense reasoning benchmarks, Echo-LoRA exceeds the reported LoRA baselines by 5.7 percentage points on average across LLaMA-7B, LLaMA2-7B, and LLaMA3-8B. Under reproduced LoRA baselines in our unified implementation, the average gain is 3.0 points; when combined with DoRA, the gain is 2.7 points. The Echo path is discarded after training, so the deployed model keeps the original low-rank LoRA/DoRA form and adds neither inference-time parameters nor inference computation.

AI.tldr: Echo-LoRA 是一种跨层表示注入方法，通过在训练时收集深层隐藏状态并注入浅层 LoRA/DoRA 模块，在保持推理零开销的前提下，在八个常识推理基准上平均超越 LoRA 基线 3.0-5.7 个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有 LoRA 变体仅在每层权重空间内修改更新规则，未能有效利用深层网络形成的中间表示，限制了微调性能的提升空间。
AI.method: 从深层源层收集边界隐藏状态，聚合成样本级 echo 表示，通过轻量投影和门控网络注入到浅层 LoRA/DoRA 模块；训练时使用回答掩码遮蔽、掩码蒸馏和随机路由保持稳定，推理时丢弃 Echo 路径。
AI.result: 在 LLaMA-7B、LLaMA2-7B、LLaMA3-8B 的八个常识推理基准上，Echo-LoRA 超过 LoRA 基线平均 5.7 分（统一实现下平均增益 3.0 分），与 DoRA 结合时增益 2.7 分。
AI.conclusion: Echo-LoRA 通过跨层表示注入有效提升了参数高效微调的性能，且不增加推理时的参数量和计算开销，保持了原始低秩形式。

title: Novel neighborhood structures for incomplete round robin sports tournaments
summary: The incomplete round robin sports tournament format, where each team plays the same number of games but faces only a subset of the other teams, is becoming increasingly popular in both youth and professional competitions. In contrast to conventional round robin tournaments, however, neighborhood structures for scheduling incomplete round robin tournaments have largely remained unexplored. We fill this gap by proposing two novel neighborhood structures and describe them in graph theory terms. One of them introduces a single new game followed by a minimal repair chain, while the other introduces possibly many new games but only affects a single round. The latter is shown to fully connect the solution space. We embed the neighborhoods in an adaptive late acceptance hill climbing algorithm and show that the proposed algorithm obtains high quality and new best solutions for several sets of instances from the literature, thereby empirically confirming the effectiveness of the proposed neighborhoods.

AI.tldr: 本文针对不完全循环赛赛程安排问题，提出了两种基于图论的邻域结构，并将其嵌入自适应延迟接受爬山算法中，获得了高质量的解并刷新了多项文献最优解。
AI.motivation: 不完全循环赛（每队比赛场次相同但只与部分对手交锋）在青少年和职业赛事中日益流行，然而其调度问题的邻域结构研究几乎空白，现有方法缺乏有效的局部搜索算子。
AI.method: 提出了两种新颖的邻域结构：(1) 引入一场新比赛并执行最小修复链；(2) 引入多场新比赛但仅影响单个轮次，后者被证明能完全连通解空间。将这两种邻域嵌入自适应延迟接受爬山算法中。
AI.result: 在多个文献标准测试集上获得高质量解，并刷新了多项现有最优解，实证验证了所提邻域结构的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于图论的邻域结构有效解决了不完全循环赛调度问题，为后续研究提供了新的搜索算子基础。

title: Affine Tracing: A New Paradigm for Probabilistic Linear Solvers
summary: Probabilistic linear solvers (PLSs) return probability distributions that quantify uncertainty due to limited computation in the solution of linear systems. The literature has traditionally distinguished between Bayesian PLSs, which condition a prior on information obtained from projections of the linear system, and probabilistic iterative methods (PIMs), which lift classical iterative solvers to probability space. In this work we show this dichotomy to be false: Bayesian PLSs are a special case of non-stationary affine PIMs. In addition, we prove that any realistic affine PIM is calibrated. These results motivate a focus on (non-stationary) affine PIMs, but their practical adoption has been limited by the significant manual effort required to implement them. To address this, we introduce affine tracing, an algorithmic framework that automatically constructs a PIM from a standard implementation of an affine iterative method by passing symbolic tracers through the computation to build an affine computational graph. We show how this graph can be transformed to compute posterior covariances, and how equality saturation can be used to perform algebraic simplifications required for computation under specific prior choices. We demonstrate the framework by automatically generating a probabilistic multigrid solver and evaluate its performance in the context of Gaussian process approximation.

AI.tldr: 本文证明贝叶斯概率线性求解器是仿射概率迭代方法（PIM）的特例，并证明了所有仿射PIM都是校准的。为解决PIM实际应用中的手动实现困难，提出仿射追踪框架，可自动从标准仿射迭代方法实现中构建PIM，并通过等式饱和进行代数简化。实验展示了自动生成的概率多重网格求解器在高斯过程近似中的性能。
AI.motivation: 澄清概率线性求解器中贝叶斯PLS与概率迭代方法（PIM）之间的关系，解决文献中的二分法误解；同时克服PIM因手动实现困难而实际应用受限的问题，提出自动化框架降低使用门槛。
AI.method: 1）理论证明贝叶斯PLS是非平稳仿射PIM的特例；2）证明任意仿射PIM具有校准特性；3）提出仿射追踪框架，通过符号跟踪器构建仿射计算图，利用等式饱和进行代数简化以计算后验协方差；4）自动生成概率多重网格求解器。
AI.result: 贝叶斯PLS与PIM的二分法被证伪，仿射PIM被证明是校准的；仿射追踪框架能自动从标准仿射迭代方法实现中构建PIM，并自动生成概率多重网格求解器，在高斯过程近似任务中验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 概率线性求解器的研究应聚焦于（非平稳）仿射PIM；提出的仿射追踪框架为PIM的自动化实现提供了可行路径，降低了应用门槛，有望推动概率线性求解器的实际部署。

title: Generalization Bounds of Emergent Communications for Agentic AI Networking
comment: Accepted at IEEE ISIT Workshop, Guangzhou, China, June 2026
summary: The evolution of 6G networking toward agentic AI networking (AgentNet) systems requires a shift from traditional data pipelines to task-aware, agentic AI-native communication solutions. Emergent communication, a novel communication paradigm in which autonomous agents learn their own signaling protocols through interaction, is increasingly viewed as a promising solution to address the challenges posed by existing rigid, predefined protocol-based networking architecture.
