These results indicate that enforcing the discrete shift structure of history-state evolution is an effective inductive bias for non-Markovian PDE surrogate modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出历史空间傅里叶神经算子（HS-FNO），通过将历史状态分解为可学习预测部分和精确移位-追加传输部分，有效解决了时滞和非马尔可夫偏微分方程的代理建模问题，在五个基准测试中相比现有方法取得了更优的自回归预测性能。
AI.motivation: 标准神经算子在自回归使用时假设瞬时场u(t,·)构成完整状态，这一假设对于时滞方程、分布式记忆系统等非马尔可夫动力学失效——两个轨迹在时刻t可能一致但未来不同，因为它们的历史不同。因此需要一种能够处理记忆效应的神经算子框架。
AI.method: HS-FNO将提升状态定义为u_t(θ,x)=u(t+θ,x)，θ∈[-τ,0]。关键计算步骤是将一次历史状态更新分解为两部分：(1) 可学习的预测器用于预测新暴露的未来切片；(2) 精确的移位-追加传输算子处理历史窗口中从上一状态已知的部分。这避免了学习确定性的历史坐标，降低了学习输出维度，并强制执行自然的离散历史更新结构。
AI.result: 在五个基准系列（时滞反应扩散、空间流行病学、非局部神经场动力学、时滞波、分布式记忆闭合）上，HS-FNO在一步预测、历史空间和自回归轨迹误差指标上均取得最优。自回归预测中，聚合rollout误差从当前状态算子的0.241、滞后堆叠算子的0.188和无约束历史到历史算子的0.185降至0.094，且参数更少。
AI.conclusion: 强制历史状态演化的离散移位结构是一种有效的归纳偏置，能够显著提升非马尔可夫PDE代理建模的性能。

title: FRACTAL: SSM with Fractional Recurrent Architecture for Computational Temporal Analysis of Long Sequences
comment: 19 pages (10 pages main text, 9 pages appendix), 3 figures. Accepted by ICML 2026
summary: Effective sequence modeling fundamentally requires balancing the retention of unbounded history with the high-resolution detection of abrupt short-term variations common in real-world phenomena. However, existing state space models (SSMs) relying on high-order polynomial projection operators (HiPPO) face a critical trade-off where uniform measures dilute recent information to maintain timescale invariance, while exponential measures sacrifice global context to capture local dynamics. This paper proposes a Fractional Recurrent Architecture for Computational Temporal Analysis of Long sequences (FRACTAL), a novel architecture integrating fractional measure theory into recursive memory updates to address this limitation. By deriving projection operators with analytically characterized spectral properties and a tunable singularity index, the proposed method amplifies sensitivity to recent signal perturbations while preserving the spectral structure that encodes scale-invariant memory dynamics. This theoretical innovation is instantiated within a simplified diagonalized state space framework by modulating input projection initialization to enable simultaneous capture of multi-scale temporal features. FRACTAL achieves an average score of 87.11\% on the Long Range Arena benchmark, including 61.85\% on the ListOps task, outperforming the S5 model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FRACTAL架构，通过分数阶测度理论改进状态空间模型的记忆更新机制，在保持尺度不变记忆的同时增强对近期信号扰动的敏感性，在Long Range Arena基准上平均得分87.11%，其中ListOps任务61.85%，超越S5模型。
AI.motivation: 现有SSM（如HiPPO）在平衡长程历史保留与局部动态捕获之间存在根本性权衡：均匀测度稀释近期信息以维持时间尺度不变性，指数测度则牺牲全局上下文以捕获局部动态。需要一种能同时兼顾两者的方法。
AI.method: 提出分数阶递归架构FRACTAL，将分数阶测度理论融入递归记忆更新。推导具有解析表征谱特性和可调奇异指数的投影算子，增强对近期信号扰动的敏感性同时保留编码尺度不变记忆的谱结构。在简化的对角化状态空间框架中通过调制输入投影初始化实现多尺度时间特征的同时捕获。
AI.result: 在Long Range Arena基准上平均得分87.11%，ListOps任务61.85%，超越S5模型。
AI.conclusion: FRACTAL通过分数阶测度理论有效解决了SSM中长程记忆与局部动态捕获之间的权衡问题，验证了理论创新在实际序列建模任务中的有效性。

title: Trapping Attacker in Dilemma: Examining Internal Correlations and External Influences of Trigger for Defending GNN Backdoors
summary: GNNs have become a standard tool for learning on relational data, yet they remain highly vulnerable to backdoor attacks. Prior defenses often depend on inspecting specific subgraph patterns or node features, and thus can be circumvented by adaptive attackers. We propose PRAETORIAN, a new defense that targets intrinsic requirements of effective GNN backdoors rather than surface-level cues. Our key observation is that flipping a victim node's prediction requires substantial influence on the victim: attackers tend to either inject many trigger nodes or rely on a small set of highly influential ones. Building on this observation, PRAETORIAN (i) analyzes internal correlations within potential trigger subgraphs to detect abnormally large injected structures, and (ii) quantifies external node influence to identify triggers with disproportionate impact. Across our evaluations, PRAETORIAN reduces the average attack success rate (ASR) to 0.55% with only a 0.62% drop in clean accuracy (CA), whereas state-of-the-art defenses still yield an average ASR of >20% and a CA drop of >3% under the same conditions. Moreover, PRAETORIAN remains effective against a range of adaptive attacks, forcing adversaries to either inject many trigger nodes to achieve high ASR (>80%), which incurs a >10% CA drop, or preserve CA at the cost of limiting ASR to 18.1%. Overall, PRAETORIAN constrains attackers to an unfavorable trade-off between efficacy and detectability.

AI.tldr: PRAETORIAN是一种针对GNN后门攻击的新型防御方法，通过分析潜在触发子图的内部相关性和量化外部节点影响力来检测后门触发器，有效将攻击成功率降至0.55%，干净准确率仅下降0.62%，并迫使攻击者在有效性和可检测性之间做出不利权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有针对GNN后门攻击的防御方法通常依赖检测特定子图模式或节点特征等表面线索，容易被自适应攻击者绕过，因此需要一种基于后门攻击内在要求的更鲁棒的防御机制。
AI.method: PRAETORIAN基于两个关键观察设计防御：(i) 分析潜在触发子图内部的关联性，检测异常大的注入结构；(ii) 量化外部节点影响力，识别具有不成比例影响的触发器。
AI.result: PRAETORIAN将平均攻击成功率降至0.55%，干净准确率仅下降0.62%；而现有最优防御在同一条件下平均攻击成功率仍>20%，干净准确率下降>3%。面对自适应攻击，攻击者要么注入大量触发节点（导致干净准确率下降>10%）以维持>80%的攻击成功率，要么牺牲攻击成功率（限制在18.1%）以保持干净准确率。
AI.conclusion: PRAETORIAN通过迫使攻击者在有效性和可检测性之间做出不利权衡，提供了一种鲁棒且有效的GNN后门防御方案。

title: PowerStep: Memory-Efficient Adaptive Optimization via $\ell_p$-Norm Steepest Descent
summary: Adaptive optimizers, most notably Adam, have become the default standard for training large-scale neural networks such as Transformers. These methods maintain running estimates of gradient first and second moments, incurring substantial memory overhead. We introduce PowerStep, a memory-efficient optimizer that achieves coordinate-wise adaptivity without storing second-moment statistics. Motivated by steepest descent under an $\ell_p$-norm geometry, we show that applying a nonlinear transform directly to a momentum buffer yields coordinate-wise adaptivity. We prove that PowerStep converges at the optimal $O(1/\sqrt{T})$ rate for non-convex stochastic optimization. Extensive experiments on Transformer models ranging from 124M to 235B parameters demonstrate that PowerStep matches Adam's convergence speed while halving optimizer memory. Furthermore, when combined with aggressive \texttt{int8} quantization, PowerStep remains numerically stable and reduces optimizer memory by $\sim\!8\times$ compared to full-precision Adam. PowerStep thus provides a principled, scalable and resource-efficient alternative for large-scale training. Code is available at https://github.com/yaolubrain/PowerStep.

AI.tldr: PowerStep是一种内存高效的优化器，通过对动量缓冲进行非线性变换实现坐标级自适应，无需存储二阶矩统计量。在124M到235B参数的Transformer模型上，PowerStep匹配Adam的收敛速度，同时将优化器内存减半，结合int8量化可实现约8倍内存压缩。
AI.motivation: Adam等自适应优化器需维护梯度一阶和二阶矩的运行估计，导致显著的内存开销。在大规模神经网络训练中，内存效率成为关键瓶颈，亟需一种既能保持自适应能力又更节省内存的优化方法。
AI.method: 受ℓ_p-范数几何下的最速下降启发，PowerStep对动量缓冲直接应用非线性变换以实现坐标级自适应性，从而避免存储二阶矩统计量。该方法理论上证明了在非凸随机优化中达到最优O(1/√T)收敛速率。
AI.result: 在124M至235B参数的Transformer模型上的大量实验表明：PowerStep在匹配Adam收敛速度的同时将优化器内存减半；结合激进int8量化时保持数值稳定，相比全精度Adam实现约8倍优化器内存压缩。
AI.conclusion: PowerStep为大规模训练提供了一种有理论依据、可扩展且资源高效的替代方案，有效解决了自适应优化器在高内存开销方面的核心问题。

title: SynerDiff: Synergetic Continuous Batching for Fast and Parallel Diffusion Model Inference
summary: The expansion of Artificial Intelligence-generated content service requires diffusion model serving to simultaneously achieve high throughput and low task end-to-end (E2E) latency. However, existing continuous batching methods suffer from severe resource contention during UNet-VAE concurrency, leading to latency spikes. Furthermore, concurrent multi-task scheduling entails a trade-off between UNet throughput and VAE latency across varying scheduling strategies. To address these, we propose SynerDiff, an efficient continuous batching system built on intra-inter level synergy. At the intra-concurrency level, SynerDiff alleviates resource contention by pruning component-specific resource bottlenecks via VAE Chunking and Adaptive Skip-CFG. At the inter-concurrency level, leveraging components' differential sensitivity to scheduling granularities, a threshold-aware scheduler plans concurrent sequences and tunes intra-concurrency decisions to minimize VAE latency while maintaining UNet within high-throughput threshold. Additionally, a feedback controller dynamically adjusts this threshold based on queue loads to boost system capacity ceiling. Experimental results show that, SynerDiff improves throughput by 1.6$\times$ and decreases both average E2E and P99 tail latencies by up to 78.7\%, compared to benchmarks while guaranteeing high image fidelity.

AI.tldr: SynerDiff 是一个面向扩散模型服务的连续批处理系统，通过层内和层间协同调度，在保证高图像保真度的前提下，将吞吐量提升1.6倍，平均端到端延迟和P99尾部延迟降低高达78.7%。
AI.motivation: 现有连续批处理方法在UNet-VAE并发阶段存在严重的资源争用问题，导致延迟尖峰；同时，多任务并发调度在不同调度策略下需要在UNet吞吐量和VAE延迟之间进行权衡。
AI.method: 在层内并发层面，通过VAE Chunking和Adaptive Skip-CFG剪枝组件特定的资源瓶颈以缓解资源争用；在层间并发层面，利用组件对调度粒度的差异化敏感性，设计阈值感知调度器规划并发序列并调整层内决策，以在保持UNet在高吞吐阈值内的同时最小化VAE延迟；额外引入反馈控制器基于队列负载动态调整阈值以提升系统容量上限。
AI.result: 吞吐量提升1.6倍，平均端到端延迟和P99尾部延迟降低高达78.7%，同时保证高图像保真度。
AI.conclusion: SynerDiff通过层内-层间协同调度有效解决了扩散模型服务中的资源争用与调度权衡问题，实现了高吞吐与低延迟的统一。

title: LaWM: Least Action World Models for Long-Horizon Physical Consistency from Visual Observations
summary: Learning predictive world models from visual observations is a core problem in embodied AI, with applications to model-based reinforcement learning and robotic planning. Existing latent world models typically generate future states with unconstrained neural transition functions, while modern video generation systems often prioritize perceptual plausibility or introduce physical structure through auxiliary losses, external guidance, or separate dynamics modules. As a result, long-horizon rollouts can remain weakly grounded in the physical principles that govern real dynamics, leading to compounding error, energy drift, and physically inconsistent futures. We propose Least Action World Models (LaWM), a latent world-modeling framework that operationalizes the Principle of Least Action in learned visual latent space: future rollouts are governed by a learned Lagrangian action functional rather than produced only by an unconstrained transition predictor. Our main technical realization is a latent variational integrator: LaWM encodes observations into learned generalized coordinates, learns a latent discrete Lagrangian over consecutive latent states, constructs a discrete action functional, and advances prediction by solving the corresponding discrete integration condition. Thus, physical structure is not merely used to score, regularize, or constrain a completed trajectory; it defines the latent transition rule itself. Because the transition is induced by a discrete variational principle, LaWM provides a structure-preserving bias for long-horizon visual prediction. Across physics-clean synthetic dynamics and embodied robot interaction benchmarks, LaWM improves physical invariance, background consistency, motion smoothness, and appearance and geometric prediction metrics over video-generation and world-model baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出最小作用量世界模型（LaWM），通过在潜空间中学习拉格朗日作用量泛函并利用离散变分积分器进行未来状态预测，从而在视觉世界模型中引入物理结构先验，实现长期视觉预测的物理一致性与结构保持。
AI.motivation: 现有潜空间世界模型通常使用无约束的神经转移函数生成未来状态，导致长期 rollout 在物理原理上弱约束，出现累积误差、能量漂移和物理不一致的未来预测问题。
AI.method: 将观测编码为学习到的广义坐标，在连续潜状态间学习离散拉格朗日量，构造离散作用量泛函，并通过求解离散积分条件（变分原理）来驱动状态转移，而非使用无约束的过渡预测器。
AI.result: 在物理合成动力学和具身机器人交互基准上，LaWM 在物理不变性、背景一致性、运动平滑性以及外观和几何预测指标上优于视频生成和世界模型基线。
AI.conclusion: 物理结构不仅是评分或正则化手段，而是定义潜空间转移规则本身，这种结构保持的变分偏置能够有效提升长期视觉预测的物理一致性与预测质量。

title: LLM4Branch: Large Language Model for Discovering Efficient Branching Policies of Integer Programs
comment: ICML2026 preprint, camera ready in progress
summary: Efficient branching policies are essential for accelerating Mixed Integer Linear Programming (MILP) solvers. Their design has long relied on hand-crafted heuristics, and now machine learning has emerged as a promising paradigm to automate this process. However, existing learning-based methods are often hindered by their dependence on expensive expert demonstrations and the gap between training objectives and the solver's end-to-end performance. In this work, we propose LLM4Branch, a novel framework that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to automate the discovery of efficient branching policies. Specifically, the discovered policy is an executable program with a program skeleton generated by the LLM and a parameter vector, which is optimized via a zeroth-order method over a few instances with their end-to-end performance feedback. Extensive experiments on standard MILP benchmarks demonstrate that LLM4Branch establishes a new state-of-the-art among CPU-based methods and achieves performance competitive with advanced GPU-based models. Codes are available at https://github.com/hzn18/LLM4Branch.

AI.tldr: LLM4Branch提出利用大语言模型自动发现高效的MILP分支策略，通过生成可执行程序骨架和参数向量，并采用零阶方法基于端到端性能反馈进行优化，在CPU方法中达到最优，且性能与先进GPU模型相当。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的分支策略方法依赖昂贵的专家演示，且训练目标与求解器端到端性能之间存在差距，亟需一种无需专家演示、直接以端到端性能为优化目标的方法。
AI.method: 利用LLM生成可执行程序骨架（分支策略的代码结构）和参数向量，通过零阶优化方法在少量实例上基于端到端性能反馈对参数进行优化，实现策略的自动发现。
AI.result: 在标准MILP基准测试中，LLM4Branch在CPU方法中达到新最优水平，性能与先进的GPU模型相媲美。
AI.conclusion: LLM4Branch证明了大语言模型在自动发现高效分支策略方面的潜力，为弥合学习目标与求解器实际性能之间的鸿沟提供了有效方案。

title: On Uniform Error Bounds for Kernel Regression under Non-Gaussian Noise
comment: This paper has been accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2026
summary: Providing non-conservative uncertainty quantification for function estimates derived from noisy observations remains a fundamental challenge in statistical machine learning, particularly for applications in safety-critical domains. In this work, we propose novel non-asymptotic probabilistic uniform error bounds for kernel-based regression. Compared to related bounds in the literature that are restricted to (conditionally) independent sub-Gaussian noise, our bounds allow to consider a broad class of non-Gaussian distributions, such as sub-Gaussian, bounded, sub-exponential, and variance/moment-bounded noise. Moreover, our results apply to correlated and uncorrelated noise. We compare our proposed error bounds with existing results in terms of the induced uncertainty region and their performance in safe control, demonstrating the tightness of the proposed bounds.

AI.tldr: 本文针对核回归提出了一种新颖的非渐近概率一致误差界，该误差界适用于广泛的非高斯噪声分布（包括次高斯、有界、次指数及方差/矩有界噪声），同时支持相关和不相关噪声场景，在安全控制等关键领域中展现出更紧的不确定性量化性能。
AI.motivation: 为安全关键领域的函数估计提供非保守的不确定性量化，解决现有误差界仅适用于（条件）独立次高斯噪声的局限性。
AI.method: 提出非渐近概率一致误差界，适用于核回归方法，覆盖次高斯、有界、次指数、方差/矩有界噪声以及相关和不相关噪声场景。
AI.result: 与现有结果相比，所提误差界在不确信区域和安全控制任务中展现出更紧（tightness）的性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的非渐近概率一致误差界能有效处理更广泛的噪声分布，在安全控制等应用中提供更紧的不确定性量化。

title: M$^3$: Reframing Training Measures for Discretized Physical Simulations
summary: Neural surrogate models for physical simulations are trained on discretized samples of continuous domains, where the induced empirical measure leads to uneven supervision, biasing optimization and causing spatial inconsistencies in physical fidelity. To mitigate this measure-induced bias, we propose M$^3$ (Multi-scale Morton Measure), a scalable framework that balances training measures by partitioning space according to physical variation and allocating supervision across multiple scales. Applied to three industrial-scale datasets with diverse discretizations, M$^3$ consistently improves predictions in the continuous physical domain, achieving up to 4.7$\times$ lower error in large-scale volumetric cases. These gains persist under aggressive subsampling (160M $\rightarrow$ 16M $\rightarrow$ 1.6M points), where M$^3$-trained models outperform those trained on higher-resolution data, reducing physics-weighted relative $L_2$ error by 3--4$\times$ and the corresponding MSE by up to 13$\times$. These results highlight data distribution as a key factor in operator learning and position M$^3$ as a scalable, data-efficient approach for physically consistent modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出M³（多尺度Morton度量）框架，通过根据物理变化划分空间并在多尺度上分配监督来平衡训练度量，从而减轻神经代理模型在物理模拟中因离散化样本引起的度量诱导偏差。在三个工业级数据集上，M³持续提升连续物理域的预测性能，大尺度体情况误差降低高达4.7倍；在激进子采样下（1.6亿→160万点），M³训练模型仍优于高分辨率数据训练模型，物理加权相对L₂误差降低3-4倍，MSE降低高达13倍。
AI.motivation: 神经代理模型在离散化连续域样本上训练时，经验度量会导致不均匀监督，使优化产生偏差并引发物理保真度的空间不一致性。现有方法缺乏有效的度量平衡机制来缓解这一问题。
AI.method: M³框架利用Morton编码进行空间划分，根据物理变化（如梯度、曲率）自适应分配多尺度监督权重，从而实现训练度量的平衡。
AI.result: 在三个工业级数据集上，M³实现了连续物理域预测的一致改进，大尺度体情况误差降低4.7倍；在从1.6亿点子采样至160万点的极端场景下，物理加权相对L₂误差降低3-4倍，MSE降低最多13倍。
AI.conclusion: 数据分布是算子学习的关键因素，M³作为一种可扩展、数据高效的方法，能够实现物理一致性建模。

title: Beyond the False Trade-off: Adaptive EWC for Stealthy and Generalizable T2I Backdoors
summary: Preserving model fidelity is essential for stealthy text-to-image (T2I) backdoor attacks. Existing methods such as Learning without Forgetting (LwF) rely on output-based distillation, which provides limited regularization. We introduce Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC) as a parameter-based alternative for preserving fidelity in backdoor learning. While stronger in principle, we show that standard static EWC with a fixed regularization weight lambda and mean-squared utility loss creates an artificial trade-off between attack success rate (ASR) and fidelity, particularly degrading performance on weak triggers. To address this, we propose Cosine-Aware Adaptive EWC, which dynamically adjusts EWC regularization using a cosine-based semantic utility and adaptive scheduling. This approach transforms EWC from a fixed penalty into a context-sensitive constraint, maintaining high ASR while preserving model fidelity. Experiments demonstrate improved ASR-fidelity balance and enhanced robustness on out-of-domain (OOD) datasets compared to existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出Cosine-Aware Adaptive EWC方法，通过余弦语义效用和自适应调度动态调整弹性权重巩固（EWC）正则化，解决文本到图像后门攻击中标准静态EWC造成的攻击成功率与模型保真度之间的人工权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有T2I后门攻击方法（如LwF）使用基于输出的蒸馏正则化，保真度保护有限；标准静态EWC虽理论上更强，但固定正则化权重和均方误差损失会在ASR和保真度之间产生人工权衡，尤其在弱触发器上性能下降。
AI.method: 提出Cosine-Aware Adaptive EWC：(1) 用余弦相似度替代均方误差作为语义效用函数，更准确地衡量参数重要性；(2) 自适应调度策略动态调整正则化强度，将EWC从固定惩罚转变为上下文敏感约束。
AI.result: 实验表明所提方法在ASR-保真度平衡上优于现有基线，并在OOD数据集上展现出更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Cosine-Aware Adaptive EWC有效解决了标准静态EWC在T2I后门攻击中ASR与保真度之间的权衡问题，通过动态上下文敏感约束实现了更好的平衡和鲁棒性。

title: Ace-Skill: Bootstrapping Multimodal Agents with Prioritized and Clustered Evolution
summary: Self-evolving agents present a promising path toward continual adaptation by distilling task interactions into reusable knowledge artifacts. In practice, this paradigm remains hindered by two coupled bottlenecks: data inefficiency, where costly rollout effort is disproportionately spent on low-value samples rather than informative ones, and knowledge interference, where heterogeneous knowledge stored in shared repositories leads to noisy retrieval and task-misaligned guidance. Together, these issues form a self-reinforcing failure loop in which uninformative rollouts yield noisy knowledge, which in turn degrades subsequent rollouts. In this work, we introduce Ace-Skill, a co-evolutionary framework that jointly optimizes rollout allocation and knowledge organization for self-evolving multimodal agents. Specifically, Ace-Skill combines aprioritized sampler with lazy-decay proficiency tracking to focus rollouts on informative and insufficiently mastered samples, and a clustered organizer that semantically clusters knowledge for cleaner retrieval and more reliable adaptation. By improving sampling and organization together, Ace-Skill turns self-evolution into a virtuous cycle in which more informative rollouts produce higher-quality knowledge that supports stronger subsequent rollouts. Across four multimodal tool-use benchmarks, Ace-Skill delivers strong gains (e.g., +35.46% relative improvement in Avg@4 accuracy), enabling an opensource 35B MoE model to match or surpass proprietary models. The acquired knowledge also transfers effectively in a zero-shot manner to smaller 9B and 4B models, allowing resource-constrained agents to inherit advanced capabilities without additional training. The code has been publicly available at https://github.com/AMAP-ML/Ace-Skill.

AI.tldr: Ace-Skill提出了一种协同进化框架，通过优先采样器（聚焦信息量大且未掌握样本）和聚类组织器（语义聚类知识以减少检索噪声）共同优化，打破自我进化智能体中的数据低效和知识干扰的恶性循环，在多项多模态工具使用基准上取得显著提升（如Avg@4相对提升35.46%），并使开源35B MoE模型性能比肩专有模型，且知识可零样本迁移至小模型。
AI.motivation: 现有自我进化智能体面临两个耦合瓶颈：一是数据低效（试错成本过度浪费在低价值样本上），二是知识干扰（异构知识存储导致检索噪声和任务错位指引），二者形成自我强化的失败循环。
AI.method: 提出Ace-Skill协同进化框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 带懒惰衰减熟练度追踪的优先采样器，将试错集中在信息量大且未掌握的样本上；2) 聚类组织器，对知识进行语义聚类以实现更干净的检索和更可靠的适应。
AI.result: 在四个多模态工具使用基准上，Avg@4准确率相对提升35.46%；开源35B MoE模型性能比肩或超越专有模型；知识可零样本迁移至9B和4B小模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合优化采样分配和知识组织，Ace-Skill将自我进化转变为良性循环：信息量更大的试错产生更高质量的知识，进而支持更强的后续试错，实现持续适应。

title: HTPO: Towards Exploration-Exploitation Balanced Policy Optimization via Hierarchical Token-level Objective Control
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a pivotal technique for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, the de facto practice of mainstream RL algorithms is to treat all tokens of one response equally and assign the same optimization objective to each token, failing to provide granular guidance for the reasoning process. While in Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, different tokens usually play distinct roles. Therefore, the current RL algorithms lack an effective mechanism to dynamically balance the exploration-exploitation trade-off during learning. To this end, we propose Hierarchical Token-level Objective Control Policy Optimization (HTPO), a novel RL algorithm that takes the divide-and-conquer idea to hierarchically partition the response tokens into specific functional groups from three aspects (i.e., prompt difficulty, answer correctness, and token entropy). Within each group, according to the contributions to exploration or exploitation, we design specialized optimization objectives to facilitate the effective execution of each token's expected functionality. In this way, HTPO can achieve a more balanced exploration-exploitation trade-off. Extensive experiments on challenging reasoning benchmarks validate the superiority of our HTPO algorithm, which significantly outperforms the strong DAPO baseline (e.g., +8.6% and +6.7% on AIME'24 and AIME'25, respectively). When scaling test-time compute, the HTPO-trained model maintains a consistent performance advantage over the DAPO baseline, and the gap widens as the sampling budget increases, validating that our adaptive token-level control method fosters effective exploration without sacrificing exploitation performance. Code will be at https://github.com/xcyao00/HTPO.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HTPO算法，通过层次化Token级目标控制策略优化，将响应Token按提示难度、答案正确性和Token熵分层划分为功能组，并为每组设计专门的优化目标，以更好地平衡探索-利用权衡。在推理基准上显著超越DAPO基线（AIME'24 +8.6%，AIME'25 +6.7%），且在扩展测试时计算时优势持续扩大。
AI.motivation: 当前主流的RLVR算法对所有Token一视同仁，分配相同的优化目标，无法为Chain-of-Thought推理过程提供细粒度指导。由于不同Token在推理中扮演不同角色，现有算法缺乏有效机制来动态平衡探索-利用权衡。
AI.method: 采用分治思想，从三个维度（提示难度、答案正确性、Token熵）对响应Token进行层次化功能分组。在每个组内，根据Token对探索或利用的贡献设计专门的优化目标，从而实现更均衡的探索-利用权衡。
AI.result: 在AIME'24上比DAPO基线提升8.6%，在AIME'25上提升6.7%。在扩展测试时计算资源时，HTPO训练模型保持持续优势，且优势随采样预算增加而扩大。
AI.conclusion: HTPO通过自适应Token级控制方法，在不牺牲利用性能的前提下有效促进了探索，验证了层次化Token级优化在RLVR中的有效性。

title: Natural Policy Gradient as Doubly Smoothed Policy Iteration: A Bellman-Operator Framework
summary: In this work, we show that natural policy gradient, a core algorithm in reinforcement learning, admits an exact formulation as a smoothed and averaged form of policy iteration. Specifically, we introduce doubly smoothed policy iteration (DSPI), a Bellman-operator framework in which each policy is obtained by applying a regularized greedy step to a weighted average of past $Q$-functions. DSPI includes policy iteration, dual-averaged policy iteration, natural policy gradient, and more general policy dual averaging methods as special cases. Using only monotonicity and contraction of smoothed Bellman operators, we prove distribution-free global geometric convergence of DSPI. Consequently, standard natural policy gradient and policy dual averaging achieve an iteration complexity of $\mathcal{O}((1-γ)^{-1}\log((1-γ)^{-1}ε^{-1}))$ for computing an $ε$-optimal policy, without modifying the MDP, adding regularization beyond the mirror map inherent in the update, or using adaptive, trajectory-dependent stepsizes. For the unregularized greedy case, corresponding to dual-averaged policy iteration, we also prove finite termination. The same Bellman-operator framework further extends to discounted MDPs with linear function approximation and stochastic shortest path problems.

AI.tldr: 本文证明自然策略梯度可精确表示为策略迭代的平滑平均形式，提出双平滑策略迭代（DSPI）框架，证明其无需分布假设即可实现全局几何收敛，并给出自然策略梯度和策略对偶平均方法达到ε-最优策略的迭代复杂度上界。
AI.motivation: 揭示自然策略梯度算法与策略迭代之间的深层理论联系，为自然策略梯度提供严格的收敛性分析，并建立统一的Bellman算子框架来涵盖多种策略优化方法。
AI.method: 提出双平滑策略迭代（DSPI）框架，其中每个策略通过对过去Q函数的加权平均施加正则化贪心步骤获得；利用平滑Bellman算子的单调性和压缩性证明全局几何收敛；将自然策略梯度、策略对偶平均等算法统一纳入该框架。
AI.result: 自然策略梯度和策略对偶平均达到ε-最优策略的迭代复杂度为O((1-γ)^{-1}log((1-γ)^{-1}ε^{-1}))；未正则化贪心情形（对偶平均策略迭代）证明有限终止；该框架可扩展至线性函数逼近和随机最短路问题。
AI.conclusion: DSPI框架提供了一种统一视角理解策略迭代与自然策略梯度的关系，在不修改MDP、不引入额外正则化或自适应步长的条件下，给出了自然策略梯度的全局收敛保证。

title: The two clocks and the innovation window: When and how generative models learn rules
comment: 48 pages, 28 figures. Earlier versions are presented in NeurIPS2025 SPIGM workshop as oral presentation https://openreview.net/forum?id=LjqX8OhPPi
summary: Generative models trained on finite data face a fundamental tension: their score-matching or next-token objective converges to the empirical training distribution rather than the population distribution we seek to learn. Using rule-valid synthetic tasks, we trace this tension across two training timescales: $τ_{\mathrm{rule}}$, the step at which generations first become rule-valid, and $τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$, the step at which models begin reproducing training samples. Focusing on parity and extending to other binary rules and combinatorial puzzles, we characterize how these two clocks, $τ_{\mathrm{rule}}$ and $τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$, depend on key aspects of the learning setup. Specifically, we show that $τ_{\mathrm{rule}}$ increases with rule complexity and decreases with model capacity, while $τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$ is approximately invariant to the rule and scales nearly linearly with dataset size $N$. We define the \emph{innovation window} as the interval $[τ_{\mathrm{rule}}, τ_{\mathrm{mem}}]$. This window widens with increasing $N$ and narrows with rule complexity, and may vanish entirely when $τ_{\mathrm{rule}} \geq τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$. The same two-clock structure arises in both diffusion (DiT) and autoregressive (GPT) models, with architecture-dependent offsets. Dissecting the learned score of DiT models reveals a corresponding evolution of the optimization landscapes, where rule-valid samples' basins expand substantially around $τ_{\mathrm{rule}}$, while training samples' basins begin to dominate around $τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$. Together, these results yield a unified and predictive account of when and how generative models exhibit genuine innovation.

AI.tldr: 本文发现生成模型在训练过程中存在两个关键时间尺度：规则学习时刻（τ_rule）和记忆时刻（τ_mem），并定义了二者之间的“创新窗口”。该窗口随数据集增大而变宽，随规则复杂度增加而变窄，当τ_rule ≥ τ_mem时窗口消失。这一双时钟结构在扩散模型和自回归模型中共同存在，为理解生成模型何时能实现真正的创新提供了统一框架。
AI.motivation: 生成模型在有限数据上训练时，其目标函数收敛到经验训练分布而非真实数据分布，这导致模型要么学习到数据背后的规律（创新），要么只是记忆训练样本。作者希望揭示这两种行为出现的时间尺度及其依赖因素，从而理解生成模型何时能产生真实创新。
AI.method: 采用规则可验证的合成任务（以奇偶校验为主，扩展到其他二元规则和组合谜题），在扩散模型（DiT）和自回归模型（GPT）上追踪训练过程中两个关键时间点：τ_rule（首次生成符合规则）和τ_mem（开始复现训练样本）。通过分析这两个时间尺度与规则复杂度、模型容量、数据集大小等因素的关系，定义并研究“创新窗口”[τ_rule, τ_mem]。此外，通过分析DiT模型的得分函数，揭示优化景观的演化过程。
AI.result: τ_rule随规则复杂度增加而增大，随模型容量增加而减小；τ_mem近似与规则无关，随数据集大小N近线性增长。创新窗口随N增大而变宽，随规则复杂度增加而变窄，当τ_rule ≥ τ_mem时窗口消失。这一双时钟结构在DiT和GPT中均存在，具体偏移量取决于架构。得分函数分析显示，τ_rule附近规则有效样本的吸引域显著扩大，而τ_mem附近训练样本的吸引域开始主导。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为生成模型的创新行为提供了统一且可预测的理论框架，解释了模型何时能产生真正的创新（在创新窗口内）而非记忆训练数据，揭示了数据集大小和规则复杂度对创新能力的决定性影响。

title: OPT-BENCH: Evaluating the Iterative Self-Optimization of LLM Agents in Large-Scale Search Spaces
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in reasoning and tool use. However, the fundamental cognitive faculties essential for problem solving, including perception, reasoning, and memory, remain the stable core of intelligence. Unlike memorizing specific patterns, humans succeed in novel environments by applying these intrinsic faculties to adapt and optimize. Yet, whether LLMs possess this essential capacity, namely the ability to continuously refine solutions in response to dynamic environmental feedback, remains underexplored. To address this challenge, we introduce OPT-BENCH, a benchmark for evaluating self-improvement capabilities in large-scale search spaces. By combining 20 machine learning tasks with 10 classic NP-hard problems, OPT-BENCH provides a rigorous setting to assess whether agents can adapt through intrinsic self-reflection rather than rote tool application. We further propose OPT-Agent, a framework that emulates human-like cognitive adaptation. It operates through a general perception, memory, and reasoning loop, iteratively refining solutions based on environmental feedback. Through extensive experiments on 19 LLMs from 7 model families, including reasoning models, general models, and open-source models ranging from 3B to 235B parameters, we demonstrate that stronger models are more effective at leveraging feedback signals for self-improvement. However, this upper-bound adaptability remains fundamentally constrained by the models' base capacity, and even the most advanced LLMs still fall short of human expert performance.

AI.tldr: 提出OPT-BENCH基准测试和OPT-Agent框架，评估大语言模型在动态环境中通过自我反思进行持续优化的能力，实验表明强模型能更好利用反馈信号进行自我改进，但所有模型仍不及人类专家水平。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在推理和工具使用方面表现出色，但其是否具备如同人类一样在动态环境反馈下持续优化解决方案的自我改进能力仍未被充分探索。
AI.method: 构建OPT-BENCH基准（含20个机器学习任务和10个经典NP难问题），提出OPT-Agent框架（模拟人类认知适应的感知-记忆-推理循环），在19个LLM（7个模型家族，参数3B-235B）上进行实验。
AI.result: 更强的大语言模型能更有效利用反馈信号进行自我改进，但这种适应能力受限于模型的基座能力，最先进的LLM仍不及人类专家水平。
AI.conclusion: 当前大语言模型具备一定程度的自我优化能力，但存在上限约束，距离人类专家的认知适应能力仍有显著差距。

title: Exactness Matters for Physical Rule Enforcement
summary: Autoregressive scientific forecasters often enforce physical or structural constraints by repairing each predicted state before feeding it back into the model. However, it remains unclear when stronger physical rule enforcement becomes reliable and when it becomes a source of distribution shift. We study this question through operator exactness, meaning whether the repair map is the identity on the target manifold and is aligned with the target geometry. We compare raw forecasting, post hoc repair, and in-loop repair across periodic incompressible Navier--Stokes, non-periodic CFDBench flows, and a hierarchical-forecasting support task. In the exact periodic regime, Fourier projection substantially improves rollout accuracy. On the NS-128 benchmark, a strong Raw-FNO has a final-step rollout MSE at horizon 100 of $(9.390 \pm 6.290)\times 10^{-5}$, and post hoc and in-loop projection reduce it to $(1.130 \pm 0.165)\times 10^{-6}$ and $(5.370 \pm 0.113)\times 10^{-7}$. However, once an exact projection is unavailable and only approximate boundary-preserving cleanup is available, the ordering changes. Across cavity, tube, dam, and cylinder flow, stronger Poisson-based cleanup can reduce divergence while worsening rollout error; target-distortion MSE predicts this harm far better than a linear-system residual. Controlled mismatch, screened cleanup, adaptive gating, and external-backbone checks show that the best approximate-regime operating point can be raw or near-identity. Hierarchical forecasting gives the same broader pattern. Exact forecast reconciliation is a stable baseline, whereas blended top-down repair, a validation-tuned interpolation toward historical-proportion top-down reconciliation, is dataset-dependent. Thus, constraint enforcement should be benchmarked by operator--data alignment before enforcement strength.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自回归科学预测器中物理约束修复（算子精确性）的效果，发现在精确投影可用时（如周期流）能显著提升性能，但在近似修复场景下，过度约束反而损害预测，最佳策略是保持原始预测或近恒等修复。
AI.motivation: 澄清在自回归科学预测中，何时强物理约束修复可靠、何时会引发分布偏移，通过算子精确性（repair map是否为恒等映射且与目标几何对齐）这一视角系统研究该问题。
AI.method: 对比原始预测、事后修复和循环内修复三种方案，在周期性不可压缩Navier-Stokes、非周期性CFDBench流场以及层次预测支持任务上进行实验。通过Fourier投影、基于Poisson的清理等不同强度的修复算子，结合目标畸变MSE、线性系统残差等指标评估。
AI.result: 在精确周期条件下，Fourier投影大幅提升滚动预测精度（NS-128上Raw-FNO的MSE从9.39e-5降至5.37e-7）。但在近似边界保持场景下，更强的Poisson清理虽能降低散度却恶化滚动误差；目标畸变MSE比线性系统残差更能预测这种损伤。层次预测呈现相同模式。
AI.conclusion: 约束执行应在应用前通过算子-数据对齐进行基准测试；精确的预测协调是稳定基线，而近似约束策略（如混合自上而下修复）效果依赖于数据集。

title: Hyperparameter Transfer for Dense Associative Memories
summary: Dense Associative Memory (DenseAM) is a promising family of AI architectures that is represented by a neural network performing temporal dynamics on an energy landscape. While hyperparameter transfer methods are well-studied for feed-forward networks, these methods have not been developed for settings in which weights are shared across layers and within the layer, which is common in DenseAMs. Additionally, DenseAMs utilize rapidly peaking activation functions that are rarely used in feed-forward architectures. The confluence of these aspects makes DenseAM a challenging framework for using existing methods for hyperparameter transfer. Our work initiates the development of hyperparameter transfer methods for this class of models. We derive explicit prescriptions for how the hyperparameters tuned on small models can be transferred to models trained at scale. We demonstrate excellent agreement between these theoretical findings and empirical results.

AI.tldr: 本文首次为密集联想记忆（DenseAM）架构开发了超参数迁移方法，解决了权重共享和快速峰值激活函数带来的挑战，并推导出从小模型到大模型的超参数迁移公式，理论与实验结果高度一致。
AI.motivation: 现有超参数迁移方法主要针对前馈网络设计，而DenseAM具有层间和层内权重共享、以及快速峰值激活函数等独特特性，使得现有方法无法直接应用。本文旨在填补这一空白，为DenseAM这类架构开发专门的超参数迁移方法。
AI.method: 作者从理论推导出发，针对DenseAM的权重共享结构和快速峰值激活函数特点，给出了从小模型调优的超参数向大规模模型迁移的显式公式，并通过实验验证了理论预测与实证结果的一致性。
AI.result: 理论推导出的超参数迁移公式与实验观测结果具有极好的一致性，表明该方法能有效指导DenseAM模型从低参数量到高参数量的超参数迁移。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次为DenseAM这类权重共享且使用快速峰值激活函数的架构建立了超参数迁移理论，为这类模型的可扩展训练提供了方法论基础。

title: Forge: Quality-Aware Reinforcement Learning for NP-Hard Optimization in LLMs
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success on reasoning benchmarks through Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR), excelling at tasks such as math, coding, logic, and puzzles. However, existing benchmarks evaluate only correctness, while overlooking optimality, namely the ability to find the best solutions under constraints. We propose OPT-BENCH, the first comprehensive framework for training and evaluating LLMs on NP-hard optimization problems through quality-aware RLVR. OPT-BENCH provides three key components: a scalable training infrastructure with instance generators, quality verifiers, and optimal baselines across 10 tasks; a rigorous benchmark with 1,000 instances evaluating both feasibility, measured by Success Rate, and quality, measured by Quality Ratio; and quality-aware rewards that enable continuous improvement beyond binary correctness. Training on Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-1M with 15K examples achieves 93.1% SR and 46.6% QR, significantly outperforming GPT-4o, which achieves 29.6% SR and 14.6% QR. Beyond optimization, training on OPT-BENCH transfers to diverse tasks, including mathematics (+2.2%), logic (+1.2%), knowledge (+4.1%), and instruction following (+6.1%). Our analysis reveals that quality-aware rewards improve solutions by 28.8% over binary rewards, and that task diversity drives generalization more than data quantity, offering insights into RLVR scaling for complex reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OPT-BENCH，首个面向NP-hard优化问题的LLM训练与评估框架，通过质量感知的RLVR实现超越二值正确性的连续优化，在10个任务上显著超越GPT-4o，且训练收益可迁移至数学、逻辑等下游任务。
AI.motivation: 现有推理基准仅评估正确性（即解是否可行），忽略最优性（即在约束下寻找最优解的能力），缺乏对LLM优化能力的系统评估与训练框架。
AI.method: 构建OPT-BENCH框架，包含：(1) 可扩展的训练基础设施（实例生成器、质量验证器、10个任务的最优基线）；(2) 严格基准测试（1000个实例，用Success Rate评估可行性、Quality Ratio评估质量）；(3) 质量感知奖励函数，支持超越二值正确性的持续改进。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-1M上训练15K个样本，达到93.1% SR和46.6% QR，显著优于GPT-4o（29.6% SR, 14.6% QR）。质量感知奖励相比二值奖励提升28.8%，任务多样性比数据量对泛化更重要。
AI.conclusion: OPT-BENCH有效提升了LLM的优化能力，质量感知奖励驱动持续改进，且优化训练收益可迁移至其他推理任务（数学+2.2%、逻辑+1.2%、知识+4.1%、指令遵循+6.1%），为复杂推理的RLVR扩展提供了新见解。

title: Diagnosing Spectral Ceilings in Equivariant Neural Force Fields
summary: We introduce a spectral-injection diagnostic for measuring which angular frequencies a trained equivariant force-field backbone preserves: inject a controlled angular-frequency perturbation into a molecular force field, attach a lightweight Spectral Prediction Network (SPN) to the frozen backbone, and read off which frequencies are recoverable. On aspirin, a quadratic SPN attached to an L = 2 NequIP backbone recovers the boundary signal at l = 4 but collapses at l = 5: a 11.7x cliff at the predicted drL boundary, with p dropping from 0.913 to 0.078. The same boundary-vs-above contrast persists across n = 4 independently trained backbones (raw-gain delta contrast, hierarchical cluster bootstrap) and is corroborated by a denominator-free injected-residual metric (R2_inj(4) = 0.374 versus R2_inj(5) = 0.006). A finite-degree span theorem calibrates the diagnostic: for a single marked direction, degree-d polynomials of degree-L spherical-harmonic features span exactly H less than or equal to dL with multiplicity-one saturation at the boundary (scoped to single-direction degree-bounded probes, not a function-class upper bound on multi-atom MPNNs). A synthetic C5 calibration plus capacity, activation, and cross-architecture controls rule out parameter count alone as the explanation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种谱注入诊断方法，通过向等变力场骨干网络注入可控角频率扰动并附加轻量级SPN，发现L=2的NequIP骨干能恢复l=4的信号但无法恢复l=5的信号（性能从0.913降至0.078），存在11.7倍的性能悬崖。该现象在多个独立训练骨干上一致，并由无分母的注入残差指标和有限度多项式跨度定理支持。
AI.motivation: 现有等变力场模型（如NequIP）虽然广泛使用，但其对不同角频率信号的保留能力缺乏系统性诊断方法。本文旨在开发一种诊断工具，量化模型对输入频率的保真度，并理解其背后的理论限制。
AI.method: 1) 提出谱注入诊断框架：向分子力场注入可控角频率扰动，附加轻量级谱预测网络(SPN)检测可恢复频率；2) 在阿司匹林分子上使用L=2的NequIP骨干进行实验；3) 采用分层聚类bootstrap进行统计检验；4) 提出无分母的注入残差指标R2_inj；5) 推导有限度多项式跨度定理进行理论校准；6) 通过合成C5校准及容量、激活函数、跨架构控制排除参数量解释。
AI.result: L=2的NequIP骨干在l=4处能恢复边界信号（p=0.913），但在l=5处性能崩溃（p=0.078），产生11.7倍的性能悬崖。该边界-超越边界对比在4个独立训练骨干上一致。R2_inj(4)=0.374 vs R2_inj(5)=0.006。有限度多项式跨度定理表明，单标记方向上，d次多项式作用于L次球谐特征恰好张成≤dL的希尔伯特空间，边界处出现多重性饱和。
AI.conclusion: 等变力场模型对角频率的保留存在理论上的边界限制，该诊断方法可有效检测模型频率保真度，为设计更高阶等变模型提供指导。

title: Generalization Error Bounds for Picard-Type Operator Learning in Nonlinear Parabolic PDEs
summary: Operator learning for partial differential equations (PDEs) aims to learn solution operators on infinite-dimensional function spaces from finite-resolution data. In this setting, it is important for the learned model to be discretization-invariant, or resolution-robust, and to reflect PDE-specific structure. It is therefore natural to ask how such structure should be encoded in the model architecture, hypothesis class, or learning procedure. In this paper, we study operator learning for solution operators of nonlinear parabolic PDEs based on Duhamel--Picard iteration. We formulate Picard iteration as an abstract state-transition model and present a theoretical framework for Picard-type operator learning. We derive implementation-agnostic generalization error bounds that separate the implementation error from the estimation error associated with the abstract state-transition model induced by Picard iteration. A key consequence is that increasing the Picard depth reduces the Picard truncation error without causing an unbounded growth of the entropy-based estimation error. We also extend the analysis to long-time prediction by rolling out the same learned local model over successive time blocks. Finally, we illustrate the theory for nonlinear heat equations on the torus using a Picard-type Fourier neural operator as a concrete implementation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于Duhamel-Picard迭代的算子学习框架，用于非线性抛物型偏微分方程的解算子学习。通过将Picard迭代建模为抽象状态转移模型，推导了与实现无关的泛化误差界，证明增加Picard深度可降低截断误差而不会导致基于熵的估计误差无界增长，并扩展至长时间预测场景。
AI.motivation: 算子学习需要离散化不变性和PDE特定结构编码，但如何将PDE结构融入模型架构或学习过程仍不清楚。本文旨在利用Duhamel-Picard迭代的结构特性，为非线性抛物型PDE的算子学习提供理论框架。
AI.method: 将Picard迭代形式化为抽象状态转移模型；推导与具体实现无关的泛化误差界，将实现误差与抽象状态转移模型的估计误差分离；通过滚动相同局部模型到连续时间块扩展至长时间预测；以非线性热方程为例，使用Picard型Fourier神经算子作为具体实现进行验证。
AI.result: 增加Picard深度能降低Picard截断误差，且不会导致基于熵的估计误差无界增长；理论框架实现了实现误差与估计误差的分离；长时间预测的滚动策略有效。
AI.conclusion: 本文为基于Picard迭代的算子学习提供了严格的理论基础，证明了其泛化误差可控性，为PDE结构在算子学习中的编码提供了理论指导。

title: Internalizing Safety Understanding in Large Reasoning Models via Verification
comment: Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: While explicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT) empowers large reasoning models (LRMs), it enables the generation of riskier final answers. Current alignment paradigms primarily rely on externally enforced compliance, optimizing models to detect malicious prompts rather than evaluating the safety of their own outputs. We argue that this approach remains largely behavioral: our empirical analysis reveals that ostensibly aligned models lack intrinsic safety understanding, often failing to verify their own response safety and remaining vulnerable to adversarial jailbreaks. To address this fundamental limitation, we propose Safety Internal (SInternal), a framework that internalizes safety specifications by training LRMs exclusively on safety verification tasks to critique their own generated answers using expert reasoning trajectories. We demonstrate that learning to verify induces a strong generalization for response safety, significantly enhancing robustness against out-of-domain jailbreaks. Furthermore, when combined with reinforcement learning, SInternal serves as a superior initialization compared to standard supervised fine-tuning, suggesting that internalizing safety understanding creates a more robust foundation for alignment than merely mimicking safe behaviors. Our codes are available at https://github.com/AlphaLab-USTC/SInternal

AI.tldr: 本文提出Safety Internal (SInternal)框架，通过训练大推理模型在安全验证任务上内化安全规范，使其能够自我批判生成答案的安全性，显著提升对越狱攻击的鲁棒性，并为强化学习提供更优的初始化基础。
AI.motivation: 现有对齐范式主要依赖外部强制合规，优化模型检测恶意提示而非评估自身输出的安全性，导致模型缺乏内在安全理解，易受对抗性越狱攻击。
AI.method: 提出SInternal框架，仅训练LRM在安全验证任务上使用专家推理轨迹批判自身生成的答案，通过内化安全规范实现自我安全评估。
AI.result: 学习安全验证能诱导响应安全性的强泛化能力，显著增强对域外越狱攻击的鲁棒性；结合强化学习时，SInternal相比标准监督微调提供更优的初始化。
AI.conclusion: 内化安全理解比单纯模仿安全行为能为对齐奠定更稳健的基础，从行为对齐转向内在安全对齐是提升模型安全性的关键方向。

title: Multi-Armed Bandits With Best-Action Queries
summary: We study \emph{multi-armed bandits} (MABs) augmented with \emph{best-action queries}, in which the learner may additionally query an oracle that reveals the best arm in the current round. This setting was recently characterized by Russo et al. [2024] in the \emph{full-feedback} model, where the learner observes the rewards of all arms after each round. They show that, in both \emph{stochastic} and \emph{adversarial} environments, $k$ best-action queries reduce the optimal $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{T})$ regret to $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\min\{T/k,\sqrt{T}\})$. Whether this improvement extends to the more realistic \emph{bandit-feedback} model -- where the learner observes only the reward of the played arm -- was left as an open problem. We fully resolve this question. When rewards are stochastic but correlated among arms, we show that the full-feedback result does not carry over: any algorithm must incur regret at least $Ω(\sqrt{T-k})$. This lower bound directly extends to adversarial environments. On the positive side, we show that $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\min\{T/k,\sqrt{T-k}\})$ regret is still achievable when rewards are stochastic and i.i.d., and establish a matching lower bound, up to logarithmic factors. Together, these results provide a complete characterization of the benefits of \emph{best-action queries} in the \emph{bandit-feedback} model.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在强盗反馈（bandit-feedback）模型中，带有最佳动作查询（best-action queries）的多臂老虎机问题。在随机且臂间奖励独立同分布的场景下，可实现 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\min\{T/k,\sqrt{T-k}\})$ 的遗憾界，且该界在 logarithmic 因子下最优；而在随机但臂间奖励相关或对抗性环境下，任何算法都至少需要 $\Omega(\sqrt{T-k})$ 的遗憾。
AI.motivation: 先前工作（Russo et al., 2024）在全反馈（full-feedback）模型中刻画了最佳动作查询带来的收益，但更现实的强盗反馈模型是否也能获得类似改进尚不清楚，该问题被列为开放问题。
AI.method: 通过信息论下界和上界算法分析，分别处理随机相关奖励、随机独立同分布奖励和对抗性环境。
AI.result: (1) 随机相关奖励或对抗性环境下：遗憾下界 $\Omega(\sqrt{T-k})$，全反馈结果不成立；(2) 随机独立同分布奖励下：上界 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\min\{T/k,\sqrt{T-k}\})$ 且匹配下界（对数因子内）。
AI.conclusion: 完整刻画了强盗反馈模型中最佳动作查询的收益，表明全反馈的改善不能直接推广到强盗反馈，且在独立同分布随机奖励下提供了紧的遗憾界。

title: Sample-Mean Anchored Thompson Sampling for Offline-to-Online Learning with Distribution Shift
summary: Offline-to-online learning aims to improve online decision-making by leveraging offline logged data. A central challenge in this setting is the distribution shift between offline and online environments. While some existing works attempt to leverage shifted offline data, they largely rely on UCB-type algorithms. Thompson sampling (TS) represents another canonical class of bandit algorithms, well known for its strong empirical performance and naturally suited to offline-to-online learning through its Bayesian formulation. However, unlike UCB indices, posterior samples in TS are not guaranteed to be optimistic with respect to the true arm means. This makes indices constructed from purely online and hybrid data difficult to compare and complicates their use. To address this issue, we propose sample-mean anchored TS (Anchor-TS), which introduces a novel median-based anchoring rule that defines the arm index as the median of an online posterior sample, a hybrid posterior sample, and the online sample mean. The median anchoring systematically corrects bias induced by distribution shift by mitigating over-estimation for suboptimal arms and under-estimation for optimal arms, while exploiting offline information to obtain more accurate estimates when the shift is small. We establish theoretical guarantees showing that the proposed algorithm safely leverages offline data to accelerate online learning, and quantifying how the degree of distribution shift and the size of offline data affect the resulting regret reduction. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements of our algorithm over baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于中位数锚定的汤普森采样算法（Anchor-TS），通过结合在线后验样本、混合后验样本和在线样本均值的中位数来修正分布偏移导致的偏差，从而安全利用离线数据加速在线学习。
AI.motivation: 离线到在线学习中存在分布偏移问题，现有工作多依赖UCB类算法；TS算法虽性能优异且天然适配，但其后验样本不保证对真实臂均值的乐观性，导致纯在线与混合数据构建的指标难以比较和使用。
AI.method: 提出Anchor-TS算法，引入基于中位数的锚定规则：将在线后验样本、混合后验样本和在线样本均值三者的中位数作为臂指标。该机制通过对次优臂抑制高估、对最优臂纠正低估来系统性地修正分布偏移导致的偏差，同时在小偏移时利用离线信息获得更准确估计。
AI.result: 建立了理论保证，证明算法能安全利用离线数据加速在线学习，并量化了分布偏移程度和离线数据规模对遗憾降低的影响。大量实验表明算法持续优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Anchor-TS有效解决了TS在离线到在线学习中的乐观性缺失问题，为利用分布偏移的离线数据提供了一种安全且高效的新方法。

title: PnP-Corrector: A Universal Correction Framework for Coupled Spatiotemporal Forecasting
summary: Coupled spatiotemporal forecasting is important for predicting the future evolution of multiple interacting dynamical systems, such as in climate models. However, existing methods are severely constrained by the persistent bottleneck of compounding errors. In coupled systems, errors from each subsystem simulator propagate and amplify one another, a phenomenon we term Reciprocal Error Amplification, leading to a rapid collapse of long-range predictions. To address this challenge, we propose a universal framework called PnP-Corrector (Plug-and-Play Corrector). The core idea of our framework is to decouple the physical simulation from the error correction process: it freezes pre-trained physics simulation engines and exclusively trains a correction agent to proactively counteract the systematic biases emerging from the coupled system. Furthermore, we design an efficient predictive model architecture, DSLCast, to serve as the backbone of this framework. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly enhances the long-term stability and accuracy of coupled forecasting systems. For instance, in the challenging task of a 300-day global ocean-atmosphere coupled forecast, our PnP-Corrector framework reduces the prediction error of the baseline model by 29% and surpasses state-of-the-art models on several key metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PnP-Corrector框架，通过解耦物理模拟与误差修正过程，冻结预训练物理引擎并训练修正代理来抑制耦合系统中的互惠误差放大现象，显著提升长期耦合时空预测的稳定性与精度。
AI.motivation: 现有耦合时空预测方法受制于持续性的误差累积瓶颈，在耦合系统中各子系统模拟器的误差会相互传播和放大（称为互惠误差放大），导致长期预测快速崩溃。
AI.method: 提出PnP-Corrector框架，核心是解耦物理模拟与误差修正：冻结预训练的物理模拟引擎，仅训练一个修正代理来主动抵消耦合系统产生的系统性偏差；并设计了高效预测模型架构DSLCast作为该框架的主干网络。
AI.result: 在300天全球海气耦合预报任务中，PnP-Corrector将基线模型的预测误差降低了29%，并在多个关键指标上超越了现有最优模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著增强了耦合预测系统的长期稳定性和准确性。

title: UMEDA: Unified Multi-modal Efficient Data Fusion for Privacy-Preserving Graph Federated Learning via Spectral-Gated Attention and Diffusion-Based Operator Alignment
summary: Device-free localization trains models from heterogeneous wireless and visual sensors (e.g., Wi-Fi, LiDAR) distributed across edge devices. Federated learning offers a privacy-respecting framework, but is brittle when clients differ in sensor modality and resolution, when their data distributions drift, and when privacy noise destroys the structural signal needed for localization. We propose UMEDA, a graph federated learning framework in which clients form nodes of a global graph that share a continuous integral operator, and aggregation is reformulated as spectral signal processing on this operator. Each client encodes its local sensors with a linear-attention layer whose kernel spectrum is low-rank filtered, suppressing modality-specific residuals so clients with different sensors align in a common low-rank subspace. The server then aggregates client updates via a diffusion model over the kernel's spectral coefficients, treating updates as discretizations of a shared operator rather than topology-bound weights -- this absorbs varying graph sizes and missing modalities without node-wise correspondence. To balance privacy and utility, we add an anisotropic differential-privacy mechanism that projects noise preferentially into the null space of the signal subspace, preserving dominant eigendirections while ensuring formal $(ε, δ)$-DP under gradient clipping. On MM-Fi and the RELI11D out-of-distribution benchmark, UMEDA outperforms state-of-the-art federated baselines in accuracy, convergence, and communication efficiency, particularly under high modality heterogeneity and tight privacy budgets.

AI.tldr: UMEDA是一个图联邦学习框架，通过将客户端更新视为共享连续积分算子的离散化，并在谱域进行聚合和差分隐私保护，解决了异构无线与视觉传感器在联邦学习中的模态差异、数据漂移和隐私噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在设备无关定位中面临三大挑战：客户端传感器模态和分辨率异构、数据分布漂移、以及隐私噪声破坏定位所需的结构化信号。现有联邦学习方法难以处理这些异构性和隐私-效用权衡。
AI.method: 提出UMEDA框架：1) 构建全局图，客户端作为节点共享连续积分算子，将聚合重定义为谱域信号处理；2) 每个客户端使用线性注意力层，其核谱经低秩滤波抑制模态特异性残差，使不同传感器对齐到公共低秩子空间；3) 服务器通过扩散模型在核谱系数上聚合客户端更新；4) 采用各向异性差分隐私机制，将噪声优先投影到信号子空间的零空间，保留主导特征方向同时保证(ε,δ)-DP。
AI.result: 在MM-Fi和RELI11D分布外基准测试上，UMEDA在准确性、收敛速度和通信效率方面均优于最先进的联邦基线，特别是在高模态异质性和严格隐私预算条件下优势显著。
AI.conclusion: UMEDA通过谱域操作和结构感知的差分隐私机制，有效解决了异构传感器联邦学习中的模态对齐和隐私-效用权衡问题，为跨模态无线感知提供了一种鲁棒且隐私保护的解决方案。

title: Real vs. Semi-Simulated: Rethinking Evaluation for Treatment Effect Estimation
summary: Estimating heterogeneous treatment effects with machine learning has attracted substantial attention in both academic research and industrial practice. However, the two communities often evaluate models under markedly different conditions. Methodological work typically relies on semi-simulated benchmarks and metrics that require counterfactual outcomes, whereas real-world applications rely on observable metrics based on ranking or test outcomes. Despite the well-known gap between methodological progress and practical deployment, the relationship between these evaluation regimes has not been examined systematically. We conduct a large-scale empirical study of treatment effect evaluation across standard semi-simulated benchmark families and real-world datasets. Our benchmark covers meta-learners paired with multiple base learners, as well as specialized causal machine learning models. We evaluate these methods using observable metrics common in application-oriented literature, alongside counterfactual metrics commonly used in methods papers. Our results reveal two complementary gaps. First, counterfactual metrics do not reliably recover the estimators preferred by observable metrics, even on the same semi-simulated benchmarks. Second, rankings obtained on semi-simulated benchmarks do not transfer to real datasets. We further find that simple meta-learners with strong base models are consistently competitive, in contrast to specialized causal models. Overall, our findings suggest that progress in treatment effect estimation research should not be assessed solely through counterfactual metrics and semi-simulated benchmarks, but it would benefit from incorporating observable metrics and real-data validation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模实证研究，系统考察了异质性处理效应估计中两类评估机制（基于反事实的基准指标与基于可观测结果的现实指标）之间的关系，发现两者存在显著分歧：反事实指标无法可靠复现可观测指标偏好的模型排序，半模拟基准上的排名也无法迁移到真实数据集。简单元学习器搭配强基模型的表现始终优于专门化因果模型。
AI.motivation: 方法论研究通常使用半模拟基准和反事实指标，而实际应用依赖可观测指标（如排序或测试结果），两种评估体制之间的关系尚未被系统考察，存在着方法论进步与实际部署之间的已知鸿沟。
AI.method: 开展大规模实证研究，涵盖标准半模拟基准家族和真实数据集；评估元学习器搭配多种基学习器以及专门化因果机器学习模型；同时使用应用文献中常见的可观测指标和方法论文中常用的反事实指标进行对比评估。
AI.result: 发现两类互补差距：1）反事实指标无法可靠复现可观测指标偏好的模型排序，即使在相同半模拟基准上；2）半模拟基准上的排名无法迁移到真实数据集。简单元学习器搭配强基模型始终具有竞争力，而专门化因果模型表现不佳。
AI.conclusion: 处理效应估计研究的进展不应仅通过反事实指标和半模拟基准来评估，而应纳入可观测指标和真实数据验证。

title: Self-ReSET: Learning to Self-Recover from Unsafe Reasoning Trajectories
summary: Large Reasoning Models possess remarkable capabilities for self-correction in general domain; however, they frequently struggle to recover from unsafe reasoning trajectories under adversarial attacks. Existing alignment methods attempt to mitigate this vulnerability by fine-tuning the model on expert data including reflection traces or adversarial prefixes. Crucially, these approaches are often hindered by static training data which inevitably deviate from model's dynamic, on-policy reasoning traces, resulting in model hardly covering its vast generation space and learning to recover from its own failures. To bridge this gap, we propose Self-ReSET, a pure reinforcement learning framework designed to equip LRMs with the intrinsic capacity to recover from their own safety error trajectories, which are subsequently reused as an initial state for reinforcement learning. Extensive experiments across various LRMs and benchmarks demonstrate that Self-ReSET significantly enhances robustness against adversarial attacks especially out-of-distribution (OOD) jailbreak prompts while maintaining general utility, along with efficient data utilization. Further analysis reveals that our method effectively fosters self-recovery patterns, enabling models to better identify and recover from unsafe intermediate error states back to benign paths. Our codes and data are available at https://github.com/Ing1024/Self-ReSET.

AI.tldr: Self-ReSET是一个纯强化学习框架，通过让大型推理模型在自身生成的错误安全轨迹上进行训练，显著提升其对对抗攻击（尤其是OOD越狱提示）的鲁棒性，同时保持通用能力。
AI.motivation: 现有对齐方法依赖静态的专家数据（包含反思轨迹或对抗前缀），这些数据与模型动态的、在策略的推理轨迹存在偏差，导致模型无法覆盖其庞大的生成空间，也难以从自身错误中恢复。因此，需要一种能让模型从自身失败中学习恢复能力的方法。
AI.method: 提出Self-ReSET框架，核心思想是纯强化学习：先让模型生成自身的安全错误轨迹，然后将这些轨迹作为强化学习的初始状态，通过RL训练使模型学会从自身错误中恢复。
AI.result: 在多种LRM和基准上的实验表明，Self-ReSET显著增强了对抗攻击（尤其是OOD越狱提示）下的鲁棒性，同时保持通用能力，且数据利用效率高。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效培养模型的自我恢复模式，使其更好地识别并从不安全的中间错误状态恢复到良性路径。

title: What If We Let Forecasting Forget? A Sparse Bottleneck for Cross-Variable Dependencies
summary: Multivariate time series forecasting is critical in many real-world systems, and thus modeling cross-channel dependencies is essential. Although existing methods improve overall accuracy by enhancing representations and cross-channel interactions, it remains challenging to reliably capture inter-variable dependencies under specific conditions. We observe that dependencies in real data are often state-dependent and noisy; in such cases, dense interactions can amplify spurious correlations and lead to representation over-smoothing, which may yield unreliable predictions in certain scenarios. Motivated by this, we propose MS-FLOW, a sparse-bottleneck framework that explicitly models inter-variable interaction as capacity-limited information flow. Specifically, MS-FLOW replaces fully connected communication with selective sparse routing, retaining only a few critical dependency paths and injecting cross-variable signals under a strict communication budget, thereby suppressing redundant connections and spurious-correlation propagation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MS-FLOW learns more reliable multivariate correlations, achieving state-of-the-art forecasting accuracy on 12 real-world benchmarks while producing fewer yet more reliable dependencies, shifting multivariate forecasting from "more interaction" to "more effective interaction".

AI.tldr: 提出MS-FLOW稀疏瓶颈框架，通过选择性稀疏路由替代全连接通信，在有限通信预算下仅保留关键依赖路径，抑制虚假相关性传播，实现更可靠的多元时间序列预测，在12个基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过增强表征和跨通道交互提升预测精度，但在特定条件下难以可靠捕获变量间依赖关系；真实数据中的依赖常是状态依赖且含噪声的，密集交互会放大虚假相关性并导致表示过平滑，产生不可靠预测。
AI.method: 提出MS-FLOW稀疏瓶颈框架，将变量间交互建模为容量受限的信息流：用选择性稀疏路由替代全连接通信，在严格通信预算下仅保留少数关键依赖路径，注入跨变量信号，从而抑制冗余连接和虚假相关传播。
AI.result: 在12个真实世界基准数据集上达到SOTA预测精度，同时产生更少但更可靠的依赖关系。
AI.conclusion: 多元时间序列预测应从"更多交互"转向"更有效的交互"，稀疏化瓶颈设计能学习更可靠的多元相关性。

title: Can We Formally Verify Neural PDE Surrogates? SMT Compilation of Small Fourier Neural Operators
summary: Fourier Neural Operators (FNOs) can greatly accelerate PDE simulation, but they are often used without formal guarantees that they preserve basic physical structure. We show that, once the trained weights and grid are fixed, the spectral convolution in an FNO is a linear map. As a result, the full forward pass is piecewise-linear and can be represented exactly in Z3's linear real arithmetic. We study two encodings. The exact encoding compiles the spectral convolution into a dense matrix multiplication, which is sound for both proofs and counterexamples. The lighter frozen encoding replaces the spectral path with a constant, making it faster but approximate. On 10 small FNO surrogates for 1D advection-diffusion-reaction (85 to 117 parameters, grids 8 to 32), the exact encoding gives 2 sound positivity proofs on linear (ReLU-free) models, 5 sound positivity counterexamples, and 10 sound mass-violation counterexamples; the remaining 3 positivity queries on ReLU models time out. For mass non-increase, Z3 finds worse counterexamples than both gradient-based falsification and Monte Carlo on 7 of 10 models. The frozen encoding scales to grid size 64 with sub-second positivity checks, but it no longer provides certificates for the original FNO. Overall, the results make the soundness--scalability tradeoff explicit and point to what is needed for formal verification of production-scale neural operators.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了傅里叶神经算子(FNO)的正式验证方法，通过将FNO编码为Z3可求解的线性算术问题，在10个小规模FNO代理模型上实现了对正性和质量守恒性质的精确或近似验证，揭示了形式验证与可扩展性之间的权衡。
AI.motivation: FNO常用于加速PDE仿真，但缺乏对其是否保持基本物理结构的形式化保证，需要建立可验证的推理框架。
AI.method: 利用FNO中谱卷积在固定权重和网格后是线性映射的性质，将整个前向传播表示为分段线性函数，通过Z3的线性实数算术进行精确编码（密集矩阵乘法）和冻结编码（谱路径近似为常数）。
AI.result: 在10个小规模1D对流-扩散-反应FNO上，精确编码在无ReLU模型上成功证明正性(2个)，给出正性反例(5个)和质量守恒反例(10个)；ReLU模型超时(3个)。冻结编码扩展到网格64，但不再提供原始FNO的证书。
AI.conclusion: 研究明确了形式验证在FNO上的可靠性与可扩展性之间的权衡，指出了对生产级神经算子进行形式验证所需的方向。

title: Toward Optimal Regret in Robust Pricing: Decoupling Corruption and Time
summary: We design the first regret guarantees for robust dynamic pricing that decouple the dependence on the corruption $C$ and the time horizon $T$. In dynamic pricing, a seller with unlimited supply of a good interacts with a stream of buyers over \( T \) rounds, with the goal of maximizing revenue. At each round $t$, the seller posts a price $p_t$, and the buyer purchases the good only if their unknown valuation $v^\star$ exceeds this price. The seller observes only the binary feedback $\mathbb{I} \left\{ p_t \leq v^\star \right\}$, indicating whether a sale occurred. In the \emph{robust} pricing setting, a malicious adversary is allowed to corrupt this feedback in at most $C$ rounds. Even if the learner knows the corruption $C$, the best known regret bound is $\mathcal{O}(C\log\log T)$ by Gupta et al. [2025]. This leaves as an open problem to ``decouple'' the dependence on $C$ and $T$. In this work, we resolve this open problem. In particular, we develop a robust variant of binary search that achieves regret $\mathcal{O}(C+\log T)$ when the corruption $C$ is known and $\mathcal{O}(C+\log^2 T)$ when the corruption is unknown.

AI.tldr: 本文针对鲁棒动态定价问题，设计了首个将腐败量C与时间T的依赖解耦的遗憾界，在已知C时达到O(C+log T)，未知C时达到O(C+log² T)。
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒动态定价算法中，遗憾界同时依赖腐败量C和时间T（如O(C log log T)），无法将两者解耦，这是一个公开问题。
AI.method: 提出了鲁棒二分搜索的变体，通过设计对最多C轮恶意反馈具有鲁棒性的定价策略，分别处理已知和未知腐败量的情况。
AI.result: 当腐败量C已知时，遗憾界为O(C + log T)；当腐败量C未知时，遗憾界为O(C + log² T)。
AI.conclusion: 成功解决了动态定价中腐败量C与时间T依赖解耦的公开问题，显著改进了现有结果。

title: A Recursive Decomposition Framework for Causal Structure Learning in the Presence of Latent Variables
summary: Constraint-based causal discovery is widely used for learning causal structures, but heavy reliance on conditional independence (CI) testing makes it computationally expensive in high-dimensional settings. To mitigate this limitation, many divide-and-conquer frameworks have been proposed, but most assume causal sufficiency, i.e., no latent variables. In this paper, we show that divide-and-conquer strategies can be theoretically generalized beyond causal sufficiency to settings with latent variables. Specifically, we propose a recursive decomposition framework, termed DiCoLa, that enables divide-and-conquer causal discovery in the presence of latent variables. It recursively decomposes the global learning task into smaller subproblems and integrates their solutions through a principled reconstruction step to recover the global structure. We theoretically establish the soundness and completeness of the proposed framework. Extensive experiments on synthetic data demonstrate that our approach significantly improves computational efficiency across a range of causal discovery algorithms, while experiments on a real-world dataset further illustrate its practical effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 提出DiCoLa框架，将分治策略推广到存在隐变量的因果发现场景，通过递归分解全局任务为子问题并整合重建全局结构，理论证明了框架的完备性和正确性，实验表明能显著提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于约束的因果发现方法在高维场景下因条件独立性检验而计算开销巨大，而现有分治框架多假设因果充分性（无隐变量），缺乏对存在隐变量场景的理论支持。
AI.method: 提出DiCoLa递归分解框架：将全局因果学习任务递归分解为更小的子问题，通过原则性重建步骤整合子问题解以恢复全局结构，理论上证明了框架的可靠性和完备性。
AI.result: 在合成数据上，DiCoLa显著提升了多种因果发现算法的计算效率；在真实数据集上验证了其实用有效性。
AI.conclusion: 分治策略可超越因果充分性假设推广到含隐变量的场景，DiCoLa为高维含隐变量因果发现提供了高效且理论上可靠的解决方案。

title: MDGYM: Benchmarking AI Agents on Molecular Simulations
summary: The promise of AI-driven scientific discovery hinges on whether AI agents can autonomously design and execute the computational workflows that underpin modern science. Molecular dynamics (MD) simulation presents a natural test bed to stress-test this claim; it requires translating physical intuition into syntactically and semantically correct input scripts, reasoning about initial and boundary conditions, diagnosing numerically unstable trajectories, and interpreting outputs against known physical behavior and laws. We introduce MDGYM, a benchmark of 169 expert-curated MD simulations spanning LAMMPS and GROMACS, two widely used MD packages, across three increasing difficulty levels. We evaluate three agentic frameworks -- Claude Code, Codex, and OpenHands -- with four LLMs, and find that all perform poorly: even the strongest agent solves only 21\% of easy-level tasks, with less than 10\% at higher difficulties. Trajectory analysis reveals a characteristic pattern of failure -- agents successfully invoke simulation machinery but produce physically unstable configurations, fabricate numerical outputs without executing the underlying computation, or abandon tasks prematurely rather than iterating through simulation-specific errors. These failure modes are qualitatively distinct from those observed in general software engineering benchmarks, indicating that fluent code generation does not transfer to grounded physical reasoning.

AI.tldr: MDGYM是包含169个专家 curated 分子动力学模拟的基准测试，涵盖LAMMPS和GROMACS。评估了三种智能体框架和四种LLM，发现即使是表现最好的智能体也仅能解决21%的简单任务，高级任务成功率低于10%。失败模式表现为物理不稳定构型、编造数值结果或过早放弃任务，表明流畅的代码生成能力无法迁移至 grounded 的物理推理。
AI.motivation: 验证AI智能体能否自主设计和执行计算工作流，以分子动力学模拟作为测试床，检验AI能否将物理直觉转化为正确脚本、推理边界条件、诊断数值不稳定轨迹并解释输出。
AI.method: 构建MDGYM基准测试（169个专家 curated 的MD模拟任务，覆盖LAMMPS和GROMACS，分三级难度），评估Claude Code、Codex、OpenHands三种智能体框架搭配四种LLM的表现。
AI.result: 所有智能体表现均差：最强智能体仅解决21%的简单任务，高级任务低于10%。失败模式包括产生物理不稳定构型、编造数值结果而非实际执行计算、过早放弃任务。
AI.conclusion: 现有AI智能体在 grounded 物理推理方面存在根本性缺陷，流畅的代码生成能力无法迁移至需要物理理解的科学计算任务，失败模式与通用软件工程基准测试中的表现有本质区别。

title: Graph Computation Meets Circuit Algebra: A Task-Aligned Analysis of Graph Neural Networks for Electronic Design Automation
summary: EDA problems are graph-structured, but not all graph-structured problems call for the same GNN computation. We argue that successful GNN-for-EDA methods are those whose propagation, aggregation, and supervision align with the native algebra of the target task. Concretely: static timing analysis is a max-plus/min-plus recurrence on a topologically ordered DAG, structurally aligned with asynchronous DAG-GNNs; placement is governed by hypergraph wirelength and density penalties and is exploited by differentiable placers rather than by message-passing GNNs alone; routing congestion is a sparse demand-supply field over a layout grid; switching-activity propagation is a probabilistic recurrence on a directed netlist; IR drop is a linear system on the power-delivery network; and analog symmetry extraction is a discrete constraint-prediction problem on schematic graphs. Through these task-by-task alignments we (i) review the GNN architectural toolkit relevant to circuits, (ii) formalize how circuit graphs differ from generic graphs (directed, heterogeneous, multi-scale, with sequential and clock structure), (iii) characterize where current methods succeed and where the algebra-architecture mismatch limits them, and (iv) identify failure modes--stage leakage, proxy-to-signoff gap, calibration, and design-distribution shift--that we believe are likely to dominate the next phase of work. We position the paper as a GNN-for-EDA, task-aligned analysis rather than a comprehensive AI-for-chip-design survey. Continuous SE(3)-equivariant geometric GNNs are usually mismatched to Manhattan digital layout, and LLM-for-RTL, HLS, and RL/diffusion-based topology generation are outside our scope.

AI.tldr: 本文聚焦GNN在EDA中的应用，提出成功方法的关键在于GNN的传播、聚合和监督机制与目标任务的代数结构对齐。针对静态时序分析、布局、布线拥塞、开关活动传播、IR压降和模拟对称性提取等任务，逐一分析其代数特性与GNN架构的匹配关系，并指出当前方法的局限性及未来挑战。
AI.motivation: EDA问题虽然是图结构的，但不同问题需要不同的GNN计算方式。现有方法往往忽视任务代数结构与GNN架构之间的匹配关系，导致效果受限。本文旨在通过任务级对齐分析，阐明何时GNN适合EDA任务、何时不匹配，并识别关键失败模式。
AI.method: 采用任务级对齐分析框架：对每个EDA任务，首先形式化其底层代数结构（如max-plus/min-plus递归、超图线长密度惩罚、需求-供给场、概率递归、线性系统、离散约束预测），然后分析与之对齐或错位的GNN架构类型（如异步DAG-GNN、可微分布局器、消息传递GNN等），并识别当前方法中的成功与失败模式。
AI.result: (i) 梳理了与电路相关的GNN架构工具集；(ii) 形式化了电路图与通用图的差异（有向、异构、多尺度、含时序和时钟结构）；(iii) 刻画了各任务上当前方法的成功之处与代数-架构不匹配导致的局限；(iv) 识别了四个关键失败模式：stage leakage、proxy-to-signoff gap、校准问题、设计分布偏移。
AI.conclusion: GNN-for-EDA的成功依赖于任务代数结构与GNN架构的对齐。连续SE(3)-等变几何GNN通常不适用于曼哈顿数字布局，LLM-for-RTL、HLS、RL/扩散拓扑生成不在本文讨论范围内。

title: Agentic AI Scientists Are Not Built For Autonomous Scientific Discovery
summary: A growing body of work pursues AI scientists capable of end-to-end autonomous scientific discovery. This position paper argues that although they already function as co-scientists, agentic AI scientists are not built for autonomous scientific discovery. We identify the following challenges in building and deploying autonomous AI scientists: (1) Problem selection is influenced by the McNamara fallacy; (2) Agents are built on large language models (LLMs) whose training corpora omit tacit procedural and failure knowledge of laboratory practice; (3) Preference optimisation during post-training compresses output diversity toward consensus; and (4) Most scientific benchmarks measure single-turn prediction accuracy and lack feedback from physical experiments back to the computational model. These challenges are not just questions of scale and scaffolding; they require revisiting fundamental design choices. To build truly autonomous AI scientists, we recommend the use of scientific simulations as verifiers for training, the design of persistent world models that represent the shifting objectives governing real investigations, the establishment of a centralized preregistration repository for all AI-generated hypotheses, and application driven by scientific need rather than tool affordance.

AI.tldr: 本文认为当前基于LLM的自主AI科学家存在四项根本性挑战：McNamara谬误导致的选题偏差、训练语料缺少隐性知识与失败经验、偏好优化压缩输出多样性、以及缺乏物理实验反馈。建议通过科学模拟作为验证器、持久化世界模型、集中预注册库和需求驱动应用来构建真正的自主AI科学家。
AI.motivation: 虽然已有大量工作致力于打造端到端自主科学发现的AI科学家，但现有方法忽视了若干根本性设计缺陷。本文旨在系统性地识别这些挑战，并论证它们无法仅通过规模扩展或工程搭建来解决，需要重新思考基础设计选择。
AI.method: 采用立场论文形式，识别并论证构建和部署自主AI科学家的四项核心挑战，并针对每项挑战提出相应的解决方案建议。
AI.result: 识别出四项关键挑战：(1)问题选择受McNamara谬误影响(过度关注可量化指标)；(2)LLM训练语料缺少实验室实践的隐性程序知识和失败知识；(3)偏好优化压缩输出多样性趋向共识；(4)科学基准大多只测量单轮预测准确性，缺乏物理实验对计算模型的反馈。
AI.conclusion: 建议采用科学模拟作为训练验证器、设计持久化世界模型以表征真实研究中不断变化的目标、建立AI生成假说的集中预注册库、以及由科学需求而非工具可用性驱动应用。

title: What should post-training optimize? A test-time scaling law perspective
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed with test-time strategies: sample $N$ responses, score them with a reward model or verifier, and return the best. This deployment rule exposes a mismatch in post-training: standard objectives optimize the mean reward of a single response, whereas best-of-$N$ performance is governed by the upper tail of the reward distribution. Recent test-time-aware objectives partly address this mismatch, but typically assume that training can use the same per-prompt rollout budget as deployment, which is impractical when post-training must cover many prompts while deployment can allocate much larger per-prompt test-time compute. We study this budget-mismatch regime, where only $m\ll N$ per-prompt rollouts are available during training but the target objective is best-of-$N$ deployment. Under structural assumptions on the reward tails, we show that the policy gradient of the best-of-$N$ objective can be approximated from a much smaller rollout group by extrapolating upper-tail statistics. This yields a family of Tail-Extrapolated estimators for best-of-$N$-oriented post-training: a simple direct estimator, Tail-Extrapolated Advantage (TEA), and a fixed-order debiased Prefix-TEA estimator based on moment cancellation. Experiments on instruction-following tasks show that TEA and Prefix-TEA improve best-of-$N$ performance across different language models, reward models and datasets under various training and test-time budget settings.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了训练阶段每个提示仅允许少量(m)次采样，而部署阶段需要执行大量(N次, m≪N)最佳采样(Best-of-N)的预算不匹配问题。通过利用奖励尾部分布的结构假设，提出了一类尾外推估计器(TEA和Prefix-TEA)，能够从小规模训练样本中近似Best-of-N目标的策略梯度，从而弥合训练与部署间的计算预算差距。实验表明该方法在不同语言模型、奖励模型和数据集上均能提升Best-of-N性能。
AI.motivation: 标准后训练目标优化的是单次响应的平均奖励，而Best-of-N部署的性能由奖励分布的上尾决定。现有测试时感知的目标假设训练与部署使用相同的每个提示采样预算，这在实践中不可行——后训练需覆盖大量提示而部署可分配更大的每提示测试时计算量。因此需要研究这种预算不匹配场景下的后训练方法。
AI.method: 在奖励尾部分布的结构假设下，证明可以通过外推上尾统计量，从小规模采样组(m个)近似Best-of-N目标的策略梯度。据此提出TEA(Tail-Extrapolated Advantage)直接估计器和基于矩消除的固定阶去偏Prefix-TEA估计器。
AI.result: 在指令跟随任务上的实验表明，TEA和Prefix-TEA在不同语言模型、奖励模型和数据集以及各种训练/测试时预算设置下均能提升Best-of-N性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过尾外推方法有效解决了训练与部署间采样预算不匹配问题，为实际场景中Best-of-N导向的后训练提供了可行方案。

title: Latency Analysis and Optimization of Alpamayo 1 via Efficient Trajectory Generation
comment: Submitted to IEEE RTCSA on March 26, 2026 (KST) Accepted on May 4, 2026 (KST)
summary: Reasoning-based end-to-end (E2E) autonomous driving has recently emerged as a promising approach to improving the interpretability of driving decisions as it can generate human-readable reasoning together with predicted trajectories. Such approaches commonly generate multiple trajectories to capture diverse future behaviors, and they fall into two categories: (1) multi-reasoning, where one reasoning sequence is generated per trajectory, and (2) single-reasoning, where a single reasoning is shared across all trajectories. The former offers richer diversity at the cost of redundant computation, while the latter is more efficient but is often assumed to sacrifice diversity. Alpamayo 1, a representative system, adopts the multi-reasoning approach and achieves competitive trajectory prediction performance. However, the efficiency of this design remains largely unexplored, making it a well-motivated subject for investigation. In this paper, we systematically analyze and improve Alpamayo 1 in two ways. First, we reduce inference latency while preserving trajectory diversity by redesigning Alpamayo 1 into a single-reasoning system. Through extensive experiments, we find that replacing multi-reasoning with single-reasoning does not meaningfully degrade trajectory diversity. Second, we accelerate diffusion-based action generation by eliminating inter-block overhead arising from unnecessary copy operations and inefficient kernel execution. Through closed-loop and open-loop experiments, we validate both optimizations, demonstrating a 69.23% reduction in inference latency while maintaining trajectory diversity and prediction quality. These results highlight the importance of jointly analyzing system architecture and runtime execution to improve the efficiency of reasoning-based E2E AD systems.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析并改进了推理式端到端自动驾驶系统Alpamayo 1，通过将多推理范式改造为单推理范式并加速扩散模型动作生成，在保持轨迹多样性和预测质量的前提下，将推理延迟降低了69.23%。
AI.motivation: 推理式端到端自动驾驶系统虽能提升决策可解释性，但以Alpamayo 1为代表的多推理范式存在计算冗余问题，其效率尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 1) 将多推理系统改造为单推理系统，消除冗余计算；2) 通过消除不必要的拷贝操作和低效内核执行来加速扩散模型的动作生成。
AI.result: 推理延迟降低69.23%，同时保持轨迹多样性和预测质量，在闭环与开环实验中均得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 联合分析系统架构与运行时执行是提升推理式端到端自动驾驶系统效率的关键，单推理范式并不会显著牺牲轨迹多样性。

title: In-Context Fixation: When Demonstrated Labels Override Semantics in Few-Shot Classification
summary: While random demonstration labels barely hurt in-context learning (Min et al., 2022), we show that homogeneous labels--even semantically valid ones--collapse accuracy to <=12% across six models (Pythia, Llama, Qwen; 0.8B--8B) and four tasks. The trigger is label-slot content: the model treats tokens occupying the label position as an exhaustive answer vocabulary, with homogeneity as the maximally collapsed case. A novel set-level fixation finding confirms this: when demonstrations carry varied nonsense tokens from {foo,bar,vex,nit,orb}, the model places 42--67% of probability on the demonstrated set while P(dog) remains below 0.2%. This is inconsistent with latent-concept Bayesian accounts (Xie et al., 2022) and reveals that ICL output is constrained vocabulary retrieval--the model binds its output to the demonstrated token inventory regardless of semantic plausibility. The effect generalizes to 4-way classification (0% accuracy across three models, 1B--8B) and multi-token verbalizers ("very positive"), where we decompose fixation into format-level (template adoption) and content-level (polarity override) components that are experimentally dissociable. Mechanistically, per-item paired activation patching on Pythia-1B recovers 98.4% of the gap (95% CI [84%, 112%]), localizing fixation to a layer-7-centered circuit (rank 2/560, 99.8th percentile; 4-fold CV mean 103%). Cross-architecture logit lens on Llama-3.2-1B replicates the encode-then-override trajectory with causal confirmation (top-5 layers: 89% recovery).

AI.tldr: 本文发现上下文学习(ICL)中演示标签的标签槽内容会形成“词汇固定”效应：模型将标签位置上的token视为穷举答案词表，导致输出被限制在演示token集合内。同质标签（即使是语义有效的）使准确率崩至≤12%；随机无意义token的集合级固定效应显示42-67%的概率分配给演示集合。该效应通过激活修补定位到Pythia-1B的第7层回路，并在Llama-3.2-1B中得到跨架构验证。
AI.motivation: 现有研究（Min et al., 2022）表明随机标签对ICL影响很小，但本文发现同质标签会造成灾难性性能下降。这揭示ICL并非基于潜在概念的贝叶斯推理（Xie et al., 2022），而是受到词汇级检索机制的约束，需要深入理解其背后的固化机制。
AI.method: 在6种模型（Pythia、Llama、Qwen; 0.8B-8B）和4种任务上进行实验，分析标签槽内容对ICL的影响。使用集合级固定效应实验（{foo,bar,vex,nit,orb}等无意义token）、4-way分类、多token verbalizer（"very positive"）。采用每项配对激活修补（per-item paired activation patching）定位机制，并使用logit lens和因果验证进行跨架构分析。
AI.result: 同质标签（即使语义有效）使6种模型在4个任务上准确率崩至≤12%；无意义token集合级固定效应显示42-67%概率分配在演示集合内，P(dog)<0.2%；4-way分类准确率为0%。激活修补恢复98.4%的差距（95% CI [84%, 112%]），定位到Pythia-1B第7层回路（rank 2/560, 99.8百分位）。发现格式级（模板采用）和内容级（极性覆盖）两个可实验分离的组件。
AI.conclusion: ICL输出本质上是受约束的词汇检索：模型将其输出绑定到演示token清单上，与语义合理性无关。这反驳了潜在概念贝叶斯解释，揭示了标签槽内容对模型推理的支配性影响。词汇固定效应在跨架构、多任务、多token verbalizer下均具有鲁棒性。

title: Reasoning Is Not Free: Robust Adaptive Cost-Efficient Routing for LLM-as-a-Judge
summary: Reasoning-capable large language models (LLMs) have recently been adopted as automated judges, but their benefits and costs in LLM-as-a-Judge settings remain unclear. Through controlled comparisons between reasoning and non-reasoning judges, we show that explicit reasoning substantially improves judgment accuracy on tasks requiring structured verification (e.g., math and coding), while offering limited or even negative gains on simpler evaluations and incurring significantly higher computational cost. These findings motivate that reasoning should be used selectively rather than universally, with awareness of possible distribution shift. We propose a Robust Adaptive Cost-Efficient Routing (RACER), which dynamically selects between reasoning and non-reasoning judges under a fixed budget by formulating routing as a constrained distributionally robust optimization problem. RACER explicitly accounts for distribution shift via a KL-divergence uncertainty set, admits an efficient primal--dual algorithm, and enjoys theoretical guarantees including uniqueness of the optimal policy and linear convergence. Extensive experiments show that RACER achieves superior accuracy--cost trade-offs under distribution shift.

AI.tldr: 本文提出选择性使用推理型大语言模型作为评判者，通过RACER路由机制在固定预算下动态选择推理型或非推理型评判者，实现准确率与成本的优化权衡，并理论保证最优策略的唯一性和线性收敛。
AI.motivation: 推理型LLM作为自动评判者虽提升了准确性，但计算成本显著增加，且并非所有评估任务都受益于推理。现有方法缺乏对推理能力的自适应选择性使用，尤其在分布偏移场景下表现不佳。
AI.method: 将路由问题形式化为带约束的分布鲁棒优化问题，使用KL散度不确定性集显式建模分布偏移，设计高效原始-对偶算法求解，并提供最优策略唯一性和线性收敛的理论保证。
AI.result: 推理型评判者在需要结构化验证的任务（数学、编程）上显著提升准确性，在简单评估上增益有限甚至为负；RACER在分布偏移下实现了优越的准确率-成本权衡。
AI.conclusion: 推理能力应选择性使用而非普遍应用；RACER提供了一种理论保障的、鲁棒且成本高效的路由框架，能够在预算约束和分布偏移条件下自适应选择合适的评判者。

title: Learning to Explore: Scaling Agentic Reasoning via Exploration-Aware Policy Optimization
summary: Recent advancements in agentic test-time scaling allow models to gather environmental feedback before committing to final actions. A key limitation of existing methods is that they typically employ undifferentiated exploration strategies, lacking the ability to adaptively distinguish when exploration is truly required. In this paper, we propose an exploration-aware reinforcement learning framework that enables LLM agents to adaptively explore only when uncertainty is high. Our method introduces a fine-grained reward function via variational inference that explicitly evaluates exploratory actions by estimating their potential to improve future decision-making, together with an exploration-aware grouping mechanism that separates exploratory actions from task-completion actions during optimization. By targeting informational gaps, this design allows agents to explore selectively and transition to execution as soon as the task context is clear. Empirically, we demonstrate that our approach achieves consistent improvements across a range of challenging text-based and GUI-based agent benchmarks. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/HansenHua/EAPO-ICML26} and models are available at https://huggingface.co/hansenhua/EAPO-ICML26.

AI.tldr: 提出一种探索感知的强化学习框架（EAPO），让LLM代理仅在不确定性高时自适应探索，通过变分推断的细粒度奖励函数和探索感知分组机制，在文本和GUI代理基准上取得一致改进。
AI.motivation: 现有代理测试时扩展方法采用无差别的探索策略，缺乏自适应区分何时真正需要探索的能力，导致探索效率低下。
AI.method: 1) 通过变分推断设计细粒度奖励函数，显式评估探索动作对未来决策改进的潜力；2) 提出探索感知分组机制，在优化过程中将探索动作与任务完成动作分离。核心思想是仅在不确定性高时进行选择性探索，一旦任务上下文清晰即转向执行。
AI.result: 在多种具有挑战性的基于文本和GUI的代理基准上实现了一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过信息缺口定向探索，让代理具备自适应探索能力，在保证探索有效性的同时及时切换到任务执行阶段，提升了代理在复杂环境中的决策效率。

title: A Qualitative Test-Risk Mechanism for Scaling Behavior in Normalized Residual Networks
summary: The scaling behavior, in which test performance often improves as model size and data increase, is a central empirical phenomenon in modern deep learning, yet its theoretical basis remains incomplete.
