In this paper, we study depth expansion in normalized residual networks: starting from a trained model in an old hypothesis class, we insert a new residual block at an intermediate layer and ask when such an expansion can yield a provable improvement in test risk. We develop a unified framework that decomposes this question into representational gain, optimization gain, and generalization transfer. First, under a first-order descent condition near zero initialization, we prove that the expanded hypothesis class contains an auxiliary jumpboard model with strictly smaller population risk than the original model. Second, under norm control tailored to post-normalized residual architectures, we establish a norm-based Rademacher complexity bound for the expanded model class. These ingredients lead to two complementary test-risk guarantees: one route passes through population risk and is tighter when a positive population margin is available, while the other works directly at the train/test level, avoids Hoeffding transfer, and is more robust in degenerate regimes. Together, these results provide a theorem-driven mechanism under which residual depth expansion can improve test performance in normalized residual networks. More broadly, they suggest that scaling is inherently joint: depth creates new improving directions, width enhances the finite-sample observability of weak signals, and data determines whether the statistical cost of expansion can be controlled.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论上证明，在归一化残差网络中，通过插入新的残差块进行深度扩展可以在特定条件下严格降低测试风险，并构建了一个包含表示增益、优化增益和泛化迁移的统一分析框架。
AI.motivation: 深度学习中模型规模扩大带来性能提升的缩放行为是核心经验现象，但其理论基础尚不完整。本文旨在为残差网络的深度扩展提供严格的理论基础，解释为何增加深度可以改善测试性能。
AI.method: 将深度扩展问题分解为表示增益、优化增益和泛化迁移三个部分。首先，在零初始化附近的一阶下降条件下，证明扩展后的假设类中存在一个辅助跳板模型，其总体风险严格小于原始模型。其次，针对后归一化残差架构建立范数控制的Rademacher复杂度界，从而得到两种互补的测试风险保证。
AI.result: 提供了两种互补的测试风险保证：一种通过总体风险路径，在存在正总体间隔时更紧；另一种直接在训练/测试层面工作，避免Hoeffding迁移，在退化情形下更鲁棒。证明了残差深度扩展可以改进归一化残差网络的测试性能。
AI.conclusion: 缩放本质上是联合的：深度创造新的改进方向，宽度增强弱信号的有噪观测性，数据决定扩展的统计成本是否可控。

title: Revisiting Policy Gradients for Restricted Policy Classes: Escaping Myopic Local Optima with $k$-step Policy Gradients
summary: This work revisits standard policy gradient methods used on restricted policy classes, which are known to get stuck in suboptimal critical points. We identify an important cause for this phenomenon to be that the policy gradient is itself fundamentally myopic, i.e. it only improves the policy based on the one-step $Q$-function. In this work, we propose a generalized $k$-step policy gradient method that couples the randomness within a $k$-step time window and can escape the myopic local optima in MDPs with restricted policy classes. We show this new method is theoretically guaranteed to converge to a solution that is exponentially close in performance to the optimal deterministic policy with respect to $k$. Further, we show projected gradient descent and mirror descent with this $k$-step policy gradient can achieve this exponential guarantee in $O(\frac{1}{T})$ iterations, despite only assuming smoothness and differentiability of the value function. This will provide near optimal solutions to previously elusive applications like state aggregation and partially observable cooperative multi-agent settings. Moreover, our bounds avoid the ubiquitous distribution mismatch factors $||d_μ^{π^*} / d_μ^π||_\infty$ and $||d_μ^{π^*} / μ||_\infty$ enabling the $k$-step policy gradient method to escape suboptimal critical points that emerge from poor exploration in fully observable settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种广义k步策略梯度方法，通过耦合k步时间窗口内的随机性，能够逃离受限策略类中的次优临界点，并理论上保证以指数级收敛到接近最优确定性策略的解。
AI.motivation: 标准的策略梯度方法在受限策略类中容易陷入次优临界点，其根本原因在于策略梯度本质上是短视的（仅基于一步Q函数改进策略）。
AI.method: 提出广义k步策略梯度方法，将k步时间窗口内的随机性耦合起来，通过增大时间窗口长度k来克服策略梯度的短视性。
AI.result: 该方法在理论上保证以指数级（关于k）接近最优确定性策略的性能；使用投影梯度下降和镜像下降时，能在O(1/T)迭代次数内达到该指数级保证；且避免了分布不匹配因子||d_μ^{π*}/d_μ^π||_∞和||d_μ^{π*}/μ||_∞的影响。
AI.conclusion: k步策略梯度方法能逃离次优临界点，为状态聚合、部分可观测多智能体协同等难以应用的问题提供了近似最优解。

title: Sufficient conditions for a Heuristic Rating Estimation Method application
summary: A series of papers has introduced the Heuristic Rating Estimation method, which evaluates a set of alternatives based on pairwise comparisons and the weights of reference alternatives. We formulate the conditions under which the HRE method can be applied correctly. The research considers both arithmetic and geometric algorithms for complete and incomplete pairwise comparison methods. The illustrative examples show that the estimations of inconsistency in the arithmetic variant are optimal.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了启发式评级估计（HRE）方法的适用条件，涵盖算术与几何算法在完整与不完整成对比较中的表现，并通过实例证明算术变体在不一致性估计方面具有最优性。
AI.motivation: 已有系列论文提出了启发式评级估计（HRE）方法，但该方法何时能正确应用尚缺乏系统性的条件界定。本文旨在明确HRE方法正确应用的边界条件。
AI.method: 分别对算术算法和几何算法在完整成对比较方法和不完整成对比较方法两种情境下进行公式化条件分析，并通过说明性算例进行验证。
AI.result: 算术变体在不一致性估计方面表现出最优性。
AI.conclusion: 研究明确了HRE方法正确应用的条件，并指出算术算法在不一致性估计方面优于几何算法。

title: What Cohort INRs Encode and Where to Freeze Them
summary: Reusing the early layers of cohort-trained INRs as initialization for new signals has been shown to accelerate and improve signal fitting, yet it remains unclear which layers of the shared encoder learn transferable representations and what those representations encode. We address both questions for two standard backbones, SIREN and Fourier-feature MLPs (FFMLP). First, sweeping the freeze depth across the shared encoder at test time, we find that the optimum coincides with the layer of highest weight stable rank. Moreover, freezing at this depth matches or improves on the standard fine-tuning recipe across all our experiments. Second, identifying which layer transfers does not characterize what that layer encodes. To address this we adopt sparse autoencoders (SAEs), the dominant tool in mechanistic interpretability, and present the first SAE decomposition of INR activations into sparse dictionary atoms. Interestingly, SIREN and FFMLP achieve comparable cohort-fitting quality, but learn qualitatively different dictionaries. Cohort SIREN's atoms are localized, tiling the coordinate plane such that each atom fires in a confined region independent of cohort content. Cohort FFMLP's atoms are image-spanning, tracing the contours of memorized cohort signals. Single-atom ablations confirm causal use of these dictionaries: a single FFMLP atom out of 4096 can drop PSNR by up to 10.6 dB across the image, while SIREN ablations remain confined to where the atom fires. Together, these results give the first mechanistic account of what transfers in cohort-trained INRs and turn their activations into inspectable dictionary atoms. These tools open a path towards characterizing what INRs encode and towards architectures designed for generalization rather than memorization.

AI.tldr: 本文首次通过稀疏自编码器（SAEs）分解了同类训练隐式神经表示（INR）的激活值，发现SIREN和傅里叶特征MLP（FFMLP）在共享编码器中可迁移层位于权重稳定秩最高的层，且两者学到截然不同的字典原子：SIREN原子局域化、平铺坐标平面，FFMLP原子覆盖全图、记忆同类信号轮廓。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽表明复用同类训练INR的早期层作为初始化可加速并改善信号拟合，但尚不清楚共享编码器中哪些层学到了可迁移表示，以及这些表示编码了什么内容。本文旨在回答这两个问题。
AI.method: 1) 在测试时扫掠共享编码器的冻结深度，发现最优冻结深度与权重稳定秩最高的层一致。2) 采用稀疏自编码器（SAEs）对INR激活值进行首次字典原子分解，分析SIREN和FFMLP两种骨干网络学到的字典特征。
AI.result: 1) 在最优深度冻结可匹配甚至超越标准微调方法。2) SIREN的原子局域化，平铺坐标平面，每个原子在独立于同类内容的受限区域激活；FFMLP的原子覆盖全图，勾勒同类信号的轮廓。单原子消融实验表明：FFMLP中单个原子（共4096个）可导致全图PSNR下降高达10.6dB，而SIREN的消融影响仅限于原子激活区域。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次从机制上解释了同类训练INR中哪些层可迁移以及迁移了什么，并将INR激活转化为可检查的字典原子，为表征INR编码内容以及设计面向泛化而非记忆的架构开辟了道路。

title: Variational Inference for Lévy Process-Driven SDEs via Neural Tilting
comment: The associated project page which contains the official implementation can be found in https://circle-group.github.io/research/NeuralTilting/
summary: Modelling extreme events and heavy-tailed phenomena is central to building reliable predictive systems in domains such as finance, climate science, and safety-critical AI. While Lévy processes provide a natural mathematical framework for capturing jumps and heavy tails, Bayesian inference for Lévy-driven stochastic differential equations (SDEs) remains intractable with existing methods: Monte Carlo approaches are rigorous but lack scalability, whereas neural variational inference methods are efficient but rely on Gaussian assumptions that fail to capture discontinuities. We address this tension by introducing a neural exponential tilting framework for variational inference in Lévy-driven SDEs. Our approach constructs a flexible variational family by exponentially reweighting the Lévy measure using neural networks. This parametrization preserves the jump structure of the underlying process while remaining computationally tractable. To enable efficient inference, we develop a quadratic neural parametrization that yields closed-form normalization of the tilted measure, a conditional Gaussian representation for stable processes that facilitates simulation, and symmetry-aware Monte Carlo estimators for scalable optimization. Empirically, we demonstrate that the method accurately captures jump dynamics and yields reliable posterior inference in regimes where Gaussian-based variational approaches fail, on both synthetic and real-world datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种神经指数倾斜框架，用于Lévy驱动随机微分方程的变分推断，通过神经网络对Lévy测度进行指数重加权来构建灵活的变分族，在保留跳跃结构的同时实现计算可行性，并通过二次神经参数化、条件高斯表示和对称性感知蒙特卡洛估计器实现高效推断，在合成和真实数据集上优于基于高斯假设的变分方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在两难困境：蒙特卡洛方法严格但缺乏可扩展性，神经变分推断方法高效但依赖高斯假设无法捕捉不连续性和重尾现象。需要一种既能保留跳跃过程结构又具有计算可行性的推断方法。
AI.method: 1）通过神经网络对Lévy测度进行指数重加权（指数倾斜）构建灵活变分族；2）提出二次神经参数化实现倾斜测度的闭式归一化；3）开发稳定过程的条件高斯表示以促进模拟；4）设计对称性感知蒙特卡洛估计器用于可扩展优化。
AI.result: 该方法准确捕捉跳跃动力学，在基于高斯假设的变分方法失效的场景下（合成和真实数据集）仍能提供可靠的后验推断。
AI.conclusion: 提出的神经指数倾斜框架成功弥合了Lévy驱动SDE贝叶斯推断中严格性与可扩展性之间的鸿沟，为金融、气候科学和安全关键型AI等领域的极端事件建模提供了实用解决方案。

title: Re$^2$Math: Benchmarking Theorem Retrieval in Research-Level Mathematics
summary: Large language models are increasingly capable at closed-world mathematical reasoning, but research assistance also requires source-grounded use of the literature. When a proof reaches a non-trivial step, a useful assistant should determine whether the needed tool (e.g., a lemma) already exists, identify a suitable scholarly source, and verify that its assumptions align with the current proof context. To rigorously evaluate such capabilities, we introduce Re$^2$Math, a benchmark for tool-grounded retrieval from partial mathematical proofs. Each instance is built from a candidate instrumental citation in the proof of a main theorem, with hierarchical context and an optional leakage-controlled anchor hint. We also make the task source-grounded yet citation-agnostic in that any admissible theorem sufficient for the proof transition is accepted. Evaluation uses a release-frozen retrieval artifact, ensuring reproducibility, while the benchmark itself supports automatic, continual expansion with newly constructed instances. On the current benchmark test set, the best fixed-judge ToolAcc reaches 7.0%, despite substantially higher rates of source grounding, indicating that current systems often retrieve valid statements but fail to establish their applicability to the local proof step. By decoupling citation recall, grounding, and proof-gap sufficiency, Re$^2$Math transforms literature-grounded mathematical tool use into a controlled diagnostic task.

AI.tldr: Re^2Math是一个用于评估大语言模型在数学证明中检索和验证工具（如引理）能力的基准。当前最佳模型工具准确率仅7.0%，尽管源定位率较高，表明模型能检索到有效陈述但无法判断其是否适用于当前证明步骤。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在封闭世界数学推理上表现良好，但研究助手需要利用文献进行源定位推理。当证明遇到非平凡步骤时，助手需要判断所需工具（如引理）是否已存在、找到合适学术来源、并验证其假设与当前证明上下文一致。目前缺乏系统评估这种能力的基准。
AI.method: 从主定理证明中选取候选工具引证构建实例，提供分层上下文和可选泄露控制的锚点提示。任务采用源定位但引证无关的评估方式，任何足以完成证明转换的可用定理均被接受。使用发布冻结的检索工件确保可重复性，支持自动持续扩展。
AI.result: 当前最佳固定评判器工具准确率(ToolAcc)仅7.0%，尽管源定位率显著更高。这表明现有系统往往能检索到有效陈述，但无法判断其对局部证明步骤的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦引文召回、源定位和证明空隙充分性三个维度，Re^2Math将文献定位的数学工具使用转化为可控的诊断任务，揭示了当前模型在证明步骤适用性判断上的关键短板。

title: mHC-SSM: Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections for State Space Language Models with Stream-Specialized Adapters
comment: 28 Pages, 3 Figures, all implementation code available at: https://github.com/abdulvahapmutlu/mhc-slm
summary: Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC) introduce a stability-motivated variant of multi stream residual mixing by constraining residual stream mixing matrices to the manifold of doubly stochastic matrices via Sinkhorn-Knopp projection. In his work, we study whether mHC-style constrained multi-stream residual topology transfers effectively to state space model (SSM) language modeling. We implement a static mHC mechanism around an SSM block by expanding the residual stream into multiple parallel streams, aggregating streams into a single SSM input through simplex-constrained pre-mixing, scattering the SSM output back to streams through simplex-constrained post-mixing, and applying Sinkhorn-projected residual stream mixing at each layer. We further introduce stream-specialized adapters that add lightweight stream-specific capacity through a shared bottleneck with per-stream scaling, applied both before stream aggregation and after the SSM output prior to scattering. We evaluate baseline single-stream SSM, static mHC SSM, and mHC SSM with adapters on WikiText-2 using identical training settings and report checkpoint-based validation loss, perplexity, throughput, and peak GPU memory. Under the reported fair checkpoint evaluation, static mHC improves validation loss from 6.3507 to 6.2448 and reduces perplexity from 572.91 to 515.35, while mHC with adapters further improves validation loss to 6.1353 and perplexity to 461.88. These gains are accompanied by modest throughput reductions from 1025.52 to 964.81 and 938.90 tokens per second, and increased peak memory from 2365 MB to 2568 MB and 3092 MB. The results suggest that mHC-inspired constrained multi-stream residual mixing can yield measurable quality improvements in SSM language models and that stream-specialized adapter capacity can further enhance performance with predictable efficiency tradeoffs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究将受流形约束的多流残差混合（mHC）方法应用于状态空间模型（SSM）语言建模。通过在SSM模块周围实现静态mHC机制（包括单纯形约束的预混合/后混合、Sinkhorn投影的残差流混合）并引入流专用适配器，在WikiText-2上验证了该方法能显著降低验证损失和困惑度，尽管吞吐量略有下降、内存消耗增加。
AI.motivation: 探索mHC风格的约束多流残差拓扑是否能有效迁移到SSM语言模型中，以提升模型质量。
AI.method: 在SSM模块周围实现静态mHC机制：将残差流扩展为多个并行流，通过单纯形约束的预混合聚合为单一SSM输入，再通过单纯形约束的后混合将SSM输出分散回各流，并在每层应用Sinkhorn投影的残差流混合。此外引入流专用适配器（共享瓶颈+每流缩放）以增加轻量级流特定容量。
AI.result: 在WikiText-2上，静态mHC将验证损失从6.3507降至6.2448，困惑度从572.91降至515.35；mHC+适配器进一步将验证损失降至6.1353，困惑度降至461.88。吞吐量从1025.52降至964.81和938.90 tokens/s，峰值内存从2365 MB增至2568 MB和3092 MB。
AI.conclusion: mHC启发的约束多流残差混合能在SSM语言模型中带来可测量的质量提升，流专用适配器可进一步增强性能，但伴随可预测的效率权衡。

title: CATO: Charted Attention for Neural PDE Operators
summary: Neural operators have emerged as powerful data-driven solvers for PDEs, offering substantial acceleration over classical numerical methods. However, existing transformer-based operators still face critical challenges when modeling PDEs on complex geometries: directly processing over massive mesh points is computationally expensive, while operating in raw discretization coordinates may obscure the intrinsic geometry where physical interactions are more naturally expressed. To address these limitations, we introduce the Charted Axial Transformer Operator (CATO), a geometry-adaptive and derivative-aware neural operator for PDEs on general geometries. Instead of applying attention directly in the physical coordinate system, CATO learns a continuous latent chart that maps mesh coordinates into a learned chart space, where chart-conditioned axial attention efficiently captures long-range dependencies with reduced computational cost. In addition, CATO introduces a derivative-aware physics loss for steady-state PDEs that jointly supervises solution values, mesh-consistent gradients, and an auxiliary flux-like field, improving physical fidelity and reducing oversmoothing. We further provide a theoretical approximation result showing that, under a favorable chart, charted axial attention can represent low-rank axial solution operators with controlled error, and that small chart perturbations induce bounded approximation degradation. CATO achieves the best performance across all evaluated datasets, yielding an average improvement of approximately 26.76\% over the strongest competing baselines while reducing the number of parameters by 81.98\%. These results highlight the effectiveness of learning geometry-adaptive charts and derivative-aware physical supervision for accurate and efficient PDE operator learning.

AI.tldr: CATO是一种几何自适应且导数感知的神经算子，通过学习连续潜图将网格坐标映射到图空间，利用图条件轴向注意力高效捕获长程依赖，并引入导数感知物理损失来提升PDE求解的精度和效率，在多个数据集上平均提升约26.76%且参数量减少81.98%。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的神经算子在处理复杂几何上的PDE时面临两大挑战：直接处理海量网格点计算成本高，而在原始离散坐标上操作会掩盖物理交互更自然表达的固有几何结构。
AI.method: 1) 学习连续潜图（latent chart）将网格坐标映射到学习到的图空间；2) 在图空间中使用图条件轴向注意力（chart-conditioned axial attention）高效捕获长程依赖；3) 引入导数感知物理损失（derivative-aware physics loss），联合监督解值、网格一致梯度和辅助通量场。
AI.result: 在所有评估数据集上取得最佳性能，相比最强基线平均提升约26.76%，同时参数量减少81.98%。
AI.conclusion: 学习几何自适应图与导数感知物理监督能有效提升PDE算子学习的准确性与效率；理论上证明了在有利图下，图条件轴向注意力能以可控误差表示低秩轴向解算子，且小的图扰动仅导致有界的近似退化。

title: Priming: Hybrid State Space Models From Pre-trained Transformers
summary: Hybrid State-Space models combine Attention with recurrent State-Space Model (SSM) layers, balancing eidetic memory from Attention with compressed fading memory from SSMs. This yields smaller Key-Value caches and faster decoding than Transformers, along with a richer architectural design space. Exploring that design space at scale has so far required training from scratch, a barrier that has kept most large-model Hybrid research within a narrow range of architectures. We introduce Priming, a method that turns Hybrid architecture design from a pre-training problem into a knowledge transfer one. Priming initializes a Hybrid model from a pre-trained Transformer and, through short alignment and post-training phases, recovers downstream quality using less than 0.5% of the source model's pre-training token budget. Priming is agnostic to the source Transformer family (e.g., Qwen, Llama, Mistral), model class (dense or Mixture-of-Experts), and model scale. Priming enables us to run the first controlled comparison of SSM layer types at scale under identical conditions. We evaluate, Gated KalmaNet (GKA), Gated DeltaNet (GDN), and Mamba-2, and show that their expressiveness hierarchy, GKA>GDN>Mamba-2, directly predicts downstream performance on long-context reasoning tasks. We scale Priming to 8B/32B reasoning models with native 128K contexts. Our Hybrid GKA 32B improves over its source Qwen3-32B by +3.8 average reasoning points, while staying within 1% of a Transformer post-trained on the same data and enabling up to 2.3x higher decode throughput. To foster research on Hybrid architectures, we release a model zoo of primed Hybrid models for long-context reasoning and instruction following, together with the Priming training and inference code (Sequence Parallelism algorithms for long-context training, optimized GKA kernels, and vLLM serving plugin), all under Apache~2.0 License.

AI.tldr: 提出Priming方法，通过知识迁移而非从头训练来设计混合状态空间模型，仅需不到0.5%的预训练token预算即可将预训练Transformer转化为Hybrid模型，并在8B/32B规模上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 探索Hybrid SSM+Attention架构的设计空间需要从头训练，成本高昂，限制了大规模混合架构研究的多样性。需要一种低成本方法来将预训练Transformer转化为Hybrid模型。
AI.method: Priming方法：从预训练Transformer初始化Hybrid模型，通过短对齐和后训练阶段恢复下游质量，仅需源模型不到0.5%的预训练token预算。该方法与源Transformer系列、模型类别和规模无关。
AI.result: 1) 首次在同等条件下大规模控制比较SSM层类型，发现表达能力层级GKA>GDN>Mamba-2直接预测长上下文推理性能。2) Priming扩展到8B/32B推理模型，原生128K上下文。3) Hybrid GKA 32B相比源Qwen3-32B提升+3.8推理平均分，解码吞吐量提升2.3倍。
AI.conclusion: Priming将混合架构设计从预训练问题转变为知识迁移问题，大幅降低了探索成本。Hybrid GKA在推理性能和解码效率上均优于原始Transformer，为大规模混合模型研究提供了新路径。开源了模型动物园和完整代码。

title: SearchSkill: Teaching LLMs to Use Search Tools with Evolving Skill Banks
summary: Teaching language models to use search tools is not only a question of whether they search, but also of whether they issue good queries. This is especially important in open-domain question answering, where broad or copied queries often waste retrieval budget and derail later reasoning. We propose \Ours, a framework that makes query planning explicit through reusable search skills. At each step, the model first selects a skill, then generates a search or answer action conditioned on the selected skill card. The skill inventory itself is not fixed: SearchSkill maintains an evolving SkillBank, expands or refines it from recurrent failure patterns, and reconstructs affected trajectories before supervised training. The resulting two-stage SFT recipe aligns training with the inference-time protocol of skill selection followed by skill-grounded execution. Across open-source and closed-source models, SearchSkill improves exact match on knowledge-intensive QA benchmarks and yields better retrieval behavior, including fewer copied first queries, more atomic hop-focused queries, and more correct answers within a small search budget. These results suggest that explicit skill-conditioned query planning is a lightweight alternative to treating search as an undifferentiated action.

AI.tldr: SearchSkill 框架通过显式的技能条件化查询规划（先选择搜索技能，再生成查询），配合动态演化的技能库和两阶段 SFT 训练，显著提升了开放域问答中检索查询的质量和效率，减少了复制性查询和检索预算浪费。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型在使用搜索工具时，往往生成宽泛或复制的低质量查询，浪费检索预算并影响后续推理。作者认为问题不仅在于是否搜索，更在于是否生成好的查询。
AI.method: 提出 SearchSkill 框架：1) 显式技能选择机制，模型先选技能再生成搜索/回答动作；2) 动态演化的 SkillBank，从失败模式中扩展或精炼技能；3) 受影响轨迹重构后进行监督微调；4) 两阶段 SFT 训练，使训练与推理协议一致。
AI.result: 在开源和闭源模型上，SearchSkill 在知识密集型 QA 基准上提升了精确匹配分数，改善了检索行为：减少复制性首次查询、生成更多原子化跳转查询、在更小的检索预算内给出更多正确答案。
AI.conclusion: 显式的技能条件化查询规划可以作为将搜索视为无差异化动作的轻量级替代方案。

title: SGC-RML: A reliable and interpretable longitudinal assessment for PD in real-world DNS
comment: Preprint. The first five authors contributed equally. Corresponding author: Hen-Wei Huang. 9 pages main text + appendix; 4 figures, 5 tables in main text
summary: Real-world digital Parkinson's disease assessment faces challenges such as heterogeneous modalities, cross-device bias, and incomplete labeling. Existing methods often focus on average predictive performance, lacking the reliability mechanisms needed for retrospective reliability-aware assessment - namely, determining when the model is reliable, when to reject an assessment, when to retest, and from which symptom dimensions the predictions are based. This paper proposes SGC-RML, which maps speech, gait, wearable motion, mobility tasks, and clinical variables to a shared 8-dimensional symptom node space (7 clinical symptom nodes and 1 reliability_state auxiliary node), unifying motor and non-motor representations through a symptom atlas. By jointly introducing uncertainty estimation, conformal calibration, and selective decision routing, the model can not only predict symptoms and severity but also reject assessments or suggest retests when evidence is insufficient. We validate this framework on five real-world PD datasets, covering classification, regression, event detection, and longitudinal severity prediction. Experiments show that SGC-RML achieves an MAE of 4.579 / R^2 of 0.772 on PPMI, an AUC of 0.953 on mPower, and an AUC of 0.825 on PADS. Under leak-free temporal anchoring, as few as 5 subject-specific anchors transform UCI from an essentially non-predictive subject-independent setting (motor MAE 8.38, CCC 0.02) into a calibrated longitudinal assessment (motor MAE 3.24, CCC 0.756) with split-conformal coverage held at the 0.80 target. Under the Daphnet LOSO protocol, it achieves an F1 of 0.803 / AUC of 0.872. These results demonstrate that SGC-RML provides a unified paradigm for accurate, calibrated, auditable, and symptom-interpretable retrospective longitudinal assessment of PD under incomplete multimodal conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SGC-RML框架，通过构建共享的症状节点空间（8维，含7个临床症状节点和1个可靠性状态辅助节点），结合不确定性估计、共形校准和选择性决策路由，实现对帕金森病多模态异质数据（语音、步态、可穿戴运动、移动任务和临床变量）的可靠回顾性评估。在5个真实PD数据集上验证，PPMI上MAE 4.579 / R² 0.772，mPower上AUC 0.953，PADS上AUC 0.825；在UCI数据集上通过仅5个受试者特定锚点，将运动MAE从8.38提升至3.24，CCC从0.02提升至0.756；Daphnet LOSO协议下F1 0.803 / AUC 0.872。
AI.motivation: 现实世界的数字帕金森病评估面临异质模态、跨设备偏差和不完全标注等挑战，现有方法仅关注平均预测性能，缺乏可靠性感知机制——即无法判断模型何时可靠、何时拒绝评估、何时建议重测以及预测基于哪些症状维度。
AI.method: 将语音、步态、可穿戴运动、移动任务和临床变量映射到共享的8维症状节点空间（7个临床症状节点+1个reliability_state辅助节点），通过症状图谱统一运动和非运动表征，联合引入不确定性估计、共形校准和选择性决策路由。
AI.result: PPMI: MAE 4.579 / R² 0.772; mPower: AUC 0.953; PADS: AUC 0.825; UCI: 仅5个锚点将运动MAE从8.38降至3.24, CCC从0.02提升至0.756; Daphnet LOSO: F1 0.803 / AUC 0.872。
AI.conclusion: SGC-RML在不完全多模态条件下为PD提供了统一、准确、经校准、可审计且症状可解释的回顾性纵向评估范式。

title: UxSID: Semantic-Aware User Interests Modeling for Ultra-Long Sequence
summary: Modeling ultra-long user sequences involves a difficult trade-off between efficiency and effectiveness. While current paradigms rely on either item-specific search or item-agnostic compression, we propose UxSID, a framework exploring a third path: semantic-group shared interest memory. By utilizing Semantic IDs (SIDs) and a dual-level attention strategy, UxSID captures target-aware preferences without the heavy cost of item-specific models. This end-to-end architecture balances computational parsimony with semantic awareness, achieving state-of-the-art performance and a 0.337% revenue lift in large-scale advertising A/B test.

AI.tldr: 针对超长用户序列建模中效率与效果的权衡问题，提出UxSID框架，通过语义组共享兴趣记忆（基于语义ID和双层注意力机制）实现端到端建模，兼顾计算简洁性与语义感知能力，在广告A/B测试中实现0.337%收入提升，达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有超长用户序列建模方法存在两难困境：基于物品粒度的搜索（item-specific search）效率低，而物品无关的压缩（item-agnostic compression）损失细粒度语义信息。需要探索第三条路径，在效率与效果之间取得更优平衡。
AI.method: 提出UxSID框架，核心包括：(1) 语义ID（Semantic IDs）将用户交互的物品映射到语义组；(2) 双层注意力策略（dual-level attention）实现目标感知的偏好捕获，避免物品级模型的高计算成本；(3) 端到端架构保证整体可优化性。
AI.result: 取得SOTA性能，并在大规模广告线上A/B测试中实现0.337%的收入提升（revenue lift），验证了实际工业场景的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 语义组共享兴趣记忆（SID+双层注意力）是超长用户序列建模中一个有效且高效的新范式，证明了语义分组可以在不增加计算负担的情况下提升序列建模的语义感知能力。

title: GNN for Structural Displacement Prediction
summary: Accurate prediction of structural displacements under external loading is fundamental to structural health monitoring and seismic safety assessment. Although the finite element method (FEM) remains the prevailing approach because of its high accuracy, its considerable computational cost restricts its suitability for real-time monitoring applications. To address this limitation, this study proposes a data-driven framework based on Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), in which structural systems are represented as graphs with joints modeled as nodes and structural members as edges. By incorporating both geometric and mechanical properties into the graph representation, the proposed model learns the relationship between applied loads and structural responses directly from simulated data. A synthetic dataset was generated from a two-story frame structure using ANSYS, and both a conventional Neural Network (NN) and a GNN were trained for comparison. The results show that the proposed GNN framework predicts displacements and rotations with high accuracy and outperforms the NN model, demonstrating its potential as a fast and efficient alternative to traditional FEM-based analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图神经网络（GNN）的数据驱动框架，将结构系统表示为图（节点为节点、边为构件），用于快速预测外荷载下的结构位移，在精度接近有限元法的同时显著提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: 有限元法虽精度高，但计算成本大，难以用于实时监测；迫切需要一种兼具精度与速度的结构响应预测方法。
AI.method: 将结构系统建模为图，节点代表连接节点，边代表结构构件；结合几何与力学属性构建图表示，利用GNN学习荷载与结构响应之间的映射关系；使用ANSYS生成两层框架结构的合成数据集进行训练和验证。
AI.result: GNN框架在预测位移和转角方面具有高精度，且性能优于传统神经网络（NN）模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的GNN方法可作为传统有限元分析的快速高效替代方案，适用于结构健康监测与地震安全评估等实时应用场景。

title: Containment Verification: AI Safety Guarantees Independent of Alignment
summary: Agentic frameworks are the software layer through which AI agents act in the world. Existing safety methods intervene on the model and therefore remain conditional on unverifiable properties of learned behavior. We introduce containment verification, which locates safety guarantees in the agentic framework itself. Under havoc oracle semantics, the AI is modeled as an unconstrained oracle ranging over the entire typed action space, and the verified containment layer must enforce the boundary policy for every possible AI output. For boundary-enforceable properties, expressed over modeled boundary events, action arguments, and state, we prove a universal guarantee by forward-simulation refinement and mechanize it in Dafny. We instantiate the paradigm by verifying PocketFlow, a minimalist agentic LLM framework, and use an agentic synthesis pipeline to generate the specification, operational model, and refinement proof under an information barrier against tautological specifications. To our knowledge, this is the first deductive formal verification of an agentic framework, and its guarantee is invariant to model capability over the modeled typed action boundary.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为"包含验证"（containment verification）的形式化验证方法，将AI智能体的安全保证从模型本身转移到智能体框架层。在混乱预言机语义下，将AI建模为无约束的预言机，验证包含层必须对所有可能的AI输出强制执行边界策略。通过前向仿真精化证明了边界可强制属性的通用保证，并在Dafny中机械化实现。通过验证PocketFlow（一个极简的智能体LLM框架）实例化该范式，并在信息屏障下使用智能体合成流程生成规约、操作模型和精化证明。这是首个对智能体框架进行演绎形式化验证的工作，其保证对建模的类型化动作边界内的模型能力具有不变性。
AI.motivation: 现有安全方法作用于模型层面，依赖于学习行为中不可验证的属性，无法提供可靠的安全保证。作者希望将安全保证定位在智能体框架本身，从而获得不依赖于模型具体能力的不变性保证。
AI.method: 提出包含验证范式，在混乱预言机语义下将AI建模为可输出任意类型化动作的无约束预言机，验证包含层对所有可能输出强制执行边界策略。通过前向仿真精化证明边界可强制属性的通用保证，并在Dafny中形式化验证。使用智能体合成流程在信息屏障下生成规约、操作模型和精化证明。
AI.result: 成功验证了PocketFlow智能体框架，证明了边界策略在所有可能的AI输出下都能得到强制执行。这是首个对智能体框架进行演绎形式化验证的工作，其保证对建模边界内的模型能力具有不变性。
AI.conclusion: 包含验证提供了一种新的安全范式，将安全保证从模型转移到框架层，获得不依赖模型能力的可证明安全保证。该方法可扩展至其他智能体框架，为AI安全提供更强的形式化基础。

title: LLMSYS-HPOBench: Hyperparameter Optimization Benchmark Suite for Real-World LLM Systems
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) systems have been the frontier of AI in many application domains, leading to new challenges and opportunities for hyperparameter optimization (HPO) for the AutoML community. However, this type of system exhibits an unprecedented compound space of hyperparameter configuration from both the AI and non-AI components; rich and nonlinear implications from the fidelity factors; and diverse costs of measuring hyperparameter configurations, none of which have been fully captured in existing benchmarks. This paper presents the first (live) benchmark suite and datasets for HPO of real-world LLM systems, dubbed LLMSYS-HPOBench, covering data related to the inference objective values of hyperparameter configurations profiled from running the LLM systems. Currently, LLMSYS-HPOBench contains 364,450 hyperparameter configurations with a dimensionality of 12-23, 3-5 dimensions of fidelity factor leading to 932 settings, 3-9 inference objective metrics, and 2-10 cost metrics, together with generated logs from measuring the LLM systems. What we seek to advocate is not only a revalidation of the existing HPO algorithms over the frontier LLM systems, but also to provide an evolving platform for the AutoML community to explore new directions of research in this regard. The benchmark suite has been made available at: https://github.com/ideas-labo/llmsys-hpobench

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个针对现实世界大语言模型系统超参数优化的实时基准套件LLMSYS-HPOBench，包含364,450个超参数配置、12-23维参数空间、3-5维保真度因子、932种设置、3-9个推理目标指标和2-10个成本指标，旨在为AutoML社区提供探索LLM系统HPO新方向的研究平台。
AI.motivation: 现有基准未能充分捕捉LLM系统中AI与非AI组件构成的空前复杂的超参数配置空间、保真度因子的丰富非线性影响以及衡量超参数配置的多样化成本，因此需要一个新的基准来填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过运行真实LLM系统对超参数配置进行剖析，收集推理目标值，构建包含高维参数空间、多保真度因子、多目标指标和成本指标的基准数据集，并以实时更新的方式发布。
AI.result: LLMSYS-HPOBench包含364,450个超参数配置，维度为12-23，3-5维保真度因子导致932种设置，3-9个推理目标指标，2-10个成本指标，以及测量日志。
AI.conclusion: 该基准不仅用于重新验证现有HPO算法在LLM系统上的表现，也为AutoML社区提供了一个持续演进的研究平台，以探索这一领域的新研究方向。

title: CauSim: Scaling Causal Reasoning with Increasingly Complex Causal Simulators
summary: Despite surpassing human performance across mathematics, coding, and other knowledge-intensive tasks, large language models (LLMs) continue to struggle with causal reasoning. A core obstacle is the target data itself: causal systems are complex and often expressed in non-executable forms, while ground-truth answers to causal queries are inherently scarce. We introduce CauSim, a framework that turns causal reasoning from a scarce-label problem into a scalable supervised one. CauSim constructs increasingly complex causal simulators: executable structural causal models (SCMs), incrementally built by LLMs, that scale to globally complex systems while maintaining verifiable answers to causal queries. CauSim operates across representations by formalizing non-executable causal knowledge into code, enabling data augmentation, and translating executable SCMs into natural language, enabling supervision in previously difficult-to-supervise representations. We structure our research into two parts: (1) how to construct increasingly complex causal simulators, and (2) a systematic study of what CauSim enables, demonstrating generalization across representations, consistent gains from curriculum scaling and data volume, LLM self-improvement through self-generated simulators, and data augmentation via formalization of existing domain knowledge.

AI.tldr: CauSim是一个将因果推理从稀缺标签问题转化为可扩展监督学习问题的框架，通过LLM增量构建可执行的结构因果模型（SCMs），实现跨表示泛化、课程学习扩展和数据增强。
AI.motivation: LLM在因果推理任务中表现不佳，核心障碍在于因果系统的目标数据本身：因果系统复杂且常以不可执行形式表达，而因果查询的真实答案本质上稀缺。现有方法受限于标签稀缺问题，缺乏可扩展的监督信号。
AI.method: CauSim框架包含两个部分：(1) 利用LLM增量构建复杂度递增的可执行结构因果模型（SCMs），从简单到复杂逐步扩展；(2) 将非可执行的因果知识形式化为代码实现数据增强，并将可执行SCMs翻译为自然语言，实现对难以监督的表示进行监督。
AI.result: 展示了跨表示泛化能力、课程学习扩展和数据量的持续增益、LLM通过自生成模拟器实现自我改进，以及通过形式化现有领域知识实现数据增强的效果。
AI.conclusion: CauSim有效将因果推理从标签稀缺问题转化为可扩展的监督学习问题，通过构建可执行的因果模拟器为LLM提供持续的监督信号，在多个维度上取得了改进。

title: Practical Wi-Fi-based Motion Recognition Under Variable Traffic Patterns
summary: Wi-Fi sensing detects human motions and activities by analysing the channel state information (CSI) derived from Wi-Fi transmissions. However, the impact of variable transmission traffic, which dictates the effective sampling rate and interval, is often overlooked. Existing Wi-Fi sensing systems are trained with fixed input size and sampling rate, which suffer from poor sampling rate generalisation. This paper proposes a novel Wi-Fi sensing approach for motion recognition applications, e.g., gesture and activity recognition, under variable traffic patterns. A sampling rate versatile neural network (SRV-NN) based on the transformer is proposed to efficiently handle variable input-sized sensing signals. A dynamic sampling rate augmentation is employed for variable sampling rates and intervals. To validate our approach, we have carried out extensive experimental evaluation, using two self-collected datasets, namely SRV activity and SRV gesture, as well as two publicly available datasets. Our method demonstrated exceptional performance and stability under variable sampling rates, with substantial improvements in average accuracy compared to baseline models without augmentation. The proposed approach significantly enhances stability by greatly reducing accuracy variance across different sampling rates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的采样率通用神经网络（SRV-NN），通过动态采样率增强技术，有效解决了Wi-Fi感知中因可变传输流量导致的采样率变化问题，在动作识别任务中表现出优异的性能与稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有Wi-Fi感知系统通常使用固定输入大小和采样率进行训练，忽视了传输流量变化导致的有效采样率和间隔的动态变化，导致模型在不同采样率下泛化能力差。
AI.method: 提出基于Transformer的采样率通用神经网络（SRV-NN），可高效处理可变大小的输入信号；同时采用动态采样率增强策略来适应不同的采样率和采样间隔。
AI.result: 在两个自建数据集（SRV活动、SRV手势）和两个公开数据集上进行实验，所提方法在不同采样率下均表现出卓越性能和稳定性，平均准确率显著优于无增强的基线模型，且准确率方差大幅降低。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的SRV-NN结合动态采样率增强，能有效应对可变采样率下的Wi-Fi感知挑战，大幅提升模型的泛化能力和稳定性。

title: Constant-Target Energy Matching: A Unified Framework for Continuous and Discrete Density Estimation
summary: Density estimation is a central primitive in probabilistic modeling, yet continuous, discrete, and mixed-variable domains are often treated by separate objectives, limiting the ability to exploit a common statistical structure across data types. Continuous score-based methods rely on log-density gradients, while discrete extensions typically use concrete score whose unbounded targets become unstable near low-probability states. We introduce Constant-Target Energy Matching (CTEM), a unified energy-based framework for density estimation on general state spaces. CTEM replaces ordinary density-ratio regression with a bounded energy-difference transform and derives from it a sample-only training objective with the constant target 1. The learned scalar potential recovers log p without partition-function estimation or explicit unbounded ratio regression. Across continuous, discrete, and mixed-variable benchmarks, CTEM substantially improves density estimation over competitive baselines and yields higher-quality samples under standard sampling procedures.

AI.tldr: CTEM提出一种统一的能量基密度估计框架，通过将有界能量差变换替代传统密度比回归，使得连续、离散和混合变量空间上可使用恒定目标1进行样本训练，避免无界分数不稳定问题，并在多个基准上显著提升密度估计质量和采样效果。
AI.motivation: 现有密度估计方法对连续、离散和混合变量域采用不同目标函数，无法利用跨数据类型的共同统计结构；连续分数基方法依赖对数密度梯度，离散扩展使用无界具体分数，在低概率状态附近不稳定。
AI.method: 引入Constant-Target Energy Matching (CTEM)，用有界能量差变换替代密度比回归，推导出仅需样本的训练目标，目标值恒为1；学习到的标量势能可直接恢复log p，无需估计配分函数或显式无界比回归。
AI.result: 在连续、离散和混合变量基准上，CTEM在密度估计上大幅优于竞争基线，并在标准采样程序下生成更高质量的样本。
AI.conclusion: CTEM为一般状态空间上的密度估计提供了统一且稳定的框架，弥合了不同数据类型之间的方法鸿沟，兼具理论简洁性和实践有效性。

title: Revitalizing the Beginning: Avoiding Storage Dependency for Model Merging in Continual Learning
summary: Model merging provides a compelling paradigm for integrating specialized expertise into a unified multi-task model, a goal that aligns naturally with the sequential knowledge acquisition in continual learning (CL). However, the requirement for preserving diverse forms of previous knowledge conflicts with the storage limitations inherent to CL. In this paper, we systematically analyze existing model merging methods under the constraints of CL. We find that current methods prioritize global alignment, which often leads to the accumulation and amplification of task-specific errors within the continuous data stream; and the vanishing gradients at the onset of subsequent tasks frequently cause optimization to stagnate. These leave the merged model in a suboptimal state at the beginning of the next training phase. To address these challenges, we propose Trajectory Regularized Merging (TRM), a framework that reformulates the merging phase as an optimization process within an augmented trajectory subspace. Our framework integrates three synergistic objectives including task alignment, prediction consistency, and gradient responsiveness to concurrently preserve merged model's historical stability and re-activate optimization dynamics. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出轨迹正则化合并（TRM）框架，通过在增广轨迹子空间中进行优化合并，同时保持历史稳定性与激活优化动态，解决了连续学习场景下模型合并方法存在的误差累积和梯度消失问题，在多个基准上达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 模型合并虽能整合多任务专长，但在连续学习的存储限制下，现有方法存在两个关键问题：（1）全局对齐导致任务特定误差在数据流中不断累积放大；（2）后续任务初始时的梯度消失使优化停滞，导致合并模型在下一训练阶段起始时处于次优状态。
AI.method: 提出轨迹正则化合并（TRM）框架，将合并阶段重新表述为增广轨迹子空间中的优化过程，集成了三个协同目标：任务对齐、预测一致性和梯度响应性，以同时保持合并模型的历史稳定性和重新激活优化动态。
AI.result: 在多个基准上的大量实验表明，该方法达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: TRM框架通过将合并过程转化为增广轨迹子空间中的多目标优化，有效解决了连续学习场景下模型合并的误差累积和梯度消失问题，为序列知识获取提供了统一的模型整合范式。

title: Token Economics for LLM Agents: A Dual-View Study from Computing and Economics
summary: As LLM agents evolve, tokens have emerged as the core economic primitives of Agentic AI. However, their exponential consumption introduces severe computational, collaborative, and security bottlenecks. Current surveys remain fragmented across system optimization, architecture design, and trust, lacking a unified framework to evaluate the fundamental trade-off between output quality and economic cost. To bridge this gap, this survey presents the first comprehensive survey of Token Economics. By unifying computer science and economics, we conceptualize tokens as production factors, exchange mediums, and units of account. We synthesize existing literature across a four-dimensional taxonomy: (1) Micro-level (Single Agent): Optimizing budget-constrained factor substitution via neoclassical firm theory. (2) Meso-level (Multi-Agent Systems): Minimizing collaboration friction using transaction cost and principal-agent theories. (3) Macro-level (Agent Ecosystems): Addressing congestion externalities and pricing via mechanism design. (4) Security: Internalizing adversarial threats as endogenous economic constraints. Finally, we outline frontier directions, including differentiable token budgets and dynamic markets, to lay the theoretical foundation for scalable next-generation agent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文首次提出"Token经济学"统一框架，从微观（单智能体预算约束）、中观（多智能体协作摩擦）、宏观（智能体生态系统拥堵）和安全（对抗威胁内生化）四个维度，系统综述了LLM智能体中Token作为经济原语的效率-成本权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在系统优化、架构设计和可信性等方向上碎片化分布，缺乏统一框架来评估输出质量与经济成本之间的根本权衡。
AI.method: 通过融合计算机科学与经济学，将Token概念化为生产要素、交换媒介和记账单位，并构建四维分类法（微观-中观-宏观-安全）对现有文献进行系统综述。
AI.result: 提出了一个涵盖单智能体因子替代、多智能体交易成本、生态系统机制设计以及安全内生化约束的综合性Token经济学分析框架。
AI.conclusion: 指出了可微分Token预算和动态市场等前沿方向，为可扩展的下一代智能体系统奠定理论基础。

title: FlashSVD v1.5: Making Low-Rank Transformers Inference Actually Fast
summary: SVD-based Low-rank compression reduces transformer parameters and nominal FLOPs, but these savings often translate poorly into real LLM serving speedups. We show that this gap is largely a runtime problem: factorized checkpoints fragment execution paths, and the resulting overhead differs substantially between prefill and autoregressive decode. We present FlashSVD v1.5, a unified inference runtime for serving SVD-compressed transformers. FlashSVD v1.5 maps diverse public SVD compression families to a common factorized representation and combines phase-specific kernels with dense-KV decode, packed MLP execution, and per-layer CUDA-graph replay to reorganize the low-rank serving path into a thin runtime. Across representative decoder-serving settings, FlashSVD v1.5 achieves up to 2.55x decode and 2.39x end-to-end speedup, and it attains 1.48x average decode and 1.44x average end-to-end speedup across multiple popular SVD compression families. These results suggest that practical low-rank acceleration requires runtime co-design, not compression algorithms alone. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Zishan-Shao/FlashSVD.

AI.tldr: FlashSVD v1.5是一个统一推理运行时，通过将多种SVD压缩家族映射到公共分解表示，结合相位特定内核、密集KV解码、打包MLP执行和逐层CUDA图重放，解决了SVD低秩压缩在LLM服务中的实际加速瓶颈，在多种场景下实现最高2.55倍解码加速和2.39倍端到端加速。
AI.motivation: 基于SVD的低秩压缩虽然减少了Transformer参数量和名义FLOPs，但这些节省在真实的LLM服务中往往无法有效转化为速度提升。作者发现这一差距主要是运行时问题：分解后的检查点导致执行路径碎片化，且预填充和自回归解码阶段的运行时开销存在显著差异。
AI.method: FlashSVD v1.5将多种公开SVD压缩家族映射到统一的分解表示，并组合了相位特定内核、密集KV解码、打包MLP执行以及逐层CUDA图重放技术，重新组织低秩服务路径为精简运行时。
AI.result: 在代表性解码器服务场景下，FlashSVD v1.5实现最高2.55倍解码加速和2.39倍端到端加速；在多种流行SVD压缩家族上平均达到1.48倍解码加速和1.44倍端到端加速。
AI.conclusion: 实际低秩加速需要运行时协同设计，而不仅仅是压缩算法本身。

title: When (and How) to Trust the Expert: Diagnosing Query-Time Expert-Guided Reinforcement Learning
summary: Many continuous-control problems ship with a competent but suboptimal controller (a tuned PID, a hand-designed gait). A growing family of methods uses such controllers as queryable experts during RL, but each method has been proposed in isolation, on a different benchmark, without imperfect-expert testing. We harmonize the comparison on a shared SAC backbone, common HPO and evaluation protocols, 100/50 seeds per (env, method), and a degradation sweep over expert undertuning, action bias, and observation noise. The comparison surfaces three failure modes single-paper evaluations miss: (F1) a critic blind spot under argmax-plus-bootstrap that drags IBRL below no-expert SAC on experts close to the no-expert-RL ceiling (RL-near-ceiling, distinct from the absolute physical ceiling); (F2) residual saturation on far-from-optimal experts; and (F3) warm-start buffer poisoning that collapses training-time-handoff methods under deployment-time expert undertuning. No single method dominates: each wins on one task-structure regime and fails predictably elsewhere; on RL-near-ceiling experts (FourTank, GlassFurnace) no query-time method clears the expert within our 1M-step budget, leaving open whether this is a fundamental wall or a budget effect. We convert the spread into a testable decision rule keyed on three pre-training observables (expert quality, task termination, perturbation type). The benchmark, taxonomy, and decision rule are the primary contribution; we additionally describe EDGE, a softmax-over-ensemble-LCB design point used to demonstrate that both axes the taxonomy points to (gate form, scoring rule) are individually exploitable.

AI.tldr: 本文在共享SAC骨干、统一评估协议下系统比较了多种利用次优控制器作为可查询专家的强化学习方法，揭示了三个先前被忽视的失败模式，并基于三个可观测指标提出了可测试的决策规则。研究还介绍了EDGE方法作为设计空间探索的示例。
AI.motivation: 现有利用次优控制器作为专家指导强化学习的方法虽多，但各方法在孤立环境下提出，使用不同基准、缺乏对不完美专家的测试，无法进行公平比较和失效模式分析。
AI.method: 在共享SAC骨干网络上统一实现多种专家引导方法，采用相同超参数优化和评估协议，每个(环境,方法)组合使用100/50个随机种子进行实验，并系统扫描专家欠调、动作偏置和观测噪声三种退化类型。
AI.result: 发现三种单篇论文评估未发现的失败模式：(1) 专家接近无专家RL上限时，IBRL的argmax加bootstrap导致评论家盲点；(2) 远非最优专家上存在残余饱和；(3) 部署时专家欠调导致热身缓冲区毒化。无单一方法全局最优，各方法在不同任务结构上有明确优劣区域。
AI.conclusion: 提供了统一的基准测试、分类法和决策规则作为主要贡献；EDGE方法展示了分类法中两个轴（门控形式、评分规则）均可单独利用。在RL接近上限的专家上，查询时方法无法在1M步预算内超越专家，这是否为根本性限制尚待探索。

title: Reflective Prompted Policy Optimization: Trajectory-Grounded Revision and Salience Bias
summary: Existing LLM-based policy optimizers see only scalar rewards: that a policy scored 0.45, but not whether the agent got stuck in a loop, fell into a hole on the third step, or performed well on 19 out of 20 rollouts and failed catastrophically on one. We propose Reflective Prompted Policy Optimization (R2PO), a two-stage LLM framework for policy search over compact policy classes that augments scalar reward feedback with trajectory-level behavioral evidence. A Search-LLM proposes candidate policy parameters; the environment executes them; a Critic-LLM inspects the resulting rollouts and proposes targeted revisions grounded in observed states, actions, and rewards. Across ten environments, ablations show R2PO's gains require separating global search from behavior-grounded revision and using selection to filter high-variance edits. We further identify a dominant failure mode, salience bias: when presented with multiple rollouts, the Critic-LLM fixates on improving a single failure even when most trajectories succeed. In a three-trajectory variant where the Critic-LLM sees the best, worst, and median rollout, this behavior explains 76.6% of regressions on CartPole. R2PO mitigates this by reasoning over aggregate rollout statistics, median-trajectory selection, and a revision rule. Using a 20B open-weight model, R2PO achieves the highest mean best reward across all ten environments, reaches near-optimal performance substantially earlier (e.g., near-maximum CartPole reward within ~500 episodes), and trains far more stably than both deep RL and prior LLM-based methods. These results show that treating trajectories as first-class in-context evidence, rather than artifacts reduced to scalar returns, changes how even comparatively small LLMs search over policy spaces, enabling them to learn faster, diagnose more precisely, and reliably improve external controllers.

AI.tldr: R2PO是一种两阶段LLM框架，将轨迹级行为证据与标量奖励结合用于策略优化。搜索LLM提出策略参数，评判LLM基于轨迹反馈进行修正。通过分离全局搜索与行为修正、使用选择过滤高方差编辑，以及应对显著性偏差，R2PO在10个环境中以20B开源模型取得了最高平均最佳奖励，比深度RL和先前LLM方法训练更稳定、收敛更快。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的策略优化器仅依赖标量奖励信号（如策略得分为0.45），无法获取轨迹层面的行为证据（如智能体是否陷入循环、第三步掉入坑中、或在20次 rollout 中一次灾难性失败），导致反馈信息严重不足。
AI.method: R2PO采用两阶段框架：Search-LLM负责全局搜索并提出候选策略参数，环境执行后生成轨迹，Critic-LLM检查轨迹并提出基于状态、动作和奖励的针对性修正。关键设计包括：分离全局搜索与行为修正、使用选择机制过滤高方差编辑、通过聚合轨迹统计量、中位数轨迹选择和修正规则来缓解显著性偏差。
AI.result: 在10个环境中，R2PO使用20B开源模型取得最高平均最佳奖励；在CartPole上约500个episode达到接近最优性能；训练稳定性显著优于深度RL和先前LLM方法。消融实验验证了各组件的必要性。发现显著性偏差是主要失败模式，在三轨迹变体中解释了76.6%的CartPole性能退化。
AI.conclusion: 将轨迹视为上下文中的一等证据而非简化为标量回报，即使规模较小的LLM也能更有效地搜索策略空间，实现更快学习、更精准诊断和更可靠的控制器改进。

title: Data-driven Circuit Discovery for Interpretability of Language Models
summary: Circuit discovery aims to explain how language models (LMs) implement a specific task by localizing and interpreting a circuit, a computational subgraph responsible for the LM's behavior. Existing circuit discovery methods are hypothesis-driven; they first informally define a task with a dataset, and then apply a circuit discovery algorithm over that dataset to obtain a single circuit. This imposes two strong assumptions: that the LM implements the task with a single circuit, and that the dataset adequately represents the task as humans understand it. We systematically test these assumptions across four previously studied tasks and find that even minor dataset variations that preserve task semantics can produce circuits with low edge overlap and cross-dataset faithfulness. More strikingly, when applied to a mixed dataset with two distinct tasks whose separately discovered circuits have near-zero cross-faithfulness, existing methods still return a single circuit with high faithfulness across both tasks. This indicates that current methods discover dataset-specific circuits, rather than general task circuits. We propose Data-driven Circuit Discovery (DCD), a new discovery framework that drops both assumptions: instead of returning a single circuit for a dataset, DCD first clusters examples in the dataset by how similarly the model processes them and discovers a separate circuit for each group. This allows distinct mechanisms to appear separately rather than merged into a single circuit; each circuit explains its group, not the full task. Experiments show that DCD discovers multiple circuits per dataset, each more faithful to its group than a single circuit discovered by existing methods. Broadly, DCD lets the data reveal mechanistic structure within LMs, rather than relying on human-defined task boundaries that may not align with how models organize their computation.

AI.tldr: 现有电路发现方法存在两个强假设：模型用单一电路实现任务，且数据集充分代表任务。本文证明这些假设不成立，并提出数据驱动电路发现（DCD），通过聚类数据示例并分别为每组发现独立电路，从而揭示模型内部更真实的机械结构。
AI.motivation: 现有电路发现方法基于"假设驱动"，默认模型对某一任务使用单一电路且数据集能完整代表任务。本文旨在系统检验这两个假设是否成立，并在其失效时提出更合理的方法。
AI.method: 首先在四个已有研究任务上系统测试数据集变化对电路的影响，发现即使保持任务语义的微小变化也会导致电路重叠度低和跨数据集忠实度下降。进一步发现混合两个不同任务时，现有方法仍会返回一个单一的、跨任务高忠实度的电路。基于此提出DCD框架：先对数据示例按模型处理方式的相似性进行聚类，然后为每一类分别发现一个独立电路。
AI.result: 现有方法发现的是数据集特定电路而非通用任务电路；DCD能为每个数据集发现多个电路，每个电路对其所属分组的忠实度优于现有方法的单一电路。
AI.conclusion: 电路发现不应依赖人类定义的任务边界，而应让数据本身揭示LM内部的机械结构。DCD通过聚类+分组发现的方式，避免了将不同机制强行合并为一个电路的问题。

title: RDKV: Rate-Distortion Bit Allocation for Joint Eviction and Quantization of the KV Cache
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown strong performance across diverse tasks, but their inference with long input contexts is bottlenecked by memory size and bandwidth. The Key-Value (KV) cache size grows linearly with sequence length and needs to be re-read from off-chip high-bandwidth memory (HBM) to on-chip memory at every decoding step, resulting in memory-bound inference. Existing methods reduce the cache by either eviction or quantization, but typically treat the two in isolation. In this paper, we cast KV cache compression as a rate-distortion problem, under which eviction and quantization are two end-points of the same bit allocation scheme. This exposes the need to optimize them jointly, motivating our method, RDKV (Rate-Distortion KV cache compression). RDKV derives the weight of each token or channel from the distortion that compression induces on the attention computation. Based on these weights, it assigns each token or channel a bit-width ranging from full precision down to zero bits guided by reverse water-filling, applied once after the prefilling stage. Experiments on LongBench, RULER, and InfiniteBench show that RDKV outperforms the best evaluated baseline by 9.1% on average. On LongBench it recovers 97.81% of full-cache accuracy with only 2.48% cache retention. Compared with full-cache FlashAttention-2 decoding, it achieves 4.5x decode speedup and 1.9x peak memory reduction with 128K context length, while maintaining comparable performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RDKV方法，将KV缓存压缩视为率失真问题，联合优化驱逐和量化两种压缩手段，通过反向注水算法为每个token或通道分配比特宽度，在LongBench等基准上平均提升9.1%，仅保留2.48%缓存即可恢复97.81%的全缓存准确率，实现4.5倍解码加速和1.9倍峰值内存降低。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在长上下文推理时，KV缓存大小随序列长度线性增长，每次解码步骤都需要从片外HBM重复读取到片上内存，导致推理受限于内存带宽和容量。现有方法孤立地处理驱逐或量化，缺乏对两者的联合优化。
AI.method: 将KV缓存压缩建模为率失真问题，驱逐和量化被统一为同一比特分配方案的两个端点。通过分析压缩对注意力计算引入的失真，推导每个token或通道的权重，然后基于反向注水算法在预填充阶段后一次性为每个token或通道分配比特宽度（从全精度到0比特）。
AI.result: 在LongBench、RULER和InfiniteBench上，RDKV平均超越最佳基线9.1%。在LongBench上仅用2.48%缓存保留量恢复97.81%的全缓存准确率。相比全缓存FlashAttention-2解码，在128K上下文长度下实现4.5倍解码加速和1.9倍峰值内存降低，同时保持可比性能。
AI.conclusion: RDKV通过率失真框架联合优化驱逐和量化，有效压缩KV缓存，显著提升长上下文LLM推理的速度和内存效率，且性能损失极小。

title: MCP-Cosmos: World Model-Augmented Agents for Complex Task Execution in MCP Environments
summary: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) has unified the interface between Large Language Models (LLMs) and external tools, yet a fundamental gap remains in how agents conceptualize the environments within which they operate. Current paradigms are bifurcated: Task-level planning often ignores execution-time dynamics, while reactive execution lacks long-horizon foresight. We present MCP-Cosmos, a framework that infuses generative World Models (WM) into the MCP ecosystem to enable predictive task automation. By unifying three disparate technologies, namely MCP, World Model, and Agent, we demonstrate that a "Bring Your Own World Model" (BYOWM) strategy allows agents to simulate state transitions and refine plans in a latent space before execution. We conducted experiments using two strategies, namely ReAct and SPIRAL with 2 planning models and 3 representative world models over 20+ MCP-Bench tasks. We observed improvements in Agent's environment interaction KPI such as tool success rate and tool parameter accuracy. The framework also offers new metrics such as Execution Quality to generate new insights about the effectiveness of world models compared to baseline.

AI.tldr: MCP-Cosmos是一个将生成式世界模型（World Model）融入MCP生态系统的框架，通过"自带世界模型"（BYOWM）策略，让智能体在潜在空间中模拟状态转移并优化规划后再执行，显著提升了工具调用成功率和参数准确度。
AI.motivation: 当前范式存在割裂：任务级规划忽略执行时动态，而反应式执行缺乏长远前瞻性。MCP统一了LLM与外部工具的接口，但智能体如何概念化其运行环境这一根本性鸿沟仍未解决。
AI.method: 提出MCP-Cosmos框架，统一MCP、世界模型和智能体三方面技术，采用BYOWM策略使智能体在执行前在潜在空间模拟状态转移并优化规划；使用ReAct和SPIRAL两种策略，结合2个规划模型和3个代表性世界模型，在20+ MCP-Bench任务上进行实验。
AI.result: 观察到智能体环境交互KPI（如工具成功率、工具参数准确度）的提升，并引入执行质量等新指标，相比基线方法获得了关于世界模型有效性的新洞察。
AI.conclusion: 将生成式世界模型融入MCP生态可有效弥合任务级规划与反应式执行之间的鸿沟，实现预测性任务自动化，BYOWM策略能显著改善智能体与环境的交互质量。

title: BoostAPR: Boosting Automated Program Repair via Execution-Grounded Reinforcement Learning with Dual Reward Models
summary: Reinforcement learning for program repair is hindered by sparse execution feedback and coarse sequence-level rewards that obscure which edits actually fix bugs. We present BoostAPR, a three-stage framework addressing these challenges: (1) supervised fine-tuning on execution-verified demonstrations with reasoning traces, (2) training dual reward models--a sequence-level assessor and a line-level credit allocator--from execution outcomes, and (3) PPO optimization where the line-level model redistributes rewards to critical edit regions. This line-level credit assignment operates at an intermediate granularity naturally suited to code changes. Trained on SWE-Gym and evaluated on four benchmarks, BoostAPR achieves 40.7% on SWE-bench Verified (+22.9pp over base model), 24.8% on Defects4J (Python-to-Java transfer), 84.5% on HumanEval-Java, and 95.0% on QuixBugs, achieving competitive results among open-source models with strong cross-language generalization.

AI.tldr: BoostAPR是一个三阶段强化学习框架，通过逐行信用分配机制解决程序修复中奖励稀疏问题，在多个基准上实现显著提升（SWE-bench Verified达40.7%，较基线提升22.9pp），并展现出强跨语言泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在程序修复中面临两个关键挑战：执行反馈稀疏（仅通过测试通过/失败提供信号），以及粗粒度的序列级奖励无法区分哪些具体编辑真正修复了缺陷，导致学习效率低下。
AI.method: 提出三阶段框架：(1) 在执行验证的演示数据上进行有监督微调并附带推理轨迹；(2) 训练两个奖励模型——序列级评估器和逐行信用分配器，两者均基于执行结果训练；(3) 使用PPO优化，其中逐行模型将奖励重新分配至关键编辑区域，该信用分配在自然适配代码变更的中等粒度上操作。
AI.result: 在SWE-Gym上训练，四个基准评估：SWE-bench Verified 40.7%（+22.9pp）、Defects4J（Python到Java迁移）24.8%、HumanEval-Java 84.5%、QuixBugs 95.0%，在开源模型中具有竞争力，展现强跨语言泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过逐行信用分配机制有效缓解了程序修复中强化学习的奖励稀疏问题，显著提升修复性能，并展示了从Python到Java的有效跨语言迁移能力。

title: LLM Wardens: Mitigating Adversarial Persuasion with Third-Party Conversational Oversight
summary: LLMs are increasingly capable of persuasion, which raises the question of how to protect users against manipulation. In a preregistered user study (N=120) across four decision-making scenarios, we find that an adversarial LLM with a hidden goal succeeds in steering users' decisions 65.4% of the time. We then introduce a "warden" model: a secondary LLM that monitors the human-AI interaction trace in real time and issues non-binding, private advisories to the user when it detects manipulation. Adding a warden more than halves the adversary's success rate to 30.4%, with a much smaller (8.6 percentage points) reduction for genuine interactions. To probe the mechanism behind these results, we release COAX-Bench, a simulation benchmark spanning 14 decision-making scenarios, including hiring, voting, and file access. Across 16,212 simulated multi-agent interactions, capable adversarial LLMs achieve their hidden goals in 34.7% of cases, which warden models reduce to 12.3%. Notably, even warden models substantially weaker than the adversary they oversee provide meaningful protection, suggesting a path for scalable oversight of more capable models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究对抗性LLM对用户的操纵问题，提出“warden”模型实时监控交互并发出非约束性建议，将对抗成功率从65.4%降至30.4%，并通过模拟基准COAX-Bench验证了可扩展监督的有效性。
AI.motivation: LLM的说服能力日益增强，用户面临被操纵的风险，因此需要有效机制保护用户免受对抗性LLM的操控。
AI.method: 进行预注册用户研究（N=120），在四种决策场景中测试对抗性LLM的操纵效果；引入warden模型实时监控人机交互轨迹，检测操纵时向用户发出非约束性建议；构建COAX-Bench模拟基准，涵盖14种决策场景，进行16,212次多智能体交互模拟。
AI.result: 对抗性LLM在无防护时成功率为65.4%；加入warden后成功率降至30.4%（真实交互仅降低8.6个百分点）。模拟实验中对抗成功率达34.7%，warden将其降至12.3%。即使弱于对抗模型的warden也能提供有效保护。
AI.conclusion: warden模型能有效降低对抗性LLM的操纵成功率，且较弱的warden也能提供有意义的保护，这为扩展开源监督更强大模型提供了可行路径。

title: Do LLMs Experience an Internal Polylogue? Investigating Reasoning through the Lens of Personas
summary: Recent work shows that large language models (LLMs) encode behavioural traits ("personas") as linear directions in activation space, often called "persona vectors". Prior work has used such directions as static handles for behavioural steering. Building on this, we treat them as dynamic signals instead: probes we can monitor and intervene on as reasoning unfolds. We use the term polylogue to denote the time series of alignments between persona vectors and hidden activations over the course of generation. Experiments across four open-weight models show that polylogue features predict correctness on MMLU-Pro competitively with low-dimensional activation baselines, while remaining interpretable through their associated persona directions. They also suggest concrete steering targets, namely which latent directions to modulate at different stages of a response. We instantiate this as a simple paragraph-conditioned intervention that improves accuracy on three of four models, pointing to stage-aware latent steering as a promising direction for reasoning-time control. Together, this positions the polylogue as an interpretable tool for reasoning-time monitoring and intervention.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"多轮对话"（polylogue）概念，将LLM行为特质（人格向量）从静态转向动态信号，通过监控生成过程中的时序对齐特征来预测正确性，并实现阶段感知的潜在干预，提升模型推理准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有工作将LLM中编码的行为特质（人格）视为静态向量用于行为引导，但忽略了推理过程中这些信号随生成步进变化的动态特性，缺乏可解释的推理时监控与干预机制。
AI.method: 定义"多轮对话"为生成过程中人格向量与隐藏激活之间对齐度的时间序列；分析该序列特征与MMLU-Pro正确性的关系；设计段落条件化的阶段感知干预方法，在生成不同阶段调制对应的潜在方向。
AI.result: 在四个开源模型上，多轮对话特征以与低维激活基线竞争性的性能预测MMLU-Pro正确性，且保持可解释性；段落条件化干预在四个模型中的三个上提升了准确率。
AI.conclusion: 多轮对话是一种可解释的推理时监控与干预工具，阶段感知的潜在引导是推理时控制的有前景方向。

title: SDG-MoE: Signed Debate Graph Mixture-of-Experts
summary: Sparse MoE models achieve a good balance between capacity and compute by routing each token to a small subset of experts. However, in most MoE architectures, once a token is routed, the selected experts process it independently and their outputs are combined via a weighted sum. This leaves open whether enabling communication among them could improve performance. While prior work has raised this question, direct interaction among the active routed experts remains underexplored. In this paper, we propose SDG-MoE (Signed Debate Graph Mixture-of-Experts), a novel architecture that adds a lightweight, iterative deliberation step before final aggregation. SDG-MoE introduces three components: (i) two learned interaction matrices over the active experts, a support graph $A^+$ and a critique graph $A^-$, capturing reinforcing and corrective influences; (ii) a signed message-passing step that updates expert representations before aggregation; and (iii) a disagreement-gated Friedkin-Johnsen-style anchoring that controls deliberation strength while preventing expert drift. Together, these enable a structured deliberation process where interaction strength scales with disagreement and specialization is preserved. We also provide a theoretical analysis establishing stability conditions on expert states and showing that deliberation adds only low-order overhead over the active set. In controlled three-seed pretraining experiments, SDG-MoE improves validation perplexity over both an unsigned graph communication baseline and vanilla MoE, outperforming the strongest baseline by 19.8%, and gives the best external perplexity on WikiText-103, C4, and Paloma among the compared systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SDG-MoE架构，通过带符号的辩论图在激活专家之间引入轻量级迭代 deliberation 步骤，在预训练实验中验证困惑度比最强基线提升19.8%。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏MoE模型中，被路由的专家独立处理token后直接加权求和，专家之间缺乏直接通信。本文旨在探索能否通过在聚合前引入专家间的结构化交互来提升性能。
AI.method: SDG-MoE包含三个核心组件：(i) 两个学习到的交互矩阵——支持图A⁺和批评图A⁻，分别捕捉强化和修正影响；(ii) 带符号的消息传递步骤，在聚合前更新专家表征；(iii) 基于分歧门控的Friedkin-Johnsen式锚定机制，控制 deliberation 强度并防止专家漂移。三者共同实现了一个交互强度随分歧大小缩放的结构化 deliberation 过程。
AI.result: 在控制三种子初始化的预训练实验中，SDG-MoE在验证困惑度上优于无符号图通信基线和原始MoE，比最强基线提升19.8%；在WikiText-103、C4和Paloma上取得最佳外部困惑度。
AI.conclusion: SDG-MoE通过轻量级的带符号辩论图机制有效提升了MoE性能，理论分析证明了专家状态的稳定性条件，且deliberation过程仅在激活集上增加低阶开销。

title: FORTIS: Benchmarking Over-Privilege in Agent Skills
summary: Large language model agents increasingly operate through an intermediate skill layer that mediates between user intent and concrete task execution. This layer is widely treated as an organizational abstraction, but we argue it is also a privilege boundary that current models routinely exceed. We present \textbf{FORTIS}, a benchmark that evaluates over-privilege in agent skills across two stages: whether a model selects the minimally sufficient skill from a large overlapping library, and whether it executes that skill without expanding into broader tools or actions than the skill permits. Across ten frontier models and three domains, we find that over-privileged behavior is the norm rather than the exception. Models consistently reach for higher-privilege skills and tools than the task requires, failing at both stages at rates that remain high even for the strongest available models. Failure is especially severe under the ordinary conditions of real user interaction: incomplete specification, convenience framing, and proximity to skill boundaries. None of these requires adversarial construction. The results indicate that the skill layer, far from containing agent behavior, is itself a primary source of privilege escalation in current systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FORTIS基准，评估大语言模型智能体在技能层中的过度权限问题。研究发现，即使最先进的模型也普遍存在选择过高权限技能和工具的行为，且这种失败在用户日常交互条件（如不完整指令、便利性提示）下尤为严重。技能层不仅未能约束智能体行为，反而成为权限升级的主要来源。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体广泛使用中间技能层作为用户意图与具体任务之间的组织抽象，但作者指出这一技能层同时也是权限边界，当前模型普遍越界。现有研究缺乏对此过度权限问题的系统性评估。
AI.method: 构建FORTIS基准，从两个阶段评估技能过度权限：(1) 模型是否从重叠技能库中选择最小必要技能；(2) 模型是否在执行技能时避免扩展到超出技能允许的更大范围工具或动作。覆盖10个前沿模型和3个领域。
AI.result: 过度权限行为是常态而非例外。模型总是选择比任务所需更高权限的技能和工具，两个阶段的失败率即使对最强模型也很高。失败在用户真实交互条件下（不完整指定、便利性框架、接近技能边界）尤为严重，且无需对抗性构造。
AI.conclusion: 技能层远未约束智能体行为，其本身已成为当前系统中权限升级的主要来源。

title: The Reciprocity Gradient
summary: Communication is fundamental to sustaining reciprocity and cooperation in strategic interactions. We identify and formulate the influence attribution problem as the central optimization difficulty inherent in such dynamics for a learning agent: any action or signal the agent emits reshapes the reputations of many third parties along combinatorially branching paths before feeding back into its own future rewards, forcing the agent to account for all of these indirect channels at once when choosing every action. To address this, we introduce the reciprocity gradient, which explicitly backpropagates reward gradients through private estimators of opponents' policies trained from public observations. The gradient flows through the reputation chain itself analytically, rather than being estimated from sampled returns. It jointly optimizes actions and evaluative signals without intrinsic rewards or reward shaping. Empirically, the method recovers near-optimal context-sensitive policies, while sample-based baselines collapse into constant-output policies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出互惠梯度方法，通过将奖励梯度反向传播经过对手策略的私密估计器，解决了策略交互中智能体因影响第三方声誉而产生的组合优化难题，在不依赖内在奖励或奖励塑形的情况下联合优化行动与评估信号。
AI.motivation: 识别并形式化策略交互中学习智能体面临的核心优化困难——影响归因问题：智能体的任何行动或信号会沿组合爆炸式分支路径重塑大量第三方声誉，最终反馈至自身未来奖励，迫使智能体在选择每个行动时必须同时考虑所有这些间接通道。
AI.method: 引入互惠梯度，通过从公开观测训练的对手策略私密估计器显式反向传播奖励梯度，梯度沿声誉链解析流动而非通过采样回报估计，联合优化行动与评估信号，无需内在奖励或奖励塑形。
AI.result: 经验结果表明该方法能恢复近最优的上下文敏感策略，而基于样本的基线方法则坍缩为常数输出策略。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了策略互动中的影响归因优化难题，实现了在不依赖额外奖励信号情况下的高效学习。

title: CIVeX: Causal Intervention Verification for Language Agents
comment: 16 pages, 3 figures. Includes Causal-ToolBench, IHDP, ZOZO Open Bandit, and LaLonde NSW evaluations
summary:
A valid tool call is not necessarily a valid intervention. Tool-using language agents are guarded by schema validators, policy filters, provenance checks, state predictors, and self-verification, yet such safeguards do not certify that a state-changing action has an identifiable causal effect. In confounded workflows, the action that looks optimal in observational logs can reduce utility when executed.
  We introduce CIVeX, a causal intervention verifier that maps proposed actions to structural causal queries over a committed action-state graph, checks identifiability, and returns one of four auditable verdicts: EXECUTE, REJECT, EXPERIMENT, or ABSTAIN. Execution requires an assumption-scoped causal certificate carrying graph commitments, an identification argument, a one-sided lower confidence bound (LCB), provenance, and risk limits.
  On Causal-ToolBench (1,890 instances, 7 seeds), CIVeX yields zero observed false executions across moderate and adversarial confounding. Under adversarial confounding it reaches 84.9% accuracy and 81.1% of oracle utility (+2.23 vs +2.76) and is the only non-oracle method whose constrained utility under a zero-false-execution constraint exceeds the AlwaysAbstain floor. On IHDP and ZOZO Open Bandit (real production logs with uniform-random ground truth), CIVeX matches Oracle correct-execution within 0.1pp and cuts per-execute false-execution by >=50x over naive baselines. A chain-of-thought LLM verifier (Claude Opus, Sonnet) cuts false-execution by an order of magnitude over a terse baseline, yet under adversarial confounding Opus's utility falls to 74% of CIVeX's. Intervention identifiability, not action validity, is the missing primitive for reliable tool use.

AI.tldr: CIVeX是一个因果干预验证器，通过将动作映射为结构因果查询并在动作-状态图上进行可识别性检查，为工具使用的语言代理提供带因果证书的可审计执行决策（EXECUTE/REJECT/EXPERIMENT/ABSTAIN），实验证明其在混杂场景下零虚假执行，性能优于LLM验证器。
AI.motivation: 现有工具使用的语言代理虽配备模式验证器、策略过滤器、来源检查、状态预测器和自验证等防护机制，但这些防护无法保证状态改变动作具有可识别的因果效应。在混杂工作流中，基于观测日志的最优动作在实际执行时反而可能降低效用。
AI.method: 提出CIVeX，将提议动作映射为在已提交动作-状态图上的结构因果查询，检查可识别性，返回四种可审计判决：EXECUTE（带假设范围的因果证书，含图承诺、识别论证、单侧下置信界LCB、来源和风险限制）、REJECT、EXPERIMENT或ABSTAIN。
AI.result: 在Causal-ToolBench（1890实例，7种子）上，CIVeX在中等和对抗性混杂下实现零虚假执行。对抗混杂下准确率84.9%，达到Oracle效用的81.1%（+2.23 vs +2.76），是唯一在零虚假执行约束下超越AlwaysAbstain基线的非Oracle方法。在IHDP和ZOZO Open Bandit上，CIVeX与Oracle正确执行率差距在0.1pp以内，虚假执行减少>=50倍。对抗混杂下Opus效用仅为CIVeX的74%。
AI.conclusion: 干预可识别性（而非动作有效性）才是实现可靠工具使用的缺失基元。

title: LLM Advertisement based on Neuron Auctions
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) transition into conversational agents, generative advertising emerges as a crucial monetization strategy. However, embedding advertisements within unstructured LLM outputs introduces a critical trilemma: balancing advertiser payoffs, platform revenue, and user experience. Existing methods, such as prompt injection or rigid position slots, disrupt semantic coherence and lack a parametric framework for independent control, rendering rigorous mechanism design intractable. To bridge this gap, we introduce Neuron Auctions, a novel paradigm that shifts the auction object from the surface text space to the LLM's internal representations. Leveraging mechanistic interpretability, we identify brand-specific feed-forward network (FFN) neurons and demonstrate that competing brands activate within approximately orthogonal subspaces. This near-perfect independence allows us to define continuous, disentangled intervention budgets (specifically, neuron counts and amplification factors) as auctionable commodities. Building on this computational carrier, we design a continuous menu-based auction mechanism that naturally guarantees strategy-proofness and optimizes revenue for the platform. By explicitly incorporating a user utility penalty into the platform's optimization objective, our framework dynamically prices out overly aggressive interventions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Neuron Auctions effectively preserve natural discourse quality while achieving an optimal alignment between commercial incentives and user satisfaction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出神经元拍卖（Neuron Auctions）新范式，将广告拍卖从文本空间转移到LLM内部表征空间，利用可解释性识别品牌特异性FFN神经元，通过连续菜单式拍卖机制实现策略证明性并优化平台收入，在保持自然对话质量的同时平衡广告主收益、平台收入和用户体验。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式广告方法（如提示注入、固定位置插入）会破坏语义连贯性，且缺乏参数化框架进行独立控制，无法实现严谨的机制设计，亟需一种能在LLM输出中平衡广告主收益、平台收入和用户体验的新方案。
AI.method: 1) 利用机械可解释性识别品牌特异性FFN神经元；2) 发现竞争品牌激活近似正交子空间，实现近完美独立；3) 将神经元数量和放大因子定义为连续可解耦的干预预算作为拍卖商品；4) 设计连续菜单式拍卖机制，天然满足策略证明性并优化平台收入；5) 在优化目标中显式纳入用户效用惩罚项，动态抑制过度激进的广告干预。
AI.result: 实验表明神经元拍卖能有效保持自然对话质量，同时实现商业激励与用户满意度的最优对齐。
AI.conclusion: 神经元拍卖通过将拍卖对象从表面文本空间转移到LLM内部表征空间，为生成式广告提供了一种可参数化、可机制设计的解决方案，有效解决了三难困境。

title: Open Ontologies: Tool-Augmented Ontology Engineering with Stable Matching Alignment
summary: We present Open Ontologies, an open-source ontology engineering system implemented in Rust that integrates LLM-driven construction with formal OWL reasoning and ontology alignment via the Model Context Protocol. Our primary finding is that stable 1-to-1 matching is the dominant factor in ontology alignment quality: on the OAEI Anatomy track, it achieves F1 = 0.832 (P = 0.963, R = 0.733), competitive with state-of-the-art systems and exceeding all in precision. Ablation across five weight configurations shows that signal weights are irrelevant when stable matching is applied (F1 varies by less than 0.004), while removing stable matching drops F1 to 0.728. On the Conference track, the same method achieves F1 = 0.438. On tool-augmented ontology interaction, we find a surprising result: an LLM reading a raw OWL file (F1 = 0.323) performs worse than the same LLM with no file at all (F1 = 0.431), while structured MCP tool access achieves F1 = 0.717. This demonstrates that tool structure provides a qualitatively different mode of access that the LLM cannot replicate by reading raw syntax. The system ships as a single binary under the MIT licence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Open Ontologies，一个基于Rust实现的开源本体工程系统，集成了LLM驱动的构建、OWL推理和通过MCP协议的本体对齐。主要发现是稳定1对1匹配是本体对齐质量的主导因素，在OAEI Anatomy数据集上F1=0.832，且工具结构化的MCP访问（F1=0.717）显著优于读取原始OWL文件（F1=0.323）甚至无文件访问（F1=0.431）。
AI.motivation: 现有本体工程系统在LLM与形式化推理的集成、本体对齐的稳定匹配机制以及工具化本体交互模式方面存在不足，作者希望通过Rust实现一个高效、开源且具有可复现性的系统来探索这些关键问题。
AI.method: 系统基于Rust实现，集成LLM驱动的本体构建、OWL推理引擎和通过Model Context Protocol (MCP)实现的结构化工具访问。本体对齐采用稳定1对1匹配算法，并在五个不同的信号权重配置下进行消融实验，同时在OAEI Anatomy和Conference两个基准上进行评估。还对比了LLM直接读取原始OWL文件、不读取文件和使用MCP工具访问三种交互模式。
AI.result: 在OAEI Anatomy数据集上F1=0.832（精确率0.963，召回率0.733），与最先进系统竞争且精确率最高；消融实验表明稳定匹配下信号权重几乎无影响（F1变化<0.004），而去除稳定匹配后F1降至0.728。Conference数据集上F1=0.438。工具交互实验中，MCP访问F1=0.717，显著优于读取原始OWL（F1=0.323）和无文件访问（F1=0.431）。
AI.conclusion: 稳定1对1匹配是本体对齐质量的主导因素，工具结构提供了LLM通过读取原始语法无法复现的独特访问模式。系统已以MIT许可证开源发布为单一二进制文件。

title: Interactive Critique-Revision Training for Reliable Structured LLM Generation
summary: In structured decision-making workflows such as form filling, compliance checking, and maintenance reporting, LLM outputs must be locally correct, globally consistent, and auditable against task-specific rules. Existing refinement methods often rely on heuristic debate, self-play, or LLM-generated supervision, creating a second-order assurance problem. We propose DPA-GRPO (Dual Paired-Action Group-Relative Policy Optimization), a paired-action training method for a two-player generator--verifier game with structured verifier interventions. The generator proposes outputs and may revise them when challenged; the verifier either remains silent or raises a safety assurance case (SAC) containing a claim, argument, and evidence. These SAC/no-SAC and KEEP/REVISE decisions induce paired counterfactual action groups, which DPA-GRPO uses for role-specific KL-regularized GRPO updates. We analyze the unregularized game and show that positive probability on strictly lower-reward intervention or revision actions creates a profitable unilateral deviation. Under standard stochastic-approximation assumptions, DPA-GRPO tracks the corresponding game ODE, whose isolated asymptotically stable limit points are stationary and candidate local equilibria under role-wise local optimality. Experiments on TaxCalcBench TY24 show that DPA-GRPO improves structured decision accuracy over zero-shot generation and generator-only RL baselines across Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-8B. Training increases correct silent acceptance, reduces missed errors, and improves calibrated revision behavior, indicating gains for both generator and verifier.

AI.tldr: 提出DPA-GRPO方法，通过双人生成器-验证器博弈和结构化验证干预，改进LLM在结构化决策任务中的局部正确性、全局一致性和可审计性，实验证明优于零样本生成和仅生成器RL基线。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM输出精炼方法依赖启发式辩论、自博弈或LLM生成的监督，存在二阶保证问题（即谁来监督监督者），无法确保结构化决策工作流中输出的局部正确性、全局一致性和可审计性。
AI.method: 提出DPA-GRPO（双配对动作组相对策略优化）：构建生成器-验证器双玩家博弈，生成器输出结果并可在被质疑时修订，验证器选择沉默或提出安全保证案例（SAC，包含主张、论证和证据）。SAC/无SAC和保留/修订决策形成配对反事实动作组，用于角色特定的KL正则化GRPO更新。理论分析了无正则化博弈的均衡性质，并在标准随机逼近假设下证明了算法收敛性。
AI.result: 在TaxCalcBench TY24数据集上，使用Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-8B模型，DPA-GRPO在结构化决策准确率上优于零样本生成和仅生成器RL基线。训练提升了正确沉默接受率、减少了漏检错误、改进了校准的修订行为，生成器和验证器均获得收益。
AI.conclusion: DPA-GRPO通过配对反事实动作组和结构化验证干预，有效解决了LLM输出精炼中的二阶保证问题，在结构化决策任务上实现了更可靠、可审计的输出。

title: Agentic MIP Research: Accelerated Constraint Handler Generation
summary: Mixed-integer programming (MIP) research is both mathematically sophisticated and engineering-intensive: testing an algorithmic hypothesis within a branch-and-cut solver requires substantial implementation, debugging, tuning, and large-scale benchmarking. We propose an agentic MIP research framework that shortens this feedback loop by embedding LLM agents into a solver-aware harness for generating, verifying, and evaluating plugins for the open-source solver SCIP. Propagation methods play a central role in accelerating MIP solving by exploiting global constraints. We instantiate our framework on the semantic lifting of MIP formulations into global constraints and the automatic construction of propagation-only SCIP constraint handlers. On the MIPLIB 2017 benchmark set, the framework successfully recovers global constraint structures from constraint programming and generates executable constraint detectors and propagation-only constraint handlers. Furthermore, the framework naturally extends to in-context learning within a sandboxed environment, enabling agents not only to tune and debug generated constraint handlers on real instances, but also to explore global constraint patterns in MIP problems and discover novel propagation strategies not yet implemented in SCIP. This framework allows us to systematically distinguish meaningful algorithmic improvements from low-value or overly costly candidates: the novel propagation methods successfully solved five additional instances within the explored benchmark. Overall, this framework demonstrates that LLM agents can autonomously navigate the complex MIP research loop, paving the way for a more automated solver development process.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于LLM智能体的MIP研究框架，通过嵌入开源求解器SCIP，自动生成、验证和评估传播约束处理器。该框架成功从MIPLIB 2017基准中恢复全局约束结构，生成可执行的约束检测器和传播处理器，并发现新的传播策略，额外解决了5个实例，展示了LLM自主导航MIP研究循环的能力。
AI.motivation: 混合整数规划研究既需要数学理论深度又需要大量工程实现工作，在分支-切割求解器中测试算法假设需要大量的实现、调试、调参和大规模基准测试，反馈周期过长。
AI.method: 提出一个智能体MIP研究框架，将LLM智能体嵌入到求解器感知的框架中，用于生成、验证和评估SCIP开源求解器的插件。具体实例化为MIP公式的语义提升（转化为全局约束）和自动构建仅传播的SCIP约束处理器。
AI.result: 在MIPLIB 2017基准集上，框架成功恢复全局约束结构，生成可执行约束检测器和传播处理器；在沙盒环境中支持上下文学习，实现调参、调试和探索全局约束模式；新传播方法额外解决了5个实例。
AI.conclusion: 该框架表明LLM智能体可以自主导航复杂的MIP研究循环，系统地区分有意义的算法改进与低价值或高成本方案，为更自动化的求解器开发过程铺平道路。

title: P-Flow: Proxy-gradient Flows for Linear Inverse Problems
summary: Generative models based on flow matching have emerged as a powerful paradigm for inverse problems, offering straighter trajectories and faster sampling compared to diffusion models. However, existing approaches often necessitate differentiating through unrolled paths, leading to numerical instability and prohibitive computational overhead. To address this, we propose P-Flow, a framework that stabilizes the reconstruction process by leveraging a proxy gradient to update the source point. This approach effectively circumvents the numerical instability and memory overhead of long-chain differentiation. To ensure consistency with the prior distribution, we employ a Gaussian spherical projection motivated by the concentration of measure phenomenon in high-dimensional spaces. We further provide a theoretical analysis for P-Flow based on Bayesian theory and Lipschitz continuity. Experiments across diverse restoration tasks demonstrate that P-Flow delivers competitive performance, especially under extreme degradations such as severely ill-posed conditions and high measurement noise.

AI.tldr: 提出P-Flow框架，利用代理梯度和高斯球面投影来稳定流匹配模型的逆问题求解过程，避免长链微分导致的数值不稳定和高计算开销，在极端退化条件下表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有基于流匹配的逆问题生成模型需要沿展开路径进行微分，导致数值不稳定和过高的计算开销，亟需一种稳定且高效的求解方案。
AI.method: 1) 使用代理梯度更新源点，避免长链微分的数值不稳定性和内存开销；2) 利用高维空间中的测度集中现象，采用高斯球面投影确保与先验分布的一致性；3) 基于贝叶斯理论和Lipschitz连续性提供理论分析。
AI.result: 在多种图像复原任务中展现出有竞争力的性能，尤其在严重病态条件和强测量噪声等极端退化情况下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: P-Flow通过代理梯度和球面投影有效解决了流匹配逆问题的数值稳定性问题，为高噪声和严重病态条件下的逆问题重建提供了可行方案。

title: Emergent Semantic Role Understanding in Language Models
summary: Understanding how linguistic structure emerges in language models is central to interpreting what these systems learn from data and how much supervision they truly require. In particular, semantic role understanding ("who did what to whom") is a core component of meaning representation, yet it remains unclear whether it arises from pre-training alone or depends on task-specific fine-tuning. We study whether semantic role understanding emerges during language model pre-training or requires task-specific fine-tuning. We freeze decoder-only transformers and train linear probes to extract semantic roles, using performance to infer whether role information is already encoded in pre-training or learned during adaptation. Across model scales, we find that frozen representations contain substantial semantic role information, with performance improving but not fully matching fine-tuned models. This indicates partial but incomplete emergence from pre-training alone. We show that semantic role structure emerges from language modeling objectives, but its internal implementation shifts toward more distributed representations as model scale increases.

AI.tldr: 本文研究语义角色理解是否在语言模型预训练阶段自然涌现，还是需要任务特定的微调。通过冻结解码器-only transformer并用线性探针提取语义角色，发现预训练表征已包含大量语义角色信息，但性能不及完全微调模型，表明语义角色在预训练中部分涌现但未完全。
AI.motivation: 探究语言模型中语义角色理解（"谁对谁做了什么"）这一核心意义表征成分是否仅通过预训练就能自发涌现，还是必须依赖任务特定的微调，从而理解语言模型从数据中真正学到什么以及需要多少监督。
AI.method: 冻结解码器-only transformer模型，训练线性探针（linear probes）来提取语义角色信息，通过探针性能推断语义角色信息是在预训练中已编码还是在适应阶段习得。
AI.result: 冻结表征包含大量语义角色信息，但探针性能不及完全微调模型；随着模型规模增大，语义角色结构内部实现方式向更分布式的表征转变。
AI.conclusion: 语义角色结构从语言建模目标中涌现，但在更大模型中其内部实现转向分布式表征；预训练可以部分但非完全地使语义角色理解能力涌现。

title: CDS4RAG: Cyclic Dual-Sequential Hyperparameter Optimization for RAG
comment: Accepted by main track at IJCAI 2026
