This is because models sometimes exhibit strategic deception and sandbagging, changing their behavior during evaluation. This motivates the use of white-box monitors like linear probes, which can read the model internals directly. Currently, such probes can fail under distribution shift, limiting their usefulness in real settings. We study whether there exists a low-dimensional subspace of the model internals that captures harmful behaviors more robustly, while leaving out spuriously correlative features. Inspired by the Assistant Axis and Persona Selection Model, we construct persona axes for deception and sycophancy using contrastive persona prompts. The first principal components, obtained by unsupervised PCA of the persona-specific vectors, cleanly separate harmful and harmless personas. Across 10 evaluation datasets, we show that persona-derived directions transfer non-trivially and probes trained on persona-PC projections generalize better than probes trained on raw activations. We also find that a unified axis consisting of multiple harmful and harmless behaviors improves generalization across behaviors and datasets. Overall, persona vectors provide a useful inductive bias for building more transferable behavior probes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用对比人格提示构建"人格轴"，通过对人格特定向量进行无监督PCA提取主成分，从而获得更鲁棒、更具迁移性的行为探针，用于检测语言模型内部的欺骗和谄媚等有害行为。实验表明，基于人格主成分投影训练的探针在10个评估数据集上比原始激活训练的探针泛化能力更强，且统一的多行为轴能进一步提升跨行为和跨数据集的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有文本监控不足以检测语言模型的战略欺骗和沙袋行为，而基于模型内部表示的白盒探针（如线性探针）在分布偏移下容易失效，需要更鲁棒的有害行为检测方法。
AI.method: 借鉴Assistant Axis和Persona Selection Model的思想，使用对比人格提示构建欺骗和谄媚的人格向量，通过对人格特定向量进行无监督PCA提取第一主成分作为"人格轴"，并基于这些主成分投影训练线性探针。
AI.result: 在10个评估数据集上，人格导出的方向具有非平凡迁移性；基于人格主成分投影训练的探针比基于原始激活训练的探针泛化更好；统一的多行为轴（包含多种有害和无害行为）进一步提升了跨行为和跨数据集的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 人格向量为构建更具迁移性的行为探针提供了有用的归纳偏置，有助于更鲁棒地检测语言模型中的有害行为。

title: CUDABeaver: Benchmarking LLM-Based Automated CUDA Debugging
summary: Debugging CUDA programs has long been challenging because failures often arise from subtle interactions among hardware behavior, compiler decisions, memory hierarchy, and asynchronous execution. More importantly, with the rapid expansion of GPU usage across scientific computing, machine learning, graphics, and systems workloads, CUDA debugging has become more challenging than ever. Current evaluations of LLM-based CUDA programming largely miss this setting: a model can pass correctness tests with repair by degeneration, simplifying the CUDA code into a safer but slower program that abandons the original optimization structure. We introduce CUDABEAVER, a benchmark for CUDA debugging from real failing workspaces produced during LLM-based CUDA generation. Each task provides the broken candidate, native build/test commands, raw error evidence, and a single editable file. CUDABEAVER evaluates whether a fixer truly repairs the failing CUDA code or merely finds a slower test-passing replacement, reporting results by failure category, debugging trajectory, stagnation mode, and performance preservation. We further propose pass@k(M,C,A), a protocol-conditional CUDA debugging metric by making the fixer M, corpus C, and protocol axes Aexplicit. Using this metric across 213 tasks and seven frontier LLMs, we show that protocol-aware evaluation gives a more faithful view of CUDA debugging ability: when performance-loss tolerance is high, fixers appear much stronger, but even a minor stricter performance requirement can sharply reduce measured success, shifting scores by up to 40 percentage points.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CUDABEAVER基准测试，用于评估LLM在真实CUDA调试场景中的能力，并引入协议感知评估指标pass@k(M,C,A)，揭示性能约束对调试成功率的显著影响（最高达40个百分点）。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM的CUDA编程评估忽视了两个关键问题：(1) 真实调试场景的复杂性（硬件行为、编译器决策、异步执行等交互故障）；(2) 模型可能通过"退化性修复"（简化代码、牺牲性能）来通过正确性测试，从而掩盖其真实调试能力。需要一个能区分真正修复与性能妥协的评估框架。
AI.method: (1) 构建CUDABEAVER基准，包含213个来自LLM生成过程中的真实失败CUDA工作区，每个任务提供破损代码、构建/测试命令、原始错误证据和单可编辑文件；(2) 提出协议条件性CUDA调试指标pass@k(M,C,A)，显式区分修复器(M)、语料库(C)和协议轴(A)（性能损失容忍度）；(3) 对七个前沿LLM进行系统评估，按故障类别、调试轨迹、停滞模式和性能保持度分析结果。
AI.result: 协议感知评估揭示了CUDA调试能力的更真实面貌：当性能损失容忍度高时，修复器表现更强；但即使微小的严格性能要求也会显著降低测量成功率，分数变化幅度高达40个百分点。这表明传统评估方法严重高估了LLM的实际CUDA调试能力。
AI.conclusion: CUDA调试评估必须考虑性能保持约束，否则会误导性地高估LLM能力；协议条件性评估框架能更忠实地反映模型在真实CUDA调试场景中的表现。

title: Empowering VLMs for Few-Shot Multimodal Time Series Classification via Tailored Agentic Reasoning
summary: In this paper, we propose the first VL$\underline{\textbf{M}}$ $\underline{\textbf{a}}$gentic $\underline{\textbf{r}}$easoning framework for few-$\underline{\textbf{s}}$hot multimodal $\underline{\textbf{T}}$ime $\underline{\textbf{S}}$eries $\underline{\textbf{C}}$lassification ($\textbf{MarsTSC}$), which introduces a self-evolving knowledge bank as a dynamic context iteratively refined via reflective agentic reasoning. The framework comprises three collaborative roles: i) Generator conducts reliable classification via reasoning; ii) Reflector diagnoses the root causes of reasoning errors to yield discriminative insights targeting the temporal features overlooked by Generator; iii) Modifier applies verified updates to the knowledge bank to prevent context collapse. We further introduce a test-time update strategy to enable cautious, continuous knowledge bank refinement to mitigate few-shot bias and distribution shift. Extensive experiments across 12 mainstream time series benchmarks demonstrate that $\textbf{MarsTSC}$ delivers substantial and consistent performance gains across 6 VLM backbones, outperforming both classical and foundation model-based time series baselines under few-shot conditions, while producing interpretable rationales that ground each classification decision in human-readable feature evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个VL多智能体推理框架MarsTSC，用于少样本多模态时间序列分类。该框架包含生成器、反射器和修改器三个协作角色，通过自进化知识库和反思性智能体推理实现动态上下文优化，并引入测试时更新策略缓解少样本偏差和分布偏移。在12个基准数据集上，MarsTSC在6种VLM骨干网络上均取得显著性能提升，优于传统和基于基础模型的时序分类方法，同时生成可解释的分类依据。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本多模态时间序列分类方法缺乏有效的推理机制和动态知识更新能力，难以应对少样本场景下的偏差和分布偏移问题，且缺乏可解释的分类依据。
AI.method: 提出MarsTSC框架，包含三个智能体：1) 生成器(Generator)通过推理进行可靠分类；2) 反射器(Reflector)诊断推理错误根源，识别生成器忽略的时间特征并产生判别性洞见；3) 修改器(Modifier)对知识库进行验证更新以防止上下文崩溃。同时引入测试时更新策略实现谨慎、持续的知识库精炼。
AI.result: 在12个主流时间序列基准上，MarsTSC在6种VLM骨干网络上均取得显著且一致的性能提升，在少样本条件下优于传统方法和基于基础模型的时序基线。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体反思性推理框架结合自进化知识库能有效提升少样本多模态时间序列分类性能，同时产生可解释的人类可读特征证据支撑分类决策。

title: Neurally-plausible radial basis kernels using distributed Fourier embeddings
summary: Coherent, continuous spatial representations are critical for synthesizing physical and perceptual phenomena into a single representational space. Radial basis kernels provide a path forward for this type of distributed representation. In this work, we aim to characterize and analyze common radial basis kernels realizable in the neurally-plausible framework of spatial semantic pointers. Further, we analyze previous radial basis kernel work based on grid cell-like representations and demonstrate that such representations are both capable of and optimal for realizing radial basis kernels.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在神经可解释的空间语义指针框架中可实现的径向基核函数，分析了基于网格细胞表征的径向基核工作，并证明了这类表征在实现径向基核方面既具备能力又具有最优性。
AI.motivation: 连贯、连续的空间表征对于将物理和感知现象综合到一个统一的表征空间中至关重要，而径向基核为这种分布式表征提供了实现路径。
AI.method: 在神经可解释的空间语义指针框架中表征和分析了常见的径向基核函数，并分析了以往基于网格细胞表征的径向基核工作。
AI.result: 基于网格细胞样式的表征既能实现径向基核，并且在此方面具有最优性。
AI.conclusion: 径向基核在神经可解释框架中可实现，且网格细胞表征是其实现在该框架下最优方式。

title: Strategic commitments shape collective cybersecurity under AI inequality
summary: The growing integration of AI into cybersecurity is reshaping the balance between attackers and defenders. When access to advanced AI-enabled defence tools is uneven, resource-limited defenders may be unable to adopt effective protection, creating persistent system vulnerabilities. We study the impact of differential AI access using an evolutionary game-theoretic model in a finite population. We first show that when high-capability defence is costly, the population is driven toward low-cost, weak-defence behaviour, sustaining attacks and weakening long-run security. To address this problem, we introduce differential access to AI defence tools by allowing defenders to choose between low- and high-capability protection based on their resources. We then examine the role of a small group of committed defenders who always adopt strong defence and influence others through social learning. Although commitment increases the prevalence of strong defence, it alone cannot stabilise secure outcomes due to high defence costs. We therefore incorporate a targeted subsidy to remove the cost disadvantage from committed defenders. Our analysis shows that subsidised commitment significantly increases strong defence adoption, suppresses successful attacks, and improves overall system resilience. Simulations across a broad parameter space confirm that subsidies consistently outperform commitment alone. In addition, social-welfare analysis shows improved defender outcomes while keeping attacker gains low. These findings suggest that targeted support for key defenders can be an effective mechanism for stabilising cybersecurity in AI-driven environments and provide a theoretical bridge between cybersecurity policy, AI governance, and strategic allocation of defensive AI capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文通过演化博弈模型研究AI防御工具差异化访问对网络安全的影响，发现补贴承诺防御者（对始终采用强防御的群体提供补贴）能显著提高强防御采用率、抑制攻击成功率并提升系统韧性，优于仅靠承诺防御的效果。
AI.motivation: 当先进AI防御工具在资源有限的防御者中分配不均时，系统会持续存在脆弱性。研究旨在探索如何通过差异化AI访问和有针对性的干预机制来稳定网络安全。
AI.method: 采用有限种群中的演化博弈模型，引入差异化AI防御工具访问机制（低能力与高能力防御选择），并分析承诺防御者（始终采用强防御的小群体）和针对性补贴策略的影响，通过广泛参数空间的模拟验证。
AI.result: 1) 高能力防御成本高时，种群趋向于低成本弱防御行为，攻击持续存在；2) 承诺防御虽能提高强防御流行度，但单独使用时无法稳定安全结果；3) 补贴承诺防御显著增加强防御采用率、抑制成功攻击、提升系统韧性；4) 社会福利分析表明补贴改善了防御者收益，同时保持攻击者收益较低。
AI.conclusion: 对关键防御者的针对性补贴是稳定AI驱动环境中网络安全的有效机制，在网络安全政策、AI治理与防御性AI能力战略分配之间建立了理论桥梁。

title: The Geometric Structure of Models Learning Sparse Data
summary: The manifold hypothesis (MH) is often used to explain how machine learning can overcome the curse of dimensionality. However, the MH is only applicable in regimes where the training data provides a sufficiently dense sample of the underlying low-dimensional data manifold, or where such a low-dimensional manifold is conceivably present. We describe the regimes where the MH is not applicable as sparse. In this paper, we demonstrate that models succeed in the sparse regime by exploiting a highly structured local geometry, a property we formalize as normal alignment. We prove that normal-aligned classifiers -- whose input-output Jacobians are rank-one and align perfectly with the training data -- minimize the training objective under norm constraints and achieve maximal local robustness under a non-zero Jacobian constraint. For continuous piecewise-affine deep networks, normal alignment manifests geometrically as centroid alignment within the network's induced power diagram partition and results from the feature-learning regime. Motivated by these theoretical insights, we introduce GrokAlign, a regularization strategy that actively induces normal alignment. We demonstrate that GrokAlign significantly accelerates the training dynamics of deep networks relevant to the grokking phenomenon. Furthermore, we apply the principle of normal alignment to Recursive Feature Machines (RFMs) to introduce Recursive Feature Alignment Machines (RFAMs). We show that RFAMs exhibit greater adversarial robustness compared to RFMs when trained on tabular data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"法向对齐"概念来解释机器学习在稀疏数据（流形假设不成立）时仍能成功的原因。法向对齐的分类器在满足范数约束下能最小化训练目标，并实现最大局部鲁棒性。作者提出GrokAlign正则化策略加速深度学习训练，以及RFAM方法提升表格数据的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 流形假设（MH）仅当训练数据对底层低维流形采样足够密集时才适用，但实际中常出现"稀疏"数据场景（MH不适用），需要解释模型在此类场景下为何仍然有效。
AI.method: 形式化定义"法向对齐"属性（输入-输出Jacobian秩为1且与训练数据完美对齐）；证明法向对齐分类器在范数约束下达到训练目标最优和非零Jacobian约束下的最大局部鲁棒性；分析连续分段仿射深度网络中法向对齐的几何表现（质心对齐）；提出GrokAlign正则化策略和Recursive Feature Alignment Machines（RFAMs）。
AI.result: GrokAlign显著加速与grokking现象相关的深度网络训练动态；RFAMs在表格数据上比RFMs具有更强的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 法向对齐是解释稀疏数据下模型成功的关键机制，并且可以通过主动诱导该属性来提升深度学习训练效率和鲁棒性。

title: From Passive Reuse to Active Reasoning: Grounding Large Language Models for Neuro-Symbolic Experience Replay
summary: While experience replay is essential for data efficiency in reinforcement learning (RL), standard methods treat the replay buffer as a passive memory system, prioritizing samples based on numerical prediction errors rather than their semantic significance. This approach stands in contrast to human learning, which accelerates mastery by actively abstracting fragmented experiences into behavioral rules. To bridge this gap, we propose Neuro-Symbolic Experience Replay (NSER), a framework that transforms experience replay from a passive sample reuse mechanism into an active engine for knowledge construction. Specifically, NSER addresses the incompatibility between linguistic reasoning and numerical optimization through a novel neuro-symbolic grounding pipeline. It leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) in a zero-shot manner to induce candidate behavioral rules from accumulated trajectories, grounds these insights into differentiable first-order logic representations, and utilizes the resulting symbolic structures to dynamically reweight the replay distribution. By allowing abstract knowledge to directly shape policy optimization, NSER achieves consistent superior sample efficiency and convergence speed across reactive, rule-based, and procedural benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出神经符号经验回放(NSER)框架，将经验回放从被动样本复用转变为主动知识建构引擎，通过LLM零样本归纳行为规则并转化为可微一阶逻辑表示，动态重加权回放分布，在多种基准上提升样本效率和收敛速度。
AI.motivation: 标准经验回放将被动的样本复用机制，仅基于数值预测误差排序样本，缺乏语义重要性考量，与人类通过抽象经验提炼行为规则的学习方式存在差距。
AI.method: 1) 利用LLM零样本从累积轨迹中归纳候选行为规则；2) 将规则转化为可微一阶逻辑表示；3) 利用符号结构动态重加权回放分布，使抽象知识直接塑造策略优化。
AI.result: 在反应型、基于规则型和程序型基准上均实现一致的优越样本效率和收敛速度。
AI.conclusion: NSER通过神经符号融合有效弥合了语言推理与数值优化之间的不相容性，证明了抽象知识对策略优化的直接价值。

title: CUDAHercules: Benchmarking Hardware-Aware Expert-level CUDA Optimization for LLMs
summary: Large language models show promise for automated CUDA programming, however even the strongest coding models (e.g., Claude-Opus-4.6) may still fall short of expert-level, architecture-aware optimization. We introduce CUDAHercules, a benchmark that evaluates generated CUDA against end-to-end human-expert SOTA systems. It spans single kernels, module-level operators, full applications, and unsolved challenge tasks across Ampere, Hopper, and Blackwell GPUs, with end-to-end tasks gated by domain-specific semantic validators. Evaluating models such as Claude-Opus-4.6 and GPT-5.4 shows a large gap between runnable CUDA and expert CUDA engineering: models often compile and pass tests, but rarely recover the optimization strategies needed to match expert performance. Application semantics further reduce success, and iterative or tool-augmented feedback can improve correctness while drifting toward slow fallback implementations. These results show that automated CUDA programming remains far from fully solved and requires stronger hardware reasoning, better tool use, and training objectives that connect code understanding to hardware architecture-grounded intelligence.

AI.tldr: 提出CUDAHercules基准，评估大语言模型生成CUDA代码的能力，发现即使最强模型（如Claude-Opus-4.6、GPT-5.4）生成的代码虽可编译通过测试，但远未达到人类专家级的架构感知优化水平，在端到端任务中表现更差，迭代反馈虽能改善正确性却易退化至低效实现。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在CUDA编程方面的能力尚未得到系统性评估，尤其是与人类专家级、架构感知的端到端优化系统之间的差距尚不明确，缺乏覆盖多代GPU架构和多层次任务的标准化基准。
AI.method: 构建CUDAHercules基准，覆盖单核、模块级算子、完整应用及未解决挑战任务，跨Ampere、Hopper、Blackwell三代GPU架构，采用领域特定语义验证器对端到端任务进行门控评估。在Claude-Opus-4.6和GPT-5.4等模型上进行测试，分析可编译性、正确性与性能优化之间的差距。
AI.result: 模型生成的CUDA代码虽能编译并通过测试，但极少恢复人类专家级别的优化策略；应用级语义进一步降低了成功率；迭代或工具增强的反馈虽能提升正确性，但易导致模型趋向低效的回退实现。
AI.conclusion: 自动化CUDA编程远未解决，需要更强的硬件推理能力、更好的工具使用能力，以及将代码理解与硬件架构智能相连接的训练目标。

title: SimWorld Studio: Automatic Environment Generation with Evolving Coding Agent for Embodied Agent Learning
summary: LLM/VLM-based digital agents have advanced rapidly thanks to scalable sandboxes for coding, web navigation, and computer use, which provide rich interactive training grounds. In contrast, embodied agents still lack abundant, diverse, and automatically generated 3D environments for interactive learning. Existing embodied simulators rely on manually crafted scenes or procedural templates, while recent LLM-based 3D generation systems mainly produce static scenes rather than deployable environments with verifiable tasks and standard learning interfaces. We introduce SimWorld Studio, an open-source platform built on Unreal Engine 5 for generating evolving embodied learning environments. At its core is SimCoder, a tool/skill-augmented coding agent that writes and executes engine-level code to construct physically grounded 3D worlds from language/image instructions. SimCoder self-evolves by using verifier feedback (e.g., compilation errors, physics checks, VLM critiques) to revise environments and autonomously add reusable tools and skills to its library. Generated worlds are exported as Gym-style environments for embodied agent learning. SimWorld Studio further enables co-evolution between environment generation and embodied learning: agent performance feedback guides SimCoder to generate adaptive curricula near the learner's capability frontier, so that environments become increasingly challenging as the embodied agent improves. Three case studies on embodied navigation show that self-evolution improves generation reliability, generated environments substantially improve embodied agent performance that generalizes to unseen benchmarks, and co-evolution yields an 18-point success-rate gain over fixed-environment learning and a 40-point gain over an untrained agent.

AI.tldr: SimWorld Studio是一个基于Unreal Engine 5的开源平台，通过SimCoder智能体从语言/图像指令自动生成可交互的3D具身学习环境，支持自我进化与环境-学习者协同进化，在具身导航任务中显著提升智能体性能。
AI.motivation: 现有具身智能体缺乏丰富、多样且可自动生成的3D交互学习环境；已有的具身模拟器依赖人工场景或程序化模板，而基于LLM的3D生成系统主要产出静态场景，无法提供可验证任务和标准学习接口。
AI.method: 构建SimWorld Studio平台，核心为SimCoder——一个工具/技能增强的编码智能体，可编写并执行引擎级代码从语言/图像指令构建物理真实的3D世界；利用验证反馈（编译错误、物理检查、VLM批评）自我修正环境并自主扩展工具库；生成环境导出为Gym风格环境；支持环境生成与具身学习的协同进化，根据智能体表现自动生成适应性课程。
AI.result: 在具身导航的三个案例研究中，自我进化提升了生成可靠性；生成环境显著提升具身智能体性能并泛化到未见基准；协同进化相比固定环境学习获得18个百分点的成功率提升，相比未训练智能体获得40个百分点的提升。
AI.conclusion: SimWorld Studio通过自动化生成与协同进化机制，有效解决了具身学习环境中数据稀缺和自适应课程设计问题，验证了环境生成与智能体学习相互促进的可行性。

title: VulTriage: Triple-Path Context Augmentation for LLM-Based Vulnerability Detection
summary: Automated vulnerability detection is a fundamental task in software security, yet existing learning-based methods still struggle to capture the structural dependencies, domain-specific vulnerability knowledge, and complex program semantics required for accurate detection. Recent Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong code understanding ability, but directly prompting them with raw source code often leads to missed vulnerabilities or false alarms, especially when vulnerable and benign functions differ only in subtle semantic details. To address this, we propose VulTriage, a triple-path context augmentation framework for LLM-based vulnerability detection. VulTriage enhances the LLM input through three complementary paths: a Control Path that extracts and verbalizes AST, CFG, and DFG information to expose control and data dependencies; a Knowledge Path that retrieves relevant CWE-derived vulnerability patterns and examples through hybrid dense--sparse retrieval; and a Semantic Path that summarizes the functional behavior of the code before the final judgment. These contexts are integrated into a unified instruction to guide the LLM toward more reliable vulnerability reasoning. Experiments on the PrimeVul pair test set show that VulTriage achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming existing deep learning and LLM-based baselines on key pair-wise and classification metrics. Further ablation studies verify the effectiveness of each path, and additional experiments on the Kotlin dataset demonstrate the generalization ability of VulTriage under low-resource and class-imbalanced settings. Our code is available at https://github.com/vinsontang1/VulTriage

AI.tldr: VulTriage 是一种三路径上下文增强框架，通过控制路径（AST/CFG/DFG）、知识路径（CWE检索）和语义路径（功能摘要）来增强LLM的漏洞检测能力，在PrimeVul和Kotlin数据集上达到了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的漏洞检测方法难以捕捉结构依赖、领域漏洞知识和复杂程序语义；直接使用LLM对原始源码进行漏洞检测容易漏报或误报，尤其是当脆弱函数和良性函数仅在细微语义细节上存在差异时。
AI.method: VulTrage通过三条互补路径增强LLM输入：(1) 控制路径——提取并语意化AST、CFG、DFG信息以暴露控制和数据依赖；(2) 知识路径——通过混合稠密-稀疏检索获取相关的CWE漏洞模式和样例；(3) 语义路径——在最终判断前总结代码的功能行为。三者整合为统一指令引导LLM推理。
AI.result: 在PrimeVul pair测试集上达到SOTA性能，优于现有深度学习和LLM基线方法；消融实验验证了每条路径的有效性；在Kotlin数据集上的实验证明了在低资源和类别不平衡场景下的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: VulTriage通过结构化上下文增强有效提升了LLM在漏洞检测任务上的准确性和鲁棒性，具有良好的泛化能力。

title: When Independent Sampling Outperforms Agentic Reasoning
summary: We study how to allocate inference-time compute for competitive programming under fixed budgets. Evaluating 216 Codeforces problems across Divisions 1-3, we compare agent-based reasoning with repeated independent sampling (k-shot) as a function of both cost and number of model calls. Across models and difficulty levels, k-shot consistently achieves a better accuracy-cost and accuracy-query tradeoff. This gap persists despite prompt caching in agent frameworks, indicating lower per-call effectiveness. Our results show that, for self-contained algorithmic tasks, independent exploration can outperform deeper agentic reasoning under realistic resource constraints. We also provide a budget-allocation analysis when the inference budget is fixed, and prove that a cost-optimal solver minimizes the principled metric log failure likelihood per dollar.

AI.tldr: 在固定推理预算下，针对竞赛编程问题，重复独立采样（k-shot）在准确率-成本和准确率-查询次数权衡上始终优于基于Agent的推理方法，即使Agent框架使用了提示缓存。
AI.motivation: 研究在固定预算约束下，如何分配推理时计算资源以最优地解决竞赛编程问题，比较Agent式深度推理与独立采样的效率差异。
AI.method: 在216道Codeforces题目（Div 1-3）上，系统比较Agent式推理与重复独立采样（k-shot）在不同模型调用次数和成本下的准确率表现，并进行预算分配分析及理论最优性证明。
AI.result: k-shot在所有模型和难度级别上均取得更优的准确率-成本和准确率-查询权衡；即使Agent框架采用提示缓存，该差距依然存在。
AI.conclusion: 对于自包含的算法任务，在现实资源约束下，独立探索比深度Agent推理更高效；提出了成本最优求解器的最小化对数失败似然/美元的指标。

title: Don't Click That: Teaching Web Agents to Resist Deceptive Interfaces
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 Main Conference. 23 pages, 8 figures, 19 tables
summary: Vision-language model (VLM) based web agents demonstrate impressive autonomous GUI interaction but remain vulnerable to deceptive interface elements. Existing approaches either detect deception without task integration or document attacks without proposing defenses. We formalize deception-aware web agent defense and propose DUDE (Deceptive UI Detector & Evaluator), a two-stage framework combining hybrid-reward learning with asymmetric penalties and experience summarization to distill failure patterns into transferable guidance. We introduce RUC (Real UI Clickboxes), a benchmark of 1,407 scenarios spanning four domains and deception categories. Experiments show DUDE reduces deception susceptibility by 53.8% while maintaining task performance, establishing an effective foundation for robust web agent deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DUDE框架，通过混合奖励学习与非对称惩罚机制，结合经验总结，检测网页欺骗性界面元素，在RUC基准测试中将欺骗成功率降低53.8%且不影响任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于VLM的网页代理在面对欺骗性界面元素时表现脆弱，而现有方法要么仅检测欺骗但未集成任务，要么仅记录攻击而未提出防御方案，缺乏将欺骗感知与任务执行有机结合的防御框架。
AI.method: 提出DUDE两阶段框架：第一阶段采用混合奖励学习（hybrid-reward learning）与非对称惩罚（asymmetric penalties）；第二阶段通过经验总结（experience summarization）将失败模式提炼为可迁移的指导规则。同时构建了包含1,407个场景、覆盖四个领域和多种欺骗类别的RUC基准数据集。
AI.result: DUDE将网页代理的欺骗易感性降低了53.8%，同时保持了原有的任务性能。
AI.conclusion: DUDE为鲁棒的网页代理部署建立了有效基础，在安全防御与任务效率之间取得了良好平衡。

title: ShifaMind: A Multiplicative Concept Bottleneck for Interpretable ICD-10 Coding
summary: Automated ICD-10 coding from clinical discharge summaries requires models that are both accurate on long-tailed multi-label classification tasks and interpretable to clinicians. Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) offer a principled framework for interpretability by routing predictions through human-interpretable concepts, but this transparency often comes at a cost: compressing rich clinical text representations into a narrow concept layer can restrict gradient flow and limit predictive capacity. We present ShifaMind, a concept-grounded architecture built around a Multiplicative Concept Bottleneck (MCB), which changes the form, rather than the width, of the bottleneck. Instead of projecting through a narrow concept layer, ShifaMind uses a learned multiplicative gate over a concept-grounded representation while retaining a scalar concept interface for inspection. On MIMIC-IV top-50 ICD-10 coding, ShifaMind achieves performance competitive with LAAT, the strongest baseline, across F1, AUC, and ranking metrics, while outperforming five additional ICD-coding baselines and providing concept-mediated explanations. Its substantial gains over a capacity-matched Vanilla CBM in both predictive performance and interpretability-oriented metrics highlight the importance of the bottleneck design.

AI.tldr: ShifaMind提出了一种乘法概念瓶颈（MCB）架构，通过改变瓶颈形式而非宽度，在保持概念可解释性的同时，在MIMIC-IV top-50 ICD-10编码任务上达到与LAAT相当的竞争力，并显著优于传统概念瓶颈模型。
AI.motivation: 现有概念瓶颈模型（CBM）在临床文本上因窄瓶颈限制梯度流动而导致预测性能下降，需要在可解释性与预测能力之间取得更好的平衡。
AI.method: 提出ShifaMind架构，核心是乘法概念瓶颈（MCB）：使用学习到的乘法门控机制作用于概念接地表示，同时保留标量概念接口用于检测，改变了瓶颈的形式而非宽度。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-IV top-50 ICD-10编码任务上，ShifaMind在F1、AUC和排序指标上与最强基线LAAT竞争，超越其他五个ICD编码基线；相比容量匹配的Vanilla CBM，在预测性能和可解释性指标上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 瓶颈设计的形式（乘法门控）比单纯增加瓶颈宽度更能兼顾可解释性与预测性能，为临床编码中的概念接地模型提供了新的设计方向。

title: EpiGraph: A Knowledge Graph and Benchmark for Evidence-Intensive Reasoning in Epilepsy
summary: Epilepsy diagnosis and treatment require evidence-intensive reasoning across heterogeneous clinical knowledge, including biosignal patterns, genetic mechanisms, pharmacogenomics, treatment strategies, and patient outcomes. In this work, we present \textsc{EpiGraph}, a large-scale epilepsy knowledge graph and benchmark for evaluating knowledge-augmented clinical reasoning. \textsc{EpiGraph} integrates 48,166 peer-reviewed papers and seven clinical resources into a heterogeneous graph containing 24,324 entities and 32,009 evidence-grounded triplets across five clinical layers. Built upon this graph, \textsc{EpiBench} defines five clinically motivated tasks spanning clinical decision-making, EEG report generation, pharmacogenomic precision medicine, treatment recommendation, and deep research planning. We evaluate six LLMs under both standard and Graph-RAG settings. Results show that integrating \textsc{EpiGraph} consistently improves performance across all tasks, with the largest gains observed in pharmacogenomic reasoning (+30--41\%). Our findings demonstrate that structured epilepsy knowledge substantially enhances evidence-grounded clinical reasoning and provides a practical benchmark framework for evaluating knowledge-augmented LLMs in real-world neurological settings. Our code is available at: https://github.com/LabRAI/EEG-KG.

AI.tldr: EpiGraph是一个大规模癫痫知识图谱及基准测试，整合48,166篇论文和7个临床资源，构建了包含24,324个实体和32,009个证据三元组的异构图。基于此图定义的EpiBench包含五项临床任务，实验表明知识图谱增强显著提升了LLM在各项任务上的表现，尤其在药物基因组推理方面提升最大（+30-41%）。
AI.motivation: 癫痫诊断和治疗需要跨异构临床知识的证据密集型推理，但目前缺乏结构化知识图谱来系统性地整合和评估知识增强的临床推理能力。
AI.method: 构建了EpiGraph大规模癫痫知识图谱（整合48,166篇论文和7个临床资源，含24,324个实体和32,009个证据三元组，覆盖五个临床层），并基于此定义了EpiBench基准测试（五项临床任务：临床决策、脑电图报告生成、药物基因组精准医学、治疗推荐和深度研究规划），在标准设置和Graph-RAG设置下评估了六个LLM。
AI.result: 集成EpiGraph在所有任务上持续提升了LLM性能，药物基因组推理提升最大（+30-41%）。
AI.conclusion: 结构化癫痫知识显著增强了证据驱动的临床推理能力，EpiGraph为评估真实神经学场景中知识增强型LLM提供了实用的基准框架。

title: NeuralBench: A Unifying Framework to Benchmark NeuroAI Models
summary: Deep learning and large public datasets have recently catalyzed the proliferation of AI models for processing brain recordings. However, systematically evaluating these models remains a challenge: not only do the preprocessing pipelines, training and finetuning approaches largely vary across studies, but their downstream evaluation is often limited to small sets of tasks and/or datasets. Here, we present NeuralBench: a unified framework for benchmarking AI models of brain activity. We accompany this framework with NeuralBench-EEG v1.0 -- a large EEG benchmark that includes 36 electroencephalography (EEG) tasks and 14 deep learning architectures, and is evaluated on 94 datasets accessed through a standardized interface. This first EEG-focused release already highlights two main findings. First, current foundation models only marginally outperform task-specific models. Second, a large set of tasks (e.g. cognitive decoding, clinical predictions) remain highly challenging, even for the best models. Critically, NeuralBench is designed for the integration of new tasks, datasets, models, and neuroimaging modalities, as illustrated by preliminary extensions to MEG and fMRI datasets and models. Through this white paper, we invite the community to expand this open-source framework and work together toward a unified benchmarking standard for neuroimaging models.

AI.tldr: NeuralBench是一个统一的脑活动AI模型基准测试框架，当前版本(EEG v1.0)包含36个EEG任务、14种深度学习架构和94个数据集，初步结果表明基础模型仅略优于任务特定模型，且许多任务仍极具挑战性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习和大规模公开数据集推动了脑 recordings 处理AI模型的发展，但由于预处理流程、训练/微调方法各异，且下游评估常局限于少量任务/数据集，系统评估这些模型面临挑战。因此亟需一个统一的基准测试框架。
AI.method: 构建NeuralBench统一框架，发布NeuralBench-EEG v1.0基准，包含36个EEG任务、14种深度学习架构，通过标准化接口在94个数据集上进行评估。框架设计支持新任务、数据集、模型和神经影像模态（如MEG、fMRI）的扩展集成。
AI.result: 两个主要发现：1）当前基础模型仅略优于任务特定模型；2）大量任务（如认知解码、临床预测）即使对最佳模型而言仍高度挑战。
AI.conclusion: 通过该白皮书邀请社区共同扩展这一开源框架，推动神经影像模型统一基准标准的建立。

title: WindINR: Latent-State INR for Fast Local Wind Query and Correction in Complex Terrain
summary: Many downstream decisions in complex terrain require fast wind estimates at a small number of user-specified locations and heights for a given forecast valid time, rather than another dense forecast field on a fixed grid. We present WindINR, a latent-state implicit neural representation framework for continuous high-resolution local wind query and sparse-observation correction. WindINR maps static terrain descriptors, a low-resolution background field, and continuous query coordinates to a high-resolution wind state through a latent-conditioned decoder. To enable rapid inference-time correction, WindINR separates reusable representation learning from sample-specific latent-state correction. During training, a privileged encoder infers a reference latent state from high-resolution supervision, a deployable latent predictor estimates an initial latent state from inference-time inputs alone, and their discrepancies are summarized into a dataset-adaptive Gaussian prior over latent corrections. At inference time, within the WindINR module, network weights remain fixed and only the latent state is updated by minimizing a regularized correction objective using sparse observations and their uncertainty. In controlled OSSEs over the Senja region, including a UAV-aided approach scenario and random-observation robustness tests, WindINR improves local high-resolution wind estimates by updating only a compact latent state rather than the full network. The corrected representation remains continuously queryable at arbitrary coordinates and, in our CPU benchmark, yields about a $2.6\times$ online-correction speedup over full-network fine-tuning, suggesting a practical interface between kilometer-scale background products, sparse local observations, and wind queries in complex terrain.

AI.tldr: WindINR是一个隐式神经表示框架，通过分离表示学习与潜状态修正，实现复杂地形下基于稀疏观测的快速高分辨率局部风场连续查询，相比全网络微调获得约2.6倍在线修正加速。
AI.motivation: 复杂地形中许多下游决策需要在指定位置和高度快速获取风估计，而非固定网格上的稠密预报场。现有方法难以同时满足高分辨率连续查询、稀疏观测快速修正和实时性要求。
AI.method: 提出WindINR框架：1）训练阶段使用特权编码器从高分辨率监督中推断参考潜状态，可部署潜预测器从推理输入估计初始潜状态，两者差异构建数据自适应高斯先验；2）推理阶段仅更新潜状态（固定网络权重），通过正则化修正目标最小化以融合稀疏观测及其不确定性；3）解码器将静态地形描述子、低分辨率背景场和连续查询坐标映射为高分辨率风场。
AI.result: 在Senja区域的OSSE实验中，包括无人机辅助场景和随机观测鲁棒性测试，WindINR通过仅更新紧凑潜状态改善了局部高分辨率风估计；CPU基准测试中相比全网络微调获得约2.6倍在线修正加速。
AI.conclusion: WindINR提供了一种实用接口，连接公里级背景产品、稀疏局部观测与复杂地形中的风查询，兼具连续查询能力和高效在线修正优势。

title: MathConstraint: Automated Generation of Verified Combinatorial Reasoning Instances for LLMs
summary: We introduce MathConstraint, a hard, adaptive benchmark for evaluating the combinatorial reasoning capabilities of LLMs. We combine constraint satisfaction problems with rigorous solver-based verification and design an adaptive generator to create instances that remain challenging as the LLMs improve in their reasoning capabilities. Unlike existing benchmarks that quickly saturate on fixed datasets or use LLM-as-a-judge for checking solutions,MathConstraint uses parameterized problem types that enable scalable generation of arbitrarily difficult and automatically verifiable instances. We release MathConstraint-Easy ($266$ instances), on which frontier models achieve between $72.6\%$ (gemini-3.1-flash-lite) and $87.6\%$ (gpt-5.5) accuracy, and MathConstraint ($329$ instances) on which the same models drop to between $18.5\%$ (claude-4.6-sonnet) and $66.9\%$ (gpt-5.5) accuracy, demonstrating the resilience of our benchmark generator against rapid progress in LLM reasoning capabilities. We evaluate 12 frontier and open-weight models with and without access to a sandboxed Python environment that includes generic SAT/SMT solvers. Tool access roughly doubles frontier accuracy on MathConstraint (mean $+28$pp; up to $+52$pp for claude-4.6-sonnet). Further, halving the tool-call budget from $8$ to $4$ rounds erases up to $37$ points -- a sensitivity that most single-budget benchmarks miss. We release the generator, dataset, and evaluation harness as a robust environment for studying combinatorial reasoning and tool-use behavior under adversarially-tunable difficulty.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MathConstraint，一个基于约束满足问题的自适应基准，用于评估LLM的组合推理能力。通过参数化问题类型和求解器验证，生成可扩展、难度可调的实例。在12个前沿和开源模型上的实验表明，该基准对LLM能力进步具有韧性，工具访问平均提升28个百分点准确率，且工具调用预算的敏感性揭示了单预算基准的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基准存在两个主要问题：固定数据集容易饱和（模型快速达到天花板），以及使用LLM-as-a-judge的验证方式不可靠。需要一种能随LLM能力提升而自适应生成更难实例的、且验证严格的基准。
AI.method: 将约束满足问题与基于求解器的严格验证相结合，设计自适应生成器，通过参数化问题类型实现任意难度实例的可扩展生成。包含两个难度等级：MathConstraint-Easy（266实例）和MathConstraint（329实例）。评估了12个模型，并考察了沙箱Python环境（含SAT/SMT求解器）的工具访问和工具调用预算的影响。
AI.result: MathConstraint-Easy上模型准确率72.6%-87.6%，MathConstraint上降至18.5%-66.9%。工具访问平均提升28个百分点（最高+52pp）。工具调用预算从8轮减至4轮，准确率下降最多37个百分点。
AI.conclusion: MathConstraint是一个对LLM能力进步具有韧性的组合推理基准；工具访问显著提升性能，但工具预算的敏感性是一个被现有单预算基准忽略的重要维度。

title: A Game Theoretic Free Energy Analysis of Higher Order Synergy in Attention Heads of Large Language Models
comment: this manuscript has been submitted to Neural Networks
summary: Large language models rely on multihead attention, but interactions among heads remain poorly understood. We apply the Game Theoretic Free Energy Principle (GTFEP): a framework casting multiagent systems as distributed variational inference to analyze attention heads as bounded rational agents. According to GTFEP, each head minimizes its variational free energy, and collective behavior follows a Gibbs distribution over coalition structures whose energy is decomposed into Harsanyi dividends. Using a tractable approximation (uniform prior, deterministic dynamics), coalition free energy reduces to joint Shannon entropy of discretized head outputs (argmax key index). Pairwise dividends become mutual information (nonnegative), while triple dividends correspond to interaction information and can be negative. On BERT, GPT2, and Llama with GSM8K, triple dividends are consistently negative, revealing higher order redundancy. The Nash FEP correspondence guarantees that stationary points of collective free energy are epsilon Nash equilibria; thus, heads with negligible contribution can be pruned with minimal performance loss. Pruning heads with low marginal contribution reduces computational cost with minimal performance loss: for example, pruning 20% of heads in GPT2 reduces FLOPs by 18%, increases throughput by 22%, and raises perplexity only modestly (from 28.4 to 33.4 on GSM8K). Our work shows GTFEP provides a principled foundation for analyzing and optimizing transformer architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文应用博弈论自由能原理(GTFEP)将多头注意力机制中的注意力头建模为有限理性智能体，通过变分推断分析头间相互作用。研究发现三元组交互信息一致为负（高阶冗余），并基于Nash-FEP对应给出剪枝策略：在GPT2上剪枝20%的头可减少18% FLOPs、提升22%吞吐量，仅造成轻微性能损失。
AI.motivation: 多头注意力中头间相互作用机制尚不清晰，缺乏 principled 的理论框架进行分析和优化。
AI.method: 将GTFEP应用于多头注意力分析，将每个注意力头视为最小化变分自由能的有限理性智能体；通过均匀先验和确定性动力学近似，将联盟自由能简化为离散化头输出的联合香农熵；使用Harsanyi红利分解能量，配对红利对应互信息，三元红利对应交互信息。
AI.result: 在BERT、GPT2和Llama上的GSM8K实验中，三元红利一致为负，表明高阶冗余存在；Nash-FEP对应保证集体自由能驻点是epsilon纳什均衡；剪枝低边际贡献的头可有效降低计算开销。
AI.conclusion: GTFEP为分析和优化Transformer架构提供了原则性的理论基础。

title: Scaling Limits of Long-Context Transformers
summary: We study the long-context limit of softmax self-attention with a fixed query and a random context of $n$ i.i.d. keys on the sphere, viewing the inverse temperature $β_n$ as the scaling parameter that decides whether attention degenerates into uniform averaging or collapses onto the single closest key. We show that the critical scale at which selectivity emerges is determined by the local exponent of the distance-to-query distribution near zero rather than by global features of the context, and scales like $β_n^\ast \asymp n^{2/(d-1)}$ for uniform keys on $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$. Furthermore, we characterize the limiting laws of the ordered attention weights and of the attention output across all regimes of $β_n$: a subcritical regime in which the output reduces to a local average around $q$ with explicit deterministic bias and Gaussian fluctuations; a critical regime in which a finite collection of nearest keys retains macroscopic mass without single-key collapse; and a supercritical regime in which all mass concentrates on the closest key. Of notable interest is the subcritical case with identity value matrix where the attention map approximately implements a backward heat equation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了softmax自注意力在长上下文极限下的行为，分析了逆温度β_n如何决定注意力从均匀平均退化为单键坍缩的临界尺度，并刻画了不同β_n regimes下的注意力权重和输出的极限定律。
AI.motivation: 理解softmax自注意力在长上下文（大量key）下的行为机制，特别是选择性的出现条件，以及注意力退化为均匀平均或坍缩到最近key的临界尺度。
AI.method: 理论分析：固定query，随机i.i.d. key（球面上均匀分布），以逆温度β_n为缩放参数，通过距离-query分布的局部指数来研究临界尺度，并分亚临界、临界、超临界三个regime进行极限定律刻画。
AI.result: 1) 选择性出现的临界尺度β_n^* ≍ n^{2/(d-1)}，由距离-query分布近零处的局部指数决定；2) 亚临界：输出退化为q附近的局部平均，具有确定性偏差和高斯波动；3) 临界：有限个最近key保留宏观质量，但不坍缩到单一key；4) 超临界：全部质量集中到最近key；5) 亚临界下identity value矩阵时，注意力映射近似实现反向热方程。
AI.conclusion: softmax注意力的行为由逆温度与上下文长度的相对缩放关系决定，存在明确的相变行为，且亚临界区的注意力映射与反向热方程有深刻联系。

title: Weighted Rules under the Stable Model Semantics
summary: We introduce the concept of weighted rules under the stable model semantics following the log-linear models of Markov Logic. This provides versatile methods to overcome the deterministic nature of the stable model semantics, such as resolving inconsistencies in answer set programs, ranking stable models, associating probability to stable models, and applying statistical inference to computing weighted stable models. We also present formal comparisons with related formalisms, such as answer set programs, Markov Logic, ProbLog, and P-log.

AI.tldr: 本文在稳定模型语义下引入了基于马尔可夫逻辑的对数线性模型的加权规则概念，提供了克服稳定模型语义确定性的多种方法，包括解决答案集程序中的不一致性、对稳定模型进行排序、关联概率以及应用统计推断。并与答案集程序、马尔可夫逻辑、ProbLog和P-log等相关形式体系进行了形式化比较。
AI.motivation: 稳定模型语义具有确定性特征，难以处理不确定性、不一致性以及概率推理等问题。因此，作者希望引入加权规则来赋予稳定模型语义概率解释，以增强其表达能力和实用性。
AI.method: 借鉴马尔可夫逻辑中的对数线性模型（log-linear models），在稳定模型语义中引入加权规则；通过与答案集程序、马尔可夫逻辑、ProbLog、P-log等形式体系的形式化比较来展示其特性。
AI.result: 提出了加权稳定模型的概念框架，能够有效解决答案集程序中的不一致性、实现稳定模型的排序与概率赋值，并支持统计推断。
AI.conclusion: 加权稳定模型是一种融合了马尔可夫逻辑概率特性和稳定模型语义逻辑特性的有效框架，拓展了答案集程序在不确定性和概率推理方面的应用能力。

title: Learning Polyhedral Conformal Sets for Robust Optimization
summary: Robust optimization (RO) provides a principled framework for decision-making under uncertainty, but its performance critically depends on the choice of the uncertainty set. While large sets ensure reliability, they often lead to overly conservative decisions, whereas small sets risk excluding the true outcome. Recent data-driven approaches, particularly conformal prediction, offer finite-sample validity guarantees but remain largely task-agnostic, ignoring the downstream decision structure. In this paper, we propose a decision-aware conformal framework that learns uncertainty sets tailored to robust optimization objectives. Our approach parameterizes a flexible family of polyhedral sets via data-driven hyperplanes and learns their geometry by directly minimizing the induced robust loss, while preserving statistical validity through conformal calibration. To correct for data-dependent selection, we incorporate a re-calibration step on an independent dataset to restore coverage. The resulting sets capture directional and anisotropic uncertainty aligned with the decision objective while remaining computationally tractable. We provide finite-sample coverage guarantees and bounds on the sub-optimality gap to an oracle decision. This work bridges the gap between statistical validity and decision optimality, providing a principled framework for data-driven robust optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种决策感知的共形框架，通过数据驱动超平面参数化多面体不确定集，并直接最小化鲁棒损失来学习几何形状，同时通过共形校准和独立数据集重校准保证统计有效性，从而在鲁棒优化中兼顾决策最优性与统计有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒优化中不确定集的选择存在保守性与可靠性之间的权衡，而数据驱动的共形预测方法虽提供有限样本有效性保证，但忽视了任务特定的下游决策结构，导致无法针对决策目标自适应地学习不确定集。
AI.method: 采用数据驱动超平面参数化灵活的多面体集族，通过直接最小化诱导的鲁棒损失来学习不确定集的几何形状；利用共形校准保持统计有效性，并在独立数据集上引入重校准步骤以修正数据依赖选择带来的偏差。
AI.result: 提供了有限样本覆盖保证，并给出了与oracle决策之间的次优性差距上界；所得到的不确定集能够捕获与决策目标对齐的方向性和各向异性不确定性，同时保持计算可处理性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架弥合了统计有效性与决策最优性之间的鸿沟，为数据驱动的鲁棒优化提供了原则性框架。

title: Functional Stable Model Semantics and Answer Set Programming Modulo Theories
summary: Recently there has been an increasing interest in incorporating ``intensional'' functions in answer set programming. Intensional functions are those whose values can be described by other functions and predicates, rather than being pre-defined as in the standard answer set programming. We demonstrate that the functional stable model semantics plays an important role in the framework of ``Answer Set Programming Modulo Theories (ASPMT)'' -- a tight integration of answer set programming and satisfiability modulo theories, under which existing integration approaches can be viewed as special cases where the role of functions is limited. We show that ``tight'' ASPMT programs can be translated into SMT instances, which is similar to the known relationship between ASP and SAT.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了内涵函数在回答集编程（ASP）中的重要性，展示了功能稳定模型语义在"模理论回答集编程（ASPMT）"框架中的关键作用，并证明"紧"ASPMT程序可以转化为SMT实例，类似于ASP与SAT之间的关系。
AI.motivation: 将内涵函数引入回答集编程（ASP）的兴趣日益增长，但现有整合方法中函数的角色受到限制，需要更统一的理论框架来整合ASP和SMT。
AI.method: 通过ASPMT框架将内涵函数的稳定模型语义与SMT理论整合，证明"紧"ASPMT程序可转化为SMT实例。
AI.result: 证明了功能稳定模型语义在ASPMT框架中的核心作用，并建立了紧ASPMT程序到SMT实例的转化关系。
AI.conclusion: ASPMT为ASP和SMT的整合提供了统一框架，内涵函数的引入扩展了ASP的表达能力，紧程序与SMT的转化关系为实际求解提供了理论基础。

title: MoMo: Conditioned Contrastive Representation Learning for Preference-Modulated Planning
summary: Temporally contrastive representation learning induces a latent structure capable of reducing long-horizon planning to inference in a low-dimensional linear system. However, existing contrastive planning work learns a single latent geometry which cannot distinguish multiple valid behaviors trading task efficiency against risk exposure for the same start-goal query. We introduce MoMo, a preference-conditioned contrastive planner allowing a scalar user preference to continuously modulate plan conservativeness at inference time, without retraining. MoMo learns a joint conditioning of the representation geometry and latent prediction operator via Feature-Wise Linear Modulation and low-rank neural modulation, respectively. We show that our formulation preserves the probability density ratio encoded in the representation space that is required for inference-driven contrastive planning, further retaining its inference-time efficiency. Across six environments, MoMo smoothly adapts plan safety according to user preferences, yielding improved temporal and preferential consistency over state augmentation baselines.

AI.tldr: MoMo是一种偏好条件化的对比规划器，通过在表示几何和潜在预测算子中引入标量用户偏好调制，实现推理时连续控制计划保守程度，无需重新训练，在六个环境中展现出优于状态增强基线的时序和偏好一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有对比规划方法学习单一潜在几何结构，无法区分同一开始-目标查询下多个有效行为（如任务效率与风险暴露之间的权衡），缺乏对用户偏好的灵活适应能力。
AI.method: MoMo通过特征级线性调制（FiLM）学习联合条件化的表示几何结构，并通过低秩神经调制学习条件化的潜在预测算子，在保留对比规划所需概率密度比的同时，实现推理时偏好连续调节。
AI.result: 在六个环境中，MoMo根据用户偏好平滑适应计划安全性，在时序一致性和偏好一致性方面均优于状态增强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MoMo证明了偏好条件化对比规划的有效性，能够在保持推理效率的同时实现计划保守程度的连续调控，为长时域规划中行为多样性与用户偏好对齐提供了可行方案。

title: Cplus2ASP: Computing Action Language C+ in Answer Set Programming
summary: We present Version 2 of system Cplus2ASP, which implements the definite fragment of action language C+. Its input language is fully compatible with the language of the Causal Calculator Version 2, but the new system is significantly faster thanks to modern answer set solving techniques. The translation implemented in the system is a composition of several recent theoretical results. The system orchestrates a tool chain, consisting of f2lp, clingo, iclingo, and as2transition. Under the incremental execution mode, the system translates a C+ description into the input language of iclingo, exploiting its incremental grounding mechanism. The correctness of this execution is justified by the module theorem extended to programs with nested expressions. In addition, the input language of the system has many useful features, such as external atoms by means of Lua calls and the user interactive mode. The system supports extensible multi-modal translations for other action languages, such as B and BC, as well.

AI.tldr: Cplus2ASP Version 2 实现了动作语言 C+ 的确定性子集，通过现代回答集求解技术（f2lp、clingo、iclingo、as2transition 工具链）大幅提升性能，支持增量执行、Lua 外部原子、用户交互模式，并可扩展支持其他动作语言（B、BC）。
AI.motivation: Causal Calculator Version 2 速度慢，需要更高效的实现方案。
AI.method: 将多种理论成果组合为翻译流程，采用 f2lp → clingo/iclingo → as2transition 工具链；利用 iclingo 增量接地机制，以模块定理（含嵌套表达式扩展）保证正确性。
AI.result: 新系统显著快于 Causal Calculator Version 2，支持 Lua 外部原子、用户交互模式，并能扩展支持动作语言 B 和 BC。
AI.conclusion: Cplus2ASP Version 2 通过集成现代 ASP 求解技术，在保持与 Causal Calculator Version 2 完全兼容的同时实现了性能飞跃，并具备良好的可扩展性。

title: Quantile-Coupled Flow Matching for Distributional Reinforcement Learning
summary: Unlike standard expected-return Reinforcement Learning (RL), Distributional RL (DRL) models the full return distribution, making it better-suited for uncertainty-aware and risk-sensitive decision-making. Conditional Flow Matching (CFM) critics have recently attracted attention for modelling continuous, multi-modal return distributions. Despite this interest, there remains a substantial metric mismatch: DRL theory relies on the distributional Bellman operator being contractive in the $p$-Wasserstein distance, yet existing CFM critics are trained with arbitrary source-target couplings, so their flow-matching losses are not Wasserstein-aligned surrogates for matching Bellman target return distributions. In this work, we address this mismatch by proposing FlowIQN, a CFM critic that sorts source and Bellman target samples within each mini-batch to approximate the monotone optimal transport coupling, replacing arbitrary pairings with quantile-aligned flow paths. We prove that the loss of our quantile-coupled CFM critic yields a Wasserstein-aligned approximate projection compatible with the foundations of DRL. To our knowledge, FlowIQN is the first flow-matching distributional critic with an explicit Wasserstein-aligned projection guarantee. We further extend FlowIQN with shortcut models for efficient inference. Empirical results show that FlowIQN improves Wasserstein return-distribution accuracy over other CFM critics. It also yields competitive performance on offline RL benchmarks across multiple policy extraction methods, providing a theoretically grounded CFM critic that is readily compatible with DRL pipelines. Code: https://github.com/ori-goals/flowIQN.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 FlowIQN，一种基于条件流匹配的分位数耦合分布 critic，通过排序源样本与 Bellman 目标样本以近似最优传输耦合，使流匹配损失与 Wasserstein 距离对齐，解决了现有 CFM critic 在分布强化学习中缺乏 Wasserstein 投影保证的度量不匹配问题。实验表明 FlowIQN 在 Wasserstein 返回分布精度和离线 RL 基准上均优于其他 CFM critic。
AI.motivation: 现有 CFM critic 在训练时使用任意的源-目标配对，其流匹配损失不是与 Wasserstein 距离对齐的替代目标，这与分布强化学习中分布 Bellman 算子在 p-Wasserstein 距离下收缩的理论基础存在度量不匹配。
AI.method: 提出 FlowIQN，在每个 mini-batch 内对源样本和 Bellman 目标样本进行排序以近似单调最优传输耦合，用分位数对齐的流路径替代任意配对；并引入 shortcut model 提高推理效率。
AI.result: FlowIQN 在 Wasserstein 返回分布精度上优于其他 CFM critic，在离线 RL 基准测试中通过多种策略提取方法均取得有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: FlowIQN 是首个具有显式 Wasserstein 对齐投影保证的流匹配分布 critic，为 DRL 流水线提供了理论基础的 CFM critic。

title: LLM-Guided Monte Carlo Tree Search over Knowledge Graphs: Composing Mechanistic Explanations for Drug-Disease Pairs
comment: Accepted at IJCAI-ECAI 2026. 9 pages (7 content + 2 references), 5 figures, 3 tables. Includes supplementary material (26 pages)
summary: Extracting multi-step explanations from knowledge graphs poses a combinatorial challenge requiring both heuristic guidance (as candidates proliferate with depth) and credit assignment (as path quality emerges over extended sequences). Frontier LLMs, strong on knowledge/reasoning benchmarks, offer a compelling source of such heuristics, yet their knowledge comes sans guarantees and compositional performance degrades as chains lengthen. We thus present TESSERA, a 3-part neuro-symbolic framework that uses LLMs in a circumscribed role: for local discriminative judgement rather than autonomous multi-step generation; the knowledge graph then defines the hypothesis space enforcing hard structural constraints, and MCTS coordinates the long-horizon search with principled credit assignment via backpropagation. LLMs perform dual roles as a prior policy biasing exploration and a comparative state evaluator supplying reward signals. Evaluation on drug mechanism elucidation across two complementary knowledge graphs demonstrates fidelity to curated biology while surfacing coherent alternative mechanisms, with ablations confirming discriminative contribution from both LLM components. Beyond its current application, our framework offers a general paradigm for compositional reasoning over structured knowledge.

AI.tldr: TESSERA是一个神经符号框架，结合LLM的局部判别能力与知识图谱的硬结构约束及MCTS的长程搜索，用于从知识图谱中提取多步解释，在药物机制阐释任务上展现了高保真度和发现替代机制的能力。
AI.motivation: 从知识图谱中提取多步解释面临组合爆炸（候选路径随深度指数增长）和信用分配（路径质量需在长序列中才能显现）两大挑战。前沿LLM在知识和推理基准上表现优异，可作为启发式来源，但其知识缺乏保证且组合性能随链长退化，因此需要一种将LLM局限在局部判别判断而非自主多步生成的框架。
AI.method: TESSERA是一个三部分神经符号框架：(1) LLM承担双重角色——作为先验策略指导探索偏好的"先验策略"和提供奖励信号的"比较状态评估器"；(2) 知识图谱定义假设空间，强制执行硬结构约束；(3) MCTS协调长程搜索，通过反向传播实现原则性信用分配。LLM仅在局部判别判断中发挥作用，而非自主多步生成。
AI.result: 在两个互补知识图谱上的药物机制阐释任务中，TESSERA展现出对已整理生物知识的高保真度，同时发现了连贯的替代机制。消融实验证实了两个LLM组件（先验策略和比较状态评估器）的判别性贡献。
AI.conclusion: TESSERA为结构化知识上的组合推理提供了一种通用范式，超越了当前药物机制发现的应用场景。

title: A Deep Risk Estimator for Known Operator Learning
summary: We describe an approach for estimating the statistical risk of deep networks that contain a mix of learned and known operators. Building on the maximal training error bounds previously established for known operator learning, we derive a deep risk estimator that connects the expected error of a layered network to the size of the training sample. The estimator decomposes the total risk into a sum over learned layers; every known operator contributes zero to this sum, while every learned layer adds an approximation term inspired by Barron's classic work and an estimation term that decreases with the number of training samples. We are able to show that the bound shrinks whenever a learned layer is replaced by a known operator and that the corresponding sample requirement scales with the number of trainable parameters of the layer that is replaced. As an application, we use computed tomography as an example and compare an operator-aware filtered backprojection network with a fully connected substitute that collapses the entire reconstruction pipeline into a single learned dense matrix. The predicted parameter ratio coincides with the structural sparsity that the analytic decomposition into a circulant filter and a sparse backprojection exposes. We confirm the predicted scaling on CPU at small image scale and on GPU at medium image scale, all on the same scaling law. Beyond CT reconstruction, the estimator applies to physics-informed neural networks that hardcode a known physical operation in its architecture, and we expect the result to be of interest for a broad community working on operator-aware deep learning. Calibrating the per-layer constants on each sweep yields a bound that tracks the empirical test MSE within a factor of two at every training-set size, so the estimator can be inverted to predict how many training samples are required to reach a target error.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于估计混合了学习型与已知算子深度网络统计风险的框架。通过将总风险分解为各层的贡献（已知算子贡献为零，学习层贡献基于Barron理论的近似项和随样本量递减的估计项），推导出风险估计器。该估计器在层替换时边界收缩，样本需求与替换层的可训练参数数量成比例。在CT重建中，算子感知的滤波反投影网络与全连接网络的参数比验证了理论预测，且估计器能高精度跟踪测试MSE，可逆推所需训练样本量。
AI.motivation: 现有深度网络风险估计方法主要针对纯学习型网络，而混合了已知算子（如物理模型、数学变换）与学习算子的网络缺乏系统的统计风险分析。作者旨在建立一种能显式量化已知算子对降低样本复杂度贡献的理论框架，为算子感知深度学习提供理论基础。
AI.method: 基于最大训练误差界，将总风险分解为各层的加和：已知算子贡献为零，学习层贡献包括Barron型近似项和随训练样本数递减的估计项。通过理论推导证明用已知算子替换学习层时风险界收缩，且样本复杂度与替换层的可训练参数数量线性相关。在CT重建中，将滤波反投影网络（含已知算子）与全连接网络对比，验证参数比与结构稀疏性一致。
AI.result: 理论结果表明风险界随已知算子替换而收缩，样本需求与替换层可训练参数数成比例。实验上，在CT重建任务中，算子感知网络的参数比与理论预测一致；在小尺度CPU和中尺度GPU上均验证了相同的缩放律。校准每层常数后，估计器可在所有训练集大小下将测试MSE的预测误差控制在两倍以内。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的深度风险估计器为混合学习/已知算子的网络提供了有效的风险量化工具，能准确预测样本需求并跟踪测试误差。该框架适用于物理信息神经网络等广泛领域，对算子感知深度学习社区具有重要价值。

title: TIDE-Bench: Task-Aware and Diagnostic Evaluation of Tool-Integrated Reasoning
summary: Tool-integrated reasoning has emerged as a promising paradigm for enhancing large language models with external computation, retrieval, and execution capabilities. However, the field still lacks a high-quality and unified evaluation benchmark, and existing TIR evaluations remain limited in dataset quality, task diversity, diagnostic comprehensiveness, and evaluation efficiency. In this work, we introduce TIDE-Bench, a holistic and efficient benchmark for evaluating TIR methods, featuring three key advantages. First, it provides diverse task settings, combining widely used mathematical reasoning and knowledge-intensive QA tasks with two newly designed tasks, namely the tool-grounded experimental design task and the dynamic interactive task, to probe models' abilities in complex tool invocation and multi-tool coordination. Second, TIDE-Bench adopts a comprehensive yet task-aware evaluation protocol, jointly measuring final answer quality, process reliability, tool-use efficiency, and inference cost across heterogeneous task settings. Third, TIDE-Bench constructs high-quality and discriminative evaluation sets by filtering low-discrimination instances from existing datasets, substantially reducing evaluation cost while focusing on more challenging samples. Extensive experiments on multiple foundation models and TIR methods reveal persistent bottlenecks in tool grounding, offering insights for future TIR research.

AI.tldr: TIDE-Bench是一个高质量、统一且高效的基准测试，用于评估大语言模型的工具集成推理能力，涵盖多样化任务、全面评估协议和高区分度数据集。
AI.motivation: 当前工具集成推理领域缺乏高质量、统一的评估基准，现有评估在数据集质量、任务多样性、诊断全面性和评估效率方面存在局限。
AI.method: TIDE-Bench通过三个关键优势实现：1）多样化任务设置（数学推理、知识密集型QA、工具接地实验设计、动态交互任务）；2）综合且任务感知的评估协议（最终答案质量、过程可靠性、工具使用效率、推理成本）；3）通过过滤低区分度样本来构建高质量、高区分度的评估集。
AI.result: 在多种基础模型和TIR方法上的大量实验揭示了工具接地方面持续存在的瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: TIDE-Bench为TIR研究提供了全面的评估框架，揭示了当前方法在工具接地上的不足，为未来研究提供了方向性见解。

title: SeBA: Semi-supervised few-shot learning via Separated-at-Birth Alignment for tabular data
summary: Learning from scarce labeled data with a larger pool of unlabeled samples, known as semi-supervised few-shot learning (SS-FSL), remains critical for applications involving tabular data in domains like medicine, finance, and science. The existing SS-FSL methods often rely on self-supervised learning (SSL) frameworks developed for vision or language, which assume the availability of a natural form of data augmentations. For tabular data, defining meaningful augmentations is non-trivial and can easily distort semantics, limiting the effectiveness of conventional SSL. In this work, we rethink SSL for tabular data and propose Separated-at-Birth Alignment (SeBA), a joint-embedding framework for SS-FSL that eliminates the dependence on augmentations. Our core idea is to separate the data into two independent, but complementary views and align the representations of one view to mirror the nearest-neighbor correspondence of the data in the second view. Our experimental evaluation supported by a theoretical analysis justifies that SeBA generates an output space, which improves the feature-label relationship. An experimental study conducted in various benchmark datasets demonstrates that SeBA achieves the state-of-the-art performance in the majority of cases, opening a new avenue for SS-FSL paradigm in the domain of tabular data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SeBA（Separated-at-Birth Alignment），一种无需数据增强的联合嵌入框架，用于表格数据的半监督小样本学习（SS-FSL），通过将数据分离为两个独立但互补的视图，并对齐一个视图的表征以镜像另一视图的最近邻对应关系，在多数基准数据集上实现了最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有SS-FSL方法依赖为视觉或语言领域设计的自监督学习框架，这些框架假设存在自然的数据增强方式。但对于表格数据，定义有意义的增强并非易事，容易扭曲语义，限制了传统自监督学习的有效性。因此需要一种不依赖数据增强的SS-FSL方法。
AI.method: 提出Separated-at-Birth Alignment (SeBA)框架，核心思想是将数据分离为两个独立但互补的视图，然后对齐一个视图的表征，使其镜像另一视图中数据的最近邻对应关系，从而消除对数据增强的依赖。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，SeBA在大多数情况下达到了最先进的性能。同时，理论分析验证了SeBA生成的输出空间能够改善特征-标签关系。
AI.conclusion: SeBA为表格数据的SS-FSL范式开辟了新途径，验证了无需数据增强的联合嵌入框架在该领域的有效性。

title: PDEAgent-Bench: A Multi-Metric, Multi-Library Benchmark for PDE Solver Generation
summary: PDE-to-solver code generation aims to automatically synthesize executable numerical solvers from partial differential equation (PDE) specifications. This task requires not only understanding the mathematical structure of PDEs, but also selecting appropriate discretization schemes and solver configurations, and correctly implementing the resulting formulations in finite-element method (FEM) libraries. Existing code generation benchmarks mainly evaluate syntactic correctness, or success on predefined test cases. To our knowledge, there is currently no publicly available benchmark specifically for PDE-to-solver code generation, and general-purpose code benchmarks do not fully capture the unique challenges of numerical PDE solution, such as ensuring solver accuracy, efficiency, and compatibility with professional FEM libraries. We introduce PDEAgent-Bench, to the best of our knowledge, the first multi-metric, multi-library benchmark for PDE-to-solver code generation. PDEAgent-Bench contains 645 instances across 6 mathematical categories and 11 PDE families, with common FEM libraries for DOLFINx, Firedrake, and deal.II. Each instance provides an agent-facing problem specification, a reference solution on a prescribed evaluation grid, and case-specific accuracy and runtime targets. PDEAgent-Bench adopts a staged evaluation framework in which generated solvers must sequentially pass executability, numerical accuracy, and computational efficiency checks. Experiments with representative LLMs and code agents show that models can often produce runnable code, but their pass rate drops substantially once accuracy and efficiency requirements are enforced. These results indicate that current agents remain limited in producing numerically reliable and efficient PDE solvers, and that PDEAgent-Bench provides a reproducible testbed grounded in the practical requirements of numerical PDE solving.

AI.tldr: PDEAgent-Bench是首个面向PDE到求解器代码生成任务的基准测试，包含645个实例、6个数学类别、11个PDE族，支持DOLFINx、Firedrake和deal.II三种FEM库，采用分阶段评估框架依次检查可执行性、数值精度和计算效率。实验表明现有LLM和代码智能体虽能生成可运行代码，但在精度和效率约束下通过率大幅下降。
AI.motivation: 现有代码生成基准主要评估语法正确性或预定义测试用例的通过率，缺乏专门针对PDE到求解器代码生成的基准。通用代码基准无法充分捕捉数值PDE求解的独特挑战（如求解精度、效率和与专业FEM库的兼容性），因此需要构建一个覆盖多指标、多库的专用基准。
AI.method: 构建了包含645个实例的基准，覆盖6个数学类别和11个PDE族；每个实例提供面向智能体的问题描述、参考解以及精度和运行时间目标；采用分阶段评估框架：先检查可执行性，再验证数值精度，最后评估计算效率；支持DOLFINx、Firedrake和deal.II三种常见FEM库。
AI.result: 代表LLM和代码智能体通常能生成可运行代码，但一旦施加精度和效率要求，通过率显著下降，表明当前智能体在生成数值可靠且高效的PDE求解器方面仍存在局限。
AI.conclusion: PDEAgent-Bench提供了一个基于数值PDE求解实际需求的可复现测试平台，揭示了现有代码智能体在PDE求解器生成任务上的不足，为未来研究提供了标准化评估基准。

title: FlashEvolve: Accelerating Agent Self-Evolution with Asynchronous Stage Orchestration
summary: LLM-based evolution has emerged as a promising way to improve agents by refining non-parametric artifacts, but its wall-clock cost remains a major bottleneck. We identify that this cost comes from synchronized stage execution and imbalance inside each LLM-heavy stage. We present FlashEvolve, an efficient framework that replaces synchronized execution with asynchronous workers and queues, allowing different stages and steps to overlap. To handle data staleness introduced by asynchrony, FlashEvolve tracks artifact versions and applies different policies to update, discard, or patch stale artifacts. Unlike weight-space staleness in asynchronous RL, language-space staleness is inspectable and repairable: a stale artifact is not just delayed work, but readable evidence that the LLM can reflect on, revise, and turn into useful evolution signal. FlashEvolve further improves throughput and token efficiency with speculative stage completion and adaptive workflow control. On GEPA workloads, FlashEvolve improves proposal throughput by $3.5\times$ on local vLLM and $4.9\times$ on API serving over synchronous GEPA. The same design also applies to ACE and Meta-Harness.

AI.tldr: FlashEvolve是一个异步进化框架，通过工作流解耦和异步并行（带版本跟踪的队列）将LLM进化的吞吐量提升3.5-4.9倍，同时利用语言空间中延迟工件可检查和可修复的特性来处理数据陈旧性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的进化方法虽然能有效改进智能体中的非参数工件，但其同步执行的壁钟时间成本成为主要瓶颈。作者识别出该成本来源于同步的阶段执行和各LLM密集型阶段内部的不平衡。
AI.method: 提出FlashEvolve框架，核心思想是将同步执行替换为异步工作器和队列，使不同阶段和步骤能够重叠执行。针对异步性带来的数据陈旧性，FlashEvolve跟踪工件版本，并应用更新、丢弃或修补陈旧工件等不同策略。利用语言空间中陈旧工件可检查和可修复的特性（不同于权重空间），通过LLM反思和修正陈旧工件。此外还包含推测性阶段完成和自适应工作流控制以提升吞吐量和token效率。
AI.result: 在GEPA工作负载上，FlashEvolve在本地vLLM上实现3.5倍的提案吞吐量提升，在API服务上实现4.9倍的提升。该设计同样适用于ACE和Meta-Harness。
AI.conclusion: 通过异步化工作流和善用语言空间的可检查特性，可以显著提升LLM进化框架的效率，为大规模智能体优化提供了更实用的方案。

title: Workspace Optimization: How to Train Your Agent
summary: Modern agents built on frontier language models often cannot adapt their weights. What, then, remains trainable? We argue it is the agent's \emph{workspace}, the structured external substrate it reads, writes, and tests; we call its evolution workspace optimization. Workspace optimization targets hard multi-turn environments where a frontier model has strong priors but cannot solve the task in a single shot, so the agent must learn through interaction. We propose a principled way to evolve the workspace, mirroring the structure of weight-space training: artifacts in place of parameters, evidence in place of data, counterexamples in place of losses, and textual feedback in place of gradients. We instantiate the idea in DreamTeam, a multi-agent harness for ARC-AGI-3 whose roles build an executable world model, plan, hypothesize, probe, strategize, and route failures. On the current 25-game ARC-AGI-3 public set under the official scoring protocol and averaged over two independent runs, DreamTeam improves the SOTA protocol-matched agent's score from 36% to 38.4%, while using 31% fewer environment actions per game.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"工作空间优化"概念，通过演化智能体的外部结构化工作空间（而非权重）来提升性能。DreamTeam在ARC-AGI-3上将SOTA从36%提升至38.4%，同时减少31%的环境动作。
AI.motivation: 前沿语言模型构建的智能体通常无法调整自身权重，需要探索其他可训练部分。作者认为智能体的"工作空间"（读写测试的外部结构化基质）是可行的训练目标。
AI.method: 提出工作空间优化（workspace optimization）方法，将权重空间训练的结构映射到工作空间：工件代替参数，证据代替数据，反例代替损失，文本反馈代替梯度。实例化为DreamTeam，一个用于ARC-AGI-3的多智能体框架，包含执行世界模型构建、规划、假设、探测、策略和故障路由等角色。
AI.result: 在ARC-AGI-3公开集上，DreamTeam将SOTA协议匹配智能体的得分从36%提升至38.4%（两次独立运行平均），同时每个游戏使用的环境动作减少31%。
AI.conclusion: 工作空间优化是一种有前景的范式，能够在无法调整权重的情况下通过学习交互来提升智能体性能，特别是在硬多轮环境中效果显著。

title: Skill-CMIB: Multimodal Agent Skill for Consistent Action via Conditional Multimodal Information Bottleneck
summary: While LLM-based agents excel at planning and executing long action sequences, their execution often remains inconsistent across trials, limiting reliability. Consolidating agent consistency requires distilling trial-error trajectories into reusable skills that preserve task-relevant invariants while discarding trajectory-specific noise. However, in multimodal settings, the key challenge is not only that useful invariants are distributed across vision and language information, but that different modalities support different kinds of reusable skill content: while some skills are verbalizable and interpretable, others reside in perceptual evidence beyond text. Text-only skills may lose perceptual cues, whereas storing text and perception naively introduces redundancy and noise. Existing inference-time methods, such as self-consistency, improve reliability through costly multi-sample decoding, while internalization strategies lack a way to separate verbalizable skill content from residual perceptual information. To address this, we introduce Conditional Multimodal Information Bottleneck (CMIB), a method for multimodal skill construction. CMIB begins with a joint bottleneck over multimodal skills and derives an exact sequential decomposition: (1) a text-stage bottleneck distilling interpretable skill cards, and (2) a conditional multimodal bottleneck compressing only residual information in perception that remains predictive beyond text. Unlike naive two-stream formulations, CMIB explicitly conditions the multimodal latent on the text skill, thus structurally reducing cross-modal redundancy and enabling independent control over textual and perceptual compression. We instantiate CMIB with a variational objective that makes its conditional decomposition tractable to optimize, yielding reusable multimodal skills that improve execution stability without incurring multi-sample inference overhead.

AI.tldr: 提出条件多模态信息瓶颈（CMIB）方法，通过可分解的文本技能卡和条件多模态压缩，从试错轨迹中提取可复用的多模态技能，提升LLM智能体执行稳定性，避免多采样推理开销。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体在执行长序列动作时跨试验不一致，现有方法（自一致性需多采样解码成本高，内化策略无法分离可语言化技能与感知信息）缺乏有效从多模态轨迹中提取可复用技能的手段。
AI.method: 提出条件多模态信息瓶颈（CMIB），包含两阶段分解：(1)文本阶段瓶颈蒸馏可解释技能卡；(2)条件多模态瓶颈压缩文本之外仍有预测力的残留感知信息。通过变分目标优化条件分解，显式以文本技能为条件减少跨模态冗余。
AI.result: 生成可复用的多模态技能，提升执行稳定性，且无需多采样推理开销。
AI.conclusion: CMIB通过结构化减少跨模态冗余并独立控制文本与感知压缩，有效提升智能体执行一致性，优于现有方法。

title: CodeClinic: Evaluating Automation of Coding Skills for Clinical Reasoning Agents
summary: Clinical reasoning agents based on large language models (LLMs) aim to automate tasks such as intensive care unit (ICU) monitoring and patient state tracking from electronic health records (EHRs). Existing systems typically rely on manually curated clinical tools or skills for concepts such as sepsis detection and organ failure assessment. However, maintaining these tool libraries requires substantial expert effort, while zero-shot querying or code generation often produces inefficient and unreliable reasoning chains, especially under institution-specific clinical policies. We introduce CodeClinic, a benchmark built on MIMIC-IV for evaluating whether LLM agents can synthesize and compose reusable clinical skills instead of relying on fixed toolboxes. The benchmark contains two complementary tasks: longitudinal ICU surveillance and compositional information seeking. The longitudinal setting simulates monitoring patient trajectories with structured decisions every four hours across 25 findings and eight clinical families, while the compositional setting spans 63k instances across 259 tasks in nine domains and is stratified by compositional dependency depth to evaluate increasingly complex multi-step reasoning. We further propose an offline autoformalization pipeline that converts natural-language clinical guidelines into reusable and verified Python skill libraries through iterative LLM refinement. Compared with zero-shot code generation, the resulting libraries improve consistency while reducing per-query token usage by up to 40%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CodeClinic基准，用于评估LLM代理合成与复用临床技能的能力，并设计自动形式化管道将自然语言临床指南转化为可复用的Python技能库，相比零样本代码生成将一致性提升且每查询令牌使用量减少40%。
AI.motivation: 现有临床推理系统依赖人工维护的工具库或零样本查询，前者需要大量专家精力，后者推理链低效且不可靠，尤其面对机构特定临床策略时表现不佳。
AI.method: 基于MIMIC-IV构建CodeClinic基准，包含纵向ICU监护（4小时间隔、25项发现、8个临床家族）和组合信息检索（63k实例、259任务、9个领域）两项互补任务；提出离线自动形式化管道，通过迭代式LLM精炼将自然语言临床指南转化为可复用且经过验证的Python技能库。
AI.result: 相比零样本代码生成，自动形式化生成的技能库在提升推理一致性的同时，将每查询令牌使用量减少40%。
AI.conclusion: CodeClinic和自动形式化管道证明通过自动合成可复用临床技能，能够有效替代人工维护工具库，在保证效率的同时提升推理可靠性。

title: The Propagation Field: A Geometric Substrate Theory of Deep Learning
comment: Technical notes on exploring the nature of deep learning propagation, Under review by the ICML 4th Workshop on High-dimensional Learning Dynamics (HiLD) 2026
summary: Modern deep learning treats neural networks primarily as endpoint functions from inputs to outputs. Inspired by the shift from force to geometry in physics, we ask whether a network should instead be understood through the geometry of its internal propagation. We define a neural propagation field as the collection of hidden-state trajectories and local Jacobian operators across depth. Endpoint losses constrain only the boundary behavior of this field, leaving its interior geometry underdetermined. We show that endpoint-equivalent models can differ by orders of magnitude in trajectory and Jacobian structure, and introduce observable field metrics such as path sensitivity, solver consistency, and trajectory/Jacobian retention. In controlled teacher-flow and PDE systems, endpoint fitting fails to recover the underlying propagation law. In real multi-path tasks, field-aware objectives improve unseen-path generalization, OOD robustness, and calibration when aligned with the observation structure, but can collapse when over-constrained. In continual learning, field-preservation regularization complements replay and distillation: on Split CIFAR-100, DER++ with field preservation improves average accuracy, backward transfer, and field-retention metrics. These results identify propagation-field quality as a measurable and trainable property of neural networks beyond endpoint performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将神经网络理解为"神经传播场"——即隐藏状态轨迹和局部雅可比算子随深度的集合。研究发现，端点性能相同的模型在传播场结构上可能差异巨大，且端点目标无法恢复底层传播规律。引入场感知目标可提升泛化、鲁棒性和持续学习效果。
AI.motivation: 受物理学从"力"到"几何"的范式转变启发，质疑当前将神经网络仅视为端到端函数映射的观点，认为应通过其内部传播的几何结构来理解网络。
AI.method: 定义神经传播场为隐藏状态轨迹和局部雅可比算子集合；引入可观测场指标（路径敏感性、求解器一致性、轨迹/雅可比保留度）；在教师流、PDE系统、多路径任务和持续学习场景中进行实验验证。
AI.result: 端点等价模型在轨迹和雅可比结构上可相差数量级；端点拟合无法恢复底层传播律；场感知目标在匹配观测结构时提升未见路径泛化、OOD鲁棒性和校准性，但过约束时导致坍缩；在持续学习中，场保留正则化与DER++结合提升了平均准确率、后向迁移和场保留指标。
AI.conclusion: 传播场质量是可测量且可训练的神经网络属性，超越端点性能，是理解和改进深度学习的新视角。

title: Absurd World: A Simple Yet Powerful Method to Absurdify the Real-world for Probing LLM Reasoning Capabilities
summary: While extremely powerful and versatile at various tasks, the thinking capabilities of large language models (LLMs) are often put under scrutiny as they sometimes fail to solve problems that humans can systematically solve. However, recent literature focuses on breaking LLM reasoning with increasingly complex problems, and whether an LLM is robust in simple logical reasoning remains underexplored. This paper proposes Absurd World, a benchmarking framework, to test LLMs against altered realism, where scenarios are logically coherent, and humans can easily solve the tasks. Absurd World breaks a real-world model into symbols, actions, sequences, and events, which are automatically altered to create absurd worlds where the logic to solve the tasks remains the same. It evaluates a large collection of models with simple and advanced prompting techniques, and proves that it is an effective tool to determine LLMs' ability to think logically, ignoring the patterns learned from the real world. One can use this framework to extensively test an LLM against a real-world problem to verify whether the LLM's reasoning capability is robust against variations of the task.

AI.tldr: 提出Absurd World基准框架，通过将现实世界模型解构为符号、动作、序列和事件并自动变换为逻辑一致但荒谬的场景，来测试LLM在简单逻辑推理中的鲁棒性，证明该框架能有效评估LLM是否真正具备逻辑思考能力而非依赖现实世界模式记忆。
AI.motivation: 现有研究聚焦于用日益复杂的问题来测试LLM推理能力的失败案例，但LLM在简单逻辑推理中是否鲁棒这一问题尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 提出Absurd World基准框架，将现实世界模型分解为符号、动作、序列和事件，自动对其进行变换以创建逻辑一致但违背现实常识的荒谬场景，同时保持解决问题的逻辑不变。
AI.result: 对大量模型使用简单和先进的提示技术进行评估，证明Absurd World能有效测定LLM忽略现实世界学习模式而进行逻辑思考的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可用于广泛测试LLM在现实问题变体下的推理鲁棒性，检验其是否真正具备稳健的逻辑推理能力。

title: Continuity Laws for Sequential Models
summary: Inductive biases influence the behavior and performance of sequential models. In this work, we study an underexplored inductive bias in sequential modeling: continuity in time. We ask a simple question: do models motivated by continuous-time formulations, such as state-space models, actually behave continuously in time, and does this translate into better performance on tasks with continuous temporal structure? To answer this, we formalize model continuity as convergence under temporal refinement, where a model is continuous if its predictions approach an underlying continuous trajectory as the temporal discretization is refined. We show that S4 exhibits stable continuous behavior, whereas S6 (the core of Mamba) can be more sensitive to input amplitude and selective dynamics, despite being derived from a continuous dynamical system. To study whether this distinction matters for learning, we also need a corresponding notion of task continuity. We therefore introduce a metric to quantify the continuity of datasets directly from their temporal structure. Across benchmarks, we find a clear empirical alignment between task continuity, model continuity, and model performance. Beyond an inductive bias, continuity also has practical consequences: we show that it enables a simple temporal subsampling strategy that improves both efficiency and performance.

AI.tldr: 本文研究序列建模中的时间连续性归纳偏置，形式化定义了模型连续性（时间细化下的收敛性），发现S4表现出稳定连续行为而S6（Mamba核心）对输入幅度和选择性动力学更敏感。同时引入数据集连续性度量，实验表明任务连续性、模型连续性与模型性能之间存在一致性关联。连续性还支持一种简单的时间子采样策略，可提升效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 序列模型中的归纳偏置影响模型行为与性能，但时间连续性这一归纳偏置尚未被充分探索。作者希望回答：受连续时间公式启发的模型（如状态空间模型）是否真的在时间上表现连续，以及这种连续性是否能转化为在具有连续时间结构任务上的更好性能。
AI.method: 将模型连续性形式化为时间细化下的收敛性（预测随离散化细化趋近于底层连续轨迹）；引入数据集连续性度量，量化任务的时间结构连续性；通过实验分析S4与S6（Mamba）的连续性行为差异，并考察任务连续性、模型连续性与性能之间的关系。
AI.result: S4表现出稳定的连续行为，而S6对输入幅度和选择性动力学更敏感，尽管后者源自连续动力系统。实验发现任务连续性、模型连续性与模型性能之间存在一致的实证对齐。连续性还能支持简单的时间子采样策略，同时提升效率与性能。
AI.conclusion: 时间连续性是一种重要的归纳偏置，影响模型在具有连续时间结构任务上的表现。连续性不仅具有理论意义，还有实际应用价值（如子采样策略）。研究结果提示在设计序列模型时应重视时间连续性的性质。

title: Unpredictability dissociates from structured control in language agents
summary: Unpredictable behavior is often taken as evidence of control, yet stochastic dispersion and structured action control need not coincide. This paper tests whether stochastic sampling can substitute for structured mechanisms that couple reasons, memory, self-state and inhibition to action selection in a language-agent implementation whose control components can be selectively disabled. In a seven-dataset baseline lesion matrix comprising 74,352 calls, the high-stochasticity comparator was more unpredictable than the structured-control variant in 7/7 datasets, whereas targeted reason and veto lesions reduced the expected structured-control profiles in 7/7 datasets each. In a matched-interface control spanning 26,946 generations, the structured agent maintained stronger action-field coupling than all stochastic, post-hoc, scrambled and verbosity controls across every dataset. The primary behavioral test removed free-form trace wording from the evaluation: 57,816 scored records showed the structured-control variant exceeding the high-stochasticity comparator or the reason/veto lesions in 7/7 datasets for all predefined behavioral components. Later open-weight runs extended the no-context controls to Qwen2.5 7B, 14B and 32B and to an independent Mistral-7B family across 20 task families and three agent scaffolds; no-fields, scrambled-context and distribution-matched controls failed to recover structured action control. A three-annotator blinded audit over 1,200 overlap items preserved high agreement. Strict entropy matching, strict token/compute matching and a formal counterfactual-flip stress test did not meet their gates and are treated as limitations. Stochastic unpredictability did not reproduce structured, action-coupled control in this implemented agent family.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模消融实验（74,352次调用、26,946次生成、57,816条评分记录）证明，随机采样无法替代结构化机制（理由、记忆、自我状态、抑制）在语言智能体动作选择中的作用：高随机性比较器在所有7个数据集中都表现出更强的不可预测性，而结构化控制变体在所有行为组件和数据集上均持续优于随机、事后处理、混淆和冗长控制；消融理由和否决机制会破坏预期的结构化控制轮廓；后续跨20个任务族、3种智能体框架和多个开源模型的实验进一步确认，无场、混淆上下文和分布匹配的控制条件均无法恢复结构化动作控制；严格的熵匹配、token/计算匹配和反事实翻转压力测试未通过门控，被视为局限性。
AI.motivation: 检验随机采样能否替代将理由、记忆、自我状态和抑制耦合到动作选择的结构化机制，澄清不可预测行为与控制之间的混淆。
AI.method: 在语言智能体实现中构建可选择性禁用控制组件的病变矩阵，通过七数据集基线病变实验（74,352次调用）、匹配接口控制实验（26,946次生成）、去自由形式痕迹的行为测试（57,816条评分记录）、多模型多框架跨20任务族扩展实验，以及盲审、熵匹配、token/计算匹配和反事实翻转压力测试进行系统评估。
AI.result: 高随机性比较器在7/7数据集上比结构化控制变体更不可预测；理由和否决病变在7/7数据集上均降低了预期结构化控制轮廓；结构化智能体在所有数据集上保持比所有随机/事后/混淆/冗长控制更强的动作-场耦合；后续多模型扩展中无场/混淆上下文/分布匹配控制均无法恢复结构化动作控制；严格熵匹配、token/计算匹配和反事实翻转测试未通过门控。
AI.conclusion: 随机不可预测性无法在该实现的智能体家族中再现结构化的、动作耦合的控制，表明随机采样不能替代耦合理由、记忆、自我状态和抑制的结构化机制。

title: Tokens-per-Parameter Coverage Is Critical for Robust LLM Scaling Law Extrapolation
summary: Neural scaling laws approximate a language model's loss as a power-law function of parameter count $N$ and token count $D$. Following Chinchilla-style compute-optimal training, many studies fit scaling laws from runs performed under a fixed tokens-per-parameter (TPP) ratio $k$ and set $D = kN$. We show that this collinear design, combined with the empirically common near-equality of the exponents governing $N$ and $D$, induces an inherent ill-conditioning in the Gauss-Newton least-squares problem: the condition number of the design grows as the inverse square of the gap between the $N$ and $D$-exponents. The scale coefficients become practically unidentifiable, with confidence intervals inflating by an order of magnitude or more, yielding a ``sloppy'' model whose extrapolations degrade sharply off the training ray. We prove this for four scaling-law formalisms and derive a closed-form TPP-diversity threshold that is necessary and sufficient for well-conditioned estimation. Empirically, non-collinear designs outperform collinear ones on held-out splits with a 97.3\% win rate across four laws, five corpora, multiple floating point precision modes. We further show the degeneracy is rooted in Jacobian geometry and is not an artifact of the loss function: any smooth estimation objective whose curvature involves the Jacobian inherits the same ill-conditioning.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了Chinchilla风格计算最优训练中常用的固定tokens-per-parameter (TPP)比率设计会导致参数估计的病态问题：当N和D的指数近似相等时，设计矩阵条件数随指数差平方成反比增长，导致尺度参数不可识别，置信区间膨胀一个数量级以上，外推性能严重退化。作者推导了TPP多样性阈值，实验证明非共线设计以97.3%的胜率优于共线设计，并证明该退化根植于Jacobian几何，不依赖于具体损失函数。
AI.motivation: 现有的神经标度律研究中，大量工作沿用Chinchilla风格的计算最优训练，采用固定的tokens-per-parameter (TPP)比率k使得D=kN，即参数N和token数D呈共线关系。作者发现这种共线设计会在N和D指数接近相等时导致参数估计的严重病态问题，影响了标度律的可靠性和外推能力。
AI.method: 1）理论分析：证明在共线设计下，Gauss-Newton最小二乘问题的条件数与N和D指数差的平方成反比，推导出TPP多样性阈值的闭式解；2）实验验证：在四种标度律形式、五个语料库、多种浮点精度模式下进行系统比较，共线设计与非共线设计的对比实验；3）理论推广：证明该病态问题根植于Jacobian几何，任何光滑估计目标函数只要曲率涉及Jacobian都会继承相同的病态。
AI.result: 1）共线设计导致条件数随N、D指数差平方反比增长，尺度参数置信区间膨胀一个数量级以上；2）非共线设计在97.3%的测试中优于共线设计；3）证明了病态问题不依赖于具体损失函数形式，而是Jacobian几何的本质属性。
AI.conclusion: 共线TPP设计是神经标度律参数估计病态的根本原因，非共线设计能够有效克服这一问题，提升标度律的可靠性和外推性能。研究者应当避免在固定TPP比率下拟合标度律。

title: Ambig-DS: A Benchmark for Task-Framing Ambiguity in Data-Science Agents
summary: As data-science agents shift from co-pilots to auto-pilots, silent misframing becomes a critical failure mode. Agents quietly commit to plausible but unintended task framings, producing clean, executable artifacts that hide their incorrect assessment of the task. Existing benchmarks score whether the pipeline runs, ignoring whether the agent recognized the task was underspecified. We introduce Ambig-DS, two diagnostic suites: one for prediction-target ambiguity (Ambig-DS-Target, 51 tasks built on DSBench, a tabular modeling benchmark) and one for evaluation-objective ambiguity (Ambig-DS-Objective, 61 tasks built on MLE-bench, a Kaggle-style ML competition benchmark), constructed so that scoring uses each source benchmark's original evaluator. For every task we pair the original, fully specified version with an ambiguous variant produced by controlled edits; a human-and-LLM verification pipeline confirms each variant admits multiple plausible interpretations with decision-relevant consequences. The suites are analyzed independently and ambiguity lowers performance in both.
