AI.result: 在3类主流家族上评估9种方法，均不满足诚实性标准。ReVa在遗忘集问答任务两轮交互后拒绝率最高，接近第二名两倍，且提升保留集诚实性。
AI.conclusion: 遗忘诚实性是一个被忽视但关键的问题，现有方法均不达标；ReVa通过表示对齐有效提升模型在遗忘知识上的诚实回应能力。

title: E-TCAV: Formalizing Penultimate Proxies for Efficient Concept Based Interpretability
summary: TCAV (Testing with Concept Activation Vectors) is an interpretability method that assesses the alignment between the internal representations of a trained neural network and human-understandable, high-level concepts. Though effective, TCAV suffers from significant computational overhead, inter-layer disagreement of TCAV scores, and statistical instability. This work takes a step toward addressing these challenges by introducing E-TCAV, a framework for efficient approximation of TCAV scores, which is based on extensive investigation into three key aspects of the TCAV methodology: 1) the effect of latent classifiers on the stability of TCAV scores, 2) the inter-layer agreement of TCAV scores, and 3) the use of the penultimate layer as a fast proxy for earlier layers for TCAV computation. To ensure a solid foundation for E-TCAV, we conduct extensive evaluations across four different architectures and five datasets, encompassing problems from both computer vision and natural language domains. Our results show that the layers in the final block of the neural network strongly agree with the penultimate layer in terms of the TCAV scores, and the commonly observed variance of the TCAV scores can be attributed to the choice of the latent classifier. Leveraging this inter-layer agreement and the degeneracy of directional sensitivities at the penultimate layer, E-TCAV guarantees linearly scaling speed-ups with respect to the network's size and the number of evaluation samples, marking a step towards efficient model debugging and real-time concept-guided training.

AI.tldr: E-TCAV通过利用网络最终层与倒数第二层之间的TCAV分数一致性以及倒数第二层方向敏感性的简并性，实现了与网络规模和评估样本数量线性相关的加速，解决了TCAV计算开销大、层间不一致和统计不稳定的问题。
AI.motivation: TCAV作为一种可解释性方法虽然有效，但存在显著的计算开销、层间TCAV分数不一致以及统计不稳定性问题，这些挑战限制了其在实际应用中的效率。
AI.method: 本文系统研究了TCAV方法的三个关键方面：1）潜在分类器对TCAV分数稳定性的影响；2）层间TCAV分数的一致性；3）使用倒数第二层作为早期层的快速代理。基于这些发现提出了E-TCAV框架，并在4种架构和5个数据集上进行了评估。
AI.result: 神经网络最终块中的各层与倒数第二层在TCAV分数上表现出强一致性；TCAV分数的常见方差可归因于潜在分类器的选择；E-TCAV实现了与网络规模和评估样本数量线性相关的加速。
AI.conclusion: E-TCAV通过利用层间一致性和倒数第二层的方向敏感性简并性，显著提升了TCAV的计算效率，为高效模型调试和实时概念引导训练提供了可行的方案。

title: PRIM: Meta-Learned Bayesian Root Cause Analysis
summary: Root cause analysis (RCA) in complex systems is challenging due to error propagation across multiple variables, the need for structural causal knowledge, and the computational cost of inference at test time. We introduce PRIM (Prior-fitted Root cause Identification with Meta-learning), a causal meta-learning approach that frames RCA as a Bayesian inference task over a synthetic prior of causal models. By marginalising out structural uncertainty, PRIM implicitly identifies changes in the data-generating mechanism between baseline and anomalous periods. In doing so, PRIM infers distributional differences without explicit statistical testing, and implicitly learns causal structure without model fitting at test time. Following the simulation-based meta-learning paradigm of prior-fitted networks, PRIM uses a Model-Averaged Causal Estimation (MACE) transformer neural process that jointly attends over observational and anomalous samples and the causal structure of nodes, enabling zero-shot inference in 17,ms for systems with up to 100 variables. Across synthetic benchmarks and two realistic benchmark datasets, PetShop and CausRCA, PRIM is competitive with methods that are aware of the system's causal graphical structure a priori while outperforming graph-unaware methods on several tasks. Lightweight fine-tuning to specific domains and data dynamics improves performance further.

AI.tldr: PRIM是一种因果元学习方法，将根因分析建模为贝叶斯推理任务，通过合成先验因果模型边际化结构不确定性，实现零样本推理（17ms处理100变量系统），在多个基准测试中与已知因果图结构的方法性能相当，并可通过轻量微调进一步提升。
AI.motivation: 复杂系统中的根因分析面临三大挑战：多变量间的错误传播、需要结构性因果知识、以及测试时推理的计算成本高昂。现有方法难以同时解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出PRIM框架，采用基于模拟的元学习范式（先验拟合网络），使用MACE（Model-Averaged Causal Estimation）Transformer神经过程，联合关注观测样本、异常样本和节点间的因果结构，通过边际化结构不确定性隐式识别数据生成机制的变化，无需显式统计检验或测试时模型拟合。
AI.result: 在合成基准和两个真实基准数据集（PetShop、CausRCA）上，PRIM与已知因果图结构的先验方法竞争力相当，并在多个任务上优于不知因果图的方法。零样本推理仅需17ms即可处理多达100个变量的系统，轻量微调可进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: PRIM通过元学习有效解决了复杂系统根因分析中的结构不确定性和计算效率问题，实现了快速、无需先验因果图的零样本推理，且具有良好的可扩展性和微调适应性。

title: IndustryBench: Probing the Industrial Knowledge Boundaries of LLMs
summary: In industrial procurement, an LLM answer is useful only if it survives a standards check: recommended material must match operating condition, every parameter must respect a regulated threshold, and no procedure may contradict a safety clause. Partial correctness can mask safety-critical contradictions that aggregate LLM benchmarks rarely capture. We introduce IndustryBench, a 2,049-item benchmark for industrial procurement QA in Chinese, grounded in Chinese national standards (GB/T) and structured industrial product records, organized by seven capability dimensions, ten industry categories, and panel-derived difficulty tiers, with item-aligned English, Russian, and Vietnamese renderings. Our construction pipeline rejects 70.3% of LLM-generated candidates at a search-based external-verification stage, calibrating how unreliable industrial QA remains after LLM-only filtering.Our evaluation decouples raw correctness, scored by a Qwen3-Max judge validated at $κ_w = 0.798$ against a domain expert, from a separate safety-violation (SV) check against source texts. Across 17 models in Chinese and an 8-model intersection over four languages, we find: (i) the best system reaches only 2.083 on the 0--3 rubric, leaving substantial headroom; (ii) Standards & Terminology is the most persistent capability weakness and survives item-aligned translation; (iii) extended reasoning lowers safety-adjusted scores for 12 of 13 models, primarily by introducing unsupported safety-critical details into longer final answers; and (iv) safety-violation rates reshuffle the leaderboard -- GPT-5.4 climbs from rank 6 to rank 3 after SV adjustment, while Kimi-k2.5-1T-A32B drops seven positions.Industrial LLM evaluation therefore requires source-grounded, safety-aware diagnosis rather than aggregate accuracy. We release IndustryBench with all prompts, scoring scripts, and dataset documentation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IndustryBench，一个面向工业采购的中文QA基准，包含2,049道题目，覆盖七种能力维度、十个行业类别，并配有英文、俄文、越南文版本。构建流程中70.3%的LLM生成候选被外部校验拒绝。评估将原始正确性与安全违规检查分离，发现最佳模型仅达2.083/3.0分，推理延长反而降低安全调整得分，安全违规率显著改变模型排名。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM基准测试难以捕捉工业采购中的安全关键矛盾（如参数超标、流程违反安全条款），部分正确答案可能掩盖安全违规，亟需一个源文可验证、安全感知的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建2,049道中文工业采购QA题，基于GB/T国家标准和结构化产品记录；采用搜索外部校验拒绝70.3%的低质量候选；评估分离原始正确性（Qwen3-Max法官，κ_w=0.798）与安全违规检查。
AI.result: 最佳模型得分仅2.083/3.0；标准与术语是最持久的能力短板；推理延长导致13个模型中12个安全调整得分下降；安全违规率显著改变排名（GPT-5.4上升3位，Kimi-k2.5下降7位）。
AI.conclusion: 工业LLM评估需要基于源文、安全感知的诊断方法，而非仅依赖聚合精度。IndustryBench已开源。

title: Deterministic Decomposition of Stochastic Generative Dynamics
summary: Modern generative models can be understood as probability transport from a simple base distribution to a target data distribution. Deterministic transport models offer tractable velocity-field parameterizations, whereas stochastic generative models capture richer density evolution through drift and diffusion. Yet when stochastic dynamics are described through deterministic velocity fields, the effects of drift and diffusion are often compressed into a single effective field, obscuring the distinct roles of deterministic evolution and stochastic fluctuation. In this work, we show that the deterministic field \(b_t\) of a stochastic generative process admits a natural transport--osmotic decomposition that separates deterministic transport from stochastic, diffusion-induced effects: \(b_t = u_t + d_t\), where \(u_t\) governs marginal probability transport and \(d_t\) captures an osmotic effect induced by diffusion and determined by the marginal score. Based on this decomposition, we propose Bridge Matching, a flow-based framework for learning decomposed generative dynamics through both marginal and conditional formulations. In generative modeling experiments, we recombine the learned components as \(b_t = u_t + λ_d d_t\), showing that the proposed decomposition enables interpretable and controllable sampling by adjusting the osmotic contribution in probability transport.

AI.tldr: 本文提出桥匹配(Bridge Matching)框架，将随机生成过程的确定性场分解为传输项和渗透项，实现可解释和可控的生成采样。
AI.motivation: 现有确定性传输模型和随机生成模型在描述动力学时，往往将漂移和扩散效应压缩为单一有效场，模糊了确定性演化与随机波动的不同作用。本文旨在分离这两种效应，揭示其在概率传输中的独立角色。
AI.method: 提出传输-渗透分解(transport-osmotic decomposition)：确定性场b_t = u_t(边际概率传输) + d_t(扩散诱导的渗透效应，由边际得分决定)。基于此分解，提出桥匹配(Bridge Matching)框架，通过边际和条件两种形式学习分解后的生成动力学。
AI.result: 在生成建模实验中，将学习到的分量重组为b_t = u_t + λ_d d_t，通过调整渗透贡献λ_d实现对采样过程的可解释和可控调节。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的分解方法能够清晰区分确定性传输与随机扩散在生成过程中的不同作用，并允许通过调整渗透项实现灵活可控的生成采样。

title: AgentRx: A Benchmark Study of LLM Agents for Multimodal Clinical Prediction Tasks
comment: Accepted at the AHLI Conference on Health, Inference, and Learning 2026
summary: Building effective clinical decision support systems requires the synthesis of complex heterogeneous multimodal data. Such modalities include temporal electronic health records data, medical images, radiology reports, and clinical notes. Large language model (LLM)-based agents have shown impressive performance in various healthcare tasks, especially those involving textual modalities. Considering the fragmentation of healthcare data across hospital systems, collaborative agent frameworks present a promising direction to mitigate data sharing challenges. However, the effectiveness of LLM agents for multimodal clinical risk prediction remains largely unexamined. In this work, we conduct a systematic evaluation of LLM-based agents for clinical prediction tasks using large-scale real-world data. We assess performance in unimodal and multimodal settings and quantify performance gaps between single agent and multi-agent systems. Our findings highlight that single agent frameworks outperform naive multi-agent systems, are better at handling multimodal data, and are better calibrated. This underscores a critical need for improving multi-agent collaboration to better handle heterogeneous inputs. By open-sourcing our code and evaluation framework, this work offers a new benchmark to support future developments relating to agentic systems in healthcare.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了基于LLM的智能体在临床预测任务中的表现，发现单智能体框架在多模态数据处理、性能校准等方面优于朴素的多智能体系统，指出了改进多智能体协作以更好处理异构输入的必要性，并开源了代码和评估框架作为新基准。
AI.motivation: 临床决策支持系统需要综合处理电子健康记录、医学影像、放射报告和临床笔记等多模态异构数据，而现有LLM智能体在多模态临床风险预测方面的效果缺乏系统评估。
AI.method: 使用大规模真实世界数据，在单模态和多模态设置下系统评估LLM智能体在临床预测任务中的性能，并量化单智能体与多智能体系统之间的性能差距。
AI.result: 单智能体框架在性能上优于朴素的多智能体系统，能更好地处理多模态数据，且校准效果更佳。
AI.conclusion: 需要改进多智能体协作机制以更好地处理异构输入数据，同时开源代码和评估框架可为后续智能体系统在医疗领域的研究提供基准。

title: Data-driven transport modelling without overfit
summary: Macroscopic transport modelling aims to predict traffic flows after proposed public policy interventions, such as a new road or railway section or a temporary road closure. As such, it is a vital step in infrastructure planning and development. Traditionally, building a transport model has relied on complex understanding of socio-economic characteristics of the population requiring expensive data collection via surveys, which are prone to biases. Previous numerical frameworks to optimize transport models to fit observed traffic flows are not easily-interpretable and can lead to overfit. We present here an alternative: a data-driven modelling protocol with objective function based on traffic counts, which can be nowadays cheaply and reliably obtained; explainable model weights; and a controlled path to increase model complexity and accuracy. We demonstrate our approach on several toy and realistic examples, and suggest ways to generalize to multimodal systems including public transport.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于交通计数的数据驱动宏观交通建模协议，具有可解释的模型权重和可控的复杂度增长路径，替代了传统依赖昂贵调查和易过拟合的优化方法。
AI.motivation: 传统宏观交通建模依赖昂贵的人口调查数据，易产生偏差；现有数值优化框架难以解释且容易过拟合。迫切需要一种低成本、可解释、鲁棒的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出数据驱动建模协议：目标函数基于交通计数（可廉价可靠获取），模型权重可解释，并通过受控路径逐步增加模型复杂度与精度。在多个玩具模型和实际案例中验证，并扩展到多模式交通系统（含公共交通）。
AI.result: 在多个玩具和实际案例中成功验证了该协议的有效性，并展示了向包含公共交通的多模式系统推广的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该数据驱动方法为宏观交通建模提供了更经济、可解释且不易过拟合的替代方案，有望成为基础设施规划中更实用的工具。

title: Positive Alignment: Artificial Intelligence for Human Flourishing
summary: Existing alignment research is dominated by concerns about safety and preventing harm: safeguards, controllability, and compliance. This paradigm of alignment parallels early psychology's focus on mental illness: necessary but incomplete. What we call Positive Alignment is the development of AI systems that (i) actively support human and ecological flourishing in a pluralistic, polycentric, context-sensitive, and user-authored way while (ii) remaining safe and cooperative. It is a distinct and necessary agenda within AI alignment research. We argue that several existing failures of alignment (e.g., engagement hacking, loss of human autonomy, failures in truth-seeking, low epistemic humility, error correction, lack of diverse viewpoints, and being primarily reactive rather than proactive) may be better addressed through positive alignment, including cultivating virtues and maximizing human flourishing. We highlight a range of challenges, open questions, and technical directions (e.g., data filtering and upsampling, pre- and post-training, evaluations, collaborative value collection) for different phases of the LLM and agents lifecycle. We end with design principles for promoting disagreement and decentralization through contextual grounding, community customization, continual adaptation, and polycentric governance; that is, many legitimate centers of oversight rather than one institutional or moral chokepoint.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"积极对齐"（Positive Alignment）概念，主张AI系统不仅要安全可控，更要主动促进人类和生态繁荣，通过多元化、情境敏感、用户主导的方式实现，并讨论了技术路径和治理原则。
AI.motivation: 现有对齐研究过度聚焦于安全与防止伤害（如保障措施、可控性、合规性），类似于早期心理学只关注精神疾病，忽略了积极面的建设。许多对齐失败（如参与度黑客、自主性丧失、求真失败、缺乏认知谦逊、错误纠正不足、观点单一、被动反应等）需要从积极对齐视角解决。
AI.method: 提出"积极对齐"框架，涵盖数据筛选与上采样、预训练与后训练、评估、协作价值收集等技术方向，并设计了强调去中心化、情境接地、社区定制、持续适应和多中心治理的原则。
AI.result: 指出积极对齐是AI对齐研究中独立且必要的议程，能够更好应对现有对齐失败问题，并提出了LLM和智能体生命周期的技术路线图。
AI.conclusion: AI对齐应超越安全范式，转向主动促进繁荣的积极对齐，通过多中心治理而非单一机构或道德瓶颈来实现分歧与去中心化的促进。

title: Compressed Video Aggregator: Content-driven Module for Efficient Micro-Video Recommendation
summary: We propose Compressed Video Aggregator (CVA), a lightweight micro-video recommendation module that decouples video information from preference learning. It aggregates frozen VFM embeddings, and uses latent reasoning without cross-attention projection, producing compact video embeddings for recommenders. Due to the redundancy in the frame count of the original benchmark and its overly coarse sampling, we used titles to re-select key frames based on CLIP. Experiments on MicroLens and Short-Video show consistent gains with orders-of-magnitude reductions in training time and GPU memory, and re-selected frames can further enhance the performance of all methods, including CVA. Furthermore, we also discussed the impact of several scenarios involving erroneous titles on our method. Code will be released soon.

AI.tldr: CVA是一个轻量级微视频推荐模块，通过解耦视频信息与偏好学习、冻结VFM嵌入、无交叉注意力的潜在推理，以及基于CLIP的标题辅助关键帧重选，显著降低训练时间和GPU内存消耗，同时提升推荐性能。
AI.motivation: 现有微视频推荐方法在处理视频特征时计算开销大，且原始基准测试的帧采样过于粗糙，存在冗余，需要一种更高效、紧凑的视频表示方法。
AI.method: 1) 设计CVA模块，解耦视频信息提取与偏好学习；2) 冻结预训练视觉基础模型(VFM)的嵌入，避免端到端微调的高成本；3) 采用无交叉注意力投影的潜在推理，生成紧凑视频嵌入；4) 利用标题信息基于CLIP重新选择关键帧，替代原始粗糙的帧采样策略。
AI.result: 在MicroLens和Short-Video数据集上，CVA在保持或提升推荐性能的同时，训练时间和GPU内存消耗降低数个数量级；重新选择的关键帧能进一步提升包括CVA在内的所有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: CVA是一种高效且有效的微视频推荐轻量级模块，解耦设计和大规模预训练模型冻结策略显著降低了计算成本，标题辅助的关键帧重选策略进一步提升了推荐效果。

title: Verifiable Process Rewards for Agentic Reasoning
summary: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) has improved the reasoning abilities of large language models (LLMs), but most existing approaches rely on sparse outcome-level feedback. This sparsity creates a credit assignment challenge in long-horizon agentic reasoning: a trajectory may fail despite containing many correct intermediate decisions, or succeed despite containing flawed ones. In this work, we study a class of densely-verifiable agentic reasoning problems, where intermediate actions can be objectively checked by symbolic or algorithmic oracles. We propose Verifiable Process Rewards (VPR), a framework that converts such oracles into dense turn-level supervision for reinforcement learning, and instantiate it in three representative settings: search-based verification for dynamic deduction, constraint-based verification for logical reasoning, and posterior-based verification for probabilistic inference. We further provide a theoretical analysis showing that dense verifier-grounded rewards can improve long-horizon credit assignment by providing more localized learning signals, with the benefit depending on the reliability of the verifier. Empirically, VPR outperforms outcome-level reward and rollout-based process reward baselines across controlled environments, and more importantly, transfers to both general and agentic reasoning benchmarks, suggesting that verifiable process supervision can foster general reasoning skills applicable beyond the training environments. Our results indicate that VPR is a promising approach for enhancing LLM agents whenever reliable intermediate verification is available, while also highlighting its dependence on oracle quality and the open challenge of extending VPR to less structured, open-ended environments.

AI.tldr: 提出Verifiable Process Rewards (VPR)框架，利用符号或算法验算器为智能体推理的中间步骤提供密集的回合级奖励信号，以改善稀疏结果级奖励在长程推理中的信用分配问题。实验表明VPR优于结果级奖励和基于rollout的过程奖励基线，并能迁移到通用和智能体推理基准。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR方法大多依赖稀疏的结果级反馈，在长程智能体推理中面临信用分配挑战：一条轨迹可能因中间正确步骤多但最终失败，或中间有缺陷却最终成功，导致学习信号不精确。
AI.method: 提出VPR框架，将客观的符号/算法验算器转化为密集的回合级监督信号用于强化学习，在三种场景中实例化：基于搜索验证的动态演绎、基于约束验证的逻辑推理、基于后验验证的概率推理。同时给出理论分析证明密集验算器奖励可改善长程信用分配。
AI.result: 在受控环境中VPR优于结果级奖励和基于rollout的过程奖励基线，并且能迁移到通用和智能体推理基准，表明可验证的过程监督可以培养超越训练环境的通用推理能力。
AI.conclusion: VPR是在具备可靠中间验证条件的场景下增强LLM智能体推理能力的有效方法，但其效果依赖于验算器质量，且扩展到非结构化开放环境仍是有待解决的挑战。

title: AgentSlimming: Towards Efficient and Cost-Aware Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Large Language Model-based Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in complex tasks. However, manually designing optimal communication topologies is labor-intensive, while automated expansion methods often result in bloated structures with redundant agents, leading to excessive token consumption. To address this problem, we introduce \textbf{AgentSlimming}, a plug-and-play compression framework for graph-structured multi-agent workflows. Motivated by pruning and quantization in neural networks, AgentSlimming compresses workflows by first estimating the importance score of each agent with a hybrid mechanism, and then removes redundant agents or replaces them with low-cost ones, where each operation is validated using a baseline-anchored acceptance rule to prevent performance collapse. Experiments show that AgentSlimming reduces average token cost by up to 78.9\% with negligible performance degradation, and sometimes even improves accuracy, achieving a strong Pareto-optimal trade-off between cost and quality. \textit{Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/CitrusYL/AgentSlimming

AI.tldr: AgentSlimming是一种用于图结构多智能体工作流的即插即用压缩框架，通过混合机制评估智能体重要性并移除或替换冗余智能体，在保持性能的同时平均降低78.9%的token成本。
AI.motivation: 手动设计多智能体系统的最优通信拓扑结构劳动密集，而自动化扩展方法常导致结构臃肿、智能体冗余，造成大量token消耗。
AI.method: 受神经网络剪枝和量化启发，AgentSlimming首先通过混合机制估计每个智能体的重要性分数，然后移除冗余智能体或将其替换为低成本智能体，每个操作均使用基线锚定接受规则验证以防止性能崩溃。
AI.result: 平均token成本降低高达78.9%，仅带来可忽略的性能下降，有时甚至能提升准确率，实现了成本与质量之间的强帕累托最优权衡。
AI.conclusion: AgentSlimming是一个有效的即插即用框架，能够显著压缩多智能体工作流，减少token消耗的同时保持甚至提升模型性能。

title: EmbodiSkill: Skill-Aware Reflection for Self-Evolving Embodied Agents
summary: Embodied agents can benefit from skills that guide object search, action execution, and state changes across diverse environments. Since embodied environments vary across layouts, object states, and other execution factors, these skills must self-evolve from trajectories generated during task execution. However, existing skill self-evolution methods are mainly developed in digital environments and often convert trajectories into coarse skill updates. Directly applying this paradigm to embodied settings is problematic, because a failed task execution may reflect not only incorrect skill content, but also an execution lapse in which the agent fails to follow valid guidance. We propose EmbodiSkill, a training-free framework for embodied skill self-evolution through skill-aware reflection and targeted revision. EmbodiSkill interprets each trajectory with respect to the current skill, uses skill-changing evidence to update the skill body, and uses execution-lapse evidence to preserve and emphasize valid guidance. Experiments on ALFWorld and EmbodiedBench show that EmbodiSkill consistently improves embodied task success. On ALFWorld, EmbodiSkill enables a frozen Qwen3.5-27B executor to reach 93.28% task success, outperforming GPT-5.2 used as a direct agent without skills by 31.58%. These results show that skill-aware self-evolution helps embodied agents accumulate reusable procedural knowledge from their own trajectories.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EmbodiSkill，一种无需训练的具身技能自进化框架，通过技能感知反思和针对性修订，从任务执行轨迹中区分技能错误与执行失误，实现技能持续改进。在ALFWorld和EmbodiedBench上，EmbodiSkill显著提升了具身任务成功率，在ALFWorld上使用冻结的Qwen3.5-27B执行器达到93.28%的成功率，超过直接使用GPT-5.2作为智能体31.58%。
AI.motivation: 现有技能自进化方法主要针对数字环境，将轨迹粗粒度地转换为技能更新，直接应用于具身环境存在问题：任务执行失败可能源于技能内容错误（incorrect skill content）或执行失误（execution lapse），而现有方法无法区分这两种情况。
AI.method: EmbodiSkill是一个无需训练的框架，包含三个关键步骤：1) 技能感知反思（skill-aware reflection）——对每条轨迹在当前技能下进行解读；2) 技能体更新——利用技能改变证据（skill-changing evidence）更新技能主体；3) 执行失误处理——利用执行失误证据（execution-lapse evidence）保留并强化有效指导。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld和EmbodiedBench上的实验表明，EmbodiSkill持续提升了具身任务成功率。在ALFWorld上，使用冻结的Qwen3.5-27B执行器达到93.28%任务成功率，比直接使用GPT-5.2作为无技能智能体高出31.58%。
AI.conclusion: 技能感知的自进化方法能够帮助具身智能体从自身轨迹中积累可复用的程序性知识，有效区分技能内容错误与执行失误，实现技能的持续改进。

title: MicroFuse: Protein-to-Genome Expert Fusion for Microbial Operon Reasoning
summary: Predicting microbial operon co-membership requires integrating two complementary biological signals: protein-scale molecular identity and genome-context organization. While recent biological foundation models provide powerful representations of each view independently, naive concatenation of these modalities ignores a key biological property -- protein identity and genomic context may agree when adjacent genes form a coherent functional module, or conflict when sequence similarity is misleading but genomic layout indicates independent regulation. We present MicroFuse, a protein-to-genome expert fusion framework that integrates structure-aware protein representations from ProstT5 with genome-context representations from Bacformer through a four-expert Mixture-of-Experts module (protein, genome-context, agreement, and conflict experts) with a learned soft router. Training combines binary cross-entropy with symmetric cross-modal InfoNCE alignment and disagreement-weighted supervised contrastive shaping. We further construct OG-Operon100K, a 100,000-pair scaffold-level benchmark from the OMG metagenomic corpus with biologically grounded positive and negative criteria. On OG-Operon100K, MicroFuse achieves the strongest AUROC, AUPRC, mAP, and mAR among ProstT5-only, Bacformer-only, and Concat MLP baselines. Ablations identify cross-modal contrastive alignment as the dominant component, and a hard sequence-conflict subset reveals MicroFuse's largest gains precisely in biologically ambiguous cases where protein identity alone is misleading.

AI.tldr: MicroFuse是一个蛋白质-基因组专家融合框架，通过混合专家模块集成结构感知的蛋白质表征和基因组上下文表征，在OG-Operon100K基准上优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 预测微生物操纵子共成员关系需要整合蛋白质尺度分子身份和基因组上下文组织两种互补信号，但简单拼接忽略了二者可能一致或冲突的关键生物学特性。
AI.method: 提出MicroFuse框架，融合ProstT5的结构感知蛋白质表征与Bacformer的基因组上下文表征，通过四专家混合专家模块（蛋白质、基因组上下文、一致、冲突专家）和可学习软路由实现。训练结合二元交叉熵、对称跨模态InfoNCE对齐和基于分歧的加权监督对比学习。同时构建了OG-Operon100K基准数据集。
AI.result: 在OG-Operon100K上，MicroFuse在AUROC、AUPRC、mAP和mAR指标上均超过ProstT5-only、Bacformer-only和Concat MLP基线。消融实验表明跨模态对比对齐是关键组件，在序列冲突子集上MicroFuse的优势最大。
AI.conclusion: MicroFuse有效解决了蛋白质身份与基因组上下文在操纵子预测中的一致与冲突问题，跨模态对比对齐是关键贡献。

title: CORTEG: Foundation Models Enable Cross-Modality Representation Transfer from Scalp to Intracranial Brain Recordings
summary: Intracranial electrocorticography (ECoG) offers high-signal-to-noise access to cortical activity for brain-computer interfaces, yet limited per-patient data has led most prior work to rely on small, subject-specific decoders that neglect information shared across patients. We investigate whether large pretrained scalp-EEG foundation models (EEG FMs) can be adapted to ECoG, enabling cross-patient learning and competitive decoding performance while calibrating to a held-out patient in 10-30 minutes on a single GPU. We introduce CORTEG, a cross-modality transfer framework that combines a pretrained EEG FM backbone, an electrode-aware KNNSoftFourier spatial adapter, a dual-stream tokenizer for low-frequency and high-gamma activity, and a leave-one-subject-out fine-tuning strategy. We evaluate CORTEG on two challenging regression tasks: public finger trajectory regression (n=9) and private audio envelope regression (n=16). CORTEG matches or exceeds the strongest task-specific baselines on both tasks: it reaches the highest mean correlation among compared methods on the public finger benchmark (gain not statistically significant on n=9 subjects), with larger and statistically significant gains on the audio task and in low-data per-patient calibration. Feature analyses align with neurophysiology, and latent manifolds capture low-dimensional finger-movement structure. CORTEG provides systematic evidence that scalp-EEG pretraining can be repurposed for ECoG decoding, enabling data-efficient intracranial BCIs that can adapt to new patients.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CORTEG框架，将预训练的头皮脑电图基础模型（EEG FM）迁移至颅内皮层脑电图（ECoG）解码，通过跨模态迁移学习实现跨患者知识共享，在手指轨迹回归和音频包络回归两项任务上达到或超越最强基线，且仅需单GPU 10-30分钟即可校准新患者。
AI.motivation: 颅内ECoG虽有高信噪比优势，但每位患者可用数据有限，以往方法依赖于小规模、个体特异性的解码器，忽略了跨患者间可共享的神经信息，数据效率低下。
AI.method: 提出CORTEG跨模态迁移框架，包含三个关键组件：1）预训练的EEG FM骨干网络（迁移自头皮脑电图）；2）电极感知的KNNSoftFourier空间适配器；3）双流分词器分别处理低频和高伽马频带活动；配合留一被试出的微调策略。
AI.result: 在公共手指轨迹回归任务（n=9）上达到最高平均相关系数，在音频包络回归任务（n=16）上取得显著增益。低数据量校准场景下增益更显著。特征分析结果与神经生理学一致，潜在流形捕捉到低维手指运动结构。
AI.conclusion: CORTEG系统性地证明了头皮EEG预训练可被重新用于ECoG解码，实现了数据高效的颅内脑机接口，能够快速适应新患者。

title: Inpainting physics: self-supervised learning for context-driven fluid simulation
summary: Neural surrogate models for computational fluid dynamics (CFD) are typically trained as forward operators that map explicit problem specifications, such as geometry and boundary conditions, to solution fields. This ties the model to the conditioning variables seen during training and limits reuse under boundary-condition shifts or local geometry changes. We propose to reformulate steady CFD inference as an inpainting problem: instead of training on explicit boundary conditions, we learn a self-supervised prior over velocity fields and impose boundary constraints only during inference by fixing known regions such as inlet, outlet or unchanged regions from previous simulations. To scale this idea to large 3D meshes, we introduce a local neighbourhood tokeniser that represents high-resolution velocity fields as compact spatial latent tokens and train latent flow-matching and masked-autoencoder models on these tokens. On intracranial aneurysm hemodynamics, our method reconstructs full velocity fields from sparse boundary context, outperforms supervised neural surrogates under boundary-condition and dataset shift and enables local geometry editing by reusing unchanged simulation context. These results suggest that viewing CFD inference as context-conditioned inpainting can turn neural surrogates from task-specific predictors into reusable flow priors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将稳态CFD推理重新定义为修复问题：通过学习速度场的自监督先验，仅在推理时通过固定已知区域（如入口、出口或先前模拟中未改变的区域）来施加边界约束，从而将神经代理模型从任务特定的预测器转变为可重用的流先验。为了扩展到大型3D网格，引入了局部邻域分词器，将高分辨率速度场表示为紧凑的空间潜在令牌，并训练潜在流匹配和掩码自编码器模型。在颅内动脉瘤血流动力学上的实验表明，该方法能从稀疏边界上下文中重建完整速度场，在边界条件和数据集偏移下优于有监督神经代理，并支持局部几何编辑。
AI.motivation: 传统的神经CFD代理模型作为前向算子训练，将显式问题规格（如几何和边界条件）映射到解场，导致模型受限于训练时看到的条件变量，在边界条件变化或局部几何改变时难以复用。
AI.method: 1) 将稳态CFD推理重新定义为修复问题，学习速度场的自监督先验，推理时通过固定已知区域施加边界约束；2) 提出局部邻域分词器将高分辨率速度场编码为紧凑的空间潜在令牌；3) 训练潜在流匹配和掩码自编码器模型来处理这些令牌。
AI.result: 在颅内动脉瘤血流动力学任务中，该方法能从稀疏边界上下文中重建完整速度场；在边界条件和数据集偏移下优于有监督神经代理模型；支持局部几何编辑，通过复用未改变的模拟上下文。
AI.conclusion: 将CFD推理视为上下文条件的修复问题，可以将神经代理模型从任务特定的预测器转变为可重用的流先验。

title: PaperFit: Vision-in-the-Loop Typesetting Optimization for Scientific Documents
summary: A LaTeX manuscript that compiles without error is not necessarily publication-ready. The resulting PDFs frequently suffer from misplaced floats, overflowing equations, inconsistent table scaling, widow and orphan lines, and poor page balance, forcing authors into repetitive compile-inspect-edit cycles. Rule-based tools are blind to rendered visuals, operating only on source code and log files. Text-only LLMs perform open-loop text editing, unable to predict or verify the two-dimensional layout consequences of their changes. Reliable typesetting optimization therefore requires a visual closed loop with verification after every edit. We formalize this problem as Visual Typesetting Optimization (VTO), the task of transforming a compilable LaTeX paper into a visually polished, page-budget-compliant PDF through iterative visual verification and source-level revision, and introduce a five-category taxonomy of typesetting defects to guide diagnosis. We present PaperFit, a vision-in-the-loop agent that iteratively renders pages, diagnoses defects, and applies constrained repairs. To benchmark VTO, we construct PaperFit-Bench with 200 papers across 10 venue templates and 13 defect types at different difficulty. Extensive experiments show that PaperFit outperforms all baselines by a large margin, establishing that bridging the gap from compilable source to publication-ready PDF requires vision-in-the-loop optimization and that VTO constitutes a critical missing stage in the document automation pipeline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出视觉排版优化（VTO）任务及PaperFit智能体，通过视觉闭环迭代优化LaTeX排版缺陷，在200篇论文基准上大幅超越所有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 编译通过的LaTeX文档在视觉排版上仍存在浮动体错位、公式溢出、表格缩放不一致、孤行寡行、页面不平衡等问题，现有基于规则的工具仅操作源码和日志，纯文本LLM无法预测二维布局后果，缺乏视觉闭环的优化能力。
AI.method: 形式化定义了视觉排版优化（VTO）任务，提出五类排版缺陷分类体系；构建PaperFit智能体，通过"渲染页面→诊断缺陷→执行约束修复"的迭代视觉闭环机制进行优化；构建包含200篇论文、10个模板、13种缺陷类型的PaperFit-Bench基准。
AI.result: 在PaperFit-Bench上，PaperFit大幅超越所有基线方法，验证了视觉闭环优化对于从可编译源码到可出版PDF这一关键缺失环节的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 从可编译源码到可出版PDF的跨越需要视觉闭环优化，VTO是文档自动化流程中关键的缺失阶段。

title: Controlling Transient Amplification Improves Long-horizon Rollouts
summary: Autoregressive neural simulators now match classical solvers on short-horizon prediction of physical systems, yet their accuracy degrades rapidly when rolled out over long horizons. In this work, we identify transient amplification of perturbations around rollout trajectories as a structural mechanism driving rollout error. Using a linearization analysis we show that when the Jacobians along an autoregressive trajectory are non-normal and non-commuting, the model amplifies errors transiently, resulting in model rollout drift even when the overall system is asymptotically stable. Building on the analysis, we propose commutativity regularization: a combination of two penalties designed to reduce the normality defect of individual Jacobians and the commutator norm of Jacobians across steps. The penalties are estimated with Jacobian-vector products and have no inference-time cost. We show a propagator bound that quantifies rollout error under approximate commutativity and normality. We evaluate UNet and FNO variants with commutativity regularization on 1D and 2D spatio-temporal data in synthetic and real settings, showing successful long-horizon rollouts over thousands of steps. Further, we show that the method improves FourCastNet climate forecasts on ERA5 without using any new data. The gain is most pronounced out-of-distribution: trained on trajectories of a few hundred steps, regularized models remain in-distribution for thousands of rollout steps on initial conditions where baselines diverge.

AI.tldr: 本文发现自回归神经模拟器长期 rollout 误差的结构性机制是轨迹上扰动的瞬态放大（由 Jacobian 的非正规性和非交换性引起），并提出交换性正则化（降低 Jacobian 正规性缺陷和交换子范数）来缓解该问题，在 UNet、FNO 变体及 FourCastNet 上实现了数千步的稳定长程 rollout。
AI.motivation: 自回归神经模拟器在短时预测上已媲美经典求解器，但在长程 rollout 时精度迅速退化，现有方法缺乏对误差结构性机制的理解，亟需从理论层面揭示误差驱动因素并设计针对性缓解策略。
AI.method: 1) 线性化分析：证明轨迹上 Jacobian 的非正规性与非交换性导致扰动的瞬态放大，即使系统整体渐近稳定也会产生 rollout drift；2) 提出交换性正则化，包含两项惩罚：降低单个 Jacobian 的正规性缺陷 + 降低不同步 Jacobian 的交换子范数；3) 通过 Jacobian-向量积高效估计惩罚项，无推理开销；4) 推导了近似交换性和正规性下的传播子界以量化 rollout 误差。
AI.result: 在 1D/2D 时空数据（合成和真实场景）上，UNet 和 FNO 变体经交换性正则化后在数千步长程 rollout 中表现成功；改进 FourCastNet 在 ERA5 气候预测上的性能，无需新数据；在分布外场景中优势最显著——训练于几百步轨迹，正则化模型在基线发散的条件下仍能保持分布内滚动数千步。
AI.conclusion: 非正规性和非交换性是自回归神经模拟器长程 rollout 误差的结构性根源，交换性正则化能有效抑制瞬态放大，显著提升模型在长程和分布外场景下的稳定性与泛化能力。

title: TMAS: Scaling Test-Time Compute via Multi-Agent Synergy
summary: Test-time scaling has become an effective paradigm for improving the reasoning ability of large language models by allocating additional computation during inference. Recent structured approaches have further advanced this paradigm by organizing inference across multiple trajectories, refinement rounds, and verification-based feedback. However, existing structured test-time scaling methods either weakly coordinate parallel reasoning trajectories or rely on noisy historical information without explicitly deciding what should be retained and reused, limiting their ability to balance exploration and exploitation. In this work, we propose TMAS, a framework for scaling test-time compute via multi-agent synergy. TMAS organizes inference as a collaborative process among specialized agents, enabling structured information flow across agents, trajectories, and refinement iterations. To support effective cross-trajectory collaboration, TMAS introduces hierarchical memories: the experience bank reuses low-level reliable intermediate conclusions and local feedback, while the guideline bank records previously explored high-level strategies to steer subsequent rollouts away from redundant reasoning patterns. Furthermore, we design a hybrid reward reinforcement learning scheme tailored to TMAS, which jointly preserves basic reasoning capability, enhances experience utilization, and encourages exploration beyond previously attempted solution strategies. Extensive experiments on challenging reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that TMAS achieves stronger iterative scaling than existing test-time scaling baselines, while hybrid reward training further improves scaling effectiveness and stability across iterations. Code and data are available at https://github.com/george-QF/TMAS-code.

AI.tldr: TMAS是一个通过多智能体协同实现测试时计算扩展的框架。它引入层次化记忆（经验库和策略库）来组织跨轨迹、跨智能体的信息流，并设计了混合奖励强化学习方案，在多个推理基准上优于现有测试时扩展方法。
AI.motivation: 现有结构化测试时扩展方法要么弱协调并行推理轨迹，要么依赖有噪声的历史信息而未明确决定保留和重用哪些内容，限制了解空间探索与利用的平衡能力。
AI.method: TMAS将推理组织为多智能体协同过程，引入层次化记忆：经验库重用低级可靠中间结论和局部反馈，策略库记录高级策略以引导后续轨迹避免冗余推理。同时设计了混合奖励强化学习方案，联合保持基础推理能力、增强经验利用并鼓励探索。
AI.result: 在多个挑战性推理基准上，TMAS实现了比现有测试时扩展基线更强的迭代扩展能力，混合奖励训练进一步提升了迭代间扩展的有效性和稳定性。
AI.conclusion: TMAS通过多智能体协同和层次化记忆机制有效平衡了探索与利用，是测试时计算扩展的一种更优框架。

title: RareCP: Regime-Aware Retrieval for Efficient Conformal Prediction
summary: Recent advances in uncertainty quantification for time series forecasting show that conformal prediction can provide reliable prediction intervals, yet standard conformal methods are often inefficient under temporal dependence, drift, and heterogeneous error behavior. Existing methods typically either update miscoverage rates over time or learn unconstrained calibration weights, without explicitly separating two central sources of nonstationarity: smoothly drifting error distributions and co-existing distinct error regimes. We introduce RareCP, a regime-aware retrieval method for adaptive conformal time series prediction. RareCP learns local calibration representations through a mixture of cosine-attention experts that each capture distinct error regimes, while a compact hypernetwork adapts the kernel parameters to track temporal drift. Given a new forecasting context, RareCP retrieves the top-k most relevant calibration examples, assigns similarity weights, and forms a weighted conformal quantile over their signed residuals, yielding asymmetric prediction intervals. The adaptive kernel is trained using a smooth interval score objective, with a parameter-space anchor to a lightweight teacher kernel to preserve stable local representations. On the GIFT-Eval benchmark, RareCP improves interval efficiency over recent conformal baselines and foundation model uncertainty estimates while maintaining empirical coverage. Ablations confirm that regime-specific experts, drift-adaptive kernels, sparse retrieval, and teacher anchoring each contribute to the final performance.

AI.tldr: RareCP提出了一种基于机制感知的自适应共形预测方法，通过混合余弦注意力专家捕获不同误差机制，并结合超网络跟踪时间漂移，在时间序列预测中实现了更高效的预测区间。
AI.motivation: 现有共形预测方法在处理时间依赖、漂移和异质性误差行为时效率低下，且未能明确分离非平稳性的两个核心来源：平滑漂移的误差分布和共存的不同误差机制。
AI.method: RareCP通过混合余弦注意力专家学习局部校准表示以捕获不同误差机制，使用紧凑超网络自适应核参数以跟踪时间漂移，通过检索top-k相关校准样本并分配相似度权重，构建加权共形分位数得到非对称预测区间，采用平滑区间分数目标训练自适应核，并通过参数空间锚定轻量教师核保持稳定局部表示。
AI.result: 在GIFT-Eval基准上，RareCP相比现有共形预测基线和基础模型不确定性估计方法，在保持经验覆盖的同时提升了区间效率。消融实验验证了机制特定专家、漂移自适应核、稀疏检索和教师锚定各自对最终性能的贡献。
AI.conclusion: RareCP通过显式建模误差机制和漂移，有效提升了时间序列共形预测的区间效率，验证了各设计组件的必要性。

title: How Mobile World Model Guides GUI Agents?
summary: Recent advances in vision-language models have enabled mobile GUI agents to perceive visual interfaces and execute user instructions, but reliable prediction of action consequences remains critical for long-horizon and high-risk interactions. Existing mobile world models provide either text-based or image-based future states, yet it remains unclear which representation is useful, whether generated rollouts can replace real environments, and how test-time guidance helps agents of different strengths. To answer the above questions, we filter and annotate mobile world-model data, then train world models across four modalities: delta text, full text, diffusion-based images, and renderable code. These models achieve SoTA performance on both MobileWorldBench and Code2WorldBench. Furthermore, by evaluating their downstream utility on AITZ, AndroidControl, and AndroidWorld, we obtain three findings. First, renderable code reconstruction achieves high in-distribution fidelity and provides effective multimodal supervision for data construction, while text-based feedback is more robust for online out-of-distribution (OOD) execution. Second, world-model-generated trajectories can provide transferable interaction experience in the training process and improve agents' end-to-end task performance, although these data do not preserve the original distribution. Last, for overconfident mobile agents with low action entropy, posterior self-reflection provides limited gains, suggesting that world models are more effective as prior perception or training supervision than as universal post-hoc verifiers.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了移动GUI世界模型的不同表示形式（文本、图像、代码）及其在下游任务中的效用，发现可渲染代码在分布内场景表现优异，文本反馈在分布外场景更鲁棒；世界模型生成的轨迹可提升智能体任务性能，但后验自我反思对高置信度智能体增益有限。
AI.motivation: 现有移动世界模型在表示形式（文本/图像）上存在分歧，不清楚哪种表示更有用、生成的rollout能否替代真实环境、以及测试时引导对不同强度智能体的帮助如何。
AI.method: 筛选并标注移动世界模型数据，训练四种模态（delta文本、全文本、扩散图像、可渲染代码）的世界模型，并在多个基准上评估其下游效用。
AI.result: 可渲染代码重建在分布内场景保真度高，提供有效的多模态监督；文本反馈在在线分布外执行中更鲁棒；世界模型生成的轨迹可提供可迁移的交互经验提升任务性能，但不保持原始数据分布；后验自我反思对低动作熵的过度自信智能体增益有限。
AI.conclusion: 世界模型作为先验感知或训练监督比作为通用后验验证器更有效。

title: BubbleSpec: Turning Long-Tail Bubbles into Speculative Rollout Drafts for Synchronous Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has become a cornerstone for improving the performance of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, its rollout phase constitutes a significant efficiency bottleneck, mainly arising from the long-tail bubbles across data parallel ranks, particularly in long-context scenarios where faster GPUs remain idle while waiting for stragglers. Existing solutions, such as partial rollout or asynchronous RL, mitigate these bubbles by compromising the algorithm's strict synchronous nature. Instead, we propose BubbleSpec, a novel framework that accelerates RL rollouts while strictly keeping the mathematical exactness. Instead of attempting to eliminate bubbles, BubbleSpec exploits them. We exploit the idle time windows of faster ranks to pre-generate rollout results for subsequent steps, serving as drafts for speculative decoding. Unlike prior speculative methods that rely on historical epoch similarity and warm-ups, BubbleSpec is agnostic to dataset size and provides immediate acceleration from the onset of training. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that BubbleSpec reduces decoding steps by 50% and increases rollout throughput by up to 1.8x. Critically, BubbleSpec is seamlessly compatible with various RL frameworks and strategies as it sustains the strict synchronous property of RL algorithms.

AI.tldr: BubbleSpec利用RL rollout阶段中数据并行下的长尾气泡（空闲等待时间），让快速GPU预先生成后续步骤的rollout结果作为推测解码的草稿，在保持严格数学等价性的前提下将rollout吞吐量提升至1.8倍。
AI.motivation: RL训练LLM时，rollout阶段因长上下文场景中不同数据并行rank的计算速度差异产生长尾气泡，快速GPU空闲等待慢速rank，造成效率瓶颈。现有方案（如部分rollout、异步RL）通过牺牲算法的严格同步性来缓解气泡，需要一种在保持数学精确性的同时加速rollout的方法。
AI.method: 提出BubbleSpec框架，不试图消除气泡，而是利用空闲时间窗口让快速rank预生成后续步骤的rollout结果，作为推测解码（speculative decoding）的草稿。该方法无需依赖历史epoch相似性或预热，对数据集大小无关，从训练开始即可加速。
AI.result: 解码步骤减少50%，rollout吞吐量提升最高1.8倍，且与各类RL框架和策略兼容。
AI.conclusion: BubbleSpec通过将气泡从负担转化为资源，在严格保持RL算法同步特性的前提下显著提升rollout效率，是一种兼容性强、即插即用的加速方案。

title: Agent-ValueBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Evaluating Agent Values
summary: Autonomous agents have rapidly matured as task executors and seen widespread deployment via harnesses such as OpenClaw. Safety concerns have rightly drawn growing research attention, and beneath them lie the values silently steering agent behavior. Existing value benchmarks, however, remain confined to LLMs, leaving agent values largely uncharted. From intuitive, empirical, and theoretical vantage points, we show that an agent's values diverge from those of its underlying LLM, and the agentic modality further introduces dataset-, evaluation-, and system-level challenges absent from text-only protocols. We close this gap with Agent-ValueBench, the first benchmark dedicated to agent values. It features 394 executable environments across 16 domains, offering 4,335 value-conflict tasks that cover 28 value systems and 332 dimensions. Every instance is co-synthesized through our purpose-built end-to-end pipeline and curated per-instance by professional psychologists. Each task ships with two pole-aligned golden trajectories whose checkpoints anchor a trajectory-level rubric-based judge. Benchmarking 14 frontier proprietary and open-weights models across 4 mainstream harnesses, we uncover three concerted findings. Agent values first manifest as a Value Tide of cross-model homogeneity beneath interpretable counter-currents. This tide bends non-additively under harness pull, and yet more decisively under deliberate steering via embedded skills. Together these results signal that the agent-alignment lever is shifting from classical model alignment and prompt steering toward harness alignment and skill steering.

AI.tldr: 提出首个智能体价值基准Agent-ValueBench，证明智能体价值观与底层LLM存在分歧，发现智能体价值观存在跨模型一致性（Value Tide），并揭示对齐杠杆正从模型对齐/提示转向框架对齐/技能引导。
AI.motivation: 现有价值观基准局限于LLM，忽略了智能体作为任务执行者时价值观与底层模型之间的差异，且智能体模态引入了数据、评估、系统层面的新挑战。
AI.method: 构建Agent-ValueBench，包含394个可执行环境、4335个价值冲突任务，覆盖28个价值系统332个维度；通过端到端合成管线生成，由心理学家逐实例审核；每个任务配有双极对齐的黄金轨迹和基于评分标准的评估机制。
AI.result: 发现跨模型同质性（Value Tide）及其可解释的反向流；价值观在框架影响下呈非加性弯曲；通过内嵌技能进行刻意引导效果更显著。
AI.conclusion: 智能体对齐的杠杆正从经典的模型对齐和提示引导，转向框架对齐和技能引导。

title: Higher-Order Equilibrium Tracking for EM-Compressible Online Estimation
summary: We study online estimation in latent-variable models by recasting the problem as tracking a moving empirical equilibrium. Standard online EM and stochastic approximation analyses primarily study convergence toward the population parameter and typically do not isolate the empirical batch optimum from the online tracking error at finite horizon. Our framework decomposes the online estimate into the frozen batch equilibrium at the current running statistic and a tracking lag that captures the algorithm's delay behind this moving target. We prove a batch-to-online transfer theorem: provided $\lVert e_T \rVert_{L^{2}} = o(T^{-1/2})$, the online estimator inherits the batch central limit theorem and the sharp first-order risk constant. Our key observation is that the empirical optimum evolves on a smooth equilibrium manifold indexed by the running statistic. An $m$-th order equilibrium-jet predictor combined with an order-$ν$ frozen corrector yields localized tracking rates $O(T^{-ν(m+1)})$. We formalize EM-compressibility and EM-jet$^R$-compressibility as the structural conditions that make the equilibrium response and the Newton corrector evaluable from a retained streaming statistic. The theory is instantiated in latent linear Gaussian covariance estimation, where the first-order scheme operates on a compressed $d \times d$ statistic with explicit finite-sample risk envelopes and a certified restart rule.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线潜变量模型估计框架，将问题转化为追踪移动经验均衡，通过“批量到在线”传递定理证明：当跟踪误差为 $o(T^{-1/2})$ 时，在线估计器继承批量CLT和最优一阶风险常数。利用均衡流形上的高阶预测器-校正器实现局部跟踪率 $O(T^{-\nu(m+1)})$，并在潜在线性高斯协方差估计中给出显式有限样本风险界和重启规则。
AI.motivation: 标准在线EM和随机逼近分析主要关注向总体参数的收敛性，未能在有限时域内将经验批量最优与在线跟踪误差分离开来。本文旨在建立一种分解框架，将在线估计拆解为冻结批量均衡与跟踪滞后，从而在温和条件下证明在线估计器可继承批量估计的统计最优性质。
AI.method: 提出均衡流形视角：经验最优随运行统计量在光滑均衡流形上演化。构造 $m$ 阶均衡-jet预测器配合 $\nu$ 阶冻结校正器，实现局部跟踪率 $O(T^{-\nu(m+1)})$。形式化定义EM-可压缩性和EM-jet$^R$-可压缩性作为结构条件，使均衡响应和Newton校正可从保留的流式统计量中计算。在潜在线性高斯协方差估计中实例化一阶方案，给出显式有限样本风险界和认证重启规则。
AI.result: 证明批量到在线传递定理：若 $\lVert e_T \rVert_{L^{2}} = o(T^{-1/2})$，在线估计器继承批量CLT和锐利一阶风险常数。高阶预测器-校正器方案实现 $\tilde{O}(T^{-\nu(m+1)})$ 跟踪率。在潜在线性高斯模型中，一阶方案在压缩 $d \times d$ 统计量上具有显式有限样本风险包络。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立的理论框架将在线潜变量模型估计问题系统化为追踪移动经验均衡，为设计具有可证明统计效率的在线算法提供了通用工具。理论成果在潜在线性高斯协方差估计中具体实现，展示了压缩统计量和重启规则的实际效用。

title: EGL-SCA: Structural Credit Assignment for Co-Evolving Instructions and Tools in Graph Reasoning Agents
summary: Graph reasoning agents operating from natural-language inputs must solve a coupled problem: they must reconstruct a structured graph instance from text, decide whether existing computational assets are sufficient, interact with tools under a strict execution protocol, and satisfy an external verifier that checks structured correctness rather than textual plausibility. Existing approaches usually improve either the instruction side or the tool side in isolation, which leaves unclear what should be updated after failure. We propose EGL-SCA, a verifier-centric dual-space framework that models a graph reasoning agent using two collaborative components: an instruction-side policy space for reasoning strategies, and a tool-side program space for executable algorithmic tools. Our central mechanism is structural credit assignment, which maps trajectory evidence to conditional updates, precisely routing failures to either prompt optimization or tool synthesis and repair. To provide sufficient learning signals for dual-space adaptation, we introduce a training distribution stratified by task family, coupled with a Pareto-style retention strategy to balance success, generality, and parsimony. Experiments on four graph reasoning benchmarks show that EGL-SCA achieves a state-of-the-art 92.0\% average success rate. By effectively co-evolving instructions and tools, our framework significantly outperforms both pure-prompting and fixed-toolbox baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出EGL-SCA框架，通过指令策略空间和工具程序空间的双空间协作以及结构信用分配机制，实现图推理智能体的指令与工具协同进化，在四个基准上达到92.0%平均成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法孤立改善指令侧或工具侧，导致失败后不清楚应更新哪一部分，缺乏能够将失败归因到指令优化或工具合成/修复的双空间协同框架。
AI.method: 提出EGL-SCA框架：(1) 指令侧策略空间用于推理策略，工具侧程序空间用于可执行算法工具；(2) 结构信用分配机制将轨迹证据映射为条件更新，精确地将失败路由到提示优化或工具合成/修复；(3) 按任务族分层的训练分布结合Pareto式保留策略，平衡成功率、泛化性和简洁性。
AI.result: 在四个图推理基准上达到92.0%平均成功率，显著优于纯提示方法和固定工具箱基线。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效协同进化指令和工具，双空间框架比单方面优化的方法更优，验证了以验证者为中心的结构信用分配机制的有效性。

title: TopoGeoScore: A Self-Supervised Source-Only Geometric Framework for OOD Checkpoint Selection
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) robustness is difficult to diagnose when target-domain labels are unavailable. We consider a more restrictive source-only variant of unsupervised accuracy estimation: selecting robust checkpoints using only source-domain representations, with no target samples or target labels. We propose \textbf{TopoGeoScore}, a source-only geometric scorer for label-free OOD checkpoint selection. Given a trained checkpoint, we construct class-conditional mutual $k$-nearest-neighbour graphs from source embeddings and extract three interpretable signals: a torsion-inspired reduced Laplacian log-determinant for global class-manifold complexity, Ollivier--Ricci curvature for local neighbourhood regularity, and higher-order topological summaries for fragmented connectivity, loops, and global--local inconsistency. Instead of fixing their weights by hand, TopoGeoScore learns a non-negative linear score through a self-supervised objective that enforces invariance under approximately geometry-preserving embedding views and separation from structure-breaking views. The score remains interpretable and uses no target-domain samples or labels. Results across CIFAR-based corruption and distribution-shift benchmarks, ImageNet-C, MNLI$\to$HANS transfer, and OGBN-Arxiv suggest that source representations contain measurable global--local--topological evidence of robustness, supporting practical checkpoint selection before deployment under distribution shift.

AI.tldr: 提出TopoGeoScore，一种仅使用源域表示（无目标样本或标签）通过拓扑几何特征进行无标签OOD鲁棒性检查点选择的评分方法。
AI.motivation: 在目标域标签不可用时，难以诊断分布外（OOD）鲁棒性。现有无监督精度估计方法通常需要目标样本，本文希望在更严格的仅源域设定下实现鲁棒检查点选择。
AI.method: 基于源域嵌入构建类条件互k近邻图，提取三类可解释信号：扭转启发的缩减拉普拉斯对数行列式（全局流形复杂度）、Ollivier-Ricci曲率（局部邻域规则性）、高阶拓扑摘要（碎片化连接、环、全局-局部不一致性）；通过自监督目标学习非负线性得分，在保持几何结构的视图间实现不变性，并与破坏结构的视图分离。
AI.result: 在CIFAR类 corruption/分布偏移、ImageNet-C、MNLI→HANS迁移、OGBN-Arxiv等基准上验证了有效性，表明源域表示包含可测的全局-局部-拓扑鲁棒性证据。
AI.conclusion: 源域表示中蕴含的拓扑几何特征可用于无标签OOD检查点选择，在部署前为分布偏移下的模型选择提供实用支持。

title: Autonomous FAIR Digital Objects: From Passive Assertions to Active Knowledge
summary: Scientific knowledge on the Web is published as passive assertions and cannot decide when to validate evidence, reconcile contradictions, or update confidence as findings accumulate. Curation depends on centralised middleware and institutional continuity, but when registries close, active stewardship stops even when data remain online. We advance the concept of Autonomous FAIR Digital Objects (aFDOs) from an abstract idea to an operational model, to offer a route from passive scientific publication toward accountable, standards-aligned automation that can outlive its publishing institutions. aFDO augments FDOs with three capabilities anchored in Semantic Web standards, namely 1) a policy layer over RDF-star aligned with PROV-O, SHACL, and ODRL for portable condition-action rules, 2) an announcement layer over ActivityStreams 2.0 that bounds per-announcement evaluation cost, and 3) an agreement layer that resolves multi-source contradictions through reputation and confidence weighted agreement under a bounded adversarial model. We provide a formal definition that distinguishes policy specifications, event handlers, and communication interfaces. We evaluate an open reference implementation on 4,305 FDOs grounded in rare-disease ontologies, namely ClinVar, HPO, and Orphanet, combined with controlled synthetic observations. The consensus mechanism resolves 56.3% of 3,914 naturally occurring ClinVar conflicts where multiple submitters disagree and an expert panel has subsequently adjudicated. Under Sybil, collusion, and poisoning attacks, the mechanism degrades gracefully within its design Byzantine-tolerance bound (f < n/5), and fails as predicted beyond that bound.

AI.tldr: 本文提出自治FAIR数字对象(aFDO)概念，通过融入基于语义网标准的策略层、公告层和协议层，使科学出版物具备自动化验证、冲突解决和置信度更新的能力。在罕见病本体数据集(4,305个FDO)上的评估显示，共识机制可解决56.3%的ClinVar自然冲突，并在拜占庭容错边界(f < n/5)内对Sybil、合谋和投毒攻击具有优雅降级能力。
AI.motivation: 当前Web上的科学知识以被动断言形式存在，无法主动验证证据、协调矛盾或随证据积累更新置信度。策展依赖中心化中间件和机构持续性，但存储库关闭后即使数据仍在线，主动管理也会停止。需要一种能够超越出版机构生命周期的自主、标准化自动化机制。
AI.method: aFDO在FDO基础上增强三个能力层：1)策略层：基于RDF-star、PROV-O、SHACL和ODRL的条件-动作规则；2)公告层：基于ActivityStreams 2.0，约束每次公告的评估成本；3)协议层：通过信誉和置信度加权共识解决多源矛盾，采用有界对抗模型。提供正式定义区分策略规范、事件处理器和通信接口。基于罕见病本体(ClinVar, HPO, Orphanet)构建4,305个FDO进行开放参考实现评估。
AI.result: 共识机制解决了3,914个ClinVar自然冲突中的56.3%（这些冲突存在多个提交者分歧且专家小组已裁决）。在Sybil、合谋和投毒攻击下，机制在设计拜占庭容错边界(f < n/5)内优雅降级，超出边界后按预期失效。
AI.conclusion: aFDO为从被动科学出版走向可问责、符合标准且能超越出版机构存续期的自动化提供了可行路径。其基于语义网标准的模块化设计保证了互操作性，共识机制在实际医学数据集上具有实用性，且在对抗环境下表现稳健。

title: Agent-X: Full Pipeline Acceleration of On-device AI Agents
summary: LLM-based agents deliver state-of-the-art performance across tasks but incur high end-to-end latency on edge devices. We introduce Agent-X, a software-only, accuracy-preserving framework that accelerates both the prefill and decode stages of on-device agent workloads. Agent-X's two key components rewrite prompts to leverage prefix caching tailored to agent-specific input-token patterns and enable LLM-free speculative decoding for fast token generation with minimal overhead. On representative agentic workloads, Agent-X achieves a 1.61x end-to-end speedup in real systems with no accuracy loss and can be seamlessly integrated into existing on-device AI agents. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first to systematically characterize and eliminate latency bottlenecks in on-device agents.

AI.tldr: Agent-X 是一个纯软件、保持精度的框架，通过针对性前缀缓存和无 LLM 投机解码，将设备端智能体工作负载的端到端延迟加速 1.61 倍且无精度损失。
AI.motivation: LLM 智能体在边缘设备上端到端延迟高，而现有工作缺乏对设备端智能体延迟瓶颈的系统性刻画与消除。
AI.method: 1) 针对智能体输入 token 模式的重写提示，利用前缀缓存加速 prefill 阶段；2) 无 LLM 的投机解码，加速 decode 阶段且开销极低。
AI.result: 在真实系统的代表性智能体工作负载上实现 1.61 倍端到端加速，无精度损失。
AI.conclusion: Agent-X 是首个系统性刻画并消除设备端智能体延迟瓶颈的工作，可无缝集成到现有设备端 AI 智能体中。

title: OTora: A Unified Red Teaming Framework for Reasoning-Level Denial-of-Service in LLM Agents
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents that execute tool-augmented, multi-step tasks, where latency is a critical factor for real-world applications. Yet an overlooked threat is Reasoning-Level Denial-of-Service (R-DoS), in which an attacker preserves task correctness but degrades availability by inflating an agent's reasoning depth or tool-use budget. We introduce OTora, the first unified, two-stage red-teaming framework for instantiating R-DoS attacks. Stage I optimizes an adversarial trigger that induces targeted tool invocations using insertion-aware scoring and dynamic target co-evolution, supporting both black-box and white-box settings. Stage II generates agent-aware reasoning payloads via an ICL-guided genetic search that amplifies overthinking while maintaining correct task outcomes. Across WebShop, Email, and OS agents built on multiple backbone models such as LLaMA-70B and GPT-OSS-120B, OTora achieves up to 10 times increases in reasoning tokens and order-of-magnitude latency slowdowns, all while preserving near-baseline task accuracy. Finally, we discuss mitigation strategies for detecting and constraining abnormal reasoning and latency spikes. The code is available at https://github.com/llm2409/OTora.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了OTora，首个统一的红队测试框架，用于实例化推理层面拒绝服务攻击（R-DoS），该攻击在保持任务正确性的同时，通过膨胀智能体的推理深度和工具调用预算来降低可用性。实验表明，OTora可使推理token增加多达10倍，带来数量级延迟增长，同时保持接近基线的任务准确率。
AI.motivation: LLM作为自主智能体执行工具增强的多步骤任务时，延迟是关键因素，但现有研究忽视了推理层面拒绝服务（R-DoS）攻击——攻击者在保持任务正确性的同时，通过膨胀智能体的推理深度或工具使用预算来降低可用性。
AI.method: 提出OTora统一两阶段红队测试框架：第一阶段优化对抗触发器，通过插入感知评分和动态目标协同进化诱导特定工具调用，支持黑盒与白盒设置；第二阶段通过ICL引导的遗传搜索生成智能体感知的推理载荷，在保持正确任务结果的同时放大过度思考。
AI.result: 在基于LLaMA-70B和GPT-OSS-120B等骨干模型构建的WebShop、Email和OS智能体上，OTora实现了高达10倍的推理token增加和数量级的延迟增长，同时保持了接近基线的任务准确率。
AI.conclusion: 论文讨论了检测和约束异常推理及延迟峰值的缓解策略，并开源了代码。

title: Agentic Performance at the Edge: Insights from Benchmarking
comment: Accepted to AutoEdge workshop, co-located with MobiSys 2026
summary: Agentic artificial intelligence (AI) is a natural fit for Internet of Things (IoT) and edge systems, but edge deployments are often constrained to models around 8 billion parameters or smaller. An important question is: How much agentic-task quality is lost when model size is constrained by memory, power, and latency budgets? To address this question, in this paper, we provide an initial empirical study considering edge-focused model scaling, general-purpose versus coder-oriented model effects, and tool-enabled execution under a fixed protocol. We introduce a domain-conditioned evaluation methodology, an implementation-grounded analysis of model-tool interactions, practical guidance for model selection under constraints, and an analysis of failure modes that reveals distinct semantic versus execution failure patterns across model families. Our core finding is that edge-agent quality is not a simple function of parameter count. Robust deployment depends on the joint design of model choice and tool workflow. Domain-conditioned analysis reveals Pareto fronts in the accuracy-latency space that can guide strategy selection based on operational priorities.

AI.tldr: 本文针对边缘部署中模型规模受限（约8B参数以下）的场景，通过实证研究探讨了模型参数规模、通用型 vs 编码型模型选择以及工具执行协议对智能体任务质量的影响，发现边缘智能体质量并非参数规模的简单函数，而取决于模型选择与工具流程的联合设计。
AI.motivation: 边缘IoT和系统中部署智能体AI时，模型大小受内存、功耗和延迟预算约束（通常限制在80亿参数以下），但参数规模缩减对智能体任务质量的具体影响尚不明确，亟需量化评估。
AI.method: 采用经验研究方法，设计了领域条件化评估方法论，对边缘聚焦的模型缩放、通用型与编码型模型效果、以及固定协议下的工具执行进行了系统性对比分析，并基于实现分析模型-工具交互。
AI.result: 边缘智能体质量并非参数数量的简单函数；领域条件化分析揭示了准确率-延迟空间的Pareto前沿；不同模型系列展现出语义失败与执行失败的不同模式。
AI.conclusion: 稳健的边缘部署取决于模型选择与工具工作流的联合设计，领域条件化分析可指导基于操作优先级（accuracy-latency权衡）的策略选择。

title: Discrete Flow Matching: Convergence Guarantees Under Minimal Assumptions
summary: Flow Matching has recently emerged as a popular class of generative models for simulating a target distribution $μ_1$ from samples drawn from a source distribution $μ_0$. This framework relies on a fixed coupling between $μ_0$ and $μ_1$, and on a deterministic or stochastic bridge to define an interpolating process between the two distributions. The time marginals of this process can then be approximately sampled by estimating the transition rates, or more generally the generator, of its Markovian projection. This framework has recently been extended to the case of discrete source and target distributions, under the name Discrete Flow Matching (DFM). However, theoretical guarantees for such models remain scarce. In this paper, we study two DFM models on $\mathbb{Z}_m^d = \{0,\ldots,m-1\}^d$, sampled through time discretization, and derive non-asymptotic associated bounds for both of them. In contrast to previous work, we establish non-asymptotic bounds in Kullback--Leibler divergence for the early-stopped version of the target distribution. We also derive explicit convergence guarantees in total variation distance with respect to the true target distribution. Importantly, these bounds rely only on an approximation error assumption, relaxing standard score assumptions used in earlier works, while also yielding improved dependence on the vocabulary size $m$ and the dimension $d$.

AI.tldr: 本文为离散流匹配(DFM)模型在Z_m^d空间上提供了非渐近收敛保证，建立了KL散度和全变差距离下的理论界，相比先前工作改进了对词汇量m和维度d的依赖关系。
AI.motivation: 离散流匹配(DFM)模型虽已提出，但缺乏严格的理论保证，现有理论工作依赖较强的得分假设且界不够紧。
AI.method: 研究两种在Z_m^d空间上通过时间离散化采样的DFM模型，基于近似误差假设而非得分假设，推导非渐近界。
AI.result: 建立了早期停止版本目标分布的KL散度非渐近界，以及相对于真实目标分布的全变差距离显式收敛保证。
AI.conclusion: 所得界仅依赖近似误差假设，放宽了先前工作的得分假设，同时在词汇量m和维度d上取得了更优的依赖性。

title: GuardAD: Safeguarding Autonomous Driving MLLMs via Markovian Safety Logic
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly integrated into autonomous driving (AD) systems; however, they remain vulnerable to diverse safety threats, particularly in accident-prone scenarios. Recent safeguard mechanisms have shown promise by incorporating logical constraints, yet most rely on static formulations that lack temporally grounded safety reasoning over evolving traffic interactions, resulting in limited robustness in dynamic driving environments. To address these limitations, we propose GuardAD, a model-agnostic safeguard that formulates AD safety as an evolving Markovian logical state. GuardAD introduces Neuro-Symbolic Logic Formalization, which represents safety predicates over heterogeneous traffic participants and continuously induces them via n-th order Markovian Logic Induction. This design enables the inference of emerging and latent hazards beyond single-step observations. Rather than simply vetoing unsafe actions, GuardAD performs Logic-Driven Action Revision, where inferred safety states actively guide action refinement without modifying the underlying MLLM. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks and AD-MLLMs demonstrate that GuardAD substantially reduces accident rates (-32.07%) while slightly improving task performance (+6.85%). Moreover, closed-loop simulation evaluations, together with physical-world vehicle studies, further validate the effectiveness and potential of GuardAD.

AI.tldr: GuardAD提出了一种基于马尔可夫逻辑状态的模型无关自动驾驶安全防护机制，通过神经符号逻辑形式化与逻辑驱动动作修正，在多个基准上降低事故率32.07%并提升任务性能6.85%。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM驱动的自动驾驶安全防护机制大多依赖静态逻辑约束，缺乏对动态交通交互中时间演化的安全推理能力，导致在复杂驾驶环境中鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: GuardAD将自动驾驶安全形式化为演进的马尔可夫逻辑状态，通过神经符号逻辑形式化对异构交通参与者进行安全谓词表示，并利用n阶马尔可夫逻辑归纳持续推断安全状态；进一步采用逻辑驱动动作修正，基于推断的安全状态主动引导动作优化，无需修改底层MLLM。
AI.result: 在多个基准和AD-MLLM上，事故率降低32.07%，任务性能提升6.85%；闭环仿真与实车实验进一步验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: GuardAD通过引入时序演化的逻辑推理机制，有效提升了自动驾驶系统在动态环境中的安全性与任务性能，且具有模型无关性。

title: Compact SO(3) Equivariant Atomistic Foundation Models via Structural Pruning
summary: SO(3) equivariant graph neural networks have become the dominant paradigm for atomistic foundation models, achieving high accuracy and data efficiency by building rotational symmetry directly into the architecture. Yet the computational cost of their higher-order tensor operations creates a tough trade-off between model accuracy and inference efficiency. In this paper, we propose a structural pruning method for SO(3) equivariant atomistic foundation models to bridge this accuracy-efficiency gap. The pruning is applied along the channel and order dimensions, with each irreducible representation kept or removed as a complete block, thereby retaining SO(3) equivariance. Starting from a large checkpoint, the pruned model substantially reduces the inference cost while retaining higher accuracy than an independently trained small model. The pruned MACE-MP model outperforms the official from-scratch trained small model on 7 of 9 metrics on the Matbench Discovery leaderboard. In terms of efficiency, compressed MACE-MP and MACE-OFF models contain 1.5$\times$ to 4$\times$ fewer parameters and require 2.5$\times$ to 4$\times$ less pre-training compute than training a small model from scratch. For downstream applications, fine-tuning the pruned model reduces energy and force errors by 70.1% and 34.4% compared to training task-specific models from scratch across eight representative downstream datasets. We demonstrate that the method generalizes to other SO(3) equivariant architectures (SevenNet, eSCN) and can be combined with quantization and knowledge distillation for further gains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对SO(3)等变原子基础模型的结构化剪枝方法，沿通道和阶次维度剪枝不可约表示块，在保持SO(3)等变性的前提下显著降低推理成本。剪枝后的MACE-MP模型在Matbench Discovery排行榜上9项指标中7项优于官方从头训练的小模型，参数减少1.5-4倍，预训练计算量减少2.5-4倍，下游微调使能量和力误差分别降低70.1%和34.4%。该方法可推广至其他SO(3)等变架构，并与量化和知识蒸馏结合。
AI.motivation: SO(3)等变图神经网络在原子基础模型中占据主导地位，但其高阶张量运算导致模型精度与推理效率之间存在难以调和的权衡。现有方法要么追求高精度而牺牲计算效率，要么选择更小的模型导致精度下降，缺乏一种能够同时兼顾精度与效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出一种针对SO(3)等变原子基础模型的结构化剪枝方法，沿通道维度和阶次维度进行剪枝，每个不可约表示以完整块的形式保留或移除，从而保持SO(3)等变性。从大型预训练检查点出发，对模型进行结构化剪枝，再与量化和知识蒸馏等技术结合进一步优化。
AI.result: 剪枝后的MACE-MP模型在Matbench Discovery排行榜9项指标中7项优于从头训练的小模型；压缩后的MACE-MP和MACE-OFF模型参数减少1.5-4倍，预训练计算量减少2.5-4倍；下游微调使能量误差降低70.1%，力误差降低34.4%；该方法可推广至SevenNet、eSCN等其他架构。
AI.conclusion: 结构化剪枝方法有效桥接了SO(3)等变原子基础模型的精度-效率鸿沟，能够从大模型出发获得比从头训练小模型更高精度且更低推理成本的模型，且具有良好的泛化性和与其他压缩技术的兼容性。

title: Machine Learning Research Has Outpaced Its Communication Norms and NeurIPS Should Act
summary: Machine learning research has grown exponentially while its communication norms have not. We argue NeurIPS should adopt explicit, measurable writing standards. We analyze 2.8 million arXiv papers (1991-2025), 24,772 NeurIPS papers (1987-2024), and 24.5 million PubMed papers (1990-2025), applying classical readability scores, the Hohmann writing style suite (including sensational language), acronym density and reuse, an LLM as judge readability protocol, and citations from OpenAlex and Semantic Scholar. Four patterns emerge. First, NeurIPS abstracts score harder to read on every classical readability metric: Flesch Reading Ease falls from about 24 in 1987 to 13 in 2024, and sensational language rises by about 50 percent in NeurIPS abstracts between 2015 and 2024. Second, acronym density in NeurIPS titles has grown from 0.33 per 100 words in 1987 to 3.21 in 2024, and about 89 percent of NeurIPS acronyms are used fewer than ten times, ten points above the science-wide baseline. Third, more readable NeurIPS papers tend to receive more citations, suggesting readability and impact are correlated and that less readable papers risk remaining fragmented. LLM as judge scores rate NeurIPS abstracts as roughly stable from 1987 to 2022, with early signs of improvement thereafter, a pattern that disagrees with every classical readability metric and raises a design question for enforcement: is the target reader a human or an LLM? Lastly, NeurIPS volume has grown roughly 50-fold between 1987 and 2024. Assuming the goal is to optimise for human readers, we propose seven standards NeurIPS could pilot at NeurIPS 2027: an acronym budget with a venue-approved term list, a human readability threshold, stricter citation standards, standalone visual elements, a plain language summary, a pre-registered acronym glossary, and open source audit tooling.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对280万篇arXiv论文、24772篇NeurIPS论文和2450万篇PubMed论文的分析，发现NeurIPS摘要的可读性持续下降（Flesch阅读易读性从1987年的24降至2024年的13），煽动性语言增加约50%，缩略语密度增长近10倍。论文提出NeurIPS应采用七项明确的写作标准，包括缩略语预算、人类可读性阈值、严格引用标准等，以优化人类读者的阅读体验。
AI.motivation: 机器学习研究呈指数级增长，但其写作规范并未跟上。作者认为NeurIPS应采用明确、可衡量的写作标准，以解决可读性持续下降、缩略语滥用、煽动性语言增多等问题，避免论文影响力因可读性差而受限。
AI.method: 分析了280万篇arXiv论文（1991-2025）、24772篇NeurIPS论文（1987-2024）和2450万篇PubMed论文（1990-2025），应用经典可读性评分、Hohmann写作风格套件（含煽动性语言检测）、缩略语密度与复用分析、LLM作为裁判的可读性评估协议，以及来自OpenAlex和Semantic Scholar的引用数据。
AI.result: 四个主要发现：1）NeurIPS摘要可读性持续下降，煽动性语言增加约50%；2）缩略语密度从0.33/百词增至3.21/百词，约89%的缩略语使用次数少于10次；3）可读性更佳的论文获得更多引用，可读性与影响力正相关；4）LLM评估显示可读性稳定，与经典指标趋势相悖，引发目标读者是人还是LLM的设计问题。
AI.conclusion: 提出七项标准供NeurIPS 2027试点：缩略语预算与批准词表、人类可读性阈值、更严格的引用标准、独立的可视化元素、通俗语言摘要、预注册缩略语词汇表、开源审计工具。目标是为人类读者优化写作规范。

title: Can Agent Benchmarks Support Their Scores? Evidence-Supported Bounds for Interactive-Agent Evaluation
summary:
Interactive agent benchmarks map an agent run to a binary outcome through outcome checks. When these checks rely on surface level signals or fail to capture the agent's actual action path, they cannot reliably determine whether the run succeeded. For example, a benchmark task may ask whether Alice's shipping address was changed, while the outcome check only verifies that the agent clicked "Save." This does not guarantee that the intended state change occurred, since the agent may have modified the wrong record. Treating such a run as successful therefore makes the reported score misleading. Benchmark quality thus depends not only on task design, but also on the reliability of outcome detection.
  We address this problem by introducing an outcome evidence reporting layer for existing benchmarks, without modifying their tasks, agents, or evaluators. The layer performs three functions. First, before scoring, it specifies which stored artifacts are required to verify the claimed outcome for each case. Second, it applies a locked checklist to each completed run and assigns one of three evidence labels: Evidence Pass, Evidence Fail, or Unknown. Third, it reports evidence supported score bounds that quantify uncertainty arising from Unknown cases. Rather than silently counting, discarding, or hiding uncertain cases inside a single aggregate success rate, the framework keeps them explicitly visible.
  We evaluate the outcome evidence layer on five public benchmarks: ANDROIDWORLD, AGENTDOJO, APPWORLD, tau3 bench retail, and MINIWOB. The resulting reports separate several empirically distinct failure modes.

AI.tldr: 现有交互式Agent基准测试的结果检测不可靠，本文提出结果证据报告层，通过明确要求可验证证据、分配三种证据标签（通过/失败/未知）并报告证据支持的得分区间，使评估更可信。在五个基准上的实验揭示了多种失败模式。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试的结果检查依赖表面信号或无法捕获实际行为路径，导致误判成功，例如仅验证“点击保存”而非确认实际状态变更。基准质量不仅取决于任务设计，还依赖于结果检测的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出结果证据报告层，无需修改原任务、智能体或评估器。三个功能：1) 评分前明确每个案例所需验证的存储工件；2) 对完成轨迹应用锁定检查清单，分配三种证据标签（Evidence Pass/Evidence Fail/Unknown）；3) 报告证据支持的得分区间，量化Unknown案例带来的不确定性。
AI.result: 在ANDROIDWORLD、AGENTDOJO、APPWORLD、tau3 bench retail和MINIWOB五个基准上进行了评估，结果报告分离出了几种经验上不同的失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式暴露不确定性而非默默计数或隐藏，框架提升了评估透明度和可靠性，揭示了传统聚合成功率所掩盖的失败模式。

title: Bilinear autoencoders find interpretable manifolds
summary: Sparse autoencoders have become a standard tool for uncovering interpretable latent representations in neural networks. Yet salient concepts often span manifolds that current linear methods cannot capture without post hoc analysis. This paper uses quadratic latents to close this gap: we implement these with bilinear autoencoders, which decompose activations into low-rank quadratic forms, compose linearly in weight space, and admit input-independent geometric analysis. This qualitative difference in what concepts quadratic latents can detect challenges the standard linear representation hypothesis. Our experiments and visualisations show that multi-dimensional geometries are highly prevalent and that composite latents capture them well, systematically improving reconstruction error in language models. Furthermore, we show that autoencoders with varying geometric priors recover the same input subspace despite their dictionary entries being distinct. Practically, these models serve as an unsupervised tool for manifold discovery, which we demonstrate through an interactive online visualizer for Qwen 3.5. This is a step toward nonlinear but mathematically tractable latent representations whose composition is expressive and interpretable by design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用双线性自编码器（含二次型潜变量）来捕捉神经网络中线性方法无法捕获的流形结构，挑战了线性表征假说，并在语言模型上取得了更好的重构效果，同时提供无监督的流形发现工具。
AI.motivation: 标准稀疏自编码器使用线性潜变量，但许多重要概念分布在非线性流形上，线性方法无法直接捕捉，需要事后分析才能弥补。
AI.method: 使用二次型潜变量（双线性自编码器）将激活分解为低秩二次型形式，这些潜变量在权重空间中线性组合，且支持与输入无关的几何分析。
AI.result: 实验表明多维几何结构在潜空间中普遍存在，复合潜变量能很好地捕捉它们，系统性地改善了语言模型的重构误差；不同几何先验的自编码器能恢复相同的输入子空间。
AI.conclusion: 本文向非线性但数学可解的潜表征迈出一步，这类表征组合具有表达力且设计上可解释。

title: ASIA: an Autonomous System Identification Agent
summary: Over the years, research in system identification has provided a rich set of methods for learning dynamical models, together with well-established theoretical guarantees. In practice, however, the choice of model class, training algorithm, and hyperparameter tuning is still largely left to empirical trial-and-error, requiring substantial expert time and domain experience. Motivated by recent advances in agentic artificial intelligence, we present ASIA, a framework that delegates this iterative search to a large language model acting as an autonomous coding agent. Building on existing agentic platforms, ASIA closes the loop between hypothesis, implementation, and evaluation without human intervention, requiring only a plain-English description of the identification problem. We conduct an empirical study of ASIA on two system identification benchmarks and analyse the agent's search behaviour, the architectures and training strategies it discovers, and the quality of the resulting models. We also discuss the potential of the approach and its current limitations, including implicit test leakage, reduced methodological transparency, and reproducibility concerns.

AI.tldr: ASIA是一个利用大语言模型作为自主编码代理的框架，能够根据自然语言描述自动完成系统识别任务中的迭代搜索，包括模型类选择、训练算法和超参数调优，无需人工干预。
AI.motivation: 系统识别领域虽然已有丰富的学习方法和理论保证，但在实践中，模型类选择、训练算法和超参数调优仍依赖大量的专家经验和试错，缺乏自动化流程。
AI.method: 受智能体人工智能启发，ASIA框架将迭代搜索过程委托给一个大语言模型作为自主编码代理。该代理在现有智能体平台基础上，实现了假设、实现和评估之间的闭环，仅需问题描述的自然语言输入。
AI.result: 在两个系统识别基准上进行了实证研究，分析了代理的搜索行为、发现的架构和训练策略以及生成模型的质量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法具有潜力，但也存在当前局限性，包括隐式测试泄漏、方法透明度降低和可重复性问题。

title: Shapley Regression for Rare Disease Diagnosis Support: a case study on APDS
comment: 21 pages, 4 figures. Accepted to the AI and Health special track at IJCAI 2026; the first two named authors had equal contribution
summary: Activated PI3K8 Syndrome (APDS) is a rare genetic immune disorder caused by variants in PIK3CD or PIK3R1, with highly heterogeneous symptoms that often delay diagnosis. Early recognition is hampered by overlapping clinical presentations and limited clinician awareness, motivating systematic, data-driven approaches to detect APDS-associated phenotypic patterns in routine electronic health records. Traditional linear scoring systems cannot capture complex symptom interactions, while deep learning models, though expressive, often lack interpretability. To bridge this gap, we propose Shapley regression, a novel game-theoretic model replacing the linear predictor with a k-additive cooperative game, explicitly modeling co-occurrence of symptoms while maintaining the transparency and convexity of logistic regression. We carry out an empirical study of our lightweight method on eight public biomedical datasets, showing that a 2-additive model with $l_{2}$ regularization achieves an optimal trade-off between predictive power and noise robustness. We also apply it to a real-world cohort of 222 patients, on which Shapley regression accurately distinguished APDS cases from matched controls, confirming and validating phenotypes known to be associated with APDS, and facilitating the exploration of pairwise interactions between symptoms, validated by clinical experts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Shapley回归，一种基于博弈论的可解释模型，用于在电子健康记录中检测APDS（活化PI3Kδ综合征）相关症状模式。该模型用k-可加合作博弈替代线性预测器，显式建模症状共现，在保持逻辑回归透明性的同时提高了预测能力。在8个公开数据集和222名真实患者队列中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: APDS是一种罕见遗传性免疫疾病，症状高度异质，易与其他疾病混淆导致诊断延迟。传统线性评分系统无法捕捉症状间的复杂交互，而深度学习模型虽表达力强但缺乏可解释性。因此需要一种既能建模症状共现、又保持透明可解释的数据驱动方法，以辅助早期识别。
AI.method: 提出Shapley回归模型，用k-可加合作博弈替代线性预测器，显式建模症状共现（包括主效应和二阶交互效应），同时保持逻辑回归的凸性和可解释性。采用L2正则化的2-可加模型，在预测能力与噪声鲁棒性之间取得最优平衡。
AI.result: 在8个公开生物医学数据集上，2-可加L2正则化Shapley回归实现了预测能力与鲁棒性的最优权衡。在222名患者的真实队列中，该模型准确区分APDS病例与匹配对照，验证了已知的APDS相关表型，并发现了经临床专家验证的症状间成对交互作用。
AI.conclusion: Shapley回归作为一种轻量级、可解释的博弈论模型，有效桥接了传统线性模型与黑盒深度学习方法之间的鸿沟，为罕见病的早期识别和表型发现提供了实用工具。

title: SkillEvolver: Skill Learning as a Meta-Skill
summary: Agent skills today are static artifact: authored once -- by human curation or one-shot generation from parametric knowledge -- and then consumed unchanged, with no mechanism to improve from real use. We propose \textbf{SkillEvolver}, a lightweight, plug-and-play solution for online skill learning, in which a single meta-skill iteratively authors, deploys, and refines domain-specific skills. The learning target of SkillEvolver is the skill's prose and code, not model weights, so that the resulting artifact drops into any agent without retraining; and the meta-skill itself is just another skill, loaded through the same interface by any protocol-compliant CLI-agent. Unlike trace-distillation, the meta-skill refines only after deploying the learnt skill, such that the learning signal comes from failures another agent encounters while using it -- not from exploratory traces alone. Refinement iterations are governed by a fresh-agent overfit audit that catches possible leakage as well as deployed-skill-specific failures, including the silent-bypass mode in which a skill appears valid in content but is never invoked at runtime. On $83$ SkillsBench tasks spanning $15^{+}$ domains, SkillEvolver reaches $56.8\%$ accuracy versus $43.6\%$ for curated human skills and $29.9\%$ for the no-skill baseline; on three GPU kernel optimization tasks from KernelBench, it also raises mean speedup from $1.16$ to $1.51$ on average.

AI.tldr: SkillEvolver提出了一种轻量级、即插即用的在线技能学习方法，通过元技能迭代地撰写、部署和精炼领域特定技能，在83个SkillsBench任务上达到56.8%的准确率，并在GPU内核优化任务上实现1.51倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体技能是静态产物，一次编写后无法从实际使用中改进，缺乏在线学习机制。作者希望让技能能够在使用中自我迭代优化。
AI.method: SkillEvolver采用元技能架构：该元技能本身也是一项普通技能，通过相同接口加载到符合协议的CLI智能体中。学习目标是技能的描述文本和代码（而非模型权重），因此学习到的技能可直接部署到任何智能体而无需重新训练。精炼迭代基于"新鲜智能体过拟合审核"机制，只在部署所学技能后、当其他智能体使用它遇到失败时才进行精炼（而非仅凭探索轨迹），该审核机制能捕获信息泄露、静默绕过等部署后特有的失败模式。
AI.result: 在83个SkillsBench任务（覆盖15+领域）上，SkillEvolver达到56.8%准确率，高于人工策划技能的43.6%和无技能基线的29.9%。在KernelBench的三个GPU内核优化任务上，平均加速比从1.16提升至1.51。
AI.conclusion: SkillEvolver证明了通过在部署后从实际使用失败中学习，技能可以超越人工策划的静态技能；其轻量级、无需重新训练的设计使得在线技能学习成为实用可行的范式。

title: Non-Monotonic Latency in Apple MPS Decoding: KV Cache Interactions and Execution Regimes
summary: Autoregressive inference is typically assumed to scale predictably with decoding length, and key-value (KV) caching is widely regarded as a universally beneficial optimization for accelerating decoding. In this work, we identify unexpected non-monotonic latency behavior in the Apple MPS backend, where latency changes abruptly across nearby decoding configurations. Using transformer models from multiple families (GPT-2, BLOOM, and OPT), we observe latency spikes of up to 21x within specific decoding-budget intervals, followed by recovery at neighboring configurations. Controlled experiments show that these anomalies are not explained by memory pressure or prefill cost, but are instead consistent with backend execution dynamics, while CPU and NVIDIA T4 (CUDA) exhibit smooth monotonic scaling under identical conditions. Our findings highlight the importance of hardware-aware evaluation for autoregressive inference and caution against relying on aggregated decoding-budget benchmarks, as performance can vary discontinuously across nearby configurations.

AI.tldr: 在Apple MPS后端的自回归推理中，KV缓存并未如预期般带来平滑加速，而是出现了高达21倍的异常延迟峰值，且该现象在特定解码预算区间内呈现非单调变化，而CPU和NVIDIA T4（CUDA）在相同条件下表现正常。
AI.motivation: 揭示Apple MPS后端中KV缓存导致的自回归推理延迟非单调行为，挑战"KV缓存普遍有益"的假设，并强调硬件感知评估的重要性。
AI.method: 在GPT-2、BLOOM和OPT等多个Transformer模型家族上，对比Apple MPS、CPU和NVIDIA T4（CUDA）后端的自回归推理延迟，通过控制实验排除内存压力和预填充成本的影响。
AI.result: Apple MPS后端在特定解码预算区间内出现高达21倍的延迟尖峰，且延迟随解码长度呈非单调变化；CPU和NVIDIA T4（CUDA）则呈现平滑单调缩放。
AI.conclusion: 自回归推理的性能可能因硬件后端不同而呈现不连续变化，应避免依赖聚合解码预算基准，需要硬件感知的评估方法。

title: SLASH the Sink: Sharpening Structural Attention Inside LLMs
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) show remarkable semantic understanding but often struggle with structural understanding when processing graph topologies in a serialized format. Existing solutions rely on training external graph-based adapters or fine-tuning, which incur high costs and lost generalizability. In this work, we investigate the internal mechanisms of LLMs and present a critical finding: LLMs spontaneously reconstruct the graph's topology internally, evidenced by a distinct "sawtooth" pattern in their attention maps that structurally aligns with the "token-level adjacency matrix". However, this intrinsic structural understanding is diluted by the attention sink. We theoretically formalize this dilution as a representation bottleneck, stemming from a fundamental conflict: the model's anisotropic bias, essential for language tasks, suppresses the topology-aware local aggregation required for graph reasoning. To address this, we propose a training-free solution, named StructuraL Attention SHarpening (Slash), which amplifies this internal structural understanding via a plug-and-play attention redistribution. Experiments on pure graph tasks and molecular prediction validate Slash delivers significant and consistent performance gains across diverse LLMs.

AI.tldr: LLMs在处理序列化图结构时存在内部结构理解被注意力汇稀释的问题，本文提出无需训练的Slash方法，通过注意力重分配放大模型内在的结构理解能力，在图任务和分子预测中取得显著提升。
