AI.motivation: 现有LLMs在图拓扑理解上存在困难，而基于外部适配器或微调的方法成本高且泛化性差，因此需要探索LLMs内部机制并开发轻量级解决方案。
AI.method: 首先发现LLMs注意力图中存在与"token级邻接矩阵"结构对齐的"锯齿"模式，证明模型内部自发重构了图拓扑。随后理论形式化注意力汇导致的表征瓶颈，并提出无需训练的StructuraL Attention SHarpening (Slash)方法，通过即插即用的注意力重分配来放大这种内部结构理解能力。
AI.result: 在纯图任务和分子预测任务上，Slash方法在不同LLMs上均取得显著且一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: LLMs内部已具备一定的图结构理解能力，通过简单的注意力重分配而非昂贵的外部适配或微调即可有效释放这种能力，为提升LLM在图任务上的表现提供了低成本方案。

title: Transformer autoencoder with local attention for sparse and irregular time series with application on risk estimation
summary: This paper introduces a framework specifically designed for sparse and irregular time series {risk estimation}. It is based on a Transformer Autoencoder with local attention, which leverages the powerful pattern identification capabilities of transformers complemented by traditional data cleaning and normalization methods. It efficiently captures relevant patterns within irregular sequences suffering from sparse data collection, benefiting from the discriminative ability of the local attention mechanism. The proposed framework is applied to a real-world case study, on the risk estimation of non-technical losses in electrical power systems in a wide area in Greece. Non-technical losses in electrical power systems, primarily stemming from electricity theft, pose significant economic and operational challenges. Detecting these anomalies is particularly challenging due to the inherent sparse and irregular nature of real-world data collection practices. Traditional risk estimation methods struggle with effectively capturing long-range dependencies and robustly handling such data characteristics. We demonstrate that our approach effectively yields highly discriminative latent features, which results in more consistent risk estimation compared with existing state-of-the-art and widely used methods. It achieves high recall and precision, meeting the critical objectives of the problem. As such, our solution offers a robust and effective tool for risk detection in irregular time series datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于局部注意力Transformer自编码器的框架，用于处理稀疏和不规则时间序列的风险估计问题，并在希腊电力系统非技术损失（窃电）检测中验证了其有效性，相比现有方法在召回率和精确率上表现更优。
AI.motivation: 电力系统中的非技术损失（主要由窃电导致）带来显著的经济和运营挑战，而实际数据采集的稀疏性和不规则性使得传统风险估计方法难以有效捕获长期依赖关系并稳健处理此类数据特征。
AI.method: 基于Transformer自编码器架构，引入局部注意力机制，结合传统数据清洗与归一化方法，以高效捕获稀疏不规则序列中的相关模式。
AI.result: 该方法能够产生高度判别性的潜在特征，在风险估计的一致性和召回率、精确率上均优于现有的最先进及广泛使用的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为不规则时间序列数据集中的风险检测提供了一种稳健且有效的工具。

title: Consistency as a Testable Property: Statistical Methods to Evaluate AI Agent Reliability
summary: This paper establishes a rigorous measurement science for AI agent reliability, providing a foundational framework for quantifying consistency under semantically preserving perturbations. By leveraging $U$-statistics for output-level reliability and kernel-based metrics for trajectory-level stability, we offer a principled approach to evaluating agents across diverse operating conditions. Our proposal highlights the important distinction between the core capability and execution robustness of an agent, showing that minor task-level variations can induce complete strategy breakdowns despite the agent possessing the requisite knowledge for the task. We validate our framework through extensive experiments on three agentic benchmarks, demonstrating that trajectory-level consistency metrics provide far greater diagnostic sensitivity than traditional pass@1 rates. By providing the mathematical tools to isolate where and why agents deviate, we enable the identification and rectification of architectural concerns that hinder the deployment of agents in high-stakes, real-world environments.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了AI智能体可靠性的严格度量科学框架，利用U-统计量和基于核的度量分别评估输出级可靠性和轨迹级稳定性，并通过实验验证了轨迹级一致性指标相比传统pass@1率具有更强的诊断灵敏度，能够有效识别和修复阻碍智能体在高风险环境中部署的架构问题。
AI.motivation: 现有AI智能体评估缺乏对可靠性的严格量化方法，传统指标（如pass@1）无法有效区分智能体的核心能力与执行鲁棒性，也难以诊断任务级微小扰动导致的策略崩溃问题，亟需建立数学上严谨的可靠性度量框架。
AI.method: 提出基于U-统计量的输出级可靠性度量与基于核方法的轨迹级稳定性度量，通过语义保持扰动下的输出一致性和轨迹相似性来量化智能体可靠性，并区分核心能力与执行鲁棒性两个维度。
AI.result: 在三个智能体基准上的实验表明，轨迹级一致性指标相比传统的pass@1率具有更强的诊断灵敏度，能够检测到任务级微小扰动对智能体策略的破坏性影响。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了隔离和诊断智能体偏差的数学工具，有助于识别和修复影响智能体在高风险真实环境中部署的架构缺陷。

title: Physics-Informed Neural PDE Solvers via Spatio-Temporal MeanFlow
summary: Deep learning paradigms, such as PINNs and neural operators, have significantly advanced the solving of PDEs. However, they often struggle to capture the continuous integral nature of physical systems, relying either on pointwise residuals that ignore the integral perspective or on pre-discretized temporal grids. Drawing inspiration from MeanFlow, a continuous-time integrator recently developed to efficiently solve generative ODEs, we introduce Spatio-Temporal MeanFlow, which functions as a novel PDE solver learning the finite-interval evolution of physical states. By substituting the generative velocity field with the physical PDE operator, we transform multi-step numerical integration into an efficient prediction with a freely controllable integration length. Crucially, we extend the original MeanFlow constraint from the temporal to the spatio-temporal domain, coupling time evolution with spatial consistency. This yields a unified framework naturally accommodating both time-dependent and stationary PDEs. Comprehensive experiments on benchmarks demonstrate that our approach achieves superior accuracy and inference efficiency over representative baselines. Furthermore, the proposed integral constraint enables excellent generalization to out-of-distribution initial conditions and varying spatial resolutions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出时空平均流（Spatio-Temporal MeanFlow），一种基于连续时间积分的新型PDE求解器，通过将物理PDE算子替换生成速度场，并将积分约束从时间域扩展到时空域，实现灵活积分长度的高效预测，在多项基准上取得优于现有方法的精度和效率，且具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法（如PINNs、神经算子）在求解PDE时存在局限：要么依赖忽略积分视角的点态残差，要么依赖预离散的时间网格，难以捕捉物理系统的连续积分本质。作者希望构建一个真正连续时间且能灵活控制积分步长的PDE求解器。
AI.method: 受MeanFlow连续时间积分器的启发，作者将生成速度场替换为物理PDE算子，将多步数值积分转化为单步预测；并将原始MeanFlow的约束从时间域扩展到时空域，耦合时间演化与空间一致性，形成一个统一框架，同时适用于时间依赖和稳态PDE。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上，该方法在精度和推理效率方面均优于代表性基线方法；此外，所提出的积分约束使得模型对分布外初始条件和不同空间分辨率展现出良好的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 时空平均流为PDE求解提供了一种连续时间积分的新范式，兼顾精度、效率与泛化能力，是对现有深度PDE求解方法的有效补充。

title: PrimeKG-CL: A Continual Graph Learning Benchmark on Evolving Biomedical Knowledge Graphs
summary: Biomedical knowledge graphs underwrite drug repurposing and clinical decision support, yet the upstream ontologies they depend on update on independent cycles that add millions of edges and deprecate hundreds of thousands more between releases. Yet existing continual graph learning has been studied almost exclusively on synthetic random splits of static, generic KGs, a regime that cannot reproduce the asynchronous, structured evolution real biomedical KGs undergo. To this end, we introduce PrimeKG-CL, a CGL benchmark built from nine authoritative biomedical databases (129K+ nodes, 8.1M+ edges, 10 node types, 30 relation types) with two genuine temporal snapshots (June 2021, July 2023; 5.83M edges added, 889K removed, 7.21M persistent), 10 entity-type-grouped tasks, multimodal node features, and a per-task persistent/added/removed test stratification. On three tasks (biomedical relationship prediction, entity classification, KGQA), we evaluate six CL strategies across four KGE decoders, plus LKGE, an LLM-RAG agent, and CMKL. We find that decoder choice and continual learning strategy interact strongly: no single strategy performs best across all decoders, and mismatched combinations can significantly degrade performance. Moreover, only DistMult exhibits a clear separation between persistent and deprecated knowledge, indicating that standard metrics conflate retention of still-valid facts with failure to forget outdated ones; this effect is absent under RotatE. In addition, multimodal features improve entity-level tasks by up to 60%, and a recent CKGE framework (IncDE) failed to scale to our 5.67M-triple base task across five attempts up to 350GB RAM. Data, pipeline, baselines, and the stratified split are released openly. Dataset:huggingface.co/datasets/yradwan147/PrimeKGCL|Code:github.com/yradwan147/primekg-cl-neurips2026

AI.tldr: 本文提出PrimeKG-CL，一个基于真实生物医学知识图谱动态演化的持续图学习基准，包含9个权威数据库、两个真实时间快照（2021年6月和2023年7月），评估了多种持续学习策略和知识图谱嵌入解码器，发现解码器与学习策略存在强交互作用，且标准指标无法区分持久知识与已废弃知识的保留效果。
AI.motivation: 现有持续图学习研究几乎全部基于静态通用KG的随机合成切分，无法复现真实生物医学KG所经历的异步、结构化演化过程。因此需要构建一个能反映真实生物医学KG动态演化特性的持续学习基准。
AI.method: 构建PrimeKG-CL基准，包含9个生物医学数据库（129K+节点、8.1M+边），两个真实时间快照（2021年6月和2023年7月），5.83M边新增、889K边删除、7.21M边保留。设计了10个实体类型分组任务、多模态节点特征及三层持久/新增/删除测试分层。在生物医学关系预测、实体分类、KGQA三个任务上评估了6种持续学习策略×4种KGE解码器，以及LKGE（LLM-RAG）、CMKL等基线。
AI.result: 1) 解码器选择与持续学习策略存在强交互，没有一种策略在所有解码器上最优，错误组合会显著降低性能；2) 仅DistMult能清晰区分持久知识与废弃知识，标准指标会将两者的保留效果混为一谈，RotatE则无此区分效果；3) 多模态特征可将实体级任务提升高达60%；4) 最新CKGE框架IncDE在5.67M三元组的基础任务上无法扩展，5次尝试均失败（最高350GB RAM）。
AI.conclusion: 真实生物医学KG的持续学习需要专门设计的基准来评估，标准CGL设置无法捕捉实际演化特性；解码器与策略的匹配至关重要；未来研究需关注废弃知识的遗忘与持久知识的保留之间的解耦问题。

title: When and Why Grouping Attention Heads Accelerates Muon Optimization
summary: Muon orthogonalizes matrix updates, but multi-head attention naturally operates at the level of heads. This granularity mismatch raises the question of whether Muon should be applied to the full attention projection, to individual heads, or to intermediate head groups. We study this question through a one-step descent comparison between full-matrix Muon and group-wise Muon. Our analysis reveals a trade-off between the \textbf{group-wise whitening gain} from group-wise updates and the \textbf{grouping-induced norm cost}, an additional update-norm cost caused by replacing full-matrix whitening with group-wise whitening. Motivated by this trade-off, we propose \textbf{Group Muon}, which treats head group size and grouping rule as optimizer hyperparameters. On GPT-2 Small trained on FineWeb, appropriate grouping improves validation loss over both full-QKV Muon and fully head-wise MuonSplit.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Muon优化器在多头注意力机制中的粒度匹配问题，提出了Group Muon方法，通过头分组策略在组间白化增益和分组范数代价之间取得平衡，在GPT-2 Small训练中优于全矩阵Muon和逐头MuonSplit。
AI.motivation: Muon优化器的正交化更新与多头注意力的头粒度之间存在不匹配，需要确定Muon应应用于完整注意力投影、单个头还是中间头组。
AI.method: 通过一步下降比较分析全矩阵Muon与逐组Muon之间的权衡，提出Group Muon，将头组大小和分组规则作为优化器超参数。
AI.result: 在FineWeb数据集上训练GPT-2 Small，适当的分组在验证损失上优于全QKV Muon和完全逐头的MuonSplit。
AI.conclusion: 分组策略有效缓解了粒度不匹配问题，在优化性能上取得了更好的结果。

title: A Reflective Storytelling Agent for Older Adults: Integrating Argumentation Schemes and Argument Mining in LLM-Based Personalised Narratives
comment: Submitted to ACM Transactions on Intelligent Systems and Technology (TIST)
summary:
This work investigates whether knowledge-driven large language model (LLM)-based storytelling can support purposeful narrative interaction with a digital companion for older adults. To address known limitations of LLMs, including hallucinations and limited transparency, we present a reflective storytelling agent integrating knowledge graphs, user modelling, argumentation theory, and argument mining to guide and inspect narrative generation.
  The study consisted of two phases. Phase I employed participatory design involving 11 domain experts in a formative evaluation that informed iterative refinement. The resulting system generates narratives grounded in structured user models representing health-promoting activities and motivations. Phase II involved 55 older adults evaluating persona-based narratives across four prompts and two creativity levels. Participants assessed perceived purpose, usefulness, cultural relatability, and inconsistencies. The system additionally computed hallucination-risk indicators to evaluate generated narratives.
  Participants recognised personally relevant purposes in roughly two thirds of narratives, while argument-based purposes were identified in around half of these cases. Cultural recognisability strongly influenced willingness to use the functionality, whereas minor inconsistencies were often tolerated when narratives remained understandable and personally relevant. Narratives with higher hallucination-risk indicators were more often perceived as inconsistent, while higher argument-quality indicators tended to co-occur with higher clarity and meaningfulness ratings.
  Overall, the study positions argument mining as a reflective inspection mechanism for comparing formal grounding signals with human evaluations in health-oriented LLM storytelling for older adults.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于知识驱动的大语言模型（LLM）叙事能否支持面向老年人的数字伴侣进行有目的性的互动。提出了一种结合知识图谱、用户建模、论证理论和论据挖掘的反省式叙事代理，用于引导和检查叙事生成。研究分两阶段：第一阶段通过11位领域专家的参与式设计进行形成性评估；第二阶段由55位老年人评估基于人物角色的叙事。参与者在约三分之二的叙事中识别出个人相关目的，文化可识别性显著影响使用意愿，而轻微不一致通常可被容忍。论证挖掘可作为面向老年人健康导向LLM叙事的反省检查机制。
AI.motivation: 探索知识驱动的LLM叙事能否支持面向老年人的数字伴侣进行有目的性的互动，并解决LLM存在的幻觉和透明度有限等问题。
AI.method: 提出反思性叙事代理，集成知识图谱、用户建模、论证理论和论据挖掘；两阶段研究：阶段I为11位专家的参与式设计，阶段II为55位老年人评估四种提示和两种创造力水平的人物叙事。
AI.result: 参与者在约三分之二叙事中识别出个人相关目的，论证目的在其中约一半被识别；文化可识别性显著影响使用意愿，轻微不一致被容忍；高风险幻觉叙事更容易被认为不一致，高论证质量指标与更高清晰度和有意义性共存。
AI.conclusion: 论证挖掘可作为健康导向LLM故事生成的反射性检查机制，用于比较形式化信号与人类评估。

title: From Mechanistic to Compositional Interpretability
summary: Mechanistic interpretability aims to explain neural model behaviour by reverse-engineering learned computational structure into human-understandable components. Without a formal framework, however, mechanistic explanations cannot be objectively verified, compared, or composed. We introduce compositional interpretability, a category-theoretic framework grounded in the principles of compositionality and minimum description length. Compositional interpretations are pairs of syntactic and semantic mappings that must commute to enforce consistency between a model's decomposition and its observed behaviour. We deconstruct explanation quality into measures of faithfulness and complexity to cast interpretability as a constrained optimisation problem, and introduce compressive refinement to systematically restructure models into simpler parts without altering their function. Finally, we prove a parsimony criterion under which syntactic compression theoretically guarantees more concise, human-aligned explanations. Our framework situates prominent mechanistic methods as subclasses of refinement, and clarifies why their compressibility heuristics tend to align with human interpretability. Our work provides a measurable, optimisable foundation for automating the discovery and evaluation of mechanistic explanations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了组合可解释性（compositional interpretability）这一基于范畴论的形式化框架，将机制解释定义为语法与语义映射的交换对，并通过忠实度和复杂度两个维度将可解释性转化为约束优化问题，最终证明在语法压缩下更简洁的解释理论上更符合人类理解。
AI.motivation: 现有机制可解释性缺乏形式化框架，导致解释无法被客观验证、比较或组合，亟需一个可度量、可优化的理论基础。
AI.method: 利用范畴论中的组合性原理和最小描述长度原则，定义语法映射与语义映射的交换条件来保证解释一致性；引入压缩精炼（compressive refinement）方法在保持功能不变的前提下系统性地重构模型结构；证明简约性准则（parsimony criterion）以确保语法压缩能产生更简洁且符合人类认知的解释。
AI.result: 将现有主流机制可解释方法归类为压缩精炼的子类，阐明其压缩启发式（compressibility heuristics）与人类可解释性一致的数学原因。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为自动发现和评估机制解释提供了可度量、可优化的理论基础，有望推动机制可解释性从定性分析走向形式化、自动化的方向。

title: Bridging Sequence and Graph Structure for Epigenetic Age Prediction
summary: Epigenetic clocks based on DNA methylation have emerged as powerful tools for estimating biological age, with broad applications in aging research, age-related disease studies, and longevity science. Despite advances across machine learning approaches to epigenetic age prediction, spanning penalised linear regression, deep feedforward networks, residual architectures, and graph neural networks, no existing method jointly models co-methylation graph structure and site-specific DNA sequence context within a unified framework. We propose a unified sequence--graph integration framework for epigenetic age prediction that addresses this gap, integrating eight-dimensional DNA sequence statistical features through a lightweight gated modulation mechanism that adaptively scales each site's methylation signal according to its sequence-determined biological relevance prior to graph convolution. Evaluated on 3,707 blood methylation samples against a comprehensive set of baselines, our method achieves a test MAE of 3.149 years, a 12.8\% improvement over the strongest graph-based baseline. Biologically informed statistical features outperform CNN-based sequence encoding, demonstrating that handcrafted sequence features are more effective than end-to-end learned representations in this data regime. Post-hoc interpretability analysis identifies CpG density and local adenine frequency as features with age-dependent importance shifts, consistent with known mechanisms of age-related hypermethylation at CpG-dense promoter regions. Our code is at https://github.com/yaoli2022/graphage-seq.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种统一序列-图集成框架GraphAge-Seq，通过门控调制机制将DNA序列统计特征与共甲基化图结构结合，在3,707个血液甲基化样本上实现3.149年测试MAE，较最强图基线提升12.8%。
AI.motivation: 现有表观遗传时钟方法（包括惩罚线性回归、深度前馈网络、残差架构和图神经网络）均未能在统一框架中联合建模共甲基化图结构和位点特异性DNA序列上下文。
AI.method: 提出统一序列-图集成框架，将八维DNA序列统计特征通过轻量级门控调制机制自适应缩放各位点的甲基化信号，再输入图卷积网络进行年龄预测。
AI.result: 在3,707个血液甲基化样本上测试MAE为3.149年，较最强图基线提升12.8%；生物学统计特征优于CNN端到端学习特征；CpG密度和局部腺嘌呤频率呈现年龄依赖的重要性变化。
AI.conclusion: 手工设计的序列统计特征在该数据规模下比端到端学习的表示更有效，且模型具有可解释性，识别出与已知年龄相关高甲基化机制一致的生物学特征。

title: A Single Deep Preference-Conditioned Policy for Learning Pareto Coverage Sets
summary: Preference-conditioned multi-objective reinforcement learning aims to learn a single policy that captures trade-offs across preferences, but under nonlinear scalarization the uniqueness and continuity of the preference-to-solution correspondence remain unclear. We study this problem in tabular multi-objective Markov decision processes (MDPs) using smooth Tchebycheff scalarization as a monotone utility. Under mild interior conditions on the preference set, we prove that each preference induces a unique Pareto-optimal return vector and that this vector depends Lipschitz-continuously on the preference, providing a principled foundation for preference sweeping toward dense Pareto-front coverage. To compute these targets, we formulate the problem over occupancy measures and derive Concave Mirror Descent Policy Iteration (CMDPI), which achieves an $O(1/k)$ objective-suboptimality rate. We further show that each update is equivalent to solving a Kullback-Leibler-regularized MDP with the previous policy as reference, yielding a policy-iteration interpretation and finite-iterate policy continuity across preferences. We instantiate the update as a deep actor-critic algorithm preserving previous-policy regularization. On eight MO-Gymnasium tasks, it achieves the best average hypervolume rank among recent baselines and strong expected-utility performance. Continuous-control experiments indicate gains beyond the discrete-action setting.

AI.tldr: 本文在表格型多目标MDP中，证明了基于光滑Tchebycheff标量化的偏好-最优回报映射的唯一性与Lipschitz连续性，并提出了CMDPI算法（O(1/k)收敛率），在8个MO-Gymnasium任务上取得了最优平均超体积排名。
AI.motivation: 非线性标量化下偏好到解的对应关系（唯一性与连续性）尚不明确，缺乏理论基础来支持偏好扫描以实现密集帕累托前沿覆盖。
AI.method: 在偏好集满足温和内点条件时证明偏好-最优回报映射的唯一性与Lipschitz连续性；在占用测度上建模，推导CMDPI（凹镜像下降策略迭代），证明每步等价于以原策略为参考的KL正则化MDP，并实例化为深度演员-评论家算法。
AI.result: CMDPI在8个MO-Gymnasium任务中取得最佳平均超体积排名，在连续控制实验中表现超过离散动作场景。
AI.conclusion: 为偏好条件多目标强化学习提供了理论基础，验证了CMDPI算法在离散和连续动作空间上的有效性。

title: Agent-First Tool API: A Semantic Interface Paradigm for Enterprise AI Agent Systems
summary: As AI agents transition from research prototypes to enterprise production systems, the tool interfaces they consume remain rooted in human-oriented CRUD paradigms. This paper identifies five fundamental architectural mismatches between conventional APIs and autonomous agent requirements: exact-identifier dependence, rendering-oriented responses, single-shot interaction assumptions, user-equivalent authorization, and opaque error semantics. We propose the Agent-First Tool API paradigm, comprising three integrated mechanisms: (1) a Six-Verb Semantic Protocol that decomposes tool interactions into search, resolve, preview, execute, verify, and recover phases; (2) a Normalized Tool Contract (NTC) providing structured decision-support metadata including confidence scores, evidence chains, and suggested next actions; and (3) a dual-layer governance pipeline combining static capability policies with dynamic risk escalation. The paradigm is implemented and validated in a production multi-tenant SaaS platform serving 85 registered tools across 6 business domains. Comparative experiments on 50 real operational tasks demonstrate that Agent-First APIs achieve 88% end-to-end task success rate versus 64% for optimized CRUD baselines (+37.5%), while reducing required human interventions by 72.7% and improving autonomous error recovery by 5.8x. We establish that the paradigm is orthogonal and complementary to transport-layer standards such as MCP, operating as the semantic application layer above existing tool discovery and invocation protocols.

AI.tldr: 本文提出面向AI Agent的Agent-First Tool API范式，包含六动词语义协议、标准化工具合约和双层治理管道，在85个工具的SaaS平台上验证，任务成功率从64%提升至88%，人工干预减少72.7%，错误恢复能力提升5.8倍。
AI.motivation: 传统API基于人类使用的CRUD范式设计，与自主AI Agent的需求存在根本性架构不匹配，包括精确标识符依赖、面向渲染的响应、单次交互假设、用户级授权和不透明错误语义五大问题。
AI.method: 提出Agent-First Tool API范式，包含三个集成机制：(1) Six-Verb Semantic Protocol将工具交互分解为search/resolve/preview/execute/verify/recover六个阶段；(2) Normalized Tool Contract提供结构化决策支持元数据；(3) 双层治理管道结合静态能力策略与动态风险升级。
AI.result: 在85个注册工具、6个业务领域的生产多租户SaaS平台上验证。50个真实运维任务对比实验显示：端到端任务成功率88%（CRUD基线64%，提升37.5%），人工干预减少72.7%，自主错误恢复能力提升5.8倍。
AI.conclusion: 该范式与MCP等传输层标准正交互补，作为现有工具发现和调用协议之上的语义应用层运作，为AI Agent与工具交互提供了系统性的架构设计原则。

title: Muon-OGD: Muon-based Spectral Orthogonal Gradient Projection for LLM Continual Learning
summary: A central challenge in continual learning for large language models (LLMs) is catastrophic forgetting, where adapting to new tasks can substantially degrade performance on previously learned ones. Existing projection-based methods mitigate such interference by restricting parameter updates to subspaces that are orthogonal to directions associated with past tasks. However, these methods are typically formulated under Euclidean parameter geometry, with update magnitudes and projections governed by the Frobenius norm. The recent empirical success of the Muon optimizer, which applies orthogonalized matrix updates and admits a spectral-norm interpretation, suggests that Frobenius geometry may not be the most effective choice for matrix-valued LLM parameters. Motivated by this observation, we propose Muon-OGD, a spectral-norm-aware continual learning framework that integrates Muon-style operator-norm geometry with orthogonal projection constraints. Our method formulates each update as a spectral-norm-constrained optimization problem with linear non-interference constraints, and solves it efficiently through dual iterations and Newton--Schulz matrix-sign approximations. By applying orthogonalized momentum updates that avoid protected directions associated with prior tasks, Muon-OGD aims to improve the stability--plasticity trade-off in sequential LLM adaptation. We evaluate the proposed method on standard continual learning benchmarks, TRACE, and domain-specific Coding--Math--Medical curricula using both encoder--decoder and decoder-only architectures. Empirically, Muon-OGD consistently improves over sequential fine-tuning and competitive orthogonal-gradient baselines, while remaining computationally scalable. These results suggest that spectral-norm-aware update geometry provides a practical and effective alternative to Frobenius-norm projection for continual learning in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Muon-OGD方法，将Muon优化器的谱范数几何与正交投影约束相结合，用于解决大语言模型持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，在多个基准上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于投影的持续学习方法在欧几里得参数几何下使用Frobenius范数进行更新约束，而Muon优化器的成功表明谱范数几何可能更适用于LLM的矩阵参数，因此需要探索谱范数感知的持续学习框架。
AI.method: 提出Muon-OGD框架：将每次更新建模为具有线性非干扰约束的谱范数约束优化问题，通过对偶迭代和Newton-Schulz矩阵符号近似高效求解；应用正交化动量更新以避开与先前任务相关的受保护方向。
AI.result: 在TRACE基准和代码-数学-医学课程上，使用编码器-解码器和仅解码器架构进行评估，Muon-OGD持续优于顺序微调和竞争性的正交梯度基线方法，且计算上可扩展。
AI.conclusion: 谱范数感知的更新几何为LLM持续学习提供了一种实用且有效的Frobenius范数投影替代方案，改善了稳定性-可塑性权衡。

title: Deep Arguing
summary: Deep learning has become the dominant approach for creating high capacity, scalable models across diverse data modalities. However, because these models rely on a large number of learned parameters, tightly couple feature extraction with task objectives, and often lack explicit reasoning mechanisms, it is difficult for humans to understand how they arrive at their predictions. Understanding what representations emerge and why they arise from the training data remains an open challenge. We introduce Deep Arguing, a novel neurosymbolic approach that integrates deep learning with argumentation construction and reasoning for interpretable classification with different data modalities. In our approach deep neural networks construct an argumentation structure wherein data points support their assigned label and attack different ones. Using differentiable argumentation semantics for reasoning, the model is trained end-to-end to jointly learn feature representation and argumentative interactions. This results in argumentation structures providing faithful case-based explanations for predictions. Structure constraints over the argumentation graph guide learning, improving both interpretability and predictive performance. Experiments with tabular and imaging datasets show that Deep Arguing achieves performance competitive with standard baselines whilst offering interpretable argumentative reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出Deep Arguing，一种将深度学习与论证推理结合的神经符号方法，通过可微的论证语义实现端到端可解释分类。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型虽然性能优异，但由于参数量大、特征提取与任务目标紧密耦合且缺乏显式推理机制，导致其预测过程难以被人类理解。
AI.method: 构建论证结构，数据点支持自身标签并攻击其他标签；利用可微论证语义进行推理；通过图结构约束引导学习，实现端到端联合训练。
AI.result: 在表格数据和影像数据集上，Deep Arguing在保持与标准基线竞争性能的同时，提供了可解释的论证推理。
AI.conclusion: 神经符号方法能有效融合深度学习的表达能力与符号推理的可解释性，论证图的结构约束可同时提升可解释性和预测性能。

title: MolWorld: Molecule World Models for Actionable Molecular Optimization
summary: Molecular optimization in drug discovery aims to discover molecules with improved target properties, but practical lead optimization often requires more than high predicted scores. A useful candidate should also be actionable: it should be reachable from known molecules through valid local structural transformations, so that it can be interpreted as a plausible revision within an evolving chemical series. Existing de novo and single-molecule optimization methods do not explicitly model such reachability, especially when both the target molecules and the intermediate molecules connecting them to known compounds are unknown. In this work, we formulate actionable molecular optimization as sequential expansion of a molecule-transfer graph, where nodes are molecules and edges encode valid local transformations. We propose MolWorld, a molecule world model-guided framework that treats the current molecule-transfer graph as an evolving search state. At each iteration, MolWorld selects local anchor contexts, generates candidate molecules conditioned on these contexts, evaluates their properties, and uses a learned world model to update the evolving molecule world by retaining admissible candidates and inserting them into the molecule-transfer graph. The expanded molecule world then guides subsequent optimization. Experiments on property optimization and docking-based tasks show that MolWorld discovers high-property molecules while maintaining substantially stronger structural connectivity, supporting actionable and sequential molecular design.

AI.tldr: MolWorld 是一个基于分子世界模型的框架，通过将分子优化建模为分子-转移图的顺序扩展，在保持结构连通性的同时发现高属性分子，支持可操作的、序列化的分子设计。
AI.motivation: 现有分子优化方法（包括从头设计和单分子优化）未能显式建模分子的"可操作性"（reachability），即候选分子应通过有效的局部结构变换从已知分子可达，从而被解释为合理的设计修正。
AI.method: 将分子优化形式化为分子-转移图（节点为分子，边为有效局部变换）的顺序扩展；在每个迭代中，MolWorld 选择局部锚点上下文、生成候选分子、评估属性，并使用学习的世界模型更新分子世界，保留可接受的候选分子并插入图中，从而引导后续优化。
AI.result: 在属性优化和基于对接的任务中，MolWorld 能发现高属性分子，同时保持显著更强的结构连通性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架支持可操作且序列化的分子设计，弥合了高预测分数与实际可用性之间的鸿沟。

title: LLM Jaggedness Unlocks Scientific Creativity
summary: As artificial intelligence advances, models are not improving uniformly. Instead, progress unfolds in a jagged fashion, with capabilities growing unevenly across tasks, domains, and model scales. In this work, we examine this dynamic jaggedness through the lens of scientific idea generation. We introduce SciAidanBench, a benchmark of open-ended scientific questions designed to measure the scientific creativity of large language models (LLMs). Given a scientific question, models are asked to generate as many unique and coherent ideas as possible, with the total number of valid responses serving as a proxy for creative potential. Evaluating 19 base models across 8 providers (30 total variants including reasoning versions), we find that jaggedness manifests both across models and within models. First, in a cross-task comparison between general and scientific creativity, improvements in general creativity do not translate uniformly to scientific creativity, revealing divergent capability profiles across models. Second, at the prompt level, stronger models do not improve uniformly; instead, they exhibit high variability, with bursts of creativity on some questions and limited performance on others. Third, at the domain level, individual models display uneven strengths across scientific subfields, reflecting fragmented internal capability profiles. Finally, we show that this jaggedness can be harnessed. We explore mechanisms of inference-time compute, knowledge pooling, and brainstorming to combine models effectively and construct meta-model ensembles that outperform any single model. Our results position jaggedness not as a limitation, but as a resource, a structural feature of AI progress that, when understood and leveraged, can amplify LLM-driven scientific creativity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SciAidanBench基准评估LLM的科学创造力，发现AI能力呈现"锯齿状"不均匀进步模式：跨模型通用与科学创造力不统一、同一模型内问题间表现差异大、不同科学子领域能力不均衡。通过推理时计算、知识池化和头脑风暴方法构建元模型集成，可超越单一模型表现，将锯齿性从限制转化为可用的结构特征。
AI.motivation: AI模型的能力并非均匀进步，而是在任务、领域和模型规模上呈现锯齿状不均衡发展。作者希望通过科学创意生成这一具体场景，系统性地测量和理解这种动态锯齿性，并探索如何利用而非克服这一特性。
AI.method: 构建SciAidanBench基准，包含开放式科学问题，要求模型生成尽可能多独特且连贯的想法，以有效回答总数作为创造力代理指标。评估19个基础模型（含8个提供商共30个变体），在跨任务、提示级别和领域级别三个维度分析锯齿性，并探索推理时计算、知识池化和头脑风暴三种机制构建元模型集成。
AI.result: 锯齿性在多维度存在：1)通用创造力与科学创造力改进不统一；2)强模型在不同问题上表现高变异性和创意爆发；3)单个模型在不同科学子领域能力不均衡。元模型集成方法可超越任何单一模型表现。
AI.conclusion: AI能力的锯齿性不是限制而是可被利用的资源，是AI进步的结构性特征。通过理解和利用这一特性，可以放大LLM驱动的科学创造力。

title: Outlier detection for patient monitoring and alerting
summary: We develop and evaluate a data-driven approach for detecting unusual (anomalous) patient-management decisions using past patient cases stored in electronic health records (EHRs). Our hypothesis is that a patient-management decision that is unusual with respect to past patient care may be due to an error and that it is worthwhile to generate an alert if such a decision is encountered. We evaluate this hypothesis using data obtained from EHRs of 4486 post-cardiac surgical patients and a subset of 222 alerts generated from the data. We base the evaluation on the opinions of a panel of experts. The results of the study support our hypothesis that the outlier-based alerting can lead to promising true alert rates. We observed true alert rates that ranged from 25\% to 66\% for a variety of patient-management actions, with 66\% corresponding to the strongest outliers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数据驱动的方法，利用电子健康记录（EHRs）中的历史病例检测异常的患者管理决策。通过对4486名心脏术后患者的EHR数据和222条警报进行评估，并经专家小组验证，发现基于异常值（离群值）的警报系统能够有效识别潜在医疗错误，真实警报率在25%至66%之间，其中最强异常值对应的真实警报率达66%。
AI.motivation: 不寻常的患者管理决策可能源于医疗错误，现有的告警系统往往基于固定规则，缺乏对历史病例数据的充分利用。作者希望通过数据驱动的方式，基于过去病例发现异常决策，从而生成更有价值的警报。
AI.method: 利用EHR中存储的4486名心脏术后患者的历史病例数据，构建数据驱动的异常检测模型，识别与过去常规护理决策显著不同的患者管理行为，并生成222条警报，由专家小组进行评估验证。
AI.result: 异常值警报系统在多种患者管理行为上的真实警报率为25%至66%，其中最强异常值对应的真实警报率达到66%，验证了基于离群值检测的警报方法能够有效识别潜在医疗错误。
AI.conclusion: 基于离群值的警报方法可以有效识别潜在医疗错误，真实警报率表现良好，支持了研究假设，即异常决策值得触发警报。

title: A Resilient Solution for Sewer Overflow Monitoring across Cloud and Edge
comment: 3 pages, 6 figures, accepted at 35th International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence 2026 (IJCAI-ECAI 2026), Demonstrations Track. URL: https://riwwer.demo.calgo-lab.de
summary: Aging combined sewer systems in many historical cities are increasingly stressed by extreme rainfall events, which can trigger combined sewer overflows (CSO) with significant environmental and public health impacts. Forecasting the filling dynamics of overflow basins is critical for anticipating capacity exceedance and enabling timely preventive actions for CSO. We present a web-based demonstrator (https://riwwer.demo.calgo-lab.de) that integrates Deep Learning forecasting methods in both cloud and edge settings into an interactive monitoring dashboard for overflow monitoring, resilient to network outages. A video showcase is available online (https://cloud.bht-berlin.de/index.php/s/b9xt4T3SdiLBiFZ).

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个基于深度学习的网络演示系统，用于预测合流制污水溢流（CSO）的蓄水池填充动态，支持云端和边缘端部署，并集成交互式监控仪表盘以应对极端降雨事件。
AI.motivation: 历史城市的合流制污水系统因极端降雨事件日益承压，导致合流制污水溢流（CSO）频发，对环境和公共健康造成重大影响。提前预测溢流池的填充动态对于预见容量超限并及时采取预防措施至关重要。
AI.method: 开发了一个基于Web的演示系统，将深度学习预测方法集成到云端和边缘端环境中，并构建了交互式监控仪表盘，具备网络中断恢复能力。
AI.result: 成功构建了在线演示平台（https://riwwer.demo.calgo-lab.de），并提供了视频展示（https://cloud.bht-berlin.de/index.php/s/b9xt4T3SdiLBiFZ）。
AI.conclusion: 该演示系统能够有效预测CSO溢流池填充动态，为城市污水系统管理提供弹性化、智能化的监控与预警方案。

title: Learning predictive models for combinations of heterogeneous proteomic data sources
comment: Published at in AMIA Summit on Translational Bioinformatics (STB 2008
summary: Multiple technologies that measure expression levels of protein mixtures in the human body offer a potential for detection and understanding the disease. The recent increase of these technologies prompts researchers to evaluate the individual and combined utility of data generated by the technologies. In this work, we study two data sources to measure the expression of protein mixtures in the human body: whole-sample MS profiling and multiplexed protein arrays. We investigate the individual and combined utility of these technologies by learning and testing a variety of classification models on the data from a pancreatic cancer study. We show that for the combination of these two (heterogeneous) datasets, classification models that work well on one of them individually fail on the combination of the two datasets. We study and propose a class of model fusion methods that acknowledge the differences and try to reap most of the benefits from their combination.

AI.tldr: 本文研究两种蛋白质表达测量技术（全样本MS谱分析和多重蛋白质阵列）在胰腺癌研究中的单独及联合效用，发现单独工作良好的分类模型在组合数据上失效，并提出了一类模型融合方法以充分利用两种异构数据的优势。
AI.motivation: 多种测量人体蛋白质混合物的技术涌现，需要评估这些技术生成数据的单独及联合效用，以更好地检测和理解疾病。
AI.method: 在胰腺癌研究中，分别使用全样本MS谱分析和多重蛋白质阵列两种技术获取数据，训练多种分类模型进行测试，并针对异构数据组合失效的问题，提出了一类模型融合方法。
AI.result: 单独在某一数据集上表现良好的分类模型在两种数据的组合上失效。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一类模型融合方法，能够承认两种异构数据的差异并尽可能从其组合中获益。

title: LLARS: Enabling Domain Expert & Developer Collaboration for LLM Prompting, Generation and Evaluation
comment: Accepted at IJCAI-ECAI 2026 Demonstrations Track. Demo video: https://youtu.be/3QaKouwr4gU
summary: We demonstrate LLARS (LLM Assisted Research System), an open-source platform that bridges the gap between domain experts and developers for building LLM-based systems. It integrates three tightly connected modules into an end-to-end pipeline: Collaborative Prompt Engineering for real-time co-authoring with version control and instant LLM testing, Batch Generation for configurable output production across user-selected prompts $\times$ models $\times$ data with cost control, and Hybrid Evaluation where human and LLM evaluators jointly assess outputs through diverse assessment methods, with live agreement metrics and provenance analysis to identify the best model-prompt combination for a given use case. New prompts and models are automatically available for batch generation and completed batches can be turned into evaluation scenarios with a single click. Interviews with six domain experts and three developers in online counselling confirmed that LLARS feels intuitive, saves considerable time by keeping everything in one place and makes interdisciplinary collaboration seamless.

AI.tldr: LLARS是一个开源平台，通过协同提示工程、批量生成和混合评估三大模块组成的端到端流水线，弥合领域专家与开发者之间构建LLM系统的鸿沟，在在线咨询领域的访谈中验证了其直观性、高效性和促进跨学科协作的效果。
AI.motivation: 领域专家与开发者之间在构建基于LLM的系统时存在协作鸿沟，需要一种能降低技术门槛、集成化的工作平台来提升效率。
AI.method: 提出LLARS平台，包含三个紧密集成的模块：(1) 协同提示工程——支持实时共编、版本控制和即时LLM测试；(2) 批量生成——支持用户自定义的提示×模型×数据的可配置输出生产并控制成本；(3) 混合评估——人类与LLM评审员通过多种评估方法联合评估输出，提供实时一致性度量和溯源分析以识别最佳模型-提示组合。
AI.result: 在在线咨询领域对六位领域专家和三位开发者进行访谈，结果表明LLARS直观易用，通过将所有功能集中在一处显著节省时间，并使跨学科协作无缝衔接。
AI.conclusion: LLARS有效解决了LLM系统构建中跨学科协作的瓶颈问题，其端到端集成设计能够提升开发效率并降低协作成本。

title: Trustworthy AI: Ensuring Reliability and Accountability from Models to Agents
summary: In this thesis, we develop algorithms with theoretical guarantees for ensuring reliability and accountability of Machine Learning (ML) systems. As ML systems evolve from predictive models to generative models and autonomous agents, the landscape of trustworthy AI has shifted. This thesis introduces tools grounded in information theory, optimization, and statistical learning to mitigate bias, reduce arbitrary decisions, ensure content provenance, and evaluate LLM-driven agents in autonomous settings. Towards mitigating bias and arbitrariness in traditional ML models, we introduce a kernel-based method to achieve multiaccuracy across complex subpopulations that traditional demographic categories may overlook. We also develop methods to address predictive multiplicity, where equally accurate models yield conflicting individual predictions. We ensure the accountability in generative AI through watermarking large language models (LLMs). We characterize the information-theoretic trade-off between watermark detection and text distortion and derive optimal watermarking strategies by leveraging optimal transport and coding theory. Empirical evaluations show our watermarks achieve a superior detection-quality tradeoff across language generation and coding tasks. Finally, we evaluate autonomous LLM agents in multi-agent environments through the first simulator of a fully LLM-driven supply chain. LLM agents offer significant performance gains, outperforming human teams and reducing costs by up to 67%, but also introduce systemic risks, including costly tail events.

AI.tldr: 本论文开发了具有理论保证的算法，确保机器学习系统的可靠性和问责性，涵盖传统ML模型的偏差缓解、生成式AI的水印技术以及LLM驱动的自主智能体评估。
AI.motivation: 随着ML系统从预测模型演变为生成模型和自主智能体，可信AI的格局发生了变化。论文旨在解决三个关键问题：传统ML模型中的偏差和任意决策、生成式AI的内容溯源与问责、以及LLM智能体在自主环境中的系统性风险。
AI.method: 1) 提出基于核的方法在复杂子群体上实现多精度公平性；2) 开发方法解决预测多重性（等精度模型产生冲突预测）；3) 利用最优传输和编码理论，刻画水印检测与文本失真间的信息论权衡，推导最优水印策略；4) 构建首个完全由LLM驱动的供应链多智能体仿真器。
AI.result: 水印方法在语言生成和编码任务中实现了优越的检测-质量权衡；LLM智能体在供应链任务中性能显著优于人类团队，成本降低高达67%，但也引入了包括昂贵尾事件在内的系统性风险。
AI.conclusion: 论文通过信息论、优化和统计学习工具，为可信AI提供了从偏差缓解到内容溯源再到自主系统评估的完整理论框架与实用算法。

title: Budget-Efficient Automatic Algorithm Design via Code Graph
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as powerful tools for automatic algorithm design (AAD). However, existing pipelines remain inefficient. They operate at the granularity of full algorithms, redundantly rewriting recurring substructures and discarding low-fitness candidates that may contain valuable algorithmic features. We formalize budget-efficient automatic algorithm design, wherein the search policy maximizes realized fitness subject to limited computational cost. We propose a directed acyclic graph representation of algorithms and build a search framework that fully exploits the LLM's output. Instead of querying the LLM for full algorithms, we use it to obtain corrections: compact operators that add, replace, or remove code blocks. Each correction augments the graph, yielding new algorithms that compose with prior corrections. This graph structure decomposes algorithms into sets of corrections, enabling correction-level credit assignment that informs subsequent queries. We complement this framework with theoretical insights into the ideal balance between search depth and breadth at different budget levels. We validate our method empirically on three combinatorial optimization problems, demonstrating consistent superiority of our graph-based search over full-algorithm search at equal token budget. Finally, our experiments suggest that rich contexts help only when the LLM's prior knowledge is shallow, and can hinder performance otherwise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于有向无环图的算法表示方法和利用LLM生成代码修正（而非完整算法）的搜索框架，实现了预算高效的自动算法设计，在组合优化问题上优于传统全算法搜索方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的自动算法设计方法效率低下：以完整算法为粒度操作，冗余重写重复子结构，且丢弃包含有价值算法特征的低适应度候选方案。需要一种预算高效的自动算法设计方法。
AI.method: 提出有向无环图（DAG）表示算法，利用LLM生成代码修正（添加、替换或删除代码块）而非完整算法；每次修正增强图结构，新算法与先前修正组合；实现修正级信用分配指导后续查询；理论分析了不同预算下搜索深度与广度的最佳平衡。
AI.result: 在三个组合优化问题上，基于图的搜索方法在相同token预算下一致优于全算法搜索方法；实验表明丰富上下文仅在LLM先验知识较浅时有益，否则可能妨碍性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于图的修正搜索方法能更高效地利用LLM输出实现自动算法设计，且揭示了上下文信息对LLM先验知识不同水平的非单调影响。

title: VORT: Adaptive Power-Law Memory for NLP Transformers
summary: Standard Transformers impose near-exponential decay on the influence of distant tokens, conflicting with the power-law structure of long-range dependencies in natural language. We introduce the \emph{Variable-Order Retention Transformer} (\VORT{}), a memory architecture in which each ingested token is assigned a learnable fractional order α_i\in[δ,1] that governs a Grünwald--Letnikov power-law retention kernel. Because the fractional weighted sum is non-Markovian, we approximate it through a sum-of-exponentials (SOE) decomposition computed by Gauss--Laguerre quadrature on a Laplace-type integral representation of the kernel weights. Each exponential component admits a one-step Markovian recurrence at O(Sd_v) per step, where S=O(\log(T/\varepsilon)) terms suffice for \varepsilon-uniform accuracy on horizon [1,T]. Retrieval is keyed and associative via a linear-attention accumulator with an exact O(KSd_φd_v) -per-step recurrence. Four results are established: (i) an SOE approximation theorem with geometric convergence rate from the analyticity of the integrand after a log-change of variables; (ii) a quantisation bound valid on [δ,1] with correct analysis near α=0; (iii) a direct L^2 energy argument (Proposition) showing that for α>1/2 any mixture with fixed minimum decay rate Λ>0 incurs L^2([1,T]) error at least N_α(T)-C(Λ)\to\infty, with the Λ-dependence made explicit; and (iv) linear convergence of a gradient plasticity rule under the Polyak--Łojasiewicz condition. Two synthetic experiments confirm the architectural advantage: a Zipf-distributed retrieval benchmark and an entity label-copy task with uniform lag distribution, the latter ruling out prior-matching as an explanation for the power-law kernel's advantage.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VORT（变阶保留Transformer），通过为每个token分配可学习的分数阶α_i，并利用Grünwald-Letnikov幂律保留核来建模长距离依赖。通过指数和（SOE）分解和Gauss-Laguerre求积实现非马尔可夫核的高效近似，达到O(log(T/ε))项精度。建立了SOE逼近定理、量化界、L²能量下界（α>1/2时误差发散）以及PL条件下的线性收敛性。实验在Zipf检索和标签复制任务上验证了优势。
AI.motivation: 标准Transformer对远距离token施加近指数衰减，这与自然语言中长距离依赖的幂律结构相冲突，因此需要设计一种能更好地匹配幂律衰减的记忆架构。
AI.method: 1) 每个token分配可学习的分数阶α_i∈[δ,1]，控制Grünwald-Letnikov幂律保留核。2) 利用Laplace型积分表示核权重，通过Gauss-Laguerre求积进行SOE分解，将非马尔可夫求和近似为O(log(T/ε))个可一步马尔可夫递推的指数分量。3) 通过线性注意力累积器实现键值关联检索，递推复杂度O(KSd_φd_v)。
AI.result: 1) SOE逼近定理：通过log变量替换后被积函数的解析性，获得几何收敛率。2) 在[δ,1]上成立且正确分析α=0附近行为的量化界。3) L²能量下界：α>1/2时，固定最小衰减率Λ>0的混合模型在L²([1,T])误差至少为N_α(T)-C(Λ)→∞（Proposition，Λ依赖性显式给出）。4) Polyak-Łojasiewicz条件下的梯度塑性规则线性收敛。5) 合成实验：Zipf检索和均匀滞后标签复制任务验证了幂律核的优势，后者排除了先验匹配解释。
AI.conclusion: VORT通过可学习的分数阶幂律记忆核有效匹配了自然语言的远程依赖结构，理论保证了近似精度和收敛性，实验验证了架构优势。

title: The Open-Box Fallacy: Why AI Deployment Needs a Calibrated Verification Regime
summary: AI deployment in sensitive domains such as health care, credit, employment, and criminal justice is often treated as unsafe to authorize until model internals can be explained. This often leads to an excessive reliance on mechanistic interpretability to address a deployment challenge beyond its intended scope. We argue that the gate should instead be calibrated verification: authorization should be domain-scoped, independently checkable, monitored after release, accountable, contestable, and revocable. The reason is twofold. First, model capability is uneven across nearby tasks, so authorization must attach to a specific use rather than to a model in general. Second, societies have long governed opaque expertise through credentials, monitoring, liability, appeal, and revocation rather than mechanism-level explanation. Recent evidence reinforces this distinction between mechanistic understanding and deployment authority: a 53-percentage-point gap between internal representations and output correction shows that understanding may not translate into action, while one scoping review found that only 9.0% of FDA-approved AI/ML device documents contained a prospective post-market surveillance study. We propose Verification Coverage, a six-component reportable standard with a minimum-composition rule, as the metric that should sit beside capability scores in model cards, leaderboards, and regulatory disclosures.

AI.tldr: 本文主张AI在敏感领域的部署不应依赖于可解释性（mechanistic interpretability），而应基于“校准验证”（calibrated verification）框架，并提出验证覆盖率（Verification Coverage）作为新的评估标准。
AI.motivation: 当前AI在医疗、信贷、就业、刑事司法等敏感领域的部署，常因要求模型可解释性而被延迟或禁止。作者认为这种对机械可解释性的过度依赖超出了其适用范围，需要一种更务实的授权框架。
AI.method: 通过理论论证和实证证据支持：1）模型能力在邻近任务间不均匀，授权必须绑定到具体用途；2）社会长期通过认证、监控、责任、申诉和撤销等方式治理不透明的专家知识；3）引用53个百分点的内部表征与输出修正差距，以及仅9.0%的FDA批准的AI/ML设备包含前瞻性上市后监测研究的证据。
AI.result: 提出Verification Coverage标准，包含六个组件和一个最低组成规则，可作为模型卡、排行榜和监管披露中能力评分之外的补充指标。
AI.conclusion: AI部署授权应转向域范围限定、独立可检查、发布后可监控、可问责、可争议和可撤销的验证框架，而非依赖对模型内部机制的完整解释。

title: PRISM: Generation-Time Detection and Mitigation of Secret Leakage in Multi-Agent LLM Pipelines
summary: Multi-agent LLM systems introduce a security risk in which sensitive information accessed by one agent can propagate through shared context and reappear in downstream outputs, even without explicit adversarial intent. We formalise this phenomenon as propagation amplification, where leakage risk increases across agent boundaries as sensitive content is repeatedly exposed to downstream generators. Existing defences, including prompt-based safeguards, static pattern matching, and LLM-as-judge filtering, are not designed for this setting: they either operate after generation, rely primarily on surface-form patterns, or add substantial latency without modelling the generation process itself. To resolve these issues, we propose PRISM, a real-time defence that treats credential leakage as a sequential risk accumulation problem during generation. At each decoding step, PRISM combines 16 signals spanning lexical, structural, information-theoretic, behavioural, and contextual features into a calibrated risk score, enabling per-token intervention through green, yellow, and red risk zones. Our central observation is that credential reproduction is often preceded by a measurable shift in generation dynamics, characterised by entropy collapse and increasing logit concentration. When combined with text-structural cues such as identifier-pattern detection, these temporal signals provide an early warning of leakage before a secret is fully reconstructed. Across a 2,000-task adversarial benchmark covering 13 attack categories and three pressure levels in a heterogeneous four-agent pipeline, PRISM achieves F1 = 0.832 with precision = 1.000 and recall = 0.712, while producing no observed leakage on our benchmark (0.0% task-level leak rate) and preserving output utility of 0.893. It substantially outperforms the strongest baseline, Span Tagger, which achieves F1 = 0.719 with a 15.0% task-level leak rate.

AI.tldr: PRISM 是一种针对多智能体 LLM 系统中凭证泄露问题的实时防御方法，通过在每个解码步骤中结合 16 种信号进行风险评分，实现逐 token 的分区干预（绿/黄/红区），在 2000 任务基准上达到 F1=0.832、零泄露率、效用保持 0.893，显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 多智能体 LLM 系统存在一种安全风险：一个智能体访问的敏感信息会通过共享上下文传播并在下游输出中重现，即使没有明确的对抗意图。现有防御手段（基于提示的防护、静态模式匹配、LLM 作为裁判过滤）不适用于这种场景，它们要么在生成后操作，要么依赖表面形式模式，要么增加大量延迟而不建模生成过程本身。
AI.method: PRISM 将凭证泄露视为生成过程中的序列风险累积问题。在每个解码步骤，PRISM 结合 16 种信号（涵盖词汇、结构、信息论、行为学和上下文特征）生成校准风险评分，通过绿/黄/红三个风险区域实现逐 token 干预。核心观察是凭证复现前通常会出现生成动态的可测量偏移，特征为熵塌缩和 logit 浓度增加，结合标识符模式检测等文本结构线索，可在秘密完全重建前提供早期预警。
AI.result: 在包含 13 种攻击类别和三种压力水平的 2000 任务对抗基准测试中（异构四智能体流水线），PRISM 达到 F1=0.832，精确率=1.000，召回率=0.712，任务级泄露率为 0.0%，输出效用保持 0.893。最强基线 Span Tagger 的 F1=0.719，任务级泄露率 15.0%。
AI.conclusion: PRISM 通过在生成过程中进行实时风险建模，有效解决了多智能体 LLM 系统中的传播放大问题，实现了零泄露与高实用性的平衡。

title: PMCTS: Particle Monte Carlo Tree Search for Principled Parallelized Inference Time Scaling
summary: Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) is a widely used approach for policy improvement through search with increasing popularity for real world applications. Due to the sequential and deterministic nature of its search, runtime-scaling of MCTS with parallel compute remains a major challenge. We introduce Particle MCTS (PMCTS), to our knowledge the first principled parallel MCTS algorithm which is suited for neural network evaluations and can preserve formal policy improvement guarantees. Empirically, PMCTS scales well with parallel compute and significantly outperforms the popular heuristic-based baselines across domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出粒子蒙特卡洛树搜索（PMCTS），这是首个具有理论保证且适合神经网络评估的并行MCTS算法，在多个领域显著优于主流启发式基线方法。
AI.motivation: MCTS在顺序执行和确定性搜索特性下，并行计算的运行时扩展性面临重大挑战，现有方法缺乏理论保证且不适用于神经网络评估场景。
AI.method: 提出粒子蒙特卡洛树搜索（PMCTS），一种基于粒子的并行MCTS算法，保持形式化的策略改进保证，同时适配神经网络评估需求。
AI.result: PMCTS在并行计算下具有良好的扩展性，在多个领域的实验中显著优于基于启发式的主流基线方法。
AI.conclusion: PMCTS是首个兼具理论保证和实际可扩展性的并行MCTS算法，为大规模并行策略搜索提供了有效方案。

title: Hierarchical Causal Abduction: A Foundation Framework for Explainable Model Predictive Control
summary: Model Predictive Control (MPC) is widely used to operate safety-critical infrastructure by predicting future trajectories and optimizing control actions. However, nonlinear dynamics, hard safety constraints, and numerical optimization often render individual control moves opaque to human operators, undermining trust and hindering deployment. This paper presents Hierarchical Causal Abduction (HCA), which combines (i) physics-informed reasoning via domain knowledge graphs, (ii) optimization evidence from Karush--Kuhn--Tucker (KKT) multipliers, and (iii) temporal causal discovery via the PCMCI algorithm to generate faithful, human-interpretable explanations for control actions computed by nonlinear MPC. Across three diverse control applications (greenhouse climate, building HVAC, chemical process engineering) with expert validation, HCA improves explanation accuracy by 53\% over LIME (0.478 vs. 0.311) using a single set of cross-domain parameters without per-domain tuning; domain-specific KKT-threshold calibration over 2--3 days further increases accuracy to 0.88. Ablation studies confirm that each evidence source is essential, with 32--37\% accuracy degradation when any component is removed, and HCA's ranking-and-validation methodology generalizes beyond MPC to other prediction-based decision systems, including learning-based control and trajectory planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出分层因果溯因（HCA）方法，融合物理知识图谱、KKT乘子优化证据和PCMCI时序因果发现，为非线性MPC生成可解释的控制决策说明。在三个应用领域（温室气候、建筑暖通、化工过程）中，HCA的解释准确率达0.478（LIME为0.311），领域特定校准后可提升至0.88。
AI.motivation: 非线性MPC因复杂动力学、硬约束和数值优化导致控制动作不透明，操作人员难以理解决策过程，影响信任和部署。
AI.method: HCA方法三模块融合：(i)基于领域知识图谱的物理推理，(ii)利用KKT乘子的优化证据分析，(iii)通过PCMCI算法进行时序因果发现，共同生成忠实且可解释的控制动作说明。
AI.result: 跨领域无需调参时解释准确率0.478（LIME 0.311），经2-3天KKT阈值校准后达0.88；消融实验显示任一模块缺失导致准确率下降32-37%。
AI.conclusion: HCA能有效解释非线性MPC控制动作，且其排名-验证方法论可泛化至其他基于预测的决策系统（如学习控制、轨迹规划）。

title: Benchmarking Compositional Generalisation for Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials
summary: Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials play a fundamental role in computational chemistry and materials science, enabling applications from molecular dynamics simulations to drug design and materials discovery. While recent approaches can estimate inter-atomic forces with high precision, it remains unclear to what extent they can generalise to previously unseen molecules. Do they learn the compositional structure of chemistry, capturing how molecular fragments and their combinations determine properties, or do they primarily learn to interpolate patterns that are specific to the training examples? To address this question, we propose a benchmark consisting of four tasks that require some form of compositional generalisation. In each task, models are tested on molecules that were unseen during training, but the training data is chosen such that generalisation to the test examples should be feasible for models that learn the underlying physical principles. Our empirical analysis shows that the considered tasks are highly challenging for state-of-the-art models, with errors on out-of-distribution examples often an order of magnitude higher than on in-distribution examples, even when using foundation models that have been pre-trained on millions of molecules.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个包含四项任务的基准测试，用于评估机器学习原子间势能模型在分子上的组合泛化能力。实验表明，现有最先进模型（包括预训练于数百万分子的基础模型）在分布外样本上的误差比分布内样本高出一个数量级，说明这些模型主要学习训练样本的插值模式，而非真正的物理原理和化学组合结构。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习原子间势能模型虽能高精度估计原子间力，但尚不清楚它们是否真正学习到化学的组合结构（即分子片段及其组合如何决定性质），还是仅对训练示例的特定模式进行插值。
AI.method: 设计了一个包含四项任务的基准测试，每项任务要求模型对训练中未见过的新分子进行预测，但训练数据的选择使得学习到物理原理的模型理应具备泛化能力，从而测试模型的组合泛化性能。
AI.result: 最先进的模型在分布外样本上的误差比分布内样本高出一个数量级，即使是预训练于数百万分子的基础模型也表现不佳。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型在组合泛化任务上存在显著困难，它们更倾向于学习训练数据的插值模式，而非真正掌握决定分子性质的化学组合结构和物理原理。

title: Teacher-Aware Evolution of Heuristic Programs from Learned Optimization Policies
summary: LLM-based automatic heuristic design has shown promise for generating executable heuristics for combinatorial optimization, but existing methods mainly rely on delayed endpoint performance. We propose a \emph{teacher-aware evolutionary framework} that uses independently trained learned optimization policies as behavioral teachers. Instead of deploying or imitating the teacher, our method queries it on states visited by candidate heuristic programs and uses its action preferences as local feedback for evolution. The resulting search discovers static executable heuristics guided by both task performance and teacher-derived behavioral signals. Experiments on scheduling, routing, and graph optimization benchmarks show that our method improves over performance-driven LLM heuristic evolution baselines while requiring no neural inference at deployment. These results suggest that learned optimization policies can be repurposed as behavioral feedback sources for automatic heuristic discovery.

AI.tldr: 提出一种教师感知的进化框架，利用独立训练的学习优化策略作为行为教师，通过查询教师对候选启发式程序所访问状态的动作偏好作为局部反馈，引导进化搜索发现静态可执行启发式，在调度、路由和图优化基准上优于性能驱动的LLM启发式进化基线。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的自动启发式设计主要依赖延迟的端点性能（即最终解质量）作为反馈信号，缺乏对启发式搜索过程中局部行为的指导，导致搜索效率受限。
AI.method: 提出教师感知进化框架：1) 独立训练学习优化策略作为行为教师；2) 在进化搜索中，不部署或模仿教师，而是查询教师对候选启发式程序访问状态的动作偏好；3) 将教师行为偏好作为局部反馈信号，与任务性能共同引导进化；4) 最终发现的是静态可执行启发式，部署时无需神经网络推理。
AI.result: 在调度、路由和图优化基准上，该方法优于性能驱动的LLM启发式进化基线，且部署时无需神经网络推理。
AI.conclusion: 学习优化策略可以被重新用作行为反馈源，用于自动启发式发现，为将学习优化策略的知识迁移到可解释、可部署的静态启发式中提供了新途径。

title: When More Parameters Hurt: Foundation Model Priors Amplify Worst-Client Disparity Under Extreme Federated Heterogeneity
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures. Submitted to FL@FM-IJCAI 2026 Workshop
summary: Federated learning (FL) is increasingly used to fine-tune foundation models (FMs) on distributed private data. The community largely assumes that large-scale pretraining serves as a 'rising tide that lifts all boats' in federated settings. However, our experiments reveal that these powerful priors can hinder rather than help the most disadvantaged clients under extreme heterogeneity. Through controlled experiments on federated text classification, we compare worst-client accuracy between TextCNN (2.7M parameters) and DistilBERT with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA, 66M parameters) across four Non-IID heterogeneity levels. Under extreme label skew (alpha = 0.1), DistilBERT+LoRA produces a worst-client accuracy gap of 50.1% -- 56% larger than TextCNN's 32.2% gap, despite having 25x more parameters and extensive pretraining. Under moderate heterogeneity (alpha >= 0.5), the pattern reverses: the FM nearly eliminates the gap. We call this the FM Fairness Paradox. We further show that an inverse-weighted LoRA aggregation method (FedAvgW) does not resolve the disparity, suggesting aggregation reweighting alone may be insufficient. Our results highlight the need for mechanisms that explicitly protect minority clients before deploying foundation models in high-stakes federated contexts such as healthcare and education.

AI.tldr: 本文发现联邦微调基础模型时，大规模预训练反而在最边缘客户（极端标签偏斜）上加剧了公平性问题，DistilBERT+LoRA的最差客户准确率差距（50.1%）远超轻量模型TextCNN（32.2%），而在中等异质性下则表现更优，称为"基础模型公平性悖论"。
AI.motivation: 现有研究普遍假设大规模预训练能普遍提升联邦学习中所有客户的表现，但本文质疑这一假设，探讨在极端数据异质性下预训练强先验是否反而会伤害最弱势客户。
AI.method: 在联邦文本分类任务中，控制Non-IID异质性程度（四个级别），对比TextCNN（270万参数）与DistilBERT+LoRA（6600万参数）的最差客户准确率，并测试逆权重LoRA聚合方法（FedAvgW）的效果。
AI.result: 极端标签偏斜（alpha=0.1）下，DistilBERT+LoRA的最差客户准确率差距达50.1%，比TextCNN的32.2%大56%；中等异质性（alpha>=0.5）下，FM几乎消除差距；FedAvgW未能解决该问题。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习部署基础模型时需要专门保护少数客户的机制，仅靠聚合重加权不够；在高风险场景（医疗、教育）中部署前应审慎评估公平性。

title: Navigating the Sea of LLM Evaluation: Investigating Bias in Toxicity Benchmarks
summary: The rapid adoption of LLMs in both research and industry highlights the challenges of deploying them safely and reveals a gap in the systematic evaluation of toxicity benchmarks. As organizations increasingly rely on these benchmarks to certify models for customer-facing applications and automated moderation, unrecognized evaluation biases could lead to the deployment of vulnerable or unsafe systems. This work investigates the robustness of established benchmarking setups and examines how to measure currently neglected intrinsic biases, such as those related to model choice, metrics, and task types. Our experiments uncover significant discrepancies in benchmark behaviors when evaluation setups are altered. Specifically, shifting the task from text completion to summarization increases the tendency of benchmarks to flag content as harmful. Additionally, certain benchmarks fail to maintain consistent behavior when the input data domain is changed. Furthermore, we observe model-specific instabilities, demonstrating a clear need for more robust and comprehensive safety evaluation frameworks.

AI.tldr: 本研究系统评估了LLM毒性基准测试中的偏差问题，发现任务类型从文本补全切换为摘要时会显著提高有害内容标记倾向，部分基准在数据域变化时行为不一致，且存在模型特定不稳定性，表明当前安全评估框架亟需更鲁棒和全面的改进。
AI.motivation: LLM在研究和工业中的快速部署暴露了安全评估的挑战，现有毒性基准测试可能存在未被识别的评估偏差，这可能导致部署脆弱或不安全的系统。作者旨在系统性探究这些被忽视的内在偏差（如模型选择、指标、任务类型等）对基准测试鲁棒性的影响。
AI.method: 通过改变评估设置（如将任务从文本补全切换为摘要、改变输入数据域），系统性比较不同基准测试在不同模型、指标和任务类型下的行为表现，检测评估偏差。
AI.result: 发现实验设置变更时基准行为存在显著差异：摘要任务相比文本补全更倾向于标记有害内容；部分基准在数据域变化时无法保持一致性；观察到模型特定的不稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 当前毒性基准测试存在系统性偏差，需要建立更鲁棒和全面的安全评估框架，以确保LLM在实际部署中的安全性。

title: Machine Learning-Based Graph Simplification for Symbolic Accelerators
summary: Graph-based accelerators have been widely adopted in symbolic data processing applications such as genomics, cybersecurity, and artificial intelligence. However, these systems often suffer from excessive memory usage and inefficiencies stemming from redundant graph structures. We present AutoSlim, a machine learning-based framework that leverages data-driven methods to prune automata graphs for hardware accelerators. Using features extracted from prior graph executions and a Random Forest classifier, AutoSlim identifies and removes low-impact nodes and edges. When applied to a Non-deterministic Finite Automata overlay architecture (NAPOLY+), AutoSlim reduces FPGA resource usage by up to 40%, with corresponding improvements in throughput and power efficiency. The framework includes a verification step to ensure functional equivalence after pruning and suggests promising directions for both hardware optimization and security.

AI.tldr: AutoSlim是一个基于机器学习的框架，利用随机森林分类器从历史执行数据中识别并剪枝自动机图中的低影响节点和边，在NAPOLY+架构上实现最高40%的FPGA资源节省，同时提升吞吐量和能效，并包含功能等价性验证步骤。
AI.motivation: 基于图的加速器在符号数据处理（基因组学、网络安全、AI）中被广泛使用，但存在冗余图结构导致的过度内存使用和效率低下问题。
AI.method: 提出AutoSlim框架，从先前图执行中提取特征，使用随机森林分类器识别和移除低影响节点与边，并在NAPOLY+（非确定性有限自动机覆盖架构）上验证，同时包含功能等价性验证步骤。
AI.result: 在NAPOLY+架构上实现最高40%的FPGA资源使用减少，吞吐量和能效相应提升。
AI.conclusion: AutoSlim有效缩减自动机图的冗余结构，为硬件优化和安全领域提供了有前景的方向。

title: diffGHOST: Diffusion based Generative Hedged Oblivious Synthetic Trajectories
summary: Trajectories are nowadays valuable information for a wide range of applications. However they are also inherently sensitive, as they contain highly personal information about individuals. Facing this challenge, synthesizing mobility trajectories has emerged as a promising solution to leverage mobility information while preserving privacy. State-of-the-art models, often rely on the false assumptions of generative models implicit privacy and fails to provide privacy guarantees while preserving trajectories utility. Here, we introduce diffGHOST, a conditional diffusion model based on latent space segmentation, designed to answer this challenge. Thus, this paper propose a methodology that identify and mitigate memorization of critical samples using condition segments of a learn latent space.

AI.tldr: 本文提出diffGHOST，一种基于潜在空间分割的条件扩散模型，用于合成移动轨迹数据，在保护隐私的同时保持轨迹效用，通过识别和减轻对关键样本的记忆来实现隐私保障。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹生成模型依赖生成模型的隐式隐私假设，无法提供隐私保证同时保持轨迹效用，需要一种能够提供可量化隐私保障的轨迹合成方法。
AI.method: 提出diffGHOST模型，采用条件扩散模型架构，基于潜在空间分割技术，通过识别和减轻对关键样本的记忆来实现隐私保护。
AI.result: diffGHOST能够在提供隐私保障的同时保持轨迹数据的效用性。
AI.conclusion: 潜在空间分割的条件扩散模型可有效解决轨迹合成中的隐私-效用权衡问题。

title: Non-Parametric Rehearsal Learning via Conditional Mean Embeddings
summary: In machine learning, a critical class of decision-related problems concerns preventing predicted undesirable outcomes, referred to as the \textit{avoiding undesired future} (AUF) problem. To address this, the \textit{rehearsal learning} framework has been proposed to model influence relations for effective decisions. However, existing rehearsal methods rely on restrictive parametric assumptions such as linear systems or additive noise, limiting their practical applicability. In this paper, we propose the first non-parametric rehearsal learning approach for AUF without assuming specific functional forms of data generation processes. Specifically, we use kernel machinery to reformulate the AUF objective into a unified representation that disentangles desirability modeling from action-induced distributional changes. To handle the discontinuity of desirability indicator, we present a smooth Probit surrogate and provide an approximation error bound. Meanwhile, we capture the action-induced changes via conditional mean embeddings, and develop a kernel ridge regression based nested estimator for AUF objective with consistency guarantees. Such a formulation naturally accommodates nonlinear systems and non-additive noise, and empirical results on synthetic and real-data-derived semi-synthetic benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and flexibility of our approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个非参数化排练学习方法，用于解决避免不良未来（AUF）问题。该方法通过核技巧将AUF目标统一表示，解耦了意愿性建模与行动引起的分布变化，使用平滑Probit代理处理意愿性指标的间断性，并通过条件均值嵌入和核岭回归嵌套估计器实现一致性保证，适用于非线性系统和非加性噪声场景。
AI.motivation: 现有排练学习方法依赖线性系统、加性噪声等严格的参数化假设，限制了实际应用中的灵活性和适用性。
AI.method: 1. 利用核技巧将AUF目标重构成统一表示，解耦意愿性建模与行动引起的分布变化。2. 提出平滑Probit代理函数处理意愿性指标的间断性问题，并给出近似误差界。3. 通过条件均值嵌入捕捉行动引起的分布变化，设计基于核岭回归的嵌套估计器，并证明估计的一致性。
AI.result: 在合成数据和基于真实数据衍生的半合成基准上，实验结果表明该方法在非线性系统和非加性噪声场景下具有有效性和灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的非参数化排练学习框架成功突破了传统参数化假设的限制，为AUF问题提供了一种更普适、灵活且理论上可保证一致性的解决方案。

title: Evolving-RL: End-to-End Optimization of Experience-Driven Self-Evolving Capability within Agents
summary: Experience-driven self-evolving agents aim to overcome the static nature of large language models by distilling reusable experience from past interactions, thus enabling adaptation to novel tasks at deployment time. This process places substantial demands on the foundation model's capacities for abstraction, generalization, and in-context learning. However, most existing studies focus primarily on system-level design choices, such as how experience is represented and managed, neglecting the inherent capabilities of the underlying model. While some recent works have started to optimize the experience utilization stage via reinforcement learning, they still fail to treat self-evolution as a unified process to be jointly optimized. To this end, we propose Evolving-RL, an efficient algorithmic framework that jointly improves the experience extraction and utilization capabilities required for self-evolution. Specifically, we center the learning process on experience extraction and evaluation, using the two supervisory signals derived from evaluation to optimize the extractor and solver separately and thus enable their coordinated co-evolution. Experiments on ALFWorld and Mind2Web show that Evolving-RL effectively enhances LLMs' ability to extract and reuse experience, leading to strong performance gains on out-of-distribution tasks (up to 98.7% relative improvement over the GRPO baseline on ALFWorld unseen tasks and 35.8% on Mind2Web), and these gains are fully unlocked only through the coordinated co-evolution of experience extraction and utilization. Furthermore, Evolving-RL inherently functions as an experience-augmented RL algorithm. By internalizing reusable experience patterns directly into model parameters, it achieves remarkable performance gains over standard baselines on both seen and unseen tasks, even in the absence of test-time experience accumulation.

AI.tldr: 提出Evolving-RL框架，通过联合优化经验提取和利用（即协调共演化），使大语言模型在部署时具备自我演化能力，在ALFWorld和Mind2Web上取得显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有自我演化智能体研究多关注系统级设计（如经验表征与管理），忽略了对底层模型抽象、泛化和上下文学习能力的优化；即使有工作通过强化学习优化经验利用阶段，也未将自我演化视为一个需要联合优化的统一过程。
AI.method: 提出Evolving-RL算法框架，以经验提取和评估为核心，利用评估产生的两个监督信号分别优化提取器（extractor）和求解器（solver），实现二者的协调共演化（coordinated co-evolution）。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld和Mind2Web上，Evolving-RL有效提升了LLM提取和复用经验的能力，在分布外任务上相对GRPO基线分别提升98.7%（ALFWorld）和35.8%（Mind2Web），且该增益仅在提取与利用协调共演化时才能完全释放。
AI.conclusion: Evolving-RL本质上是一种经验增强的强化学习算法，能将可复用的经验模式内化到模型参数中，即便在测试时不积累经验，也能在已见和未见任务上均获得显著提升。

title: Relative Kinetic Utility for Reasoning-Aware Structural Pruning in Large Language Models
summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting symbolized a huge improvement of reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, scaling up test-time computation yields extensive CoT sequences, introducing severe inference latency and key-value (KV) cache memory bottlenecks. While structural pruning offers a fundamental, hardware-aware solution to alleviate static parameter burdens, existing magnitude-based methods may cut off the neurons of CoT: by over-indexing on discrete cross-entropy objectives, these heuristics fall into a \textit{magnitude trap}: they prioritize high-frequency, low-information syntactic tokens and trigger a disappointing reasoning collapse at high sparsities (e.g., 40\%). To overcome this topological phase transition, we propose \textsc{Relative Kinetic Utility} (RKU), a novel theoretical framework that elevates discrete pruning to a continuous kinetic integral over the depth manifold of the model based on Alternating Gradient Flow(AGF). By modifying it with Fisher trace normalization, RKU acts as a lightweight curvature-aware normalization to isolate \textit{kinetic spikes} -- the fundamental structural pathways responsible for high-curvature logical routing. Extensive experiments on Qwen-2.5-7B and LLaMA-3-8B improves performance in the high-sparsity regime around 40\%. RKU attains 13.34\% accuracy on GSM8K at 40\% sparsity, outperforming the strongest baseline, and appears to better preserve reasoning-relevant representations under out-of-distribution evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出相对动能效用（RKU）框架，通过交替梯度流将离散剪枝提升为连续动能积分，并利用Fisher迹归一化识别高曲率逻辑路由的"动能尖峰"，从而在40%高稀疏度下显著提升LLM的推理能力，在GSM8K上达到13.34%准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于幅度的结构剪枝方法存在"幅度陷阱"：过度依赖离散交叉熵目标，优先保留高频低信息量的句法标记，导致高稀疏度（如40%）下出现推理崩溃。需要一种能识别推理关键神经通路的结构剪枝方法。
AI.method: 提出相对动能效用（RKU），基于交替梯度流（AGF）将离散剪枝问题提升为模型深度流形上的连续动能积分，并结合Fisher迹归一化作为轻量曲率感知正则化，识别高曲率逻辑路由对应的"动能尖峰"结构通路。
AI.result: 在Qwen-2.5-7B和LLaMA-3-8B上，40%稀疏度下RKU在GSM8K达到13.34%准确率，超越最强基线；在分布外评估下更好地保留了与推理相关的表示。
AI.conclusion: RKU通过动力学视角克服了幅度剪枝的拓扑相变问题，在高稀疏度下有效保持推理能力，为LLM的结构剪枝提供了新的理论框架。

title: GESR: A Genetic Programming-Based Symbolic Regression Method with Gene Editing
summary: Mathematical formulas serve as a language through which humans communicate with nature. Discovering mathematical laws from scientific data to describe natural phenomena has been a long-standing pursuit of humanity for centuries. In the field of artificial intelligence, this challenge is known as the symbolic regression problem. Among existing symbolic regression approaches, Genetic Programming (GP) based on evolutionary algorithms remains one of the most classical and widely adopted methods. GP simulates the evolutionary process across generations through genetic mutation and crossover. However, mutations and crossovers in GP are entirely random. While this randomness effectively mimics natural evolution, it inevitably produces both beneficial and detrimental variations. If there existed a metaphorical `God` capable of foreseeing which genetic mutations or crossovers would yield superior outcomes and performing targeted gene editing accordingly, the efficiency of evolution could be substantially improved. Motivated by this idea, we propose in this paper a symbolic regression approach based on gene editing, termed GESR. In GESR, we trained two "hands of God" (two BERT models). Among them, the first leverages the BERT's masked language modeling capability to guide the mutation of genes (expression symbols). The other BERT model guides the crossover of individual genes by predicting the crossover point. Experimental results demonstrate that GESR significantly improves computational efficiency compared with traditional GP algorithms and achieves strong overall performance across multiple symbolic regression tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于基因编辑的符号回归方法GESR，利用两个BERT模型分别指导遗传编程中的基因突变和交叉操作，显著提升了计算效率。
AI.motivation: 传统遗传编程(GP)中的基因突变和交叉是完全随机的，这种随机性虽然模拟了自然进化，但会产生大量无效变异，导致进化效率低下。作者希望能有一种"上帝之手"来预见性地引导基因编辑，从而提升进化效率。
AI.method: GESR方法训练了两个BERT模型作为"上帝之手"：第一个BERT利用掩码语言建模能力指导基因（表达式符号）的突变；第二个BERT通过预测交叉点来指导个体基因的交叉操作。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，GESR相比传统GP算法显著提升了计算效率，并在多个符号回归任务上取得了优异的整体性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于基因编辑思想，利用预训练语言模型（BERT）指导遗传编程的突变和交叉操作，是一种有效提升符号回归效率的方法。

title: Large Language Models for Sequential Decision-Making: Improving In-Context Learning via Supervised Fine-Tuning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown remarkable in-context learning (ICL) capabilities, yet their potential for sequential decision-making remains underexplored. In this paper, we study the ICL capabilities of LLMs in sequential decision-making settings, including Markov Decision Processes (MDPs), Partially Observable MDPs (POMDPs), and Ambiguous POMDPs (APOMDPs). We fine-tune pretrained LLMs to perform few-shot decision-making directly from offline, oracle-labeled trajectories. Our framework enables flexible imitation of policies through supervised fine-tuning (SFT). Theoretically, we focus on linear MDPs and interpret a fine-tuned attention layer as implicitly estimating optimal Q-functions from in-context data. Building on this interpretation, we derive an end-to-end suboptimality bound for the induced policy that separates the in-context estimation error from the training-length bias. Empirically, across synthetic MDP, POMDP, and APOMDP settings, we find that fine-tuned LLMs achieve substantially smaller optimality gaps than in-context-only and random baselines, with especially large gains in longer-horizon, partially observed, and model-ambiguous environments. Together, these results show that supervised fine-tuning provides an effective route to endowing pretrained LLMs with sequential decision-making capabilities from offline data, which is an important advantage in domains such as healthcare where offline data are abundant.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大型语言模型（LLMs）在序列决策任务中的上下文学习能力，通过在离线专家轨迹上微调预训练LLM，使其能够在MDP、POMDP和APOMDP环境中进行少样本决策。理论上证明了注意力层可隐式估计最优Q函数，并给出了端到端次优性界；实验表明微调后的LLM在长时域、部分可观测和模型模糊环境中显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM在上下文学习方面表现出色，但其在序列决策（如MDP、POMDP）中的潜力尚未被充分探索。现有方法多依赖在线交互或手工设计的策略，而许多实际场景（如医疗）中只有离线数据可用，因此研究如何利用LLM的ICL能力从离线轨迹中学习决策策略具有重要价值。
AI.method: 对预训练LLM进行监督微调（SFT），使其直接从离线、专家标注的轨迹中进行少样本序列决策。理论上聚焦线性MDP，将微调后的注意力层解释为从上下文数据中隐式估计最优Q函数，并推导出诱导策略的端到端次优性界。实验在合成MDP、POMDP和APOMDP设置中评估微调LLM与上下文学习基线及随机基线的性能差距。
AI.result: 微调后的LLM在各类决策环境中均取得了比纯上下文学习和随机基线显著更小的最优性间隙（optimality gaps），尤其在长时域、部分可观测和模型模糊的环境中增益更为明显。
AI.conclusion: 监督微调是一种有效途径，能够赋予预训练LLM从离线数据中习得序列决策能力，这对于离线数据丰富的领域（如医疗）具有重要意义。理论分析与实验共同验证了方法的有效性。

title: The Agent Use of Agent Beings: Agent Cybernetics Is the Missing Science of Foundation Agents
summary: LLM-based foundation agents that perceive, reason, and act across thousands of reasoning steps are rapidly becoming the dominant paradigm for deploying artificial intelligence in open-ended, long-horizon complex tasks. Despite this significance, the field remains overwhelmingly engineering-driven. Engineering practice has converged on useful primitives (tool loops, memory banks, harnesses, reflection steps), yet these are assembled by empirical trial and error rather than from first principles. Fundamental questions remain open: under what conditions does a long-running agent remain on-task? How should an agent respond when its environment exceeds its representational capacity? What architectural properties are necessary for safe self-improvement? We argue that cybernetics, the mid-twentieth-century science of control and communication in complex systems, provides the missing theoretical scaffold for foundation agents. By mapping six canonical laws of classical cybernetics onto six agent design principles, and synthesizing those principles into three engineering desiderata (reliability, lifelong running, and self-Improvement), we arrive at a framework termed Agent Cybernetics. Three application domains, code generation, computer use and automated research, exemplify the analytical framework of agent cybernetics by identifying failure modes and concrete engineering recommendations. We hope that agent cybernetics opens a new research venue and establishes the scientific foundation that foundation agents need for principled, reliable real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"Agent Cybernetics"框架，将经典控制论六大法则映射为智能体设计原则，为基于LLM的基础智能体在长周期、开放任务中的可靠部署提供理论支撑，涵盖可靠性、持续运行和自我改进三个工程目标。
AI.motivation: 当前基于LLM的基础智能体虽然在复杂任务中表现优异，但研究主要依赖工程试错而非第一性原理，缺乏理论指导。关键基础问题（如何时能保持任务专注、环境超出表征能力时如何响应、安全自我改进需要何种架构）尚无答案。
AI.method: 将经典控制论的六条经典法则映射到六个智能体设计原则，并综合为三个工程需求（可靠性、持续运行、自我改进），形成"Agent Cybernetics"框架。通过代码生成、计算机使用和自动化研究三个应用领域进行案例分析。
AI.result: 提出了Agent Cybernetics理论框架，能够识别智能体在代码生成、计算机使用和自动化研究三个领域的失败模式，并提供具体的工程改进建议。
AI.conclusion: Agent Cybernetics为基于LLM的基础智能体提供了所亟需的科学理论基础，有望推动领域从工程驱动转向原理驱动，实现可信赖的长期部署。

title: A Geometric Perspective on Next-Token Prediction in Large Language Models: Three Emerging Phases
summary: We investigate the geometry of predictive information across the layers of large language models (LLMs). We repurpose representation lenses-learned affine maps trained to predict the next token from intermediate residual streams-as geometric diagnostic tools. Rather than asking what the model predicts at each layer, we ask where predictive information resides and how it evolves across depth. We define at each layer a predictive readout subspace as the dominant k-dimensional singular subspace of such a map on the d-dimensional residual stream (where k is a resolution parameter), and track its trajectory on the Grassmann manifold as a similarity profile across layers. The profile is well described by unimodal distributions exhibiting a rise, near-plateau, and descent; varying k from 1% to 50% of d traces a Pareto frontier between visibility and energy retention, yet the same structure emerges at all scales. Across eight models from two families (Qwen2.5 and OLMo2, 1B-32B), we identify three geometric phases. Updates are approximately orthogonal to the residual stream throughout; what distinguishes the phases is their effect on the effective rank, which expands, stabilizes, and concentrates. In the first, Seeding Multiplexing, feed-forward memories and attention layers seed a candidate set in superposition in family-specific proportions, with the final token rising as leading candidate from 20% to 35% of positions across this phase. In the second, Hoisting Overriding, updates override existing subspaces to concentrate the candidate distribution without expanding the rank. In the third, Focal Convergence, high-energy low-rank updates write the winner into a form aligned with the unembedding direction. Phases 1 and 3 grow slowly with model depth, while Phase 2 expands linearly. The additional capacity of deeper LLMs is largely absorbed by candidate disambiguation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过将表示透镜（用于预测下一个token的仿射映射）重新用作几何诊断工具，研究了大语言模型各层预测信息的几何结构。在Grassmann流形上追踪预测子空间的轨迹，发现其相似性剖面呈单峰分布（上升-平台-下降）。跨8个模型（Qwen2.5和OLMo2，1B-32B）识别出三个几何阶段：播种复用（Seeding Multiplexing）、提升覆盖（Hoisting Overriding）和焦点收敛（Focal Convergence），各阶段在有效秩变化和候选token分布上表现出不同特征。模型加深时，阶段1和3缓慢增长，阶段2线性扩展，额外容量主要用于候选消歧。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注大语言模型在各层"预测什么"，但对于预测信息在残差流中"位于何处"以及"如何随深度演化"的几何结构缺乏系统性理解。本文旨在通过Grassmann流形上的轨迹分析，揭示预测信息在LLM各层间的几何演化规律。
AI.method: 将表示透镜（预测下一个token的仿射映射）重新解释为几何诊断工具，定义每个层上的预测读出子空间为映射的k维奇异子空间（k为分辨率参数），在Grassmann流形上追踪其跨层轨迹，计算相似性剖面。使用Qwen2.5和OLMo2系列（1B-32B）共8个模型进行实验，从k=1%到50%的维度变化探索Pareto前沿。
AI.result: 1) 预测子空间的相似性剖面呈单峰分布（上升-平台-下降），在不同尺度k下结构一致。2) 识别出三个几何阶段：播种复用（前馈记忆和注意力层以家族特定比例播种候选集，最终token在20%-35%位置上升为主要候选）、提升覆盖（更新覆盖现有子空间，集中候选分布但不扩展秩）、焦点收敛（高能低秩更新将胜者写入与反嵌入方向对齐的形式）。3) 阶段1和3随模型深度缓慢增长，阶段2线性扩展；深层LLM的额外容量主要用于候选消歧。
AI.conclusion: LLM中预测信息的几何演化遵循从播种复用、提升覆盖到焦点收敛的三阶段过程，各阶段在有效秩变化和候选分布上表现不同。更深的模型主要通过线性扩展阶段2来增强候选消歧能力，揭示了模型深度增加时计算资源的分配机制。

title: MATRA: Modeling the Attack Surface of Agentic AI Systems -- OpenClaw Case Study
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 5th International Workshop on Designing and Measuring Security in Systems with AI (DeMeSSAI 2026), co-located with the 11th IEEE European Symposium on Security and Privacy (EuroS&P 2026), Lisbon, Portugal, July 10, 2026
summary: LLMs are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents with access to tools, databases, and external services, yet practitioners (across different sectors) lack systematic methods to assess how known threat classes translate into concrete risks within a specific agentic deployment. We present MATRA, a pragmatic threat modeling framework for agentic AI systems that adapts established risk assessment methodology to systematically assess how known LLM threats translate into deployment-specific risks. MATRA begins with an asset-based impact assessment and utilizes attack trees to determine the likelihood of these impacts occurring within the system architecture. We demonstrate MATRA on a personal AI agent deployment using OpenClaw, quantifying how architectural controls such as network sandboxing and least-privilege access reduce risk by limiting the blast radius of successful injections.

AI.tldr: 提出了MATRA，一个针对智能体AI系统的威胁建模框架，通过资产影响评估和攻击树分析，系统评估已知LLM威胁在具体部署中的风险，并在个人AI助手上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: LLM被部署为自主智能体时面临多种威胁，但从业者缺乏系统方法来评估已知威胁类别如何在具体智能体部署中转化为实际风险。
AI.method: MATRA框架从基于资产的影响评估入手，利用攻击树确定这些影响在系统架构中发生的可能性，从而量化架构控制措施（如网络沙箱和最小权限访问）的风险降低效果。
AI.result: 在OpenClaw个人AI智能体部署上的实验表明，网络沙箱和最小权限访问等架构控制通过限制成功注入的爆炸半径来降低风险。
AI.conclusion: MATRA为不同领域的从业者提供了一种实用的威胁建模方法，帮助系统评估和缓解智能体AI部署中的安全风险。

title: Diagnosing and Mitigating Domain Shift in Permission-Based Android Malware Detection
summary: Machine learning-based Android malware detectors often fail in real-world deployment due to domain shift, where models trained on one data source perform poorly on applications from another. This paper presents a comprehensive study on the generalizability and interpretability of permission-based detectors under cross-domain conditions. Using two complementary datasets (PerMalDroid and NATICUSdroid) and five ensemble classifiers, we first establish an intra-domain baseline, where models achieve over 92% accuracy, and then quantify a severe asymmetric performance drop. While models trained on PerMalDroid generalize well to NATICUSdroid (86% accuracy), the reverse direction sees a drastic drop to 73% accuracy. Explainable AI analysis reveals bimodal feature distributions and shows that feature importance is highly unstable, with key permissions losing or gaining influence across domains. The predictive feature sets for different domains are fundamentally mismatched, as models rely on different, dataset-specific permissions.
