Most importantly, an ablation study demonstrates that for most models, training on a noisy feature set leads to poor generalization, confirming that domain-specific artifacts are a greater obstacle than missing features. To mitigate this, we validate a hybrid training strategy based on the intersection of common features and successfully recover cross-domain performance, achieving 88% accuracy on PerMalDroid and maintaining 97% on NATICUSdroid. These findings highlight the importance of explainable, cross-domain-robust malware detection systems and provide a practical pathway toward improving real-world deployment of permission-based Android malware detectors.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了基于权限的Android恶意软件检测器在跨域条件下的泛化性与可解释性问题。实验发现模型存在严重的不对称性能下降（正向86% vs 反向73%），可解释性分析揭示特征重要性不稳定且域间特征集不匹配。通过混合训练策略（基于共同特征交集）可有效恢复跨域性能（88%和97%），表明域特定伪影比缺失特征更阻碍泛化。
AI.motivation: 基于机器学习的Android恶意软件检测器在实际部署中常因域偏移（domain shift）而失效，即在一个数据源上训练的模型难以泛化到另一个数据源的应用程序上。现有研究对此问题的系统性分析不足，尤其是基于权限的检测器在跨域条件下的泛化性和可解释性尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 使用两个互补数据集（PerMalDroid和NATICUSdroid）和五种集成分类器，首先建立域内基线（>92%准确率），然后量化跨域性能下降。通过可解释AI分析特征分布和重要性稳定性，进行消融实验区分域特定伪影与缺失特征的影响，最后验证基于共同特征交集的混合训练策略。
AI.result: 域内检测准确率超过92%；跨域时存在严重不对称性：PerMalDroid→NATICUSdroid达86%，反向仅73%。可解释性分析发现双峰特征分布、特征重要性高度不稳定、预测特征集域间不匹配。消融实验证实域特定伪影比缺失特征更阻碍泛化。混合训练策略恢复性能至88%（PerMalDroid）和97%（NATICUSdroid）。
AI.conclusion: 本研究强调了可解释、跨域鲁棒的恶意软件检测系统的重要性，并提供了改进基于权限的Android恶意软件检测器实际部署的可行路径。域特定伪影是跨域泛化的主要障碍，基于共同特征交集的混合训练是一种有效的缓解策略。

title: TrajPrism: A Multi-Task Benchmark for Language-Grounded Urban Trajectory Understanding
summary: Urban mobility is naturally expressed both as trajectories in space and as natural-language descriptions of travel intent, constraints, and preferences. However, prior work rarely evaluates these two modalities together on the same real-world trajectories: trajectory modeling often stays geometry-centric, while language-centric mobility benchmarks frequently target route planning and tool use rather than fine-grained, verifiable alignment between text and the underlying route. We introduce TrajPrism, a multi-task benchmark for language-trajectory alignment that unifies (i) instruction-conditioned trajectory generation, (ii) language-driven semantic trajectory retrieval, and (iii) trajectory captioning, together with an evaluation protocol that measures trajectory fidelity, retrieval quality, and language groundedness. We construct TrajPrism by pairing real urban trajectories with judge-filtered language annotations generated under a four-dimensional travel-intent taxonomy. The benchmark contains 300K selected trajectories across Porto, San Francisco, and Beijing, yielding 2.1M task instances from three instruction variants, three retrieval queries, and one caption per trajectory. We further develop proof-of-concept models for each task: TrajAnchor for instruction-conditioned trajectory generation, TrajFuse for semantic trajectory retrieval, and TrajRap for trajectory captioning. These models instantiate the proposed tasks and show that geometry-only trajectory baselines leave a large gap on our protocol, especially where language is part of the input-output interface. We release TrajPrism with code and a reproducible annotation pipeline that is designed to be portable across cities, given compatible trajectory inputs and map resources.

AI.tldr: TrajPrism是一个多任务基准，用于评估语言与轨迹的对齐，包含三个任务（指令条件轨迹生成、语义轨迹检索、轨迹描述），涵盖三个城市30万条轨迹和210万任务实例，并提供基线模型和可复现的标注流程。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹建模多侧重几何特征，而语言中心的移动性基准则聚焦路径规划和工具使用，缺乏对文本与轨迹之间细粒度、可验证对齐的评估。
AI.method: 构建了包含30万条轨迹（波尔图、旧金山、北京）的数据集，采用四维出行意图分类法和评判过滤生成语言标注；设计了三项对齐任务及评估协议；并为每项任务开发了初步模型（TrajAnchor、TrajFuse、TrajRap）。
AI.result: 数据集包含210万任务实例，实验表明仅基于几何特征的轨迹基线在涉及语言输入/输出的协议上存在较大差距。
AI.conclusion: TrajPrism为语言-轨迹对齐提供了统一的评估框架，揭示了现有几何方法在语言接口场景下的不足，并提供了可跨城市迁移的标准化标注流程。

title: Spherical Boltzmann machines: a solvable theory of learning and generation in energy-based models
summary: Energy-based models (EBMs) are flexible generative architectures inspired by statistical physics, but their learning and generative properties remain poorly understood. Here, we analyze a solvable EBM in the high-dimensional limit: the spherical Boltzmann machine (SBM). Combining tools from random matrix theory and dynamical mean-field theory, we: solve exact equations describing the training dynamics of the SBM; compute the Bayesian evidence, which acts as a partition function in parameter space and encodes global properties of the trained model; and uncover cascades of phase transitions that occur both during training and as a function of hyperparameters, related to successive alignment and condensation of the top modes of the coupling matrix to the data. We connect these transitions to sampling-time generative phenomena in a teacher-student scenario, including: sampling temperature tuning, double descent as a function of regularization strength, tempered posterior effects, and out-of-equilibrium effects during training that induce biases in the trained model. We provide numerical evidence demonstrating that all these phenomena appear in standard generative architectures, beyond the SBM.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了高维极限下可解能量模型——球形玻尔兹曼机（SBM），利用随机矩阵理论和动态平均场理论精确求解了训练动力学方程、计算了贝叶斯证据，并揭示了训练过程中和超参数空间中的级联相变，这些相变与耦合矩阵顶部模式向数据依次对齐和凝聚有关。作者将这些现象与教师-学生场景中的生成现象（包括采样温度调节、双重下降、后验效应和训练非平衡效应）联系起来，并在标准生成架构中提供了数值证据。
AI.motivation: 能量模型（EBM）虽然受到统计物理启发且具有灵活的生成能力，但其学习和生成性质尚不明确，本文旨在通过一个可解模型深入理解这些性质。
AI.method: 结合随机矩阵理论和动态平均场理论，对球形玻尔兹曼机（SBM）在高维极限下进行分析，求解训练动力学方程、计算贝叶斯证据，并研究相变现象。
AI.result: 精确求解了SBM的训练动力学方程；计算了作为参数空间配分函数的贝叶斯证据；发现了训练过程中和超参数依赖的级联相变，与数据模式的对齐和凝聚相关；将这些相变与教师-学生场景中的多种生成现象联系起来。
AI.conclusion: 球形玻尔兹曼机作为可解模型，揭示了能量模型中的级联相变机制及其与生成现象的联系，且这些现象在标准生成架构中普遍存在。

title: ComplexMCP: Evaluation of LLM Agents in Dynamic, Interdependent, and Large-Scale Tool Sandbox
summary:
Current LLM agents are proficient at calling isolated APIs but struggle with the "last mile" of commercial software automation. In real-world scenarios, tools are not independent; they are atomic, interdependent, and prone to environmental noise. We introduce $\textbf{ComplexMCP}$, a benchmark designed to evaluate agents in these rigorous conditions. Built on the Model Context Protocol (MCP), $\textbf{ComplexMCP}$ provides over 300 meticulously tested tools derived from 7 stateful sandboxes, ranging from office suites to financial systems. Unlike existing datasets, our benchmark utilizes a seed-driven architecture to simulate dynamic environment states and unpredictable API failures, ensuring a deterministic yet diverse evaluation.
  We evaluate various LLMs across full-context and RAG paradigms, revealing a stark performance gap: even top-tier models fail to exceed a 60% success rate, far trailing human performance 90%. Granular trajectory analysis identifies three fundamental bottlenecks: (1) $\textbf{tool retrieval saturation}$ as action spaces scale; (2) $\textbf{over-confidence}$, where agents skip essential environment verifications; and (3) $\textbf{strategic defeatism}$, a tendency to rationalize failure rather than pursuing recovery. These findings underscore the insufficiency of current agents for interdependent workflows, positioning $\textbf{ComplexMCP}$ as a critical testbed for the next generation of resilient autonomous systems.

AI.tldr: 提出ComplexMCP基准，基于MCP协议构建300+工具和7个状态化沙箱，用于评估LLM agent在复杂商业软件自动化中的表现。发现顶级模型成功率仅60%（人类90%），识别出工具检索饱和、过度自信、策略性失败三大瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM agent能调用独立API，但难以应对商业软件自动化中工具相互依赖、原子化、存在环境噪声的现实场景，缺乏能反映这些复杂条件的评估基准。
AI.method: 基于Model Context Protocol (MCP)构建ComplexMCP基准，包含300+经过严格测试的工具和7个状态化沙箱（办公套件到金融系统），采用种子驱动架构模拟动态环境状态和不可预测的API故障。
AI.result: 顶级模型在所有设置下成功率不超过60%，远低于人类90%的表现。粒度的轨迹分析识别出三大瓶颈：工具检索饱和（action空间扩大时）、过度自信（跳过环境验证）、策略性失败（倾向于合理化失败而非恢复）。
AI.conclusion: 当前agent在处理相互依赖的工作流方面存在严重不足，ComplexMCP为下一代弹性自主系统提供了关键测试平台。

title: Accelerating Zeroth-Order Spectral Optimization with Partial Orthogonalization from Power Iteration
summary: Zeroth-order (ZO) optimization has become increasingly popular and important in fine-tuning large language models (LLMs), especially on edge devices due to its ability to adjust the model to local data without the need for memory-intensive back-propagation. Recent works try to reduce ZO variance through low-dimensional subspace search, but subspace restriction alone leaves key optimization geometry under-exploited, motivating additional acceleration. In this work, we focus on the hidden layer training problem in which spectral optimizers like Muon outperform AdamW due to its ability to exploit weak spectral directions by orthogonalization. However, we have discovered that unlike in the first-order setting, full orthogonalization works poorly in the ZO setting since the gradient estimates are highly noisy and unreliable. To address this issue, we propose a key approach we call partial orthogonalization. To do so, we replace the iconic Newton-Schulz procedure in Muon with the faster, more concentrated power-iteration method so that it only amplifies dominant spectral directions. Furthermore, to improve the efficiency and generalization of the algorithm, we adopted a streaming variant of power-iteration that requires low variance in gradients, which was achieved through constraining our search inside a subspace obtained through the projection of momentum, echoing recent advances. Experiments on LLM fine-tuning show that our method can achieve from 1.5x to 4x the convergence speed of ZO-Muon, the current SOTA algorithm, across SuperGlue datasets in the OPT-13B model. Across different models, we also reach competitive final accuracies with less time in most cases compared with strong ZO baselines such as MeZO, LOZO and ZO-Muon. Code is available at https://github.com/MOFA-LAB/ZO-MOPI.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ZO-MOPI算法，通过部分正交化（用幂迭代替代Newton-Schulz）和动量投影子空间约束，解决ZO优化中梯度噪声导致的完全正交化失效问题，在LLM微调中实现1.5-4倍于ZO-Muon的收敛速度。
AI.motivation: 现有ZO优化虽通过低维子空间搜索降低方差，但子空间约束本身未充分挖掘优化几何结构；而谱优化器Muon在ZO场景下因梯度估计高度噪声化，完全正交化效果不佳，亟需一种能适应ZO噪声特性的正交化策略。
AI.method: 1) 提出部分正交化策略，用幂迭代（Power Iteration）替代Newton-Schulz过程，仅放大主导谱方向；2) 采用流式变体的幂迭代，需低方差梯度，通过动量投影子空间约束实现低方差。
AI.result: 在OPT-13B模型的SuperGlue数据集上，收敛速度达ZO-Muon的1.5-4倍；跨模型对比中，在大多数情况下以更短时间达到与MeZO、LOZO、ZO-Muon等强基线相当的最终精度。
AI.conclusion: 部分正交化结合子空间约束能有效缓解ZO梯度噪声问题，大幅提升ZO优化效率，为边缘设备上LLM微调提供更实用的优化方案。

title: PathISE: Learning Informative Path Supervision for Knowledge Graph Question Answering
summary: Knowledge Graph Question Answering (KGQA) aims to answer user questions by reasoning over Knowledge Graphs (KGs). Recent KGQA methods mainly follow the retrieval-augmented generation paradigm to ground Large Language Models~(LLMs) with structured knowledge from KGs. However, training effective models to retrieve question-relevant evidence from KGs typically requires high-quality intermediate supervision signals, such as question-relevant paths or subgraphs, which are time- and resource-intensive to obtain. We propose PathISE, a novel framework for learning high-quality intermediate supervision from answer-level labels. PathISE introduces a lightweight transformer-based estimator that estimates the informativeness of relation paths to construct pseudo path-level supervision. This supervision is then distilled into an LLM path generator, whose generated paths are grounded in the KG to provide compact evidence for inductive answer reasoning. ExtensiveISE experiments on three KGQA benchmarks show that PathISE achieves competitive or state-of-the-art KGQA performance, and provides reusable supervision signals that can enhance existing KGQA models, without relying on costly LLM-refined supervision signals. Our source code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/PathISE-2F87.

AI.tldr: PathISE提出了一种从答案级标签中学习高质量中间监督信号的框架，通过轻量级Transformer估计器构建伪路径监督，并将其蒸馏到LLM路径生成器中，实现无需昂贵中间标注的知识图谱问答。
AI.motivation: 现有KGQA方法依赖高质量的中间监督信号（如问题相关路径或子图）来训练检索模型，这些信号的获取耗时且资源密集。
AI.method: 提出PathISE框架，包含：(1) 轻量级Transformer估计器，从答案级标签估计关系路径的信息量，构建伪路径监督；(2) 将伪监督蒸馏到LLM路径生成器中；(3) 生成的路径在KG上接地，为归纳式答案推理提供紧凑证据。
AI.result: 在三个KGQA基准数据集上取得竞争性或最优性能，且无需依赖昂贵的LLM优化的监督信号。
AI.conclusion: PathISE能够生成可复用的监督信号，增强现有KGQA模型，且避免了对高成本中间标注的依赖。

title: PACT: Peak-Aware Cross-Attention Graph Transformers for Efficient Storm-Surge Emulation
summary: Accurate and efficient storm-surge emulation is essential for coastal hazard assessment, yet high-fidelity hydrodynamic models remain too expensive for large scenario ensembles and rapid evaluation under heterogeneous climate forcings. We present PACT, a peak-aware cross-attention graph transformer for efficient station-level storm-surge prediction from atmospheric forcing fields. PACT represents each forcing patch as a graph, encodes spatial structure with GraphSAGE, and uses a learned station query to aggregate node information through cross-attention rather than uniform pooling. A Transformer encoder models temporal dependence across the forcing history, and a horizon-query decoder generates lead-specific forecasts from a shared temporal memory. To better capture extreme events, we introduce a peak-aware learning strategy that couples a lightweight auxiliary peak-aware head with a tailored training objective, including a tail-focused loss on peak-dominated samples and a horizon-wise slope regularizer to encourage coherent multi-step evolution. Across multiple tide-gauge stations along the US Northeast coast, PACT outperforms a strong spatio-temporal graph neural network baseline in both RMSE and MAE. Diagnostics show improved peak fidelity and tail preservation for reanalysis and most CMIP6 datasets. PACT is also computationally efficient, requiring about 3.5~s to generate a full winter-season surge trajectory for one year after training. Under distribution shift across five CMIP6 forcings, PACT transfers well within the CMIP6 family but degrades markedly when transferring from reanalysis to climate-model forcings, highlighting a persistent reanalysis--GCM gap.

AI.tldr: PACT是一种面向风暴潮预测的峰值感知交叉注意力图Transformer，通过图结构编码、交叉注意力聚合、峰值感知学习策略实现高效准确的站点级风暴潮模拟，在US Northeast海岸多个潮位站优于基线模型，计算高效（训练后一个冬季约3.5秒），但在再分析到气候模型迁移时存在性能下降。
AI.motivation: 高保真水动力模型对大规模情景集合和异构气候强迫下的快速评估成本过高，需要准确高效的风暴潮仿真替代模型。
AI.method: 将每个强迫区域表示为图结构，使用GraphSAGE编码空间结构；通过学习到的站点查询经交叉注意力聚合节点信息代替统一池化；Transformer编码器建模时序依赖；水平查询解码器生成分领先知预测；提出峰值感知学习策略，包括轻量峰值感知头、尾部聚焦损失和水平斜率正则化器。
AI.result: 在US Northeast多个潮位站上，PACT在RMSE和MAE上优于强时空图神经网络基线；在再分析和多数CMIP6数据集上峰值保真度和尾部保持更好；训练后生成一个冬季轨迹仅需约3.5秒；在CMIP6内迁移良好，但从再分析向气候模型强迫迁移时性能明显下降。
AI.conclusion: PACT在风暴潮仿真中兼具准确性、峰值捕捉能力和计算效率，但存在再分析-GCM迁移鸿沟，需进一步弥合。

title: Interpretable Machine Learning for Football Performance Analysis: Evidence of Limited Transferability from Elite Leagues to University Competition
summary: Machine learning has become increasingly prevalent in football performance analysis, yet most studies prioritize predictive accuracy while implicitly assuming that learned performance determinants and their interpretations are transferable across competition levels. Whether interpretability remains reliable under domain shift-from elite to university football remains largely unexplored. This study investigates whether performance determinants learned from elite competitions are structurally transferable to university-level football and whether their interpretations remain robust under domain shift. Models were trained on large-scale event data from the top five European leagues and applied to university football data from National Tsing Hua University (NTHU) using an identical feature space. Random Forest and Multilayer Perceptron models were interpreted using SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) and Counterfactual Impact Score (CIS). Across five experiments, elite football exhibited a stable and consistent hierarchy of performance determinants across leagues, models, and explanation methods. In contrast, NTHU university football showed substantial reordering of key indicators, reduced explanation stability, weaker structural agreement with elite domains, and increased sensitivity to explanation method. These findings suggest that interpretability robustness is domain-dependent. Rather than reflecting methodological limitations alone, instability in explanations under domain shift may serve as a diagnostic signal of structural ambiguity in the target domain.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨机器学习模型在足球表现分析中的可解释性是否能在不同竞技层级（从精英联赛到大学足球）之间稳健迁移。研究发现，精英足球的表现决定因素具有稳定一致的层级结构，但在大学足球领域中，关键指标排序发生显著变化，解释稳定性下降，且对解释方法更为敏感。结果表明，可解释性的稳健性具有领域依赖性，解释的不稳定性可能反映目标领域的结构模糊性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注预测精度，假设学习到的表现决定因素及其解释可跨竞技层级迁移，但这一假设在领域偏移（从精英到大学足球）下是否成立尚未被系统验证。本研究旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 使用欧洲五大联赛大规模赛事数据训练Random Forest和Multilayer Perceptron模型，并在相同特征空间下应用于清华大学（NTHU）大学足球数据，采用SHAP和Counterfactual Impact Score（CIS）两种可解释性方法进行解释分析。共设计五项实验比较跨领域的解释稳定性。
AI.result: 精英足球中表现决定因素在不同联赛、模型和解释方法间保持稳定一致的层级结构；而大学足球领域出现关键指标重新排序、解释稳定性降低、与精英领域的结构一致性减弱，且对解释方法的选择更为敏感。
AI.conclusion: 可解释性的稳健性是领域依赖的。领域偏移下的解释不稳定性不应仅被视为方法论缺陷，而可能作为目标领域结构模糊性的诊断信号。

title: Predicting Plasticity in Deep Continual Learning: A Theoretical Perspective
summary: Deep continual learning requires models to adapt to new tasks without retraining from scratch. However, neural networks can lose their ability to adapt to new tasks after training on previous ones, a phenomenon known as loss of plasticity. There have been several explanations and diagnostics proposed for plasticity loss. Motivated by the philosophy that "all models are wrong, but some are useful", we ask: can existing diagnostics predict a neural network's plasticity? In this work, we take a practical view to interpret plasticity as trainability, i.e., a neural network's future optimization gain on a target task. We first take a theoretical approach, showing, by constructing a few counterexamples, that some widely adopted diagnostics of plasticity, including representation rank and neural tangent kernel rank, can fail to predict the loss of trainability in both regression and classification settings. We instead propose a novel metric, called optimization readiness, which combines gradient strength and gradient reliability. We prove that optimization readiness lower bounds one-step optimization gain under standard smoothness assumptions, providing a theoretical guarantee for its predictive power. Empirically, we show that across commonly used deep continual learning settings, such as Slowly-Changing Regression and Permuted MNIST, optimization readiness more reliably ranks checkpoints by trainability than prior diagnostics, even with substantially fewer samples.

AI.tldr: 本文发现现有诊断指标（如表示秩和NTK秩）无法可靠预测神经网络的可训练性（塑性），提出优化准备度（Optimization Readiness）这一新指标，结合梯度强度与梯度可靠性，并在理论上证明其下界单步优化增益，实验表明其优于先前方法。
AI.motivation: 持续学习中神经网络在连续任务上训练后会丧失适应新任务的能力（塑性损失），现有多种诊断指标被提出但缺乏对其预测能力的严格评估。作者从实用视角出发，探究现有指标能否真正预测网络的可训练性。
AI.method: 首先通过构造反例证明表示秩和NTK秩在回归和分类设置中均可能失效；然后提出优化准备度（Optimization Readiness）指标，综合梯度强度（gradient strength）和梯度可靠性（gradient reliability）；并在标准光滑性假设下证明其理论下界。
AI.result: 在Slowly-Changing Regression和Permuted MNIST等持续学习设置中，优化准备度比现有诊断指标更可靠地排序检查点的可训练性，且所需样本量显著更少。
AI.conclusion: 优化准备度是一个理论上保证、实践中有效的塑性/可训练性预测指标，适用于深度持续学习场景。

title: New AI-Driven Tools for Enhancing Campus Well-being: A Prevention and Intervention Approach
comment: PhD Dissertation, University of Missouri, May 2026
summary: Campus well-being underpins academic success, yet many universities lack effective methods for monitoring satisfaction and detecting mental health risks. This dissertation addresses these gaps through prevention (improving feedback collection) and intervention (advancing mental health detection), unified under an integrated framework. For prevention, we developed TigerGPT, a personalized survey chatbot leveraging LLMs to engage users in context-aware conversations grounded in conversational design and engagement theory, achieving 75% usability and 81% satisfaction. To address its limitations in repetitiveness and response depth, we introduced AURA, a reinforcement-learning framework that adapts follow-up question types (validate, specify, reflect, probe) within a session using an LSDE quality signal (Length, Self-disclosure, Emotion, Specificity), initialized from 96 prior conversations. AURA achieved +0.12 mean quality gain (p=0.044, d=0.66), with 63% fewer specification prompts and 10x more validation behavior. For intervention, we examine Expressive Narrative Stories (ENS) for mental health screening, showing BERT(128) captures nuanced linguistic features without keyword cues, while conventional classifiers depend heavily on explicit mental health terms. We then developed PsychoGPT, an LLM built on DSM-5 and PHQ-8 guidelines that performs initial distress classification, symptom-level scoring, and reconciliation with external ratings for explainable assessment. To reduce hallucinations, we proposed Stacked Multi-Model Reasoning (SMMR), layering expert models where early layers handle localized subtasks and later layers reconcile findings, outperforming single-model solutions on DAIC-WOZ in accuracy, F1, and PHQ-8 scoring. Finally, a cohesive framework unifies these tools, enabling adaptive survey insights to flow directly into specialized mental health detection models.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一套统一的校园福祉框架，涵盖预防（通过TigerGPT和AURA改进反馈收集）和干预（通过PsychoGPT和SMMR进行心理健康检测）两大模块，并验证了各组件在可用性、满意度、质量增益和检测准确性上的有效性。
AI.motivation: 校园福祉对学业成功至关重要，但许多大学缺乏有效的满意度监测和心理健康风险检测方法。
AI.method: 预防方面：开发了基于LLM的个性化调查聊天机器人TigerGPT，以及基于强化学习的AURA框架（使用LSDE质量信号自适应调整追问类型）。干预方面：分析了BERT在表达性叙事故事中的语言特征捕捉能力；开发了基于DSM-5和PHQ-8的PsychoGPT进行症状级评分；提出堆叠多模型推理（SMMR）减少幻觉。
AI.result: TigerGPT达到75%可用性和81%满意度；AURA实现+0.12平均质量增益（p=0.044, d=0.66），规范提示减少63%，验证行为增加10倍；PsychoGPT和SMMR在DAIC-WOZ数据集上优于单模型方案。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架可将自适应调查洞察直接输入专业心理健康检测模型，实现预防与干预的协同。

title: FactoryNet: A Large-Scale Dataset toward Industrial Time-Series Foundation Models
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables. Submitted to ICML 2026 Workshop on AI for Physics (AI4Physics)
summary: We introduce the first universal pretraining corpus for industrial time-series data: FactoryNet. 51M datapoints across 23k end-to-end task executions (13.3k real, 9.8k synthetic) on six embodiments, unified by a shared schema that enables robust zero-shot cross-embodiment transfer and highly parameter-efficient anomaly detection. We introduce a novel schema: Setpoint, Effort, Feedback, Context (S-E-F-C) underlying the whole pipeline that maps any actuated system into a common representational frame. The corpus spans 27 annotated anomaly types alongside healthy baselines and counterfactual pairs across robotic manipulation and machining domains. Cross-embodiment transfer experiments yield positive results: under bias-aware metrics our model demonstrates fair cross-embodiment transfer capabilities on the evaluated source-target pair, while 24 schema-aligned signals achieves competitive anomaly detection performance compared to high-dimensional baselines. We release FactoryNet as a growing, multi-embodiment dataset to drive progress toward industrial foundation models.

AI.tldr: FactoryNet 是首个面向工业时序数据的通用预训练语料库，包含 5100 万数据点，覆盖 6 种实体上的 2.3 万次端到端任务执行（含真实与合成数据），采用统一的 S-E-F-C 模式实现零样本跨实体迁移和高参数效率的异常检测。
AI.motivation: 工业时序数据缺乏统一的预训练语料库，现有方法难以实现跨实体的零样本迁移和高效的异常检测。
AI.method: 提出 S-E-F-C（Setpoint, Effort, Feedback, Context）模式，将任意驱动系统映射为通用表示框架，构建包含 27 种异常类型及健康基线和反事实对的统一语料库。
AI.result: 在跨实体迁移实验中展现出公平的迁移能力，24 个符合模式的信号在异常检测上达到与高维基线竞争的性能。
AI.conclusion: FactoryNet 作为不断增长的多实体数据集，旨在推动工业基础模型的发展。

title: A Tale of Two Problems: Multi-Task Bilevel Learning Meets Equality Constrained Multi-Objective Optimization
summary: In recent years, bilevel optimization (BLO) has attracted significant attention for its broad applications in machine learning. However, most existing works on BLO remain confined to the single-task setting and rely on the lower-level strong convexity assumption, which significantly restricts their applicability to modern machine learning problems of growing complexity. In this paper, we make the first attempt to extend BLO to the multi-task setting under a relaxed lower-level general convexity (LLGC) assumption. To this end, we reformulate the multi-task bilevel learning (MTBL) problem with LLGC into an equality constrained multi-objective optimization (ECMO) problem. However, ECMO itself is a new problem that has not yet been studied in the literature. To address this gap, we first establish a new Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT)-based Pareto stationarity as the convergence criterion for ECMO algorithm design. Based on this foundation, we propose a weighted Chebyshev (WC)-penalty algorithm that achieves a finite-time convergence rate of $O(ST^{-\frac{1}{2})$ to KKT-based Pareto stationarity in both deterministic and stochastic settings, where $S$ denotes the number of objectives, and $T$ is the total iterations. Moreover, by varying the preference vector over the $S$-dimensional simplex, our WC-penalty method systematically explores the Pareto front. Finally, solutions to the ECMO problem translate directly into solutions for the original MTBL problem, thereby closing the loop between these two foundational optimization frameworks.

AI.tldr: 本文首次将双层优化(BLO)从单任务拓展到多任务场景，在放宽下层强凸性为一般凸性(LLGC)的假设下，将多任务双层学习(MTBL)重构为等式约束的多目标优化(ECMO)问题，并提出基于KKT帕累托平稳性的加权切比雪夫(WC)-罚函数算法，在确定性和随机环境下实现了O(ST^{-1/2})的有限时间收敛率。
AI.motivation: 现有双层优化工作局限于单任务设置且依赖下层强凸性假设，难以适应日益复杂的机器学习问题。本文试图将BLO拓展到多任务场景并放宽下层凸性假设。
AI.method: 将多任务双层学习(MTBL)问题重构为等式约束的多目标优化(ECMO)问题；建立基于KKT条件的帕累托平稳性作为收敛准则；提出加权切比雪夫(WC)-罚函数算法。
AI.result: 在确定性和随机环境下，算法实现了O(ST^{-1/2})的有限时间收敛率到KKT帕累托平稳性；通过变化偏好向量可系统探索帕累托前沿。
AI.conclusion: ECMO问题的解可直接转化为原MTBL问题的解，从而闭合了这两个优化框架之间的循环。

title: NanoResearch: Co-Evolving Skills, Memory, and Policy for Personalized Research Automation
summary: LLM-powered multi-agent systems can now automate the full research pipeline from ideation to paper writing, but a fundamental question remains: automation for whom? Researchers operate under different resource configurations, hold different methodological preferences, and target different output formats. A system that produces uniform outputs regardless of these differences will systematically under-serve every individual user, making personalization a precondition for research automation to be genuinely usable. However, achieving it requires three capabilities that current systems lack: accumulating reusable procedural knowledge across projects, retaining user-specific experience across sessions, and internalizing implicit preferences that resist explicit formalization. We propose NanoResearch, a multi-agent framework that addresses these gaps through tri-level co-evolution. A skill bank distills recurring operations into compact procedural rules reusable across projects. A memory module maintains user- and project-specific experience that grounds planning decisions in each user's research history. A label-free policy learning converts free-form feedback into persistent parameter updates of the planner, reshaping subsequent coordination. These three layers co-evolve: reliable skills produce richer memory, richer memory informs better planning, and preference internalization continuously realigns the loop to each user. Extensive experiments demonstrate that NanoResearch delivers substantial gains over state-of-the-art AI research systems, and progressively refines itself to produce better research at lower cost over successive cycles.

AI.tldr: 提出NanoResearch，一个通过三层次协同进化（技能库、记忆模块、无标签策略学习）实现个性化研究自动化的多智能体框架，解决了现有系统缺乏跨项目可复用知识、跨会话用户经验和隐性偏好内化的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM驱动的多智能体研究自动化系统忽视了个性化需求——不同研究者拥有不同的资源配置、方法论偏好和输出格式要求，统一输出无法满足任何个体用户，使得个性化成为研究自动化真正可用的前提条件。
AI.method: 提出NanoResearch框架，包含三个协同进化层次：(1) 技能库（Skill Bank）将重复操作提炼为可跨项目复用的紧凑过程规则；(2) 记忆模块（Memory Module）维护用户和项目特定经验，将规划决策植根于用户研究历史；(3) 无标签策略学习（Label-free Policy Learning）将自由形式反馈转化为规划器的持续参数更新。三层协同进化：可靠技能产生更丰富记忆，丰富记忆支撑更好规划，偏好内化持续校准循环。
AI.result: 大量实验表明NanoResearch相较于最先进的AI研究系统取得显著收益，并能通过连续循环逐步自我优化，以更低成本产出更优研究。
AI.conclusion: 个性化是研究自动化可用的前提条件，NanoResearch通过三层次协同进化机制有效实现了用户特定偏好内化和持续自我改进，为个性化研究自动化提供了可行方案。

title: Bridging Spectral Operator Learning and U-Net Hierarchies: SpectraNet for Stable Autoregressive PDE Surrogates
summary: Neural operators for time-dependent PDEs face a structural tension: spectral architectures (FNO and descendants) inherit exponential rollout-error growth from their one-step Lipschitz constant, while hierarchical U-Net operators trade resolution invariance for multi-scale detail. We introduce SpectraNet, an autoregressive neural operator that composes truncated spectral convolutions inside a U-Net hierarchy with a Residual-Target Spectral Block trained under a Semigroup-Consistency Loss. The residual-target parametrization replaces L^T stability blow-up with linear T*delta drift, and the spectral path's parameter count is Theta(L w^2 M^2), independent of grid N. Under a single unified protocol against 16 published neural-operator baselines on Navier-Stokes nu=1e-5 at 64x64, SpectraNet reaches test relative L2 = 0.0822 at 2.04M parameters -- 2.33x fewer than canonical FNO at ~20% lower error -- and wins five of six rows in a cross-PDE comparison against FNO (NS at nu in {1e-4, 1e-3}, PDEBench Shallow-Water 2D and Diffusion-Reaction, with the Active-Matter row going to FNO inside its seed spread). Trained from scratch at native 128^2 under the same protocol, SpectraNet improves to 0.0724 while FNO regresses to 0.3080. Free rollout stays bounded for T=100 where FNO diverges across all 200 test trajectories. On consumer CPU at B=1, SpectraNet runs sub-200ms while the full-attention Transformer that wins raw L2 pays ~60x latency; we do not claim to beat that Transformer on raw L2, only to dominate the lightweight (<=5M parameter, sub-200ms CPU) Pareto frontier. Source code: https://github.com/Enrikkk/spectranet

AI.tldr: SpectraNet是一种自回归神经算子，通过将截断谱卷积嵌入U-Net层级结构并结合残差目标谱块与半群一致性损失训练，解决了谱架构（如FNO）的指数级 rollout 误差增长问题。在Navier-Stokes等多个PDE基准上，以2.04M参数达到0.0822相对L2误差，优于FNO（2.33倍参数、~20%更低误差），且长时间 rollout 稳定（T=100不发散），CPU推理亚200ms，主导轻量级Pareto前沿。
AI.motivation: 现有神经算子存在结构性矛盾：谱架构（FNO等）因单步Lipschitz常数导致自回归时误差指数增长；层级U-Net算子虽能捕捉多尺度细节，但丧失了分辨率不变性。作者旨在设计一种兼具谱算子的分辨率不变性与U-Net多尺度表征能力、且能避免长程 rollout 误差爆炸的轻量级神经算子。
AI.method: 1) 将截断谱卷积嵌入U-Net层级结构；2) 提出残差目标谱块（Residual-Target Spectral Block），将L^T稳定性爆炸转化为线性T*δ漂移；3) 采用半群一致性损失（Semigroup-Consistency Loss）训练；4) 谱路径参数量为Θ(L w² M²)，与网格N无关。
AI.result: 在Navier-Stokes ν=1e-5、64×64统一协议下，SpectraNet以2.04M参数达到测试相对L2=0.0822，比FNO参数少2.33倍、误差低~20%；在跨PDE比较中6项指标胜5项。128²训练时SpectraNet提升至0.0724，FNO退化为0.3080。T=100 rollout保持有界，FNO全部发散。CPU推理<200ms，而全注意力Transformers延迟高约60倍。
AI.conclusion: SpectraNet在轻量级（≤5M参数、CPU亚200ms）Pareto前沿上占据主导地位，虽然未在原始L2上超越全注意力Transformer，但以极低的计算代价实现了稳定且精确的长程PDE预测，为实际部署提供了高效解决方案。

title: Probing Cross-modal Information Hubs in Audio-Visual LLMs
summary: Audio-visual large language models (AVLLMs) have recently emerged as a powerful architecture capable of jointly reasoning over audio, visual, and textual modalities. In AVLLMs, the bidirectional interaction between audio and video modalities introduces intricate processing dynamics, necessitating a deeper understanding of their internal mechanisms. However, unlike extensively studied text-only or large vision language models, the internal workings of AVLLMs remain largely unexplored. In this paper, we focus on cross-modal information flow between audio and visual modalities in AVLLMs, investigating where information derived from one modality is encoded within the token representations of the other modality. Through an analysis of multiple recent AVLLMs, we uncover two common findings. First, AVLLMs primarily encode integrated audio-visual information in sink tokens. Second, sink tokens do not uniformly hold cross-modal information. Instead, a distinct subset of sink tokens, which we term cross-modal sink tokens, specializes in storing such information. Based on these findings, we further propose a simple training-free hallucination mitigation method by encouraging reliance on integrated cross-modal information within cross-modal sink tokens. Our code is available at https://github.com/kaistmm/crossmodal-hub.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了音视频大语言模型（AVLLMs）中跨模态信息流的内部机制，发现模型主要在"接收令牌"（sink tokens）中编码音视频融合信息，并进一步识别出专门存储跨模态信息的"跨模态接收令牌"（cross-modal sink tokens），基于此提出了一种无需训练的幻觉缓解方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管AVLLMs在音视频多模态联合推理中展现出强大能力，但其内部工作机制（尤其是跨模态信息如何在音频和视觉模态间流动）尚不明确，与已充分研究的纯文本或视觉语言模型形成鲜明对比。
AI.method: 通过对多个最新AVLLMs进行跨模态信息流分析，研究某一模态衍生的信息如何在另一模态的令牌表示中被编码；基于发现提出无需训练的幻觉缓解方法，鼓励模型依赖跨模态接收令牌中的融合信息。
AI.result: 发现两个共性结论：(1) AVLLMs主要在接收令牌中编码音视频融合信息；(2) 并非所有接收令牌均匀存储跨模态信息，存在专门负责此功能的"跨模态接收令牌"子集。
AI.conclusion: 基于跨模态接收令牌的发现，提出的无需训练幻觉缓解方法能够有效改善AVLLMs的输出质量。

title: Contextual Plackett-Luce: An Efficient Neural Model for Probabilistic Sequence Selection under Ambiguity
summary: Selecting a coherent sequence or subset of elements is a fundamental problem in structured prediction, arising in tasks such as detection, trajectory forecasting, and representative subset selection. In many such settings, the target is inherently ambiguous: each input admits multiple valid outputs, while supervision provides only a single sampled instance. This induces a mismatch between the underlying multi-modal target distribution and the observed training signal. We propose Contextual Plackett-Luce (CPL), a structured probabilistic model for sequence selection that extends the classical Plackett-Luce model to a context-dependent setting following an Ising-style parameterization with unary and pairwise interaction terms. CPL can be viewed as a hybrid between fully autoregressive prediction and parallel sequence selection: autoregressive models effectively capture uncertainty but are computationally expensive on modern parallel hardware such as GPUs, while parallel methods are efficient but struggle to represent multi-modal dependencies. CPL combines the strengths of both by constructing the parameters of a probabilistic selection model in a fully parallel manner, followed by a lightweight autoregressive selection process in which each step applies incremental updates to contextual logits. This decoupling of parallel scoring and sequential selection enables efficient computation without sacrificing expressivity. We evaluate CPL on two structured selection tasks: multi-modal path prediction and representative subset selection. CPL achieves improved structural consistency and robustness under ambiguous supervision compared to strong parallel baselines.

AI.tldr: 针对结构化预测中多模态目标分布与单实例监督不匹配的问题，提出Contextual Plackett-Luce (CPL)模型，采用Ising风格参数化融合并行评分与轻量级自回归选择，在路径预测和代表性子集选择任务上取得更优的结构一致性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 在结构化预测中，许多任务（如检测、轨迹预测、代表性子集选择）的目标具有内在歧义性：每个输入对应多个有效输出，但监督信号仅提供单个采样实例，导致多模态目标分布与观测训练信号之间存在不匹配。
AI.method: 提出Contextual Plackett-Luce (CPL)模型，将经典Plackett-Luce模型扩展到上下文相关场景，采用Ising风格参数化（含一元和成对交互项）。模型先以完全并行方式构建概率选择模型的参数，再通过轻量级自回归选择过程逐步骤对上下文logits进行增量更新，实现并行评分与顺序选择的解耦。
AI.result: 在两种结构化选择任务（多模态路径预测和代表性子集选择）上，CPL相比强并行基线方法取得了更好的结构一致性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CPL作为一种混合模型，兼具自回归模型的不确定性捕捉能力和并行方法的高效计算优势，在模糊监督场景下有效提升了输出结构的一致性和鲁棒性。

title: CLEF: EEG Foundation Model for Learning Clinical Semantics
summary: Clinical EEG interpretation requires reasoning over full EEG sessions and integrating signal patterns with clinical context. Existing EEG foundation models are largely designed for short-window decoding and do not incorporate clinical context. We introduce CLEF, a clinically grounded long-context EEG foundation model. CLEF represents EEG sessions as 3D multitaper spectrogram tokens, enabling tractable Transformer modeling at session scale, and aligns embeddings with neurologist reports and structured EHR data through contrastive objectives. We evaluate CLEF on a new 234-task benchmark spanning disease phenotypes, medication exposures, and EEG findings, with more than 260k EEG sessions from over 108k patients. CLEF outperforms prior EEG foundation models on 229 of 234 tasks, improving mean AUROC from 0.65 to 0.74. Reconstruction-only pretraining surpasses prior EEG foundation models, while report and EHR alignment yields further gains. Held-out concept and external-cohort experiments suggest that these representations transfer beyond observed alignment targets. These results support session-scale, clinically grounded representation learning as a promising foundation-model paradigm for clinical EEG.

AI.tldr: CLEF是一个临床导向的长上下文脑电图基础模型，通过3D多窗谱图令牌对完整EEG会话进行建模，并结合神经科医生报告和结构化EHR数据进行对比学习，在234项任务中显著优于现有模型（平均AUROC从0.65提升至0.74）。
AI.motivation: 现有EEG基础模型主要设计用于短窗口解码，无法处理完整EEG会话，且未整合临床上下文信息，限制了真实临床场景中的应用。
AI.method: 将EEG会话表示为3D多窗谱图令牌以实现会话级Transformer建模，通过对比学习目标将嵌入与神经科医生报告和结构化EHR数据对齐。
AI.result: 在涵盖234项任务（疾病表型、药物暴露、EEG发现）的基准上，CLEF在229项任务中优于先前EEG基础模型，平均AUROC从0.65提升至0.74。仅重构预训练即超越先前模型，报告和EHR对齐带来进一步增益。
AI.conclusion: 会话级、临床导向的表征学习是临床EEG基础模型的有前景范式，且学到的表征能泛化到未见概念和外部队列。

title: Personalized Alignment Revisited: The Necessity and Sufficiency of User Diversity
summary: Personalized alignment aims to adapt large language models to heterogeneous user preferences, yet the precise theoretical conditions for its statistical efficiency have not been formally established. This paper characterizes the conditions under which personalized alignment achieves O(1) online regret and log(1/epsilon) offline sample complexity. We show that these optimal rates depend on a specific user-diversity condition: the population of user-specific heads must span the latent reward directions that can alter the optimal response. We prove that this condition is both necessary and sufficient. When it holds, simple greedy algorithms achieve benchmark efficiency; when it fails, every learner in a natural admissible class incurs at least logarithmic regret. Our results identify user diversity as the fundamental driver of personalized identifiability.

AI.tldr: 本文刻画了个性化对齐在用户多样性条件下达到最优统计效率（在线O(1)遗憾和离线log(1/ε)样本复杂度）的充要条件，证明了用户特异性头的张成空间必须覆盖能改变最优响应的潜在奖励方向，并指出用户多样性是个性化可识别性的根本驱动力。
AI.motivation: 已有研究缺乏对个性化对齐统计效率的理论条件的形式化刻画，本文旨在建立个性化对齐达到最优在线遗憾和离线样本复杂度的精确理论条件。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，提出并证明了一个用户多样性条件（用户特异性头张成空间需覆盖改变最优响应的潜在奖励方向），并证明该条件在对于实现O(1)在线遗憾和log(1/ε)离线样本复杂度上是必要且充分的。在该条件成立时，简单贪心算法即可达到基准效率；不成立时，任何自然可容许类中的学习器都会遭受至少对数遗憾。
AI.result: 个性化对齐在用户多样性条件满足时达到O(1)在线遗憾和log(1/ε)离线样本复杂度；条件不满足时，所有自然可容许学习器至少产生对数遗憾。
AI.conclusion: 用户多样性是个性化可识别性的根本驱动力，该条件决定了个性化对齐的最优统计效率边界。

title: MaD Physics: Evaluating information seeking under constraints in physical environments
summary: Scientific discovery is fundamentally a resource-constrained process that requires navigating complex trade-offs between the quality and quantity of measurements due to physical and cost constraints. Measurements drive the scientific process by revealing novel phenomena to improve our understanding. Existing benchmarks for evaluating agents for scientific discovery focus on either static knowledge-based reasoning or unconstrained experimental design tasks, and do not capture the ability to make measurements and plan under constraints. To bridge this gap, we propose Measuring and Discovering Physics (MaD Physics), a benchmark to evaluate the ability of agents to make informative measurements and conclusions subject to constraints on the quality and quantity of measurements. The benchmark consists of three environments, each based on a distinct physical law. To mitigate contamination from existing knowledge, MaD Physics includes altered physical laws. In each trial, the agent makes measurements of the system until it exhausts an allotted budget and then the agent has to infer the underlying physical law to make predictions about the state of the system in the future. MaD Physics evaluates two fundamental capabilities of scientific agents: inferring models from data and planning under constraints. We also demonstrate how MaD Physics can be used to evaluate other capabilities such as multimodality and in-context learning. We benchmark agents on MaD Physics using four Gemini models (2.5 Flash Lite, 2.5 Flash, 2.5 Pro, and 3 Flash), identifying shortcomings in their structured exploration and data collection capabilities and highlighting directions to improve their scientific reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出了MaD Physics基准，用于评估科学发现智能体在质量-数量约束下进行测量、规划并推断物理定律的能力。基准包含三个基于物理定律（含篡改版本）的环境，通过预算限制测量，考察模型从数据推断模型和约束下规划两大核心能力。测试了四个Gemini模型，发现其在结构化探索和数据收集方面存在不足。
AI.motivation: 现有科学发现基准要么关注静态知识推理，要么关注无约束的实验设计，无法捕捉在测量质量和数量约束下进行测量和规划的能力。真实科学发现是资源受限过程，需要在测量质量与数量间权衡，因此需要一个新的基准来评估智能体在这些约束下的表现。
AI.method: 构建MaD Physics基准，包含三个基于不同物理定律（含篡改版以避免知识污染）的环境。每个试验中，智能体在分配预算内进行系统测量，预算耗尽后需推断背后的物理定律并对系统未来状态进行预测。评估两个核心能力：从数据推断模型和约束下规划。使用四个Gemini模型（2.5 Flash Lite、2.5 Flash、2.5 Pro、3 Flash）进行基准测试。
AI.result: 展示了MaD Physics可用于评估多模态和上下文学习等其他能力。四款Gemini模型在该基准上表现不佳，暴露出结构化探索和数据收集能力的缺陷。
AI.conclusion: MaD Physics有效揭示了当前AI模型在科学发现中的关键短板——结构化探索和约束下数据采集能力不足，为改进科学推理能力指明了方向。

title: A Communication-Theoretic Framework for LLM Agents: Cost-Aware Adaptive Reliability
summary: Agents built on large language models (LLMs) rely on a range of reliability techniques, including retry, majority voting, and self-consistency, that have been developed in parallel rather than within a common analytical framework. We observe that an LLM sampled at temperature $T$ is a discrete stochastic channel $p(y \mid x)$ in the sense of Shannon's coding theory, and use this identity as the entry point for such a framework grounded in communication theory. Each of these techniques is a special case of one of six classical reliability operators: diversity combining, hybrid retransmission, iterative generator-critic decoding, rateless sampling, structured redundant verification, and difficulty-adaptive routing. Within the framework we give two closed-form results: a noise-variance threshold above which uniform averaging beats quality-weighted averaging, and a contractivity criterion for generator-critic refinement, consistent with a contractive-to-divergent transition we observe between 3B- and 14B-parameter models. We further introduce a cost-aware semantic-nearest-neighbor router whose single Lagrangian knob traverses the quality-cost frontier without retraining. Across six channel configurations spanning local and cloud models on 69 hard tasks, no fixed model-technique-budget choice dominates, motivating per-task allocation. On a 300-item hard split of MMLU, GSM8K, and HumanEval, our router occupies the full empirical Pareto frontier: at matched quality, its normalized cost is ${\approx}56$\% lower than the strongest fixed technique; at matched normalized cost, it improves quality by ${\approx}7$\% ($26$\% over single-shot decoding). These results argue for consolidating these reliability techniques into a single tunable layer informed by channel coding.

AI.tldr: 本文基于香农通信理论，将LLM采样视为离散随机信道，统一了六种经典可靠性技术，并引入成本感知的语义近邻路由器，在69个硬任务上实现了帕累托最优的性能-成本权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM可靠性技术（重试、多数投票、自一致性等）是在平行方向上独立发展的，缺乏统一的分析框架，亟需建立一个共通的理论基础来理解和优化这些技术。
AI.method: 将温度T下的LLM采样建模为离散随机信道p(y|x)，识别六种可靠性技术为经典可靠性算子的特例；推导出噪声方差阈值和生成器-鉴别器精炼的收缩性判据；提出成本感知的语义近邻路由器，通过单一拉格朗日旋钮遍历质量-成本前沿。
AI.result: 推导了两个闭式结果：均匀平均优于加权平均的噪声方差阈值，以及生成器-鉴别器精炼的收缩性判据（在3B-14B参数模型间观察到收缩到发散转变）。路由器在MMLU、GSM8K、HumanEval的300项硬任务子集上占据完整经验帕累托前沿：同等质量下成本降低约56%；同等成本下质量提升约7%（相比单次解码提升26%）。
AI.conclusion: 这些可靠性技术应整合为一个受信道编码启发的可调层，且无固定模型-技术-预算组合占优，需按任务进行分配。

title: The First Drop of Ink: Nonlinear Impact of Misleading Information in Long-Context Reasoning
summary: As large language models are increasingly deployed in retrieval-augmented generation and agentic systems that accumulate extensive context, understanding how distracting information affects long-context performance becomes critical. Prior work shows that semantically relevant yet misleading documents degrade performance, but the quantitative relationship between the proportion of distractors and performance remains unstudied. In this work, we systematically vary the hard-distractor proportion in fixed-length contexts, revealing a striking nonlinear pattern: as the proportion of hard distractors increases, performance drops sharply within the first small fraction, while the remainder of the range yields only marginal additional decline. We term this ''The First Drop of Ink'' effect, analogous to how a single drop of ink contaminates water. Our theoretical and empirical analyses grounded in attention mechanics show that hard distractors capture disproportionate attention even at small proportions, with diminishing marginal impact as their proportion grows. Controlled experiments further show that filtering gains mainly come from context-length reduction rather than distractor removal; substantial recovery requires reducing the hard-distractor proportion to near zero, highlighting the importance of upstream retrieval precision.

AI.tldr: LLM在长上下文任务中，干扰信息比例与性能呈现非线性关系：少量硬干扰（"第一滴墨水"效应）即导致性能骤降，且性能恢复需要将干扰比例降至接近零。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM被广泛应用于检索增强生成和智能体系统，上下文不断累积，理解干扰信息如何影响长上下文性能变得至关重要。已有工作表明语义相关但有误导性的文档会降低性能，但干扰比例与性能之间的定量关系尚未被研究。
AI.method: 在固定长度上下文中系统变化硬干扰比例，通过实验揭示非线性模式；结合注意力机制的理论与实证分析解释该现象；通过控制实验分离上下文长度缩减与干扰移除对性能恢复的贡献。
AI.result: 发现了"第一滴墨水"效应：硬干扰比例在小范围内增加时性能急剧下降，之后边际影响递减；硬干扰即使在低比例下也会捕获不成比例的注意力；过滤带来的性能提升主要源于上下文长度缩减而非干扰移除；大幅恢复需要将硬干扰比例降至接近零。
AI.conclusion: 强调了上游检索精度的重要性，因为下游过滤无法有效消除硬干扰带来的负面影响。

title: Cosine-Gated Adam-Decay: Drop-In Staleness-Aware Outer Optimization for Decoupled DiLoCo
summary: Asynchronous DiLoCo systems may receive pseudo-gradients computed several outer rounds earlier, yet the standard Nesterov outer optimizer does not explicitly condition its update on per-update age. This can make the outer momentum buffer brittle under large controlled delays. We propose Cosine Gated Adam Decay (CGAD), a simple, drop-in, age-aware outer optimizer that scales each incoming pseudo-gradient by $σ(τ) = γ(τ) e^{-ατ}$ before it enters Adam's first- and second-moment buffers; the exponential models information decay and the cosine gate $γ(τ)$ smoothly zeroes contributions past a chosen cutoff. CGAD reduces to plain Adam at $τ=0$, adds two hyperparameters whose defaults transfer across scales, and extends to partial-sync schedulers via a per-fragment age-aware variant (PA-CGAD). For an idealized gated-adaptive update on smooth non convex objectives, we prove a non-asymptotic convergence bound whose staleness-bias term depends on $α$ alone, rather than on the realized maximum delay $τ_{\max}$; standard analyses of asynchronous momentum-SGD instead carry a $τ_{\max}^2$ factor. Empirically, on Llama style language model pretraining at 25M, 1B, and 7B parameters, CGAD trains stably across the controlled delays we sweep. The cosine cutoff acts as scale insurance: the closest baseline, Adam Decay (CGAD without the cutoff), is competitive at 25M but its seed-to-seed $σ$ at $τ=8$ grows 27x from 25M to 7B, pushing its single-shot risk (mean + $σ$) above the chance-level loss while CGAD's stays well below. The published Nesterov recipe is the least stable method on the full sweep.

AI.tldr: 提出余弦门控Adam衰减（CGAD），一种年龄感知的异步分布式学习外优化器，通过余弦门控和指数衰减处理过时伪梯度，在理论上消除传统方法的延迟平方项，并在Llama风格语言模型预训练中实现稳定训练。
AI.motivation: 标准Nesterov外优化器不显式按更新年龄调整，在大规模受控延迟下动量缓冲区变得脆弱；现有异步动量SGD的分析带有τ_max²因子，性能随延迟急剧下降。
AI.method: CGAD对每个到达的伪梯度应用缩放σ(τ)=γ(τ)e^{-ατ}，再送入Adam的一阶和二阶矩缓冲区；指数项建模信息衰减，余弦门控γ(τ)在超过截止阈值后平滑归零；扩展到部分同步调度器时提出逐片段年龄感知变体PA-CGAD。
AI.result: 在光滑非凸目标上证明非渐近收敛界，陈旧性偏差项仅依赖α而非τ_max（标准分析为τ_max²因子）；在25M/1B/7B参数Llama语言模型上稳定训练；余弦截止提供规模保险，Adam Decay（无截止）在τ=8时单次风险从25M到7B增长27倍并超越随机损失，CGAD保持稳定；Nesterov是最不稳定的方法。
AI.conclusion: CGAD是一种即插即用、年龄感知的外优化器，两个超参数默认值跨规模可迁移，在理论和实践上都优于现有异步优化方法，尤其在大规模延迟场景下表现鲁棒。

title: From Controlled to the Wild: Evaluation of Pentesting Agents for the Real-World
summary: AI pentesting agents are increasingly credible as offensive security systems, but current benchmarks still provide limited guidance on which will perform best in real-world targets. Existing evaluation protocols assess and optimize for predefined goals such as capture-the-flag, remote code execution, exploit reproduction, or trajectory similarity, in simplified or narrow settings. These tools are valuable for measuring bounded capabilities, yet they do not adequately capture the complexity, open-ended exploration, and strategic decision-making required in realistic pentesting. In this paper, we present a practical evaluation protocol that shifts assessment from task completion to validated vulnerability discovery, allowing evaluation in sufficiently complex targets spanning multiple attack surfaces and vulnerability classes. The protocol combines structured ground-truth with LLM-based semantic matching to identify vulnerabilities, bipartite resolution to score findings under realistic ambiguity, continuous ground-truth maintenance, repeated and cumulative evaluation of stochastic agents, efficiency metrics, and reduced-suite selection for sustainable experimentation. This protocol extends the state of the art by enabling a more realistic, operationally informative comparison of AI pentesting agents. To enable reproducibility, we also release expert-annotated ground truth and code for the proposed evaluation protocol: https://github.com/jd0965199-oss/ethibench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向AI渗透测试智能体的实用评估协议，将评估重点从任务完成转向验证漏洞发现，结合结构化真实标注与LLM语义匹配、二分图消歧、连续真实标注维护、重复累积评估、效率指标及精简测试集选择，以更真实、可操作地比较不同AI渗透测试智能体在复杂目标上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有AI渗透测试智能体评估协议多在简化或狭窄场景中衡量有限能力（如CTF、远程代码执行、利用复现或轨迹相似度），未能充分捕捉真实渗透测试所需的复杂性、开放式探索和战略决策，导致难以预测哪个智能体在实际目标中表现最佳。
AI.method: 1) 将评估从任务完成转向已验证的漏洞发现；2) 结合结构化真实标注与LLM语义匹配来识别漏洞；3) 使用二分图消解机制在模糊性下评分；4) 持续维护真实标注；5) 对随机性智能体进行重复和累积评估；6) 引入效率指标；7) 采用精简测试集选择以保证实验可持续性。
AI.result: 所提协议能更真实、更具操作指导性地比较AI渗透测试智能体，覆盖多攻击面和多漏洞类别的复杂目标。
AI.conclusion: 该评估协议推进了现有技术水平，使AI渗透测试智能体的比较更贴近真实场景；同时开源了专家标注的真实标注和代码以支持可复现性。

title: Evaluating Federated Learning approaches for mammography under breast density heterogeneity
summary: Breast density is a key factor that influences mammography interpretation and is a major source of heterogeneity in multicenter datasets. Such heterogeneity poses challenges for collaborative machine learning across institutions, particularly in Federated Learning. This study aims to evaluate the impact of breast density-induced heterogeneity on FL for mammography image classification and to assess the robustness of common FL algorithms in realistic clinical settings. We conducted experiments under two scenarios: (1) a strongly heterogeneous setting where each participating site contributed exclusively low- or high-density cases, based on the BI-RADS density score, and (2) a population-based setting simulating breast density distributions in White and Asian populations. For the strongly heterogeneous setting, we evaluated two configurations: one with 2 clients, where the cases were grouped as BI-RADS A-B and C-D, and one with 4 clients, where each site contained cases of a single BI-RADS density. We compared three FL methods (FedAvg, FedProx, SCAFFOLD) against centralized training, local-only training, and naive aggregation approaches, including ensembling and weight averaging. Across both scenarios, FL achieved performance comparable to centralized training, while local models and naive aggregation approaches underperformed in the presence of strong heterogeneity. Notably, FedAvg achieved accuracy on par with or exceeding centralized training, demonstrating resilience to breast density-induced data imbalance without requiring specialized heterogeneity mitigation algorithms. These findings show that FL can address breast density-related heterogeneity, supporting its feasibility for real-world mammography workflows. The demonstrated robustness of FedAvg underscores the potential for broad clinical deployment of FL, enabling collaborative model development while maintaining data privacy.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了乳腺密度异质性对联邦学习（FL）在乳腺X线图像分类中的影响，发现FedAvg在强异质性和基于人群的场景下均表现出与集中训练相当甚至更优的性能，表明FL能够有效应对乳腺密度相关的数据异质性，支持其在真实临床场景中的部署可行性。
AI.motivation: 乳腺密度是影响乳腺X线摄影解读的关键因素，也是多中心数据集异质性的主要来源。这种异质性给跨机构的协作机器学习（尤其是联邦学习）带来了挑战。研究旨在评估乳腺密度诱导的异质性对FL在乳腺X线图像分类中的影响，并检验常见FL算法在真实临床环境中的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 实验设计了两类场景：(1) 强异质性场景：每个参与站点仅贡献低密度或高密度病例（基于BI-RADS评分），分为2个客户端（BI-RADS A-B vs C-D）和4个客户端（每个BI-RADS密度类别单独作为一个站点）两种配置；(2) 基于人群的场景：模拟白人和亚洲人群的乳腺密度分布。对比了三种FL方法（FedAvg、FedProx、SCAFFOLD）与集中训练、本地训练、朴素聚合（集成和权重平均）的性能。
AI.result: 在两种场景下，FL性能均与集中训练相当，而本地模型和朴素聚合方法在强异质性情况下表现不佳。FedAvg在准确率上达到或超过集中训练，对乳腺密度导致的数据不平衡表现出鲁棒性，无需专门设计异质性缓解算法。
AI.conclusion: FL能够应对乳腺密度相关的异质性，支持其在真实乳腺X线工作流程中的可行性；FedAvg的鲁棒性凸显了FL在临床广泛应用中的潜力，可在维护数据隐私的同时实现协作模型开发。

title: The Generalized Turing Test: A Foundation for Comparing Intelligence
summary: We introduce the Generalized Turing Test (GTT), a formal framework for comparing the capabilities of arbitrary agents via indistinguishability. For agents A and B, we define the Turing comparator A $\geq$ B to hold if B, acting as a distinguisher, cannot reliably distinguish between interactions with A (instructed to imitate B) and another instance of B. This yields a dataset- and task-agnostic notion of relative intelligence. We study the comparator's structure, including conditions under which it is transitive and therefore induces an ordering over equivalence classes, and we define and analyze variants with querying, bounded interaction, and fixed distinguishers. To complement the theory, we instantiate the framework on a collection of modern models, empirically evaluating pairwise indistinguishability across thousands of trials. The resulting comparisons exhibit a stratified structure consistent with existing rankings, hinting that the proposed framework yields meaningful empirical orderings. Our results position indistinguishability as a unifying lens for reasoning about intelligence, suggesting a foundation for evaluation and, potentially, training objectives that are inherently independent of fixed datasets or benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出广义图灵测试（GTT），通过不可区分性形式化比较任意智能体的能力，并实验验证该框架能产生有意义的排序。
AI.motivation: 现有智能评估方法依赖固定数据集和基准任务，缺乏统一、任务无关的智能比较框架。作者希望建立一种基于不可区分性的相对智能度量标准。
AI.method: 定义图灵比较器 A ≥ B：当B作为区分者无法可靠区分模仿B的A与另一实例B时成立。研究了比较器的传递性、变体（查询、有限交互、固定区分者），并在现代模型上进行了数千次成对不可区分性实验。
AI.result: 实验比较呈现分层结构，与现有排名一致，表明该框架能产生有意义的经验排序。
AI.conclusion: 不可区分性可作为统一视角理解智能，为独立于固定数据集或基准的评估与训练目标提供基础。

title: FedVSSAM: Mitigating Flatness Incompatibility in Sharpness-Aware Federated Learning
summary: Sharpness-aware minimization (SAM) is an effective method for improving the generalization of federated learning (FL) by steering local training toward flat minima. Under data heterogeneity, however, device-side SAM searches for locally flat basins that are incompatible with the flat region preferred by the global objective. We identify this structural failure mode as flatness incompatibility, which explains why improving local flatness alone may provide limited training and generalization improvement for the global model. We reveal that flatness incompatibility arises from data heterogeneity and the friendly adversary phenomenon, and is further amplified by local updates and partial device participation. To mitigate this issue, we propose Federated Learning with variance-suppressed sharpness-aware minimization (FedVSSAM), which constructs a variance-suppressed adjusted direction and uses it consistently in local flatness search, local descent, and global update. FedVSSAM anchors both perturbation and update directions to a more stable global direction, instead of correcting only an isolated local perturbation. We establish non-convex convergence guarantees of FedVSSAM and prove that the mean-square deviation between the adjusted direction and the global gradient is effectively controlled. Experiments demonstrate that FedVSSAM mitigates flatness incompatibility and outperforms the baselines across diverse FL settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedVSSAM方法，通过构建方差抑制的调整方向来解决联邦学习中的平坦性不兼容问题，实验表明该方法优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 在联邦学习中，数据异构性导致设备端SAM搜索的局部平坦区域与全局目标偏好的平坦区域不兼容（即平坦性不兼容问题），仅改善局部平坦性对全局模型的训练和泛化提升有限。
AI.method: 提出FedVSSAM，构建方差抑制的调整方向，并将其一致地用于局部平坦性搜索、局部下降和全局更新中，将扰动和更新方向锚定到更稳定的全局方向。
AI.result: 建立了FedVSSAM的非凸收敛保证，证明了调整方向与全局梯度之间的均方偏差得到有效控制。实验表明FedVSSAM缓解了平坦性不兼容问题，在多种FL设置下优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过方差抑制的调整方向解决平坦性不兼容，有效提升联邦学习在数据异构下的泛化性能。

title: BenchCAD: A Comprehensive, Industry-Standard Benchmark for Programmatic CAD
summary: Industrial Computer-Aided Design (CAD) code generation requires models to produce executable parametric programs from visual or textual inputs. Beyond recognizing the outer shape of a part, this task involves understanding its 3D structure, inferring engineering parameters, and choosing CAD operations that reflect how the part would be designed and manufactured. Despite the promise of Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for this task, they are rarely evaluated on whether these capabilities jointly hold in realistic industrial CAD settings. We present BenchCAD, a unified benchmark for industrial CAD reasoning. BenchCAD contains 17,900 execution-verified CadQuery programs across 106 industrial part families, including bevel gears, compression springs, twist drills, and other reusable engineering designs. It evaluates models through visual question answering, code question answering, image-to-code generation, and instruction-guided code editing, enabling fine-grained analysis across perception, parametric abstraction, and executable program synthesis. Across 10+ frontier models, BenchCAD shows that current systems often recover coarse outer geometry but fail to produce faithful parametric CAD programs. Common failures include missing fine 3D structure, misinterpreting industrial design parameters, and replacing essential operations such as sweeps, lofts, and twist-extrudes with simpler sketch-and-extrude patterns. Fine-tuning and reinforcement learning improve in-distribution performance, but generalization to unseen part families remains limited. These results position BenchCAD as a benchmark for measuring and improving the industrial readiness of multimodal CAD automation.

AI.tldr: BenchCAD是一个面向工业CAD推理的统一基准，包含17,900个可执行程序、106个零件族，评估多模态大模型在感知、参数抽象和可执行程序合成方面的能力。实验表明现有模型能恢复粗粒外观几何，但无法生成忠实参数化CAD程序，在工业级CAD自动化中尚未达到实用水平。
AI.motivation: 多模态大模型在工业CAD代码生成任务中虽有潜力，但现有评估缺乏统一的工业级基准来检验模型是否同时具备理解3D结构、推断工程参数、选择合理CAD操作等联合能力。
AI.method: 构建BenchCAD基准，包含17,900个经过执行验证的CadQuery程序，覆盖106个工业零件族（如锥齿轮、压缩弹簧、麻花钻等），通过视觉问答、代码问答、图像到代码生成、指令引导代码编辑四个任务维度进行细粒度评估。
AI.result: 前沿模型普遍能恢复粗略外几何形状，但无法生成忠实参数化CAD程序；常见失败包括缺失精细3D结构、误解工业设计参数、将扫掠/放样/扭转拉伸等必要操作替换为简单拉伸/草图模式；微调和强化学习可提升分布内性能，但对未见零件族的泛化能力有限。
AI.conclusion: BenchCAD可作为衡量和提升工业级多模态CAD自动化就绪度的基准，揭示了当前模型与工业实用性之间的显著差距。

title: AlphaExploitem: Going Beyond the Nash Equilibrium in Poker by Learning to Exploit Suboptimal Play
summary: Poker is an imperfect information game that has served as a long-standing benchmark for decision-making under uncertainty. To maximize utility beyond the Nash equilibrium, an agent can deviate from Nash-equilibrium policies to exploit suboptimal play. We introduce AlphaExploitem, which extends the competitive RL poker agent AlphaHoldem by using a hierarchical transformer encoder that enables reasoning over previously played hands and modifying the training procedure with the inclusion of a diverse pool of exploitable opponents to facilitate learning to exploit. We train and evaluate AlphaExploitem on two standard benchmarks for imperfect-information games. Empirically, AlphaExploitem successfully exploits weak play by both in- and out-of-distribution opponents, without losing performance against NE opponents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AlphaExploitem，一个在非完美信息扑克游戏中通过层次化Transformer编码器利用历史手牌信息，并针对可被利用对手进行多样化训练的强化学习智能体，能够有效利用对手弱点而不损失对纳什均衡对手的性能。
AI.motivation: 在扑克等非完美信息游戏中，智能体可以通过偏离纳什均衡策略来利用对手的次优玩法，从而最大化效用。现有方法在利用对手弱点方面仍存在改进空间。
AI.method: AlphaExploitem扩展了AlphaHoldem，采用层次化Transformer编码器对先前手牌进行推理，并在训练过程中引入多样化可被利用的对手池，以促进学习利用行为。
AI.result: 在两个标准非完美信息游戏基准上，AlphaExploitem成功利用了弱玩法（包括分布内和分布外的对手），同时在对阵纳什均衡对手时性能没有下降。
AI.conclusion: 层次化Transformer编码器与多样化对手训练相结合，可以有效实现非完美信息游戏中的利用性玩法，且不牺牲对阵最优对手时的稳健性。

title: Remember the Decision, Not the Description: A Rate-Distortion Framework for Agent Memory
summary: Long-horizon language agents must operate under limited runtime memory, yet existing memory mechanisms often organize experience around descriptive criteria such as relevance, salience, or summary quality. For an agent, however, memory is valuable not because it faithfully describes the past, but because it preserves the distinctions between histories that must remain separated under a fixed budget to support good decisions. We cast this as a decision-centric rate-distortion problem, measuring memory quality by the loss in achievable decision quality induced by compression. This yields an exact forgetting boundary for what can be safely forgotten, and a memory-distortion frontier characterizing the optimal tradeoff between memory budget and decision quality. Motivated by this decision-centric view of memory, we propose DeMem, an online memory learner that refines its partition only when data certify that a shared state would induce decision conflict, and prove near-minimax regret guarantees. On both controlled synthetic diagnostics and long-horizon conversational benchmarks, DeMem yields consistent gains under the same runtime budget, supporting the principle that memory should preserve the distinctions that matter for decisions, not descriptions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出决策驱动的记忆压缩框架DeMem，将记忆优化视为率-失真问题，通过保留影响决策的历史区分而非描述性内容，在有限预算下实现近最优的决策质量保障。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆机制按相关性、显著性等描述性标准组织经验，但智能体的记忆价值在于保留对决策至关重要的历史区分，而非忠实描述过去。现有方法缺乏对"什么应该被遗忘"的理论边界。
AI.method: 将记忆优化形式化为决策中心的率-失真问题，以压缩导致的决策质量损失衡量记忆质量；推导出精确的遗忘边界和记忆-失真前沿；提出在线记忆学习器DeMem，仅当数据证明共享状态会引发决策冲突时才更新划分，并提供近最小最大遗憾保证。
AI.result: 在合成诊断任务和长程对话基准上，DeMem在相同运行时预算下取得一致增益，验证了记忆应保留对决策重要的区分而非描述的原则。
AI.conclusion: 记忆的价值取决于其维护的决策区分能力，而非描述准确性；决策中心的视角为长时域语言智能体的记忆管理提供了理论和实践框架。

title: Predicting Large Model Test Losses with a Noisy Quadratic System
summary: We introduce a predictive model that estimates the pre-training loss of large models from model size (N), batch size (B) and number of weight updates (K). This is the first loss prediction model that can handle changing batch size. The model outperforms Chinchilla's loss model, a model of the test loss using the batch size and number of tokens, in terms of projecting the loss at extrapolated compute budgets (up to 1000 folds). A natural use of the model is to find optimal N, B, K configurations under explicit and compound resource constraints like time, memory and compute. In our experiments, the model-selected configurations are close to ground-truth optimal. Our work advocates for loss prediction as a better alternative to heuristic-based laws, which are growing in complexity. The implementation is available on https://github.com/chuningxdy/Noisy-Quadratic-System.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个能处理变批量大小的预训练损失预测模型（N, B, K），在跨1000倍计算预算的外推上优于Chinchilla模型，并能用于在时间、内存、计算等复合约束下优化配置。
AI.motivation: 现有损失预测模型（如Chinchilla）无法处理变化的批量大小，且启发式定律日益复杂，需要一种更优的替代方案来预测预训练损失。
AI.method: 构建了一个以模型大小(N)、批量大小(B)和权重更新次数(K)为输入的预测模型，用于估计预训练损失。该模型首次能够处理变化的批量大小。
AI.result: 该模型在跨1000倍计算预算的外推场景下，损失预测能力优于Chinchilla模型；在时间、内存、计算等复合约束下，模型选择的配置接近真实最优解。
AI.conclusion: 损失预测模型是日益复杂的启发式定律的更优替代方案，对未来大规模模型训练的资源分配和超参数选择具有指导意义。

title: Shepherd: A Runtime Substrate Empowering Meta-Agents with a Formalized Execution Trace
summary: We introduce Shepherd, a functional programming model that formalizes meta-agent operations on target agents as functions, with core operations mechanized in Lean. Shepherd records every agent-environment interaction as a typed event in a Git-like execution trace, enabling any past state to be forked and replayed. The system forks the agent process and its filesystem $5\times$ faster than Docker, achieving $>95\%$ prompt-cache reuse on replay. We demonstrate the model through three applications. First, in runtime intervention, a live supervisor increases pair coding pass rates from 28.8% to 54.7% on CooperBench. Second, in counterfactual meta-optimization, branching exploration outperforms baselines across four benchmarks by up to 11 points while reducing wall-clock time by up to 58%. Third, in Tree-RL training, forking rollouts at selected turns improves TerminalBench-2 performance from 34.2% to 39.4%. These results establish Shepherd as an efficient infrastructure for programming meta-agents. We open-source the system to support future research.

AI.tldr: Shepherd是一个将元智能体操作形式化为函数式编程模型（基于Lean形式化验证）的系统，通过类似Git的执行轨迹实现状态分支与重放，在运行时干预、反事实元优化和Tree-RL训练三个应用中显著提升了性能，且系统开销远低于Docker。
AI.motivation: 现有元智能体系统缺乏形式化的操作模型，难以高效地记录、分支和重放智能体与环境交互的历史状态，导致干预、优化和训练等元操作缺乏基础设施支持。
AI.method: 提出函数式编程模型Shepherd，将元智能体操作抽象为函数，在Lean中机械化核心操作；记录每一次交互为类型化事件，构建类似Git的执行轨迹；支持分支与重放，通过fork进程和文件系统实现高效的状态隔离。
AI.result: 1) 分支速度比Docker快5倍，重放时提示缓存复用率>95%；2) 运行时干预使配对编码通过率从28.8%提升至54.7%；3) 分支探索在四个基准上最高提升11个点，同时减少最多58%的墙钟时间；4) Tree-RL训练中TerminalBench-2性能从34.2%提升至39.4%。
AI.conclusion: Shepherd为编程元智能体提供了高效的基础设施，开源支持未来研究。

title: Revisiting Mixture Policies in Entropy-Regularized Actor-Critic
summary: Mixture policies theoretically offer greater flexibility than unimodal policies in continuous action reinforcement learning, but the practical benefits of this complexity remain elusive. Mixture policies are notably absent from most state-of-the-art algorithms, raising a fundamental question: Is the added representational overhead useful? We show that increased flexibility can theoretically enhance solution quality and entropy robustness. Yet standard algorithms like SAC do not leverage these advantages. A core issue is the lack of a low-variance reparameterization trick for mixtures, a luxury Gaussian policies enjoy. We propose a marginalized reparameterization (MRP) estimator to address this, proving it offers lower variance than the standard likelihood-ratio (LR) approach. Our experiments across Gym MuJoCo, DeepMind Control Suite, and MetaWorld show that MRP mixture policies significantly outperform their LR ones, and reach parity (sometimes better) with Gaussian counterparts. In addition, we do find several cases where MRP mixture policies exhibit clear empirical advantages. In this paper, we provide a clearer understanding of the trade-offs involved, elevating MRP mixture policies from theoretical curiosity to a practical tool.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了混合策略在连续动作强化学习中的实际价值，提出了边际化重参数化（MRP）估计器来解决混合策略的高方差问题，实验表明MRP混合策略在多个基准测试中显著优于传统似然比方法，并能在某些场景下超越高斯策略。
AI.motivation: 混合策略理论上比单峰策略更具灵活性，但在实际最先进的强化学习算法中鲜有使用，本文旨在探究混合策略的额外表征开销是否具有实际价值，并解决其在实际应用中的关键障碍。
AI.method: 提出边际化重参数化（MRP）估计器，用于混合策略的低方差重参数化估计，理论上证明其方差低于标准似然比（LR）方法。
AI.result: 在Gym MuJoCo、DeepMind Control Suite和MetaWorld上的实验表明，MRP混合策略显著优于LR混合策略，在某些场景下达到甚至超越高斯策略的性能。
AI.conclusion: MRP混合策略从理论上的好奇心转化为实用的工具，提供了对混合策略在实际应用中权衡的更清晰理解。

title: A Unified Pair-GRPO Family: From Implicit to Explicit Preference Constraints for Stable and General RL Alignment
summary: Large language model (LLM) alignment via reinforcement learning from human preferences (RLHF) suffers from unstable policy updates, ambiguous gradient directions, poor interpretability, and high gradient variance in mainstream pairwise preference learning paradigms. To systematically address these limitations, we establish a unified theoretical framework for preference-based RL optimization centered on the Pair-GRPO family, comprising two tightly coupled variants: Soft-Pair-GRPO and Hard-Pair-GRPO. Soft-Pair-GRPO is a minimal modification of Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) that replaces group-normalized scalar rewards with binary pairwise preference rewards, retaining GRPO's clipped surrogate and KL-regularized structure. We prove a critical gradient equivalence theorem: under first-order Taylor expansion around the current policy, Soft-Pair-GRPO's gradient is a positive scalar multiple of standard GRPO's gradient, explaining its empirical stability despite discarding continuous reward magnitudes. Building on this foundation, we propose Hard-Pair-GRPO, an advanced variant introducing explicit local probability constraints and constrained KL-fitting optimization to further suppress gradient noise and global policy drift. We provide comprehensive theoretical guarantees for both variants--including monotonic policy improvement, deterministic gradient direction, gradient-variance reduction, and dynamic step-size convergence. Extensive experiments on standard LLM alignment benchmarks (HH-RLHF,UltraFeedback) and the MuJoCo continuous control task HalfCheetah-v4 demonstrate that our Pair-GRPO family consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in alignment quality, human preference win rate, training stability, and generalization to general reinforcement learning. Ablation studies validate the critical contributions of each core component.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pair-GRPO系列方法（含Soft-Pair-GRPO和Hard-Pair-GRPO），通过统一理论框架解决RLHF中策略更新不稳定、梯度方向模糊、方差高等问题。Soft-Pair-GRPO将GRPO的组归一化标量奖励替换为二元成对偏好奖励，并证明了梯度等价定理；Hard-Pair-GRPO引入局部概率约束和KL拟合优化。理论保证包括单调策略改进、确定性梯度方向、梯度方差降低等。实验表明在LLM对齐和连续控制任务上优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有RLHF中基于成对偏好学习的范式存在策略更新不稳定、梯度方向模糊、可解释性差、梯度方差高等系统性缺陷，亟需建立统一的理论框架来系统解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出Pair-GRPO系列，包含两个变体：(1) Soft-Pair-GRPO，将GRPO的组归一化标量奖励替换为二进制成对偏好奖励，保留裁剪代理和KL正则化结构，并证明其梯度与标准GRPO梯度在泰勒展开下呈正标量倍数关系；(2) Hard-Pair-GRPO，引入显式局部概率约束和约束KL拟合优化以抑制梯度噪声和全局策略漂移。
AI.result: 在HH-RLHF、UltraFeedback等LLM对齐基准和MuJoCo的HalfCheetah-v4连续控制任务上，Pair-GRPO系列在对齐质量、人类偏好胜率、训练稳定性和泛化能力方面均一致优于SOTA基线。消融实验验证了各核心组件的关键贡献。
AI.conclusion: Pair-GRPO系列通过理论驱动设计，在统一框架下有效解决了RLHF的多项固有限制，并展现了从LLM对齐到通用强化学习的良好泛化能力。

title: Objective-Specific Privileged Bases via Full-Prefix Matryoshka Learning
summary: Learned representations are often invariant to rotational transformations, leaving individual dimensions non-identifiable and interchangeable. We study how Matryoshka Representation Learning (MRL) induces a task-aligned privileged basis distinct from variance-based or regularizer-induced orderings. In the linear setting, we prove that full-prefix MRL recovers the ordered principal directions, and can be computed efficiently using shared statistics. Empirically, we demonstrate that MRL yields consistent per-dimension structure aligned with task signal, where coordinate magnitude reflects informativeness.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Matryoshka表示学习（MRL）如何诱导出与任务对齐的特权基，证明了在线性设置下全前缀MRL能恢复有序的主方向，并可通过共享统计量高效计算。实验表明MRL产生与任务信号对齐的维度结构，坐标大小反映信息量。
AI.motivation: 学习到的表示通常对旋转变换具有不变性，导致单个维度不可识别且可互换。作者希望研究MRL如何打破这种对称性，产生与任务对齐的、有意义的维度排序结构。
AI.method: 在理论方面，作者在线性设置下证明全前缀MRL可以恢复有序的主方向，并可通过共享统计量高效计算。在实验方面，作者实证展示了MRL能产生与任务信号一致的维度结构。
AI.result: 理论上证明了全前缀MRL恢复有序主方向；实验上展示了MRL产生与任务信号对齐的维度结构，坐标大小反映信息量。
AI.conclusion: MRL能够打破表示学习的旋转不变性，诱导出与任务对齐的特权基，使得维度具有可解释性和可排序性。

title: Delulu: A Verified Multi-Lingual Benchmark for Code Hallucination Detection in Fill-in-the-Middle Tasks
summary: Large Language Models for code generation frequently produce hallucinations in Fill-in-the-Middle (FIM) tasks -- plausible but incorrect completions such as invented API methods, invalid parameters, undefined variables, or non-existent imports. These failures pass superficial review yet introduce runtime errors. We introduce Delulu, a verified multi-lingual benchmark of 1,951 FIM samples across 7 languages and 4 hallucination types. Samples are curated through an adversarial pipeline: a frontier LLM generates plausible hallucinations, four diverse judge models evaluate them, embedding-based clustering mines progressively harder examples, self-contained Docker containers verify that golden completions compile while hallucinated variants produce the expected runtime error, and a final human-expert review removes any remaining biased or trivially decidable samples. We evaluate 11 open-weight FIM models from five families spanning 0.5B-32B parameters: a six-point Qwen2.5-Coder scaling slate, plus a cross-family slate (CodeLlama, DeepSeek-Coder-V2, StarCoder2). The strongest model reaches only 84.5% pass@1, no family exceeds 0.77 Edit Similarity, and every family produces hallucination-aligned completions on a non-trivial share of samples, confirming that the difficulty exposed by Delulu is task-intrinsic rather than family-specific. We release the benchmark, containers, and evaluation framework at https://github.com/microsoft/delulu.

AI.tldr: 提出了Delulu，一个包含1,951个多语言Fill-in-the-Middle代码补全样本的验证基准，涵盖7种语言和4种幻觉类型。经过对抗性流程筛选，评估了11个开源FIM模型，最强模型仅达84.5% pass@1，确认该任务存在固有难度。
AI.motivation: LLM在代码生成的Fill-in-the-Middle任务中频繁产生幻觉（如虚构的API方法、无效参数、未定义变量、不存在的导入），这些输出看似合理但引入运行时错误，且能通过表面审查。现有基准缺乏针对此类幻觉的严格评估。
AI.method: 构建对抗性流程：(1)前沿LLM生成看似合理的幻觉样本；(2)四个判别模型评估；(3)嵌入聚类挖掘难度递增的样本；(4)Docker容器验证正确补全能编译而幻觉变体产生预期运行时错误；(5)人工专家审查去除偏差样本。最终形成1,951个样本，覆盖7种语言、4种幻觉类型。
AI.result: 评估11个开源FIM模型（0.5B-32B参数，5个模型家族），最强模型Qwen2.5-Coder系列仅达84.5% pass@1，所有家族Edit Similarity均不超过0.77，每个模型家族在相当比例的样本上均产生与幻觉对齐的补全。
AI.conclusion: Delulu揭示的难度是任务内在的而非模型家族特异的，现有开源FIM模型在此基准上仍有显著提升空间。

title: Sparse Layers are Critical to Scaling Looped Language Models
summary: Looped language models repeat a set of transformer layers through depth, reducing memory costs and providing natural early-exit points at loop boundaries. However, looped models do not scale as favorably as standard transformers with unique layers. We compare standard and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) transformers, with and without looping, and find two main results. First, we find Looped-MoE models scale better than the standard baseline while dense looped models do not. We trace this to routing divergence between loops: in Looped-MoE models, different experts are activated on each pass through the same shared layers, recovering expressivity without additional parameters. Our second finding is that looped models have better compute-quality trade-offs with early exits than standard models. Because each loop ends with the same layers that produce the final output, loop boundaries are superior exit points, as confirmed by earlier output convergence at these points. In sum, we provide a clear direction for scaling looped models: a Looped-MoE model with early exits can not only beat standard transformers at scale, but also enable significant memory and inference savings with minimal degradation in quality.

AI.tldr: 本文研究循环语言模型与标准Transformer的对比，发现循环MoE模型比标准模型扩展性更好，且循环模型在早期退出时具有更优的计算-质量权衡。
AI.motivation: 循环语言模型通过重复使用相同的Transformer层来降低内存成本，并在循环边界提供自然的早期退出点，但其扩展性不如具有独特层的标准Transformer，作者旨在探究如何改进循环模型的扩展性。
AI.method: 对比标准Transformer、MoE Transformer、循环密集模型和循环MoE模型，分析路由发散现象对扩展性的影响，并评估不同模型在早期退出时的计算-质量权衡。
AI.result: 循环密集模型扩展性不如标准基线，但循环MoE模型表现更好，原因是不同循环中激活不同专家，恢复了表达力；循环模型的早期退出点因输出收敛更快而更优。
AI.conclusion: 循环MoE模型结合早期退出策略，不仅能在大规模上超越标准Transformer，还能在质量损失极小的情况下实现显著的内存和推理成本节约。

title: Prediction Bottlenecks Don't Discover Causal Structure (But Here's What They Actually Do)
summary: A Mamba state-space model trained only for next-step prediction appears to recover Granger-causal structure through a simple readout $S = |W_{out} W_{in}|$, with early experiments suggesting the phenomenon generalized across architectures and benefited from interventional data at $p < 10^{-5}$. We package the protocol used to test that claim -- standardized synthetic generators (VAR/Lorenz/CauseMe-style), three intervention semantics ($do(X=c)$, soft-noise, random-forcing), edge-provenance cards on three real datasets, and size-matched control arms -- as a reusable falsification benchmark, and walk the claim through it in five stages. The method-level claim does not survive: (i) a plain linear bottleneck does as well or better; (ii) tuned Lasso beats the bottleneck on synthetic CauseMe-style benchmarks, and on Lorenz-96 (the only real benchmark with unambiguous ground truth) classical PCMCI and Granger lead a tight cluster in which the bottleneck trails; (iii) the headline intervention advantage is roughly 60% a sample-size confound, and the residual disappears under standard $do(X=c)$ interventions, surviving only under a non-standard random-forcing scheme; (iv) even that residual reproduces, with a larger effect, in classical bivariate Granger -- the effect is method-agnostic. What survives is a narrow characterization result; the benchmark is the lasting artifact, and each stage above is one of its control arms.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地验证了Mamba状态空间模型通过简单线性读出来恢复Granger因果结构的宣称，发现该宣称在五个阶段的严格测试中未能成立：线性瓶颈模型表现相当或更好、经典方法在合成和真实基准上优于该瓶颈、干预优势约60%来自样本量混淆、残余效应在标准干预下消失、且再现的效应在经典双变量Granger中更显著。最终仅保留了一个狭窄的表征结论，而可复用的基准测试框架成为主要贡献。
AI.motivation: 检验"Mamba状态空间模型仅通过下一帧预测就能通过简单线性读出来恢复Granger因果结构"这一宣称的鲁棒性，并提供一个标准化的可复现假说检验基准。
AI.method: 构建标准化合成数据生成器（VAR/Lorenz/CauseMe风格）、三种干预语义（do(X=c)、软噪声、随机强制）、三个真实数据的边溯源卡片以及规模匹配的对照组，形成五阶段可复现假说检验基准，对原宣称进行渐进式验证。
AI.result: (1) 线性瓶颈模型表现相当或更好；(2) Lasso在CauseMe和Lorenz-96上优于瓶颈，PCMCI和Granger在Lorenz-96上领先；(3) 干预优势约60%来自样本量混淆，残余效应在标准do(X=c)下消失；(4) 残余效应在经典双变量Granger中可复现且更显著。原方法级宣称被证伪。
AI.conclusion: 宣称未通过系统性验证，仅保留窄化表征结论；主要贡献是建立了可复用的标准化假说检验基准框架，其中的各阶段可作为对照实验使用。

title: WavesFM: Hierarchical Representation Learning for Longitudinal Wearable Sensor Waveforms
summary: Wearable sensors enable the continuous acquisition of high-resolution physiological waveforms, such as photoplethysmography and accelerometry, under free-living conditions. However, inferring health-related phenotypes from these signals presents significant challenges due to high sampling frequencies, multimodal dependencies, and extreme sequence lengths (e.g., weeks of recordings), compounded by a scarcity of ground-truth labels. To address these challenges, existing self-supervised learning (SSL) methodologies typically follow two paradigms: (1) learning rich morphological representations from short waveform segments while collapsing longitudinal dynamics through simple aggregation, or (2) modeling behavioral patterns from coarse, hand-crafted features (e.g. heart rate, step counts) spanning longer horizons but foregoing subtle, predictive signatures in raw waveforms. To bridge this gap, we propose WavesFM, a foundation model utilizing a two-stage SSL framework for longitudinal physiological data. Specifically, we decompose the learning problem into two stages: first, a segment-level encoder is pretrained to extract local embeddings from short waveforms; subsequently, a temporal encoder is trained to model the sequence of these embeddings across a multi-day horizon. This hierarchical approach overcomes the computational complexity of high-resolution, long-sequence data, allowing the overall model to capture both local signal semantics and the complex circadian and inter-day variations governing physiological dynamics. Pretrained on over 6.8M hours (N=324k individuals) of recordings for the first stage and 5.3M hours (N=10k) for the second stage, WavesFM demonstrates superior performance across 58 diverse tasks spanning demographics, lifestyle, health conditions, and medications.

AI.tldr: WavesFM提出了一种两阶段自监督学习框架，分别从短时波形提取局部嵌入，再从多日尺度的嵌入序列建模时间动态，从而同时捕捉高分辨率生理信号的局部形态和长期昼夜节律变化，在58个下游任务上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有SSL方法存在两难：要么从短波形学习丰富形态但丢失纵向动态，要么从手工粗粒度特征建模长期行为但丢失原始波形中的细微预测信号。亟需一种能同时捕捉局部信号语义和长期昼夜变化规律的模型。
AI.method: 两阶段自监督学习框架。第一阶段：预训练段级编码器，从短时波形（如PPG、加速度计）提取局部嵌入；第二阶段：训练时序编码器，对跨越多天的嵌入序列进行建模，捕捉昼夜节律和日间变异。两阶段分别在68万小时（32.4万人）和53万小时（1万人）数据上预训练。
AI.result: 在58个多样化的下游任务（涵盖人口统计、生活方式、健康状况、用药情况）上，WavesFM均取得了优于现有方法的表现。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段层次化框架有效解决了高分辨率长序列生理数据的计算复杂性，实现了局部形态与长期时序动态的联合建模，为可穿戴传感器数据分析提供了新的基础模型范式。

title: Navigating LLM Valley: From AdamW to Memory-Efficient and Matrix-Based Optimizers
summary: Training large language models requires optimization algorithms that are not only statistically effective, but also computationally and memory efficient at extreme scale. Although Adam remains the dominant optimizer for large-scale language-model pretraining and fine-tuning, recent work has revisited nearly every component of the optimization stack: adaptive moment estimation, decoupled weight decay, memory footprint, curvature approximation, sign-based updates, large-batch stability, low-rank gradient structure, and matrix-wise orthogonalized updates. This survey reviews optimizer design for large language models through a systems-and-optimization lens. We organize the literature into classical first-order optimizers, adaptive optimizers, memory-efficient variants, second-order and curvature-aware methods, sign-based and discovered optimizers, low-rank and projection-based methods, and matrix-based optimizers such as Muon. We also discuss benchmarking methodology, including hyperparameter fairness, scale dependence, wall-clock efficiency, token efficiency, memory overhead, and downstream evaluation. We argue that optimizer research for LLMs is entering a new phase: moving from single-algorithm speedup claims toward rigorous, scale-aware comparisons that jointly evaluate convergence, stability, memory, and implementation complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了面向大语言模型的优化器设计，从系统和优化视角出发，将现有工作分为经典一阶优化器、自适应优化器、内存高效变体、二阶与曲率感知方法、符号与发现式优化器、低秩与投影方法、矩阵优化器（如Muon）等七大类，并讨论了评估方法论，指出LLM优化器研究正从单一算法加速转向严格的、考虑规模的联合评估。
