We decompose this redistribution into reduced per-token FFN capacity and sparse partitioning across experts. Critically, frozen random routing nearly matches learned routing, suggesting that redistribution is driven largely by architectural sparsity rather than router-learned specialization. As a secondary finding, GLU-style multiplicative gating rotates task-relevant Fourier structure out of the per-neuron basis and into distributed subspaces, making neuron-level interpretability less informative while preserving structured computation. We validate these conclusions with random-routing, narrow-FFN, and top-2 MoE controls, plus parameter-matching, activation-function, and width-scaling analyses. Together, these results show that local FFN design choices can have nonlocal consequences for Transformer computation.

AI.tldr: Transformer FFN模块的架构选择（如稀疏MoE、GLU门控）会将计算负荷从FFN重新分配到注意力层，其中稀疏路由是主要驱动因素，且冻结随机路由几乎与学习路由效果相当；GLU乘法门控会将任务相关的傅里叶结构从单神经元基旋转到分布式子空间，降低神经元可解释性。
AI.motivation: 研究Transformer中FFN块的架构选择（如GLU、MoE、MoE-GLU）对模型整体计算分配的非局部影响，特别是对注意力层与FFN层之间计算分工的重新分配效应。
AI.method: 在单层Transformer上训练数字进位加法、模运算和直方图计数三个任务，对比密集FFN、GLU、MoE和MoE-GLU四种架构；通过消融实验、随机路由控制、参数匹配、激活函数和宽度缩放分析来分解计算重分配机制。
AI.result: 稀疏MoE路由将计算从FFN转移到注意力层，对进位加法影响最显著；这种重分配源于每token FFN容量减少和跨专家稀疏分区；冻结随机路由几乎匹配学习路由效果，表明稀疏性而非路由器学习是主要驱动因素；GLU门控将傅里叶结构从单神经元基分散到分布式子空间。
AI.conclusion: 局部FFN架构选择会对Transformer整体计算产生非局部影响，稀疏性和门控机制是关键的变量而非路由器学习或神经元级可解释性。

title: Let the Target Select for Itself: Data Selection via Target-Aligned Paths
summary: Targeted data selection aims to identify training samples from a large candidate pool that improve performance on a specific downstream task. Many recent methods estimate candidate utility by aggregating local attribution scores along a trajectory induced by the candidate pool. When the pool is heterogeneous, however, this reference trajectory may be misaligned with the dynamics of a target-aligned selected subset, creating what we call reference path bias. We propose an alternative reference path: a validation-induced flow obtained from a short, capacity-limited warmup on the available target validation proxy. Along this path, candidates are scored by a normalized endpoint loss drop, yielding a simple zero-order selection rule that requires no candidate gradients or Hessian approximations. Across controlled logistic, vision, and instruction-tuning experiments, this score is competitive with strong dynamic attribution baselines while substantially reducing warmup and storage cost. Moreover, since the reference trajectory is decoupled from any specific candidate pool, the same compact warmup can be reused across additional pools without recomputing the trajectory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的目标数据选择方法，通过使用目标验证集上的容量受限预热生成验证诱导流作为参考路径，并利用归一化端点损失下降作为零阶选择规则，有效避免了参考路径偏差，在多种实验设置中与强基线方法性能相当，同时大幅降低了预热和存储成本。
AI.motivation: 现有基于轨迹聚合的候选数据效用估计方法在候选池异质性较大时，参考轨迹可能与目标对齐的子集动态不一致，产生"参考路径偏差"，影响数据选择效果。
AI.method: 提出使用目标验证集上短时容量受限预热产生的验证诱导流作为替代参考路径，沿该路径通过归一化端点损失下降对候选样本评分，形成无需候选梯度或Hessian近似的零阶选择规则。
AI.result: 在可控逻辑回归、视觉和指令微调实验中，该方法与强动态归因基线性能相当，同时大幅降低预热和存储成本；且参考轨迹与候选池解耦，同一预热可复用于多个候选池而无须重新计算。
AI.conclusion: 验证诱导流作为参考路径能有效缓解参考路径偏差，零阶选择规则在保持性能的同时显著提升效率和解耦性。

title: A Controlled Diagnostic Study of Hardware-Induced Distortions in Hardware-Aware Training
summary: Hardware-aware training (HAT) is widely used to improve the robustness of neural networks on non-ideal AI accelerators, such as analog in-memory computing (IMC) systems. However, not all hardware-induced distortions are equally compensable by training. This paper presents a diagnostic framework that models hardware non-idealities as structured perturbations of the forward operator and evaluates their compatibility with gradient-based optimization. We analyze six representative perturbation classes--read noise, variability, drift, stuck-at faults, IR-drop, and ADC discretization--and identify three key diagnostics: gradient expectation consistency, bounded gradient variance, and non-degenerate sensitivity. Our results show a clear separation between perturbations that can be compensated by HAT and those that consistently break optimization. This provides practical guidance for hardware-software co-design, clarifying which non-idealities can be addressed at the training level and which require circuit-, architecture-, or calibration-level mitigation. This study should be interpreted as a controlled empirical analysis under vanilla forward-perturbation HAT, rather than as a universal theory of hardware-aware training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个诊断框架，通过将硬件非理想性建模为前向算子的结构化扰动，分析六类硬件扰动（读取噪声、可变性、漂移、卡住故障、IR压降和ADC离散化）与梯度优化训练的兼容性，发现只有满足梯度期望一致性、有界梯度方差和非退化敏感性这三个条件的扰动才能被HAT有效补偿。
AI.motivation: 并非所有硬件引起的失真都能通过训练同等程度地补偿，现有HAT方法缺乏系统性的诊断工具来区分哪些非理想性可被训练补偿、哪些必须通过电路/架构/校准层面解决。
AI.method: 将硬件非理想性建模为前向算子的结构化扰动，提出三个诊断指标：梯度期望一致性、有界梯度方差和非退化敏感性，并在六类代表性扰动（读取噪声、可变性、漂移、卡住故障、IR压降、ADC离散化）上进行受控实证分析。
AI.result: 在六类扰动中清晰区分了可通过HAT补偿的扰动与那些持续破坏优化的扰动，验证了三个诊断指标能够有效预测HAT的补偿效果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为硬件-软件协同设计提供了实用指导，明确了哪些非理想性可在训练层面解决，哪些需要电路、架构或校准层面的缓解措施。但该研究应被理解为在标准前向扰动HAT下的受控实证分析，而非通用理论。

title: Tabular Foundation Model for Generative Modelling
summary: Generative modelling is a demanding test of foundation models, because it requires robust, holistic representation learning for a given data modality, rather than optimisation for a supervised prediction target alone. While recent work on tabular foundation models has achieved remarkable progress in predictive modelling, generative tabular foundation models remain underexplored. Existing tabular foundation generators, in particular, have not yet consistently matched strong dataset-specific generators in synthetic data quality. A key reason is their misalignment with the distinctive causal structural prior of heterogeneous tabular data. In this paper, we address this gap by introducing a novel tabular foundation model, \textbf{TabFORGE}, built on pretrained \textbf{Tab}ular \textbf{FO}undational \textbf{R}epresentations for \textbf{GE}neration. TabFORGE is designed to utilise the implicitly learned causal information underlying diverse tabular datasets in a unified latent space induced by a pretrained causality-aware feature encoder. It further decouples latent modelling from decoding through a two-stage design: we first pretrain a score-based diffusion transformer, and then pretrain a denoising-aligned decoder using the denoised latent embeddings. This design elegantly mitigates the distribution shifts in latent embeddings that typically arise between training and inference. We evaluate TabFORGE comprehensively against 22 benchmark methods on 45 real-world datasets. Our results show that TabFORGE effectively learns and leverages generalisable tabular representations, enabling efficient generation of high-quality synthetic tabular data, particularly with strong structural fidelity.

AI.tldr: TabFORGE是一种基于预训练因果感知特征编码器和两阶段设计的表格基础生成模型，通过解耦潜在建模与解码，在45个真实数据集上优于22种基线方法，生成高质量的合成表格数据。
AI.motivation: 现有表格基础生成模型在合成数据质量上未能持续超越数据集专用的生成器，主要原因是它们与异构表格数据独特的因果结构先验不匹配。本文旨在解决这一差距。
AI.method: TabFORGE采用两阶段设计：1）因果感知特征编码器在统一潜在空间中隐式学习多样化表格数据集中的因果信息；2）先预训练基于分数的扩散Transformer，再预训练去噪对齐的解码器，从而缓解训练与推理间潜在嵌入的分布偏移。
AI.result: 在45个真实数据集上对比22种基线方法，TabFORGE能有效学习和利用可泛化的表格表示，生成高质量的合成表格数据，尤其具有强大的结构保真度。
AI.conclusion: TabFORGE通过因果感知预训练和两阶段去噪对齐设计，成功弥合了表格基础生成模型与数据集专用生成器之间的性能差距，验证了利用隐式因果先验提升生成质量的可行性。

title: FedCIGAR: A Personalized Reconstruction Approach for Federated Graph-level Anomaly Detection
summary: Graph-level anomaly detection (GLAD) is crucial for ensuring the reliability of graph-driven applications by identifying abnormal graphs that deviate from the majority. Considering the privacy concerns in distributed scenarios, federated graph-level anomaly detection (FedGLAD) has emerged as a promising solution to enable collaborative detection without sharing raw data. However, existing methods suffer from poor generalization due to the reliance on unrealistic synthetic anomalies and insufficient personalization capabilities under data heterogeneity. To address these challenges, we propose a novel Federated graph-level anomaly detection approach with Cluster-adaptIve GAted Reconstruction (FedCIGAR). Specifically, we design a reconstruction-based paradigm trained on normal graphs to avoid synthetic data. Furthermore, we introduce a client-side node contribution gating mechanism and a server-side sliding window-based clustering strategy to tackle data heterogeneity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FedCIGAR achieves superior performance and robustness in contrast to state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedCIGAR，一种基于重构范式的联邦图级异常检测方法，通过客户端节点贡献门控机制和服务器端滑动窗口聚类策略，在不依赖合成异常数据的情况下有效处理数据异质性，性能优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦图级异常检测方法存在两个主要问题：一是依赖不现实的合成异常数据导致泛化能力差；二是在数据异质性下个性化能力不足。隐私保护需求也要求在不共享原始数据的前提下进行协作检测。
AI.method: FedCIGAR包含三个关键设计：1) 基于重构的范式，仅在正常图上训练以避免合成数据；2) 客户端侧节点贡献门控机制，自适应筛选重要节点特征；3) 服务器端基于滑动窗口的聚类策略，应对数据异质性。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，FedCIGAR在性能鲁棒性上显著优于现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过避免合成异常数据和引入自适应个性化机制，FedCIGAR有效解决了FedGLAD中的泛化差和个性化不足问题，为分布式场景下的图级异常检测提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: fmxcoders: Factorized Masked Crosscoders for Cross-Layer Feature Discovery
summary: Many features in pretrained Transformers span multiple layers: they emerge through stages of inference, persist in the residual stream, or are built jointly by parallel MLPs. Crosscoders (namely, sparse dictionaries trained jointly across layers) aim to recover these cross-layer features in a single shared latent space. We show that standard crosscoders largely fail at this purpose. Although their decoder weight norms spread evenly across layers, a functional coherence metric we introduce reveals that each latent's activation is effectively driven by only one or two layers on average. While functionally coherent latents act as human-interpretable concept detectors (e.g., US states and cities), the layer-localized latents that crosscoders predominantly learn collapse onto surface-level patterns such as digit detectors. We trace this failure to two structural limitations: unconstrained cross-layer parameterization and unregularized cross-layer dependence. We address both by introducing fmxcoders, which (i) replace the encoder and decoder with low-rank tensor factorizations that draw every latent's per-layer weights from a shared cross-layer basis, and (ii) apply stochastic layer masking, a denoising regularizer along the layer axis that penalizes latents whose contribution collapses when a single layer is masked. Across GPT2-Small, Pythia-410M, Pythia-1.4B, and Gemma2-2B, fmxcoders lift mean probing F1 by 10-30 points, surpassing per-layer SAE baselines that standard crosscoders fail to reach, reduce reconstruction MSE by 25-50%, and roughly double mean functional coherence. An LLM-as-a-judge evaluation further shows that fmxcoders recover 3-13$\times$ more semantically coherent latents than standard crosscoders across all four base LLMs.

AI.tldr: 标准交叉编码器（crosscoders）在跨层共享潜在空间中恢复跨层特征时存在严重缺陷：其潜在变量平均仅由1-2层驱动，无法实现功能连贯。本文提出fmxcoders，通过低秩张量分解和随机层掩码正则化解决此问题，在GPT2-Small、Pythia-410M/1.4B、Gemma2-2B上实现探测F1提升10-30点，MSE降低25-50%，功能连贯性翻倍，语义连贯潜在变量数量提升3-13倍。
AI.motivation: 预训练Transformer中许多特征跨越多个层次出现，但现有稀疏字典学习方法（crosscoders）未能有效恢复这些跨层特征，其潜在变量实际仅由少数层次驱动，导致学习到的特征碎片化且丧失语义连贯性。
AI.method: 提出fmxcoders：(i) 使用低秩张量分解替代编码器/解码器，将每个潜在变量的逐层权重从共享的跨层基中抽取；(ii) 引入随机层掩码作为沿层轴的去噪正则化，惩罚当单层被掩码时贡献崩溃的潜在变量。
AI.result: 在GPT2-Small、Pythia-410M、Pythia-1.4B和Gemma2-2B上，fmxcoders将平均探测F1提升10-30点，重建MSE降低25-50%，功能连贯性约翻倍。LLM-as-a-judge评估显示语义连贯潜在变量数量提升3-13倍。
AI.conclusion: 标准crosscoders因未约束的跨层参数化和未正则化的跨层依赖而失效；fmxcoders通过结构化约束和正则化有效恢复跨层特征，显著超越标准crosscoders及逐层SAE基线。

title: Learning to Bid with Unknown Private Values in Budget-Constrained First-Price Auctions
summary: The transition to First-Price Auctions (FPA) in digital advertising has spurred significant research, yet existing work typically assumes access to a valuation oracle, ignoring the reality that values must be inferred from censored data. While Linear Treatment Effect (LTE) models address this by learning value uplift, they have not been adapted to realistic settings with hard Budget constraints or Return-on-Spend (RoS) targets requiring regret and violation control. In this work, we propose a unified primal-dual framework for constrained FPAs that jointly learns the latent LTE valuation parameters and the competitor's bid distribution. This simultaneous learning introduces a critical technical challenge: the estimation error is dynamically scaled by the Lagrangian multiplier, potentially leading to unbounded regret. We resolve this by leveraging a strong Slater condition and a novel adaptive burn-in procedure to stabilize the dual variables. Our approach achieves near-optimal regret guarantees, providing the first theoretically grounded solution for constrained bidding with latent valuations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一的原始-对偶框架，用于在硬预算约束或投资回报率目标下，联合学习潜在线性处理效应估值参数和竞争对手出价分布，并通过强Slater条件和新颖的自适应预热过程稳定对偶变量，首次为具有潜在估值的约束竞价提供了理论上有保证的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通常假设可以访问估值预言机，忽略了估值必须从删失数据中推断的现实；虽然线性处理效应模型可以学习估值提升，但尚未适应硬预算约束或投资回报率目标下的现实场景。
AI.method: 提出了一个统一的原始-对偶框架，联合学习潜在LTE估值参数和竞争对手出价分布；利用强Slater条件和自适应预热过程来解决估计误差被拉格朗日乘子动态放大的技术挑战，从而稳定对偶变量。
AI.result: 实现了接近最优的遗憾保证，提供了第一个在潜在估值下进行约束竞价的理论有保障的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功将线性处理效应模型扩展到具有预算约束和投资回报率目标的现实第一价格拍卖场景，解决了联合学习中估计误差动态放大的关键问题，为实际数字广告竞价提供了理论基础。

title: RAwR: Role-Aware Rewiring via Approximate Equitable Partition
summary: While Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have demonstrated significant efficacy in node classification tasks, where predictions rely on local neighborhood information, the performance of GNNs often drops when prediction tasks depend on long-range interactions. These limitations are attributed to phenomena such as oversquashing, where structural bottlenecks restrict signal propagation across the network topology. To address this challenge, we introduce RAwR, a computationally efficient rewiring framework that augments the input graph with a quotient graph derived from equitable partitions. This approach facilitates accelerated communication between nodes that share identical structural roles, as identified by the Weisfeiler-Leman graph coloring, and thereby reduces the total effective resistance of the system. Furthermore, by employing an approximate definition of the equitable partition, RAwR enables a controllable reduction of the quotient graph, which, in its most condensed state, recovers the conventional Master Node rewiring technique. Empirical evaluations across a diverse suite of benchmarks -- including homophilic, heterophilic, and synthetic long-range datasets -- demonstrate that RAwR achieves state-of-the-art results. Our contribution is further supported by an analytical investigation using a teacher-student model of linear GNNs, which elucidates the theoretical foundations of role-based rewiring. This analysis leads to the formulation of Spectral Role Lift (SRL), a metric designed to identify the optimal approximate equitable partition for maximizing predictive performance.

AI.tldr: 提出RAwR框架，通过基于等价划分的商图重连技术增强GNN在长程交互任务中的表现，结合谱角色提升(SRL)指标实现最优重连，在多个基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: GNN在依赖长程交互的节点分类任务中性能下降，主要由于过挤压(oversquashing)等结构瓶颈限制了信号传播，现有方法在计算效率和理论保证上存在不足。
AI.method: 利用Weisfeiler-Lehman图着色识别结构等价节点，通过等价划分构造商图进行重连；引入近似等价划分实现可控的商图约简；提出谱角色提升(SRL)指标指导最优划分选择。
AI.result: 在同质性、异质性和合成长程数据集上均达到SOTA性能；通过线性GNN教师-学生模型的理论分析验证了基于角色的重连的有效性。
AI.conclusion: RAwR通过基于等价划分的角色重连有效缓解过挤压问题，SRL指标为最优结构重连提供了理论指导，该框架兼具计算效率和理论完备性。

title: Positional LSH: Binary Block Matrix Approximation for Attention with Linear Biases
summary: Positional encoding in transformers is commonly implemented through positional embeddings, attention masks, or bias terms, but formal connections between these mechanisms remain limited. We study attention with positional bias through the lens of locality-sensitive hashing (LSH), focusing on Attention with Linear Biases (ALiBi). We show that the ALiBi bias matrix is the expectation of contiguous block-diagonal binary masks induced by a ``positional LSH'' scheme. The empirical mean of masks sampled from this scheme yields spectral norm and max-norm approximation guarantees with bounded block sizes with high probability. This structural theorem implies a uniform approximation theorem for ALiBi-biased attention: with high probability over the sampled masks, the approximate attention output is accurate simultaneously for all query-key-value inputs and can be computed in near-linear time in the context length, reducing long-context ALiBi to a collection of randomized short-context regular (positionally unbiased) attention operations. Conceptually, this connects positional bias, masks, and positional embeddings in a single formal framework and suggests an approach to efficient ALiBi-biased attention. Experiments on large language models validate our theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 本文从局部敏感哈希（LSH）视角研究Transformer中的位置编码，证明ALiBi偏置矩阵是位置LSH方案产生的块对角二元掩码的期望，并给出谱范数和最大范数的近似保证，从而将位置偏置、掩码和位置嵌入统一在一个形式框架中，并提出了ALiBi注意力机制的近似高效计算方法。
AI.motivation: Transformer中位置编码的常见实现方式（位置嵌入、注意力掩码、偏置项）之间存在形式化联系不足的问题，缺乏统一的理论框架。
AI.method: 通过LSH视角分析ALiBi位置偏置注意力机制，建立ALiBi偏置矩阵与随机块对角二元掩码期望之间的联系，推导谱范数和最大范数近似保证，并设计近似高效计算方法。
AI.result: ALiBi偏置矩阵可表示为位置LSH方案生成掩码的期望值；该方案能以高概率实现有界块大小的谱范数和最大范数近似保证；近似注意力输出对所有查询-键-值输入同时保持精度，且可在近线性时间内计算。
AI.conclusion: 建立了位置偏置、掩码和位置嵌入的形式化统一框架，为高效长上下文ALiBi注意力计算提供了理论基础，大语言模型实验验证了理论发现。

title: CTQWformer: A CTQW-based Transformer for Graph Classification
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNN) and Transformer-based architectures have achieved remarkable progress in graph learning, yet they still struggle to capture both global structural dependencies and model the dynamic information propagation. In this paper, we propose CTQWformer, a hybrid graph learning framework that integrates continuous-time quantum walks (CTQW) with GNN. CTQWformer employs a trainable Hamiltonian that fuses graph topology and node features, enabling physically grounded modeling of quantum walk dynamics that captures rich and intricate graph structure information. The extracted CTQW-based representations are incorporated into two complementary modules:(i) a Graph Transformer module that embeds final-time propagation probabilities as structural biases in the self-attention mechanism, and (ii) a Graph Recurrent Module that captures temporal evolution patterns with bidirectional recurrent networks. Extensive experiments on benchmark graph classification datasets demonstrate that CTQWformer outperforms graph kernel and GNN-based methods, demonstrating the potential of integrating quantum dynamics into trainable deep learning frameworks for graph representation learning. To the best of our knowledge, CTQWformer is the first hybrid CTQW-based Transformer, integrating CTQW-derived structural bias with temporal evolution modeling to advance graph learning.

AI.tldr: 提出CTQWformer，一种将连续时间量子行走（CTQW）与GNN结合的混合图学习框架，利用可训练哈密顿量融合图拓扑和节点特征，并通过图Transformer和图循环模块分别捕捉结构依赖和时变模式，在图分类任务上优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN和Transformer架构难以同时捕捉全局结构依赖和动态信息传播，需要更强大的图表示学习框架。
AI.method: CTQWformer包含三个核心组件：可训练哈密顿量融合图拓扑与节点特征驱动CTQW动力学；图Transformer模块将终态传播概率作为结构偏置注入自注意力机制；图循环模块用双向循环网络建模时间演化模式。
AI.result: 在基准图分类数据集上，CTQWformer优于图核方法和GNN方法，证明量子动力学与可训练深度学习框架融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CTQWformer是首个混合CTQW-Transformer架构，将量子行走衍生的结构偏置与时序演化建模相结合，为图表示学习开辟了新方向。

title: Kintsugi: Learning Policies by Repairing Executable Knowledge Bases
summary: Modern embodied agents achieve impressive performance, but their task knowledge is often stored in neural weights, latent state, or prompt-bound memory, making individual policy knowledge difficult to inspect, validate, recombine, and reuse. We introduce \textbf{Kintsugi}, a white-box policy-learning framework that treats embodied policy improvement as verifier-gated construction of a typed executable Knowledge Base (KB). Kintsugi represents task-level policy knowledge as composable typed entries -- predicates, operators, policy schemas, monitors, recovery rules, experience records, and goals -- and improves this artifact through localized typed edits induced from rollout evidence, rather than relying on test-time language-model reasoning. Between rollouts, a tool-constrained agentic editing loop diagnoses trajectory failures, localizes them to editable KB layers, and proposes candidate edits. A deterministic verification gate admits an edit only when the candidate type-checks, the resulting KB executes, and focused validation success or trajectory-health metrics improve without violating protected-regression checks. At inference, the accepted KB is executed by a deterministic symbolic executor with zero LLM calls. Across long-horizon text-agent benchmarks and representative object-centric manipulation settings, Kintsugi achieves strong endpoint performance while preserving inspectability, local editability, and verifier-gated deployment. These results suggest that embodied policy improvement can be organized around executable task knowledge.

AI.tldr: Kintsugi是一个白盒策略学习框架，将具身策略改进表示为验证器门控的可执行知识库构建过程，通过局部类型化编辑实现策略知识的可检查、可验证、可组合和可重用，在长程文本智能体和物体操作任务中取得强性能。
AI.motivation: 现有具身智能体的任务知识存储在神经权重、潜在状态或提示绑定记忆中，导致个体策略知识难以检查、验证、重组和重用，缺乏可解释性和模块化。
AI.method: 提出Kintsugi框架，将策略知识表示为可组合的类型化知识库条目（谓词、算子、策略模式、监控器、恢复规则、经验记录、目标），通过工具约束的智能体编辑循环诊断轨迹失败、定位到可编辑知识库层并提出候选编辑，经确定性验证门控（类型检查、可执行性验证、聚焦验证和回归检查）后接受编辑，推理时完全由确定性符号执行器执行，不调用任何LLM。
AI.result: 在长程文本智能体基准和代表性物体操作场景中，Kintsugi在保持可检查性、局部可编辑性和验证器门控部署的同时，实现了强端点性能。
AI.conclusion: 具身策略改进可以围绕可执行任务知识来组织，为构建可解释、可验证、可重用的具身智能体提供了新范式。

title: Spectral Transformer Neural Processes
summary: Time series, spatial data, and images are natural applications of Neural Processes. However, when such data exhibit strong periodicity and quasi-periodicity, existing methods often suffer from underfitting and generalise poorly beyond the training distribution. In this work, we propose Spectral Transformer Neural Processes (STNPs), a frequency-aware extension of Transformer Neural Processes (TNPs). STNPs introduce a Spectral Aggregator that estimates an empirical context spectrum, compresses it into a spectral mixture, samples task-adaptive spectral features, and concatenates them with time-domain embeddings, thereby injecting a spectral-mixture-kernel bias into TNPs. This design reshapes the similarity geometry, allowing inputs that are distant in Euclidean space to remain close in an induced periodic manifold while enhancing time-frequency interactions. Extensive experiments on synthetic regression tasks, real-world time-series datasets, and an image dataset demonstrate that STNPs consistently improve predictive performance over existing baselines, extending Neural Processes beyond translation equivariance towards effective modelling of periodicity and quasi-periodicity.

AI.tldr: STNPs通过在Transformer神经过程中引入频谱聚合器，将频谱混合核偏置注入模型，有效提升了神经过程对周期性和准周期性数据的建模能力。
AI.motivation: 现有神经过程（Neural Processes）在时间序列、空间数据和图像中应用广泛，但当数据呈现强周期性和准周期性时，现有方法容易欠拟合且在训练分布外泛化能力差。
AI.method: 提出Spectral Transformer Neural Processes（STNPs），核心组件是频谱聚合器（Spectral Aggregator），它估计经验上下文频谱、压缩为频谱混合、采样任务自适应频谱特征并与时域嵌入拼接，从而将频谱混合核偏置注入Transformer神经过程（TNPs）。
AI.result: 在合成回归任务、真实世界时间序列数据集和图像数据集上的广泛实验表明，STNPs持续优于现有基线方法，预测性能得到一致提升。
AI.conclusion: STNPs将神经过程从平移等变性扩展到对周期性和准周期性的有效建模，弥补了现有方法在这类数据上的不足。

title: Doubly Robust Proxy Causal Learning with Neural Mean Embeddings
summary: Unobserved confounding prevents standard covariate adjustment from identifying causal response functions in observational studies. Proxy causal learning addresses this problem through bridge equations involving treatment- and outcome-inducing proxies, avoiding direct recovery of the latent confounder. Existing doubly robust proxy estimators combine outcome and treatment bridges, but typically rely on fixed kernels, sieves, or low-dimensional semiparametric models; existing neural proxy methods are more flexible, but are largely single-bridge estimators. We develop a neural doubly robust framework for proxy causal learning with continuous and structured treatments. Our method introduces a neural mean-embedding estimator for the treatment bridge, combines it with a neural outcome bridge, and estimates the doubly robust correction through a final regression stage. The framework covers population, heterogeneous, and conditional dose-response functions, yielding full response-curve estimators rather than binary-treatment effects. The algorithms use two stages for each bridge and history-aware updates of the final linear layers to stabilize stochastic multi-stage training. We prove consistency of the algorithms showing that the doubly robust error is controlled by the final averaging and regression errors together with the smaller of the outcome- and treatment-side weak-norm bridge errors. Across synthetic and image-valued benchmarks, the proposed estimators outperform existing baselines and single-bridge neural estimators, showing the benefit of combining learned outcome and treatment bridges in a doubly robust construction. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/BariscanBozkurt/DRPCL-Neural-Mean-Embedding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种神经双重稳健代理因果学习框架，适用于连续和结构化处理变量。该方法通过神经均值嵌入估计处理桥、神经结果桥以及双重稳健校正，涵盖总体、异质性和条件剂量反应函数，并证明了算法的相合性。实验表明该方法优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 观测研究中未观测混杂因素阻碍了标准协变量调整对因果响应函数的识别。代理因果学习通过处理代理和结果代理的桥方程来解决此问题，但现有双重稳健估计器依赖固定核或低维半参数模型，而神经代理方法多为单桥估计器，缺乏灵活性。
AI.method: 提出神经双重稳健框架：1) 神经均值嵌入估计器处理桥；2) 神经结果桥；3) 最终回归阶段估计双重稳健校正。算法采用两阶段训练每个桥，并通过历史感知更新最终线性层来稳定随机多阶段训练。覆盖总体、异质性和条件剂量响应函数。
AI.result: 在合成和图像基准测试中，所提估计器优于现有基线和单桥神经估计器，证明了双重稳健构造中结合学习的结果桥和处理桥的优势。双重稳健误差由最终平均和回归误差以及结果侧和处理侧弱范数桥误差中较小者控制。
AI.conclusion: 神经双重稳健代理因果学习框架有效处理连续和结构化处理变量的因果推断，双重稳健构造提升了估计的鲁棒性和准确性。

title: Mixture of Layers with Hybrid Attention
summary: Standard Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) transformers route tokens to expert subnetworks within each layer, but the layer structure itself remains monolithic. We introduce Mixture of Layers (MoL), which replaces full-width transformer blocks (d_model) with K parallel thin blocks at reduced dimensionality (d_thin << d_model), connected via learned down/up projections and composed via top-k block routing. Scaling sparse block routing to many blocks creates an attention coverage problem, as each block sees fewer tokens. We address this by introducing hybrid attention, which pairs one shared softmax block for global context with Gated DeltaNet linear attention in routed blocks.

AI.tldr: 提出Mixture of Layers (MoL)，用K个并行薄块替代全宽transformer层，通过降维投影和top-k路由组合，并引入混合注意力（共享softmax块+门控DeltaNet线性注意力）解决注意力覆盖问题。
AI.motivation: 标准MoE transformer在层内路由token到专家子网络，但层结构本身仍是单一块，缺乏灵活性。
AI.method: 将全宽transformer块替换为K个并行薄块（d_thin << d_model），通过可学习的下/上投影连接，采用top-k块路由；引入混合注意力机制，配对共享softmax块（全局上下文）与门控DeltaNet线性注意力（路由块）。
AI.result: 通过稀疏块路由扩展到多个块时，每个块看到的token减少导致的注意力覆盖问题得到解决。
AI.conclusion: MoL通过薄块并行化与混合注意力机制，在保持效率的同时解决了大规模稀疏路由的注意力覆盖挑战。

title: LLM-Driven Performance-Space Augmentation for Meta-Learning-Based Algorithm Selection
summary: Meta-learning for algorithm selection relies on a meta-dataset in which each row corresponds to a supervised learning dataset described by meta-features and labelled with a target value that is associated with algorithm choice (typically, some function of algorithm performance). A persistent limitation is that the number of curated real-world datasets is small, resulting in sparse meta-datasets that constrain meta-learner generalisation. In this paper, we address this problem by augmenting the meta-dataset with synthetic regression datasets produced via a large language model (LLM), with generation steered toward target regions of a low-dimensionality performance space. In our experiments, we adopt a two-dimensional geometric setting defined by the cross-validated $R^2$ scores of two anchor algorithms, known as landmarkers. We compare two augmentation strategies: (1) uniform sampling, which distributes synthetic datasets across the performance space; and (2) margin-based sampling, which concentrates them near the decision boundary where landmarker preference is most ambiguous. Across 42 real-world UCI regression datasets and 730 synthetic datasets, both strategies substantially improve meta-learner performance over the unaugmented baseline under regression and multi-label evaluation formulations. However, uniform augmentation consistently outperforms margin-based augmentation, achieving a 17.47% relative reduction in Hamming loss, a 100.41% relative improvement in subset accuracy, and a +6.09% relative gain in pooled out-of-fold $R^2$. These results lead us to postulate a central thesis: the performance of algorithms resides on a low-dimensional performance manifold, whose reconstruction bias may be minimised by user-guided LLMs that seek to maximise uniform $ε$-cover, and consequently, lead to improved meta-learning for algorithm selection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用大语言模型生成合成回归数据集来增强元数据集，以解决算法选择的元学习中真实数据集稀少的问题。实验表明，均匀采样策略相比基于边界的采样策略能更有效地提升元学习器性能，并由此提出算法性能位于低维性能流形上的核心论点。
AI.motivation: 元学习用于算法选择时，依赖由元特征和算法性能标签组成的元数据集。然而，经过人工筛选的真实世界数据集数量有限，导致元数据集稀疏，限制了元学习器的泛化能力。本文旨在通过数据增强解决这一瓶颈。
AI.method: 利用大语言模型生成合成回归数据集来扩充元数据集。生成过程被引导至一个低维性能空间的目标区域。在二维几何设定下（以两种锚定算法的交叉验证R²分数为坐标），比较两种增强策略：1）均匀采样——在整个性能空间分布合成数据集；2）基于边界的采样——将合成数据集中在决策边界附近。
AI.result: 在42个真实UCI回归数据集和730个合成数据集上，两种增强策略均显著优于未增强基线。其中，均匀增强策略持续优于基于边界的增强策略：Hamming损失相对降低17.47%，子集准确率相对提升100.41%，池化折外R²相对提升+6.09%。
AI.conclusion: 算法性能位于低维性能流形上；通过用户引导的LLM最大化均匀ε-覆盖，可以最小化该流形的重建偏差，从而改进元学习用于算法选择的效果。

title: When Adaptation Fails: A Gradient-Based Diagnosis of Collapsed Gating in Vision-Language Prompt Learning
summary: Adaptive prompting mechanisms have been proposed to enhance vision-language models by dynamically tailoring prompts to inputs. However, in frozen few-shot prompt learning with CLIP-style backbones, we systematically observe that adaptive gates and prompt-selection modules often collapse: they produce nearly constant outputs, contribute negligible gradient signals, and frequently fail to outperform fixed prompts. To further explore this issue, we present a systematic diagnostic study to uncover the underlying causes and conditions of adaptation failure. Through controlled experiments across datasets and multiple prompt learning architectures, we identify two recurring failure modes: gradient magnitude imbalance and gate degradation. Our findings invite a re-examination of indiscriminately adding architectural complexity in parameter-efficient learning and clarify when prompt-level adaptive gating is, and is not, effective in this regime.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了冻结型少样本提示学习中自适应机制的失效问题，发现门控和提示选择模块常产生恒定输出、梯度贡献微弱、甚至不如固定提示。通过诊断实验，识别出梯度幅度失衡和门退化两种失败模式，提示在参数高效学习中应谨慎增加架构复杂度。
AI.motivation: 已有研究提出自适应提示机制以动态调整提示来增强视觉-语言模型，但作者系统观察到在冻结少样本提示学习场景下，自适应门控和提示选择模块经常失效，需要深入探究其根本原因和条件。
AI.method: 在多个数据集和多种提示学习架构上进行控制实验，系统诊断自适应机制的失效原因，识别出梯度幅度失衡（gradient magnitude imbalance）和门退化（gate degradation）两种反复出现的失效模式。
AI.result: 自适应门控和提示选择模块输出几乎恒定、梯度信号可忽略、性能经常不如固定提示；两种主要失效模式为梯度幅度失衡和门退化。
AI.conclusion: 该发现提示在参数高效学习中不应不加甄别地增加架构复杂度，并阐明了提示级别自适应门控在何种情况下有效或无效。

title: Online Set Learning from Precision and Recall Feedback
summary:
We consider the problem of learning an unknown subset $N_\text{target}$ of a domain in an online setting. In each round $t$, the learner predicts a set of items ${N}_t$ and receives one of two types of feedback, each with equal probability: precision feedback, in which a randomly chosen item from the predicted set $N_t$ is revealed and the learner is told whether it belongs to $N_\text{target}$ (incurring a reward if it does), or recall feedback, in which a randomly chosen item from the target set $N_\text{target}$ is revealed and the learner is told whether it belongs to $N_t$ (incurring a reward if it does). The goal is to maximize the cumulative reward over time. This simple online set learning problem abstracts a variety of learning scenarios with precision- and recall-type feedback.
  We show that a hypothesis class (a family of subsets of the domain) is learnable in this setting if and only if it has finite Vapnik-Chervonenkis (VC) dimension, mirroring the classical PAC characterization. However, the resulting algorithmic structure is markedly more intricate: in contrast to standard Probably Approximately Correct (PAC) learning -- where the algorithmic landscape is governed by the simple principle of Empirical Risk Minimization (ERM) -- our partial feedback model can invalidate ERM and even all proper learning rules. We develop algorithms to address the dependencies induced by the feedback, obtaining regret guarantees in both the realizable and agnostic settings. Our results provide a qualitative characterization of learnability in this model, addressing its most basic question, while pointing to a range of natural and intriguing open questions, including the determination of optimal regret rates.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线环境中学习未知子集的在线学习问题，其中学习者每轮预测一个集合，并等概率接收两种反馈：精确度反馈（从预测集中随机抽取元素并告知是否属于目标集）或召回率反馈（从目标集中随机抽取元素并告知是否属于预测集）。研究表明假设类在该设定下可学习的充要条件是有限VC维，但算法结构比经典PAC学习更为复杂，部分反馈模型可能使经验风险最小化（ERM）甚至所有恰当学习规则失效。
AI.motivation: 该在线集合学习问题抽象了多种涉及精确度和召回率反馈的学习场景，旨在建立该设定下可学习性的理论表征，并回答其最基本的可学习性问题。
AI.method: 采用VC理论分析可学习性的充分必要条件，通过构造反例展示ERM和恰当学习规则的失效，并开发算法处理反馈引入的依赖关系，在可实现和不可知两种设定下提供遗憾界保证。
AI.result: 证明了假设类可学习的充要条件是有限VC维（类似于经典PAC表征），但揭示了该设定下ERM和所有恰当学习规则可能无效这一重要差异，并给出了遗憾界保证。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了部分反馈集合学习模型的可学习性定性表征，并指出了多项开放问题，包括最优遗憾率的确定。

title: End-to-End Keyword Spotting on FPGA Using Graph Neural Networks with a Neuromorphic Auditory Sensor
summary: With the rapid growth of mobile robotics and embedded intelligence, there is an increasing demand for efficient on-device data processing on edge platforms. A promising research direction is the use of neuromorphic sensors inspired by human sensory systems, which generate sparse, event-based data encoding changes in the environment. In this work, we present the first end-to-end FPGA implementation of a keyword spotting system that integrates a Neuromorphic Auditory Sensor (NAS) and a graph neural network (GNN) on a single FPGA device, enabling real-time processing of raw audio data. The proposed architecture eliminates conventional signal preprocessing and operates directly on event-based audio streams. Leveraging a compute-near-memory network architecture, the system achieves efficient inference with low latency and low power consumption. Experimental results demonstrate an accuracy of 87.43% after quantization on the Google Speech Commands v2 dataset processed through the neuromorphic sensor, with end-to-end latency below 35 us and average power consumption of 1.12 W. The processed datasets, software models, and hardware modules are available at https://github.com/vision-agh/NAS-GNN-KWS.

AI.tldr: 本文首次在单FPGA器件上实现了集成神经形态听觉传感器（NAS）和图神经网络（GNN）的端到端关键词识别系统，无需传统信号预处理，直接处理事件流音频数据，在Google Speech Commands v2数据集上达到87.43%的量化精度，端到端延迟低于35微秒，平均功耗1.12瓦。
AI.motivation: 随着移动机器人和嵌入式智能的快速发展，需要在边缘平台上进行高效的设备端数据处理。神经形态传感器产生的稀疏、事件驱动数据为此提供了有前景的研究方向。
AI.method: 提出了首款集成神经形态听觉传感器（NAS）和图神经网络（GNN）的单FPGA端到端关键词识别系统，采用计算近存储（compute-near-memory）网络架构，直接处理事件流音频数据，省去传统信号预处理步骤。
AI.result: 在Google Speech Commands v2数据集上经量化后达到87.43%的准确率，端到端延迟低于35微秒，平均功耗1.12瓦。
AI.conclusion: 该架构在FPGA上实现了低延迟、低功耗的实时关键词识别，验证了神经形态传感器与图神经网络在边缘计算场景下的可行性。

title: Biosignal Fingerprinting: A Cross-Modal PPG-ECG Foundation Model
summary: Cardiovascular disease remains the leading cause of global mortality, yet scalable cardiac monitoring is hindered by the gap between diagnostic-rich ECG and ubiquitous wearable PPG. Bridging this gap requires representations that are compact, transferable across modalities and devices, and deployable without task-specific retraining. Here we introduce biosignal fingerprints: compact latent representations of cardiovascular state derived from a cross-modal foundation model, the Multi-modal Masked Autoencoder (M2AE), trained on over 3.4 million paired ECG and PPG signals. M2AE integrates modality-specific encoders with a shared bottleneck and dual decoders, jointly optimized using reconstruction and cross-modal contrastive objectives, yielding generalizable fingerprints that retain intra- and inter-modality features. Like a biometric fingerprint, these representations uniquely encode an individual's cardiovascular state in a modality-agnostic, privacy-preserving form reusable across clinical tasks without exposing raw waveform data or requiring model retraining. Across 7 downstream tasks, spanning cross-modal reconstruction, cardiovascular disease classification, hypertension detection, mortality prediction, and demographic inference, biosignal fingerprints achieve competitive or superior performance compared to leading domain-specialist foundation models in frozen settings, including an AUROC of 0.974 for five-class CVD classification and 0.877 for hypertension detection, with a maximum improvement of 27.7% in AUROC across 5 classification tasks. Critically, strong performance is maintained with only a single modality, enabling deployment in resource-constrained, single-sensor environments typical of real-world wearable monitoring, with direct implications for continuous cardiovascular monitoring across clinical and consumer health settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于跨模态基础模型M2AE的生物信号指纹，在340万对ECG和PPG信号上训练，生成紧凑、跨模态通用、无需重新训练的潜在表征，在7个下游任务中达到或超越领域专家模型表现（五类CVD分类AUROC 0.974，高血压检测0.877），且单模态仍保持强性能，适用于资源受限的可穿戴监测场景。
AI.motivation: 心血管疾病是全球首要死亡原因，但可扩展的心脏监测受到诊断丰富的ECG与普遍可穿戴PPG之间差距的阻碍，需要既紧凑又可跨模态和设备迁移、且无需任务特定重新训练的表征。
AI.method: 提出Multi-modal Masked Autoencoder (M2AE)，包含模态特定编码器、共享瓶颈和双解码器，在超过340万对ECG和PPG信号上联合优化重建损失和跨模态对比学习目标，生成通用生物信号指纹。
AI.result: 在7项下游任务中，冻结设置的生物信号指纹达到或超越领域专家基础模型，包括五类CVD分类AUROC 0.974、高血压检测0.877、跨5项分类任务最大提升27.7% AUROC；单模态条件下仍保持强性能。
AI.conclusion: 生物信号指纹以模态无关、隐私保护的形式唯一编码个体心血管状态，无需重新训练即可复用，在资源受限的单传感器环境中依然有效，对临床和消费级持续心血管监测具有直接意义。

title: Geometry Conflict: Explaining and Controlling Forgetting in LLM Continual Post-Training
summary: Continual post-training aims to extend large language models (LLMs) with new knowledge, skills, and behaviors, yet it remains unclear when sequential updates enable capability transfer and when they cause catastrophic forgetting. Existing methods mitigate forgetting through sequential fine-tuning, replay, regularization, or model merging, but offer limited criteria for determining when incorporating new updates is beneficial or harmful. In this work, we study LLM continual post-training through three questions: What drives forgetting? When do sequentially acquired capabilities transfer or interfere? How can compatibility be used to control update integration? We address these questions through task geometry: we represent each post-training task by its parameter update and study the covariance geometry induced by the update. Our central finding is that: forgetting can be considered as a state-relative update-integration failure, it arises when the covariance geometries induced by tasks misalign with the geometry of the evolving model state. Sequential updates transfer when they remain compatible with the model state shaped by previous updates, and interfere when state-relative geometry conflict becomes high. Motivated by this finding, we propose Geometry-Conflict Wasserstein Merging (GCWM), a data-free update-integration method that constructs a shared Wasserstein metric via Gaussian Wasserstein barycenters and uses geometry conflict to gate geometry-aware correction. Across Qwen3 0.6B--14B on domain-continual and capability-continual settings, GCWM consistently outperforms data-free baselines, improving retention and final performance without replay data. These results identify geometry conflict as both an explanatory signal for forgetting and a practical control signal for LLM continual post-training.

AI.tldr: 本文研究大语言模型持续后训练中的遗忘与迁移问题，提出任务几何分析框架，发现遗忘源于任务协方差几何与模型状态的错配，并据此提出数据无关的几何冲突Wasserstein合并方法（GCWM），在多个规模模型上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法虽能缓解遗忘，但缺乏判断何时引入新更新有益或有害的明确准则，亟需理解遗忘的驱动因素及顺序能力迁移/干扰的条件。
AI.method: 通过任务几何（将任务表示为参数更新并研究其协方差几何）分析遗忘机制；提出GCWM方法，利用高斯Wasserstein重心构建共享度量，以几何冲突作为门控信号实现几何感知的更新整合。
AI.result: 在Qwen3 0.6B至14B模型上的领域持续和能力持续设置中，GCWM在无重放数据条件下持续优于现有数据无关基线，显著提升保留性能与最终性能。
AI.conclusion: 几何冲突既是遗忘的解释性信号，也是持续后训练中实用的控制信号，为无重放场景下的LLM持续学习提供了有效方案。

title: Minimal Filling Architectures of Polynomial Neural Networks: Counterexamples, Frontier Search, and Defects
summary: We provide a counterexample to the minimal unimodal conjecture for polynomial neural networks (PNNs) with power activation functions. Fixing the input and output widths, the conjecture states that any minimal filling architecture has unimodal widths for the hidden layers. We found a counterexample via a frontier search and certified it using recursive dimension bounds and symbolic computation. Notably, several subarchitectures of this example exhibit large defect, in contrast with the predominantly small-defect behavior observed in prior examples.

AI.tldr: 本文通过前沿搜索和符号计算，为多项式神经网络的最小单峰猜想提供了一个反例，该反例的子架构表现出大缺陷特征，与以往的小缺陷行为不同。
AI.motivation: 为了验证多项式神经网络（PNNs）中关于隐藏层宽度必须呈单峰分布的最小填充架构猜想，并探究该猜想的有效性边界。
AI.method: 采用前沿搜索（frontier search）方法寻找反例，并利用递归维度界（recursive dimension bounds）和符号计算（symbolic computation）对反例进行严格验证。
AI.result: 成功找到了一个违反最小单峰猜想的具体反例，该反例的若干子架构表现出大缺陷（large defect），与先前主要观察到的的小缺陷（small-defect）行为形成对比。
AI.conclusion: 最小单峰猜想在多项式神经网络中不成立，存在大缺陷的反例架构，表明该问题的复杂性超出预期。

title: Plan2Cleanse: Test-Time Backdoor Defense via Monte-Carlo Planning in Deep Reinforcement Learning
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)
summary: Ensuring the security of reinforcement learning (RL) models is critical, particularly when they are trained by third parties and deployed in real-world systems. Attackers can implant backdoors into these models, causing them to behave normally under typical conditions, but execute malicious behaviors when specific triggers are activated. In this work, we propose Plan2Cleanse, a test-time detection and mitigation framework that adapts Monte Carlo Tree Search to efficiently identify and neutralize RL backdoor attacks without requiring model retraining. Our approach recasts backdoor detection as a planning problem, enabling systematic exploration of temporally extended trigger sequences while maintaining black-box access to the target policy. By leveraging the detection results, Plan2Cleanse can further achieve efficient mitigation through tree-search preventive replanning. We evaluated our method in competitive MuJoCo environments, simulated O-RAN wireless networks, and Atari games. Plan2Cleanse achieves substantial improvements, increasing trigger detection success rates by more than 61.4 percentage points in stealthy O-RAN scenarios and improving win rates from 35\% to 53\% in competitive Humanoid environments. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of our test-time defense approach and highlight the importance of proactive defenses against backdoor threats in RL deployments. Our implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/rl-bandits-lab/RL-Backdoor.

AI.tldr: Plan2Cleanse 提出了一种基于蒙特卡洛树搜索的测试时检测与缓解框架，通过将后门检测转化为规划问题，在黑盒条件下高效识别并中和RL模型中的后门攻击，无需重训练，在MuJoCo、O-RAN和Atari环境中显著提升了触发检测成功率和胜率。
AI.motivation: 第三方训练的强化学习模型在部署时可能被植入后门攻击，在特定触发条件下执行恶意行为，现有方法缺乏高效的测试时检测与缓解手段，且通常需要重训练或白盒访问。
AI.method: 将后门检测重新建模为规划问题，采用蒙特卡洛树搜索系统性地探索时序扩展的触发序列；基于检测结果，通过树搜索预防性重规划实现高效缓解，整个过程保持对目标策略的黑盒访问。
AI.result: 在隐蔽O-RAN场景中触发检测成功率提升超过61.4个百分点；在竞技Humanoid环境中胜率从35%提升至53%。
AI.conclusion: Plan2Cleanse是一种有效的测试时防御方法，无需重训练即可检测和缓解RL后门攻击，强调了主动防御在RL部署中的重要性。

title: Make Each Token Count: Towards Improving Long-Context Performance with KV Cache Eviction
comment: A learnable KV eviction method for large language models
summary: The key-value (KV) cache is a major bottleneck in long-context inference, where memory and computation grow with sequence length. Existing KV eviction methods reduce this cost but typically degrade performance relative to full-cache inference. Our key insight is that full-cache attention is not always optimal: in long contexts, irrelevant tokens can dilute attention away from useful evidence, so selective, learnable eviction can improve generation rather than merely approximate the full cache. We introduce a global retention-based KV eviction method that learns each token's future utility under a unified memory budget. Lightweight retention gates assign utility scores to cached KV entries, and a shared final scoring projection calibrates these scores across all layers and heads. This enables a single global eviction policy in which tokens from different layers, heads, and modalities compete directly for cache capacity. We further provide theoretical analysis showing that preferentially retaining useful tokens reduces attention dilution, and we justify geometric retention as a query-agnostic proxy for future utility. Across diverse long-context language and vision-language reasoning, and multi-turn dialogue benchmarks, our method substantially reduces KV memory while matching or surpassing full-cache inference. These results suggest that learned, globally calibrated KV eviction is not only a compression technique, but also a mechanism for improving long-context reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于全局保留的KV缓存驱逐方法，通过学习每个token的未来效用，在统一内存预算下实现跨层、跨头、跨模态的全局驱逐策略。该方法不仅压缩缓存，还能通过减少注意力稀释来提升长上下文推理质量，在多种基准上匹配或超越全缓存推理性能。
AI.motivation: 长上下文推理中KV缓存的内存和计算开销随序列长度线性增长，现有驱逐方法虽能降低成本但通常导致性能下降。作者发现全缓存注意力并非最优：无关token会稀释对有用证据的注意力，因此选择性、可学习的驱逐可以改善生成质量而非仅仅近似全缓存。
AI.method: 提出全局保留型KV驱逐方法：1) 轻量级保留门为每个缓存的KV条目分配效用分数；2) 共享最终评分投影跨所有层和头校准分数；3) 实现全局驱逐策略，不同层、头、模态的token直接竞争缓存容量；4) 提供理论分析证明优先保留有用token可减少注意力稀释，并论证几何保留作为查询无关的未来效用代理的合理性。
AI.result: 在长上下文语言理解、视觉-语言推理和多轮对话基准上，该方法显著减少KV内存同时匹配或超越全缓存推理性能。
AI.conclusion: 学习型、全局校准的KV驱逐不仅是一种压缩技术，更是改进长上下文推理的机制。

title: Causal Parametric Drift Simulation: A Digital Twin Framework for Classifier Robustness Evaluation
summary:
Machine learning classifiers in dynamic environments face concept drift -- changes in the data-generating process that degrade performance. Conventional evaluation via static test sets or noise perturbations fails to preserve causal dependencies in tabular data, often producing causally invalid assessments. Post-hoc tools like SHAP and LIME offer correlational insights that may not reflect the causal mechanisms driving model failure.
  We propose a framework that complements existing drift detection by leveraging Structural Causal Models as "Digital Twins" of data-generating processes, enabling precise causal interventions while preserving structural dependencies. Our technique, Causal Parametric Drift Simulation, stress-tests classifiers to identify vulnerabilities before deployment. Experiments on the Open Sourcing Mental Illness (OSMH) dataset demonstrate that this approach exposes latent vulnerabilities invisible to standard statistical monitors.

AI.tldr: 提出基于结构因果模型（SCM）作为数字孪生的框架，通过因果参数漂移模拟（CPDS）对分类器进行压力测试，在保持结构依赖性的同时进行精确因果干预，以暴露标准统计监测无法发现的潜在漏洞。
AI.motivation: 动态环境中的机器学习分类器面临概念漂移问题，而传统评估方法（静态测试集、噪声扰动）无法保留表格数据的因果依赖关系，导致评估结果的因果无效性；SHAP、LIME等事后工具提供的相关性分析也无法反映驱动模型失效的因果机制。
AI.method: 利用结构因果模型（SCM）作为数据生成过程的"数字孪生"，提出因果参数漂移模拟（Causal Parametric Drift Simulation, CPDS）技术，在保持结构依赖关系的前提下对分类器进行精确因果干预和压力测试。
AI.result: 在开放心理疾病（OSMH）数据集上的实验表明，该方法能够暴露标准统计监测器无法发现的潜在漏洞。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可作为现有漂移检测方法的补充，通过因果视角增强分类器在部署前的稳健性评估，识别传统方法遗漏的脆弱点。

title: Learning Multi-Indicator Weights for Data Selection: A Joint Task-Model Adaptation Framework with Efficient Proxies
comment: This work has been accepted at IJCAI 2026
summary: Data selection is a key component of efficient instruction tuning for large language models, as recent work has shown that data quality often matters more than data quantity. Accordingly, prior studies have introduced various multi-dimensional heuristics to evaluate and filter instruction data. However, most existing methods rely on static task-agnostic and model-agnostic weighting schemes, which overlook the varying requirements of specific downstream tasks and the differing pre-existing capabilities of models. In this paper, we propose a framework for learning multi-indicator weights that jointly adapts data selection to both the downstream task and the specific model. Our method identifies optimal weight configurations without full-scale fine-tuning by utilizing in-context learning (ICL) signals on compact tiny-validation sets. These signals serve as efficient performance proxies that ensure high-fidelity evaluation at minimal computational cost. Experiments across multiple benchmarks and model families, including Mistral, Qwen, and Llama, show that the approach achieves performance comparable to or exceeding full-dataset tuning while using only 30\% of the training samples on GSM8K. Furthermore, our analysis reveals a trade-off between semantic diversity and logical complexity in reasoning tasks, highlighting the necessity of joint task-model adaptation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个学习多指标权重的框架，通过上下文学习（ICL）信号在微型验证集上高效评估数据质量，实现数据选择对下游任务和特定模型的联合自适应，在仅使用30%训练样本的情况下达到接近或超越全量微调的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有指令调优中的数据选择方法大多采用静态的、任务无关且模型无关的加权方案，忽略了下游任务的不同需求和模型预训练能力的差异，导致选择的数据无法最优适配具体场景。
AI.method: 提出一个学习多指标权重的框架，利用上下文学习（ICL）信号在紧凑的微型验证集上作为性能代理，无需全量微调即可高效评估并找到最优权重配置，实现对下游任务和模型的联合自适应。
AI.result: 在Mistral、Qwen、Llama等多个模型族和基准测试上，仅使用GSM8K中30%的训练样本即可达到接近或超越全量微调的性能。分析还揭示了推理任务中语义多样性与逻辑复杂度之间的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 任务-模型的联合自适应是数据选择的关键，所提方法能够在极低计算成本下高效筛选高质量指令数据，同时不同质量维度之间存在权衡，需要针对性适配。

title: ChaosNetBench: Benchmarking Spatio-Temporal Graph Neural Networks on Chaotic Lattice Dynamics
summary: Spatio-temporal graph neural networks (STGNNs) are widely used for short-term forecasting in dynamic physical systems such as traffic and weather. However, the prevailing evaluation practice uses real world benchmark data sets in a single domain with a single fixed holdout splits, making it difficult to compare architectures across different dynamical regimes. We introduce ChaosNetBench (CNB), a synthetic benchmark dataset and evaluation framework for studying STGNN performance under controlled multidimensional chaotic dynamics. CNB is built on a lattice of coupled standard maps with independently tunable local chaos ($K$), coupling strength ($\varepsilon$), and system size ($N$), providing known topology and known dynamics across 96 system instances and 9{,}600 trajectories. We introduce chaos indicators, evaluation metrics and a protocol to analyze and compare the capacity of STGNN architectures to deal with different levels of local and global chaos. We illustrate the usage of the framework by analyzing 13 architectures (5 STGNNs and 8 non-graph baselines). The results reveal a regime dependent transition in which non-graph baselines (TCN, N-BEATS, iTransformer) remain competitive when there is low local chaos, while STGNNs (e.g., Graph WaveNet, D2STGNN, STAEformer) are generally more resilient to higher levels of local and global chaos. CNB provides a practical, reusable testbed for systematically comparing and analyzing the capacity of STGNN architectures to handle different levels of local and global chaos.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 ChaosNetBench (CNB)，一个基于耦合标准映射格点的合成基准数据集与评估框架，用于在多维混沌动力学条件下系统比较 STGNN 架构的性能。通过对 13 种架构的分析，发现低局部混沌时非图基线（TCN、N-BEATS、iTransformer）具有竞争力，而 STGNN（如 Graph WaveNet、D2STGNN、STAEformer）在更高局部和全局混沌水平下更具鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有 STGNN 评估使用单一领域的真实数据集与固定划分，难以比较不同动力学机制下的架构性能，缺乏可控、可复现的混沌动力学测试环境。
AI.method: 构建基于耦合标准映射格点的合成基准数据集 CNB，独立调节局部混沌参数 K、耦合强度 ε 和系统规模 N，生成 96 个系统实例和 9600 条轨迹；引入混沌指标、评估指标和协议，分析 13 种架构（5 种 STGNN 和 8 种非图基线）。
AI.result: 低局部混沌时非图基线（TCN、N-BEATS、iTransformer）保持竞争力；高局部和全局混沌下 STGNN（Graph WaveNet、D2STGNN、STAEformer）更具鲁棒性；架构性能存在依赖混沌水平的 regime transition。
AI.conclusion: CNB 提供了一个实用、可复用的测试平台，用于系统比较和分析 STGNN 架构在不同局部与全局混沌水平下的处理能力。

title: Learning Unified Representations of Normalcy for Time Series Anomaly Detection
summary: The core challenge in unsupervised anomaly detection is identifying abnormal patterns without prior knowledge of their characteristics. While existing methods have addressed aspects of this problem, they often struggle to learn a robust representation of the normal data distribution that is distinct from anomalous patterns. In this paper, we present a novel framework, Unified Unsupervised Anomaly Detection ($\text{U}^2\text{AD}$), that comprehensively addresses anomaly detection in multivariate time series. Our approach learns the underlying data distribution of normal samples by utilizing score-based generative modeling. We introduce a novel time-dependent score network and a unified training objective that together delineate the manifold of normal data while considering both local and global temporal contexts. Reconstruction is then performed via a deterministic sampling process using an ordinary differential equation solver. Our extensive experimental evaluations demonstrate that $\text{U}^2\text{AD}$ not only outperforms current state-of-the-art methods in detection accuracy but also identifies anomalies at significantly earlier stages of their occurrence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出U²AD框架，利用基于分数的生成模型学习正常数据分布，通过新型时间相关分数网络和统一训练目标区分正常与异常模式，在多元时间序列异常检测中取得SOTA性能并能更早发现异常。
AI.motivation: 无监督异常检测的核心挑战在于缺乏先验知识的情况下识别异常模式，现有方法难以学习正常数据分布与异常模式之间具有区分度的鲁棒表示。
AI.method: 利用基于分数的生成建模学习正常样本的数据分布；提出新颖的时间相关分数网络和统一训练目标，刻画正常数据流形并同时考虑局部和全局时间上下文；通过常微分方程求解器进行确定性采样实现重建。
AI.result: 在检测准确率上超越当前SOTA方法，并且能够在异常发生的显著更早阶段识别出异常。
AI.conclusion: U²AD框架有效解决了无监督异常检测中正常表示学习的难题，在检测精度和早期检测能力上均取得显著提升。

title: Quantum Circuit Simulation of Compartmental Drug Dynamics: Leveraging Variational Algorithms for Nonlinear Mixed-Effects Population Pharmacokinetics
summary: Population pharmacokinetic/pharmacodynamic (PK/PD) modeling traditionally relies on classical ordinary differential equations to simulate drug dynamics. In this work, we reformulate a compartmental PK/PD model as an open quantum system and implement it using quantum circuits developed in PennyLane. Four pharmacological compartments (central, peripheral, effect-site, and response) are encoded using twelve qubits, with inter-compartmental transitions represented through controlled quantum operations that emulate stochastic dynamics. The framework is evaluated on Phase 1 clinical data using a quantum-enhanced stochastic approximation expectation-maximization (SAEM) approach. Compared with the classical implementation, the quantum model achieves substantially improved log-likelihood values, indicating stronger statistical fit while preserving identical parameter estimates, thereby validating numerical consistency and model interpretability. The quantum-based optimization converges faster in terms of iterations, although total runtime is increased due to current simulation overhead. The study demonstrates stable large-scale simulation performance and establishes a hybrid quantum-classical approach that maintains biological fidelity while improving statistical modeling capacity. The dataset and problem statement originate from the Quantum Innovation Challenge 2025, and additional details are provided via the associated link.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将经典药代动力学/药效学（PK/PD）房室模型重新表述为开放量子系统，利用PennyLane开发的量子电路进行实现。在12个量子比特上编码四个药理学房室，通过受控量子操作模拟房室间随机动态转换。基于I期临床数据，采用量子增强的随机近似期望最大化（SAEM）方法进行评估。与经典实现相比，量子模型在保持参数估计一致性的前提下，显著提高了对数似然值，表明统计拟合度更优。量子优化在迭代次数上收敛更快，但由于当前模拟开销，总运行时间增加。研究建立了混合量子-经典方法，在维持生物学保真度的同时提升了统计建模能力。
AI.motivation: 传统PK/PD建模依赖经典常微分方程，存在计算复杂度和统计拟合能力的局限。探索量子计算范式能否为药理学建模提供统计拟合度和优化效率上的改进，同时保持模型的可解释性和生物学一致性。
AI.method: 将四房室PK/PD模型（中央室、外周室、效应室、响应室）映射为开放量子系统，使用12个量子比特编码；通过受控量子操作表示房室间随机转移；采用量子增强SAEM算法进行参数估计；在I期临床数据上对比经典实现与量子实现的性能。
AI.result: 量子模型在保持与经典模型一致的参数估计值的前提下，实现了更高的对数似然值，统计拟合度显著提升；量子优化的迭代收敛速度更快；大规模模拟性能稳定；但总运行时间因当前模拟开销而增加。
AI.conclusion: 混合量子-经典PK/PD建模方法在保持生物学解释性和数值一致性的同时，能够提升统计建模能力。量子增强SAEM在迭代效率上具有优势，但实际运行时间受限于当前量子模拟基础设施。该方法为药理学建模提供了新的计算范式，具有进一步优化的潜力。

title: Discovery of Nonlinear Dynamics with Automated Basis Function Generation
comment: 53 pages, 17 figures. Code available at https://github.com/mabasiri95/AutoSINDy
summary: Discovering governing equations from observational data remains a fundamental challenge in scientific modeling, particularly when the underlying mathematical structure is unknown. Traditional sparse identification methods like SINDy excel at discovering parsimonious models but require researchers to specify candidate basis functions a priori, a limitation that often leads to model failure when critical terms are omitted or when systems exhibit unconventional dynamics. Purely symbolic regression approaches offer unlimited flexibility but struggle with noise sensitivity and frequently produce overly complex, unstable equations. We present AutoSINDy, a hybrid Discovery-then-Solve framework that combines the exploratory power of symbolic regression with the robust sparsity-promoting capabilities of SINDy. Our method operates in three stages: (1) PySR-based symbolic regression discovers candidate functional forms from bootstrapped data chunks; (2) a curation pipeline decomposes, expands, and filters these expressions using collinearity analysis to construct a minimal yet comprehensive library; and (3) SINDy identifies sparse governing equations from this custom-tailored library. Extensive experiments across canonical nonlinear systems demonstrate that AutoSINDy consistently recovers ground-truth equations even under high observational noise, achieving a ground-truth recovery rate of 92.8% across all trials. Compared with standard SINDy using enriched libraries and standalone symbolic regression, AutoSINDy achieves higher predictive accuracy, superior generalization to unseen trajectories, and substantially lower symbolic complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoSINDy框架，将符号回归（PySR）与SINDy稀疏识别相结合，通过三阶段流程（符号回归发现候选函数、共线性分析构建定制库、SINDy稀疏辨识）自动发现控制方程，在噪声下达到92.8%的真实方程恢复率。
AI.motivation: 传统SINDy需人工指定候选基函数，遗漏关键项会导致模型失败；纯符号回归对噪声敏感且易产生过复杂方程。亟需一种既能自动探索函数形式、又能保持稀疏鲁棒性的混合方法。
AI.method: 三阶段Hybrid框架：(1) PySR对自助采样数据块进行符号回归，发现候选函数形式；(2) 构建策展管线，通过分解、展开和共线性分析过滤表达式，构建最小完备库；(3) SINDy从定制库中识别稀疏控制方程。
AI.result: 在典型非线性系统上，噪声条件下真实方程恢复率达92.8%；相比增强库SINDy和独立符号回归，预测精度更高、对未见过轨迹泛化能力更强、符号复杂度更低。
AI.conclusion: AutoSINDy有效融合了符号回归的探索能力与SINDy的稀疏促进能力，为未知结构动力系统的自动建模提供了高性能解决方案。

title: Adaptive Data Harvesting for Efficient Neural Network Learning with Universal Constraints
summary: Training neural networks to satisfy universal constraints over continuous domains poses unique challenges. Common examples include Lyapunov Neural Networks (Lyapunov NNs) and Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), where analytical solutions are generally either unavailable or overly restrictive. Sample-based methods are therefore commonly used to enforce these constraints, and the choice of samples has a substantial impact on convergence speed, stability, and solution quality. Most existing methods rely on fixed heuristics or handcrafted rules, and are suboptimal in practice. In this paper, we aim to improve upon them by learning, from data and experience, how to dynamically and iteratively adjust the samples in response to the model's evolving learning performance. Trained by reinforcement learning, the learned policy improves empirical constraint satisfaction on test problems while significantly improving efficiency. We validate the approach on both Lyapunov NNs and PINNs, and demonstrate its broader applicability to domains where adaptive input selection is essential for effective training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过强化学习动态调整样本点来训练满足连续域约束的神经网络（如Lyapunov NN和PINN），相比固定启发式方法，该策略在约束满足度和训练效率上均有显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于采样的方法依赖固定启发式或手工规则来选取样本点，这在实际中往往次优。本文旨在通过学习数据与经验，动态调整样本以响应模型学习表现，从而克服这一局限性。
AI.method: 利用强化学习训练一个策略，使其能根据模型当前的进化学习性能，动态且迭代地调整样本选择，实现自适应采样。
AI.result: 在Lyapunov NN和PINN上的验证表明，学习到的策略在测试问题上显著提升了经验约束满足度，同时大幅提高了训练效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅适用于Lyapunov NN和PINN，还可推广至更广泛的、需要自适应输入选择来保证有效训练的领域，证明了其普适性。

title: Metal-Sci: A Scientific Compute Benchmark for Evolutionary LLM Kernel Search on Apple Silicon
summary: We present Metal-Sci, a 10-task benchmark of scientific Apple Silicon Metal compute kernels spanning six optimization regimes (stencils, all-pairs in $n$-body problems, multi-field Boltzmann, neighbor-list molecular dynamics, multi-kernel PDE, FFT). Each task ships a CPU reference, a roofline-anchored fitness function, and a held-out generalization size. We pair the benchmark with a lightweight harness for automatic kernel search that runtime-compiles each candidate, scores it against the roofline across multiple sizes, and feeds structured compile and per-size correctness diagnostics back to a frozen LLM driving a $(1{+}1)$ evolutionary loop. We report matched single-model sweeps of Claude Opus 4.7, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and GPT 5.5 on M1 Pro: in-distribution self-speedups span $1.00\times$ to $10.7\times$. Beyond raw speedup, our central methodological claim is structural: the held-out gate scoring function $Φ_\mathcal{T}$ (evaluated once at end-of-run on a configuration the agent never sees during search) functions as a cheap mechanical oversight primitive on this automatic search loop, catching e.g. an Opus template <uint D> HMC win that returns wrong samples at unseen dimensions, and a GPT FFT3D best that wins in-distribution at $2.95\times$ speedup but collapses to $0.23\times$ on a $256^3$ held-out cube, a silent regression that the in-distribution score alone cannot see. Code at https://github.com/vicgalle/metal-sci-kernels

AI.tldr: Metal-Sci是一个包含10个任务的Apple Silicon Metal计算内核基准测试，覆盖6种优化场景，并配有一个自动内核搜索框架。该框架使用(1+1)进化循环和LLM驱动，通过留出门控评分函数实现轻量级机械监督，能够捕获分布外性能崩溃等静默回归问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试缺乏对Metal GPU计算内核的全面评估，且自动内核搜索缺乏有效的泛化性能监督机制，难以发现分布外性能退化问题。
AI.method: 构建了10任务基准（含CPU参考、屋顶线适配适应度函数、留出泛化规模），并设计轻量级自动搜索框架：运行时编译候选内核、多规模屋顶线评分、结构化编译/正确性诊断反馈给冻结LLM驱动(1+1)进化搜索。核心创新是留出门控评分函数Φ_𝒯，在搜索结束后对未见配置进行一次评估。
AI.result: 在M1 Pro上对Claude Opus 4.7、Gemini 3.1 Pro、GPT 5.5进行单模型扫描，分布内自加速比从1.00×到10.7×不等。留出评分成功检测到Opus的HMC模板在未见维度返回错误样本，以及GPT的FFT3D最佳解在256³留出立方体上从2.95×加速比暴跌至0.23×的静默回归。
AI.conclusion: 留出门控评分函数可作为自动搜索循环的廉价机械监督原语，有效检测分布外泛化失败，弥补纯分布内评分的盲区。

title: Benchmarking Transformer and xLSTM for Time-Series Forecasting of Heat Consumption
comment: Submitted version of the paper submitted to IEEE SusTech, 2026
summary: Obtaining an accurate short-term forecasting for heat demand is an essential part of operating district heating networks cost-efficient and reliable. Heat consumption time series at the building level are highly dependent on exogenous variables such as outdoor temperature and individual usage patterns, making forecasting in this context a challenging task. Thus, this paper benchmarks novel Transformer-based and xLSTM architectures for short-term heat-demand forecasting. Using hourly data from 25 German buildings (2017-2025), we compare three-hour and 24-hour forecasting horizons relevant for intraday control and day-ahead scheduling. We establish a multi-building benchmark that tests whether models trained on pooled, heterogeneous building data are able to generalize across diverse building stock. The results show that the xLSTM achieves the lowest RMSE (19.88 kWh for three-hour, 21.47 kWh for 24-hour forecasts), while the Temporal Fusion Transformer attains the best MAE (9.16 kWh for three-hour forecasts). As xLSTMs and Transformers require long training times and have a huge number of trainable parameters, their sustainability remains questionable. Therefore, this paper further investigates the trade-off between predictive accuracy and computational resource demand of the evaluated forecasting models. The findings indicate that also low-parameter models like a traditional fully-connected network achieve good predictive results, highlighting that marginal accuracy gains of the novel prediction models come at substantial resource expense for this use case.

AI.tldr: 本文对基于Transformer和xLSTM的新型架构在短期建筑热负荷预测中的性能进行了基准测试，发现xLSTM在RMSE上最优（三小时19.88 kWh），Temporal Fusion Transformer在MAE上最优（三小时9.16 kWh），但与传统全连接网络相比，这些复杂模型的精度提升有限且计算资源消耗巨大，其可持续性存疑。
AI.motivation: 准确预测热负荷对区域供热网络的经济高效运行至关重要，但建筑级热负荷时间序列高度依赖室外温度和用户行为等外生变量，预测难度大。现有研究缺乏对新型Transformer和xLSTM架构在短期热负荷预测中性能的系统评估。
AI.method: 使用德国25栋建筑2017-2025年的逐小时数据，构建多建筑基准，对比三种预测时长（3小时和24小时）下xLSTM、Transformer（Temporal Fusion Transformer）和传统全连接网络等模型的性能，从准确度和计算资源需求两方面进行评估。
AI.result: xLSTM在三小时和24小时预测中取得最低RMSE（19.88 kWh和21.47 kWh），Temporal Fusion Transformer取得最低MAE（三小时9.16 kWh）。但低参数量的传统全连接网络也能取得良好预测效果，新型模型的精度提升伴随显著的计算资源消耗。
AI.conclusion: 对于建筑级短期热负荷预测，传统简单网络在精度-资源权衡中更具优势，新型深度学习模型在此场景下的边际精度提升不值得其高昂的计算资源开销，其可持续性值得质疑。

title: Model Capacity Determines Grokking through Competing Memorisation and Generalisation Speeds
summary: Existing accounts of grokking explain the phenomena in terms of mechanistic frameworks such as circuit efficiency or lazy-to-rich transitions. However, despite a known dependence between grokking and model size, how model capacity shapes grokking remains an open question. We give an information-theoretic account of this relationship on the task of modular arithmetic, showing that grokking does not immediately occur when a model becomes large enough to memorise the training set, but rather emerges as the outcome of a competition between two measurable timescales: a memorisation speed $T_{\text{mem}}(P)$ and a generalisation speed $T_{\text{gen}}(P)$, both of which are functions of model parameter count $P$. Adapting the information capacity framework of Morris et al. (2025), we estimate $T_{\text{mem}}(P)$ on random-label data of equivalent complexity and $T_{\text{gen}}(P)$ on the modular task itself, and show that grokking emerges close to the parameter scale where these timescales intersect. The framework also suggests an empirical model for predicting memorisation speed given model capacity and dataset complexity, recovering the previously reported empirical observation that larger models memorise faster. Overall, we motivate the formalisation of different learning timescales as important abstractions to study when explaining how model capacity shapes grokking on algorithmic tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文通过信息论框架解释了模型容量如何通过记忆速度T_mem(P)和泛化速度T_gen(P)两种时间尺度的竞争影响grokking现象，发现grokking发生在两者相交的参数尺度附近。
AI.motivation: 现有grokking解释主要基于电路效率或懒到丰富转变等机械论框架，但模型容量如何塑造grokking仍不清楚。
AI.method: 在模算术任务上，利用信息容量框架估计随机标签数据上的记忆速度T_mem(P)和模任务上的泛化速度T_gen(P)，分析两者作为参数数量P的函数关系。
AI.result: Grokking并非在模型大到足以记忆训练集时立即发生，而是当记忆速度与泛化速度的时间尺度相交时出现；同时验证了更大模型记忆更快的经验观察。
AI.conclusion: 不同学习时间尺度的形式化是理解模型容量如何塑造grokking的重要抽象工具。

title: One for All: A Non-Linear Transformer can Enable Cross-Domain Generalization for In-Context Reinforcement Learning
summary: A central challenge in reinforcement learning (RL) is to learn models that generalize beyond the tasks on which they are trained, a goal traditionally pursued through multi-task and meta RL. Recently, transformer architectures have emerged as a promising approach, enabling adaptation to new tasks via in-context learning without explicit parameter updates. From a functional perspective, a transformer can be viewed as a functional operator that maps a context to a task-specific function. It is thus fundamental to understand and design this operator to support stronger generalization in RL. In this work, we address this resulting question of generalization from a kernel-based perspective by establishing a connection between non-linear transformers and kernel-based temporal difference learning. By interpreting the transformer as performing regression in a Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space (RKHS), we show that value functions from different domains can be represented using a shared set of weights, provided they lie within the same RKHS. Experiments on multiple MetaWorld domains support this interpretation, demonstrating convergence of the temporal-difference objective.

AI.tldr: 本文从核方法视角建立非线性Transformer与核时序差分学习之间的理论联系，将Transformer解释为在再生核希尔伯特空间中进行回归，证明不同领域的值函数可用共享权重集表示，并在MetaWorld环境中验证了时序差分目标的收敛性。
AI.motivation: 强化学习中的核心挑战是学习能泛化到未见任务的模型，传统方法依赖多任务和元强化学习。最近Transformer通过上下文学习实现任务适应而无需显式参数更新，但从函数角度看Transformer可被视为将上下文映射到任务特定函数的函数算子，因此理解并设计这一算子对于提升RL中的泛化能力至关重要。
AI.method: 建立非线性Transformer与核时序差分学习之间的理论联系，将Transformer解释为在再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）中进行回归，证明不同领域的值函数若位于同一RKHS中，可用共享权重集表示。
AI.result: 在多个MetaWorld领域上的实验支持了这一理论解释，验证了时序差分目标的收敛性。
AI.conclusion: 通过核方法视角揭示了Transformer在强化学习中实现跨任务泛化的内在机制，为设计更强的RL泛化模型提供了理论依据。

title: RubricRefine: Improving Tool-Use Agent Reliability with Training-Free Pre-Execution Refinement
summary: Iterative self-refinement is a popular inference-time reliability technique, but its effectiveness in code-mode tool use depends heavily on the structure of the feedback signal: unstructured critique helps inconsistently across models, and even revision with real execution feedback improves only modestly ($0.75$ vs. $0.65$ baseline). The dominant failures are inter-tool contract violations - wrong output shape, incorrect tool routing, broken argument provenance - that run to completion without raising errors, making runtime feedback insufficient. We introduce RubricRefine, a training-free pre-execution reliability layer that generates task- and registry-specific rubrics, scores candidate code against explicit contract checks, and iteratively repairs failures before any execution occurs. With zero execution attempts, RubricRefine reaches $0.86$ on M3ToolEval averaged across seven models-improving over prior inference-time baselines on every model tested on this benchmark, at $2.6X$ lower latency than the strongest non-iterative alternative - and remains flat on the predominantly single-step API-Bank, consistent with the method's reliance on inter-tool contract structure. A rubric-category ablation and calibration analysis further characterize when and why the method works.

AI.tldr: RubricRefine是一种无需训练的预执行可靠性增强方法，通过生成任务特定的评估标准，在代码执行前对候选代码进行合约检查与迭代修复，在M3ToolEval基准上平均得分0.86，优于所有基线方法，且延迟比最强非迭代方法低2.6倍。
AI.motivation: 现有迭代自精炼方法在代码模式工具使用中的可靠性受限于反馈信号结构：非结构化批判效果不稳定，即使使用真实执行反馈改进也有限（0.75 vs 0.65基线）。主要失败模式是工具间合约违反（输出形状错误、工具路由错误、参数来源断裂），这些问题能运行完成而不报错，使得运行时反馈不足。
AI.method: RubricRefine是一个无需训练的预执行可靠性层：首先生成任务和注册表特定的评估标准，然后对候选代码进行显式合约检查并评分，最后在代码执行前迭代修复检测到的失败。
AI.result: 在M3ToolEval上，跨7个模型平均得分0.86，优于所有先前的推理时基线；延迟比最强非迭代替代方法低2.6倍；在主要单步的API-Bank上性能持平；进行了评估标准类别消融和校准分析以进一步表征方法的工作条件与原因。
AI.conclusion: RubricRefine通过预执行的合约检查与迭代修复有效解决了工具间合约违反问题，显著提升了代码模式工具使用的可靠性，且计算效率更高。该方法的效果依赖于工具间合约结构的存在。

title: CALYREX: Cross-Attention LaYeR EXtended Transformers for System Prompt Anchoring
summary: Modern large language models (LLMs) rely on system prompts to establish behavioral constraints and safety rules. Standard causal self-attention treats privileged instructions and untrusted user content with equal structural priority -- a mismatch that leaves models vulnerable to prompt injection and instruction erosion over extended contexts. We propose CALYREX (Cross-Attention LaYeR EXtended transformers), which utilizes cross-attention between input and system prompt to structurally isolate and anchor the rule. A placement ablation on a 1.5B backbone identifies insertion at the final eighth of layers as optimal, confirmed by mechanistic activation analysis showing behavioral constraints are naturally concentrated there. At 8B scale, controlling for training data, backbone, and parameter budget, CALYREX yields $+7.4\%$ on instruction-following (IFEval) and $+16.3\%$ on multi-turn instruction adherence, while reducing many-shot jailbreaking attack success rate by $13\%$. This advantage appears to widen with model scale, consistent with larger models more effectively utilizing the dedicated routing pathway.

AI.tldr: CALYREX 通过交叉注意力机制将系统提示与用户输入在结构上隔离，在1.5B和8B规模上分别提升了指令遵循和多轮对话保持能力，同时降低越狱攻击成功率，且优势随模型规模扩大而增加。
AI.motivation: 标准因果自注意力将特权指令（系统提示）与不可信的用户内容赋予相同的结构优先级，导致模型易受提示注入攻击，且随上下文增长出现指令衰退问题。
AI.method: 提出 CALYREX（Cross-Attention LaYeR EXtended transformers），在输入与系统提示之间引入交叉注意力机制，实现规则的结构性隔离与锚定。通过消融实验确定最优插入位置为最后八分之一层，并利用机制激活分析验证行为约束自然集中于该区域。
AI.result: 在1.5B骨干网络上进行位置消融，确认最优插入位置为最后八分之一层。在8B规模下，控制训练数据、骨干网络和参数预算，IFEval指令遵循提升+7.4%，多轮指令保持提升+16.3%，多次射击越狱攻击成功率降低13%。该优势随模型规模扩大而增加。
AI.conclusion: CALYREX通过结构分离系统提示与用户输入有效缓解了提示注入和指令衰退问题，效果随模型规模扩大而增强，表明更大模型能更充分利用专用路由路径。

title: TIDES: Implicit Time-Awareness in Selective State Space Models
summary: Selective state space models (SSMs), such as Mamba, achieve strong per-token expressivity by making the time discretization step $\TildeΔ$ a learned function of the input. However, in doing so, $\TildeΔ$ ceases to represent a physical sampling interval, limiting its irregular time series modeling capability. Continuous-time SSMs, such as S5, preserve the physical meaning of $\TildeΔ$ and handle irregular timestamps natively ($\TildeΔ\equivΔ)$, but their dynamics remain linear time-invariant (LTI), limiting per-token expressivity. We propose \textbf{TIDES}, a selective SSM variant that reconciles selective and continuous architectures by moving input-dependence off the step size and onto the diagonal state matrix. As a result, $\TildeΔ$ retains its physical meaning, tied to the state discretization, allowing the model to handle irregular timestamps natively without sacrificing the per-token expressivity that makes selective SSMs effective. We show this on a novel \emph{Fading Flash} experimental benchmark, a compact controlled diagnostic for sequence models that jointly tests input-dependence and extrapolation to out-of-distribution $Δ$ values, and isolates the distinct failure modes of current state-of-the-art architectures that TIDES avoids by construction. On large-scale benchmarks, TIDES sets the new state-of-the-art average rank on UEA time-series classification and the Physiome-ODE regression benchmark. Code available at: https://github.com/TaylanSoydan/TIDES.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TIDES，一种新型选择性状态空间模型，通过将输入依赖性从步长参数转移到对角状态矩阵，在保留物理采样间隔意义的同时实现了输入依赖的表达能力，在UEA时间序列分类和Physiome-ODE回归基准上取得了新的最优结果。
AI.motivation: 现有选择性SSM（如Mamba）因将时间离散化步长$\tilde{\Delta}$设为输入的学函数，失去了物理采样间隔的意义，难以处理不规则时间序列；而连续SSM（如S5）虽保留$\tilde{\Delta}$的物理意义，但动力学保持线性时不变（LTI），限制了每个token的表达能力。TIDES旨在调和这两类架构的矛盾。
AI.method: TIDES将输入依赖性从步长$\tilde{\Delta}$转移到对角状态矩阵上，使$\tilde{\Delta}$保留其物理意义（与状态离散化绑定），从而在不牺牲选择性SSM表达能力的条件下，原生支持不规则时间戳处理。
AI.result: 在Fading Flash诊断基准上验证了TIDES避免了现有架构的失败模式；在UEA时间序列分类和Physiome-ODE回归基准上取得了新的最优平均排名。
AI.conclusion: TIDES成功调和了选择性SSM与连续时间SSM，在不牺牲输入依赖表达能力的条件下实现了对不规则时间序列的原生支持，并在多个基准上达到SOTA。

title: Entropy-informed Decoding: Adaptive Information-Driven Branching
summary: Large language models (LLMs) achieve remarkable generative performance, yet their output quality is dependent on the decoding strategy. While sampling-based methods (e.g., top-k, nucleus) and search-and-select based methods (e.g., beam search, best-of-n, majority voting) can improve upon greedy decoding, both approaches suffer from limitations: sampling generally commits to a single path, while search often expends excessive computation regardless of task complexity. To address these, we introduce Entropy-informed decoding (EDEN), a plug-and-play, model-agnostic decoding framework that adaptively allocates computation based on the model's own uncertainty, approximating higher-width beam search with fewer expansions. At each generation step, EDEN estimates the entropy of the output token distribution and adjusts the branching factor monotonically with the entropy, expanding more candidates in high-entropy regions and following a greedier path in low-entropy regions, improving token efficiency. Experiments across complex tasks, including mathematical reasoning, code generation, and scientific questions, demonstrate that EDEN consistently improves output quality over existing decoding strategies, achieving better accuracy-expansion trade-offs than fixed-width beam search. By treating next-token selection as a noisy maximisation problem, we prove that branching factors monotone in entropy are guaranteed to find better (i.e. more probable) continuations than any fixed branching factor within the same total expansion budget, and derive explicit regret rates characterising the benefit of the adaptive allocation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EDEN解码框架，根据模型输出分布的熵自适应调整束搜索宽度，在高熵区域扩展更多候选、低熵区域采用贪心路径，在相同计算预算下比固定宽度束搜索取得更好的质量-效率权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有解码策略存在两难：采样方法（如top-k、nucleus）通常只走单一路径，而搜索方法（如束搜索、best-of-n）无论任务复杂度如何都消耗大量计算，缺乏自适应计算分配机制。
AI.method: EDEN在每个生成步计算输出token分布的熵，并根据熵值单调调整分支因子：高熵区域扩更多候选，低熵区域走贪心路径，同时从理论上证明了在相同扩展预算下，熵单调分支因子比固定分支因子能找到更优续接，并给出了显式遗憾率。
AI.result: 在数学推理、代码生成、科学问答等复杂任务上，EDEN在生成质量和计算效率之间取得比现有解码策略（包括固定宽度束搜索）更优的权衡。
AI.conclusion: EDEN是一种即插即用且模型无关的解码框架，通过自适应计算分配有效提升输出质量，理论分析也证明了其优越性。

title: Sequential Feature Selection for Efficient Landslide Segmentation from Multi-Spectral Data
comment: In Process of Submission to Frontiers in Remote Sensing. Keywords: landslide segmentation, multispectral remote sensing, feature selection, explainability, Landslide4Sense
summary: Landslide detection from satellite imagery has advanced through deep learning, yet most models rely on large, highly correlated spectral-topographic inputs whose contributions remain poorly understood. The question of which channels are actually necessary has received surprisingly little attention. This matters: redundant or correlated inputs obscure physical interpretability, inflate computational overhead, and can actively degrade model performance through the Hughes Phenomenon. We present a systematic, explainable channel-selection framework for the Landslide4Sense benchmark, combining Sentinel-2 multispectral and ALOS PALSAR terrain data with 16 engineered spectral and structural indices. Rather than relying on conventional single-band drop tests, which evaluate channels in isolation and miss interaction effects, we apply Sequential Forward Floating Selection (SFFS) to iteratively build and prune a candidate feature pool using a lightweight U-Net++ proxy model. Beyond identifying a compact 8-channel subset that matches or exceeds the segmentation F1 of configurations using up to 30 channels, we use the selection process itself to interrogate which spectral and topographic features landslide models genuinely rely on, and what this reveals about the physical cues driving their predictions. We argue that SFFS represents a principled feature selection approach to input design in Earth observation, in contrast to the prevailing practice of appending every available band and hoping the model learns what to ignore.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于SFFS的可解释通道选择框架，在Landslide4Sense基准上从30个通道中筛选出8个关键通道，在保持或提升滑坡分割性能的同时揭示了模型真正依赖的物理特征。
AI.motivation: 现有滑坡检测模型通常堆叠大量光谱-地形输入通道，但各通道的实际贡献尚不明确。冗余或高度相关的输入不仅模糊物理可解释性、增加计算开销，还可能因Hughes现象降低模型性能。系统性地研究哪些通道真正必要这一问题尚未得到充分关注。
AI.method: 采用Sequential Forward Floating Selection (SFFS)算法，结合轻量级U-Net++代理模型，在Landslide4Sense基准上对Sentinel-2多光谱、ALOS PALSAR地形数据及16个工程化光谱与结构指数构成的候选特征池进行迭代构建与剪枝，最终筛选出紧凑的8通道子集。
AI.result: 筛选出的8通道子集在分割F1分数上匹配甚至超越了使用多达30个通道的配置。同时，选择过程本身揭示了对滑坡预测真正关键的谱段与地形特征，阐明了驱动模型预测的物理线索。
AI.conclusion: SFFS是一种适用于地球观测输入设计的、有原则的特征选择方法，优于当前“堆叠所有可用波段、指望模型自行忽略冗余”的通行做法。

title: WISTERIA: Learning Clinical Representations from Noisy Supervision via Multi-View Consistency in Electronic Health Records
summary: Representation learning in electronic health records (EHR) has largely followed paradigms inherited from natural language processing, relying on sequence modeling and reconstruction based objectives that treat clinical labels as ground truth. However, real world clinical supervision is inherently weak, arising from heterogeneous, noisy, and institution specific labeling processes such as billing codes, heuristic phenotypes, and incomplete annotations. In this work, we propose WISTERIA, a weakly supervised representation learning framework that models labels as stochastic observations of an underlying latent clinical state. Instead of optimizing against a single supervision signal, WISTERIA constructs multiple weak supervision operators and learns representations by enforcing consistency across their induced label distributions. This multi view formulation induces an implicit denoising mechanism, allowing the model to recover clinically meaningful structure by reconciling disagreement between noisy labelers. We further incorporate ontology aware regularization in the label space to impose semantic structure over supervision signals. Empirically, WISTERIA improves predictive performance across standard EHR benchmarks, demonstrates strong robustness to label noise, and exhibits superior cross institutional generalization compared to sequence based pretraining objectives. These results suggest that explicitly modeling the supervision process rather than treating labels as fixed targets provides a more appropriate inductive bias for learning robust and clinically meaningful representations from EHR data.

AI.tldr: 提出WISTERIA框架，通过将临床标签建模为潜在状态的弱监督观测，利用多视角一致性学习与本体感知正则化，在EHR表示学习中实现对标签噪声的鲁棒性和跨机构泛化能力的提升。
