AI.tldr: 本文通过多目标优化框架研究二元预测决策中的公平性，发现帕累托前沿由确定性、组特定的阈值规则构成，可能包含上界或下界阈值规则，且该前沿仅依赖于总体特征、效用函数和公平性评分，而非算法技术设计。
AI.motivation: 公平算法决策需要在模型性能与公平性之间权衡，但可能的权衡空间尚不明确。本文旨在系统理解这一权衡空间，连接形式化的公平性研究与法律伦理要求。
AI.method: 将决策制定概念化为同时考虑决策者效用和群体公平性的多目标优化问题，研究帕累托最优决策规则集。
AI.result: 帕累托前沿由确定性、组特定的阈值规则构成，可能包含上界阈值规则（偏好成功概率更低的个体）。前沿位置仅依赖总体特征、效用函数和公平性评分，不依赖算法技术设计（预处理、处理中、后处理方法均适用）。
AI.conclusion: 结果推广了公平约束分类的最优性定理，将其扩展到广义公平性度量和原则以及部分公平制度，为评估和比较算法决策系统提供理论基础。

title: Nearly-Optimal Algorithm for Adversarial Kernelized Bandits
summary: This paper studies kernelized bandits (also known as Gaussian process bandits) in an adversarial environment, where the reward functions in a known reproducing kernel Hilbert space (RKHS) may be adversarially chosen at each round. We show that the exponential-weight algorithm achieves $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T γ_T})$ adversarial regret, where $T$ and $γ_T$ denote the number of total rounds and the maximum information gain, respectively. For squared exponential (SE) and $ν$-Matérn kernels, we also show algorithm-independent lower bounds that guarantee the optimality of our algorithm up to polylogarithmic factors. Furthermore, we present a computationally efficient variant of our algorithm using Nyström approximation while maintaining nearly optimal regret guarantees.

AI.tldr: 本文研究对抗性环境下再生核希尔伯特空间中的核化老虎机问题，提出指数权重算法实现了$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T γ_T})$的对抗性遗憾界，并在SE和Matérn核下证明了算法无关的下界以确认最优性，同时利用Nyström近似给出了计算高效变体。
AI.motivation: 现有核化老虎机（高斯过程老虎机）研究多假设奖励函数具有随机性或与上下文相关，但实际场景中奖励可能被对手恶意选择，缺乏对抗性环境下的理论保证。
AI.method: 采用指数权重算法（exponential-weight algorithm）对抗自适应选择的奖励函数；利用Nyström近似对核矩阵进行低秩近似以降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 1) 指数权重算法达到$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T γ_T})$的对抗遗憾界；2) 对SE核和ν-Matérn核，给出算法无关下界，证明算法在多项式对数因子内最优；3) Nyström近似变体保持近最优遗憾，但计算效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 指数权重算法在对抗性核化老虎机问题中实现了近乎最优的遗憾界，且可通过Nyström近似实现高效计算，填补了对抗性环境下核化老虎机理论研究的空白。

title: Follow the Mean: Reference-Guided Flow Matching
summary: Existing approaches to controllable generation typically rely on fine-tuning, auxiliary networks, or test-time search. We show that flow matching admits a different control interface: adaptation through examples. For deterministic interpolants, the velocity field is solely governed by a conditional endpoint mean; shifting this mean shifts the flow itself. This yields a simple principle for controllable generation: steer a pretrained model by changing the reference set it follows. We instantiate this idea in two forms. Reference-Mean Guidance is training-free: it computes a closed-form endpoint-mean correction from a reference bank and applies it to a frozen FLUX.2-klein (4B) model, enabling control of color, identity, style, and structure while keeping the prompt, seed, and weights fixed. Semi-Parametric Guidance amortizes the same idea through an explicit mean anchor and learned residual refiner, matching unconditional DiT-B/4 quality on AFHQv2 while allowing the reference set to be swapped at inference time. These results point to a broader direction: generative models that adapt through data, not parameter updates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于流匹配的可控生成方法，通过改变参考集（即条件端点均值）来引导预训练模型生成，无需微调或辅助网络。具体包括两种实现：Reference-Mean Guidance（训练免费，直接计算均值校正）和Semi-Parametric Guidance（通过显式均值锚点和学习残差精化器），在颜色、身份、风格和结构控制上效果显著。
AI.motivation: 现有可控生成方法依赖微调、辅助网络或测试时搜索，缺乏更简洁的调控接口。作者发现确定性流匹配中速度场仅由条件端点均值决定，因此提出通过改变参考集来引导生成，实现数据驱动而非参数更新的可控生成范式。
AI.method: 基于理论推导：流匹配的速度场由条件端点均值唯一决定，改变该均值即可改变流场。提出两种实例化：(1) Reference-Mean Guidance：从参考集中计算闭式端点均值校正，直接应用于冻结的FLUX.2-klein (4B)模型，无需训练；(2) Semi-Parametric Guidance：通过显式均值锚点加学习残差精化器，在AFHQv2上达到无条件DiT-B/4质量，同时推理时可切换参考集。
AI.result: Reference-Mean Guidance在冻结4B模型上实现对颜色、身份、风格和结构的有效控制，且保持提示词、随机种子和权重不变；Semi-Parametric Guidance在AFHQv2上匹配无条件DiT-B/4的生成质量，支持推理时灵活切换参考集。
AI.conclusion: 流匹配提供了一种通过数据（参考集）而非参数更新来适配生成模型的新范式，为可控生成开辟了“自适应数据”的简洁方向。

title: Active Learning for Gaussian Process Regression Under Self-Induced Boltzmann Weights
summary:
We consider the active learning problem where the goal is to learn an unknown function with low prediction error under an unknown Boltzmann distribution induced by the function itself. This self-induced weighting arises naturally in problems such as potential energy surface (PES) modeling in computational chemistry,
  yet poses unique challenges as the target distribution is unknown and its partition function is intractable. We propose \texttt{AB-SID-iVAR}, a Gaussian Process-based acquisition function that approximates the intractable Bayesian target distribution in closed form while avoiding partition function estimation, and is applicable to both discrete and continuous input domains. We also analyze a Thompson sampling alternative (\texttt{TS-SID-iVAR}) as a higher variance Monte Carlo variant. Despite the unknown target, under mild conditions, we establish that the terminal prediction error vanishes with high probability, and provide a tighter average-case guarantee. We demonstrate consistent improvements over existing approaches in this setting on synthetic benchmarks and real-world PES modeling and drug discovery tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高斯过程的主动学习方法 AB-SID-iVAR，用于在未知玻尔兹曼分布（由函数自身诱导）下学习未知函数，避免了配分函数估计，并在理论保证和实际任务（势能面建模、药物发现）中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 在计算化学等领域的势能面建模中，目标分布由函数自身诱导的玻尔兹曼分布决定，该分布未知且配分函数难以计算，传统主动学习方法无法直接适用，因此需要一种能处理这种自诱导加权分布的主动学习方法。
AI.method: 提出 AB-SID-iVAR（基于高斯过程的采集函数），以闭式近似逼近难以处理的贝叶斯目标分布，避免配分函数估计；同时提出 TS-SID-iVAR（汤普森采样变体）作为高方差蒙特卡洛替代方案。方法适用于离散和连续输入域。
AI.result: 在温和条件下，证明了终态预测误差以高概率趋于零，并提供了更紧的平均情况保证。在合成基准、真实势能面建模和药物发现任务上，该方法一致优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: AB-SID-iVAR 能有效处理自诱导加权分布下的主动学习问题，兼具理论保证和实际性能优势，适用于计算化学和药物发现等应用场景。

title: Signature Approach for Contextual Bandits with Nonlinear and Path-dependent Rewards
summary: We study contextual bandits with nonlinear and path-dependent rewards through a novel signature-transform-based approach. Leveraging the universal nonlinearity property of signatures, we approximate continuous path-dependent reward functionals by linear functionals in the signature space. This representation enables the use of efficient linear contextual bandit methods while preserving expressive sequential structure. Building on this framework, we propose \texttt{DisSigUCB}, a signature-based disjoint upper confidence bound (UCB) algorithm. Under boundedness and non-degeneracy assumptions, we prove a high-probability data-dependent sublinear regret bound of order \(\tilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{(d+m)KT})\) where \(d\) is the context dimension and \(m\) is the signature feature dimension. Synthetic experiments and numerical applications on temperature sensor monitoring, sleep-stage classification, and hospital nurse staffing demonstrate that \texttt{DisSigUCB} consistently outperforms classical linear and kernelized contextual bandit baselines in nonlinear and path-dependent settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DisSigUCB算法，利用签名变换将非线性路径依赖的奖励函数线性化，在上下文赌博机中实现高效的学习，并证明了次线性遗憾界，实验显示优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 传统上下文赌博机假设奖励是上下文线性或核化的函数，无法有效处理路径依赖和非线性奖励结构，而现实场景（如传感器数据、睡眠分期）中奖励往往依赖于历史路径。
AI.method: 利用签名变换的通用非线性逼近性质，将连续路径依赖的奖励泛函近似为签名空间中的线性泛函，从而将非线性问题转化为线性上下文赌博机问题，并设计DisSigUCB算法（基于不相交上置信界）。
AI.result: 在合成数据和三个真实应用（温度传感器监测、睡眠分期分类、医院护士排班）中，DisSigUCB持续优于线性UCB和核化UCB等基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 签名变换提供了一种将路径依赖的序列奖励结构融入上下文赌博机的有效途径，实现了理论保证与实用性能的双重优势。

title: Step Rejection Fine-Tuning: A Practical Distillation Recipe
summary: Rejection Fine-Tuning (RFT) is a standard method for training LLM agents, where unsuccessful trajectories are discarded from the training set. In the context of SWE-bench tasks, this corresponds to filtering out runs where the submitted patch does not pass the tests. However, this approach discards unresolved trajectories, even though they form a large portion of all trajectories for hard tasks and even then may be partially correct. In this work, we propose Step Rejection Fine-Tuning (SRFT) - a practical way to leverage these unresolved trajectories. For this, we employ a critic LLM to assess the correctness of each step in a trajectory. Consequently, during training, we mask the loss for erroneous steps while retaining them in the context window. This way we ensure the model learns to recover from errors without reproducing them. Evaluation on SWE-bench Verified shows that while RFT improves the resolution rate by 2.4% by excluding unresolved trajectories, SRFT improves it by 3.7% by filtering them instead of discarding completely, reaching the total resolution rate of 32.2%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Step Rejection Fine-Tuning (SRFT)，通过批评者LLM评估轨迹中每一步的正确性，仅对错误步骤进行损失掩码而非丢弃整个失败轨迹，在SWE-bench Verified上将解决率提升至32.2%（相比RFT的2.4%提升，SRFT提升3.7%）。
AI.motivation: 标准RFT方法在训练LLM智能体时直接丢弃未成功轨迹，但困难任务中大量轨迹虽未完全正确却包含部分正确步骤，这些信息被浪费了。
AI.method: 利用批评者LLM评估轨迹中每一步的正确性，在训练时对错误步骤进行损失掩码（loss masking），将错误步骤保留在上下文窗口中但不计算其损失，使模型学习从错误中恢复而非复现错误。
AI.result: 在SWE-bench Verified上，RFT提升解决率2.4%，SRFT提升3.7%，最终解决率达32.2%。
AI.conclusion: 通过保留并利用部分正确的失败轨迹，SRFT比完全丢弃未成功轨迹的RFT更有效，提升了LLM智能体在代码修复任务中的表现。

title: Is Data Shapley Not Better than Random in Data Selection? Ask NASH
comment: Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML-26) as a Spotlight paper
summary: Data selection studies the problem of identifying high-quality subsets of training data. While some existing works have considered selecting the subset of data with top-$m$ Data Shapley or other semivalues as they account for the interaction among every subset of data, other works argue that Data Shapley can sometimes perform ineffectively in practice and select subsets that are no better than random. This raises the questions: (I) Are there certain "Shapley-informative" settings where Data Shapley consistently works well? (II) Can we strategically utilize these settings to select high-quality subsets consistently and efficiently? In this paper, we propose a novel data selection framework, NASH (Non-linear Aggregation of SHapley-informative components), which (I) decomposes the target utility function (e.g., validation accuracy) into simpler, Shapley-informative component functions, and selects data by optimizing an objective that (II) aggregates these components non-linearly. We demonstrate that NASH substantially boosts the effectiveness of Shapley/semivalue-based data selection with minimal additional runtime cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NASH框架，通过将目标效用函数分解为Shapley信息性组件并非线性聚合，显著提升了基于Shapley/semivalue的数据选择效果，且仅需极小额外计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明Data Shapley在某些场景下效果不佳甚至不如随机选择，这引出了两个核心问题：(I)是否存在Shapley信息性设置使得Data Shapley始终有效？(II)能否策略性利用这些设置来一致且高效地选择高质量子集？
AI.method: 提出NASH框架，包含两个关键步骤：(I)将目标效用函数分解为更简单的Shapley信息性组件函数；(II)通过非线性聚合这些组件来优化数据选择目标。
AI.result: NASH框架显著提升了基于Shapley/semivalue的数据选择有效性，且额外运行成本极小。
AI.conclusion: 通过分解与非线性聚合策略，NASH成功解决了Data Shapley在某些场景下失效的问题，实现了高效、一致的数据选择。

title: Provable Sparse Inversion and Token Relabel Enhanced One-shot Federated Learning with ViTs
summary: One-Shot Federated Learning, where a central server learns a global model in a single communication round, has emerged as a promising paradigm. However, under extremely non-IID settings, existing data-free methods often generate low-quality data that suffers from severe semantic misalignment with ground-truth labels. To overcome these issues, we propose a novel Federated Model Inversion and Token Relabel (FedMITR) framework, which trains the global model by fully exploiting all patches of synthetic images. Specifically, FedMITR employs sparse model inversion during data generation, selectively inverting semantic foregrounds while halting the inversion of uninformative backgrounds. To address semantically meaningless tokens that hinder ViT predictions, we implement a differentiated strategy: patches with high information density utilize generated pseudo-labels, while patches with low information density are relabeled via ensemble models for robust distillation. Theoretically, our analysis based on algorithmic stability reveals that Sparse Model Inversion eliminates gradient instability arising from background noise, while Token Relabel effectively reduces gradient variance, collectively guaranteeing a tighter generalization bound. Empirically, extensive experimental results demonstrate that FedMITR substantially outperforms existing baselines under various settings.

AI.tldr: 提出FedMITR框架，通过稀疏模型反转和令牌重标记方法解决单轮联邦学习在极端非IID场景下的语义对齐问题，在单轮通信中实现更优的全局模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数据无关方法在极端非IID联邦学习场景下生成的低质量数据存在严重的语义错位问题（生成图像语义与真实标签不匹配），导致全局模型性能受限。
AI.method: 1) 稀疏模型反转：在数据生成阶段选择性反转语义前景，停止反转无信息背景；2) 令牌重标记：对高信息密度补丁使用生成伪标签，低信息密度补丁通过集成模型重新标记；3) 理论基础：基于算法稳定性分析证明稀疏模型反转消除背景噪声导致的梯度不稳定性，令牌重标记降低梯度方差，共同保证更紧的泛化界。
AI.result: 在多种设置下的广泛实验表明，FedMITR显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过充分利用合成图像的所有补丁信息，FedMITR有效解决了非IID联邦学习中的语义错位问题，为单轮联邦学习提供了更优的解决方案。

title: The Last Word Often Wins: A Format Confound in Chain-of-Thought Corruption Studies
comment: 34 pages, 6 figures, 13 tables. Submitted to NeurIPS 2026. Code and data: https://github.com/Gpgabriel25/LastWordWinsCoT
summary:
Corruption studies, the primary tool for evaluating chain-of-thought (CoT) faithfulness, identify which chain positions are "computationally important" by measuring accuracy when steps are replaced with errors. We identify a systematic confound: for chains with explicit terminal answer statements, the dominant format in standard benchmarks, corruption studies detect where the answer text appears, not where computation occurs.
  A within-dataset format ablation provides the key evidence: on standard GSM8K chains ending with "the answer is X," removing only the answer statement, preserving all reasoning, collapses suffix sensitivity ~19x at 3B (N=300, p=0.022). Conflicting-answer experiments quantify the causal mechanism: at 7B, CC accuracy drops to near-zero (<=0.02) across five architecture families; the followed-wrong rate spans 0.63-1.00 at 3B-7B and attenuates at larger scales (0.300 at Phi-4-14B, ~0.01 at 32B). A within-stable 7B replication (9.3x attenuation, N=76, p=7.8e-3; Qwen3-8B N=299, p=0.004) provides converging evidence, and the pattern replicates on MATH (DeepSeek-R1-7B: 10.9x suffix-survival recovery). On chains without answer suffixes the same protocol identifies the prefix as load-bearing (Delta=-0.77, p<10^-12).
  Generation-time probes confirm a dissociation: the answer is not early-determined during generation (early commitment <5%), yet at consumption time model outputs systematically follow the explicit answer text. The format-determination effect persists through 14B (8.5x ratio, p=0.001) and converges toward zero at 32B. We propose a three-prerequisite protocol (question-only control, format characterization, all-position sweep) as a minimum standard for corruption-based faithfulness studies.

AI.tldr: 本文发现用于评估思维链（CoT）忠实性的腐败研究存在系统性混淆：对于包含显式答案陈述的链，此类方法检测到的是答案文本出现的位置，而非实际计算发生的位置。通过格式消融、冲突答案实验和生成时间探测，作者证明了模型输出在消费时间上系统地跟随显式答案文本，并提出三前提协议作为腐败忠实性研究的最低标准。
AI.motivation: 揭示当前腐败研究方法中存在的系统性混淆——当思维链包含显式终点答案陈述时，该方法检测的是答案文本位置而非计算位置，从而质疑现有CoT忠实性评估的有效性。
AI.method: 采用三种互补实验：(1) 格式消融实验：移除GSM8K链中仅包含答案声明的语句；(2) 冲突答案实验：在不同规模（3B-32B）和架构族中测量CC准确率和跟随错误率；(3) 生成时间探测：分析生成过程中答案是否早期确定。在GSM8K和MATH两个基准数据集上验证。
AI.result: 格式消融使后缀敏感性下降约19倍（3B）；冲突答案实验中7B模型的CC准确率降至接近零（<=0.02），跟随错误率在3B-7B为0.63-1.00，到32B衰减至约0.01；生成时间探测显示早期承诺率<5%，但消费时间模型输出系统性地跟随显式答案文本。模式在MATH数据集上复现（10.9倍后缀存活恢复）。
AI.conclusion: 腐败研究检测到的是答案文本位置而非计算位置，这严重混淆了CoT忠实性评估。提出三前提协议（仅问题控制、格式表征、全位置扫描）作为腐败忠实性研究的最低标准。

title: Foundations of Reliable Inference: Reliability-Efficiency Co-Design
summary: Reliable inference requires that artificial intelligence (AI) models provide trustworthy uncertainty estimates, not merely accurate predictions. Recent advances in Bayesian learning have made significant progress toward this goal, and growing concerns about computational overhead have jointly shifted the design criterion from reliability alone to the co-design of reliability and efficiency, i.e., reducing computational overhead while preserving trustworthy uncertainty quantification. This thesis develops a unified framework from two perspectives to address the central question: can we efficiently perform reliable inference?

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何在降低计算开销的同时，实现具备可信不确定性量化的可靠推理，提出了一个统一框架。
AI.motivation: 可靠的推理不仅需要准确的预测，还需要可信的不确定性估计。然而，贝叶斯学习的计算开销较大，需要在可靠性与效率之间进行协同设计。
AI.method: 本文从一个统一框架出发，从两个视角（具体视角未在摘要中详述）来回答“能否高效地进行可靠推理”这一核心问题。
AI.result: 提出了一种兼顾可靠性与效率的协同设计框架，在降低计算开销的同时保持了可信的不确定性量化。
AI.conclusion: 在贝叶斯学习领域，可靠性与效率可以协同设计，实现高效且可靠的推理。

title: DeepLévy: Learning Heavy-Tailed Uncertainty in Highly Volatile Time Series
summary: Modeling uncertainty in heavy-tailed time series remains a critical challenge for deep probabilistic forecasting models, which often struggle to capture abrupt, extreme events. While Lévy stable distributions offer a natural framework for modeling such non-Gaussian behaviors, the intractability of their probability density functions severely limits conventional likelihood-based inference. To address this, we introduce DeepLévy, a neural framework that learns mixtures of Lévy stable distributions by minimizing the discrepancy between empirical and parametric characteristic functions. DeepLévy incorporates a mixture mechanism that adaptively learns context-dependent weights and parameters over multiple Lévy components, enabling flexible multi-horizon uncertainty modeling. Evaluations on both real and synthetic datasets demonstrate that DeepLévy outperforms state-of-the-art deep probabilistic forecasting approaches in tail risk metrics, especially under extreme volatility.

AI.tldr: 提出DeepLévy框架，通过最小化经验特征函数与参数特征函数的差异来学习莱维稳定分布的混合模型，有效捕捉重尾时间序列中的极端事件，在尾部风险指标上超越现有深度概率预测方法。
AI.motivation: 深度概率预测模型在捕捉重尾时间序列中的突然极端事件方面表现不佳，而莱维稳定分布虽适合建模非高斯行为，但其概率密度函数难以处理，限制了基于似然的推理方法。
AI.method: DeepLévy通过最小化经验特征函数与参数特征函数之间的差异来学习多个莱维稳定成分的混合分布，并引入自适应学习上下文相关权重和参数的混合机制，实现灵活的多步预测不确定性建模。
AI.result: 在真实和合成数据集上的评估表明，DeepLévy在尾部风险指标上优于现有深度概率预测方法，特别是在极端波动情况下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: DeepLévy通过特征函数匹配有效解决了莱维稳定分布推理难题，为重尾时间序列的不确定性建模提供了高效且鲁棒的深度学习解决方案。

title: Policy Gradient Methods for Non-Markovian Reinforcement Learning
summary: We study policy gradient methods for reinforcement learning in non-Markovian decision processes (NMDPs), where observations and rewards depend on the entire interaction history. To handle this dependence, the agent maintains an internal state that is recursively updated to provide a compact summary of past observations and actions. In contrast to approaches that treat the agent state dynamics as fixed or learn it via predictive objectives, we propose a reward-centric formulation that jointly optimizes the agent state dynamics and the control policy to maximize the expected cumulative reward. To this end, we consider a class of Agent State-Markov (ASM) policies, comprising an agent state dynamics and a control policy that maps the agent state to actions. We establish a novel policy gradient theorem for ASM policies, extending the classical policy gradient results from the Markovian setting to episodic and infinite-horizon discounted NMDPs. Building on this gradient expression, we propose the Agent State-Markov Policy Gradient (ASMPG) algorithm, which leverages the recursive structure of the agent state dynamics for efficient optimization. We establish finite-time and almost sure convergence guarantees, and empirically demonstrate that, on a range of non-Markovian tasks, ASMPG outperforms baselines that learn state representations via predictive objectives.

AI.tldr: 本文针对非马尔可夫决策过程（NMDP）中的策略梯度方法，提出了一种奖励中心化的联合优化方法（ASMPG），同时学习智能体状态动力学和控制策略，并证明了策略梯度定理、收敛性保证，实验表明优于基于预测目标学习状态表示的基线方法。
AI.motivation: 在非马尔可夫决策过程中，观测和奖励依赖于整个交互历史，传统方法要么将智能体状态动力学固定，要么通过预测目标学习，未考虑奖励信号的直接优化，因此需要一种奖励中心化的联合优化方法来最大化期望累积奖励。
AI.method: 提出Agent State-Markov (ASM)策略类，包含可学习的智能体状态动力学和控制策略；推导ASM策略的策略梯度定理；基于梯度表达式提出ASMPG算法，利用状态动力学的递归结构进行高效优化；给出有限时间和几乎必然收敛性证明。
AI.result: 在多个非马尔可夫任务上，ASMPG算法在性能上优于基于预测目标学习状态表示的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文为部分可观测/非马尔可夫环境中的策略梯度学习提供了理论框架和实用算法，证明了奖励中心化的状态表示学习比预测目标方法更有效。

title: PC3D: Zero-Shot Cooperation Across Variable Rosters via Personalized Context Distillation
summary: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning often assumes a fixed execution team, yet many decentralized systems must operate with varying numbers of active agents during deployment. We study this setting under episodic roster variation: each episode is executed by a set of homogeneous agents, with the team size varying across episodes. Agents act only from local histories, without execution-time communication, privileged coordinators, or online retraining. Therefore, effective cooperation requires each agent to recover relevant context about the active team and adapt its behavior accordingly. To this end, we propose PC3D (Personalized Central Coordination Context Distillation), a method for training decentralized policies to recover and use personalized coordination context from local interaction histories. During training, a set-structured centralized teacher compresses the active team into coordination tokens and personalizes them into agent-specific contexts, which are distilled into decentralized policies. At execution, each agent predicts its own context from local history and adaptively uses it to condition decision-making. Across three cooperative MARL benchmarks, PC3D achieves higher returns than the evaluated baselines with both seen and unseen roster sizes, and ablations attribute these gains to both context distillation and adaptive context use.

AI.tldr: 提出PC3D方法，通过集中式教师蒸馏个性化协调上下文到分布式策略，使同质智能体能在变规模团队协作中从局部历史恢复协调上下文，实现自适应决策。
AI.motivation: 现有合作多智能体强化学习常假设固定执行团队，但实际去中心化系统部署时活跃智能体数量会动态变化，需要智能体在没有通信、特权协调器或在线重训练的情况下适应变规模团队协作。
AI.method: PC3D：训练阶段，集值结构的集中式教师将活跃团队压缩为协调令牌，个性化生成智能体特定上下文，并蒸馏到分布式策略中；执行阶段，每个智能体从局部历史预测自己的上下文，并自适应地用于条件决策。
AI.result: 在三个合作MARL基准上，PC3D在已见和未见团队规模下均取得优于基线方法的回报，消融实验证实上下文蒸馏和自适应上下文使用均有贡献。
AI.conclusion: PC3D通过集中式教师蒸馏个性化协调上下文，有效解决了变规模团队协作问题，使分布式智能体能从局部历史恢复并自适应使用协调上下文。

title: SLIM: Sparse Latent Steering for Interpretable and Property-Directed LLM-Based Molecular Editing
summary: Large language models possess strong chemical reasoning capabilities, making them effective molecular editors. However, property-relevant information is implicitly entangled across their dense hidden states, providing no explicit handle for property control: a substantial fraction of edits fail to improve or even degrade target properties. To address these issues, we propose SLIM (Sparse Latent Interpretable Molecular editing), a plug-and-play framework that decomposes the editor's hidden states into sparse, property-aligned features via a Sparse Autoencoder with learnable importance gates. Steering in this sparse feature space precisely activates property-relevant dimensions, improving editing success rate without modifying model parameters. The same sparse basis further supports interpretable analysis of editing behavior. Experiments on the MolEditRL benchmark across four model architectures and eight molecular properties show consistent gains over baselines, with improvements of up to 42.4 points.

AI.tldr: 提出SLIM框架，通过稀疏自编码器将分子编辑器的隐藏状态分解为属性对齐的稀疏特征，实现无需修改模型参数的可控分子编辑，在MolEditRL基准上提升高达42.4个百分点。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型作为分子编辑器时，属性相关信息隐式纠缠在密集隐藏状态中，缺乏显式的属性控制手段，导致大量编辑操作无法改善甚至降低目标属性。
AI.method: 提出SLIM框架，采用带可学习重要性门控的稀疏自编码器，将编辑器的隐藏状态分解为稀疏、属性对齐的特征，通过在该稀疏特征空间中进行引导来精确激活属性相关维度。
AI.result: 在MolEditRL基准上，覆盖四种模型架构和八种分子属性，相较于基线方法取得一致提升，最高提升42.4个百分点。
AI.conclusion: SLIM作为一种即插即用框架，在不修改模型参数的前提下有效提升了分子编辑的成功率，同时稀疏基座支持编辑行为的可解释分析。

title: The Polynomial Counting Capabilities of Message Passing Neural Networks
summary: The counting power of Message Passing Neural Networks (MPNN) has been the subject of many recent papers, showing that they can express logic that involves counting up to a threshold or more generally satisfy a linear arithmetic constraint. In this paper, we study the counting capabilities of MPNN beyond linear arithmetic, primarily utilising local and global mean aggregations. In particular, our goal is to tease out conditions required to express extensions of graded modal logic with polynomial counting constraints. We show that global polynomial counting constraints in node-labelled graphs can be checked using mean MPNN under mild assumptions. Checking local constraints is also possible, if we consider formulas with no nested modalities and additionally either (i) permit sum/max aggregations, or (ii) only restrict to regular graphs. We also show how formulas with nested modalities can be captured by mean MPNN over graphs with tree-like structures and similar assumptions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了消息传递神经网络（MPNN）在超越线性算术的计数能力，重点利用局部和全局均值聚合，探讨了在节点标记图中检查带多项式计数约束的模态逻辑所需的条件。
AI.motivation: 现有研究已证明MPNN能够表达涉及阈值计数或线性算术约束的逻辑，但超越线性算术的计数能力尚未被充分探索，特别是在多项式计数约束方面。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，研究均值MPNN在全局和局部多项式计数约束下的表达能力，考虑不同条件（如允许sum/max聚合、限制正则图、树状结构图等）对表达嵌套模态公式的影响。
AI.result: 全局多项式计数约束可在温和假设下通过均值MPNN检查；局部约束在无非嵌套模态条件下可通过添加sum/max聚合或限制正则图实现；嵌套模态公式可在树状结构图及类似假设下被均值MPNN捕获。
AI.conclusion: 均值MPNN在特定条件下能够表达带多项式计数约束的模态逻辑，为理解MPNN的计数能力提供了理论边界。

title: Clin-JEPA: A Multi-Phase Co-Training Framework for Joint-Embedding Predictive Pretraining on EHR Patient Trajectories
summary: We present Clin-JEPA, a multi-phase co-training framework for joint-embedding predictive (JEPA) pretraining on EHR patient trajectories. JEPA architectures have enabled latent-space planning in robotics and high-quality representation learning in vision, but extending the paradigm to EHR data -- to obtain a single backbone that simultaneously forecasts patient trajectories and serves diverse downstream risk-prediction tasks without per-task fine-tuning -- remains an open challenge. Existing JEPA frameworks either discard the predictor after pretraining (I-JEPA, V-JEPA) or train it on a frozen pretrained encoder (V-JEPA 2-AC), leaving the encoder unaware of the rollout signal that the retained predictor must use at inference; co-training the encoder and predictor under a shared JEPA prediction objective would supply this grounding, but naïve co-training is unstable, with representation collapse and online/target drift causing autoregressive rollout to diverge. Clin-JEPA's five-phase pretraining curriculum -- predictor warmup, joint refinement, EMA target alignment, hard sync, and predictor finalization -- addresses each failure mode by phase, stably co-training a Qwen3-8B-based encoder and a 92M-parameter latent trajectory predictor. On MIMIC-IV ICU data, three independent evaluations support the framework: (1) latent $\ell_1$ rollout drift uniquely converges ($-$15.7%) over 48-hour horizons while baselines and ablations diverge (+3% to +4951%); (2) the encoder learns a clinically discriminative latent geometry (deteriorating-patient cohorts displace 4.83$\times$ further than stable patients in latent space, vs $\leq$2.62$\times$ for baseline encoders); (3) a single backbone outperforms strong tabular and sequence baselines on multi-task downstream evaluation. Clin-JEPA achieves mean AUROC 0.851 on ICareFM EEP and 0.883 on 8 binary risk tasks (+0.038 and +0.041 vs baseline average).

AI.tldr: Clin-JEPA 提出了一种多阶段协同训练框架，用于对 EHR 患者轨迹进行联合嵌入预测（JEPA）预训练。该方法通过五阶段课程学习稳定地协同训练 Qwen3-8B 编码器与 92M 参数潜在轨迹预测器，解决 JEPA 在 EHR 领域中的表示崩溃和 rollout 发散问题。在 MIMIC-IV ICU 数据上，该框架实现了潜在 rollout 收敛、临床判别性潜在几何结构学习以及单个骨干网络在多任务下游评估中优于基线（平均 AUROC 0.851/0.883）。
AI.motivation: 现有 JEPA 框架要么在预训练后丢弃预测器（I-JEPA, V-JEPA），要么在冻结的预训练编码器上训练预测器（V-JEPA 2-AC），导致编码器无法感知 rollout 信号，从而限制了预测器在推理时的表现。将编码器和预测器在共享 JEPA 预测目标下协同训练可以提供这种基础，但简单协同训练不稳定，会导致表示崩溃和在线/目标漂移，使自回归 rollout 发散。因此，需要一种能够稳定协同训练编码器和预测器的框架，以获得能同时预测患者轨迹和完成多种下游风险评估任务的单一骨干网络。
AI.method: 提出 Clin-JEPA 五阶段预训练课程：预测器预热（predictor warmup）、联合精化（joint refinement）、EMA 目标对齐（EMA target alignment）、硬同步（hard sync）和预测器最终化（predictor finalization）。每个阶段针对不同的失效模式设计：初始阶段防止表示崩溃，后续阶段对齐在线/目标网络，最后稳定预测器。编码器基于 Qwen3-8B，预测器为 92M 参数的潜在轨迹预测器。
AI.result: 在 MIMIC-IV ICU 数据上取得三项关键结果：(1) 潜在 ℓ₁ rollout 漂移在 48 小时范围内唯一收敛（-15.7%），而基线和消融实验发散（+3% 到 +4951%）；(2) 编码器学习到临床判别性潜在几何结构（恶化患者群体在潜在空间中比稳定患者位移大 4.83 倍，基线编码器 ≤2.62 倍）；(3) 单个骨干网络在多任务下游评估中优于强基线和序列基线，在 ICareFM EEP 上达到平均 AUROC 0.851，在 8 个二元风险任务上达到 0.883（分别比基线均值高 +0.038 和 +0.041）。
AI.conclusion: Clin-JEPA 成功将 JEPA 范式扩展到 EHR 领域，通过精心设计的五阶段课程实现了编码器与预测器的稳定协同训练，证明了在 EHR 轨迹预测和下游风险评估中，一个统一的预训练骨干网络可以同时胜任两项任务，无需针对每个任务进行微调。

title: Causal Explanations from the Geometric Properties of ReLU Neural Networks
comment: 7 pages, 0 figures, Accepted for presentation at the Yorkshire Innovation in Science and Engineering Conference
summary: Neural networks have proved an effective means of learning control policies for autonomous systems, but these learned policies are difficult to understand due to the black-box nature of neural networks. This lack of interpretability makes safety assurance for such autonomous systems challenging. The fields of eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) and eXplainable Reinforcement Learning (XRL) aim to interpret the decision making processes of neural networks and autonomous agents, respectively. In particular, work on causal explanations aims to provide "why" and "why not" explanations for why a model made a given decision. However, most of the work on explainability to date utilises a distilled version of the original model. While this distilled policy is interpretable, it necessarily degrades in performance significantly when compared to the original model, and is not guaranteed to be an accurate reflection of the decision making processes in the original model and as such cannot be used to guarantee its safety. Recent work on understanding the geometry of ReLU neural networks shows that a ReLU network corresponds to a piecewise linear function divided into regions defined by an n-dimensional convex polytope. Through this lens, a neural network can be understood as dividing the input space into distinct regions which apply a single linear function for each output neuron. We show that this geometric representation can be used to generate causal explanations for the network's behaviour similar to previous work, but which extracts rules directly from the geometry of Neural Networks with the ReLU activation function, and is therefore an accurate reflection of the network's behaviour.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用ReLU神经网络的几何结构（凸多面体划分输入空间）直接提取因果解释规则，以解决现有可解释性方法使用蒸馏模型导致性能下降且无法准确反映原模型行为的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络的因果解释方法依赖蒸馏模型，这些模型性能显著下降且无法准确反映原模型的决策过程，不能用于安全保证。需要一种直接从原模型几何结构中提取准确解释的方法。
AI.method: 利用ReLU神经网络对应分段线性函数的几何特性，将输入空间划分为由n维凸多面体定义的线性区域，直接从这些区域中提取决策规则，生成关于模型行为的"why"和"why not"因果解释。
AI.result: 该方法能够生成与先前工作类似的因果解释，但规则直接源自ReLU网络的几何结构，因此是网络行为的准确反映，避免了蒸馏方法带来的性能损失和解释失真。
AI.conclusion: 基于ReLU网络几何结构的解释方法能够提供更准确、可靠的因果解释，有助于提升自主系统安全保证的可信度。

title: AssayBench: An Assay-Level Virtual Cell Benchmark for LLMs and Agents
summary: Recent advances in machine learning and large-scale biological data collections have revived the prospect of building a virtual cell, a computational model of cellular behavior that could accelerate biological discovery. One of the most compelling promises of this vision is the ability to perform in silico phenotypic screens, in which a model predicts the effects of cellular perturbations in unseen biological contexts. This task combines heterogeneous textual inputs with diverse phenotypic outputs, making it particularly well-suited to LLMs and agentic systems. Yet, no standard benchmark currently exists for this task, as existing efforts focus on narrower molecular readouts that are only indirectly aligned with the phenotypic endpoints driving many real-world drug discovery workflows. In this work, we present AssayBench, a benchmark for phenotypic screen prediction, built from 1,920 publicly available CRISPR screens spanning five broad classes of cellular phenotypes. We formulate the screen prediction task as a gene rank prediction for each screen and introduce the adjusted nDCG, a continuous metric for comparing performance across heterogeneous assays. Our extensive evaluation shows that existing methods remain far from empirically estimated performance ceilings and zero-shot generalist LLMs outperform biology-specific LLMs and trainable baselines. Optimization techniques such as fine-tuning, ensembling, and prompt optimization can further improve LLM performance on this task. Overall, AssayBench offers a practical testbed for measuring progress toward in silico phenotypic screening and, more broadly, virtual cell models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AssayBench基准，用于评估虚拟细胞模型在表型筛选预测任务上的表现。该基准基于1,920个公开CRISPR筛选实验，涵盖五类细胞表型，将任务形式化为基因排序预测，并引入调整后的nDCG指标。实验表明现有方法远未达到性能上限，零样本通用LLM优于生物学专用LLM和可训练基线，微调、集成和提示优化可进一步提升性能。
AI.motivation: 构建虚拟细胞模型的重要承诺之一是能够在计算中进行表型筛选，预测扰动在不同生物背景下的效果。然而，目前缺乏一个标准基准来评估这一任务，现有工作多聚焦于较窄的分子读数，与真实药物发现中的表型终点仅有间接关联。
AI.method: 从1,920个公开CRISPR筛选实验构建AssayBench基准，涵盖五类细胞表型；将表型筛选预测任务形式化为每个筛选的基因排序预测；提出调整后的nDCG连续指标用于比较异质实验间的性能。
AI.result: 现有方法远未达到经验估计的性能上限；零样本通用LLM优于生物学专用LLM和可训练基线；微调、集成和提示优化可进一步提升LLM性能。
AI.conclusion: AssayBench为计算表型筛选和更广泛的虚拟细胞模型研究提供了一个实用的测试平台，有助于衡量该方向的进展。

title: Valid Best-Model Identification for LLM Evaluation via Low-Rank Factorization
summary: Selecting the best large language model (LLM) for a fixed benchmark is often expensive, since exhaustive evaluation requires running every model on every example. Multi-armed bandit (MAB) algorithms can reduce the number of LLM calls by sequentially selecting the next model-example pair to evaluate, thereby avoiding wasted evaluations on clearly underperforming models. Further savings can be achieved by predicting model scores from the partially observed model-example score matrix using low-rank factorization. However, such predictions are not ground truth: they can be biased and may therefore lead to incorrect identification of the best model. In this work, we propose a principled framework that combines MAB with cheap predicted scores without compromising statistical validity. Specifically, we derive doubly robust estimators of each model's performance that use the low-rank predictions to reduce variance. This enables the construction of valid finite-sample confidence intervals in our setting, where models are selected adaptively and examples are sampled without replacement. Empirical results on real-world benchmarks show that our approach reduces the number of required evaluations, yielding meaningful savings in compute and cost while accurately identifying the best-performing model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多臂老虎机（MAB）与低秩预测的框架，通过双重稳健估计在自适应模型选择和示例不放回采样下构建有效的有限样本置信区间，在不牺牲统计有效性的前提下减少评估LLM所需的计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试中评估所有大语言模型（LLM）的成本高昂，虽然MAB算法和低秩分解可以分别通过选择性采样和预测分数来减少评估次数，但预测分数可能存在偏差，导致无法正确识别最佳模型。因此需要一种既能利用预测分数节省成本，又不损害统计有效性的方法。
AI.method: 提出一个原则性框架，将多臂老虎机（MAB）与廉价预测分数相结合。具体地，利用低秩预测导出每个模型性能的双重稳健（doubly robust）估计量以降低方差，从而在模型自适应选择和示例不放回采样下构建有效的有限样本置信区间。
AI.result: 在真实世界基准上的实证结果表明，该方法减少了所需的评估次数，在准确识别最佳性能模型的同时，显著节省了计算和成本。
AI.conclusion: 通过双重稳健估计结合MAB与低秩预测，可以在不牺牲统计有效性的前提下，大幅降低大规模LLM评估的计算开销，为高效模型选择提供了可行方案。

title: LoKA: Low-precision Kernel Applications for Recommendation Models At Scale
summary: Recent GPU generations deliver significantly higher FLOPs using lower-precision arithmetic, such as FP8. While successfully applied to large language models (LLMs), its adoption in large recommendation models (LRMs) has been limited. This is because LRMs are numerically sensitive, dominated by small matrix multiplications (GEMMs) followed by normalization, and trained in communication-intensive environments. Applying FP8 directly to LRMs often degrades model quality and prolongs training time. These challenges are inherent to LRM workloads and cannot be resolved merely by introducing better FP8 kernels. Instead, a system-model co-design approach is needed to successfully integrate FP8. We present LoKA (Low-precision Kernel Applications), a framework that makes FP8 practical for LRMs through three principles: profile under realistic distributions to know where low precision is safe, co-design model components with hardware to expand where it is safe, and orchestrate across kernel libraries to maximize the gains. Concretely, LoKA Probe is a statistically grounded, online benchmarking method that learns activation and weight statistics, and quantifies per-layer errors. This process pinpoints safe and unsafe, fast and slow sites for FP8 adoption. LoKA Mods is a set of reusable model adaptations that improve both numerical stability and execution efficiency with FP8. LoKA Dispatch is a runtime that leverages the statistical insights from LoKA Probe to select the fastest FP8 kernel that satisfies the accuracy requirements.

AI.tldr: LoKA是一个通过系统-模型协同设计框架，使FP8低精度计算在大规模推荐模型（LRM）中实用的方案，解决了LRM对数值敏感、以小矩阵乘法为主且在通信密集环境下训练的问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管FP8低精度计算在大型语言模型（LLM）中成功应用，但在大规模推荐模型（LRM）中难以推广，因为LRM对数值敏感、以小矩阵乘法为主、训练环境通信密集，直接应用FP8会降低模型质量并延长训练时间。
AI.method: LoKA提出三个核心原则：1）LoKA Probe：基于统计的在线基准测试方法，学习激活值和权重的统计分布并量化逐层误差，定位适合FP8的安全和高效位置；2）LoKA Mods：一组可复用的模型适配方法，提升FP8下的数值稳定性和执行效率；3）LoKA Dispatch：运行时系统，利用LoKA Probe的统计洞察选择满足精度要求的最快FP8内核。
AI.result: LoKA使FP8在LRM中变得实用，在不降低模型质量的前提下实现了训练加速。
AI.conclusion: LRM的FP8应用需要系统-模型协同设计而非仅依赖更好的FP8内核，LoKA通过profile、协同设计和跨库编排三个原则成功实现了FP8在LRM中的实际部署。

title: Identified-Set Geometry of Distributional Model Extraction under Top-$K$ Censored API Access
summary: Modern LLM APIs often reveal only top-$K$ logit scores and censor the remaining vocabulary. We study the per-position distribution-recovery limits of this access model. For censoring threshold $τ$, the compatible teacher distributions form an identified set whose total-variation diameter is exactly $U_K=(V-K)\exp(τ)/(Z_A+(V-K)\exp(τ))$, where $Z_A$ is the observed partition function. For KL recovery, we give a computable binary-endpoint lower bound and an asymptotically matching small-ambiguity upper bound, with an extension to reference-aware attackers. Experiments on a Qwen3 math-reasoning teacher reveal a layered extraction hierarchy: on-task top-$K$ distillation recovers 12% of private capability, full-logit distillation recovers 56% despite 99% KL closure, and generation-based extraction recovers 96%. Top-$K$ censoring therefore limits per-position distribution recovery but does not by itself prevent capability extraction, separating fidelity from transfer in prompt-only logit distillation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了现代大语言模型API仅暴露前K个logit分数并审查剩余词汇的访问模式下，逐位置分布恢复的极限。理论推导了总变差直径的精确表达式和KL恢复的边界，实验表明虽然top-K审查限制了分布恢复保真度，但无法阻止能力提取（生成式提取恢复96%能力），从而分离了保真度与迁移。
AI.motivation: 现代LLM API通常只暴露前K个logit分数并屏蔽其余词汇，这种受限访问模式下的分布恢复能力和知识迁移极限尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 理论推导了审查阈值τ下兼容教师分布的总变差直径精确表达式U_K，给出了KL恢复的可计算二端点下界和渐近匹配的小模糊度上界，并在Qwen3数学推理教师模型上进行了实验验证。
AI.result: ① 总变差直径精确公式：U_K = (V-K)exp(τ)/(Z_A+(V-K)exp(τ))；② 实验揭示分层提取层级：on-task top-K蒸馏恢复12%能力，全logit蒸馏恢复56%（尽管99% KL闭包），生成式提取恢复96%。
AI.conclusion: Top-K审查在理论上限制了逐位置分布恢复的保真度，但无法阻止能力提取，将保真度与迁移分离；仅基于提示的logit蒸馏中，保真度与能力迁移并非等价。

title: Unmasking On-Policy Distillation: Where It Helps, Where It Hurts, and Why
summary: On-policy distillation offers dense, per-token supervision for training reasoning models; however, it remains unclear under which conditions this signal is beneficial and under which it is detrimental. Which teacher model should be used, and in the case of self-distillation, which specific context should serve as the supervisory signal? Does the optimal choice vary from one token to the next? At present, addressing these questions typically requires costly training runs whose aggregate performance metrics obscure the dynamics at the level of individual tokens. We introduce a training-free diagnostic framework that operates at the highest resolution: per token, per question, and per teacher. We derive an ideal per-node gradient defined as the parameter update that maximally increases the student's probability of success. We then develop a scalable targeted-rollout algorithm to estimate this gradient efficiently, even for long chains of intermediate thoughts. The gradient alignment score, defined as the cosine similarity between this ideal gradient and any given distillation gradient, quantifies the extent to which a particular configuration approximates the ideal signal. Across a range of self-distillation settings and external teacher models, we observe that distillation guidance exhibits substantially higher alignment with the ideal on incorrect rollouts than on correct ones, where the student already performs well and the teacher's signal tends to become noisy. Furthermore, we find that the optimal distillation context depends jointly on the student model's capacity and the target task, and that no single universally effective configuration emerges. These findings motivate the use of per-task, per-token diagnostic analyses for distillation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的诊断框架，可在每个token、每个问题和每个教师模型的粒度上评估蒸馏信号的质量，发现蒸馏指导在错误rollout上的对齐度高于正确rollout，且最优蒸馏上下文取决于学生模型容量和目标任务。
AI.motivation: 现有on-policy蒸馏方法不清楚在何种条件下每个token的监督信号是有益或有害的，选择何种教师模型以及自蒸馏中的具体上下文作为监督信号缺乏理论指导，且回答这些问题通常需要昂贵的训练。
AI.method: 推导了理想逐节点梯度（最大化学生成功概率的参数更新），开发了可扩展的目标性rollout算法来高效估计该梯度，并定义了梯度对齐得分（理想梯度与蒸馏梯度的余弦相似度）来量化蒸馏信号的质量。
AI.result: 蒸馏指导在错误的rollout上比正确的rollout具有更高的对齐度；最优蒸馏上下文取决于学生模型能力和目标任务，不存在普遍有效的单一配置。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现激励使用每个任务、每个token的诊断分析来进行蒸馏，为蒸馏配置选择提供了细粒度的理论指导。

title: Equilibrium Residuals Expose Three Regimes of Matrix-Game Strategic Reasoning in Language Models
summary: Large language models can score well on named game-theory benchmarks while failing on the same strategic computation once semantic cues are removed. We show this gap with procedurally generated zero-sum matrix games: a model that recognizes familiar games drops to 34%, 18%, and 2% success on anonymous $2{\times}2$, $3{\times}3$, and $5{\times}5$ payoff matrices. The benchmark separates semantic recall, learned approximate Nash computation, and an output-interface bottleneck that limits scale. Training only on $2{\times}2$ and $3{\times}3$ games, supervised fine-tuning raises unseen $5{\times}5$--$7{\times}7$ success from 2% to 61%, while exploitability-reward training averages 37% with high seed variance. We prove that the exploitability residual is $2$-Lipschitz in payoff perturbations, unlike discontinuous vertex-returning LP equilibrium selectors, explaining why residual training can transfer under payoff shifts even when formatting instability limits mean performance. A dominated-action padding experiment provides causal evidence: trained models solve $3{\times}3$ games embedded in much larger matrices, while random-padded controls fail and dense $12{\times}12$ games remain near failure. Procedural evaluation is therefore necessary for measuring strategic reasoning, and residual rewards expose a real but format-limited route to approximate equilibrium computation.

AI.tldr: 大型语言模型在命名博弈论基准上表现良好，但移除语义线索后在相同战略计算任务上失败。通过程序化生成的零和矩阵游戏发现，模型在匿名2×2、3×3和5×5收益矩阵上的成功率分别降至34%、18%和2%。该基准分离了语义回忆、学习到的近似纳什计算和输出接口瓶颈。在2×2和3×3游戏上训练，监督微调将未见过的5×5-7×7成功率从2%提升至61%，而利用度奖励训练平均达37%但种子方差高。证明利用度残差在收益扰动下是2-Lipschitz的，解释了残差训练如何在格式不稳定时仍能迁移。主导动作填充实验提供了因果证据。程序化评估对于衡量战略推理是必要的，残差奖励提供了一条真实但格式受限的近似均衡计算路径。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在命名博弈论基准上表现良好，但无法判断模型是否真正理解战略推理还是仅依赖语义记忆。需要一种程序化生成的基准来分离语义回忆与真实战略计算能力。
AI.method: 使用程序化生成的匿名零和矩阵游戏（2×2、3×3、5×5），比较监督微调与利用度奖励训练，并证明利用度残差的2-Lipschitz性质。通过主导动作填充实验提供因果证据。
AI.result: 模型在匿名矩阵上表现大幅下降（2×2:34%, 3×3:18%, 5×5:2%）。监督微调可提升至61%，利用度奖励训练平均37%但方差大。残差训练在格式不稳定时仍可迁移，但密集12×12游戏仍近乎失败。
AI.conclusion: 程序化评估对于衡量LLM的战略推理能力是必要的；残差奖励提供了一条真实但格式受限的近似均衡计算路径。

title: DataMaster: Towards Autonomous Data Engineering for Machine Learning
summary: As model families, training recipes, and compute budgets become increasingly standardized, further gains in machine learning systems depend increasingly on data. Yet data engineering remains largely manual and ad hoc: practitioners repeatedly search for external datasets, adapt them to existing pipelines, validate candidate data through downstream training, and carry forward lessons from prior attempts. We study task-conditioned autonomous data engineering, where an autonomous agent improves a fixed learning algorithm by optimizing only the data side, including external data discovery, data selection and composition, cleaning and transformation. The goal is to obtain a stronger downstream solution while leaving the learning algorithm unchanged. To address the open-ended search space, branch-dependent refinement, and delayed validation inherent in autonomous data engineering, we propose DataMaster, a data-agent framework that integrates tree-structured search, shared candidate data, and cumulative memory. DataMaster consists of three key components: a DataTree that organizes alternative data-engineering branches, a shared Data Pool that stores discovered external data sources for reuse, and a Global Memory that records node outcomes, artifacts, and reusable findings. Together, these components allow the agent to discover candidate data, construct executable training inputs, evaluate them through downstream feedback, and carry useful evidence across branches. We evaluate DataMaster on two types of benchmarks, MLE-Bench Lite and PostTrainBench. On MLE-Bench Lite, it improves medal rate by 32.27% over the initial score; on PostTrainBench, it surpasses the instruct model on GPQA (31.02% vs 30.35%).

AI.tldr: 本文提出 DataMaster 框架，将数据工程自动化建模为任务条件化的智能体搜索问题，通过树状结构搜索、共享数据池和全局记忆三大组件在固定学习算法下优化数据侧（发现、选择、清洗、转换），在 MLE-Bench Lite 和 PostTrainBench 上分别取得 32.27% 奖牌率提升和超越 instruct 模型（GPQA 31.02% vs 30.35%）的效果。
AI.motivation: 当前机器学习系统在模型族、训练方案和计算预算日趋标准化的背景下，性能提升越来越依赖数据工程，但数据工程仍以手动和临时性方式为主，缺乏系统化、自动化的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出 DataMaster 框架，包含三个核心组件：(1) DataTree——组织替代性数据工程分支的树状结构；(2) Data Pool——共享已发现的外部数据源供复用；(3) Global Memory——记录节点结果、产物和可复用的发现。智能体通过这三个组件实现候选数据发现、可执行训练输入构建、下游反馈评估以及跨分支证据传递。
AI.result: 在 MLE-Bench Lite 上，奖牌率相比初始分数提升 32.27%；在 PostTrainBench 上，GPQA 指标达到 31.02%，超越 instruct 模型的 30.35%。
AI.conclusion: DataMaster 证明了在固定学习算法条件下，通过自主数据工程自动化可以有效提升下游模型性能，为数据驱动的机器学习系统优化提供了系统化框架。

title: Remember to Forget: Gated Adaptive Positional Encoding
summary: Rotary Positional Encoding (RoPE) is widely used in modern large language models. However, when sequences are extended beyond the range seen during training, rotary phases can enter out-of-distribution regimes, leading to spurious long-range alignments, diffuse attention, and degraded retrieval. Existing remedies only partially address these failures, as they often trade local positional resolution for long-context stability. We propose GAPE (Gated Adaptive Positional Encoding), a drop-in augmentation for positional encodings that introduces a content-aware bias directly into the attention logits while preserving the rotary geometry. GAPE decouples distance-based suppression from token importance through a query-dependent gate that contracts irrelevant context and a key-dependent gate that preserves salient distant tokens. We prove that protected tokens remain accessible, while the attention mass assigned to unprotected distant tokens decays as a function of the query gate. We further show that GAPE can be implemented within standard scaled dot-product attention. We validate these properties empirically, finding that GAPE consistently yields sharper attention and improved long-context robustness over rotary baselines across both synthetic retrieval and long-context benchmarks.

AI.tldr: GAPE是一种即插即用的位置编码增强方法，通过在注意力logits中引入内容感知的偏置来改善RoPE在超长序列上的注意力弥散和检索退化问题，同时保持旋转几何特性。
AI.motivation: RoPE在处理超出训练长度的序列时，旋转相位进入分布外区域，导致虚假的长距离对齐、注意力弥散和检索性能下降，现有方法因在局部位置分辨率与长上下文稳定性之间做权衡而仅能部分缓解这些问题。
AI.method: GAPE在注意力logits中引入内容感知的偏置，通过查询依赖的门控压缩不相关上下文，以及键依赖的门控保留重要的远距离token，实现距离驱动的抑制与token重要性的解耦。该方法可在标准缩放点积注意力中实现。
AI.result: 理论证明受保护token仍可访问，未受保护远距离token的注意力质量随查询门控值衰减；实验表明GAPE在合成检索和长上下文基准测试中均能产生更锐利的注意力分布，并提升长上下文鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: GAPE作为一种即插即用的位置编码增强方案，在不牺牲旋转几何特性的前提下，有效解决了长序列下的注意力弥散问题，为RoPE的长期上下文扩展提供了实用改进。

title: Beyond Spatial Compression: Interface-Centric Generative States for Open-World 3D Structure
summary: Current 3D tokenizers largely treat representation as spatial compression: compact codes reconstruct surface geometry, but leave component ownership and attachment validity implicit. In open-world assets with intersecting components, noisy topology, and weak canonical structure, this creates a representation mismatch: local shape, component identity, and assembly relations become entangled in a latent stream and are not natively addressable during decoding. We formulate an alternative view, interface-centric generative states, in which tokenization constructs an operational state rather than a passive compressed code. The state exposes local geometry, component ownership, and attachment validity as variables that can be queried, constrained, and repaired during decoding. We instantiate this formulation with Component-Conditioned Canonical Local Tokens (C2LT-3D), factorizing representation into canonical local geometry, partition-conditioned context, and relational seam variables. Each factor targets a distinct failure mode of compression-centric tokens: pose leakage, cross-component interference, or invalid local attachment. This exposed state supports attachment validation, latent structural repair, targeted intervention, and constrained serialization without a separate post-hoc structure recovery module. Trained on single-object CAD models and evaluated zero-shot on open-world multi-component assets, C2LT-3D improves structural robustness and shows that its latent variables remain actionable under adversarial attachment settings. These results suggest that open-world 3D generative representations should be evaluated not only by reconstruction fidelity, but by whether their discrete states remain operational for assembly-level structural reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出C2LT-3D，一种以接口为中心的可操作生成状态框架，将3D tokenization从被动空间压缩重构为暴露局部几何、部件归属与连接有效性的可查询变量，在无需后处理的情况下实现了对开放世界多部件资产的附着验证、结构修复与约束序列化。
AI.motivation: 现有3D tokenizer将表示视为空间压缩，虽能重建表面几何，但隐式处理了部件归属与连接有效性。在开放世界资产中（交叉部件、噪声拓扑、弱规范结构），局部形状、部件身份与装配关系在潜在流中纠缠，解码时无法原生寻址，导致表示失配。
AI.method: 提出C2LT-3D（Component-Conditioned Canonical Local Tokens），将表示分解为三个因子：规范局部几何（canonical local geometry）、分区条件上下文（partition-conditioned context）与关系接缝变量（relational seam variables）。每个因子针对压缩中心token的一个特定失效模式：姿态泄露、跨部件干扰或无效局部连接。
AI.result: 在单对象CAD模型上训练，零样本评估开放世界多组件资产。C2LT-3D提升了结构鲁棒性，其潜在变量在对抗性附着设置下仍保持可操作性。
AI.conclusion: 开放世界3D生成表示不仅应评估重建保真度，还应评估其离散状态是否对装配级结构推理保持可操作。

title: Don't Fix the Basis -- Learn It: Spectral Representation with Adaptive Basis Learning for PDEs
summary: Spectral neural operators achieve strong performance for PDE learning, but rely on fixed global bases that limit their ability to represent spatially heterogeneous and multiscale dynamics. We propose Adaptive Basis Learning (ABLE), a framework that learns data-dependent spectral representations instead of relying on predefined bases. ABLE constructs a spatially adaptive Parseval frame via a learned ancillary density, enabling the operator to act in a lifted spectral space while preserving invertibility and maintaining $O(N\log N)$ complexity through FFT-based implementation. This shifts the source of expressivity from spectral coefficients to the representation itself, allowing the model to capture localized structures and non-translation-invariant interactions more efficiently. ABLE integrates seamlessly into existing neural operator architectures as a drop-in replacement for spectral layers. Across a range of benchmarks ABLE improves accuracy over strong baselines, with the largest gains in regimes characterized by sharp gradients and multiscale behavior. Moreover, augmenting existing models (e.g., U-FNO, HPM) with ABLE further enhances their performance, demonstrating its role as a general and complementary spectral refinement. Our results highlight that the data-driven choice of representation, rather than operator complexity alone, is a key bottleneck in neural operator design. By learning the basis itself, ABLE provides a principled and efficient framework for improving spectral methods in PDE learning.

AI.tldr: ABLE提出了一种学习数据依赖谱表示的方法，替代固定全局基函数，通过可逆的Parseval框架和FFT实现O(N log N)复杂度，显著提升了神经算子对异质多尺度动力学的建模能力。
AI.motivation: 现有谱神经算子依赖固定全局基函数，难以表示空间异质和多尺度动力学，表达力瓶颈在于表示本身而非算子复杂度。
AI.method: 通过学习的辅助密度构建空间自适应Parseval框架，在提升的谱空间中操作算子，保持可逆性并利用FFT实现高效计算。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中优于强基线方法，在尖锐梯度和多尺度场景下提升最大；作为即插即用模块可增强U-FNO、HPM等现有模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动的表示选择是神经算子设计的关键瓶颈，学习基函数本身为改进PDE学习的谱方法提供了原则性且高效的框架。

title: SlimSpec: Low-Rank Draft LM-Head for Accelerated Speculative Decoding
summary: Speculative decoding speeds up autoregressive generation in Large Language Models (LLMs) through a two-step procedure, where a lightweight draft model proposes tokens which the target model then verifies in a single forward pass. Although the drafter network is small in modern architectures, its LM-head still performs projection to a large vocabulary, becoming one of the major computational bottlenecks. In prior work this issue has been predominantly addressed via static or dynamic vocabulary truncation. Yet mitigating the bottleneck, these methods bring in extra complexity, such as special vocabulary curation, sophisticated inference-time logic or modifications of the training setup. In this paper, we propose SlimSpec, a low-rank parameterization of the drafter's LM-head that compresses the inner representation rather than the output, preserving full vocabulary support. We evaluate our method with EAGLE-3 drafter across three target models and diverse benchmarks in both latency- and throughput-bound inference regimes. SlimSpec achieves $4\text{-}5\times$ acceleration over the standard LM-head architecture while maintaining a competitive acceptance length, surpassing existing methods by up to $8\text{-}9\%$ of the end-to-end speedup. Our method requires minimal adjustments of training and inference pipelines. Combined with the aforementioned speedup improvements, it makes SlimSpec a strong alternative across wide variety of draft LM-head architectures.

AI.tldr: SlimSpec通过对草稿模型的LM头进行低秩参数化，压缩内部表示而非输出词汇，在保持完整词汇支持的同时，实现4-5倍加速，端到端速度提升8-9%，且无需复杂的词汇截断或训练调整。
AI.motivation: 在推测解码中，草稿模型的LM头将小规模网络表示投影到大型词汇空间，成为主要计算瓶颈。现有词汇截断方法虽缓解了瓶颈，但引入了词汇筛选、复杂推理逻辑或训练修改等额外复杂性。
AI.method: 提出SlimSpec，对草稿模型LM头进行低秩参数化，压缩内部表示维度而非输出词汇，保持完整词汇表支持。基于EAGLE-3草稿架构，在多种目标模型和基准上评估。
AI.result: 相比标准LM头架构实现4-5倍加速，保持竞争性接受长度；端到端加速比现有方法提升8-9%。
AI.conclusion: SlimSpec是对训练和推理管线影响最小的有效替代方案，可广泛适用于多种草稿LM头架构。

title: AxiomOcean: Forecasting the Three-Dimensional Structure of the Upper Ocean
summary: Short-term ocean forecast skill depends strongly on the three-dimensional ocean structure of the upper ocean, which governs stratification, subsurface heat storage, and the response of the ocean to atmospheric forcing. However, AI ocean forecasting models often fail to preserve this vertical structure, resulting in over-smoothed subsurface features and weak physical consistency under strong forcing. Here, we present AxiomOcean, a global AI ocean forecasting model that explicitly represents vertical hierarchy and cross-layer dependence within the water column. By combining a fully three-dimensional encoder-backbone-decoder architecture with surface atmospheric forcing, AxiomOcean jointly predicts upper-ocean temperature, salinity, and three-dimensional currents at global 1/12° resolution down to 643 m depth. In 10-day forecasts, AxiomOcean outperforms an advanced AI comparison model across variables and lead times, reducing day-1 RMSE by approximately 20 to 35% while maintaining higher anomaly correlation. The gain is not achieved through excessive smoothing: AxiomOcean better preserves eddy kinetic energy, temperature and salinity variance. Its advantage also extends through the water column and remains evident across the equatorial Pacific, Kuroshio Extension, and Southern Ocean, yielding a more realistic reconstruction of upper-ocean heat content. These results show that explicitly preserving upper-ocean three-dimensional structure can improve both forecast accuracy and physical fidelity in AI ocean prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出AxiomOcean，一种通过显式表示水体垂直层次和跨层依赖的全球AI海洋预报模型，在1/12°分辨率下联合预测上层海洋温度、盐度和三维流场，相比先进AI模型，10天预报的RMSE降低约20-35%，同时更好地保留了涡动能和温盐方差，并在不同海区和水深上保持优势。
AI.motivation: 现有AI海洋预报模型往往无法保持上层海洋的三维垂直结构，导致次表层特征过度平滑，在强强迫下物理一致性弱，而短时海洋预报技能高度依赖上层海洋的三维结构。
AI.method: 采用全三维编码器-骨干网络-解码器架构，结合地表大气强迫，在全局1/12°分辨率下联合预测上层海洋温度、盐度和三维流场，深度达643米。
AI.result: 10天预报中，相比先进AI对比模型，AxiomOcean在变量和预报时效上均表现更优，第1天RMSE降低约20-35%，同时保持更高的异常相关系数；更好地保留了涡动能、温度和盐度方差；优势贯穿整个水柱，在赤道太平洋、黑潮延伸体和南大洋均保持明显，重建的上层海洋热含量更真实。
AI.conclusion: 显式保持上层海洋三维结构可以同时提高AI海洋预报的准确性和物理保真度。

title: QT-Net: Rethinking Evaluation of AI Models in Atomic Chemical Space
summary: Atomic properties such as partial charges or multipoles encode chemically meaningful information that can inform downstream molecular property prediction, but their evaluation as machine learning targets has been complicated by the absence of a principled out-of-distribution evaluation protocol at the atomic level. In this work, we propose a held-out evaluation protocol that clusters atomic environments by SOAP descriptors and computes metrics accounting only for cluster labels unseen during training. Following this procedure, we use 5$\times$5 cross-validation and Tukey's HSD to run a statistically rigorous comparison of E(3)-equivariant against non-equivariant, rotationally augmented models for predicting electron populations and multipoles of H, C, N, and O atoms. Building on our results, we introduce the Quantum Topological Neural Network (QT-Net), a rotationally augmented, non-equivariant graph neural network. We show that QT-Net can be used to infer properties of atoms in molecules from QM9 outside our training set, and that these inferred properties can yield improvement when used as input features for downstream molecular property prediction. To further validate the framework, molecular dipole moments computed from QT-Net's per-atom outputs recover the ground-truth values reported in QM9. We release all code and data, including a JAX implementation of QT-Net, to support the broader use of learned QTA properties as inductive biases for atomic-scale molecular machine learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于原子环境聚类的原子层面分布外评估协议，通过统计严谨的比较发现旋转增强的非等变模型可媲美E(3)-等变模型，并据此提出QT-Net，一种旋转增强的非等变图神经网络，可用于推断原子性质并提升下游分子属性预测性能。
AI.motivation: 原子性质（如部分电荷或多极矩）具有化学意义，可作为分子属性预测的下游特征，但由于缺乏原则性的原子层面分布外评估协议，其作为机器学习目标的评估一直较为复杂。
AI.method: （1）提出基于SOAP描述符聚类原子环境并仅计算训练中未见簇标签指标的特有评估协议；（2）采用5×5交叉验证和Tukey HSD进行统计严格比较，对比E(3)-等变模型与非等变、旋转增强模型；（3）基于结果提出QT-Net（旋转增强的非等变图神经网络），用于推断QM9中原子性质并作为下游分子属性预测的输入特征。
AI.result: QT-Net可推断训练集外QM9分子的原子性质；推断得到的原子性质作为输入特征可改善下游分子属性预测；从QT-Net逐原子输出计算的分子偶极矩可恢复QM9中的真实值。
AI.conclusion: 旋转增强的非等变模型在原子性质预测中可与E(3)-等变模型媲美；QT-Net可有效推断原子性质并作为分子机器学习的归纳偏置；相关代码和数据已开源。

title: Self-Attention as a Covariance Readout: A Unified View of In-Context Learning and Repetition
summary: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit two striking and ostensibly unrelated behaviours: in-context learning (ICL) and repetitive generation. In both, the model behaves as though it had summarised the context into a population-level statistic and discarded token-level detail. We ask whether this ``summarisation and forgetting'' can be derived from the attention mechanism itself, and answer in the affirmative. Under stationary, ergodic and elliptical inputs, the softmax attention output converges almost surely to $Θ_VΣΘ_K^{\top}Θ_Q x_t$, where $Σ$ is the input covariance; the long-context limit is therefore a linear readout of the input's second-order statistics. Two consequences follow. (i) For in-context linear regression, a single softmax head can implement one step of population gradient descent. Stacking such heads with residual connections iterates this update and implements multiple gradient descent steps. (ii) Propagated across an $L$-layer transformer, this readout drives the terminal hidden state at the parametric $1/t$ rate to a deterministic function of the current token alone, so that autoregressive generation collapses asymptotically to a first-order Markov chain whose attracting orbits furnish a structural account of repetition and mode collapse. The two phenomena thus emerge as facets of a single covariance-readout principle.

AI.tldr: 本文证明，在平稳、遍历和椭圆输入条件下，softmax注意力机制几乎必然收敛到输入协方差的线性读出。由此推导出两个关键结果：单头softmax可实现一步群体梯度下降，堆叠多头并加残差连接可迭代实现多步梯度下降；该读出机制以1/t速率驱动Transformer隐藏状态退化为仅依赖当前token的确定性函数，导致自回归生成渐近坍缩为一阶马尔可夫链，其吸引轨道解释了重复生成和模式坍缩。因此，上下文学习与重复生成两个看似无关的现象均源于同一协方差读出原则。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型表现出两个显著但看似无关的行为：上下文学习（ICL）和重复生成。在这两种行为中，模型似乎将上下文总结为总体统计量而丢弃了token级别的细节。作者希望探究这种"总结与遗忘"机制是否能从注意力机制本身推导出来。
AI.method: 在平稳、遍历和椭圆输入的理论假设下，推导softmax注意力输出的几乎必然收敛极限，证明其收敛到输入协方差的线性读出形式。基于此框架，分别分析ICL（将单头softmax解释为群体梯度下降的一步，堆叠头部加残差连接实现多步）和重复生成（推导隐藏状态以1/t速率退化为仅依赖当前token的函数，自回归生成坍缩为一阶马尔可夫链）。
AI.result: (i) 在上下文线性回归中，单softmax头可实现一步群体梯度下降，堆叠多头加残差连接迭代实现多步梯度下降。(ii) 经过L层Transformer传播，该读出机制以1/t的参数量级驱动终端隐藏状态退化为仅依赖当前token的确定性函数，自回归生成渐近坍缩为一阶马尔可夫链，其吸引轨道解释了重复生成和模式坍缩。
AI.conclusion: 上下文学习和重复生成这两个看似无关的现象，实际上是同一协方差读出原则的两个不同方面，可以从注意力机制本身推导出来。

title: Can Muon Fine-tune Adam-Pretrained Models?
summary: Muon has emerged as an efficient alternative to Adam for pretraining, yet remains underused for fine-tuning. A key obstacle is that most open models are pretrained with Adam, and naively switching to Muon for fine-tuning leads to degraded performance due to an optimizer mismatch. We investigate this mismatch through controlled experiments and relate it to the distinct implicit biases of Adam and Muon. We provide evidence that the mismatch disrupts pretrained knowledge, and that this disruption scales with update strength. This leads us to hypothesize that constraining updates should mitigate the mismatch. We validate this with LoRA: across language and vision tasks, LoRA reduces the performance gap between Adam and Muon observed under full fine-tuning. Studies on LoRA rank, catastrophic forgetting, and LoRA variants further confirm that mismatch severity correlates with update strength. These results shed light on how optimizer mismatch affects fine-tuning and how it can be mitigated. Our code is available at https://github.com/XingyuQu/muon-finetune.

AI.tldr: Muon优化器在全量微调中因与Adam预训练模型的优化器不匹配而导致性能下降，而LoRA通过约束更新强度可以有效缓解这一问题。
AI.motivation: Muon在预训练中表现优异，但在微调中未被广泛使用。主要障碍是大多数开源模型使用Adam预训练，直接切换Muon微调会导致性能下降（优化器不匹配），亟需探究其原因并寻找缓解方案。
AI.method: 通过控制实验研究Adam与Muon的隐式偏差差异，分析不匹配如何破坏预训练知识；提出更新强度与不匹配严重程度相关的假设，并通过LoRA（低秩适配）在不同语言和视觉任务上验证该假设。
AI.result: 全量微调中Muon明显劣于Adam；使用LoRA后，Adam与Muon之间的性能差距显著缩小。对LoRA秩、灾难性遗忘及LoRA变体的进一步实验证实，不匹配严重程度与更新强度正相关。
AI.conclusion: 优化器不匹配会破坏预训练知识，且破坏程度随更新强度增大而加剧；LoRA通过约束更新空间有效缓解不匹配问题，为Muon在微调场景下的应用提供了实用方案。

title: ConfoundingSHAP: Quantifying confounding strength in causal inference
summary: In causal inference, confounders are variables that influence both treatment decisions and outcomes. However, unlike as in randomized clinical trials, the treatment assignment mechanism in observational studies is not known, and it is thus unclear which covariates act as confounders. Here, we aim to generate insight for causal inference and answer: which of the observed covariates act as confounders? We introduce ConfoundingSHAP, a Shapley-based method for attributing confounding strength to individual covariates. Our contributions are twofold. First, we propose a Shapley game targeted to infer the confounding strength of the covariates. Our resulting Shapley values differ from the standard applications of SHAP explanations on causal targets, such as understanding treatment effect heterogeneity, which are ill-suited for our task. Second, as our task requires evaluating the value function over many adjustment sets, we provide a scalable TabPFN-based estimation that avoids exhaustive refitting. We demonstrate the practical value across various datasets, where ConfoundingSHAP provides informative explanations of which observed covariates drive confounding and thereby helps to provide more insight for causal inference in practice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ConfoundingSHAP，一种基于Shapley值的方法，用于量化观测协变量对因果推断中混杂效应的贡献强度，并通过TabPFN实现高效估计。
AI.motivation: 在观察性研究中，混杂变量的识别是关键难题，因为治疗分配机制未知，研究人员难以确定哪些协变量实际充当混杂因子。现有SHAP应用主要聚焦于理解治疗效果异质性，不适合直接用于衡量混杂强度。
AI.method: 提出一种针对混杂强度推断的Shapley博弈框架，计算每个协变量的混杂Shapley值；同时基于TabPFN的估计方法，避免对不同调整集进行穷举式重新拟合，提升计算可扩展性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上展示了ConfoundingSHAP的实际价值，能够提供关于哪些观测协变量驱动混杂的信息性解释，从而为因果推断提供更多洞察。
AI.conclusion: ConfoundingSHAP有效量化了各协变量的混杂贡献，为观察性研究中的混杂变量识别提供了新的解释性工具，有助于提升因果推断的实践洞察力。

title: Higher Resolution, Better Generalization: Unlocking Visual Scaling in Deep Reinforcement Learning
summary: Pixel-based deep reinforcement learning agents are typically trained on heavily downsampled visual observations, a convention inherited from early benchmarks rather than grounded in principled design. In this work, we show that observation resolution is a critical yet overlooked variable for policy learning: higher-resolution inputs can substantially improve both performance and generalization, provided the network architecture can process them effectively. We find that the widely used Impala encoder, which flattens spatial features into a vector, suffers from quadratic parameter growth as resolution increases and fails to leverage the additional visual detail. Replacing this operation with global average pooling, as in the Impoola architecture, decouples parameter count from resolution and yields consistent improvements across resolutions and network widths - at their respective best conditions, visual scaling unlocks a 28 % performance gain for Impoola over Impala. These gains are strongest in environments that require precise perception of small or distant objects, and gradient saliency analysis confirms that the underlying mechanism is a more spatially localized visual attention of the policy at higher resolutions. Our results challenge the prevailing practice of aggressive input downsampling and position resolution-independent architectures as a simple, effective path toward scalable visual deep RL. To facilitate future research on resolution scaling in deep RL, we publicly release the open-source code for the Procgen-HD benchmark: https://github.com/raphajaner/procgen-hd.

AI.tldr: 本文发现视觉深度强化学习中观测分辨率是关键变量，更高分辨率能提升性能和泛化能力。Impala编码器因扁平化操作导致参数量随分辨率二次增长，而采用全局平均池化的Impoola架构可解耦参数量与分辨率，在最佳条件下性能提升28%。定性分析表明高分辨率策略具有更空间局部的视觉注意力机制。作者开源了Procgen-HD基准。
AI.motivation: 揭示观测分辨率对视觉深度强化学习策略学习的影响，挑战现有研究中对输入进行过度下采样的惯例，并探索能够有效利用高分辨率输入的架构设计。
AI.method: 提出Impoola架构，使用全局平均池化替代Impala编码器中的空间特征扁平化操作，实现参数量与输入分辨率的解耦。通过Procgen-HD基准进行对比实验，并利用梯度显著性分析解释高分辨率下的性能提升机制。
AI.result: Impoola在最佳条件下相比Impala取得28%的性能提升；高分辨率输入在需要精确感知小或远距离物体的环境中提升最为显著；梯度显著性分析证实高分辨率策略具有更空间局部的视觉注意力。
AI.conclusion: 应挑战激进输入下采样的常见做法，采用分辨率无关的架构（如Impoola）是实现可扩展视觉深度强化学习的简单有效途径。

title: PhysEDA: Physics-Aware Learning Framework for Efficient EDA With Manhattan Distance Decay
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, plus appendix. Code and data to be released upon publication
summary: Electronic design automation (EDA) addresses placement, routing, timing analysis, and power-integrity verification for integrated circuits. Learning methods -- attention (Transformer) and reinforcement learning (RL) -- have recently emerged on EDA tasks, yet face two common bottlenecks: vanilla attention's quadratic complexity limits scaling, and data-scarce models overfit statistical noise and amplify weak long-range correlations against the underlying physics. We observe that EDA tasks share a physical prior -- pairwise electrical and routing interactions decay exponentially along Manhattan distance -- and integrate it as a unified inductive bias into both architecture and training. We propose PhysEDA, comprising two components Physics-Structured Linear Attention (PSLA) folds the separable Manhattan decay into the linear-attention kernel as a multiplicative bias, reducing complexity from quadratic to linear; Potential-Based Reward Shaping (PBRS) constructs a physical potential from the same kernel, providing dense reward signal under sparse RL while preserving the optimal policy via the policy-invariance theorem. Across three EDA scenarios -- decoupling-capacitor placement, macro placement, and IR-drop prediction -- PhysEDA improves zero-shot cross-scale transfer by 56.8% and achieves 14x inference speedup with 98.5% memory savings on 100x100 grids; PBRS adds another 10.8% in sparse-reward DPP.

AI.tldr: PhysEDA通过将曼哈顿距离指数衰减的物理先验作为归纳偏置融入线性和强化学习，实现了EDA任务中零样本跨尺度迁移提升56.8%、14倍推理加速和98.5%内存节省。
AI.motivation: 现有注意力机制和强化学习方法在EDA任务中存在两个瓶颈：vanilla注意力的二次复杂度限制了扩展性，以及数据稀缺导致模型过拟合统计噪声并放大弱长程相关性。
AI.method: 提出PhysEDA包含两个组件：1) 物理结构线性注意力(PSLA)将可分离的曼哈顿衰减作为乘性偏置融入线性注意力核，复杂度从二次降至线性；2) 基于势能奖励塑造(PBRS)从相同核构建物理势能，在稀疏RL下提供密集奖励信号，通过策略不变性定理保持最优策略。
AI.result: 在去耦电容布局、宏单元布局和IR压降预测三个EDA场景中，PhysEDA实现零样本跨尺度迁移提升56.8%，在100x100网格上达到14倍推理加速和98.5%内存节省；PBRS在稀疏奖励DPP上额外提升10.8%。
AI.conclusion: 将物理先验（曼哈顿距离指数衰减）作为统一的归纳偏置同时融入架构设计和训练过程，能有效解决EDA任务中注意力机制和强化学习的扩展性与数据稀缺问题。

title: It's All Connected: Topology-Aware Structural Graph Encoding Improves Performance on Polymer Prediction
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have achieved strong results in molecular property prediction, but polymers present distinct challenges: labeled datasets are scarce and small (typically in the order of hundreds of polymers) due to the need for expensive experimentation, and complex polymer chain distributions influence polymer properties. Established practice in polymer prediction represents polymers solely by graphs of their repeat units, discarding the chain-scale morphology that governs key properties such as the glass transition temperature ($T_g$). In this work, we propose a principled graph construction that addresses this gap. Given a polymer's molecular mass distribution (MMD), we sample representative chains from the Schulz-Zimm distribution and construct representative sets of large graphs encoding chain-scale topology directly, with atoms and bonds featurized using rich chemical descriptors. We further pretrain GNN encoders via masked graph modeling on 100,000 unlabeled PSMILES strings before fine-tuning on labeled data. On a dataset of 381 polymers (180 homopolymers and 201 copolymers), we show that graph construction and self-supervised pretraining are jointly necessary: without pretraining, the large graph method matches the repeat-unit baseline (28.40 K vs. 28.36 K RMSE); with pretraining, it achieves 24.76 K +/- 3.30 K, a 5.1% reduction in mean error over the pretrained repeat-unit baseline (26.08 K +/- 4.20 K, p < 0.001, 30 runs). An ablation removing chemical features degrades performance to 36.65 K, confirming both components are essential. Results are architecture-agnostic, holding for both GINE and GATv2 encoders.

AI.tldr: 针对聚合物性质预测中标签数据稀缺且传统仅用重复单元图忽略链尺度形态的问题，本文提出一种 principled 图构建方法：从分子质量分布（MMD）中采样代表性长链，构建编码链拓扑的大图，并结合化学描述符进行原子/键特征化；同时采用掩码图建模在10万条未标记PSMILES上预训练GNN编码器。在381个聚合物数据集上，大图方法+预训练相比重复单元基线RMSE降低约5.1%（24.76 K vs 26.08 K，p<0.001），且无预训练时两者性能相当；去除化学特征后性能大幅下降（36.65 K）。该结果对GINE和GATv2两种架构均成立。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN方法在分子性质预测上表现优异，但聚合物面临两大挑战：1）标记数据集稀缺且规模小（通常仅数百个聚合物），因为需要昂贵实验；2）复杂的聚合物链分布影响性质。现有方法仅用重复单元图表示聚合物，丢弃了决定玻璃化转变温度等关键性质的链尺度形态，导致预测不准确。
AI.method: 1）根据聚合物的分子质量分布（MMD），从Schulz-Zimm分布中采样代表性链，构建编码链尺度拓扑的大图集合；2）使用丰富化学描述符对原子和键进行特征化；3）在10万条未标记PSMILES字符串上通过掩码图建模（masked graph modeling）预训练GNN编码器，然后在标记数据上微调。
AI.result: 在381个聚合物数据集（180种均聚物和201种共聚物）上：1）无预训练时，大图方法与重复单元基线性能相当（RMSE 28.40 K vs 28.36 K）；2）有预训练时，大图方法RMSE降至24.76 K ± 3.30 K，相比预训练的重复单元基线（26.08 K ± 4.20 K）降低5.1%，p<0.001（30次实验）；3）去除化学特征后性能恶化至36.65 K；4）结果在GINE和GATv2两种编码器架构上均成立。
AI.conclusion: 图构建（大图表示链尺度拓扑）和自监督预训练对于聚合物性质预测是联合必需的，两者缺一不可。该方法架构无关，为聚合物性质预测提供了有效的范式。

title: Online Sharp-Calibrated Bayesian Optimization
summary: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a widely used framework for optimizing expensive black-box functions, commonly based on Gaussian process (GP) surrogate models. Its effectiveness relies on uncertainty quantification that is both sharp (informative) and well-calibrated along the BO trajectory. In practice, GP kernel hyperparameters are unknown and are refit online from sequentially collected (non-i.i.d.) data, which can yield miscalibrated or overly conservative uncertainty and lies outside the fixed-kernel assumptions of standard BO regret theory. We propose Online Sharp-Calibrated Bayesian Optimization (OSCBO), a BO algorithm that adaptively balances GP sharpness and calibration by casting hyperparameter selection as a constrained online-learning problem. We also show that OSCBO preserves sublinear regret bounds by leveraging the theoretical guarantees of the underlying online learning algorithm. Empirically, OSCBO performs competitively across synthetic and real-world benchmarks, ranking among the strongest methods in final simple regret while maintaining robust cumulative-regret behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OSCBO算法，通过在线学习框架自适应平衡高斯过程的锐度和校准度，在非独立同分布数据下保持亚线性遗憾界，并取得优异的经验性能。
AI.motivation: 标准贝叶斯优化假设高斯过程核函数固定已知，但在实践中核超参数需从序列采集的非独立同分布数据中在线更新，导致不确定性量化不校准或过于保守，现有遗憾理论无法适用。
AI.method: 将超参数选择建模为约束在线学习问题，在贝叶斯优化框架下自适应平衡GP的锐度（信息量）和校准度，并利用在线学习算法的理论保证。
AI.result: 在合成和真实基准测试中，OSCBO在最终简单遗憾上排名最强，同时保持稳健的累积遗憾表现。
AI.conclusion: OSCBO有效解决了在线更新核超参数导致的不确定性问题，兼具理论保证和实际竞争力。

title: Controllability in preference-conditioned multi-objective reinforcement learning
summary: Multi-objective reinforcement learning (MORL) allows a user to express preference over outcomes in terms of the relative importance of the objectives, but standard metrics cannot capture whether changes in preference reliably change the agent's behavior in the intended way, a property termed controllability. As a result, preference-conditioned agents can score well on standard MORL metrics while being insensitive to the preference input. If the ability to control agents cannot be reliably assessed, the symbolic interface that MORL provides between user intent and agent behavior is broken. Mainstream MORL metrics alone fail to measure the controllability of preference-conditioned agents, motivating a complementary metric specifically designed to that end. We hope the results spur discussion in the community on existing evaluation protocols to consolidate advances in preference adaptation in MORL to larger and more complex problems.

AI.tldr: 现有MORL指标无法衡量偏好条件智能体的可控性（即偏好变化能否可靠地按预期改变行为），作者提出了一种补充性指标来专门评估可控性，并希望推动社区对评价协议的讨论。
AI.motivation: 标准MORL指标无法捕捉偏好变化是否可靠地按预期方式改变智能体行为（即可控性），导致偏好条件智能体可能在标准指标上表现良好却对偏好输入不敏感，破坏了用户意图与智能体行为之间的符号接口。
AI.method: 提出一种专门针对可控性设计的补充性评估指标，用于衡量偏好条件智能体的可控性。
AI.result: 主流MORL指标单独无法测量偏好条件智能体的可控性，现有评估协议存在缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 需要社区讨论并完善现有评估协议，以巩固偏好适应在MORL中的进展并扩展到更大更复杂的问题。

title: MulTaBench: Benchmarking Multimodal Tabular Learning with Text and Image
summary: Tabular Foundation Models have recently established the state of the art in supervised tabular learning, by leveraging pretraining to learn generalizable representations of numerical and categorical structured data. However, they lack native support for unstructured modalities such as text and image, and rely on frozen, pretrained embeddings to process them. On established Multimodal Tabular Learning benchmarks, we show that tuning the embeddings to the task improves performance. Existing benchmarks, however, often focus on the mere co-occurrence of modalities; this leads to high variance across datasets and masks the benefits of task-specific tuning. To address this gap, we introduce MulTaBench, a benchmark of 40 datasets, split equally between image-tabular and text-tabular tasks. We focus on predictive tasks where the modalities provide complementary predictive signal, and where generic embeddings lose critical information, necessitating Target-Aware Representations that are aligned with the task. Our experimental results demonstrate that the gains from target-aware representation tuning generalize across both text and image modalities, several tabular learners, encoder scales, and embedding dimensions. MulTaBench constitutes the largest image-tabular benchmarking effort to date, spanning high-impact domains such as healthcare and e-commerce. It is designed to enable the research of novel architectures which incorporate joint modeling and target-aware representations, paving the way for the development of novel Multimodal Tabular Foundation Models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MulTaBench基准，包含40个多模态表格数据集（图像-表格和文本-表格各20个），证明了在监督学习中微调多模态嵌入以对齐任务目标能显著提升性能，并发现现有基准因模态共现而非互补性而掩盖了任务特定调优的优势。
AI.motivation: 现有表格基础模型缺乏对非结构化模态（文本、图像）的原生支持，依赖冻结的预训练嵌入；现有多模态表格基准主要关注模态共现而非互补性，导致高方差并掩盖了任务特定调优的收益，亟需一个能评估目标感知表示价值的标准化基准。
AI.method: 构建MulTaBench基准（40个数据集，图像-表格和文本-表格各20个），聚焦模态提供互补预测信号的任务；在多种表格学习器、编码器尺度和嵌入维度上，对比冻结嵌入与任务特定微调嵌入的性能差异。
AI.result: 目标感知表示调优在文本和图像模态、多种表格学习器、编码器尺度和嵌入维度上均实现了性能提升；MulTaBench是迄今最大规模的图像-表格基准评估，覆盖医疗和电商等高影响力领域。
AI.conclusion: MulTaBench为联合建模和目标感知表示的新型架构研究提供了标准化平台，有助于推动多模态表格基础模型的发展。

title: Hierarchical End-to-End Taylor Bounds for Complete Neural Network Verification

AI.tldr: 本文提出HiTaB框架，利用二阶平滑性（Hessian及其Lipschitz常数）对光滑神经网络进行可达集过近似，构建了从零阶到二阶的统一边界层次，并通过曲率边界的逐层传播高效计算L_{\nabla^2 f}，首次将曲率的Lipschitz连续性系统性地应用于神经网络可达性分析。
AI.motivation: 现有针对光滑、二次可微神经网络的可达性分析方法最多利用二阶信息，未能系统性地利用更高阶信息，导致安全证书不够紧致。需要一种能利用曲率Lipschitz连续性的框架来获得更紧的过近似边界。
AI.method: 提出HiTaB框架，核心包括：(1) 利用Hessian矩阵∇²f及其Lipschitz常数L_{\nabla^2 f}捕捉二阶光滑性；(2) 建立零阶、一阶、二阶边界的统一层次结构，并给出高阶近似可证明改进的条件；(3) 通过逐层传播曲率边界，组合式地高效计算深度神经网络中的L_{\nabla^2 f}；(4) 将框架扩展至ℓ₂和ℓ_\infty约束输入集，并集成到分支定界验证流水线中。
AI.result: 据作者所知，HiTaB是首个系统性地利用曲率Lipschitz连续性的神经网络可达性分析框架，能够生成更紧致、信息量更丰富的安全证书。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用曲率的Lipschitz连续性，HiTaB能够在光滑神经网络的可达性分析中获得比现有方法更紧的过近似边界，为学习赋能物理系统的安全认证提供了更有效的工具。

title: Composing diffusion priors with explicit physical context via generative Gibbs sampling
summary: Pretrained diffusion models provide powerful learned priors, but in scientific sampling the target distribution often depends on physical context that is not fully represented by one generative model. We introduce Generative Gibbs for Physics-Aware Sampling (GG-PA), a training-free framework that formulates the composition of learned partial priors and explicit physical context as inference over a joint target distribution in an augmented state space. We derive a Gibbs sampler for this joint target, show that it is asymptotically exact as the diffusion time approaches zero, and prove that in settings with quadratic interactions it remains exact at finite diffusion times. We further introduce replica exchange over diffusion time to accelerate mixing. Experiments on a double-well system, a $φ^4$ lattice model, and atomistic peptide systems show that GG-PA recovers context-induced distribution shifts and emergent collective behavior in interacting systems using partial priors without retraining. These results demonstrate GG-PA as a practical approach for combining pretrained generative priors with explicit physical context.

AI.tldr: 提出GG-PA框架，通过吉布斯采样在增强状态空间中组合预训练扩散先验与显式物理上下文，无需重新训练即可实现物理感知的科学采样。
AI.motivation: 科学采样中目标分布往往依赖于生成模型无法完全表示的物理上下文，现有方法无法灵活组合预训练的部分先验与特定的物理约束。
AI.method: 在增强状态空间中定义联合目标分布，推导吉布斯采样器进行推断；理论证明扩散时间趋近零时渐近精确，二次交互场景下有限时间也精确；引入扩散时间上的副本交换加速混合。
AI.result: 在双阱系统、φ⁴晶格模型和原子肽系统上，GG-PA无需重新训练即可恢复上下文诱导的分布偏移和涌现集体行为。
AI.conclusion: GG-PA为结合预训练生成先验与显式物理上下文提供了一种实用且无需重新训练的方法。

title: A Random-Matrix Criterion for Initializing Gated Recurrent Neural Networks
summary: Proper weight initialization prior to training has historically been one of the key factors that helped kick off the deep learning revolution. Initialization is even more crucial in "reservoir computing", where the weights of a readout layer are learned linearly while the reservoir weights are fixed and largely determine the richness, stability and memory of the resulting dynamics. In the infinite-width limit it has been shown that meaningful initializations are those sitting at an effective critical point of the randomly initialized model. The phase transition is controlled by the weight variance $g^2$ and separates an ordered phase from a chaotic one where information progressively degrades. Here we derive a simple criterion to estimate the critical $g_c$ for a broad class of recurrent architectures and we show that it closely tracks the gain at which a gated-RNN reservoir achieves peak performance on a chaotic forecasting task. Finally, we argue that our criterion can serve as a design principle for future initialization schemes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种估计循环神经网络初始化临界点$g_c$的简单准则，该准则与门控RNN在混沌预测任务上的最优性能点高度吻合，可作为未来初始化方案的设计原则。
AI.motivation: 权重初始化是深度学习成功的关键因素之一，在储层计算中尤为重要，因为储层权重固定且决定了动力学的丰富性、稳定性和记忆能力。在无限宽度极限下，有意义的初始化位于随机初始化模型的有效临界点，该相变由权重方差$g^2$控制，区分有序相和信息逐渐退化的混沌相。
AI.method: 推导了一个简单准则来估计一大类循环架构的临界$g_c$值，并通过与门控RNN储层在混沌预测任务上的峰值性能点进行对比验证。
AI.result: 该方法能够紧密追踪门控RNN在混沌预测任务上达到最优性能时的增益参数。
AI.conclusion: 该准则可作为未来初始化方案的设计原则，为循环神经网络和储层计算的初始化提供理论指导。

title: BCJR-QAT: A Differentiable Relaxation of Trellis-Coded Weight Quantization
